authors_text: Ryo Toda,Hayato Itoh,Masahiro Oda,Yuichiro Hayashi,Yoshito Otake,Masahiro Hashimoto,Toshiaki Akashi,Shigeki Aoki,Kensaku Mori
title: Identifying Suspicious Regions of Covid-19 by Abnormality-Sensitive Activation Mapping
title_zh: 通过异常敏感激活图谱识别 Covid-19 的可疑区域
abstract: This paper presents a fully-automated method for the identification of suspicious regions of a coronavirus disease (COVID-19) on chest CT volumes. One major role of chest CT scanning in COVID-19 diagnoses is identification of an inflammation particular to the disease. This task is generally performed by radiologists through an interpretation of the CT volumes, however, because of the heavy workload, an automatic analysis method using a computer is desired. Most computer-aided diagnosis studies have addressed only a portion of the elements necessary for the identification. In this work, we realize the identification method through a classification task by using a 2.5-dimensional CNN with three-dimensional attention mechanisms. We visualize the suspicious regions by applying a backpropagation based on positive gradients to attention-weighted features. We perform experiments on an in-house dataset and two public datasets to reveal the generalization ability of the proposed method. The proposed architecture achieved AUCs of over 0.900 for all the datasets, and mean sensitivity $0.853 \pm 0.036$ and specificity $0.870 \pm 0.040$. The method can also identify notable lesions pointed out in the radiology report as suspicious regions.
summary: This paper presents a fully-automated method for the identification of suspicious regions of a coronavirus disease (COVID-19) on chest CT volumes. One major role of chest CT scanning in COVID-19 diagnoses is identification of an inflammation particular to the disease. This task is generally performed by radiologists through an interpretation of the CT volumes, however, because of the heavy workload, an automatic analysis method using a computer is desired. Most computer-aided diagnosis studies have addressed only a portion of the elements necessary for the identification. In this work, we realize the identification method through a classification task by using a 2.5-dimensional CNN with three-dimensional attention mechanisms. We visualize the suspicious regions by applying a backpropagation based on positive gradients to attention-weighted features. We perform experiments on an in-house dataset and two public datasets to reveal the generalization ability of the proposed method. The proposed architecture achieved AUCs of over 0.900 for all the datasets, and mean sensitivity $0.853 \pm 0.036$ and specificity $0.870 \pm 0.040$. The method can also identify notable lesions pointed out in the radiology report as suspicious regions.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种全自动方法，用于识别胸部 CT 卷上冠状病毒疾病 (COVID-19) 的可疑区域。胸部 CT 扫描在 COVID-19 诊断中的一个主要作用是识别该疾病特有的炎症。这项任务通常由放射科医生通过解释 CT 体积来完成，然而，由于工作量很大，因此需要一种使用计算机的自动分析方法。大多数计算机辅助诊断研究仅涉及识别所需的一部分要素。在这项工作中，我们通过使用具有三维注意力机制的 2.5 维 CNN 来实现分类任务的识别方法。我们通过将基于正梯度的反向传播应用于注意力加权特征来可视化可疑区域。我们在内部数据集和两个公共数据集上进行实验，以揭示所提出方法的泛化能力。所提出的架构在所有数据集上实现了超过 0.900 的 AUC，平均灵敏度为 $0.853 \pm 0.036$，特异性为 $0.870 \pm 0.040$。该方法还可以将放射学报告中指出的显着病变识别为可疑区域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种全自动方法，通过异常敏感的激活映射技术在胸部CT影像中识别新冠病毒（COVID-19）的可疑区域。
AI.motivation: 胸部CT扫描在COVID-19诊断中用于识别特异性炎症，但依赖放射科医生手动分析导致工作量过大，现有计算机辅助诊断方法未能全面覆盖识别需求。
AI.method: 采用2.5维卷积神经网络（CNN）结合三维注意力机制，通过基于正梯度的反向传播算法对注意力加权特征进行可视化，实现可疑区域定位。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上均取得AUC超过0.900的性能，平均灵敏度为0.853±0.036，特异性为0.870±0.040，可准确识别放射科报告中指出的显著病变区域。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在自动化识别COVID-19可疑区域方面表现优异，具有临床实用价值，能够有效辅助放射科医生提高诊断效率。

authors_text: Ruijie Wang,Zheng Li,Jingfeng Yang,Tianyu Cao,Chao Zhang,Bing Yin,Tarek Abdelzaher
title: Mutually-paced Knowledge Distillation for Cross-lingual Temporal Knowledge Graph Reasoning
title_zh: 跨语言时态知识图推理的同步知识蒸馏
comment: This paper is accepted by The Web Conference 2023
comments: This paper is accepted by The Web Conference 2023
abstract: This paper investigates cross-lingual temporal knowledge graph reasoning problem, which aims to facilitate reasoning on Temporal Knowledge Graphs (TKGs) in low-resource languages by transfering knowledge from TKGs in high-resource ones. The cross-lingual distillation ability across TKGs becomes increasingly crucial, in light of the unsatisfying performance of existing reasoning methods on those severely incomplete TKGs, especially in low-resource languages. However, it poses tremendous challenges in two aspects. First, the cross-lingual alignments, which serve as bridges for knowledge transfer, are usually too scarce to transfer sufficient knowledge between two TKGs. Second, temporal knowledge discrepancy of the aligned entities, especially when alignments are unreliable, can mislead the knowledge distillation process. We correspondingly propose a mutually-paced knowledge distillation model MP-KD, where a teacher network trained on a source TKG can guide the training of a student network on target TKGs with an alignment module. Concretely, to deal with the scarcity issue, MP-KD generates pseudo alignments between TKGs based on the temporal information extracted by our representation module. To maximize the efficacy of knowledge transfer and control the noise caused by the temporal knowledge discrepancy, we enhance MP-KD with a temporal cross-lingual attention mechanism to dynamically estimate the alignment strength. The two procedures are mutually paced along with model training. Extensive experiments on twelve cross-lingual TKG transfer tasks in the EventKG benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed MP-KD method.
summary: This paper investigates cross-lingual temporal knowledge graph reasoning problem, which aims to facilitate reasoning on Temporal Knowledge Graphs (TKGs) in low-resource languages by transfering knowledge from TKGs in high-resource ones. The cross-lingual distillation ability across TKGs becomes increasingly crucial, in light of the unsatisfying performance of existing reasoning methods on those severely incomplete TKGs, especially in low-resource languages. However, it poses tremendous challenges in two aspects. First, the cross-lingual alignments, which serve as bridges for knowledge transfer, are usually too scarce to transfer sufficient knowledge between two TKGs. Second, temporal knowledge discrepancy of the aligned entities, especially when alignments are unreliable, can mislead the knowledge distillation process. We correspondingly propose a mutually-paced knowledge distillation model MP-KD, where a teacher network trained on a source TKG can guide the training of a student network on target TKGs with an alignment module. Concretely, to deal with the scarcity issue, MP-KD generates pseudo alignments between TKGs based on the temporal information extracted by our representation module. To maximize the efficacy of knowledge transfer and control the noise caused by the temporal knowledge discrepancy, we enhance MP-KD with a temporal cross-lingual attention mechanism to dynamically estimate the alignment strength. The two procedures are mutually paced along with model training. Extensive experiments on twelve cross-lingual TKG transfer tasks in the EventKG benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed MP-KD method.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了跨语言时间知识图推理问题，旨在通过迁移高资源语言中的时间知识图（TKG）的知识来促进低资源语言中的时间知识图（TKG）的推理。鉴于现有推理方法在那些严重不完整的 TKG 上的性能不令人满意，特别是在资源匮乏的语言中，跨 TKG 的跨语言蒸馏能力变得越来越重要。然而，它在两个方面提出了巨大的挑战。首先，作为知识转移桥梁的跨语言对齐通常太稀缺，无法在两个 TKG 之间转移足够的知识。其次，对齐实体的时间知识差异，尤其是当对齐不可靠时，可能会误导知识蒸馏过程。我们相应地提出了一种相互进度的知识蒸馏模型 MP-KD，其中在源 TKG 上训练的教师网络可以通过对齐模块指导学生网络在目标 TKG 上的训练。具体来说，为了解决稀缺问题，MP-KD 根据我们的表示模块提取的时间信息生成 TKG 之间的伪对齐。为了最大限度地提高知识转移的效率并控制由时间知识差异引起的噪声，我们通过时间跨语言注意机制来增强 MP-KD，以动态估计对齐强度。这两个过程与模型训练一起同步进行。在 EventKG 基准测试中对 12 个跨语言 TKG 迁移任务进行的大量实验证明了所提出的 MP-KD 方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨语言时态知识图谱推理方法MP-KD，通过知识蒸馏解决低资源语言中时态知识图谱推理性能不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在低资源语言的不完整时态知识图谱（TKG）上表现不佳，主要受限于跨语言对齐稀缺性和时态知识差异导致的噪声干扰。
AI.method: 构建教师-学生网络架构，结合伪对齐生成模块与时态跨语言注意力机制，通过动态评估对齐强度实现知识蒸馏过程的双向调控。
AI.result: 在EventKG基准的12个跨语言TKG迁移任务中，MP-KD方法显著优于现有技术，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MP-KD通过伪对齐生成与时态注意力机制的协同优化，有效解决了跨语言时态知识迁移中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Xianfan Gu,Chuan Wen,Weirui Ye,Jiaming Song,Yang Gao
title: Seer: Language Instructed Video Prediction with Latent Diffusion Models
title_zh: Seer：使用潜在扩散模型的语言指导视频预测
abstract: Imagining the future trajectory is the key for robots to make sound planning and successfully reach their goals. Therefore, text-conditioned video prediction (TVP) is an essential task to facilitate general robot policy learning. To tackle this task and empower robots with the ability to foresee the future, we propose a sample and computation-efficient model, named \textbf{Seer}, by inflating the pretrained text-to-image (T2I) stable diffusion models along the temporal axis. We enhance the U-Net and language conditioning model by incorporating computation-efficient spatial-temporal attention. Furthermore, we introduce a novel Frame Sequential Text Decomposer module that dissects a sentence's global instruction into temporally aligned sub-instructions, ensuring precise integration into each frame of generation. Our framework allows us to effectively leverage the extensive prior knowledge embedded in pretrained T2I models across the frames. With the adaptable-designed architecture, Seer makes it possible to generate high-fidelity, coherent, and instruction-aligned video frames by fine-tuning a few layers on a small amount of data. The experimental results on Something Something V2 (SSv2), Bridgedata and EpicKitchens-100 datasets demonstrate our superior video prediction performance with around 480-GPU hours versus CogVideo with over 12,480-GPU hours: achieving the 31% FVD improvement compared to the current SOTA model on SSv2 and 83.7% average preference in the human evaluation.
summary: Imagining the future trajectory is the key for robots to make sound planning and successfully reach their goals. Therefore, text-conditioned video prediction (TVP) is an essential task to facilitate general robot policy learning. To tackle this task and empower robots with the ability to foresee the future, we propose a sample and computation-efficient model, named \textbf{Seer}, by inflating the pretrained text-to-image (T2I) stable diffusion models along the temporal axis. We enhance the U-Net and language conditioning model by incorporating computation-efficient spatial-temporal attention. Furthermore, we introduce a novel Frame Sequential Text Decomposer module that dissects a sentence's global instruction into temporally aligned sub-instructions, ensuring precise integration into each frame of generation. Our framework allows us to effectively leverage the extensive prior knowledge embedded in pretrained T2I models across the frames. With the adaptable-designed architecture, Seer makes it possible to generate high-fidelity, coherent, and instruction-aligned video frames by fine-tuning a few layers on a small amount of data. The experimental results on Something Something V2 (SSv2), Bridgedata and EpicKitchens-100 datasets demonstrate our superior video prediction performance with around 480-GPU hours versus CogVideo with over 12,480-GPU hours: achieving the 31% FVD improvement compared to the current SOTA model on SSv2 and 83.7% average preference in the human evaluation.
abstract_zh: 想象未来的轨迹是机器人做出合理规划并成功实现目标的关键。因此，文本条件视频预测（TVP）是促进通用机器人策略学习的一项重要任务。为了解决这一任务并赋予机器人预见未来的能力，我们提出了一个样本和计算高效的模型，名为 \textbf{Seer}，通过沿时间轴膨胀预训练的文本到图像（T2I）稳定扩散模型。我们通过结合计算高效的时空注意力来增强 U-Net 和语言调节模型。此外，我们引入了一种新颖的帧顺序文本分解器模块，该模块将句子的全局指令分解为时间对齐的子指令，确保精确集成到每个生成帧中。我们的框架使我们能够有效地利用跨框架的预训练 T2I 模型中嵌入的广泛先验知识。凭借适应性设计的架构，Seer 可以通过在少量数据上微调几个层来生成高保真、连贯且指令对齐的视频帧。 Something Something V2 (SSv2)、Bridgedata 和 EpicKitchens-100 数据集上的实验结果表明，我们在约 480 个 GPU 小时的视频预测性能优于超过 12,480 个 GPU 小时的 CogVideo：与 SSv2 上的当前 SOTA 模型相比，实现了 31% 的 FVD 改进，在人类评估中实现了 83.7% 的平均偏好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Seer的高效文本条件视频预测模型，通过扩展预训练文本到图像扩散模型，实现机器人未来轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 机器人需要通过预测未来轨迹来达成目标，但现有方法计算成本高且效率低，需开发更高效的视频预测框架。
AI.method: 将预训练文本到图像扩散模型沿时间轴扩展，改进U-Net与语言条件模块的时空注意力机制，并引入帧序列文本分解器模块解析全局指令为时间对齐子指令。
AI.result: 在SSv2、Bridgedata和EpicKitchens-100数据集上，Seer相比CogVideo减少96%的GPU小时消耗，FVD指标提升31%，人类评估偏好率达83.7%。
AI.conclusion: Seer通过高效架构设计和模块创新，在多个基准数据集上实现了更优的视频预测性能，验证了其在机器人未来轨迹预测中的有效性。

authors_text: Md Solimul Chowdhury,Cayden R. Codel,Marijn J. H. Heule
title: A Linear Weight Transfer Rule for Local Search
title_zh: 本地搜索的线性权重传递规则
abstract: The Divide and Distribute Fixed Weights algorithm (ddfw) is a dynamic local search SAT-solving algorithm that transfers weight from satisfied to falsified clauses in local minima. ddfw is remarkably effective on several hard combinatorial instances. Yet, despite its success, it has received little study since its debut in 2005. In this paper, we propose three modifications to the base algorithm: a linear weight transfer method that moves a dynamic amount of weight between clauses in local minima, an adjustment to how satisfied clauses are chosen in local minima to give weight, and a weighted-random method of selecting variables to flip. We implemented our modifications to ddfw on top of the solver yalsat. Our experiments show that our modifications boost the performance compared to the original ddfw algorithm on multiple benchmarks, including those from the past three years of SAT competitions. Moreover, our improved solver exclusively solves hard combinatorial instances that refute a conjecture on the lower bound of two Van der Waerden numbers set forth by Ahmed et al. (2014), and it performs well on a hard graph-coloring instance that has been open for over three decades.
summary: The Divide and Distribute Fixed Weights algorithm (ddfw) is a dynamic local search SAT-solving algorithm that transfers weight from satisfied to falsified clauses in local minima. ddfw is remarkably effective on several hard combinatorial instances. Yet, despite its success, it has received little study since its debut in 2005. In this paper, we propose three modifications to the base algorithm: a linear weight transfer method that moves a dynamic amount of weight between clauses in local minima, an adjustment to how satisfied clauses are chosen in local minima to give weight, and a weighted-random method of selecting variables to flip. We implemented our modifications to ddfw on top of the solver yalsat. Our experiments show that our modifications boost the performance compared to the original ddfw algorithm on multiple benchmarks, including those from the past three years of SAT competitions. Moreover, our improved solver exclusively solves hard combinatorial instances that refute a conjecture on the lower bound of two Van der Waerden numbers set forth by Ahmed et al. (2014), and it performs well on a hard graph-coloring instance that has been open for over three decades.
abstract_zh: 划分和分配固定权重算法 (ddfw) 是一种动态局部搜索 SAT 求解算法，可将权重从局部最小值中的满足子句转移到伪造子句。 ddfw 在几个硬组合实例上非常有效。然而，尽管它取得了成功，但自 2005 年首次亮相以来，却很少受到研究。在本文中，我们提出了对基本算法的三项修改：一种线性权重转移方法，在局部极小值的子句之间移动动态量的权重，调整如何在局部极小值中选择满足的子句来赋予权重，以及选择要翻转的变量的加权随机方法。我们在求解器 yalsat 之上实现了对 ddfw 的修改。我们的实验表明，与原始 ddfw 算法相比，我们的修改在多个基准测试（包括过去三年的 SAT 比赛的基准测试）上提高了性能。此外，我们改进的求解器专门解决了硬组合实例，这些实例反驳了 Ahmed 等人提出的关于两个 Van der Waerden 数下界的猜想。 (2014)，它在开放了三十多年的硬图着色实例上表现良好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出对动态局部搜索SAT求解算法ddfw的三项改进，以提升其在组合优化问题上的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管ddfw算法在解决困难组合实例上表现优异，但自2005年提出后研究较少，需进一步优化以应对最新基准测试和开放性问题。
AI.method: 设计线性权重转移机制动态调整子句权重，改进局部极小值中满足子句的选择策略，并采用加权随机变量翻转方法，基于yalsat求解器实现改进。
AI.result: 改进后的求解器在多类基准测试中性能优于原始ddfw，成功解决Ahmed等提出的范德华德数下界猜想相关难题及三十年未解的图着色实例。
AI.conclusion: 线性权重转移规则有效提升了局部搜索算法性能，为解决组合优化领域开放性问题提供了新方法。

authors_text: Xiaoyan Qian,Chang Liu,Xiaojuan Qi,Siew-Chong Tan,Edmund Lam,Ngai Wong
title: Context-Aware Transformer for 3D Point Cloud Automatic Annotation
title_zh: 用于 3D 点云自动注释的上下文感知转换器
abstract: 3D automatic annotation has received increased attention since manually annotating 3D point clouds is laborious. However, existing methods are usually complicated, e.g., pipelined training for 3D foreground/background segmentation, cylindrical object proposals, and point completion. Furthermore, they often overlook the inter-object feature relation that is particularly informative to hard samples for 3D annotation. To this end, we propose a simple yet effective end-to-end Context-Aware Transformer (CAT) as an automated 3D-box labeler to generate precise 3D box annotations from 2D boxes, trained with a small number of human annotations. We adopt the general encoder-decoder architecture, where the CAT encoder consists of an intra-object encoder (local) and an inter-object encoder (global), performing self-attention along the sequence and batch dimensions, respectively. The former models intra-object interactions among points, and the latter extracts feature relations among different objects, thus boosting scene-level understanding. Via local and global encoders, CAT can generate high-quality 3D box annotations with a streamlined workflow, allowing it to outperform existing state-of-the-art by up to 1.79% 3D AP on the hard task of the KITTI test set.
summary: 3D automatic annotation has received increased attention since manually annotating 3D point clouds is laborious. However, existing methods are usually complicated, e.g., pipelined training for 3D foreground/background segmentation, cylindrical object proposals, and point completion. Furthermore, they often overlook the inter-object feature relation that is particularly informative to hard samples for 3D annotation. To this end, we propose a simple yet effective end-to-end Context-Aware Transformer (CAT) as an automated 3D-box labeler to generate precise 3D box annotations from 2D boxes, trained with a small number of human annotations. We adopt the general encoder-decoder architecture, where the CAT encoder consists of an intra-object encoder (local) and an inter-object encoder (global), performing self-attention along the sequence and batch dimensions, respectively. The former models intra-object interactions among points, and the latter extracts feature relations among different objects, thus boosting scene-level understanding. Via local and global encoders, CAT can generate high-quality 3D box annotations with a streamlined workflow, allowing it to outperform existing state-of-the-art by up to 1.79% 3D AP on the hard task of the KITTI test set.
abstract_zh: 由于手动注释 3D 点云非常费力，因此 3D 自动注释受到越来越多的关注。然而，现有的方法通常很复杂，例如 3D 前景/背景分割的流水线训练、圆柱对象建议和点完成。此外，他们经常忽视对象间的特征关系，而这对于 3D 注释的硬样本来说尤其有用。为此，我们提出了一种简单而有效的端到端上下文感知转换器（CAT）作为自动 3D 框标记器，用于从 2D 框生成精确的 3D 框注释，并使用少量人工注释进行训练。我们采用通用的编码器-解码器架构，其中CAT编码器由对象内编码器（本地）和对象间编码器（全局）组成，分别沿序列和批量维度执行自注意力。前者对点之间的对象内交互进行建模，后者提取不同对象之间的特征关系，从而促进场景级理解。通过本地和全局编码器，CAT 可以通过简化的工作流程生成高质量的 3D 框注释，使其在 KITTI 测试集的艰巨任务上比现有最先进的 3D AP 性能高出高达 1.79%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的上下文感知Transformer（CAT），用于从2D框生成精确的3D框标注，解决3D点云自动标注问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D标注方法流程复杂且忽略物体间特征关系，导致对困难样本标注效果不佳，需设计更高效且考虑全局关系的模型。
AI.method: 采用编码器-解码器架构，包含局部（物体内部点交互）和全局（物体间特征关系）编码器，通过自注意力机制实现上下文感知的3D框生成。
AI.result: 在KITTI测试集的困难任务中，CAT相较现有最优方法提升1.79%的3D平均精度（AP）。
AI.conclusion: CAT通过建模局部与全局特征关系，以简洁流程实现高精度3D标注，验证了上下文感知设计的有效性。

search_text: Context-Aware Transformer for 3D Point Cloud Automatic Annotation 用于 3D 点云自动注释的上下文感知转换器 3D automatic annotation has received increased attention since manually annotating 3D point clouds is laborious. However, existing methods are usually complicated, e.g., pipelined training for 3D foreground/background segmentation, cylindrical object proposals, and point completion. Furthermore, they often overlook the inter-object feature relation that is particularly informative to hard samples for 3D annotation. To this end, we propose a simple yet effective end-to-end Context-Aware Transformer (CAT) as an automated 3D-box labeler to generate precise 3D box annotations from 2D boxes, trained with a small number of human annotations. We adopt the general encoder-decoder architecture, where the CAT encoder consists of an intra-object encoder (local) and an inter-object encoder (global), performing self-attention along the sequence and batch dimensions, respectively. The former models intra-object interactions among points, and the latter extracts feature relations among different objects, thus boosting scene-level understanding. Via local and global encoders, CAT can generate high-quality 3D box annotations with a streamlined workflow, allowing it to outperform existing state-of-the-art by up to 1.79% 3D AP on the hard task of the KITTI test set. 由于手动注释 3D 点云非常费力，因此 3D 自动注释受到越来越多的关注。然而，现有的方法通常很复杂，例如 3D 前景/背景分割的流水线训练、圆柱对象建议和点完成。此外，他们经常忽视对象间的特征关系，而这对于 3D 注释的硬样本来说尤其有用。为此，我们提出了一种简单而有效的端到端上下文感知转换器（CAT）作为自动 3D 框标记器，用于从 2D 框生成精确的 3D 框注释，并使用少量人工注释进行训练。我们采用通用的编码器-解码器架构，其中CAT编码器由对象内编码器（本地）和对象间编码器（全局）组成，分别沿序列和批量维度执行自注意力。前者对点之间的对象内交互进行建模，后者提取不同对象之间的特征关系，从而促进场景级理解。通过本地和全局编码器，CAT 可以通过简化的工作流程生成高质量的 3D 框注释，使其在 KITTI 测试集的艰巨任务上比现有最先进的 3D AP 性能高出高达 1.79%。 本文提出一种端到端的上下文感知Transformer（CAT），用于从2D框生成精确的3D框标注，解决3D点云自动标注问题。 Xiaoyan Qian,Chang Liu,Xiaojuan Qi,Siew-Chong Tan,Edmund Lam,Ngai Wong cs.CV

authors_text: Minting Pan,Xiangming Zhu,Yitao Zheng,Yunbo Wang,Xiaokang Yang
title: Model-Based Reinforcement Learning with Isolated Imaginations
title_zh: 具有独立想象力的基于模型的强化学习
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.13817
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.13817
abstract: World models learn the consequences of actions in vision-based interactive systems. However, in practical scenarios like autonomous driving, noncontrollable dynamics that are independent or sparsely dependent on action signals often exist, making it challenging to learn effective world models. To address this issue, we propose Iso-Dream++, a model-based reinforcement learning approach that has two main contributions. First, we optimize the inverse dynamics to encourage the world model to isolate controllable state transitions from the mixed spatiotemporal variations of the environment. Second, we perform policy optimization based on the decoupled latent imaginations, where we roll out noncontrollable states into the future and adaptively associate them with the current controllable state. This enables long-horizon visuomotor control tasks to benefit from isolating mixed dynamics sources in the wild, such as self-driving cars that can anticipate the movement of other vehicles, thereby avoiding potential risks. On top of our previous work, we further consider the sparse dependencies between controllable and noncontrollable states, address the training collapse problem of state decoupling, and validate our approach in transfer learning setups. Our empirical study demonstrates that Iso-Dream++ outperforms existing reinforcement learning models significantly on CARLA and DeepMind Control.
summary: World models learn the consequences of actions in vision-based interactive systems. However, in practical scenarios like autonomous driving, noncontrollable dynamics that are independent or sparsely dependent on action signals often exist, making it challenging to learn effective world models. To address this issue, we propose Iso-Dream++, a model-based reinforcement learning approach that has two main contributions. First, we optimize the inverse dynamics to encourage the world model to isolate controllable state transitions from the mixed spatiotemporal variations of the environment. Second, we perform policy optimization based on the decoupled latent imaginations, where we roll out noncontrollable states into the future and adaptively associate them with the current controllable state. This enables long-horizon visuomotor control tasks to benefit from isolating mixed dynamics sources in the wild, such as self-driving cars that can anticipate the movement of other vehicles, thereby avoiding potential risks. On top of our previous work, we further consider the sparse dependencies between controllable and noncontrollable states, address the training collapse problem of state decoupling, and validate our approach in transfer learning setups. Our empirical study demonstrates that Iso-Dream++ outperforms existing reinforcement learning models significantly on CARLA and DeepMind Control.
abstract_zh: 世界模型学习基于视觉的交互系统中行为的后果。然而，在自动驾驶等实际场景中，经常存在独立或稀疏依赖于动作信号的不可控动态，这使得学习有效的世界模型变得具有挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Iso-Dream++，一种基于模型的强化学习方法，有两个主要贡献。首先，我们优化逆动力学，以鼓励世界模型将可控状态转换与环境的混合时空变化隔离开来。其次，我们基于解耦的潜在想象进行策略优化，将不可控状态推向未来，并自适应地将它们与当前可控状态相关联。这使得长视距视觉运动控制任务能够从野外隔离混合动力源中受益，例如可以预测其他车辆运动的自动驾驶汽车，从而避免潜在风险。在我们之前的工作的基础上，我们进一步考虑可控和不可控状态之间的稀疏依赖关系，解决状态解耦的训练崩溃问题，并验证我们在迁移学习设置中的方法。我们的实证研究表明，Iso-Dream++ 在 CARLA 和 DeepMind Control 上显着优于现有的强化学习模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型的强化学习方法Iso-Dream++，旨在解决复杂环境中非可控动态对世界模型学习的干扰问题，提升视觉运动控制任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 在现实场景（如自动驾驶）中，环境动态常包含与动作信号无关或稀疏相关的非可控因素，导致传统世界模型难以有效学习。
AI.method: 通过优化逆动力学分离可控状态转移，并基于解耦的潜在想象进行策略优化，结合稀疏依赖关系建模与状态解耦训练稳定性改进。
AI.result: 在CARLA和DeepMind Control基准测试中，Iso-Dream++显著优于现有强化学习模型，尤其在长时域视觉运动控制任务中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过隔离混合动态源，有效提升了复杂环境下的决策安全性与任务执行能力，为自动驾驶等场景提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ruoqi Yin,Jianqin Yin
title: Global Relation Modeling and Refinement for Bottom-Up Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: 自下而上人体姿势估计的全局关系建模和细化
abstract: In this paper, we concern on the bottom-up paradigm in multi-person pose estimation (MPPE). Most previous bottom-up methods try to consider the relation of instances to identify different body parts during the post processing, while ignoring to model the relation among instances or environment in the feature learning process. In addition, most existing works adopt the operations of upsampling and downsampling. During the sampling process, there will be a problem of misalignment with the source features, resulting in deviations in the keypoint features learned by the model. To overcome the above limitations, we propose a convolutional neural network for bottom-up human pose estimation. It invovles two basic modules: (i) Global Relation Modeling (GRM) module globally learns relation (e.g., environment context, instance interactive information) among region of image by fusing multiple stages features in the feature learning process. It combines with the spatial-channel attention mechanism, which focuses on achieving adaptability in spatial and channel dimensions. (ii) Multi-branch Feature Align (MFA) module aggregates features from multiple branches to align fused feature and obtain refined local keypoint representation. Our model has the ability to focus on different granularity from local to global regions, which significantly boosts the performance of the multi-person pose estimation. Our results on the COCO and CrowdPose datasets demonstrate that it is an efficient framework for multi-person pose estimation.
summary: In this paper, we concern on the bottom-up paradigm in multi-person pose estimation (MPPE). Most previous bottom-up methods try to consider the relation of instances to identify different body parts during the post processing, while ignoring to model the relation among instances or environment in the feature learning process. In addition, most existing works adopt the operations of upsampling and downsampling. During the sampling process, there will be a problem of misalignment with the source features, resulting in deviations in the keypoint features learned by the model. To overcome the above limitations, we propose a convolutional neural network for bottom-up human pose estimation. It invovles two basic modules: (i) Global Relation Modeling (GRM) module globally learns relation (e.g., environment context, instance interactive information) among region of image by fusing multiple stages features in the feature learning process. It combines with the spatial-channel attention mechanism, which focuses on achieving adaptability in spatial and channel dimensions. (ii) Multi-branch Feature Align (MFA) module aggregates features from multiple branches to align fused feature and obtain refined local keypoint representation. Our model has the ability to focus on different granularity from local to global regions, which significantly boosts the performance of the multi-person pose estimation. Our results on the COCO and CrowdPose datasets demonstrate that it is an efficient framework for multi-person pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们关注多人姿态估计（MPPE）中的自下而上范式。以前的大多数自下而上的方法试图在后处理过程中考虑实例的关系来识别不同的身体部位，而忽略了在特征学习过程中对实例或环境之间的关系进行建模。另外，现有作品大多采用上采样和下采样的操作。在采样过程中，会出现与源特征未对齐的问题，导致模型学习到的关键点特征出现偏差。为了克服上述限制，我们提出了一种用于自下而上人体姿势估计的卷积神经网络。它涉及两个基本模块：（i）全局关系建模（GRM）模块通过融合特征学习过程中的多个阶段特征来全局学习图像区域之间的关系（例如，环境上下文、实例交互信息）。它与空间通道注意力机制相结合，侧重于实现空间和通道维度的适应性。 （ii）多分支特征对齐（MFA）模块聚合来自多个分支的特征以对齐融合特征并获得细化的局部关键点表示。我们的模型能够关注从局部到全局区域的不同粒度，这显着提高了多人姿态估计的性能。我们在 COCO 和 CrowdPose 数据集上的结果表明，它是多人姿势估计的有效框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于全局关系建模和特征对齐的卷积神经网络，用于改进多人姿态估计中的自下而上方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自下而上方法在特征学习阶段忽视实例间关系和环境上下文，且上采样/下采样操作易导致特征错位，影响关键点检测精度。
AI.method: 设计全局关系建模模块（GRM）融合多阶段特征以捕捉实例交互与环境信息，并结合空间-通道注意力机制；提出多分支特征对齐模块（MFA）聚合多分支特征以获得精炼的关键点表示。
AI.result: 在COCO和CrowdPose数据集上验证，该框架显著提升多人姿态估计性能，证明其有效性与高效性。

search_text: Global Relation Modeling and Refinement for Bottom-Up Human Pose Estimation 自下而上人体姿势估计的全局关系建模和细化 In this paper, we concern on the bottom-up paradigm in multi-person pose estimation (MPPE). Most previous bottom-up methods try to consider the relation of instances to identify different body parts during the post processing, while ignoring to model the relation among instances or environment in the feature learning process. In addition, most existing works adopt the operations of upsampling and downsampling. During the sampling process, there will be a problem of misalignment with the source features, resulting in deviations in the keypoint features learned by the model. To overcome the above limitations, we propose a convolutional neural network for bottom-up human pose estimation. It invovles two basic modules: (i) Global Relation Modeling (GRM) module globally learns relation (e.g., environment context, instance interactive information) among region of image by fusing multiple stages features in the feature learning process. It combines with the spatial-channel attention mechanism, which focuses on achieving adaptability in spatial and channel dimensions. (ii) Multi-branch Feature Align (MFA) module aggregates features from multiple branches to align fused feature and obtain refined local keypoint representation. Our model has the ability to focus on different granularity from local to global regions, which significantly boosts the performance of the multi-person pose estimation. Our results on the COCO and CrowdPose datasets demonstrate that it is an efficient framework for multi-person pose estimation. 在本文中，我们关注多人姿态估计（MPPE）中的自下而上范式。以前的大多数自下而上的方法试图在后处理过程中考虑实例的关系来识别不同的身体部位，而忽略了在特征学习过程中对实例或环境之间的关系进行建模。另外，现有作品大多采用上采样和下采样的操作。在采样过程中，会出现与源特征未对齐的问题，导致模型学习到的关键点特征出现偏差。为了克服上述限制，我们提出了一种用于自下而上人体姿势估计的卷积神经网络。它涉及两个基本模块：（i）全局关系建模（GRM）模块通过融合特征学习过程中的多个阶段特征来全局学习图像区域之间的关系（例如，环境上下文、实例交互信息）。它与空间通道注意力机制相结合，侧重于实现空间和通道维度的适应性。 （ii）多分支特征对齐（MFA）模块聚合来自多个分支的特征以对齐融合特征并获得细化的局部关键点表示。我们的模型能够关注从局部到全局区域的不同粒度，这显着提高了多人姿态估计的性能。我们在 COCO 和 CrowdPose 数据集上的结果表明，它是多人姿势估计的有效框架。 本文提出一种基于全局关系建模和特征对齐的卷积神经网络，用于改进多人姿态估计中的自下而上方法。 Ruoqi Yin,Jianqin Yin cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Karren Yang,Ting-Yao Hu,Jen-Hao Rick Chang,Hema Swetha Koppula,Oncel Tuzel
title: Text is All You Need: Personalizing ASR Models using Controllable Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 您只需要文本：使用可控语音合成个性化 ASR 模型
abstract: Adapting generic speech recognition models to specific individuals is a challenging problem due to the scarcity of personalized data. Recent works have proposed boosting the amount of training data using personalized text-to-speech synthesis. Here, we ask two fundamental questions about this strategy: when is synthetic data effective for personalization, and why is it effective in those cases? To address the first question, we adapt a state-of-the-art automatic speech recognition (ASR) model to target speakers from four benchmark datasets representative of different speaker types. We show that ASR personalization with synthetic data is effective in all cases, but particularly when (i) the target speaker is underrepresented in the global data, and (ii) the capacity of the global model is limited. To address the second question of why personalized synthetic data is effective, we use controllable speech synthesis to generate speech with varied styles and content. Surprisingly, we find that the text content of the synthetic data, rather than style, is important for speaker adaptation. These results lead us to propose a data selection strategy for ASR personalization based on speech content.
summary: Adapting generic speech recognition models to specific individuals is a challenging problem due to the scarcity of personalized data. Recent works have proposed boosting the amount of training data using personalized text-to-speech synthesis. Here, we ask two fundamental questions about this strategy: when is synthetic data effective for personalization, and why is it effective in those cases? To address the first question, we adapt a state-of-the-art automatic speech recognition (ASR) model to target speakers from four benchmark datasets representative of different speaker types. We show that ASR personalization with synthetic data is effective in all cases, but particularly when (i) the target speaker is underrepresented in the global data, and (ii) the capacity of the global model is limited. To address the second question of why personalized synthetic data is effective, we use controllable speech synthesis to generate speech with varied styles and content. Surprisingly, we find that the text content of the synthetic data, rather than style, is important for speaker adaptation. These results lead us to propose a data selection strategy for ASR personalization based on speech content.
abstract_zh: 由于个性化数据的稀缺，使通用语音识别模型适应特定个体是一个具有挑战性的问题。最近的工作提出使用个性化文本到语音合成来增加训练数据量。在这里，我们提出有关该策略的两个基本问题：合成数据何时对个性化有效，以及为什么在这些情况下有效？为了解决第一个问题，我们采用最先进的自动语音识别（ASR）模型来从代表不同说话人类型的四个基准数据集中定位说话人。我们证明，使用合成数据进行 ASR 个性化在所有情况下都是有效的，特别是当 (i) 目标说话者在全局数据中代表性不足，以及 (ii) 全局模型的容量有限时。为了解决为什么个性化合成数据有效的第二个问题，我们使用可控语音合成来生成不同风格和内容的语音。令人惊讶的是，我们发现合成数据的文本内容（而不是风格）对于说话者适应很重要。这些结果促使我们提出一种基于语音内容的 ASR 个性化数据选择策略。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过可控语音合成生成的文本数据，对通用语音识别模型进行个性化适配。
AI.motivation: 由于个性化数据稀缺，现有研究尝试用个性化文本到语音合成数据提升ASR模型适配效果，但缺乏对合成数据有效性条件及原理的系统分析。
AI.method: 在四个基准数据集上适配前沿ASR模型，通过可控语音合成生成不同风格和内容的语音数据，分析合成数据有效性的影响因素。
AI.result: 合成数据在所有场景下均有效，尤其当目标说话人全球数据不足或模型容量有限时；发现文本内容而非语音风格是影响适配效果的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 文本内容是合成数据驱动ASR个性化的核心要素，据此提出基于内容的个性化数据选择策略。

authors_text: Fan Yang,Lei Hu,Xinwu Liu,Shuangping Huang,Zhenghui Gu
title: A large-scale dataset for end-to-end table recognition in the wild
title_zh: 用于野外端到端表格识别的大规模数据集
abstract: Table recognition (TR) is one of the research hotspots in pattern recognition, which aims to extract information from tables in an image. Common table recognition tasks include table detection (TD), table structure recognition (TSR) and table content recognition (TCR). TD is to locate tables in the image, TCR recognizes text content, and TSR recognizes spatial ogical structure. Currently, the end-to-end TR in real scenarios, accomplishing the three sub-tasks simultaneously, is yet an unexplored research area. One major factor that inhibits researchers is the lack of a benchmark dataset. To this end, we propose a new large-scale dataset named Table Recognition Set (TabRecSet) with diverse table forms sourcing from multiple scenarios in the wild, providing complete annotation dedicated to end-to-end TR research. It is the largest and first bi-lingual dataset for end-to-end TR, with 38.1K tables in which 20.4K are in English\, and 17.7K are in Chinese. The samples have diverse forms, such as the border-complete and -incomplete table, regular and irregular table (rotated, distorted, etc.). The scenarios are multiple in the wild, varying from scanned to camera-taken images, documents to Excel tables, educational test papers to financial invoices. The annotations are complete, consisting of the table body spatial annotation, cell spatial logical annotation and text content for TD, TSR and TCR, respectively. The spatial annotation utilizes the polygon instead of the bounding box or quadrilateral adopted by most datasets. The polygon spatial annotation is more suitable for irregular tables that are common in wild scenarios. Additionally, we propose a visualized and interactive annotation tool named TableMe to improve the efficiency and quality of table annotation.
summary: Table recognition (TR) is one of the research hotspots in pattern recognition, which aims to extract information from tables in an image. Common table recognition tasks include table detection (TD), table structure recognition (TSR) and table content recognition (TCR). TD is to locate tables in the image, TCR recognizes text content, and TSR recognizes spatial ogical structure. Currently, the end-to-end TR in real scenarios, accomplishing the three sub-tasks simultaneously, is yet an unexplored research area. One major factor that inhibits researchers is the lack of a benchmark dataset. To this end, we propose a new large-scale dataset named Table Recognition Set (TabRecSet) with diverse table forms sourcing from multiple scenarios in the wild, providing complete annotation dedicated to end-to-end TR research. It is the largest and first bi-lingual dataset for end-to-end TR, with 38.1K tables in which 20.4K are in English\, and 17.7K are in Chinese. The samples have diverse forms, such as the border-complete and -incomplete table, regular and irregular table (rotated, distorted, etc.). The scenarios are multiple in the wild, varying from scanned to camera-taken images, documents to Excel tables, educational test papers to financial invoices. The annotations are complete, consisting of the table body spatial annotation, cell spatial logical annotation and text content for TD, TSR and TCR, respectively. The spatial annotation utilizes the polygon instead of the bounding box or quadrilateral adopted by most datasets. The polygon spatial annotation is more suitable for irregular tables that are common in wild scenarios. Additionally, we propose a visualized and interactive annotation tool named TableMe to improve the efficiency and quality of table annotation.
abstract_zh: 表格识别（TR）是模式识别领域的研究热点之一，其目的是从图像中的表格中提取信息。常见的表格识别任务包括表格检测（TD）、表格结构识别（TSR）和表格内容识别（TCR）。 TD是定位图像中的表格，TCR识别文本内容，TSR识别空间逻辑结构。目前，真实场景中同时完成三个子任务的端到端TR仍然是一个尚未探索的研究领域。阻碍研究人员的一个主要因素是缺乏基准数据集。为此，我们提出了一个名为表识别集（TabRecSet）的新的大规模数据集，其具有来自多种自然场景的多种表格形式，为端到端TR研究提供完整的注释。它是最大的也是第一个端到端TR的双语数据集，有38.1K表，其中20.4K是英文，17.7K是中文。样本具有多种形式，例如边界完整和不完整的表格、规则和不规则的表格（旋转、扭曲等）。实际场景多种多样，从扫描到相机拍摄的图像、文档到 Excel 表格、教育试卷到财务发票。标注完整，分别由TD、TSR、TCR的表体空间标注、单元格空间逻辑标注和文本内容组成。空间标注使用多边形而不是大多数数据集采用的边界框或四边形。多边形空间标注更适合野外场景中常见的不规则表格。此外，我们提出了一种名为TableMe的可视化交互式标注工具，以提高表格标注的效率和质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为TabRecSet的大规模双语表格识别数据集，用于支持端到端的表格识别研究，包含38.1K张来自多种真实场景的表格样本，并提供完整的空间和内容标注。
AI.motivation: 现有表格识别研究缺乏统一的端到端基准数据集，难以同时处理表格检测、结构识别和内容识别三类子任务，制约了相关算法的发展。
AI.method: 构建包含中英文表格的TabRecSet数据集，采用多边形标注替代传统边界框，覆盖完整表格结构和内容标注；开发交互式标注工具TableMe提升标注效率与质量。
AI.result: 数据集包含20.4K英文和17.7K中文表格，涵盖完整/不完整、规则/不规则等多种形式，标注信息包含表格空间结构、单元格逻辑关系及文本内容。
AI.conclusion: TabRecSet为端到端表格识别提供了首个大规模双语基准数据集，其多边形标注方式和多样化场景覆盖将推动相关算法研究与应用发展。

search_text: A large-scale dataset for end-to-end table recognition in the wild 用于野外端到端表格识别的大规模数据集 Table recognition (TR) is one of the research hotspots in pattern recognition, which aims to extract information from tables in an image. Common table recognition tasks include table detection (TD), table structure recognition (TSR) and table content recognition (TCR). TD is to locate tables in the image, TCR recognizes text content, and TSR recognizes spatial ogical structure. Currently, the end-to-end TR in real scenarios, accomplishing the three sub-tasks simultaneously, is yet an unexplored research area. One major factor that inhibits researchers is the lack of a benchmark dataset. To this end, we propose a new large-scale dataset named Table Recognition Set (TabRecSet) with diverse table forms sourcing from multiple scenarios in the wild, providing complete annotation dedicated to end-to-end TR research. It is the largest and first bi-lingual dataset for end-to-end TR, with 38.1K tables in which 20.4K are in English\, and 17.7K are in Chinese. The samples have diverse forms, such as the border-complete and -incomplete table, regular and irregular table (rotated, distorted, etc.). The scenarios are multiple in the wild, varying from scanned to camera-taken images, documents to Excel tables, educational test papers to financial invoices. The annotations are complete, consisting of the table body spatial annotation, cell spatial logical annotation and text content for TD, TSR and TCR, respectively. The spatial annotation utilizes the polygon instead of the bounding box or quadrilateral adopted by most datasets. The polygon spatial annotation is more suitable for irregular tables that are common in wild scenarios. Additionally, we propose a visualized and interactive annotation tool named TableMe to improve the efficiency and quality of table annotation. 表格识别（TR）是模式识别领域的研究热点之一，其目的是从图像中的表格中提取信息。常见的表格识别任务包括表格检测（TD）、表格结构识别（TSR）和表格内容识别（TCR）。 TD是定位图像中的表格，TCR识别文本内容，TSR识别空间逻辑结构。目前，真实场景中同时完成三个子任务的端到端TR仍然是一个尚未探索的研究领域。阻碍研究人员的一个主要因素是缺乏基准数据集。为此，我们提出了一个名为表识别集（TabRecSet）的新的大规模数据集，其具有来自多种自然场景的多种表格形式，为端到端TR研究提供完整的注释。它是最大的也是第一个端到端TR的双语数据集，有38.1K表，其中20.4K是英文，17.7K是中文。样本具有多种形式，例如边界完整和不完整的表格、规则和不规则的表格（旋转、扭曲等）。实际场景多种多样，从扫描到相机拍摄的图像、文档到 Excel 表格、教育试卷到财务发票。标注完整，分别由TD、TSR、TCR的表体空间标注、单元格空间逻辑标注和文本内容组成。空间标注使用多边形而不是大多数数据集采用的边界框或四边形。多边形空间标注更适合野外场景中常见的不规则表格。此外，我们提出了一种名为TableMe的可视化交互式标注工具，以提高表格标注的效率和质量。 本文提出一个名为TabRecSet的大规模双语表格识别数据集，用于支持端到端的表格识别研究，包含38.1K张来自多种真实场景的表格样本，并提供完整的空间和内容标注。 Fan Yang,Lei Hu,Xinwu Liu,Shuangping Huang,Zhenghui Gu cs.CV

authors_text: Sandra Q. Liu,Yuxiang Ma,Edward H. Adelson
title: GelSight Baby Fin Ray: A Compact, Compliant, Flexible Finger with High-Resolution Tactile Sensing
title_zh: GelSight Baby Fin Ray：紧凑、柔顺、灵活的手指，具有高分辨率触觉感应
comment: Accepted to IEEE Conference of Soft Robotics (RoboSoft) 2023
comments: Accepted to IEEE Conference of Soft Robotics (RoboSoft) 2023
abstract: The synthesis of tactile sensing with compliance is essential to many fields, from agricultural usages like fruit picking, to sustainability practices such as sorting recycling, to the creation of safe home-care robots for the elderly to age with dignity. From tactile sensing, we can discern material properties, recognize textures, and determine softness, while with compliance, we are able to securely and safely interact with the objects and the environment around us. These two abilities can culminate into a useful soft robotic gripper, such as the original GelSight Fin Ray, which is able to grasp a large variety of different objects and also perform a simple household manipulation task: wine glass reorientation. Although the original GelSight Fin Ray solves the problem of interfacing a generally rigid, high-resolution sensor with a soft, compliant structure, we can improve the robustness of the sensor and implement techniques that make such camera-based tactile sensors applicable to a wider variety of soft robot designs. We first integrate flexible mirrors and incorporate the rigid electronic components into the base of the gripper, which greatly improves the compliance of the Fin Ray structure. Then, we synthesize a flexible and high-elongation silicone adhesive-based fluorescent paint, which can provide good quality 2D tactile localization results for our sensor. Finally, we incorporate all of these techniques into a new design: the Baby Fin Ray, which we use to dig through clutter, and perform successful classification of nuts in their shells. The supplementary video can be found here: https://youtu.be/_oD_QFtYTPM

From tactile sensing, we can discern material properties, recognize textures, and determine softness, while with compliance, we are able to securely and safely interact with the objects and the environment around us. These two abilities can culminate into a useful soft robotic gripper, such as the original GelSight Fin Ray, which is able to grasp a large variety of different objects and also perform a simple household manipulation task: wine glass reorientation. Although the original GelSight Fin Ray solves the problem of interfacing a generally rigid, high-resolution sensor with a soft, compliant structure, we can improve the robustness of the sensor and implement techniques that make such camera-based tactile sensors applicable to a wider variety of soft robot designs. We first integrate flexible mirrors and incorporate the rigid electronic components into the base of the gripper, which greatly improves the compliance of the Fin Ray structure. Then, we synthesize a flexible and high-elongation silicone adhesive-based fluorescent paint, which can provide good quality 2D tactile localization results for our sensor. Finally, we incorporate all of these techniques into a new design: the Baby Fin Ray, which we use to dig through clutter, and perform successful classification of nuts in their shells. The supplementary video can be found here: https://youtu.be/_oD_QFtYTPM
abstract_zh: 触觉传感与合规性的结合对于许多领域至关重要，从水果采摘等农业用途，到分类回收等可持续实践，再到为老年人创造安全的家庭护理机器人，让他们有尊严地老去。通过触觉感知，我们可以辨别材料特性、识别纹理并确定柔软度，而在合规性的情况下，我们能够安全可靠地与周围的物体和环境进行交互。这两种能力最终可以形成有用的软机器人抓手，例如最初的 GelSight Fin Ray，它能够抓取各种不同的物体，还可以执行简单的家庭操作任务：酒杯重新定向。尽管最初的 GelSight Fin Ray 解决了将一般刚性的高分辨率传感器与柔软的柔顺结构连接的问题，但我们可以提高传感器的鲁棒性并实施技术，使这种基于相机的触觉传感器适用于更广泛的软体机器人设计。我们首先集成柔性镜子，并将刚性电子元件整合到夹具的底座中，这大大提高了 Fin Ray 结构的顺应性。然后，我们合成了一种柔性且高伸长率的有机硅粘合剂荧光涂料，它可以为我们的传感器提供高质量的2D触觉定位结果。最后，我们将所有这些技术融入到一个新设计中：Baby Fin Ray，我们用它来挖掘杂物，并对壳中的坚果进行成功分类。补充视频可以在这里找到：https://youtu.be/_oD_QFtYTPM

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GelSight Baby Fin Ray的紧凑型、柔顺且灵活的触觉手指，旨在提升软体机器人在复杂环境中的操作能力。
AI.motivation: 触觉感知与柔顺性结合对农业、可持续发展及家庭护理机器人至关重要，但现有传感器在适应复杂软体结构和环境时存在局限性，需改进鲁棒性与适用性。
AI.method: 通过集成柔性镜面将刚性电子元件嵌入夹爪基部，提升结构柔顺性；开发高延展性硅胶基荧光涂料以实现高质量触觉定位，并整合至新型Baby Fin Ray设计中。
AI.result: Baby Fin Ray成功完成杂乱环境中挖掘任务及坚果壳内分类操作，验证了其在复杂场景下的触觉感知与操作能力。
AI.conclusion: 该设计通过结构优化与材料创新，显著提升了软体夹爪的柔顺性与触觉感知精度，为复杂环境下的机器人应用提供了新方案。

authors_text: Duc M. Nguyen,Mohammad Nazeri,Amirreza Payandeh,Aniket Datar,Xuesu Xiao
title: Toward Human-Like Social Robot Navigation: A Large-Scale, Multi-Modal, Social Human Navigation Dataset
title_zh: 迈向类人社交机器人导航：大规模、多模态、社交人类导航数据集
comment: Accepted by 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
comments: Accepted by 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
abstract: Humans are well-adept at navigating public spaces shared with others, where current autonomous mobile robots still struggle: while safely and efficiently reaching their goals, humans communicate their intentions and conform to unwritten social norms on a daily basis; conversely, robots become clumsy in those daily social scenarios, getting stuck in dense crowds, surprising nearby pedestrians, or even causing collisions. While recent research on robot learning has shown promises in data-driven social robot navigation, good-quality training data is still difficult to acquire through either trial and error or expert demonstrations. In this work, we propose to utilize the body of rich, widely available, social human navigation data in many natural human-inhabited public spaces for robots to learn similar, human-like, socially compliant navigation behaviors. To be specific, we design an open-source egocentric data collection sensor suite wearable by walking humans to provide multi-modal robot perception data; we collect a large-scale (~100 km, 20 hours, 300 trials, 13 humans) dataset in a variety of public spaces which contain numerous natural social navigation interactions; we analyze our dataset, demonstrate its usability, and point out future research directions and use cases.
summary: Humans are well-adept at navigating public spaces shared with others, where current autonomous mobile robots still struggle: while safely and efficiently reaching their goals, humans communicate their intentions and conform to unwritten social norms on a daily basis; conversely, robots become clumsy in those daily social scenarios, getting stuck in dense crowds, surprising nearby pedestrians, or even causing collisions. While recent research on robot learning has shown promises in data-driven social robot navigation, good-quality training data is still difficult to acquire through either trial and error or expert demonstrations. In this work, we propose to utilize the body of rich, widely available, social human navigation data in many natural human-inhabited public spaces for robots to learn similar, human-like, socially compliant navigation behaviors. To be specific, we design an open-source egocentric data collection sensor suite wearable by walking humans to provide multi-modal robot perception data; we collect a large-scale (~100 km, 20 hours, 300 trials, 13 humans) dataset in a variety of public spaces which contain numerous natural social navigation interactions; we analyze our dataset, demonstrate its usability, and point out future research directions and use cases.
abstract_zh: 人类非常擅长在与他人共享的公共空间中导航，而当前的自主移动机器人仍然在这些空间中挣扎：在安全有效地实现目标的同时，人类每天都会传达自己的意图并遵守不成文的社会规范；相反，机器人在日常社交场景中变得笨拙，陷入密集的人群中，让附近的行人感到惊讶，甚至造成碰撞。虽然最近关于机器人学习的研究显示了数据驱动的社交机器人导航的前景，但通过反复试验或专家演示仍然很难获得高质量的训练数据。在这项工作中，我们建议利用许多自然人类居住的公共空间中丰富的、广泛可用的社交人类导航数据，让机器人学习类似的、类人的、符合社会的导航行为。具体来说，我们设计了一个开源的以自我为中心的数据收集传感器套件，可供行走的人类佩戴，以提供多模态机器人感知数据；我们在各种公共空间中收集了大规模（约 100 公里、20 小时、300 次试验、13 个人）数据集，其中包含大量自然社交导航交互；我们分析我们的数据集，展示其可用性，并指出未来的研究方向和用例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模、多模态的社会人类导航数据集，用于训练机器人实现类似人类的社会化导航行为。
AI.motivation: 当前自主移动机器人在密集人群中的导航表现不佳，缺乏高质量的社会交互训练数据，而人类日常导航行为蕴含丰富的社会规范信息。
AI.method: 设计可穿戴的多模态传感器套件采集行走人类的主观视角数据，在多种公共空间收集包含自然社交互动的100公里规模数据集。
AI.result: 构建了包含300次试验、13名参与者的多模态数据集，分析验证了数据集对社交导航研究的适用性并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为机器人学习人类社会导航行为提供了基础，可推动社交机器人、自动驾驶等领域的研究进展。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模、多模态的社会人类导航数据集，用于训练机器人实现类似人类的社会化导航行为。
ai_content.motivation: 当前自主移动机器人在密集人群中的导航表现不佳，缺乏高质量的社会交互训练数据，而人类日常导航行为蕴含丰富的社会规范信息。
ai_content.method: 设计可穿戴的多模态传感器套件采集行走人类的主观视角数据，在多种公共空间收集包含自然社交互动的100公里规模数据集。
ai_content.result: 构建了包含300次试验、13名参与者的多模态数据集，分析验证了数据集对社交导航研究的适用性并提出未来研究方向。
ai_content.conclusion: 该数据集为机器人学习人类社会导航行为提供了基础，可推动社交机器人、自动驾驶等领域的研究进展。

search_text: Toward Human-Like Social Robot Navigation: A Large-Scale, Multi-Modal, Social Human Navigation Dataset 迈向类人社交机器人导航：大规模、多模态、社交人类导航数据集 Humans are well-adept at navigating public spaces shared with others, where current autonomous mobile robots still struggle: while safely and efficiently reaching their goals, humans communicate their intentions and conform to unwritten social norms on a daily basis; conversely, robots become clumsy in those daily social scenarios, getting stuck in dense crowds, surprising nearby pedestrians, or even causing collisions. While recent research on robot learning has shown promises in data-driven social robot navigation, good-quality training data is still difficult to acquire through either trial and error or expert demonstrations. In this work, we propose to utilize the body of rich, widely available, social human navigation data in many natural human-inhabited public spaces for robots to learn similar, human-like, socially compliant navigation behaviors. To be specific, we design an open-source egocentric data collection sensor suite wearable by walking humans to provide multi-modal robot perception data; we collect a large-scale (~100 km, 20 hours, 300 trials, 13 humans) dataset in a variety of public spaces which contain numerous natural social navigation interactions; we analyze our dataset, demonstrate its usability, and point out future research directions and use cases. 人类非常擅长在与他人共享的公共空间中导航，而当前的自主移动机器人仍然在这些空间中挣扎：在安全有效地实现目标的同时，人类每天都会传达自己的意图并遵守不成文的社会规范；相反，机器人在日常社交场景中变得笨拙，陷入密集的人群中，让附近的行人感到惊讶，甚至造成碰撞。虽然最近关于机器人学习的研究显示了数据驱动的社交机器人导航的前景，但通过反复试验或专家演示仍然很难获得高质量的训练数据。在这项工作中，我们建议利用许多自然人类居住的公共空间中丰富的、广泛可用的社交人类导航数据，让机器人学习类似的、类人的、符合社会的导航行为。具体来说，我们设计了一个开源的以自我为中心的数据收集传感器套件，可供行走的人类佩戴，以提供多模态机器人感知数据；我们在各种公共空间中收集了大规模（约 100 公里、20 小时、300 次试验、13 个人）数据集，其中包含大量自然社交导航交互；我们分析我们的数据集，展示其可用性，并指出未来的研究方向和用例。 本文提出一个大规模、多模态的社会人类导航数据集，用于训练机器人实现类似人类的社会化导航行为。 Duc M. Nguyen,Mohammad Nazeri,Amirreza Payandeh,Aniket Datar,Xuesu Xiao cs.RO

authors_text: Marco Faroni,Alessandro Umbrico,Manuel Beschi,Andrea Orlandini,Amedeo Cesta,Nicola Pedrocchi
title: Optimal task and motion planning and execution for human-robot multi-agent systems in dynamic environments
title_zh: 动态环境中人机多智能体系统的最佳任务和运动规划与执行
comment: 12 pages, 6 figures, accepted for publication on IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics in March 2023
comments: 12 pages, 6 figures, accepted for publication on IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics in March 2023
abstract: Combining symbolic and geometric reasoning in multi-agent systems is a challenging task that involves planning, scheduling, and synchronization problems. Existing works overlooked the variability of task duration and geometric feasibility that is intrinsic to these systems because of the interaction between agents and the environment. We propose a combined task and motion planning approach to optimize sequencing, assignment, and execution of tasks under temporal and spatial variability. The framework relies on decoupling tasks and actions, where an action is one possible geometric realization of a symbolic task. At the task level, timeline-based planning deals with temporal constraints, duration variability, and synergic assignment of tasks. At the action level, online motion planning plans for the actual movements dealing with environmental changes. We demonstrate the approach effectiveness in a collaborative manufacturing scenario, in which a robotic arm and a human worker shall assemble a mosaic in the shortest time possible. Compared with existing works, our approach applies to a broader range of applications and reduces the execution time of the process.
summary: Combining symbolic and geometric reasoning in multi-agent systems is a challenging task that involves planning, scheduling, and synchronization problems. Existing works overlooked the variability of task duration and geometric feasibility that is intrinsic to these systems because of the interaction between agents and the environment. We propose a combined task and motion planning approach to optimize sequencing, assignment, and execution of tasks under temporal and spatial variability. The framework relies on decoupling tasks and actions, where an action is one possible geometric realization of a symbolic task. At the task level, timeline-based planning deals with temporal constraints, duration variability, and synergic assignment of tasks. At the action level, online motion planning plans for the actual movements dealing with environmental changes. We demonstrate the approach effectiveness in a collaborative manufacturing scenario, in which a robotic arm and a human worker shall assemble a mosaic in the shortest time possible. Compared with existing works, our approach applies to a broader range of applications and reduces the execution time of the process.
abstract_zh: 在多智能体系统中结合符号推理和几何推理是一项具有挑战性的任务，涉及规划、调度和同步问题。由于代理与环境之间的相互作用，现有的工作忽略了任务持续时间的可变性和这些系统固有的几何可行性。我们提出了一种组合任务和运动规划方法，以优化时间和空间变化下任务的排序、分配和执行。该框架依赖于任务和动作的解耦，其中动作是符号任务的一种可能的几何实现。在任务级别，基于时间线的计划处理时间限制、持续时间可变性和任务的协同分配。在动作层面，在线运动规划针对应对环境变化的实际运动进行规划。我们在协作制造场景中展示了该方法的有效性，其中机械臂和人类工人应在尽可能短的时间内组装马赛克。与现有工作相比，我们的方法适用于更广泛的应用，并减少了流程的执行时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合任务与运动规划的方法，以解决动态环境中人机多智能体系统的任务排序、分配及执行优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未充分考虑多智能体系统中任务持续时间的可变性及几何可行性问题，导致规划效率与适应性不足。
AI.method: 通过解耦任务与动作，任务层采用基于时间线的规划处理时间约束与协同分配，动作层利用在线运动规划应对环境动态变化。
AI.result: 在协作制造场景中验证了方法的有效性，相较于现有方法缩短了任务执行时间并扩展了适用范围。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为动态环境中人机协作提供了更高效、灵活的规划方案，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Satoshi Kataoka,Youngseog Chung,Seyed Kamyar Seyed Ghasemipour,Pannag Sanketi,Shixiang Shane Gu,Igor Mordatch
title: Bi-Manual Block Assembly via Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过模拟到真实的强化学习进行双手动块组装
comment: Our accompanying project webpage can be found at: https://sites.google.com/view/u-shape-block-assembly. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.08277
comments: Our accompanying project webpage can be found at: https://sites.google.com/view/u-shape-block-assembly. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.08277
abstract: Most successes in robotic manipulation have been restricted to single-arm gripper robots, whose low dexterity limits the range of solvable tasks to pick-and-place, inser-tion, and object rearrangement. More complex tasks such as assembly require dual and multi-arm platforms, but entail a suite of unique challenges such as bi-arm coordination and collision avoidance, robust grasping, and long-horizon planning. In this work we investigate the feasibility of training deep reinforcement learning (RL) policies in simulation and transferring them to the real world (Sim2Real) as a generic methodology for obtaining performant controllers for real-world bi-manual robotic manipulation tasks. As a testbed for bi-manual manipulation, we develop the U-Shape Magnetic BlockAssembly Task, wherein two robots with parallel grippers must connect 3 magnetic blocks to form a U-shape. Without manually-designed controller nor human demonstrations, we demonstrate that with careful Sim2Real considerations, our policies trained with RL in simulation enable two xArm6 robots to solve the U-shape assembly task with a success rate of above90% in simulation, and 50% on real hardware without any additional real-world fine-tuning. Through careful ablations,we highlight how each component of the system is critical for such simple and successful policy learning and transfer,including task specification, learning algorithm, direct joint-space control, behavior constraints, perception and actuation noises, action delays and action interpolation. Our results present a significant step forward for bi-arm capability on real hardware, and we hope our system can inspire future research on deep RL and Sim2Real transfer of bi-manualpolicies, drastically scaling up the capability of real-world robot manipulators.
summary: Most successes in robotic manipulation have been restricted to single-arm gripper robots, whose low dexterity limits the range of solvable tasks to pick-and-place, inser-tion, and object rearrangement. More complex tasks such as assembly require dual and multi-arm platforms, but entail a suite of unique challenges such as bi-arm coordination and collision avoidance, robust grasping, and long-horizon planning. In this work we investigate the feasibility of training deep reinforcement learning (RL) policies in simulation and transferring them to the real world (Sim2Real) as a generic methodology for obtaining performant controllers for real-world bi-manual robotic manipulation tasks. As a testbed for bi-manual manipulation, we develop the U-Shape Magnetic BlockAssembly Task, wherein two robots with parallel grippers must connect 3 magnetic blocks to form a U-shape. Without manually-designed controller nor human demonstrations, we demonstrate that with careful Sim2Real considerations, our policies trained with RL in simulation enable two xArm6 robots to solve the U-shape assembly task with a success rate of above90% in simulation, and 50% on real hardware without any additional real-world fine-tuning. Through careful ablations,we highlight how each component of the system is critical for such simple and successful policy learning and transfer,including task specification, learning algorithm, direct joint-space control, behavior constraints, perception and actuation noises, action delays and action interpolation. Our results present a significant step forward for bi-arm capability on real hardware, and we hope our system can inspire future research on deep RL and Sim2Real transfer of bi-manualpolicies, drastically scaling up the capability of real-world robot manipulators.
abstract_zh: 机器人操作方面的大多数成功仅限于单臂抓取机器人，其灵活性较低，限制了可解决的任务范围，例如拾取和放置、插入和物体重新排列。组装等更复杂的任务需要双臂和多臂平台，但会带来一系列独特的挑战，例如双臂协调和避免碰撞、强大的抓取和长期规划。在这项工作中，我们研究了在模拟中训练深度强化学习（RL）策略并将其转移到现实世界（Sim2Real）的可行性，作为获得现实世界双手动机器人操作任务的高性能控制器的通用方法。作为双手操作的测试平台，我们开发了 U 形磁块组装任务，其中两个具有平行夹具的机器人必须连接 3 个磁块以形成 U 形。在没有手动设计的控制器或人工演示的情况下，我们证明，经过仔细的 Sim2Real 考虑，我们在模拟中用 RL 训练的策略使两个 xArm6 机器人能够解决 U 形装配任务，在模拟中成功率超过 90%，在真实硬件上成功率达到 50%，而无需任何额外的现实世界微调。通过仔细的消融，我们强调了系统的每个组件对于如此简单而成功的策略学习和迁移至关重要，包括任务规范、学习算法、直接关节空间控制、行为约束、感知和驱动噪声、动作延迟和动作插值。我们的结果代表了真实硬件上双臂能力的重大进步，我们希望我们的系统能够激发未来对双臂策略的深度强化学习和 Sim2Real 传输的研究，从而大幅提高现实世界机器人机械手的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过模拟到现实的深度强化学习方法，实现双臂机器人磁块U型组装任务的控制策略学习与迁移。
AI.motivation: 单臂机械臂在复杂装配任务中存在协调性不足等局限，双臂平台虽具潜力但面临协同控制、避障等挑战，亟需通用控制策略生成方法。
AI.method: 设计U型磁块组装测试任务，采用模拟环境训练深度强化学习策略，通过关节空间直接控制、行为约束等关键技术实现模拟到真实机械臂的策略迁移。
AI.result: 模拟环境中策略成功率超90%，真实机械臂未额外调优下达成50%成功率，系统组件关键性通过消融实验验证。
AI.conclusion: 该成果为双臂机械臂现实应用提供重要进展，展示了深度强化学习在模拟到现实迁移中的有效性，为后续研究奠定基础。

tldr: 本文提出通过模拟到现实的深度强化学习方法，实现双臂机器人磁块U型组装任务的控制策略学习与迁移。
motivation: 单臂机械臂在复杂装配任务中存在协调性不足等局限，双臂平台虽具潜力但面临协同控制、避障等挑战，亟需通用控制策略生成方法。
method: 设计U型磁块组装测试任务，采用模拟环境训练深度强化学习策略，通过关节空间直接控制、行为约束等关键技术实现模拟到真实机械臂的策略迁移。
result: 模拟环境中策略成功率超90%，真实机械臂未额外调优下达成50%成功率，系统组件关键性通过消融实验验证。
conclusion: 该成果为双臂机械臂现实应用提供重要进展，展示了深度强化学习在模拟到现实迁移中的有效性，为后续研究奠定基础。
search_text: Bi-Manual Block Assembly via Sim-to-Real Reinforcement Learning 通过模拟到真实的强化学习进行双手动块组装 Most successes in robotic manipulation have been restricted to single-arm gripper robots, whose low dexterity limits the range of solvable tasks to pick-and-place, inser-tion, and object rearrangement. More complex tasks such as assembly require dual and multi-arm platforms, but entail a suite of unique challenges such as bi-arm coordination and collision avoidance, robust grasping, and long-horizon planning. In this work we investigate the feasibility of training deep reinforcement learning (RL) policies in simulation and transferring them to the real world (Sim2Real) as a generic methodology for obtaining performant controllers for real-world bi-manual robotic manipulation tasks. As a testbed for bi-manual manipulation, we develop the U-Shape Magnetic BlockAssembly Task, wherein two robots with parallel grippers must connect 3 magnetic blocks to form a U-shape. Without manually-designed controller nor human demonstrations, we demonstrate that with careful Sim2Real considerations, our policies trained with RL in simulation enable two xArm6 robots to solve the U-shape assembly task with a success rate of above90% in simulation, and 50% on real hardware without any additional real-world fine-tuning. Through careful ablations,we highlight how each component of the system is critical for such simple and successful policy learning and transfer,including task specification, learning algorithm, direct joint-space control, behavior constraints, perception and actuation noises, action delays and action interpolation. Our results present a significant step forward for bi-arm capability on real hardware, and we hope our system can inspire future research on deep RL and Sim2Real transfer of bi-manualpolicies, drastically scaling up the capability of real-world robot manipulators. 机器人操作方面的大多数成功仅限于单臂抓取机器人，其灵活性较低，限制了可解决的任务范围，例如拾取和放置、插入和物体重新排列。组装等更复杂的任务需要双臂和多臂平台，但会带来一系列独特的挑战，例如双臂协调和避免碰撞、强大的抓取和长期规划。在这项工作中，我们研究了在模拟中训练深度强化学习（RL）策略并将其转移到现实世界（Sim2Real）的可行性，作为获得现实世界双手动机器人操作任务的高性能控制器的通用方法。作为双手操作的测试平台，我们开发了 U 形磁块组装任务，其中两个具有平行夹具的机器人必须连接 3 个磁块以形成 U 形。在没有手动设计的控制器或人工演示的情况下，我们证明，经过仔细的 Sim2Real 考虑，我们在模拟中用 RL 训练的策略使两个 xArm6 机器人能够解决 U 形装配任务，在模拟中成功率超过 90%，在真实硬件上成功率达到 50%，而无需任何额外的现实世界微调。通过仔细的消融，我们强调了系统的每个组件对于如此简单而成功的策略学习和迁移至关重要，包括任务规范、学习算法、直接关节空间控制、行为约束、感知和驱动噪声、动作延迟和动作插值。我们的结果代表了真实硬件上双臂能力的重大进步，我们希望我们的系统能够激发未来对双臂策略的深度强化学习和 Sim2Real 传输的研究，从而大幅提高现实世界机器人机械手的能力。 本文提出通过模拟到现实的深度强化学习方法，实现双臂机器人磁块U型组装任务的控制策略学习与迁移。 Satoshi Kataoka,Youngseog Chung,Seyed Kamyar Seyed Ghasemipour,Pannag Sanketi,Shixiang Shane Gu,Igor Mordatch cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Qixin Hu,Yixiong Chen,Junfei Xiao,Shuwen Sun,Jieneng Chen,Alan Yuille,Zongwei Zhou
title: Label-Free Liver Tumor Segmentation
title_zh: 无标记肝脏肿瘤分割
abstract: We demonstrate that AI models can accurately segment liver tumors without the need for manual annotation by using synthetic tumors in CT scans. Our synthetic tumors have two intriguing advantages: (I) realistic in shape and texture, which even medical professionals can confuse with real tumors; (II) effective for training AI models, which can perform liver tumor segmentation similarly to the model trained on real tumors -- this result is exciting because no existing work, using synthetic tumors only, has thus far reached a similar or even close performance to real tumors. This result also implies that manual efforts for annotating tumors voxel by voxel (which took years to create) can be significantly reduced in the future. Moreover, our synthetic tumors can automatically generate many examples of small (or even tiny) synthetic tumors and have the potential to improve the success rate of detecting small liver tumors, which is critical for detecting the early stages of cancer. In addition to enriching the training data, our synthesizing strategy also enables us to rigorously assess the AI robustness.
summary: We demonstrate that AI models can accurately segment liver tumors without the need for manual annotation by using synthetic tumors in CT scans. Our synthetic tumors have two intriguing advantages: (I) realistic in shape and texture, which even medical professionals can confuse with real tumors; (II) effective for training AI models, which can perform liver tumor segmentation similarly to the model trained on real tumors -- this result is exciting because no existing work, using synthetic tumors only, has thus far reached a similar or even close performance to real tumors. This result also implies that manual efforts for annotating tumors voxel by voxel (which took years to create) can be significantly reduced in the future. Moreover, our synthetic tumors can automatically generate many examples of small (or even tiny) synthetic tumors and have the potential to improve the success rate of detecting small liver tumors, which is critical for detecting the early stages of cancer. In addition to enriching the training data, our synthesizing strategy also enables us to rigorously assess the AI robustness.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，通过在 CT 扫描中使用合成肿瘤，人工智能模型可以准确分割肝脏肿瘤，而无需手动注释。我们的合成肿瘤有两个有趣的优点：（一）形状和纹理逼真，即使是医学专业人士也可能与真实肿瘤混淆； （II）对于训练人工智能模型有效，该模型可以像在真实肿瘤上训练的模型一样执行肝脏肿瘤分割——这个结果令人兴奋，因为迄今为止还没有仅使用合成肿瘤的现有工作达到与真实肿瘤相似甚至接近的性能。这一结果还意味着未来可以显着减少逐个体素注释肿瘤体素的手动工作（需要数年时间才能创建）。此外，我们的合成肿瘤可以自动生成许多小型（甚至微小）合成肿瘤的例子，并有可能提高检测小型肝脏肿瘤的成功率，这对于检测癌症的早期阶段至关重要。除了丰富训练数据之外，我们的合成策略还使我们能够严格评估人工智能的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需人工标注的肝脏肿瘤分割方法，通过使用合成肿瘤的CT扫描数据训练AI模型。
AI.motivation: 传统肝脏肿瘤分割依赖耗时的人工标注，且现有合成肿瘤方法性能不足。本文旨在通过生成逼真的合成肿瘤数据，减少人工标注需求并提升小肿瘤检测能力。
AI.method: 生成形状和纹理逼真的合成肿瘤，并利用其自动创建大量小肿瘤样本训练AI模型，同时通过合成数据严格评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: AI模型在合成肿瘤数据上的分割性能接近真实肿瘤训练模型，显著降低人工标注需求，并提升小肿瘤检测成功率。
AI.conclusion: 合成肿瘤数据可有效替代真实标注数据，为肝脏肿瘤分割提供高效解决方案，并为未来研究模型鲁棒性和数据多样性奠定基础。

authors_text: Joshua C. Zhao,Ahmed Roushdy Elkordy,Atul Sharma,Yahya H. Ezzeldin,Salman Avestimehr,Saurabh Bagchi
title: The Resource Problem of Using Linear Layer Leakage Attack in Federated Learning
title_zh: 联邦学习中使用线性层泄漏攻击的资源问题
abstract: Secure aggregation promises a heightened level of privacy in federated learning, maintaining that a server only has access to a decrypted aggregate update. Within this setting, linear layer leakage methods are the only data reconstruction attacks able to scale and achieve a high leakage rate regardless of the number of clients or batch size. This is done through increasing the size of an injected fully-connected (FC) layer. However, this results in a resource overhead which grows larger with an increasing number of clients. We show that this resource overhead is caused by an incorrect perspective in all prior work that treats an attack on an aggregate update in the same way as an individual update with a larger batch size. Instead, by attacking the update from the perspective that aggregation is combining multiple individual updates, this allows the application of sparsity to alleviate resource overhead. We show that the use of sparsity can decrease the model size overhead by over 327$\times$ and the computation time by 3.34$\times$ compared to SOTA while maintaining equivalent total leakage rate, 77% even with $1000$ clients in aggregation.
summary: Secure aggregation promises a heightened level of privacy in federated learning, maintaining that a server only has access to a decrypted aggregate update. Within this setting, linear layer leakage methods are the only data reconstruction attacks able to scale and achieve a high leakage rate regardless of the number of clients or batch size. This is done through increasing the size of an injected fully-connected (FC) layer. However, this results in a resource overhead which grows larger with an increasing number of clients. We show that this resource overhead is caused by an incorrect perspective in all prior work that treats an attack on an aggregate update in the same way as an individual update with a larger batch size. Instead, by attacking the update from the perspective that aggregation is combining multiple individual updates, this allows the application of sparsity to alleviate resource overhead. We show that the use of sparsity can decrease the model size overhead by over 327$\times$ and the computation time by 3.34$\times$ compared to SOTA while maintaining equivalent total leakage rate, 77% even with $1000$ clients in aggregation.
abstract_zh: 安全聚合保证了联合学习中更高级别的隐私，保持服务器只能访问解密的聚合更新。在此设置中，线性层泄漏方法是唯一能够扩展并实现高泄漏率的数据重建攻击，无论客户端数量或批量大小如何。这是通过增加注入的全连接（FC）层的大小来完成的。然而，这会导致资源开销随着客户端数量的增加而变得更大。我们表明，这种资源开销是由之前所有工作中的错误观点造成的，即以与具有较大批量大小的单独更新相同的方式对待对聚合更新的攻击。相反，通过从聚合组合多个单独更新的角度来攻击更新，这允许应用稀疏性来减轻资源开销。我们表明，与 SOTA 相比，使用稀疏性可以将模型大小开销减少超过 327$\times$，计算时间减少 3.34$\times$，同时保持等效的总泄漏率，即使聚合 $1000$ 客户端，泄漏率也为 77%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究联邦学习中线性层泄漏攻击的资源问题，并提出通过稀疏性优化降低计算开销的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有线性层泄漏攻击在联邦学习中面临客户端数量增加导致的资源开销激增问题，需寻找高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过重新定义攻击视角（聚合为多客户端更新组合），结合稀疏性约束优化模型参数，降低计算与存储开销。
AI.result: 模型体积开销降低327倍，计算时间减少3.34倍，1000客户端场景下保持77%等效泄漏率。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏性优化有效解决线性层攻击的资源瓶颈，在保证攻击效果前提下实现高效联邦学习数据泄露防御。

We show that this resource overhead is caused by an incorrect perspective in all prior work that treats an attack on an aggregate update in the same way as an individual update with a larger batch size. Instead, by attacking the update from the perspective that aggregation is combining multiple individual updates, this allows the application of sparsity to alleviate resource overhead. We show that the use of sparsity can decrease the model size overhead by over 327$\times$ and the computation time by 3.34$\times$ compared to SOTA while maintaining equivalent total leakage rate, 77% even with $1000$ clients in aggregation. 安全聚合保证了联合学习中更高级别的隐私，保持服务器只能访问解密的聚合更新。在此设置中，线性层泄漏方法是唯一能够扩展并实现高泄漏率的数据重建攻击，无论客户端数量或批量大小如何。这是通过增加注入的全连接（FC）层的大小来完成的。然而，这会导致资源开销随着客户端数量的增加而变得更大。我们表明，这种资源开销是由之前所有工作中的错误观点造成的，即以与具有较大批量大小的单独更新相同的方式对待对聚合更新的攻击。相反，通过从聚合组合多个单独更新的角度来攻击更新，这允许应用稀疏性来减轻资源开销。我们表明，与 SOTA 相比，使用稀疏性可以将模型大小开销减少超过 327$\times$，计算时间减少 3.34$\times$，同时保持等效的总泄漏率，即使聚合 $1000$ 客户端，泄漏率也为 77%。 本文研究联邦学习中线性层泄漏攻击的资源问题，并提出通过稀疏性优化降低计算开销的方法。 Joshua C. Zhao,Ahmed Roushdy Elkordy,Atul Sharma,Yahya H. Ezzeldin,Salman Avestimehr,Saurabh Bagchi cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Yuxiao Chen,Jianbo Yuan,Yu Tian,Shijie Geng,Xinyu Li,Ding Zhou,Dimitris N. Metaxas,Hongxia Yang
title: Revisiting Multimodal Representation in Contrastive Learning: From Patch and Token Embeddings to Finite Discrete Tokens
title_zh: 重新审视对比学习中的多模态表示：从补丁和令牌嵌入到有限离散令牌
abstract: Contrastive learning-based vision-language pre-training approaches, such as CLIP, have demonstrated great success in many vision-language tasks. These methods achieve cross-modal alignment by encoding a matched image-text pair with similar feature embeddings, which are generated by aggregating information from visual patches and language tokens. However, direct aligning cross-modal information using such representations is challenging, as visual patches and text tokens differ in semantic levels and granularities. To alleviate this issue, we propose a Finite Discrete Tokens (FDT) based multimodal representation. FDT is a set of learnable tokens representing certain visual-semantic concepts. Both images and texts are embedded using shared FDT by first grounding multimodal inputs to FDT space and then aggregating the activated FDT representations. The matched visual and semantic concepts are enforced to be represented by the same set of discrete tokens by a sparse activation constraint. As a result, the granularity gap between the two modalities is reduced. Through both quantitative and qualitative analyses, we demonstrate that using FDT representations in CLIP-style models improves cross-modal alignment and performance in visual recognition and vision-language downstream tasks. Furthermore, we show that our method can learn more comprehensive representations, and the learned FDT capture meaningful cross-modal correspondence, ranging from objects to actions and attributes.
summary: Contrastive learning-based vision-language pre-training approaches, such as CLIP, have demonstrated great success in many vision-language tasks. These methods achieve cross-modal alignment by encoding a matched image-text pair with similar feature embeddings, which are generated by aggregating information from visual patches and language tokens. However, direct aligning cross-modal information using such representations is challenging, as visual patches and text tokens differ in semantic levels and granularities. To alleviate this issue, we propose a Finite Discrete Tokens (FDT) based multimodal representation. FDT is a set of learnable tokens representing certain visual-semantic concepts. Both images and texts are embedded using shared FDT by first grounding multimodal inputs to FDT space and then aggregating the activated FDT representations. The matched visual and semantic concepts are enforced to be represented by the same set of discrete tokens by a sparse activation constraint. As a result, the granularity gap between the two modalities is reduced. Through both quantitative and qualitative analyses, we demonstrate that using FDT representations in CLIP-style models improves cross-modal alignment and performance in visual recognition and vision-language downstream tasks. Furthermore, we show that our method can learn more comprehensive representations, and the learned FDT capture meaningful cross-modal correspondence, ranging from objects to actions and attributes.
abstract_zh: 基于对比学习的视觉语言预训练方法（例如 CLIP）在许多视觉语言任务中取得了巨大成功。这些方法通过对具有相似特征嵌入的匹配图像文本对进行编码来实现跨模态对齐，这些特征嵌入是通过聚合来自视觉补丁和语言标记的信息而生成的。然而，使用此类表示直接对齐跨模式信息具有挑战性，因为视觉补丁和文本标记在语义级别和粒度上有所不同。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于有限离散令牌（FDT）的多模态表示。 FDT 是一组代表某些视觉语义概念的可学习标记。通过首先将多模态输入接地到 FDT 空间，然后聚合激活的 FDT 表示，使用共享 FDT 嵌入图像和文本。匹配的视觉和语义概念被强制由稀疏激活约束的同一组离散标记表示。结果，两种模式之间的粒度差距减小了。通过定量和定性分析，我们证明在 CLIP 式模型中使用 FDT 表示可以改善视觉识别和视觉语言下游任务中的跨模式对齐和性能。此外，我们表明我们的方法可以学习更全面的表示，并且学习到的 FDT 捕获有意义的跨模态对应，范围从对象到动作和属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于有限离散标记（FDT）的多模态表示方法，旨在改进对比学习中的跨模态对齐问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法（如CLIP）在视觉-语言任务中因图像块与文本标记在语义层次和粒度上的差异，导致跨模态对齐困难。
AI.method: 通过引入可学习的有限离散标记（FDT），将图像和文本映射到共享的FDT空间，并通过稀疏激活约束强制匹配的视觉语义概念使用相同离散标记。
AI.result: 实验表明，FDT表示提升了CLIP类模型的跨模态对齐效果及下游任务性能，且FDT能捕捉从物体到动作的跨模态对应关系。
AI.conclusion: FDT方法有效弥合了视觉与语言模态的粒度差距，为多模态表示学习提供了更全面的解决方案。

authors_text: Sauradip Nag,Xiatian Zhu,Jiankang Deng,Yi-Zhe Song,Tao Xiang
title: DiffTAD: Temporal Action Detection with Proposal Denoising Diffusion
title_zh: DiffTAD：使用提案去噪扩散进行时间动作检测
abstract: We propose a new formulation of temporal action detection (TAD) with denoising diffusion, DiffTAD in short. Taking as input random temporal proposals, it can yield action proposals accurately given an untrimmed long video. This presents a generative modeling perspective, against previous discriminative learning manners. This capability is achieved by first diffusing the ground-truth proposals to random ones (i.e., the forward/noising process) and then learning to reverse the noising process (i.e., the backward/denoising process). Concretely, we establish the denoising process in the Transformer decoder (e.g., DETR) by introducing a temporal location query design with faster convergence in training. We further propose a cross-step selective conditioning algorithm for inference acceleration. Extensive evaluations on ActivityNet and THUMOS show that our DiffTAD achieves top performance compared to previous art alternatives. The code will be made available at https://github.com/sauradip/DiffusionTAD.
summary: We propose a new formulation of temporal action detection (TAD) with denoising diffusion, DiffTAD in short. Taking as input random temporal proposals, it can yield action proposals accurately given an untrimmed long video. This presents a generative modeling perspective, against previous discriminative learning manners. This capability is achieved by first diffusing the ground-truth proposals to random ones (i.e., the forward/noising process) and then learning to reverse the noising process (i.e., the backward/denoising process). Concretely, we establish the denoising process in the Transformer decoder (e.g., DETR) by introducing a temporal location query design with faster convergence in training. We further propose a cross-step selective conditioning algorithm for inference acceleration. Extensive evaluations on ActivityNet and THUMOS show that our DiffTAD achieves top performance compared to previous art alternatives. The code will be made available at https://github.com/sauradip/DiffusionTAD.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种带有去噪扩散的时间动作检测（TAD）的新公式，简称 DiffTAD。以随机时间建议作为输入，它可以在给定未修剪的长视频的情况下准确地产生动作建议。这提出了生成建模的观点，反对以前的歧视性学习方式。这种能力是通过首先将真实建议扩散到随机建议（即前向/噪声过程），然后学习反转噪声过程（即后向/去噪过程）来实现的。具体来说，我们通过引入训练中收敛速度更快的时间位置查询设计，在 Transformer 解码器（例如 DETR）中建立去噪过程。我们进一步提出了一种用于推理加速的跨步选择性条件算法。对 ActivityNet 和 THUMOS 的广泛评估表明，与之前的艺术替代方案相比，我们的 DiffTAD 实现了最佳性能。该代码将在 https://github.com/sauradip/DiffusionTAD 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于去噪扩散的时序动作检测方法DiffTAD，通过生成模型从随机时间提案中准确生成动作提案。
AI.motivation: 传统判别式方法在时序动作检测中存在提案生成不准确的问题，本文通过生成模型视角利用扩散过程提升检测性能。
AI.method: 在Transformer解码器中建立扩散过程，设计时序位置查询机制并引入跨步选择性条件算法加速推理。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet和THUMOS数据集上取得优于现有方法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: DiffTAD通过生成模型框架有效提升了时序动作检测的准确性与效率。

ai_content.conclusion: DiffTAD通过生成模型框架有效提升了时序动作检测的准确性与效率。
