authors_text: Junchi Yu,Jian Liang,Ran He
title: Mind the Label Shift of Augmentation-based Graph OOD Generalization
title_zh: 注意基于增强的图 OOD 泛化的标签偏移
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.09345
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2206.09345
abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization is an important issue for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). Recent works employ different graph editions to generate augmented environments and learn an invariant GNN for generalization. However, the label shift usually occurs in augmentation since graph structural edition inevitably alters the graph label. This brings inconsistent predictive relationships among augmented environments, which is harmful to generalization. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{LiSA}, which generates label-invariant augmentations to facilitate graph OOD generalization. Instead of resorting to graph editions, LiSA exploits \textbf{L}abel-\textbf{i}nvariant \textbf{S}ubgraphs of the training graphs to construct \textbf{A}ugmented environments. Specifically, LiSA first designs the variational subgraph generators to extract locally predictive patterns and construct multiple label-invariant subgraphs efficiently. Then, the subgraphs produced by different generators are collected to build different augmented environments. To promote diversity among augmented environments, LiSA further introduces a tractable energy-based regularization to enlarge pair-wise distances between the distributions of environments. In this manner, LiSA generates diverse augmented environments with a consistent predictive relationship and facilitates learning an invariant GNN. Extensive experiments on node-level and graph-level OOD benchmarks show that LiSA achieves impressive generalization performance with different GNN backbones. Code is available on \url{https://github.com/Samyu0304/LiSA}.

Extensive experiments on node-level and graph-level OOD benchmarks show that LiSA achieves impressive generalization performance with different GNN backbones. Code is available on \url{https://github.com/Samyu0304/LiSA}.
abstract_zh: 分布外（OOD）泛化是图神经网络（GNN）的一个重要问题。最近的工作采用不同的图形版本来生成增强环境并学习不变的 GNN 进行泛化。然而，标签移位通常发生在增强中，因为图结构编辑不可避免地会改变图标签。这带来了增强环境之间不一致的预测关系，这不利于泛化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出 \textbf{LiSA}，它生成标签不变的增强以促进图 OOD 泛化。 LiSA 没有采用图版本，而是利用训练图的 \textbf{L}abel-\textbf{i}nvariant \textbf{S}ubgraph 来构建 \textbf{A} 增强环境。具体来说，LiSA 首先设计变分子图生成器来提取局部预测模式并有效构建多个标签不变子图。然后，收集不同生成器产生的子图来构建不同的增强环境。为了促进增强环境之间的多样性，LiSA 进一步引入了一种易于处理的基于能量的正则化，以扩大环境分布之间的成对距离。通过这种方式，LiSA 生成具有一致预测关系的多样化增强环境，并有助于学习不变的 GNN。对节点级和图级 OOD 基准的大量实验表明，LiSA 在不同的 GNN 主干上实现了令人印象深刻的泛化性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Samyu0304/LiSA} 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiSA方法，通过生成标签不变的子图来解决图神经网络（GNN）在基于增强的分布外（OOD）泛化中的标签偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图增强的方法在生成增强环境时容易导致标签偏移，破坏预测关系的一致性，从而影响OOD泛化性能。
AI.method: LiSA通过提取训练图的标签不变子图构建增强环境，利用变分子图生成器高效生成局部预测模式，并引入能量正则化策略扩大增强环境分布间的距离以提升多样性。
AI.result: 在节点级和图级OOD基准测试中，LiSA在不同GNN主干网络上均表现出优异的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: LiSA通过标签不变增强策略有效缓解了标签偏移问题，为图结构数据的OOD泛化提供了新思路。

search_text: Mind the Label Shift of Augmentation-based Graph OOD Generalization 注意基于增强的图 OOD 泛化的标签偏移 Out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization is an important issue for Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). Recent works employ different graph editions to generate augmented environments and learn an invariant GNN for generalization. However, the label shift usually occurs in augmentation since graph structural edition inevitably alters the graph label. This brings inconsistent predictive relationships among augmented environments, which is harmful to generalization. To address this issue, we propose \textbf{LiSA}, which generates label-invariant augmentations to facilitate graph OOD generalization. Instead of resorting to graph editions, LiSA exploits \textbf{L}abel-\textbf{i}nvariant \textbf{S}ubgraphs of the training graphs to construct \textbf{A}ugmented environments. Specifically, LiSA first designs the variational subgraph generators to extract locally predictive patterns and construct multiple label-invariant subgraphs efficiently. Then, the subgraphs produced by different generators are collected to build different augmented environments. To promote diversity among augmented environments, LiSA further introduces a tractable energy-based regularization to enlarge pair-wise distances between the distributions of environments. In this manner, LiSA generates diverse augmented environments with a consistent predictive relationship and facilitates learning an invariant GNN. Extensive experiments on node-level and graph-level OOD benchmarks show that LiSA achieves impressive generalization performance with different GNN backbones. Code is available on \url{https://github.com/Samyu0304/LiSA}. 分布外（OOD）泛化是图神经网络（GNN）的一个重要问题。最近的工作采用不同的图形版本来生成增强环境并学习不变的 GNN 进行泛化。然而，标签移位通常发生在增强中，因为图结构编辑不可避免地会改变图标签。这带来了增强环境之间不一致的预测关系，这不利于泛化。为了解决这个问题，我们提出 \textbf{LiSA}，它生成标签不变的增强以促进图 OOD 泛化。 LiSA 没有采用图版本，而是利用训练图的 \textbf{L}abel-\textbf{i}nvariant \textbf{S}ubgraph 来构建 \textbf{A} 增强环境。具体来说，LiSA 首先设计变分子图生成器来提取局部预测模式并有效构建多个标签不变子图。然后，收集不同生成器产生的子图来构建不同的增强环境。为了促进增强环境之间的多样性，LiSA 进一步引入了一种易于处理的基于能量的正则化，以扩大环境分布之间的成对距离。通过这种方式，LiSA 生成具有一致预测关系的多样化增强环境，并有助于学习不变的 GNN。对节点级和图级 OOD 基准的大量实验表明，LiSA 在不同的 GNN 主干上实现了令人印象深刻的泛化性能。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/Samyu0304/LiSA} 上找到。 本文提出LiSA方法，通过生成标签不变的子图来解决图神经网络（GNN）在基于增强的分布外（OOD）泛化中的标签偏移问题。 Junchi Yu,Jian Liang,Ran He cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Zuhaib Akhtar,Rashid Ali
title: Automatic Number Plate Recognition using Random Forest Classifier
title_zh: 使用随机森林分类器自动车牌识别
abstract: Automatic Number Plate Recognition System (ANPRS) is a mass surveillance embedded system that recognizes the number plate of the vehicle. This system is generally used for traffic management applications. It should be very efficient in detecting the number plate in noisy as well as in low illumination and also within required time frame. This paper proposes a number plate recognition method by processing vehicle's rear or front image. After image is captured, processing is divided into four steps which are Pre-Processing, Number plate localization, Character segmentation and Character recognition. Pre-Processing enhances the image for further processing, number plate localization extracts the number plate region from the image, character segmentation separates the individual characters from the extracted number plate and character recognition identifies the optical characters by using random forest classification algorithm. Experimental results reveal that the accuracy of this method is 90.9%.
summary: Automatic Number Plate Recognition System (ANPRS) is a mass surveillance embedded system that recognizes the number plate of the vehicle. This system is generally used for traffic management applications. It should be very efficient in detecting the number plate in noisy as well as in low illumination and also within required time frame. This paper proposes a number plate recognition method by processing vehicle's rear or front image. After image is captured, processing is divided into four steps which are Pre-Processing, Number plate localization, Character segmentation and Character recognition. Pre-Processing enhances the image for further processing, number plate localization extracts the number plate region from the image, character segmentation separates the individual characters from the extracted number plate and character recognition identifies the optical characters by using random forest classification algorithm. Experimental results reveal that the accuracy of this method is 90.9%.
abstract_zh: 自动车牌识别系统（ANPRS）是一种大规模监控嵌入式系统，可识别车辆的车牌号。该系统通常用于交通管理应用。它应该能够非常有效地在嘈杂和低照度下以及在要求的时间范围内检测车牌。本文提出了一种通过处理车辆后方或前方图像的车牌识别方法。图像采集后，处理分为四个步骤：预处理、车牌定位、字符分割和字符识别。预处理增强图像以进行进一步处理，车牌定位从图像中提取车牌区域，字符分割从提取的车牌中分离出各个字符，字符识别使用随机森林分类算法识别光学字符。实验结果表明，该方法的准确率为90.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于随机森林分类器的自动车牌识别方法，旨在提高复杂环境下的识别效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有车牌识别系统在噪声、低光照等复杂环境下存在识别效率低、准确性不足的问题，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用四步处理流程：图像预处理、车牌定位、字符分割及随机森林分类器实现的字符识别，重点优化低光照和噪声条件下的识别性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在测试集上达到90.9%的识别准确率，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的随机森林分类方法在复杂场景下表现优异，可为交通管理等实际应用提供可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Xiaofei Wang,Stephen Price,Chao Li
title: Multi-task Learning of Histology and Molecular Markers for Classifying Diffuse Glioma
title_zh: 用于分类弥漫性胶质瘤的组织学和分子标记的多任务学习
abstract: Most recently, the pathology diagnosis of cancer is shifting to integrating molecular makers with histology features. It is a urgent need for digital pathology methods to effectively integrate molecular markers with histology, which could lead to more accurate diagnosis in the real world scenarios. This paper presents a first attempt to jointly predict molecular markers and histology features and model their interactions for classifying diffuse glioma bases on whole slide images. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical multi-task multi-instance learning framework to jointly predict histology and molecular markers. Moreover, we propose a co-occurrence probability-based label correction graph network to model the co-occurrence of molecular markers. Lastly, we design an inter-omic interaction strategy with the dynamical confidence constraint loss to model the interactions of histology and molecular markers. Our experiments show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in classifying diffuse glioma,as well as related histology and molecular markers on a multi-institutional dataset.
summary: Most recently, the pathology diagnosis of cancer is shifting to integrating molecular makers with histology features. It is a urgent need for digital pathology methods to effectively integrate molecular markers with histology, which could lead to more accurate diagnosis in the real world scenarios. This paper presents a first attempt to jointly predict molecular markers and histology features and model their interactions for classifying diffuse glioma bases on whole slide images. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical multi-task multi-instance learning framework to jointly predict histology and molecular markers. Moreover, we propose a co-occurrence probability-based label correction graph network to model the co-occurrence of molecular markers. Lastly, we design an inter-omic interaction strategy with the dynamical confidence constraint loss to model the interactions of histology and molecular markers. Our experiments show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in classifying diffuse glioma,as well as related histology and molecular markers on a multi-institutional dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近，癌症的病理诊断正在转向将分子标记与组织学特征相结合。数字病理学方法迫切需要将分子标记与组织学有效结合，从而在现实世界中实现更准确的诊断。本文首次尝试联合预测分子标记和组织学特征，并对它们的相互作用进行建模，以在整个幻灯片图像上对弥漫性神经胶质瘤进行分类。具体来说，我们提出了一个分层多任务多实例学习框架来联合预测组织学和分子标记。此外，我们提出了一种基于共现概率的标签校正图网络来模拟分子标记的共现。最后，我们设计了一种具有动态置信约束损失的组间相互作用策略，以模拟组织学和分子标记的相互作用。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在对弥漫性神经胶质瘤进行分类以及多机构数据集上的相关组织学和分子标记方面优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务学习框架，通过整合组织学特征和分子标记物来分类弥漫性胶质瘤。
AI.motivation: 癌症病理诊断需结合分子标记物与组织学特征，但现有数字病理方法难以有效整合两者，亟需更精确的诊断方案。
AI.method: 设计分层多任务多实例学习框架，结合基于共现概率的标签校正图网络与跨组学交互策略，并引入动态置信度约束损失建模交互关系。
AI.result: 在多机构数据集上，该方法在弥漫性胶质瘤分类及分子标记物预测任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模组织学与分子标记物的交互关系，该框架显著提升了胶质瘤分类准确性，为数字病理学提供了新思路。

method: 设计分层多任务多实例学习框架，结合基于共现概率的标签校正图网络与跨组学交互策略，并引入动态置信度约束损失建模交互关系。
result: 在多机构数据集上，该方法在弥漫性胶质瘤分类及分子标记物预测任务中均优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 通过联合建模组织学与分子标记物的交互关系，该框架显著提升了胶质瘤分类准确性，为数字病理学提供了新思路。
search_text: Multi-task Learning of Histology and Molecular Markers for Classifying Diffuse Glioma 用于分类弥漫性胶质瘤的组织学和分子标记的多任务学习 Most recently, the pathology diagnosis of cancer is shifting to integrating molecular makers with histology features. It is a urgent need for digital pathology methods to effectively integrate molecular markers with histology, which could lead to more accurate diagnosis in the real world scenarios. This paper presents a first attempt to jointly predict molecular markers and histology features and model their interactions for classifying diffuse glioma bases on whole slide images. Specifically, we propose a hierarchical multi-task multi-instance learning framework to jointly predict histology and molecular markers. Moreover, we propose a co-occurrence probability-based label correction graph network to model the co-occurrence of molecular markers. Lastly, we design an inter-omic interaction strategy with the dynamical confidence constraint loss to model the interactions of histology and molecular markers. Our experiments show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in classifying diffuse glioma,as well as related histology and molecular markers on a multi-institutional dataset. 最近，癌症的病理诊断正在转向将分子标记与组织学特征相结合。数字病理学方法迫切需要将分子标记与组织学有效结合，从而在现实世界中实现更准确的诊断。本文首次尝试联合预测分子标记和组织学特征，并对它们的相互作用进行建模，以在整个幻灯片图像上对弥漫性神经胶质瘤进行分类。具体来说，我们提出了一个分层多任务多实例学习框架来联合预测组织学和分子标记。此外，我们提出了一种基于共现概率的标签校正图网络来模拟分子标记的共现。最后，我们设计了一种具有动态置信约束损失的组间相互作用策略，以模拟组织学和分子标记的相互作用。我们的实验表明，我们的方法在对弥漫性神经胶质瘤进行分类以及多机构数据集上的相关组织学和分子标记方面优于其他最先进的方法。 本文提出一种多任务学习框架，通过整合组织学特征和分子标记物来分类弥漫性胶质瘤。 Xiaofei Wang,Stephen Price,Chao Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Qazal Rezaee,Mehdi Delrobaei,Ashkan Giveki,Nasireh Dayarian,Sahar Javaher Haghighi
title: Driver Drowsiness Detection with Commercial EEG Headsets
title_zh: 使用商用脑电图耳机进行驾驶员困倦检测
comment: 546 Preprint version of the manuscript published in the proceedings of the 10th RSI International Conference on Robotics and Mechatronics (ICRoM 2022), Nov. 15-18, 2022, Tehran, Iran
comments: 546 Preprint version of the manuscript published in the proceedings of the 10th RSI International Conference on Robotics and Mechatronics (ICRoM 2022), Nov. 15-18, 2022, Tehran, Iran
abstract: Driver Drowsiness is one of the leading causes of road accidents. Electroencephalography (EEG) is highly affected by drowsiness; hence, EEG-based methods detect drowsiness with the highest accuracy. Developments in manufacturing dry electrodes and headsets have made recording EEG more convenient. Vehicle-based features used for detecting drowsiness are easy to capture but do not have the best performance. In this paper, we investigated the performance of EEG signals recorded in 4 channels with commercial headsets against the vehicle-based technique in drowsiness detection. We recorded EEG signals of 50 volunteers driving a simulator in drowsy and alert states by commercial devices. The observer rating of the drowsiness method was used to determine the drowsiness level of the subjects. The meaningful separation of vehicle-based features, recorded by the simulator, and EEG-based features of the two states of drowsiness and alertness have been investigated. The comparison results indicated that the EEG-based features are separated with lower p-values than the vehicle-based ones in the two states. It is concluded that EEG headsets can be feasible alternatives with better performance compared to vehicle-based methods for detecting drowsiness.
summary: Driver Drowsiness is one of the leading causes of road accidents. Electroencephalography (EEG) is highly affected by drowsiness; hence, EEG-based methods detect drowsiness with the highest accuracy. In this paper, we investigated the performance of EEG signals recorded in 4 channels with commercial headsets against the vehicle-based technique in drowsiness detection. We recorded EEG signals of 50 volunteers driving a simulator in drowsy and alert states by commercial devices. The observer rating of the drowsiness method was used to determine the drowsiness level of the subjects. The meaningful separation of vehicle-based features, recorded by the simulator, and EEG-based features of the two states of drowsiness and alertness have been investigated. The comparison results indicated that the EEG-based features are separated with lower p-values than the vehicle-based ones in the two states. It is concluded that EEG headsets can be feasible alternatives with better performance compared to vehicle-based methods for detecting drowsiness.
abstract_zh: 驾驶员困倦是道路事故的主要原因之一。脑电图 (EEG) 受困倦影响很大；因此，基于脑电图的方法可以最准确地检测困倦。干电极和耳机制造的发展使记录脑电图变得更加方便。用于检测睡意的基于车辆的特征很容易捕获，但不具有最佳性能。在本文中，我们研究了使用商用耳机在 4 个通道中记录的脑电图信号与基于车辆的睡意检测技术的性能。我们通过商业设备记录了 50 名志愿者在昏昏欲睡和警觉状态下驾驶模拟器的脑电图信号。睡意法的观察者评分用于确定受试者的睡意程度。已经研究了模拟器记录的基于车辆的特征以及困倦和警觉两种状态的基于脑电图的特征的有意义的分离。比较结果表明，在两种状态下，基于脑电图的特征以低于基于车辆的特征的 p 值分开。结论是，与基于车辆的睡意检测方法相比，脑电图耳机是可行的替代品，具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了使用商业EEG头戴设备记录的4通道EEG信号在检测驾驶员嗜睡状态中的性能，并与基于车辆特征的方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 驾驶员嗜睡是导致交通事故的主要原因之一，EEG信号受嗜睡影响显著且检测准确率高，但车辆特征方法性能不足，需探索更优方案。
AI.method: 通过商业设备记录50名志愿者在模拟器中清醒与嗜睡状态下的EEG信号，结合观察者评分确定嗜睡水平，比较EEG特征与车辆特征在两种状态下的分离效果（p值）。
AI.result: EEG特征在清醒与嗜睡状态间的p值显著低于车辆特征，表明EEG信号分离效果更优。
AI.conclusion: 商业EEG头戴设备在嗜睡检测中表现优于传统车辆特征方法，具有可行性。

authors_text: HyunJun Jung,Patrick Ruhkamp,Guangyao Zhai,Nikolas Brasch,Yitong Li,Yannick Verdie,Jifei Song,Yiren Zhou,Anil Armagan,Slobodan Ilic,Ales Leonardis,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam
title: On the Importance of Accurate Geometry Data for Dense 3D Vision Tasks
title_zh: 论精确几何数据对于密集 3D 视觉任务的重要性
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2023, Main Paper + Supp. Mat. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.04565
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2023, Main Paper + Supp. Mat. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.04565
abstract: Learning-based methods to solve dense 3D vision problems typically train on 3D sensor data. The respectively used principle of measuring distances provides advantages and drawbacks. These are typically not compared nor discussed in the literature due to a lack of multi-modal datasets. Texture-less regions are problematic for structure from motion and stereo, reflective material poses issues for active sensing, and distances for translucent objects are intricate to measure with existing hardware. Training on inaccurate or corrupt data induces model bias and hampers generalisation capabilities. These effects remain unnoticed if the sensor measurement is considered as ground truth during the evaluation. This paper investigates the effect of sensor errors for the dense 3D vision tasks of depth estimation and reconstruction. We rigorously show the significant impact of sensor characteristics on the learned predictions and notice generalisation issues arising from various technologies in everyday household environments. For evaluation, we introduce a carefully designed dataset\footnote{dataset available at https://github.com/Junggy/HAMMER-dataset} comprising measurements from commodity sensors, namely D-ToF, I-ToF, passive/active stereo, and monocular RGB+P. Our study quantifies the considerable sensor noise impact and paves the way to improved dense vision estimates and targeted data fusion.
summary: Learning-based methods to solve dense 3D vision problems typically train on 3D sensor data. The respectively used principle of measuring distances provides advantages and drawbacks. These are typically not compared nor discussed in the literature due to a lack of multi-modal datasets. Texture-less regions are problematic for structure from motion and stereo, reflective material poses issues for active sensing, and distances for translucent objects are intricate to measure with existing hardware. Training on inaccurate or corrupt data induces model bias and hampers generalisation capabilities. These effects remain unnoticed if the sensor measurement is considered as ground truth during the evaluation. This paper investigates the effect of sensor errors for the dense 3D vision tasks of depth estimation and reconstruction. We rigorously show the significant impact of sensor characteristics on the learned predictions and notice generalisation issues arising from various technologies in everyday household environments. For evaluation, we introduce a carefully designed dataset\footnote{dataset available at https://github.com/Junggy/HAMMER-dataset} comprising measurements from commodity sensors, namely D-ToF, I-ToF, passive/active stereo, and monocular RGB+P. Our study quantifies the considerable sensor noise impact and paves the way to improved dense vision estimates and targeted data fusion.
abstract_zh: 解决密集 3D 视觉问题的基于学习的方法通常在 3D 传感器数据上进行训练。分别使用的测量距离的原理具有优点和缺点。由于缺乏多模式数据集，文献中通常不会对这些进行比较或讨论。无纹理区域对于运动和立体结构来说是有问题的，反射材料给主动传感带来了问题，并且使用现有硬件测量半透明物体的距离很复杂。对不准确或损坏的数据进行训练会导致模型偏差并妨碍泛化能力。如果在评估过程中将传感器测量值视为基本事实，则这些影响仍然不会被注意到。本文研究了传感器误差对深度估计和重建的密集 3D 视觉任务的影响。我们严格地展示了传感器特性对学习预测的重大影响，并注意到日常家庭环境中各种技术引起的泛化问题。为了进行评估，我们引入了一个精心设计的数据集\脚注{数据集可在 https://github.com/Junggy/HAMMER-dataset 获得}，其中包含来自商用传感器的测量结果，即 D-ToF、I-ToF、被动/主动立体和单目 RGB+P。我们的研究量化了相当大的传感器噪声影响，并为改进密集视觉估计和有针对性的数据融合铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 本文研究传感器误差对密集3D视觉任务（深度估计和重建）的影响，并引入多模态数据集评估不同传感器特性对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对传感器测距原理优缺点的系统比较，且使用不准确的传感器数据训练会导致模型偏差和泛化能力下降，尤其在家庭环境中存在多种传感器技术时问题更显著。
AI.method: 构建包含D-ToF、I-ToF、立体视觉和单目RGB+P等传感器的HAMMER数据集，量化分析传感器噪声对深度估计和重建任务的影响，并评估不同技术的泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明传感器噪声显著影响模型预测，不同技术在家庭环境中存在明显的泛化问题，验证了准确几何数据对密集3D视觉任务的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 传感器误差会诱导模型偏差，需重视数据质量；通过多模态数据融合可提升密集3D视觉任务的鲁棒性，未来研究应关注更精准的几何数据获取与融合方法。

search_text: On the Importance of Accurate Geometry Data for Dense 3D Vision Tasks 论精确几何数据对于密集 3D 视觉任务的重要性 Learning-based methods to solve dense 3D vision problems typically train on 3D sensor data. The respectively used principle of measuring distances provides advantages and drawbacks. These are typically not compared nor discussed in the literature due to a lack of multi-modal datasets. Texture-less regions are problematic for structure from motion and stereo, reflective material poses issues for active sensing, and distances for translucent objects are intricate to measure with existing hardware. Training on inaccurate or corrupt data induces model bias and hampers generalisation capabilities. These effects remain unnoticed if the sensor measurement is considered as ground truth during the evaluation. This paper investigates the effect of sensor errors for the dense 3D vision tasks of depth estimation and reconstruction. We rigorously show the significant impact of sensor characteristics on the learned predictions and notice generalisation issues arising from various technologies in everyday household environments. For evaluation, we introduce a carefully designed dataset\footnote{dataset available at https://github.com/Junggy/HAMMER-dataset} comprising measurements from commodity sensors, namely D-ToF, I-ToF, passive/active stereo, and monocular RGB+P. Our study quantifies the considerable sensor noise impact and paves the way to improved dense vision estimates and targeted data fusion. 解决密集 3D 视觉问题的基于学习的方法通常在 3D 传感器数据上进行训练。分别使用的测量距离的原理具有优点和缺点。由于缺乏多模式数据集，文献中通常不会对这些进行比较或讨论。无纹理区域对于运动和立体结构来说是有问题的，反射材料给主动传感带来了问题，并且使用现有硬件测量半透明物体的距离很复杂。对不准确或损坏的数据进行训练会导致模型偏差并妨碍泛化能力。如果在评估过程中将传感器测量值视为基本事实，则这些影响仍然不会被注意到。本文研究了传感器误差对深度估计和重建的密集 3D 视觉任务的影响。我们严格地展示了传感器特性对学习预测的重大影响，并注意到日常家庭环境中各种技术引起的泛化问题。为了进行评估，我们引入了一个精心设计的数据集\脚注{数据集可在 https://github.com/Junggy/HAMMER-dataset 获得}，其中包含来自商用传感器的测量结果，即 D-ToF、I-ToF、被动/主动立体和单目 RGB+P。我们的研究量化了相当大的传感器噪声影响，并为改进密集视觉估计和有针对性的数据融合铺平了道路。 本文研究传感器误差对密集3D视觉任务（深度估计和重建）的影响，并引入多模态数据集评估不同传感器特性对模型性能的影响。 HyunJun Jung,Patrick Ruhkamp,Guangyao Zhai,Nikolas Brasch,Yitong Li,Yannick Verdie,Jifei Song,Yiren Zhou,Anil Armagan,Slobodan Ilic,Ales Leonardis,Nassir Navab,Benjamin Busam cs.CV

authors_text: Zhipeng Fan,Yao Wang
title: Lightweight Estimation of Hand Mesh and Biomechanically Feasible Kinematic Parameters
title_zh: 手网格和生物力学可行运动学参数的轻量级估计
abstract: 3D hand pose estimation is a long-standing challenge in both robotics and computer vision communities due to its implicit depth ambiguity and often strong self-occlusion. Recently, in addition to the hand skeleton, jointly estimating hand pose and shape has gained more attraction. State-of-the-art methods adopt a model-free approach, estimating the vertices of the hand mesh directly and providing superior accuracy compared to traditional model-based methods directly regressing the parameters of the parametric hand mesh. However, with the large number of mesh vertices to estimate, these methods are often slow in inference. We propose an efficient variation of the previously proposed image-to-lixel approach to efficiently estimate hand meshes from the images. Leveraging recent developments in efficient neural architectures, we significantly reduce the computation complexity without sacrificing the estimation accuracy. Furthermore, we introduce an inverted kinematic(IK) network to translate the estimated hand mesh to a biomechanically feasible set of joint rotation parameters, which is necessary for applications that leverage pose estimation for controlling robotic hands. Finally, an optional post-processing module is proposed to refine the rotation and shape parameters to compensate for the error introduced by the IK net. Our Lite I2L Mesh Net achieves state-of-the-art joint and mesh estimation accuracy with less than $13\%$ of the total computational complexity of the original I2L hand mesh estimator. Adding the IK net and post-optimization modules can improve the accuracy slightly at a small computation cost, but more importantly, provide the kinematic parameters required for robotic applications.
summary: 3D hand pose estimation is a long-standing challenge in both robotics and computer vision communities due to its implicit depth ambiguity and often strong self-occlusion. Recently, in addition to the hand skeleton, jointly estimating hand pose and shape has gained more attraction. State-of-the-art methods adopt a model-free approach, estimating the vertices of the hand mesh directly and providing superior accuracy compared to traditional model-based methods directly regressing the parameters of the parametric hand mesh. However, with the large number of mesh vertices to estimate, these methods are often slow in inference. We propose an efficient variation of the previously proposed image-to-lixel approach to efficiently estimate hand meshes from the images. Leveraging recent developments in efficient neural architectures, we significantly reduce the computation complexity without sacrificing the estimation accuracy. Furthermore, we introduce an inverted kinematic(IK) network to translate the estimated hand mesh to a biomechanically feasible set of joint rotation parameters, which is necessary for applications that leverage pose estimation for controlling robotic hands. Finally, an optional post-processing module is proposed to refine the rotation and shape parameters to compensate for the error introduced by the IK net. Our Lite I2L Mesh Net achieves state-of-the-art joint and mesh estimation accuracy with less than $13\%$ of the total computational complexity of the original I2L hand mesh estimator. Adding the IK net and post-optimization modules can improve the accuracy slightly at a small computation cost, but more importantly, provide the kinematic parameters required for robotic applications.
abstract_zh: 3D 手部姿势估计由于其隐含的深度模糊性和通常强烈的自遮挡，在机器人技术和计算机视觉领域都是一个长期存在的挑战。最近，除了手部骨骼之外，联合估计手部姿势和形状也受到了更多关注。最先进的方法采用无模型方法，直接估计手部网格的顶点，与直接回归参数化手部网格参数的传统基于模型的方法相比，提供了更高的精度。然而，由于需要估计大量网格顶点，这些方法的推理速度通常很慢。我们提出了先前提出的图像到像素方法的有效变体，以有效地从图像估计手部网格。利用高效神经架构的最新发展，我们在不牺牲估计精度的情况下显着降低了计算复杂性。此外，我们引入了反向运动学（IK）网络，将估计的手部网格转换为生物力学上可行的关节旋转参数集，这对于利用姿势估计来控制机器人手的应用程序是必需的。最后，提出了一个可选的后处理模块来细化旋转和形状参数，以补偿 IK 网络引入的误差。我们的 Lite I2L Mesh Net 实现了最先进的关节和网格估计精度，其总计算复杂度不到原始 I2L 手网格估计器的 13\%$。添加IK网络和后优化模块可以以较小的计算成本略微提高精度，但更重要的是，提供机器人应用所需的运动学参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级方法，用于从图像中高效估计手部网格模型及符合生物力学的运动参数，以满足机器人控制需求。
AI.motivation: 现有手部姿态估计方法因需处理大量网格顶点导致推理速度慢，且缺乏直接输出机器人控制所需的生物力学运动参数。
AI.method: 改进图像到像素的估计框架（Lite I2L Mesh Net），结合高效神经网络架构减少计算量，并引入逆运动学网络（IK Net）生成生物力学可行的关节参数，最后通过后处理模块优化结果。
AI.result: 在保持估计精度的同时，计算复杂度降至原方法的13%；添加IK网络和后优化模块可小幅提升精度并生成所需运动参数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证估计精度的前提下显著降低计算成本，为实时机器人控制提供了高效的生物力学参数输出方案。

Recently, in addition to the hand skeleton, jointly estimating hand pose and shape has gained more attraction. State-of-the-art methods adopt a model-free approach, estimating the vertices of the hand mesh directly and providing superior accuracy compared to traditional model-based methods directly regressing the parameters of the parametric hand mesh. Leveraging recent developments in efficient neural architectures, we significantly reduce the computation complexity without sacrificing the estimation accuracy. Furthermore, we introduce an inverted kinematic(IK) network to translate the estimated hand mesh to a biomechanically feasible set of joint rotation parameters, which is necessary for applications that leverage pose estimation for controlling robotic hands. Our Lite I2L Mesh Net achieves state-of-the-art joint and mesh estimation accuracy with less than $13\%$ of the total computational complexity of the original I2L hand mesh estimator. Adding the IK net and post-optimization modules can improve the accuracy slightly at a small computation cost, but more importantly, provide the kinematic parameters required for robotic applications. 3D 手部姿势估计由于其隐含的深度模糊性和通常强烈的自遮挡，在机器人技术和计算机视觉领域都是一个长期存在的挑战。最近，除了手部骨骼之外，联合估计手部姿势和形状也受到了更多关注。最先进的方法采用无模型方法，直接估计手部网格的顶点，与直接回归参数化手部网格参数的传统基于模型的方法相比，提供了更高的精度。然而，由于需要估计大量网格顶点，这些方法的推理速度通常很慢。我们提出了先前提出的图像到像素方法的有效变体，以有效地从图像估计手部网格。利用高效神经架构的最新发展，我们在不牺牲估计精度的情况下显着降低了计算复杂性。此外，我们引入了反向运动学（IK）网络，将估计的手部网格转换为生物力学上可行的关节旋转参数集，这对于利用姿势估计来控制机器人手的应用程序是必需的。最后，提出了一个可选的后处理模块来细化旋转和形状参数，以补偿 IK 网络引入的误差。我们的 Lite I2L Mesh Net 实现了最先进的关节和网格估计精度，其总计算复杂度不到原始 I2L 手网格估计器的 13\%$。添加IK网络和后优化模块可以以较小的计算成本略微提高精度，但更重要的是，提供机器人应用所需的运动学参数。 本文提出一种轻量级方法，用于从图像中高效估计手部网格模型及符合生物力学的运动参数，以满足机器人控制需求。 Zhipeng Fan,Yao Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Asmar Nadeem,Adrian Hilton,Robert Dawes,Graham Thomas,Armin Mustafa
title: SEM-POS: Grammatically and Semantically Correct Video Captioning
title_zh: SEM-POS：语法和语义正确的视频字幕
abstract: Generating grammatically and semantically correct captions in video captioning is a challenging task. The captions generated from the existing methods are either word-by-word that do not align with grammatical structure or miss key information from the input videos. To address these issues, we introduce a novel global-local fusion network, with a Global-Local Fusion Block (GLFB) that encodes and fuses features from different parts of speech (POS) components with visual-spatial features. We use novel combinations of different POS components - 'determinant + subject', 'auxiliary verb', 'verb', and 'determinant + object' for supervision of the POS blocks - Det + Subject, Aux Verb, Verb, and Det + Object respectively. The novel global-local fusion network together with POS blocks helps align the visual features with language description to generate grammatically and semantically correct captions. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on benchmark MSVD and MSRVTT datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach generates more grammatically and semantically correct captions compared to the existing methods, achieving the new state-of-the-art. Ablations on the POS blocks and the GLFB demonstrate the impact of the contributions on the proposed method.
summary: Generating grammatically and semantically correct captions in video captioning is a challenging task. The captions generated from the existing methods are either word-by-word that do not align with grammatical structure or miss key information from the input videos. To address these issues, we introduce a novel global-local fusion network, with a Global-Local Fusion Block (GLFB) that encodes and fuses features from different parts of speech (POS) components with visual-spatial features. We use novel combinations of different POS components - 'determinant + subject', 'auxiliary verb', 'verb', and 'determinant + object' for supervision of the POS blocks - Det + Subject, Aux Verb, Verb, and Det + Object respectively. The novel global-local fusion network together with POS blocks helps align the visual features with language description to generate grammatically and semantically correct captions. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on benchmark MSVD and MSRVTT datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach generates more grammatically and semantically correct captions compared to the existing methods, achieving the new state-of-the-art. Ablations on the POS blocks and the GLFB demonstrate the impact of the contributions on the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 在视频字幕中生成语法和语义正确的字幕是一项具有挑战性的任务。现有方法生成的字幕要么是逐字的，与语法结构不相符，要么遗漏了输入视频中的关键信息。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一种新颖的全局局部融合网络，其中的全局局部融合块（GLFB）可以对不同词性（POS）组件的特征与视觉空间特征进行编码和融合。我们使用不同 POS 组件的新颖组合 - “行列式 + 主语”、“助动词”、“动词”和“行列式 + 宾语”来监督 POS 块 - 分别是 Det + 主语、辅助动词、动词和 Det + 宾语。新颖的全局局部融合网络与 POS 块一起有助于将视觉特征与语言描述对齐，以生成语法和语义正确的字幕。对基准 MSVD 和 MSRVTT 数据集进行的广泛定性和定量实验表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的方法可以生成语法和语义上更正确的字幕，实现了新的最先进技术。 POS 块和 GLFB 上的消融证明了贡献对所提出方法的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SEM-POS的新方法，用于生成语法和语义正确的视频字幕。
AI.motivation: 现有视频字幕生成方法生成的字幕要么不符合语法结构，要么遗漏了视频中的关键信息，因此需要一种新的方法来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种新的全局-局部融合网络，包含一个全局-局部融合块（GLFB），该块通过编码和融合不同词性（POS）成分与视觉-空间特征来生成字幕。使用了‘限定词+主语’、‘助动词’、‘动词’和‘限定词+宾语’等新的POS组合进行监督。
AI.result: 在MSVD和MSRVTT数据集上的大量定性和定量实验表明，该方法生成的字幕比现有方法更符合语法和语义，达到了新的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过融合视觉特征与语言描述，有效提升了视频字幕的语法和语义正确性，为视频字幕生成任务提供了新的思路。

search_text: SEM-POS: Grammatically and Semantically Correct Video Captioning SEM-POS：语法和语义正确的视频字幕 Generating grammatically and semantically correct captions in video captioning is a challenging task. The captions generated from the existing methods are either word-by-word that do not align with grammatical structure or miss key information from the input videos. To address these issues, we introduce a novel global-local fusion network, with a Global-Local Fusion Block (GLFB) that encodes and fuses features from different parts of speech (POS) components with visual-spatial features. We use novel combinations of different POS components - 'determinant + subject', 'auxiliary verb', 'verb', and 'determinant + object' for supervision of the POS blocks - Det + Subject, Aux Verb, Verb, and Det + Object respectively. The novel global-local fusion network together with POS blocks helps align the visual features with language description to generate grammatically and semantically correct captions. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experiments on benchmark MSVD and MSRVTT datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach generates more grammatically and semantically correct captions compared to the existing methods, achieving the new state-of-the-art. Ablations on the POS blocks and the GLFB demonstrate the impact of the contributions on the proposed method. 在视频字幕中生成语法和语义正确的字幕是一项具有挑战性的任务。现有方法生成的字幕要么是逐字的，与语法结构不相符，要么遗漏了输入视频中的关键信息。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一种新颖的全局局部融合网络，其中的全局局部融合块（GLFB）可以对不同词性（POS）组件的特征与视觉空间特征进行编码和融合。我们使用不同 POS 组件的新颖组合 - “行列式 + 主语”、“助动词”、“动词”和“行列式 + 宾语”来监督 POS 块 - 分别是 Det + 主语、辅助动词、动词和 Det + 宾语。新颖的全局局部融合网络与 POS 块一起有助于将视觉特征与语言描述对齐，以生成语法和语义正确的字幕。对基准 MSVD 和 MSRVTT 数据集进行的广泛定性和定量实验表明，与现有方法相比，所提出的方法可以生成语法和语义上更正确的字幕，实现了新的最先进技术。 POS 块和 GLFB 上的消融证明了贡献对所提出方法的影响。 本文提出了一种名为SEM-POS的新方法，用于生成语法和语义正确的视频字幕。 Asmar Nadeem,Adrian Hilton,Robert Dawes,Graham Thomas,Armin Mustafa cs.CV

authors_text: Dina Bashkirova,Samarth Mishra,Diala Lteif,Piotr Teterwak,Donghyun Kim,Fadi Alladkani,James Akl,Berk Calli,Sarah Adel Bargal,Kate Saenko,Daehan Kim,Minseok Seo,YoungJin Jeon,Dong-Geol Choi,Shahaf Ettedgui,Raja Giryes,Shady Abu-Hussein,Binhui Xie,Shuang Li
title: VisDA 2022 Challenge: Domain Adaptation for Industrial Waste Sorting
title_zh: VisDA 2022 挑战赛：工业废物分类的领域适应
abstract: Label-efficient and reliable semantic segmentation is essential for many real-life applications, especially for industrial settings with high visual diversity, such as waste sorting. In industrial waste sorting, one of the biggest challenges is the extreme diversity of the input stream depending on factors like the location of the sorting facility, the equipment available in the facility, and the time of year, all of which significantly impact the composition and visual appearance of the waste stream. These changes in the data are called ``visual domains'', and label-efficient adaptation of models to such domains is needed for successful semantic segmentation of industrial waste. To test the abilities of computer vision models on this task, we present the VisDA 2022 Challenge on Domain Adaptation for Industrial Waste Sorting. Our challenge incorporates a fully-annotated waste sorting dataset, ZeroWaste, collected from two real material recovery facilities in different locations and seasons, as well as a novel procedurally generated synthetic waste sorting dataset, SynthWaste. In this competition, we aim to answer two questions: 1) can we leverage domain adaptation techniques to minimize the domain gap? and 2) can synthetic data augmentation improve performance on this task and help adapt to changing data distributions? The results of the competition show that industrial waste detection poses a real domain adaptation problem, that domain generalization techniques such as augmentations, ensembling, etc., improve the overall performance on the unlabeled target domain examples, and that leveraging synthetic data effectively remains an open problem. See https://ai.bu.edu/visda-2022/
summary: Label-efficient and reliable semantic segmentation is essential for many real-life applications, especially for industrial settings with high visual diversity, such as waste sorting. In industrial waste sorting, one of the biggest challenges is the extreme diversity of the input stream depending on factors like the location of the sorting facility, the equipment available in the facility, and the time of year, all of which significantly impact the composition and visual appearance of the waste stream. These changes in the data are called ``visual domains'', and label-efficient adaptation of models to such domains is needed for successful semantic segmentation of industrial waste. To test the abilities of computer vision models on this task, we present the VisDA 2022 Challenge on Domain Adaptation for Industrial Waste Sorting. Our challenge incorporates a fully-annotated waste sorting dataset, ZeroWaste, collected from two real material recovery facilities in different locations and seasons, as well as a novel procedurally generated synthetic waste sorting dataset, SynthWaste. In this competition, we aim to answer two questions: 1) can we leverage domain adaptation techniques to minimize the domain gap? and 2) can synthetic data augmentation improve performance on this task and help adapt to changing data distributions? The results of the competition show that industrial waste detection poses a real domain adaptation problem, that domain generalization techniques such as augmentations, ensembling, etc., improve the overall performance on the unlabeled target domain examples, and that leveraging synthetic data effectively remains an open problem. See https://ai.bu.edu/visda-2022/
abstract_zh: 标签高效且可靠的语义分割对于许多现实生活中的应用至关重要，特别是对于具有高度视觉多样性的工业环境，例如废物分类。在工业废物分类中，最大的挑战之一是输入流的极端多样性，具体取决于分类设施的位置、设施中可用的设备以及一年中的时间等因素，所有这些都会显着影响废物流的成分和视觉外观。数据中的这些变化被称为“视觉域”，要成功地对工业废物进行语义分割，需要对模型进行标签有效地适应这些域。为了测试计算机视觉模型在这项任务上的能力，我们提出了 VisDA 2022 工业废物分类领域适应挑战赛。我们的挑战包含从不同地点和季节的两个真实材料回收设施收集的完全注释的废物分类数据集 ZeroWaste，以及新的程序生成的合成废物分类数据集 SynthWaste。在本次比赛中，我们旨在回答两个问题：1）我们能否利用领域适应技术来最小化领域差距？ 2）合成数据增强能否提高此任务的性能并帮助适应不断变化的数据分布？竞赛结果表明，工业废物检测提出了真正的领域适应问题，领域泛化技术（例如增强、集成等）提高了未标记目标领域示例的整体性能，并且有效利用合成数据仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。参见 https://ai.bu.edu/visda-2022/

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了VisDA 2022挑战赛，旨在通过领域自适应技术解决工业废料分类中的视觉领域差异问题，并评估合成数据增强的效果。
AI.motivation: 工业废料分类面临输入流视觉多样性极高的挑战，不同地点、设备和季节导致数据分布变化显著，需通过领域自适应技术提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建了真实数据集ZeroWaste（来自两个不同地点和季节的回收设施）和合成数据集SynthWaste，通过领域自适应技术及数据增强方法评估模型在目标域上的表现。
AI.result: 领域自适应技术能有效缩小领域差距，数据增强和集成方法提升未标注目标域样本性能，但合成数据的有效利用仍为开放问题。
AI.conclusion: 工业废料检测需依赖领域自适应技术，现有通用化方法有一定效果，但合成数据的优化和应用仍需进一步研究。

authors_text: Yitian Zhang,Yue Bai,Chang Liu,Huan Wang,Sheng Li,Yun Fu
title: Frame Flexible Network
title_zh: 框架灵活组网
abstract: Existing video recognition algorithms always conduct different training pipelines for inputs with different frame numbers, which requires repetitive training operations and multiplying storage costs. If we evaluate the model using other frames which are not used in training, we observe the performance will drop significantly (see Fig.1), which is summarized as Temporal Frequency Deviation phenomenon. To fix this issue, we propose a general framework, named Frame Flexible Network (FFN), which not only enables the model to be evaluated at different frames to adjust its computation, but also reduces the memory costs of storing multiple models significantly. Concretely, FFN integrates several sets of training sequences, involves Multi-Frequency Alignment (MFAL) to learn temporal frequency invariant representations, and leverages Multi-Frequency Adaptation (MFAD) to further strengthen the representation abilities. Comprehensive empirical validations using various architectures and popular benchmarks solidly demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization of FFN (e.g., 7.08/5.15/2.17% performance gain at Frame 4/8/16 on Something-Something V1 dataset over Uniformer). Code is available at https://github.com/BeSpontaneous/FFN.
summary: Existing video recognition algorithms always conduct different training pipelines for inputs with different frame numbers, which requires repetitive training operations and multiplying storage costs. If we evaluate the model using other frames which are not used in training, we observe the performance will drop significantly (see Fig.1), which is summarized as Temporal Frequency Deviation phenomenon. To fix this issue, we propose a general framework, named Frame Flexible Network (FFN), which not only enables the model to be evaluated at different frames to adjust its computation, but also reduces the memory costs of storing multiple models significantly. Concretely, FFN integrates several sets of training sequences, involves Multi-Frequency Alignment (MFAL) to learn temporal frequency invariant representations, and leverages Multi-Frequency Adaptation (MFAD) to further strengthen the representation abilities. Comprehensive empirical validations using various architectures and popular benchmarks solidly demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization of FFN (e.g., 7.08/5.15/2.17% performance gain at Frame 4/8/16 on Something-Something V1 dataset over Uniformer). Code is available at https://github.com/BeSpontaneous/FFN.
abstract_zh: 现有的视频识别算法总是对不同帧数的输入进行不同的训练管道，这需要重复的训练操作并成倍增加存储成本。如果我们使用训练中未使用的其他帧来评估模型，我们会观察到性能会显着下降（见图1），这可概括为时间频率偏差现象。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为帧灵活网络（FFN）的通用框架，它不仅使模型能够在不同的帧上进行评估以调整其计算，而且还显着降低了存储多个模型的内存成本。具体来说，FFN集成了多组训练序列，涉及多频对齐（MFAL）来学习时间频率不变的表示，并利用多频适应（MFAD）来进一步增强表示能力。使用各种架构和流行基准的综合实证验证有力地证明了 FFN 的有效性和泛化性（例如，在 Something-Something V1 数据集上，在 4/8/16 帧上，相对于 Uniformer，性能提升了 7.08/5.15/2.17%）。代码可在 https://github.com/BeSpontaneous/FFN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Frame Flexible Network (FFN)的通用框架，旨在解决视频识别中因输入帧数不同导致的重复训练和存储成本高的问题，同时提升模型在不同帧数下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频识别算法需为不同帧数输入设计独立训练流程，导致训练重复性和存储成本增加；当使用未训练的帧数进行评估时，性能显著下降（Temporal Frequency Deviation现象）。
AI.method: FFN通过集成多组训练序列，结合多频对齐（MFAL）学习时间频率不变表示，并利用多频适配（MFAD）增强表示能力，实现模型在不同帧数下的灵活评估与计算调整。
AI.result: 在Something-Something V1数据集上，FFN在4/8/16帧下分别较Uniformer提升7.08/5.15/2.17%性能，且显著降低多模型存储成本。
AI.conclusion: FFN有效缓解了时间频率偏差问题，提供了一种通用且高效的视频识别框架，适用于不同帧数和架构，具有广泛的应用潜力。

If we evaluate the model using other frames which are not used in training, we observe the performance will drop significantly (see Fig.1), which is summarized as Temporal Frequency Deviation phenomenon. Concretely, FFN integrates several sets of training sequences, involves Multi-Frequency Alignment (MFAL) to learn temporal frequency invariant representations, and leverages Multi-Frequency Adaptation (MFAD) to further strengthen the representation abilities. Comprehensive empirical validations using various architectures and popular benchmarks solidly demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization of FFN (e.g., 7.08/5.15/2.17% performance gain at Frame 4/8/16 on Something-Something V1 dataset over Uniformer). Code is available at https://github.com/BeSpontaneous/FFN. 现有的视频识别算法总是对不同帧数的输入进行不同的训练管道，这需要重复的训练操作并成倍增加存储成本。如果我们使用训练中未使用的其他帧来评估模型，我们会观察到性能会显着下降（见图1），这可概括为时间频率偏差现象。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个名为帧灵活网络（FFN）的通用框架，它不仅使模型能够在不同的帧上进行评估以调整其计算，而且还显着降低了存储多个模型的内存成本。具体来说，FFN集成了多组训练序列，涉及多频对齐（MFAL）来学习时间频率不变的表示，并利用多频适应（MFAD）来进一步增强表示能力。使用各种架构和流行基准的综合实证验证有力地证明了 FFN 的有效性和泛化性（例如，在 Something-Something V1 数据集上，在 4/8/16 帧上，相对于 Uniformer，性能提升了 7.08/5.15/2.17%）。代码可在 https://github.com/BeSpontaneous/FFN 获取。 本文提出了一种名为Frame Flexible Network (FFN)的通用框架，旨在解决视频识别中因输入帧数不同导致的重复训练和存储成本高的问题，同时提升模型在不同帧数下的性能。 Yitian Zhang,Yue Bai,Chang Liu,Huan Wang,Sheng Li,Yun Fu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhou Huang,Hang Dai,Tian-Zhu Xiang,Shuo Wang,Huai-Xin Chen,Jie Qin,Huan Xiong
title: Feature Shrinkage Pyramid for Camouflaged Object Detection with Transformers
title_zh: 使用变形金刚进行伪装物体检测的特征收缩金字塔
abstract: Vision transformers have recently shown strong global context modeling capabilities in camouflaged object detection. However, they suffer from two major limitations: less effective locality modeling and insufficient feature aggregation in decoders, which are not conducive to camouflaged object detection that explores subtle cues from indistinguishable backgrounds. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel transformer-based Feature Shrinkage Pyramid Network (FSPNet), which aims to hierarchically decode locality-enhanced neighboring transformer features through progressive shrinking for camouflaged object detection. Specifically, we propose a nonlocal token enhancement module (NL-TEM) that employs the non-local mechanism to interact neighboring tokens and explore graph-based high-order relations within tokens to enhance local representations of transformers. Moreover, we design a feature shrinkage decoder (FSD) with adjacent interaction modules (AIM), which progressively aggregates adjacent transformer features through a layer-bylayer shrinkage pyramid to accumulate imperceptible but effective cues as much as possible for object information decoding. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that the proposed model significantly outperforms the existing 24 competitors on three challenging COD benchmark datasets under six widely-used evaluation metrics. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/ZhouHuang23/FSPNet.
summary: Vision transformers have recently shown strong global context modeling capabilities in camouflaged object detection. However, they suffer from two major limitations: less effective locality modeling and insufficient feature aggregation in decoders, which are not conducive to camouflaged object detection that explores subtle cues from indistinguishable backgrounds. To address these issues, in this paper, we propose a novel transformer-based Feature Shrinkage Pyramid Network (FSPNet), which aims to hierarchically decode locality-enhanced neighboring transformer features through progressive shrinking for camouflaged object detection. Specifically, we propose a nonlocal token enhancement module (NL-TEM) that employs the non-local mechanism to interact neighboring tokens and explore graph-based high-order relations within tokens to enhance local representations of transformers. Moreover, we design a feature shrinkage decoder (FSD) with adjacent interaction modules (AIM), which progressively aggregates adjacent transformer features through a layer-bylayer shrinkage pyramid to accumulate imperceptible but effective cues as much as possible for object information decoding. Extensive quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that the proposed model significantly outperforms the existing 24 competitors on three challenging COD benchmark datasets under six widely-used evaluation metrics. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/ZhouHuang23/FSPNet.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器最近在伪装对象检测中表现出了强大的全局上下文建模能力。然而，它们面临两个主要限制：局部建模效率较低和解码器中的特征聚合不足，这不利于伪装目标检测，从而探索难以区分的背景中的微妙线索。为了解决这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于变压器的特征收缩金字塔网络（FSPNet），其目的是通过渐进收缩来分层解码局部增强的相邻变压器特征以进行伪装目标检测。具体来说，我们提出了一种非局部令牌增强模块（NL-TEM），它采用非局部机制来交互相邻令牌并探索令牌内基于图的高阶关系以增强变压器的局部表示。此外，我们设计了具有相邻交互模块（AIM）的特征收缩解码器（FSD），它通过逐层收缩金字塔逐步聚合相邻的变换器特征，以尽可能多地积累难以察觉但有效的线索，用于对象信息解码。广泛的定量和定性实验表明，在六个广泛使用的评估指标下，所提出的模型在三个具有挑战性的 COD 基准数据集上显着优于现有的 24 个竞争对手。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/ZhouHuang23/FSPNet 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的特征收缩金字塔网络（FSPNet），用于改进伪装目标检测中的局部特征建模与特征聚合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer在伪装目标检测中存在局部性建模不足和解码器特征聚合效率低的问题，导致难以捕捉背景与目标间的细微差异。
AI.method: 设计非局部token增强模块（NL-TEM）提升局部表征，并构建包含相邻交互模块（AIM）的特征收缩解码器（FSD），通过逐层收缩金字塔结构聚合相邻特征。
AI.result: 在三个COD基准数据集上，FSPNet在六个常用指标中均显著优于24种现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: FSPNet通过增强局部特征交互与渐进式特征收缩机制，有效提升了伪装目标检测的性能。

authors_text: Jongheon Jeong,Yang Zou,Taewan Kim,Dongqing Zhang,Avinash Ravichandran,Onkar Dabeer
title: WinCLIP: Zero-/Few-Shot Anomaly Classification and Segmentation
title_zh: WinCLIP：零/少样本异常分类和分割
comment: Accepted to Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023
comments: Accepted to Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023
abstract: Visual anomaly classification and segmentation are vital for automating industrial quality inspection. The focus of prior research in the field has been on training custom models for each quality inspection task, which requires task-specific images and annotation. In this paper we move away from this regime, addressing zero-shot and few-normal-shot anomaly classification and segmentation. Recently CLIP, a vision-language model, has shown revolutionary generality with competitive zero-/few-shot performance in comparison to full-supervision. But CLIP falls short on anomaly classification and segmentation tasks. Hence, we propose window-based CLIP (WinCLIP) with (1) a compositional ensemble on state words and prompt templates and (2) efficient extraction and aggregation of window/patch/image-level features aligned with text. We also propose its few-normal-shot extension WinCLIP+, which uses complementary information from normal images. In MVTec-AD (and VisA), without further tuning, WinCLIP achieves 91.8%/85.1% (78.1%/79.6%) AUROC in zero-shot anomaly classification and segmentation while WinCLIP+ does 93.1%/95.2% (83.8%/96.4%) in 1-normal-shot, surpassing state-of-the-art by large margins.
summary: Visual anomaly classification and segmentation are vital for automating industrial quality inspection. The focus of prior research in the field has been on training custom models for each quality inspection task, which requires task-specific images and annotation. In this paper we move away from this regime, addressing zero-shot and few-normal-shot anomaly classification and segmentation. Recently CLIP, a vision-language model, has shown revolutionary generality with competitive zero-/few-shot performance in comparison to full-supervision. But CLIP falls short on anomaly classification and segmentation tasks. Hence, we propose window-based CLIP (WinCLIP) with (1) a compositional ensemble on state words and prompt templates and (2) efficient extraction and aggregation of window/patch/image-level features aligned with text. We also propose its few-normal-shot extension WinCLIP+, which uses complementary information from normal images. In MVTec-AD (and VisA), without further tuning, WinCLIP achieves 91.8%/85.1% (78.1%/79.6%) AUROC in zero-shot anomaly classification and segmentation while WinCLIP+ does 93.1%/95.2% (83.8%/96.4%) in 1-normal-shot, surpassing state-of-the-art by large margins.
abstract_zh: 视觉异常分类和分割对于自动化工业质量检测至关重要。该领域先前研究的重点是为每个质量检查任务训练自定义模型，这需要特定于任务的图像和注释。在本文中，我们摆脱了这种机制，解决了零样本和少量正常样本的异常分类和分割问题。最近，CLIP（一种视觉语言模型）显示出革命性的通用性，与完全监督相比，具有具有竞争力的零/少样本性能。但 CLIP 在异常分类和分割任务方面存在不足。因此，我们提出基于窗口的 CLIP (WinCLIP)，其中 (1) 状态词和提示模板的组合集成，以及 (2) 与文本对齐的窗口/补丁/图像级特征的有效提取和聚合。我们还提出了少数正常镜头扩展 WinCLIP+，它使用正常图像的补充信息。在 MVTec-AD（和 VisA）中，无需进一步调整，WinCLIP 在零样本异常分类和分割中实现了 91.8%/85.1% (78.1%/79.6%) AUROC，而 WinCLIP+ 在 1-正常样本中实现了 93.1%/95.2% (83.8%/96.4%)，大幅超越了现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WinCLIP和WinCLIP+方法，用于在零样本和少样本情况下进行工业视觉异常分类与分割。
AI.motivation: 传统工业质检需为每个任务定制模型并依赖大量标注数据，而CLIP等模型在异常检测任务中表现不足，需改进以实现零样本/少样本学习。
AI.method: 设计基于窗口的CLIP模型（WinCLIP），通过组合状态词和提示模板增强文本-图像对齐，并高效提取多粒度特征；进一步提出WinCLIP+，利用正常图像的互补信息提升少样本性能。
AI.result: 在MVTec-AD和VisA数据集上，WinCLIP零样本分类/分割AUROC达91.8%/85.1%和78.1%/79.6%，WinCLIP+在1样本情况下达93.1%/95.2%和83.8%/96.4%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: WinCLIP通过文本-图像对齐优化和多粒度特征融合，有效解决了CLIP在异常检测中的不足，且WinCLIP+的正常样本辅助机制进一步提升了少样本性能。

We also propose its few-normal-shot extension WinCLIP+, which uses complementary information from normal images. In MVTec-AD (and VisA), without further tuning, WinCLIP achieves 91.8%/85.1% (78.1%/79.6%) AUROC in zero-shot anomaly classification and segmentation while WinCLIP+ does 93.1%/95.2% (83.8%/96.4%) in 1-normal-shot, surpassing state-of-the-art by large margins. 视觉异常分类和分割对于自动化工业质量检测至关重要。该领域先前研究的重点是为每个质量检查任务训练自定义模型，这需要特定于任务的图像和注释。在本文中，我们摆脱了这种机制，解决了零样本和少量正常样本的异常分类和分割问题。最近，CLIP（一种视觉语言模型）显示出革命性的通用性，与完全监督相比，具有具有竞争力的零/少样本性能。但 CLIP 在异常分类和分割任务方面存在不足。因此，我们提出基于窗口的 CLIP (WinCLIP)，其中 (1) 状态词和提示模板的组合集成，以及 (2) 与文本对齐的窗口/补丁/图像级特征的有效提取和聚合。我们还提出了少数正常镜头扩展 WinCLIP+，它使用正常图像的补充信息。在 MVTec-AD（和 VisA）中，无需进一步调整，WinCLIP 在零样本异常分类和分割中实现了 91.8%/85.1% (78.1%/79.6%) AUROC，而 WinCLIP+ 在 1-正常样本中实现了 93.1%/95.2% (83.8%/96.4%)，大幅超越了现有技术。 本文提出WinCLIP和WinCLIP+方法，用于在零样本和少样本情况下进行工业视觉异常分类与分割。 Jongheon Jeong,Yang Zou,Taewan Kim,Dongqing Zhang,Avinash Ravichandran,Onkar Dabeer cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Sander Riisøen Jyhne,Per-Arne Andersen,Morten Goodwin
title: A Contrastive Learning Scheme with Transformer Innate Patches
title_zh: 具有 Transformer 固有补丁的对比学习方案
abstract: This paper presents Contrastive Transformer, a contrastive learning scheme using the Transformer innate patches. Contrastive Transformer enables existing contrastive learning techniques, often used for image classification, to benefit dense downstream prediction tasks such as semantic segmentation. The scheme performs supervised patch-level contrastive learning, selecting the patches based on the ground truth mask, subsequently used for hard-negative and hard-positive sampling. The scheme applies to all vision-transformer architectures, is easy to implement, and introduces minimal additional memory footprint. Additionally, the scheme removes the need for huge batch sizes, as each patch is treated as an image. We apply and test Contrastive Transformer for the case of aerial image segmentation, known for low-resolution data, large class imbalance, and similar semantic classes. We perform extensive experiments to show the efficacy of the Contrastive Transformer scheme on the ISPRS Potsdam aerial image segmentation dataset. Additionally, we show the generalizability of our scheme by applying it to multiple inherently different Transformer architectures. Ultimately, the results show a consistent increase in mean IoU across all classes.
summary: This paper presents Contrastive Transformer, a contrastive learning scheme using the Transformer innate patches. Contrastive Transformer enables existing contrastive learning techniques, often used for image classification, to benefit dense downstream prediction tasks such as semantic segmentation. The scheme performs supervised patch-level contrastive learning, selecting the patches based on the ground truth mask, subsequently used for hard-negative and hard-positive sampling. The scheme applies to all vision-transformer architectures, is easy to implement, and introduces minimal additional memory footprint. Additionally, the scheme removes the need for huge batch sizes, as each patch is treated as an image. We apply and test Contrastive Transformer for the case of aerial image segmentation, known for low-resolution data, large class imbalance, and similar semantic classes. We perform extensive experiments to show the efficacy of the Contrastive Transformer scheme on the ISPRS Potsdam aerial image segmentation dataset. Additionally, we show the generalizability of our scheme by applying it to multiple inherently different Transformer architectures. Ultimately, the results show a consistent increase in mean IoU across all classes.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 Contrastive Transformer，这是一种使用 Transformer 固有补丁的对比学习方案。 Contrastive Transformer 使现有的对比学习技术（通常用于图像分类）能够受益于语义分割等密集的下游预测任务。该方案执行有监督的补丁级对比学习，根据地面真值掩模选择补丁，随后用于硬负和硬正采样。该方案适用于所有视觉转换器架构，易于实现，并且引入的额外内存占用最少。此外，该方案消除了对巨大批量大小的需求，因为每个补丁都被视为图像。我们在航空图像分割的情况下应用和测试对比变换器，这种分割以低分辨率数据、大类不平衡和相似的语义类而闻名。我们进行了大量的实验来展示 Contrastive Transformer 方案在 ISPRS Potsdam 航空图像分割数据集上的有效性。此外，我们通过将我们的方案应用于多个本质上不同的 Transformer 架构来展示其通用性。最终，结果显示所有类别的平均 IoU 持续增加。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer原生块的对比学习方案，用于提升密集下游预测任务（如语义分割）的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的对比学习方法主要用于图像分类，难以直接应用于密集预测任务。因此，需要一种新的方法来提升对比学习在语义分割等任务中的效果。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种名为Contrastive Transformer的对比学习方案，通过利用Transformer的原生块进行监督对比学习，并基于真实标签进行难负样本和难正样本的采样。该方法适用于所有视觉Transformer架构，且易于实现，内存占用少。
AI.result: 在ISPRS Potsdam遥感图像分割数据集上的实验表明，Contrastive Transformer显著提升了各类别的平均IoU指标。此外，该方法在多种不同的Transformer架构上也具有良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Contrastive Transformer是一种有效且通用的对比学习方法，能够显著提升语义分割任务的性能，适用于多种视觉Transformer架构。

authors_text: Ben Vardi,Alessandro Torcinovich,Marina Khoroshiltseva,Marcello Pelillo,Ohad Ben-Shahar
title: Multi-Phase Relaxation Labeling for Square Jigsaw Puzzle Solving
title_zh: 用于解决方形拼图游戏的多阶段松弛标签
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures. Published in Proceedings of the 18th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications - Volume 4 VISAPP: VISAPP, 785-795, 2023
comments: 10 pages, 7 figures. Published in Proceedings of the 18th International Joint Conference on Computer Vision, Imaging and Computer Graphics Theory and Applications - Volume 4 VISAPP: VISAPP, 785-795, 2023
abstract: We present a novel method for solving square jigsaw puzzles based on global optimization. The method is fully automatic, assumes no prior information, and can handle puzzles with known or unknown piece orientation. At the core of the optimization process is nonlinear relaxation labeling, a well-founded approach for deducing global solutions from local constraints, but unlike the classical scheme here we propose a multi-phase approach that guarantees convergence to feasible puzzle solutions. Next to the algorithmic novelty, we also present a new compatibility function for the quantification of the affinity between adjacent puzzle pieces. Competitive results and the advantage of the multi-phase approach are demonstrated on standard datasets.
summary: We present a novel method for solving square jigsaw puzzles based on global optimization. The method is fully automatic, assumes no prior information, and can handle puzzles with known or unknown piece orientation. At the core of the optimization process is nonlinear relaxation labeling, a well-founded approach for deducing global solutions from local constraints, but unlike the classical scheme here we propose a multi-phase approach that guarantees convergence to feasible puzzle solutions. Next to the algorithmic novelty, we also present a new compatibility function for the quantification of the affinity between adjacent puzzle pieces. Competitive results and the advantage of the multi-phase approach are demonstrated on standard datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于全局优化的解决方形拼图游戏的新方法。该方法是全自动的，不假设任何先验信息，并且可以处理已知或未知的棋子方向的谜题。优化过程的核心是非线性松弛标签，这是一种从局部约束推导出全局解决方案的有根据的方法，但与这里的经典方案不同，我们提出了一种多阶段方法，可以保证收敛到可行的难题解决方案。除了算法新颖性之外，我们还提出了一种新的兼容性函数，用于量化相邻拼图之间的亲和力。标准数据集上展示了多阶段方法的竞争结果和优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于全局优化的自动解决方形拼图问题的新方法，无需先验信息且能处理已知或未知的拼图块方向。
AI.motivation: 传统拼图求解方法可能存在对先验信息的依赖或无法保证收敛性，需改进以实现更鲁棒的自动求解。
AI.method: 采用多阶段非线性松弛标记算法，结合新的兼容性函数量化相邻拼图块的亲和力，确保收敛到可行解。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上展示了该方法的竞争力，验证了多阶段策略的优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过全局优化和多阶段松弛标记有效解决了方形拼图问题，为自动拼图提供了新思路。

authors_text: Fateme Zare,Paniz Sedighi,Mehdi Delrobaei
title: A Wearable RFID-Based Navigation System for the Visually Impaired
title_zh: 针对视障人士的可穿戴式基于 RFID 的导航系统
abstract: Recent studies have focused on developing advanced assistive devices to help blind or visually impaired people. Navigation is challenging for this community; however, developing a simple yet reliable navigation system is still an unmet need. This study targets the navigation problem and proposes a wearable assistive system. We developed a smart glove and shoe set based on radio-frequency identification technology to assist visually impaired people with navigation and orientation in indoor environments. The system enables the user to find the directions through audio feedback. To evaluate the device's performance, we designed a simple experimental setup. The proposed system has a simple structure and can be personalized according to the user's requirements. The results identified that the platform is reliable, power efficient, and accurate enough for indoor navigation.
summary: Recent studies have focused on developing advanced assistive devices to help blind or visually impaired people. Navigation is challenging for this community; however, developing a simple yet reliable navigation system is still an unmet need. This study targets the navigation problem and proposes a wearable assistive system. We developed a smart glove and shoe set based on radio-frequency identification technology to assist visually impaired people with navigation and orientation in indoor environments. The system enables the user to find the directions through audio feedback. To evaluate the device's performance, we designed a simple experimental setup. The proposed system has a simple structure and can be personalized according to the user's requirements. The results identified that the platform is reliable, power efficient, and accurate enough for indoor navigation.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究重点是开发先进的辅助设备来帮助盲人或视力受损的人。对于这个社区来说，导航是一项挑战；然而，开发简单而可靠的导航系统仍然是一个未满足的需求。本研究针对导航问题，提出了一种可穿戴辅助系统。我们开发了基于射频识别技术的智能手套和鞋子套装，以帮助视障人士在室内环境中进行导航和定位。该系统使用户能够通过音频反馈找到方向。为了评估设备的性能，我们设计了一个简单的实验装置。该系统结构简单，可以根据用户的需求进行个性化设计。结果表明，该平台可靠、省电且足够准确，适合室内导航。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于RFID技术的可穿戴导航系统，帮助视障人士在室内环境中实现定位与导航。
AI.motivation: 视障人士在室内导航中面临挑战，现有设备复杂或不可靠，亟需开发简单且精准的辅助系统。
AI.method: 研发包含RFID技术的智能手套和鞋套，通过音频反馈指引方向，并设计实验验证系统性能。
AI.result: 实验表明系统结构简单、能耗低且定位准确，能满足室内导航需求。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可靠且可定制，为视障人士提供了实用的室内导航解决方案。

search_text: A Wearable RFID-Based Navigation System for the Visually Impaired 针对视障人士的可穿戴式基于 RFID 的导航系统 Recent studies have focused on developing advanced assistive devices to help blind or visually impaired people. Navigation is challenging for this community; however, developing a simple yet reliable navigation system is still an unmet need. This study targets the navigation problem and proposes a wearable assistive system. We developed a smart glove and shoe set based on radio-frequency identification technology to assist visually impaired people with navigation and orientation in indoor environments. The system enables the user to find the directions through audio feedback. To evaluate the device's performance, we designed a simple experimental setup. The proposed system has a simple structure and can be personalized according to the user's requirements. The results identified that the platform is reliable, power efficient, and accurate enough for indoor navigation. 最近的研究重点是开发先进的辅助设备来帮助盲人或视力受损的人。对于这个社区来说，导航是一项挑战；然而，开发简单而可靠的导航系统仍然是一个未满足的需求。本研究针对导航问题，提出了一种可穿戴辅助系统。我们开发了基于射频识别技术的智能手套和鞋子套装，以帮助视障人士在室内环境中进行导航和定位。该系统使用户能够通过音频反馈找到方向。为了评估设备的性能，我们设计了一个简单的实验装置。该系统结构简单，可以根据用户的需求进行个性化设计。结果表明，该平台可靠、省电且足够准确，适合室内导航。 本文提出了一种基于RFID技术的可穿戴导航系统，帮助视障人士在室内环境中实现定位与导航。 Fateme Zare,Paniz Sedighi,Mehdi Delrobaei cs.HC,eess.SY

authors_text: Cheng Wang,Fengwei Guo,Ruilin Yu,Luyao Wang,Yuxin Zhang
title: The Application of Driver Models in the Safety Assessment of Autonomous Vehicles: A Survey
title_zh: 驾驶员模型在自动驾驶汽车安全评估中的应用：调查
abstract: Driver models play a vital role in developing and verifying autonomous vehicles (AVs). Previously, they are mainly applied in traffic flow simulation to model driver behavior. With the development of AVs, driver models attract much attention again due to their potential contributions to AV safety assessment. The simulation-based testing method is an effective measure to accelerate AV testing due to its safe and efficient characteristics. Nonetheless, realistic driver models are prerequisites for valid simulation results. Additionally, an AV is assumed to be at least as safe as a careful and competent driver, which is modeled by driver models as well. Therefore, driver models are essential for AV safety assessment from the current perspective. However, no comparison or discussion of driver models is available regarding their utility to AVs in the last five years despite their necessities in the release of AVs. This motivates us to present a comprehensive survey of driver models in the paper and compare their applicability. Requirements for driver models as applied to AV safety assessment are discussed. A summary of driver models for simulation-based testing and AV benchmarks is provided. Evaluation metrics are defined to compare their strength and weakness. Finally, potential gaps in existing driver models are identified, which provide direction for future work. This study gives related researchers especially regulators an overview and helps them to define appropriate driver models for AVs.

This study gives related researchers especially regulators an overview and helps them to define appropriate driver models for AVs.
abstract_zh: 驾驶员模型在开发和验证自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 中发挥着至关重要的作用。此前，它们主要应用于交通流模拟中，以模拟驾驶员的行为。随着自动驾驶汽车的发展，驾驶员模型因其对自动驾驶汽车安全评估的潜在贡献而再次引起人们的关注。基于仿真的测试方法因其安全、高效的特点，是加速AV测试的有效措施。尽管如此，真实的驾驶员模型是有效仿真结果的先决条件。此外，自动驾驶汽车被认为至少与细心且称职的驾驶员一样安全，这也是由驾驶员模型建模的。因此，从目前的角度来看，驾驶员模型对于自动驾驶汽车安全评估至关重要。然而，尽管驱动程序模型对于发布自动驾驶汽车来说是必要的，但在过去五年中，没有对驱动模型对自动驾驶汽车的实用性进行比较或讨论。这促使我们在本文中对驾驶员模型进行全面调查并比较它们的适用性。讨论了应用于自动驾驶安全评估的驾驶员模型的要求。提供了用于基于仿真的测试和 AV 基准测试的驱动程序模型的摘要。评估指标的定义是为了比较它们的优势和劣势。最后，确定了现有驱动程序模型中的潜在差距，这为未来的工作提供了方向。这项研究为相关研究人员（尤其是监管机构）提供了一个概述，并帮助他们定义适合自动驾驶汽车的驱动程序模型。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了驾驶员模型在自动驾驶车辆安全评估中的应用，比较了其适用性并指出现有模型的不足。
AI.motivation: 尽管驾驶员模型对自动驾驶车辆安全评估至关重要，但近五年内缺乏对其在该领域应用的系统比较和讨论。
AI.method: 通过调研现有驾驶员模型，分析其在仿真测试和AV基准中的应用，定义评估指标并对比优缺点。
AI.result: 总结了适用于AV安全评估的驾驶员模型，提出了评价标准，并识别了当前模型存在的关键缺口。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为研究人员和监管机构提供了模型选择参考，并为未来改进驾驶员模型指明了方向。

authors_text: Yabin Zhu,Chenglong Li,Xiao Wang,Jin Tang,Zhixiang Huang
title: RGBT Tracking via Progressive Fusion Transformer with Dynamically Guided Learning
title_zh: 通过具有动态引导学习功能的渐进式融合变压器进行 RGBT 跟踪
comment: Incorrect experimental setup on the LasHeR dataset
comments: Incorrect experimental setup on the LasHeR dataset
abstract: Existing Transformer-based RGBT tracking methods either use cross-attention to fuse the two modalities, or use self-attention and cross-attention to model both modality-specific and modality-sharing information. However, the significant appearance gap between modalities limits the feature representation ability of certain modalities during the fusion process. To address this problem, we propose a novel Progressive Fusion Transformer called ProFormer, which progressively integrates single-modality information into the multimodal representation for robust RGBT tracking. In particular, ProFormer first uses a self-attention module to collaboratively extract the multimodal representation, and then uses two cross-attention modules to interact it with the features of the dual modalities respectively. In this way, the modality-specific information can well be activated in the multimodal representation. Finally, a feed-forward network is used to fuse two interacted multimodal representations for the further enhancement of the final multimodal representation. In addition, existing learning methods of RGBT trackers either fuse multimodal features into one for final classification, or exploit the relationship between unimodal branches and fused branch through a competitive learning strategy. However, they either ignore the learning of single-modality branches or result in one branch failing to be well optimized. To solve these problems, we propose a dynamically guided learning algorithm that adaptively uses well-performing branches to guide the learning of other branches, for enhancing the representation ability of each branch. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed ProFormer sets a new state-of-the-art performance on RGBT210, RGBT234, LasHeR, and VTUAV datasets.
summary: Existing Transformer-based RGBT tracking methods either use cross-attention to fuse the two modalities, or use self-attention and cross-attention to model both modality-specific and modality-sharing information. However, the significant appearance gap between modalities limits the feature representation ability of certain modalities during the fusion process. To address this problem, we propose a novel Progressive Fusion Transformer called ProFormer, which progressively integrates single-modality information into the multimodal representation for robust RGBT tracking. In particular, ProFormer first uses a self-attention module to collaboratively extract the multimodal representation, and then uses two cross-attention modules to interact it with the features of the dual modalities respectively. In this way, the modality-specific information can well be activated in the multimodal representation. Finally, a feed-forward network is used to fuse two interacted multimodal representations for the further enhancement of the final multimodal representation. In addition, existing learning methods of RGBT trackers either fuse multimodal features into one for final classification, or exploit the relationship between unimodal branches and fused branch through a competitive learning strategy. However, they either ignore the learning of single-modality branches or result in one branch failing to be well optimized. To solve these problems, we propose a dynamically guided learning algorithm that adaptively uses well-performing branches to guide the learning of other branches, for enhancing the representation ability of each branch. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed ProFormer sets a new state-of-the-art performance on RGBT210, RGBT234, LasHeR, and VTUAV datasets.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于 Transformer 的 RGBT 跟踪方法要么使用交叉注意力来融合两种模态，要么使用自注意力和交叉注意力来对模态特定信息和模态共享信息进行建模。然而，模态之间显着的外观差距限制了融合过程中某些模态的特征表示能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 ProFormer 的新型渐进式融合变压器，它逐步将单模态信息集成到多模态表示中，以实现鲁棒的 RGBT 跟踪。特别是，ProFormer 首先使用自注意力模块协作提取多模态表示，然后使用两个交叉注意力模块分别将其与双模态的特征进行交互。这样，可以在多模态表示中很好地激活模态特定信息。最后，使用前馈网络融合两个交互的多模态表示，以进一步增强最终的多模态表示。此外，RGBT跟踪器现有的学习方法要么将多模态特征融合为一个以进行最终分类，要么通过竞争性学习策略利用单模态分支和融合分支之间的关系。然而，它们要么忽略单模态分支的学习，要么导致一个分支无法得到很好的优化。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种动态引导学习算法，自适应地使用表现良好的分支来指导其他分支的学习，以增强每个分支的表示能力。大量实验表明，我们提出的 ProFormer 在 RGBT210、RGBT234、LasHeR 和 VTUAV 数据集上设置了新的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ProFormer的渐进融合Transformer模型，用于提升RGBT（可见光与热红外）跟踪任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的RGBT跟踪方法在融合多模态信息时，因模态间显著的外观差异导致特征表示能力受限，且学习策略存在单模态分支优化不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计渐进融合Transformer（ProFormer），通过自注意力模块提取多模态表示，再利用两个交叉注意力模块分别与双模态特征交互，激活模态特异性信息；最后通过前馈网络融合增强最终表示。同时提出动态引导学习算法，利用表现优异的分支指导其他分支学习。
AI.result: 在RGBT210、RGBT234、LasHeR和VTUAV数据集上，ProFormer达到新的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 渐进融合策略与动态引导学习有效解决了多模态特征融合中的表示局限与分支优化问题，显著提升了RGBT跟踪的准确性。

method: 设计渐进融合Transformer（ProFormer），通过自注意力模块提取多模态表示，再利用两个交叉注意力模块分别与双模态特征交互，激活模态特异性信息；最后通过前馈网络融合增强最终表示。同时提出动态引导学习算法，利用表现优异的分支指导其他分支学习。
result: 在RGBT210、RGBT234、LasHeR和VTUAV数据集上，ProFormer达到新的SOTA性能。
conclusion: 渐进融合策略与动态引导学习有效解决了多模态特征融合中的表示局限与分支优化问题，显著提升了RGBT跟踪的准确性。
search_text: RGBT Tracking via Progressive Fusion Transformer with Dynamically Guided Learning 通过具有动态引导学习功能的渐进式融合变压器进行 RGBT 跟踪 Existing Transformer-based RGBT tracking methods either use cross-attention to fuse the two modalities, or use self-attention and cross-attention to model both modality-specific and modality-sharing information. However, the significant appearance gap between modalities limits the feature representation ability of certain modalities during the fusion process. To address this problem, we propose a novel Progressive Fusion Transformer called ProFormer, which progressively integrates single-modality information into the multimodal representation for robust RGBT tracking. In particular, ProFormer first uses a self-attention module to collaboratively extract the multimodal representation, and then uses two cross-attention modules to interact it with the features of the dual modalities respectively. In this way, the modality-specific information can well be activated in the multimodal representation. Finally, a feed-forward network is used to fuse two interacted multimodal representations for the further enhancement of the final multimodal representation. In addition, existing learning methods of RGBT trackers either fuse multimodal features into one for final classification, or exploit the relationship between unimodal branches and fused branch through a competitive learning strategy. However, they either ignore the learning of single-modality branches or result in one branch failing to be well optimized. To solve these problems, we propose a dynamically guided learning algorithm that adaptively uses well-performing branches to guide the learning of other branches, for enhancing the representation ability of each branch. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed ProFormer sets a new state-of-the-art performance on RGBT210, RGBT234, LasHeR, and VTUAV datasets. 现有的基于 Transformer 的 RGBT 跟踪方法要么使用交叉注意力来融合两种模态，要么使用自注意力和交叉注意力来对模态特定信息和模态共享信息进行建模。然而，模态之间显着的外观差距限制了融合过程中某些模态的特征表示能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 ProFormer 的新型渐进式融合变压器，它逐步将单模态信息集成到多模态表示中，以实现鲁棒的 RGBT 跟踪。特别是，ProFormer 首先使用自注意力模块协作提取多模态表示，然后使用两个交叉注意力模块分别将其与双模态的特征进行交互。这样，可以在多模态表示中很好地激活模态特定信息。最后，使用前馈网络融合两个交互的多模态表示，以进一步增强最终的多模态表示。此外，RGBT跟踪器现有的学习方法要么将多模态特征融合为一个以进行最终分类，要么通过竞争性学习策略利用单模态分支和融合分支之间的关系。然而，它们要么忽略单模态分支的学习，要么导致一个分支无法得到很好的优化。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种动态引导学习算法，自适应地使用表现良好的分支来指导其他分支的学习，以增强每个分支的表示能力。大量实验表明，我们提出的 ProFormer 在 RGBT210、RGBT234、LasHeR 和 VTUAV 数据集上设置了新的最先进性能。 本文提出一种名为ProFormer的渐进融合Transformer模型，用于提升RGBT（可见光与热红外）跟踪任务的性能。 Yabin Zhu,Chenglong Li,Xiao Wang,Jin Tang,Zhixiang Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Changdae Oh,Hyeji Hwang,Hee-young Lee,YongTaek Lim,Geunyoung Jung,Jiyoung Jung,Hosik Choi,Kyungwoo Song
title: BlackVIP: Black-Box Visual Prompting for Robust Transfer Learning
title_zh: BlackVIP：用于稳健迁移学习的黑盒视觉提示
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023 (v2: citation error was fixed)
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023 (v2: citation error was fixed)
abstract: With the surge of large-scale pre-trained models (PTMs), fine-tuning these models to numerous downstream tasks becomes a crucial problem. Consequently, parameter efficient transfer learning (PETL) of large models has grasped huge attention. While recent PETL methods showcase impressive performance, they rely on optimistic assumptions: 1) the entire parameter set of a PTM is available, and 2) a sufficiently large memory capacity for the fine-tuning is equipped. However, in most real-world applications, PTMs are served as a black-box API or proprietary software without explicit parameter accessibility. Besides, it is hard to meet a large memory requirement for modern PTMs. In this work, we propose black-box visual prompting (BlackVIP), which efficiently adapts the PTMs without knowledge about model architectures and parameters. BlackVIP has two components; 1) Coordinator and 2) simultaneous perturbation stochastic approximation with gradient correction (SPSA-GC). The Coordinator designs input-dependent image-shaped visual prompts, which improves few-shot adaptation and robustness on distribution/location shift. SPSA-GC efficiently estimates the gradient of a target model to update Coordinator. Extensive experiments on 16 datasets demonstrate that BlackVIP enables robust adaptation to diverse domains without accessing PTMs' parameters, with minimal memory requirements. Code: \url{https://github.com/changdaeoh/BlackVIP}
summary: With the surge of large-scale pre-trained models (PTMs), fine-tuning these models to numerous downstream tasks becomes a crucial problem. Consequently, parameter efficient transfer learning (PETL) of large models has grasped huge attention. While recent PETL methods showcase impressive performance, they rely on optimistic assumptions: 1) the entire parameter set of a PTM is available, and 2) a sufficiently large memory capacity for the fine-tuning is equipped. However, in most real-world applications, PTMs are served as a black-box API or proprietary software without explicit parameter accessibility. Besides, it is hard to meet a large memory requirement for modern PTMs. In this work, we propose black-box visual prompting (BlackVIP), which efficiently adapts the PTMs without knowledge about model architectures and parameters. BlackVIP has two components; 1) Coordinator and 2) simultaneous perturbation stochastic approximation with gradient correction (SPSA-GC). The Coordinator designs input-dependent image-shaped visual prompts, which improves few-shot adaptation and robustness on distribution/location shift. SPSA-GC efficiently estimates the gradient of a target model to update Coordinator. Extensive experiments on 16 datasets demonstrate that BlackVIP enables robust adaptation to diverse domains without accessing PTMs' parameters, with minimal memory requirements. Code: \url{https://github.com/changdaeoh/BlackVIP}
abstract_zh: 随着大规模预训练模型（PTM）的激增，针对众多下游任务对这些模型进行微调成为一个关键问题。因此，大型模型的参数有效迁移学习（PETL）引起了巨大的关注。虽然最近的 PETL 方法展示了令人印象深刻的性能，但它们依赖于乐观的假设：1）PTM 的整个参数集可用，2）配备足够大的内存容量用于微调。然而，在大多数实际应用中，PTM 被用作黑盒 API 或专有软件，没有明确的参数可访问性。此外，很难满足现代 PTM 的大内存需求。在这项工作中，我们提出了黑盒视觉提示（BlackVIP），它可以在不了解模型架构和参数的情况下有效地适应 PTM。 BlackVIP 有两个组成部分； 1) 协调器和 2) 带梯度校正的同时扰动随机近似 (SPSA-GC)。协调器设计依赖于输入的图像形状的视觉提示，这提高了少数镜头的适应性和分布/位置转移的鲁棒性。 SPSA-GC 有效地估计目标模型的梯度以更新协调器。对 16 个数据集的广泛实验表明，BlackVIP 能够以最小的内存需求，在不访问 PTM 参数的情况下对不同的领域进行稳健的适应。代码：\url{https://github.com/changdaeoh/BlackVIP}

AI.tldr: 本文提出BlackVIP方法，在不访问预训练模型参数和占用大量内存的情况下，实现对视觉任务的鲁棒迁移学习。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效迁移学习方法依赖模型参数可访问性和大内存，但实际场景中预训练模型常以黑盒形式存在且内存受限，需开发无需参数访问的适应方法。
AI.method: BlackVIP包含两个组件：1）设计输入相关的视觉提示的协调器（Coordinator）；2）结合梯度校正的同步扰动随机逼近算法（SPSA-GC），用于在无参数访问条件下估计模型梯度并更新协调器。
AI.result: 在16个数据集上的实验表明，BlackVIP在分布/位置偏移场景下实现跨领域鲁棒适应，且内存需求极低。
AI.conclusion: BlackVIP通过视觉提示与梯度估计技术，在无参数访问和低内存约束下实现了预训练模型的有效迁移，为实际部署提供了可行方案。
