authors_text: Chaitanya Devaguptapu,Samarth Sinha,K J Joseph,Vineeth N Balasubramanian,Animesh Garg
title: $Δ$-Patching: A Framework for Rapid Adaptation of Pre-trained Convolutional Networks without Base Performance Loss
title_zh: $Δ$-修补：快速适应预训练卷积网络而不会损失基本性能的框架
abstract: Models pre-trained on large-scale datasets are often fine-tuned to support newer tasks and datasets that arrive over time. This process necessitates storing copies of the model over time for each task that the pre-trained model is fine-tuned to. Building on top of recent model patching work, we propose $Δ$-Patching for fine-tuning neural network models in an efficient manner, without the need to store model copies. We propose a simple and lightweight method called $Δ$-Networks to achieve this objective. Our comprehensive experiments across setting and architecture variants show that $Δ$-Networks outperform earlier model patching work while only requiring a fraction of parameters to be trained. We also show that this approach can be used for other problem settings such as transfer learning and zero-shot domain adaptation, as well as other tasks such as detection and segmentation.
summary: Models pre-trained on large-scale datasets are often fine-tuned to support newer tasks and datasets that arrive over time. This process necessitates storing copies of the model over time for each task that the pre-trained model is fine-tuned to. Building on top of recent model patching work, we propose $Δ$-Patching for fine-tuning neural network models in an efficient manner, without the need to store model copies. We propose a simple and lightweight method called $Δ$-Networks to achieve this objective. Our comprehensive experiments across setting and architecture variants show that $Δ$-Networks outperform earlier model patching work while only requiring a fraction of parameters to be trained. We also show that this approach can be used for other problem settings such as transfer learning and zero-shot domain adaptation, as well as other tasks such as detection and segmentation.
abstract_zh: 在大规模数据集上预训练的模型通常会进行微调，以支持随着时间的推移而出现的新任务和数据集。此过程需要随着时间的推移，为预训练模型进行微调的每个任务存储模型的副本。在最近的模型修补工作的基础上，我们提出 $Δ$-Patching 以有效的方式微调神经网络模型，而无需存储模型副本。我们提出了一种简单且轻量级的方法，称为 $Δ$-Networks 来实现这一目标。我们跨设置和架构变体的综合实验表明，$Δ$-网络优于早期的模型修补工作，同时只需要训练一小部分参数。我们还表明，这种方法可用于其他问题设置，例如迁移学习和零样本域适应，以及其他任务，例如检测和分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为$Δ$-Patching的框架，通过轻量级的$Δ$-Networks方法，在无需存储模型副本的情况下高效微调预训练卷积网络，实现快速适应新任务且不损失基础性能。
AI.motivation: 传统微调方法需为每个新任务存储模型副本，导致存储开销大且效率低，亟需一种无需保存副本的高效适应方法。
AI.method: 设计$Δ$-Networks作为轻量级模块，仅训练少量参数以实现模型适应，通过增量更新而非全量微调，减少计算和存储需求。
AI.result: 实验表明，$Δ$-Networks在多种设置和架构下优于现有方法，参数量仅为传统方法的分数之一，且适用于迁移学习、零样本域适应等场景。
AI.conclusion: $Δ$-Patching提供了一种高效、通用的预训练模型适应方案，在保持性能的同时显著降低资源消耗，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: $Δ$-Patching: A Framework for Rapid Adaptation of Pre-trained Convolutional Networks without Base Performance Loss $Δ$-修补：快速适应预训练卷积网络而不会损失基本性能的框架 Models pre-trained on large-scale datasets are often fine-tuned to support newer tasks and datasets that arrive over time. This process necessitates storing copies of the model over time for each task that the pre-trained model is fine-tuned to. Building on top of recent model patching work, we propose $Δ$-Patching for fine-tuning neural network models in an efficient manner, without the need to store model copies. We propose a simple and lightweight method called $Δ$-Networks to achieve this objective. Our comprehensive experiments across setting and architecture variants show that $Δ$-Networks outperform earlier model patching work while only requiring a fraction of parameters to be trained. We also show that this approach can be used for other problem settings such as transfer learning and zero-shot domain adaptation, as well as other tasks such as detection and segmentation. 在大规模数据集上预训练的模型通常会进行微调，以支持随着时间的推移而出现的新任务和数据集。此过程需要随着时间的推移，为预训练模型进行微调的每个任务存储模型的副本。在最近的模型修补工作的基础上，我们提出 $Δ$-Patching 以有效的方式微调神经网络模型，而无需存储模型副本。我们提出了一种简单且轻量级的方法，称为 $Δ$-Networks 来实现这一目标。我们跨设置和架构变体的综合实验表明，$Δ$-网络优于早期的模型修补工作，同时只需要训练一小部分参数。我们还表明，这种方法可用于其他问题设置，例如迁移学习和零样本域适应，以及其他任务，例如检测和分割。 本文提出了一种名为$Δ$-Patching的框架，通过轻量级的$Δ$-Networks方法，在无需存储模型副本的情况下高效微调预训练卷积网络，实现快速适应新任务且不损失基础性能。 Chaitanya Devaguptapu,Samarth Sinha,K J Joseph,Vineeth N Balasubramanian,Animesh Garg cs.CV

authors_text: Bei Gan,Xiujun Shu,Ruizhi Qiao,Haoqian Wu,Keyu Chen,Hanjun Li,Bo Ren
title: Collaborative Noisy Label Cleaner: Learning Scene-aware Trailers for Multi-modal Highlight Detection in Movies
title_zh: 协作噪声标签清理器：学习场景感知预告片，用于电影中的多模式亮点检测
abstract: Movie highlights stand out of the screenplay for efficient browsing and play a crucial role on social media platforms. Based on existing efforts, this work has two observations: (1) For different annotators, labeling highlight has uncertainty, which leads to inaccurate and time-consuming annotations. (2) Besides previous supervised or unsupervised settings, some existing video corpora can be useful, e.g., trailers, but they are often noisy and incomplete to cover the full highlights. In this work, we study a more practical and promising setting, i.e., reformulating highlight detection as "learning with noisy labels". This setting does not require time-consuming manual annotations and can fully utilize existing abundant video corpora. First, based on movie trailers, we leverage scene segmentation to obtain complete shots, which are regarded as noisy labels. Then, we propose a Collaborative noisy Label Cleaner (CLC) framework to learn from noisy highlight moments. CLC consists of two modules: augmented cross-propagation (ACP) and multi-modality cleaning (MMC). The former aims to exploit the closely related audio-visual signals and fuse them to learn unified multi-modal representations. The latter aims to achieve cleaner highlight labels by observing the changes in losses among different modalities. To verify the effectiveness of CLC, we further collect a large-scale highlight dataset named MovieLights. Comprehensive experiments on MovieLights and YouTube Highlights datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Code has been made available at: https://github.com/TencentYoutuResearch/HighlightDetection-CLC
summary: Movie highlights stand out of the screenplay for efficient browsing and play a crucial role on social media platforms. Based on existing efforts, this work has two observations: (1) For different annotators, labeling highlight has uncertainty, which leads to inaccurate and time-consuming annotations. (2) Besides previous supervised or unsupervised settings, some existing video corpora can be useful, e.g., trailers, but they are often noisy and incomplete to cover the full highlights. In this work, we study a more practical and promising setting, i.e., reformulating highlight detection as "learning with noisy labels". This setting does not require time-consuming manual annotations and can fully utilize existing abundant video corpora. First, based on movie trailers, we leverage scene segmentation to obtain complete shots, which are regarded as noisy labels. Then, we propose a Collaborative noisy Label Cleaner (CLC) framework to learn from noisy highlight moments. CLC consists of two modules: augmented cross-propagation (ACP) and multi-modality cleaning (MMC). The former aims to exploit the closely related audio-visual signals and fuse them to learn unified multi-modal representations. The latter aims to achieve cleaner highlight labels by observing the changes in losses among different modalities. To verify the effectiveness of CLC, we further collect a large-scale highlight dataset named MovieLights. Comprehensive experiments on MovieLights and YouTube Highlights datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Code has been made available at: https://github.com/TencentYoutuResearch/HighlightDetection-CLC
abstract_zh: 电影精彩片段从剧本中脱颖而出，实现高效浏览，并在社交媒体平台上发挥着至关重要的作用。基于现有的工作，这项工作有两个观察结果：（1）对于不同的注释器，标记突出显示具有不确定性，这导致注释不准确且耗时。 （2）除了以前的监督或无监督设置之外，一些现有的视频语料库可能很有用，例如预告片，但它们通常很嘈杂且不完整，无法覆盖全部亮点。在这项工作中，我们研究了一种更实用、更有前景的设置，即将高光检测重新表述为“使用噪声标签学习”。该设置不需要耗时的手动标注，可以充分利用现有丰富的视频语料。首先，基于电影预告片，我们利用场景分割来获得完整的镜头，这些镜头被视为噪声标签。然后，我们提出了一个协作噪声标签清理器（CLC）框架来从噪声亮点时刻中学习。 CLC由两个模块组成：增强交叉传播（ACP）和多模态清洗（MMC）。前者旨在利用密切相关的视听信号并将它们融合以学习统一的多模态表示。后者旨在通过观察不同模式之间损失的变化来实现更清晰的高亮标签。为了验证 CLC 的有效性，我们进一步收集了一个名为 MovieLights 的大规模精彩数据集。对 MovieLights 和 YouTubehighlights 数据集的综合实验证明了我们方法的有效性。代码已提供：https://github.com/TencentYoutuResearch/HighlightDetection-CLC

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于协作噪声标签清理的多模态电影高光检测方法，利用电影预告片中的场景分割和多模态信息提升检测效果。
AI.motivation: 传统高光标注依赖耗时且不准确的人工标注，而现有视频数据集（如预告片）存在噪声和不完整性，需探索更实用的噪声标签学习方法。
AI.method: 提出CLC框架，包含增强跨传播模块（ACP）和多模态清理模块（MMC），通过融合音视频信号并分析多模态损失变化实现噪声标签清理。
AI.result: 构建大规模MovieLights数据集，在MovieLights和YouTube高光数据集上验证方法有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CLC框架通过协作清理噪声标签和多模态信息融合，显著提升电影高光检测性能，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Benjamin Kenwright
title: A Survey on Dual-Quaternions
title_zh: 对偶四元数综述
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.13395
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2303.13395
abstract: Over the past few years, the applications of dual-quaternions have not only developed in many different directions but has also evolved in exciting ways in several areas. As dual-quaternions offer an efficient and compact symbolic form with unique mathematical properties. While dual-quaternions are now common place in many aspects of research and implementation, such as, robotics and engineering through to computer graphics and animation, there are still a large number of avenues for exploration with huge potential benefits. This article is the first to provide a comprehensive review of the dual-quaternion landscape. In this survey, we present a review of dual-quaternion techniques and applications developed over the years while providing insights into current and future directions. The article starts with the definition of dual-quaternions, their mathematical formulation, while explaining key aspects of importance (e.g., compression and ambiguities). The literature review in this article is divided into categories to help manage and visualize the application of dual-quaternions for solving specific problems. A timeline illustrating key methods is presented, explaining how dual-quaternion approaches have progressed over the years. The most popular dual-quaternion methods are discussed with regard to their impact in the literature, performance, computational cost and their real-world results (compared to associated models). Finally, we indicate the limitations of dual-quaternion methodologies and propose future research directions.

abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，对偶四元数的应用不仅在许多不同的方向上发展，而且在多个领域以令人兴奋的方式发展。由于双四元数提供了一种具有独特数学属性的高效且紧凑的符号形式。虽然双四元数现在在研究和实施的许多方面都很常见，例如机器人技术和工程到计算机图形和动画，但仍然有大量具有巨大潜在效益的探索途径。本文是第一篇对双四元数景观进行全面回顾的文章。在本次调查中，我们回顾了多年来开发的双四元数技术和应用，同时提供了对当前和未来方向的见解。本文从对偶四元数的定义及其数学公式开始，同时解释了重要的关键方面（例如压缩和模糊性）。本文中的文献综述分为几类，以帮助管理和可视化双四元数在解决特定问题中的应用。给出了说明关键方法的时间表，解释了双四元数方法多年来的进展。讨论了最流行的双四元数方法对文献的影响、性能、计算成本及其实际结果（与相关模型相比）。最后，我们指出了对偶四元数方法的局限性并提出了未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了双四元数的技术发展与应用，分析其现状及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 双四元数在多个领域广泛应用，但仍有大量研究潜力，需系统梳理其发展与应用。
AI.method: 通过分类文献综述、时间线梳理及主流方法分析，探讨双四元数的数学基础、应用及局限性。
AI.result: 系统梳理了双四元数的数学基础与应用，总结了关键方法的发展历程，并比较了主流方法的性能与实际效果。
AI.conclusion: 指出双四元数的局限性，提出未来研究方向，如扩展应用领域及优化计算效率。

Finally, we indicate the limitations of dual-quaternion methodologies and propose future research directions. 在过去的几年里，对偶四元数的应用不仅在许多不同的方向上发展，而且在多个领域以令人兴奋的方式发展。由于双四元数提供了一种具有独特数学属性的高效且紧凑的符号形式。虽然双四元数现在在研究和实施的许多方面都很常见，例如机器人技术和工程到计算机图形和动画，但仍然有大量具有巨大潜在效益的探索途径。本文是第一篇对双四元数景观进行全面回顾的文章。在本次调查中，我们回顾了多年来开发的双四元数技术和应用，同时提供了对当前和未来方向的见解。本文从对偶四元数的定义及其数学公式开始，同时解释了重要的关键方面（例如压缩和模糊性）。本文中的文献综述分为几类，以帮助管理和可视化双四元数在解决特定问题中的应用。给出了说明关键方法的时间表，解释了双四元数方法多年来的进展。讨论了最流行的双四元数方法对文献的影响、性能、计算成本及其实际结果（与相关模型相比）。最后，我们指出了对偶四元数方法的局限性并提出了未来的研究方向。 本文综述了双四元数的技术发展与应用，分析其现状及未来研究方向。 Benjamin Kenwright math.OC,cs.RO

authors_text: Andreas Kirsch
title: Does "Deep Learning on a Data Diet" reproduce? Overall yes, but GraNd at Initialization does not
title_zh: “数据饮食中的深度学习”是否会重现？总体来说是的，但是 GraNd 在初始化时没有
abstract: The paper 'Deep Learning on a Data Diet' by Paul et al. (2021) introduces two innovative metrics for pruning datasets during the training of neural networks. While we are able to replicate the results for the EL2N score at epoch 20, the same cannot be said for the GraNd score at initialization. The GraNd scores later in training provide useful pruning signals, however. The GraNd score at initialization calculates the average gradient norm of an input sample across multiple randomly initialized models before any training has taken place. Our analysis reveals a strong correlation between the GraNd score at initialization and the input norm of a sample, suggesting that the latter could have been a cheap new baseline for data pruning. Unfortunately, neither the GraNd score at initialization nor the input norm surpasses random pruning in performance. This contradicts one of the findings in Paul et al. (2021). We were unable to reproduce their CIFAR-10 results using both an updated version of the original JAX repository and in a newly implemented PyTorch codebase. An investigation of the underlying JAX/FLAX code from 2021 surfaced a bug in the checkpoint restoring code that was fixed in April 2021 (https://github.com/google/flax/commit/28fbd95500f4bf2f9924d2560062fa50e919b1a5).

While we are able to replicate the results for the EL2N score at epoch 20, the same cannot be said for the GraNd score at initialization. The GraNd scores later in training provide useful pruning signals, however. The GraNd score at initialization calculates the average gradient norm of an input sample across multiple randomly initialized models before any training has taken place. Our analysis reveals a strong correlation between the GraNd score at initialization and the input norm of a sample, suggesting that the latter could have been a cheap new baseline for data pruning. Unfortunately, neither the GraNd score at initialization nor the input norm surpasses random pruning in performance. This contradicts one of the findings in Paul et al. (2021). We were unable to reproduce their CIFAR-10 results using both an updated version of the original JAX repository and in a newly implemented PyTorch codebase. An investigation of the underlying JAX/FLAX code from 2021 surfaced a bug in the checkpoint restoring code that was fixed in April 2021 (https://github.com/google/flax/commit/28fbd95500f4bf2f9924d2560062fa50e919b1a5).
abstract_zh: Paul 等人的论文“数据饮食中的深度学习”。 （2021）引入了在神经网络训练期间修剪数据集的两个创新指标。虽然我们能够在第 20 轮迭代时复制 EL2N 分数的结果，但对于初始化时的 GraNd 分数却不能这样说。然而，训练后期的 GraNd 分数提供了有用的修剪信号。初始化时的 GraNd 分数计算在进行任何训练之前跨多个随机初始化模型的输入样本的平均梯度范数。我们的分析揭示了初始化时的 GraNd 分数与样本的输入范数之间存在很强的相关性，这表明后者可能是数据修剪的廉价新基线。不幸的是，初始化时的 GraNd 分数和输入范数在性能上都无法超越随机剪枝。这与 Paul 等人的研究结果之一相矛盾。 （2021）。我们无法使用原始 JAX 存储库的更新版本和新实现的 PyTorch 代码库来重现他们的 CIFAR-10 结果。对 2021 年底层 JAX/FLAX 代码的调查发现，检查点恢复代码中存在一个错误，该错误已于 2021 年 4 月修复 (https://github.com/google/flax/commit/28fbd95500f4bf2f9924d2560062fa50e919b1a5)。

AI.tldr: 该论文尝试复现Paul等人（2021）提出的'深度学习数据饮食'方法，但发现GraNd在初始化时无法复现。
AI.motivation: 该论文旨在验证Paul等人（2021）提出的两种数据集剪枝指标是否具有可复现性，以评估其在实际应用中的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过使用更新的JAX仓库和新实现的PyTorch代码库，尝试复现Paul等人（2021）提出的EL2N和GraNd两种剪枝指标。
AI.result: 能够复现EL2N在第20个epoch的结果，但无法复现GraNd在初始化时的分数；同时发现GraNd初始化分数与输入规范之间存在强相关性，但其性能并未超过随机剪枝。
AI.conclusion: 论文指出，GraNd初始化分数和输入规范可能作为新的数据剪枝基线，但未能超越随机剪枝，且原始代码中存在一个已修复的bug，可能影响结果的复现。

authors_text: Nelson Rosa,Bassel Katamish,Maximilian Raff,C. David Remy
title: An Approach for Generating Families of Energetically Optimal Gaits from Passive Dynamic Walking Gaits
title_zh: 一种从被动动态步行步态生成能量最佳步态族的方法
comment: Published in the IROS 2023 proceedings. This version has several updated sections and figures. The proceedings contains a supplementary video, see https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10342322/media#media . An implementation of the results are also available, see https://github.com/nr-codes/OptimalGaitsForCompassGait
comments: Published in the IROS 2023 proceedings. This version has several updated sections and figures. The proceedings contains a supplementary video, see https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10342322/media#media . An implementation of the results are also available, see https://github.com/nr-codes/OptimalGaitsForCompassGait
abstract: For a class of biped robots with impulsive dynamics and a non-empty set of passive gaits (unactuated, periodic motions of the biped model), we present a method for computing continuous families of locally optimal gaits with respect to a class of commonly used energetic cost functions (e.g., the integral of torque-squared). We compute these families using only the passive gaits of the biped, which are globally optimal gaits with respect to these cost functions. Our approach fills in an important gap in the literature when computing a library of locally optimal gaits, which often do not make use of these globally optimal solutions as seed values. We demonstrate our approach on a well-studied two-link biped model.
summary: For a class of biped robots with impulsive dynamics and a non-empty set of passive gaits (unactuated, periodic motions of the biped model), we present a method for computing continuous families of locally optimal gaits with respect to a class of commonly used energetic cost functions (e.g., the integral of torque-squared). We compute these families using only the passive gaits of the biped, which are globally optimal gaits with respect to these cost functions. Our approach fills in an important gap in the literature when computing a library of locally optimal gaits, which often do not make use of these globally optimal solutions as seed values. We demonstrate our approach on a well-studied two-link biped model.
abstract_zh: 对于一类具有脉冲动力学和非空被动步态集（双足模型的非驱动周期性运动）的双足机器人，我们提出了一种计算局部最优步态的连续族的方法，该方法涉及一类常用的能量成本函数（例如，扭矩平方积分）。我们仅使用两足动物的被动步态来计算这些族，这些步态是相对于这些成本函数而言的全局最优步态。我们的方法在计算局部最优步态库时填补了文献中的一个重要空白，该库通常不使用这些全局最优解作为种子值。我们在经过充分研究的两连杆两足模型上展示了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种方法，利用被动动态行走步态生成能量最优的步态族，以填补现有研究中的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有文献在计算局部最优步态库时通常不使用全局最优的被动步态作为初始值，导致效率不足。
AI.method: 基于被动步态（全局最优解），通过优化能量成本函数（如扭矩平方积分）生成连续的局部最优步态族。
AI.result: 在经典双足模型上验证了方法的有效性，成功生成了符合预期的最优步态族。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用被动步态作为种子值，有效填补了局部最优步态生成的空白，为双足机器人步态优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Xiaolong Shen,Zongxin Yang,Xiaohan Wang,Jianxin Ma,Chang Zhou,Yi Yang
title: Global-to-Local Modeling for Video-based 3D Human Pose and Shape Estimation
title_zh: 基于视频的 3D 人体姿势和形状估计的全局到局部建模
abstract: Video-based 3D human pose and shape estimations are evaluated by intra-frame accuracy and inter-frame smoothness. Although these two metrics are responsible for different ranges of temporal consistency, existing state-of-the-art methods treat them as a unified problem and use monotonous modeling structures (e.g., RNN or attention-based block) to design their networks. However, using a single kind of modeling structure is difficult to balance the learning of short-term and long-term temporal correlations, and may bias the network to one of them, leading to undesirable predictions like global location shift, temporal inconsistency, and insufficient local details. To solve these problems, we propose to structurally decouple the modeling of long-term and short-term correlations in an end-to-end framework, Global-to-Local Transformer (GLoT). First, a global transformer is introduced with a Masked Pose and Shape Estimation strategy for long-term modeling. The strategy stimulates the global transformer to learn more inter-frame correlations by randomly masking the features of several frames. Second, a local transformer is responsible for exploiting local details on the human mesh and interacting with the global transformer by leveraging cross-attention. Moreover, a Hierarchical Spatial Correlation Regressor is further introduced to refine intra-frame estimations by decoupled global-local representation and implicit kinematic constraints. Our GLoT surpasses previous state-of-the-art methods with the lowest model parameters on popular benchmarks, i.e., 3DPW, MPI-INF-3DHP, and Human3.6M. Codes are available at https://github.com/sxl142/GLoT.
summary: Video-based 3D human pose and shape estimations are evaluated by intra-frame accuracy and inter-frame smoothness. Although these two metrics are responsible for different ranges of temporal consistency, existing state-of-the-art methods treat them as a unified problem and use monotonous modeling structures (e.g., RNN or attention-based block) to design their networks. However, using a single kind of modeling structure is difficult to balance the learning of short-term and long-term temporal correlations, and may bias the network to one of them, leading to undesirable predictions like global location shift, temporal inconsistency, and insufficient local details. To solve these problems, we propose to structurally decouple the modeling of long-term and short-term correlations in an end-to-end framework, Global-to-Local Transformer (GLoT). First, a global transformer is introduced with a Masked Pose and Shape Estimation strategy for long-term modeling. The strategy stimulates the global transformer to learn more inter-frame correlations by randomly masking the features of several frames. Second, a local transformer is responsible for exploiting local details on the human mesh and interacting with the global transformer by leveraging cross-attention. Moreover, a Hierarchical Spatial Correlation Regressor is further introduced to refine intra-frame estimations by decoupled global-local representation and implicit kinematic constraints. Our GLoT surpasses previous state-of-the-art methods with the lowest model parameters on popular benchmarks, i.e., 3DPW, MPI-INF-3DHP, and Human3.6M. Codes are available at https://github.com/sxl142/GLoT.
abstract_zh: 基于视频的 3D 人体姿势和形状估计通过帧内精度和帧间平滑度进行评估。尽管这两个指标负责不同范围的时间一致性，但现有的最先进方法将它们视为一个统一的问题，并使用单调的建模结构（例如 RNN 或基于注意力的块）来设计其网络。然而，使用单一类型的建模结构很难平衡短期和长期时间相关性的学习，并且可能使网络偏向其中一种，导致不良预测，如全局位置偏移、时间不一致和局部细节不足等。为了解决这些问题，我们建议在端到端框架 Global-to-Local Transformer (GLoT) 中结构性地解耦长期和短期相关性的建模。首先，引入了全局变换器以及用于长期建模的蒙面姿势和形状估计策略。该策略通过随机屏蔽多个帧的特征来刺激全局变换器学习更多的帧间相关性。其次，局部变压器负责利用人体网格上的局部细节，并通过利用交叉注意力与全局变压器进行交互。此外，进一步引入了分层空间相关回归器，通过解耦的全局局部表示和隐式运动学约束来细化帧内估计。我们的 GLoT 在流行基准（即 3DPW、MPI-INF-3DHP 和 Human3.6M）上以最低的模型参数超越了以前最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/sxl142/GLoT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频的3D人体姿态和形状估计方法，通过解耦全局与局部建模结构解决时间一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法采用单一建模结构难以平衡短期和长期时间相关性，导致全局位置偏移、时间不一致和局部细节不足等问题。
AI.method: 提出全局-局部转换器(GLoT)框架，包含全局转换器(通过掩码策略学习长期关联)、局部转换器(提取局部细节并通过交叉注意力交互)以及分层空间相关回归器(利用解耦表征和运动学约束优化帧内估计)。
AI.result: 在3DPW、MPI-INF-3DHP和Human3.6M基准测试中，GLoT在参数量最少的情况下超越了现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化解耦长期与短期关联建模，GLoT有效提升了视频序列中3D人体姿态和形状估计的准确性与鲁棒性。

search_text: Global-to-Local Modeling for Video-based 3D Human Pose and Shape Estimation 基于视频的 3D 人体姿势和形状估计的全局到局部建模 Video-based 3D human pose and shape estimations are evaluated by intra-frame accuracy and inter-frame smoothness. Although these two metrics are responsible for different ranges of temporal consistency, existing state-of-the-art methods treat them as a unified problem and use monotonous modeling structures (e.g., RNN or attention-based block) to design their networks. However, using a single kind of modeling structure is difficult to balance the learning of short-term and long-term temporal correlations, and may bias the network to one of them, leading to undesirable predictions like global location shift, temporal inconsistency, and insufficient local details. To solve these problems, we propose to structurally decouple the modeling of long-term and short-term correlations in an end-to-end framework, Global-to-Local Transformer (GLoT). First, a global transformer is introduced with a Masked Pose and Shape Estimation strategy for long-term modeling. The strategy stimulates the global transformer to learn more inter-frame correlations by randomly masking the features of several frames. Second, a local transformer is responsible for exploiting local details on the human mesh and interacting with the global transformer by leveraging cross-attention. Moreover, a Hierarchical Spatial Correlation Regressor is further introduced to refine intra-frame estimations by decoupled global-local representation and implicit kinematic constraints. Our GLoT surpasses previous state-of-the-art methods with the lowest model parameters on popular benchmarks, i.e., 3DPW, MPI-INF-3DHP, and Human3.6M. Codes are available at https://github.com/sxl142/GLoT. 基于视频的 3D 人体姿势和形状估计通过帧内精度和帧间平滑度进行评估。尽管这两个指标负责不同范围的时间一致性，但现有的最先进方法将它们视为一个统一的问题，并使用单调的建模结构（例如 RNN 或基于注意力的块）来设计其网络。然而，使用单一类型的建模结构很难平衡短期和长期时间相关性的学习，并且可能使网络偏向其中一种，导致不良预测，如全局位置偏移、时间不一致和局部细节不足等。为了解决这些问题，我们建议在端到端框架 Global-to-Local Transformer (GLoT) 中结构性地解耦长期和短期相关性的建模。首先，引入了全局变换器以及用于长期建模的蒙面姿势和形状估计策略。该策略通过随机屏蔽多个帧的特征来刺激全局变换器学习更多的帧间相关性。其次，局部变压器负责利用人体网格上的局部细节，并通过利用交叉注意力与全局变压器进行交互。此外，进一步引入了分层空间相关回归器，通过解耦的全局局部表示和隐式运动学约束来细化帧内估计。我们的 GLoT 在流行基准（即 3DPW、MPI-INF-3DHP 和 Human3.6M）上以最低的模型参数超越了以前最先进的方法。代码可在 https://github.com/sxl142/GLoT 获取。 本文提出了一种基于视频的3D人体姿态和形状估计方法，通过解耦全局与局部建模结构解决时间一致性问题。 Xiaolong Shen,Zongxin Yang,Xiaohan Wang,Jianxin Ma,Chang Zhou,Yi Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Una Pale,Tomas Teijeiro,David Atienza
title: Combining General and Personalized Models for Epilepsy Detection with Hyperdimensional Computing
title_zh: 将癫痫检测的通用模型和个性化模型与超维计算相结合
abstract: Epilepsy is a chronic neurological disorder with a significant prevalence. However, there is still no adequate technological support to enable epilepsy detection and continuous outpatient monitoring in everyday life. Hyperdimensional (HD) computing is an interesting alternative for wearable devices, characterized by a much simpler learning process and also lower memory requirements. In this work, we demonstrate a few additional aspects in which HD computing, and the way its models are built and stored, can be used for further understanding, comparing, and creating more advanced machine learning models for epilepsy detection. These possibilities are not feasible with other state-of-the-art models, such as random forests or neural networks. We compare inter-subject similarity of models per different classes (seizure and non-seizure), then study the process of creation of generalized models from personalized ones, and in the end, how to combine personalized and generalized models to create hybrid models. This results in improved epilepsy detection performance. We also tested knowledge transfer between models created on two different datasets. Finally, all those examples could be highly interesting not only from an engineering perspective to create better models for wearables, but also from a neurological perspective to better understand individual epilepsy patterns.
summary: Epilepsy is a chronic neurological disorder with a significant prevalence. However, there is still no adequate technological support to enable epilepsy detection and continuous outpatient monitoring in everyday life. Hyperdimensional (HD) computing is an interesting alternative for wearable devices, characterized by a much simpler learning process and also lower memory requirements. In this work, we demonstrate a few additional aspects in which HD computing, and the way its models are built and stored, can be used for further understanding, comparing, and creating more advanced machine learning models for epilepsy detection. These possibilities are not feasible with other state-of-the-art models, such as random forests or neural networks. We compare inter-subject similarity of models per different classes (seizure and non-seizure), then study the process of creation of generalized models from personalized ones, and in the end, how to combine personalized and generalized models to create hybrid models. This results in improved epilepsy detection performance. We also tested knowledge transfer between models created on two different datasets. Finally, all those examples could be highly interesting not only from an engineering perspective to create better models for wearables, but also from a neurological perspective to better understand individual epilepsy patterns.
abstract_zh: 癫痫是一种发病率很高的慢性神经系统疾病。然而，仍然没有足够的技术支持来实现日常生活中的癫痫检测和持续门诊监测。超维（HD）计算是可穿戴设备的一个有趣的替代方案，其特点是学习过程更简单，内存要求也更低。在这项工作中，我们演示了 HD 计算及其模型构建和存储方式的几个其他方面，可用于进一步理解、比较和创建用于癫痫检测的更先进的机器学习模型。这些可能性对于其他最先进的模型（例如随机森林或神经网络）来说是不可行的。我们比较不同类别（癫痫发作和非癫痫发作）模型的受试者间相似性，然后研究从个性化模型创建广义模型的过程，最后研究如何将个性化模型和广义模型结合起来创建混合模型。这会提高癫痫检测性能。我们还测试了在两个不同数据集上创建的模型之间的知识转移。最后，所有这些例子都非常有趣，不仅从工程角度来看，可以为可穿戴设备创建更好的模型，而且从神经学角度来看，可以更好地理解个体癫痫模式。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何利用超维计算（HD计算）结合通用模型和个人化模型，以提高癫痫检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 癫痫是一种常见的神经系统疾病，但目前尚缺乏有效的技术手段用于日常的癫痫检测和门诊监测。HD计算因其简单的学习过程和较低的内存需求，为可穿戴设备提供了潜在的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文比较了不同类别（癫痫发作和非发作）模型之间的跨个体相似性，研究了从个性化模型创建通用模型的过程，并探讨了如何将个性化模型与通用模型结合创建混合模型。此外，还测试了在两个不同数据集上创建的模型之间的知识迁移。
AI.result: 通过结合个性化模型和通用模型，本文实现了更先进的癫痫检测性能，并展示了在工程和神经学领域中的潜在应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明，HD计算在创建更先进的癫痫检测模型方面具有独特的优势，同时为理解个体癫痫模式提供了新的视角。

authors_text: Kuniaki Saito,Donghyun Kim,Piotr Teterwak,Rogerio Feris,Kate Saenko
title: Mind the Backbone: Minimizing Backbone Distortion for Robust Object Detection
title_zh: 注意主干网：最小化主干网畸变以实现稳健的物体检测
abstract: Building object detectors that are robust to domain shifts is critical for real-world applications. Prior approaches fine-tune a pre-trained backbone and risk overfitting it to in-distribution (ID) data and distorting features useful for out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization. We propose to use Relative Gradient Norm (RGN) as a way to measure the vulnerability of a backbone to feature distortion, and show that high RGN is indeed correlated with lower OOD performance. Our analysis of RGN yields interesting findings: some backbones lose OOD robustness during fine-tuning, but others gain robustness because their architecture prevents the parameters from changing too much from the initial model. Given these findings, we present recipes to boost OOD robustness for both types of backbones. Specifically, we investigate regularization and architectural choices for minimizing gradient updates so as to prevent the tuned backbone from losing generalizable features. Our proposed techniques complement each other and show substantial improvements over baselines on diverse architectures and datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/mind_back.
summary: Building object detectors that are robust to domain shifts is critical for real-world applications. Prior approaches fine-tune a pre-trained backbone and risk overfitting it to in-distribution (ID) data and distorting features useful for out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization. We propose to use Relative Gradient Norm (RGN) as a way to measure the vulnerability of a backbone to feature distortion, and show that high RGN is indeed correlated with lower OOD performance. Our analysis of RGN yields interesting findings: some backbones lose OOD robustness during fine-tuning, but others gain robustness because their architecture prevents the parameters from changing too much from the initial model. Given these findings, we present recipes to boost OOD robustness for both types of backbones. Specifically, we investigate regularization and architectural choices for minimizing gradient updates so as to prevent the tuned backbone from losing generalizable features. Our proposed techniques complement each other and show substantial improvements over baselines on diverse architectures and datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/mind_back.
abstract_zh: 构建对域变化具有鲁棒性的物体检测器对于现实世界的应用至关重要。先前的方法对预先训练的主干网进行微调，但存在将其过度拟合到分布内 (ID) 数据并扭曲对分布外 (OOD) 泛化有用的特征的风险。我们建议使用相对梯度范数（RGN）作为衡量骨干网对特征失真的脆弱性的方法，并表明高 RGN 确实与较低的 OOD 性能相关。我们对 RGN 的分析得出了有趣的发现：一些主干网在微调过程中失去了 OOD 稳健性，但其他主干网却获得了稳健性，因为它们的架构可防止参数与初始模型相比发生太大变化。鉴于这些发现，我们提出了提高两种类型骨干网 OOD 稳健性的方法。具体来说，我们研究了最小化梯度更新的正则化和架构选择，以防止调整后的主干网络丢失可泛化的特征。我们提出的技术相互补充，并且在不同架构和数据集的基础上显示出显着的改进。代码可在 https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/mind_back 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过最小化主干网络的特征扭曲，提升目标检测模型在分布外数据上的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过微调预训练主干网络以适应新领域，但容易导致模型过度拟合训练数据并损害分布外（OOD）泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出相对梯度范数（RGN）量化主干网络脆弱性，分析其与OOD性能的关联，并设计正则化与架构优化策略以抑制梯度更新，保留通用特征。
AI.result: 在多种架构和数据集上显著优于基线方法，验证了所提技术对提升OOD鲁棒性的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过关注主干网络稳定性，本文为不同类型的主干网络提供了增强分布外泛化的实践方案。

search_text: Mind the Backbone: Minimizing Backbone Distortion for Robust Object Detection 注意主干网：最小化主干网畸变以实现稳健的物体检测 Building object detectors that are robust to domain shifts is critical for real-world applications. Prior approaches fine-tune a pre-trained backbone and risk overfitting it to in-distribution (ID) data and distorting features useful for out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization. We propose to use Relative Gradient Norm (RGN) as a way to measure the vulnerability of a backbone to feature distortion, and show that high RGN is indeed correlated with lower OOD performance. Our analysis of RGN yields interesting findings: some backbones lose OOD robustness during fine-tuning, but others gain robustness because their architecture prevents the parameters from changing too much from the initial model. Given these findings, we present recipes to boost OOD robustness for both types of backbones. Specifically, we investigate regularization and architectural choices for minimizing gradient updates so as to prevent the tuned backbone from losing generalizable features. Our proposed techniques complement each other and show substantial improvements over baselines on diverse architectures and datasets. Code is available at https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/mind_back. 构建对域变化具有鲁棒性的物体检测器对于现实世界的应用至关重要。先前的方法对预先训练的主干网进行微调，但存在将其过度拟合到分布内 (ID) 数据并扭曲对分布外 (OOD) 泛化有用的特征的风险。我们建议使用相对梯度范数（RGN）作为衡量骨干网对特征失真的脆弱性的方法，并表明高 RGN 确实与较低的 OOD 性能相关。我们对 RGN 的分析得出了有趣的发现：一些主干网在微调过程中失去了 OOD 稳健性，但其他主干网却获得了稳健性，因为它们的架构可防止参数与初始模型相比发生太大变化。鉴于这些发现，我们提出了提高两种类型骨干网 OOD 稳健性的方法。具体来说，我们研究了最小化梯度更新的正则化和架构选择，以防止调整后的主干网络丢失可泛化的特征。我们提出的技术相互补充，并且在不同架构和数据集的基础上显示出显着的改进。代码可在 https://github.com/VisionLearningGroup/mind_back 获取。 本文旨在通过最小化主干网络的特征扭曲，提升目标检测模型在分布外数据上的鲁棒性。 Kuniaki Saito,Donghyun Kim,Piotr Teterwak,Rogerio Feris,Kate Saenko cs.CV

authors_text: Zhentao Liu,Yu Fang,Changjian Li,Han Wu,Yuan Liu,Dinggang Shen,Zhiming Cui
title: Geometry-Aware Attenuation Learning for Sparse-View CBCT Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于稀疏视图 CBCT 重建的几何感知衰减学习
abstract: Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) plays a vital role in clinical imaging. Traditional methods typically require hundreds of 2D X-ray projections to reconstruct a high-quality 3D CBCT image, leading to considerable radiation exposure. This has led to a growing interest in sparse-view CBCT reconstruction to reduce radiation doses. While recent advances, including deep learning and neural rendering algorithms, have made strides in this area, these methods either produce unsatisfactory results or suffer from time inefficiency of individual optimization. In this paper, we introduce a novel geometry-aware encoder-decoder framework to solve this problem. Our framework starts by encoding multi-view 2D features from various 2D X-ray projections with a 2D CNN encoder. Leveraging the geometry of CBCT scanning, it then back-projects the multi-view 2D features into the 3D space to formulate a comprehensive volumetric feature map, followed by a 3D CNN decoder to recover 3D CBCT image. Importantly, our approach respects the geometric relationship between 3D CBCT image and its 2D X-ray projections during feature back projection stage, and enjoys the prior knowledge learned from the data population. This ensures its adaptability in dealing with extremly sparse view inputs without individual training, such as scenarios with only 5 or 10 X-ray projections. Extensive evaluations on two simulated datasets and one real-world dataset demonstrate exceptional reconstruction quality and time efficiency of our method.
summary: Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) plays a vital role in clinical imaging. Traditional methods typically require hundreds of 2D X-ray projections to reconstruct a high-quality 3D CBCT image, leading to considerable radiation exposure. This has led to a growing interest in sparse-view CBCT reconstruction to reduce radiation doses. While recent advances, including deep learning and neural rendering algorithms, have made strides in this area, these methods either produce unsatisfactory results or suffer from time inefficiency of individual optimization. In this paper, we introduce a novel geometry-aware encoder-decoder framework to solve this problem. Our framework starts by encoding multi-view 2D features from various 2D X-ray projections with a 2D CNN encoder. Leveraging the geometry of CBCT scanning, it then back-projects the multi-view 2D features into the 3D space to formulate a comprehensive volumetric feature map, followed by a 3D CNN decoder to recover 3D CBCT image. Importantly, our approach respects the geometric relationship between 3D CBCT image and its 2D X-ray projections during feature back projection stage, and enjoys the prior knowledge learned from the data population. This ensures its adaptability in dealing with extremly sparse view inputs without individual training, such as scenarios with only 5 or 10 X-ray projections. Extensive evaluations on two simulated datasets and one real-world dataset demonstrate exceptional reconstruction quality and time efficiency of our method.
abstract_zh: 锥形束计算机断层扫描（CBCT）在临床成像中发挥着至关重要的作用。传统方法通常需要数百次 2D X 射线投影才能重建高质量的 3D CBCT 图像，从而导致相当大的辐射暴露。这导致人们对稀疏视图 CBCT 重建以减少辐射剂量越来越感兴趣。尽管深度学习和神经渲染算法等最新进展在这一领域取得了长足的进步，但这些方法要么产生不令人满意的结果，要么遭受个体优化时间效率低下的困扰。在本文中，我们引入了一种新颖的几何感知编码器-解码器框架来解决这个问题。我们的框架首先使用 2D CNN 编码器对来自各种 2D X 射线投影的多视图 2D 特征进行编码。然后，利用 CBCT 扫描的几何结构，将多视图 2D 特征反投影到 3D 空间中，以制定全面的体积特征图，然后通过 3D CNN 解码器恢复 3D CBCT 图像。重要的是，我们的方法在特征反投影阶段尊重 3D CBCT 图像与其 2D X 射线投影之间的几何关系，并享受从数据群体中学到的先验知识。这确保了其无需单独训练即可处理极其稀疏的视图输入的适应性，例如仅具有 5 或 10 个 X 射线投影的场景。对两个模拟数据集和一个真实数据集的广泛评估证明了我们的方法具有出色的重建质量和时间效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种几何感知的稀疏视角CBCT重建方法，通过编码多视角2D特征并结合3D反投影，实现高质量低剂量的3D图像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统CBCT重建需要大量投影导致辐射过高，现有稀疏视角方法存在重建质量差或计算效率低的问题，需开发适应极稀疏输入的高效重建框架。
AI.method: 设计几何感知编码器-解码器框架：使用2D CNN提取多视角投影特征，基于CBCT几何关系进行3D反投影生成体素特征，再通过3D CNN解码重建图像，利用数据先验适应极稀疏输入。
AI.result: 在两个模拟数据集和一个真实数据集上验证，方法在极稀疏视角（5-10投影）下实现高重建质量与计算效率，优于现有深度学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过几何约束与数据先验有效解决了稀疏视角CBCT重建难题，在临床低剂量成像中具有应用潜力。

authors_text: Inoj Neupane,Belal Alsinglawi,Khaled Rabie
title: Indoor Positioning using Wi-Fi and Machine Learning for Industry 5.0
title_zh: 使用 Wi-Fi 和机器学习进行工业 5.0 的室内定位
abstract: Humans and robots working together in an environment to enhance human performance is the aim of Industry 5.0. Although significant progress in outdoor positioning has been seen, indoor positioning remains a challenge. In this paper, we introduce a new research concept by exploiting the potential of indoor positioning for Industry 5.0. We use Wi-Fi Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI) with trilateration using cheap and easily available ESP32 Arduino boards for positioning as well as sending effective route signals to a human and a robot working in a simulated-indoor factory environment in real-time. We utilized machine learning models to detect safe closeness between two co-workers (a human subject and a robot). Experimental data and analysis show an average deviation of less than 1m from the actual distance while the targets are mobile or stationary.
summary: Humans and robots working together in an environment to enhance human performance is the aim of Industry 5.0. Although significant progress in outdoor positioning has been seen, indoor positioning remains a challenge. In this paper, we introduce a new research concept by exploiting the potential of indoor positioning for Industry 5.0. We use Wi-Fi Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI) with trilateration using cheap and easily available ESP32 Arduino boards for positioning as well as sending effective route signals to a human and a robot working in a simulated-indoor factory environment in real-time. We utilized machine learning models to detect safe closeness between two co-workers (a human subject and a robot). Experimental data and analysis show an average deviation of less than 1m from the actual distance while the targets are mobile or stationary.
abstract_zh: 工业 5.0 的目标是人类和机器人在一个环境中共同工作以提高人类绩效。尽管室外定位已经取得了重大进展，但室内定位仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们通过挖掘工业 5.0 室内定位的潜力，引入了一个新的研究概念。我们使用 Wi-Fi 接收信号强度指示器 (RSSI) 进行三边测量，使用廉价且易于获得的 ESP32 Arduino 板进行定位，并向在模拟室内工厂环境中实时工作的人和机器人发送有效的路线信号。我们利用机器学习模型来检测两个同事（人类受试者和机器人）之间的安全亲密程度。实验数据和分析表明，目标移动或静止时，与实际距离的平均偏差小于1m。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Wi-Fi和机器学习的室内定位方法，用于Industry 5.0中人机协作场景下的实时定位与安全距离检测。
AI.motivation: Industry 5.0需要人机协同工作，但现有技术难以满足复杂室内环境中高精度定位与安全交互的需求。
AI.method: 采用ESP32开发板采集Wi-Fi RSSI信号，通过三边测量法实现定位；利用机器学习模型实时检测人机安全距离，并在模拟工厂环境中验证方案。
AI.result: 实验显示定位平均偏差小于1米，可准确识别移动或静止目标间的安全距离。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为Industry 5.0场景下低成本、高精度的室内定位与人机安全交互提供了可行解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合Wi-Fi和机器学习的室内定位方法，用于Industry 5.0中人机协作场景下的实时定位与安全距离检测。

search_text: Indoor Positioning using Wi-Fi and Machine Learning for Industry 5.0 使用 Wi-Fi 和机器学习进行工业 5.0 的室内定位 Humans and robots working together in an environment to enhance human performance is the aim of Industry 5.0. Although significant progress in outdoor positioning has been seen, indoor positioning remains a challenge. In this paper, we introduce a new research concept by exploiting the potential of indoor positioning for Industry 5.0. We use Wi-Fi Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI) with trilateration using cheap and easily available ESP32 Arduino boards for positioning as well as sending effective route signals to a human and a robot working in a simulated-indoor factory environment in real-time. We utilized machine learning models to detect safe closeness between two co-workers (a human subject and a robot). Experimental data and analysis show an average deviation of less than 1m from the actual distance while the targets are mobile or stationary. 工业 5.0 的目标是人类和机器人在一个环境中共同工作以提高人类绩效。尽管室外定位已经取得了重大进展，但室内定位仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们通过挖掘工业 5.0 室内定位的潜力，引入了一个新的研究概念。我们使用 Wi-Fi 接收信号强度指示器 (RSSI) 进行三边测量，使用廉价且易于获得的 ESP32 Arduino 板进行定位，并向在模拟室内工厂环境中实时工作的人和机器人发送有效的路线信号。我们利用机器学习模型来检测两个同事（人类受试者和机器人）之间的安全亲密程度。实验数据和分析表明，目标移动或静止时，与实际距离的平均偏差小于1m。 本文提出一种结合Wi-Fi和机器学习的室内定位方法，用于Industry 5.0中人机协作场景下的实时定位与安全距离检测。 Inoj Neupane,Belal Alsinglawi,Khaled Rabie cs.RO,cs.NI

authors_text: Mark Petersen,Russ Tedrake
title: Growing Convex Collision-Free Regions in Configuration Space using Nonlinear Programming
title_zh: 使用非线性规划在配置空间中生长凸无碰撞区域
abstract: One of the most difficult parts of motion planning in configuration space is ensuring a trajectory does not collide with task-space obstacles in the environment. Generating regions that are convex and collision free in configuration space can separate the computational burden of collision checking from motion planning. To that end, we propose an extension to IRIS (Iterative Regional Inflation by Semidefinite programming) [5] that allows it to operate in configuration space. Our algorithm, IRIS-NP (Iterative Regional Inflation by Semidefinite & Nonlinear Programming), uses nonlinear optimization to add the separating hyperplanes, enabling support for more general nonlinear constraints. Developed in parallel to Amice et al. [1], IRIS-NP trades rigorous certification that regions are collision free for probabilistic certification and the benefit of faster region generation in the configuration-space coordinates. IRIS-NP also provides a solid initialization to C-IRIS to reduce the number of iterations required for certification. We demonstrate that IRIS-NP can scale to a dual-arm manipulator and can handle additional nonlinear constraints using the same machinery. Finally, we show ablations of elements of our implementation to demonstrate their importance.
summary: One of the most difficult parts of motion planning in configuration space is ensuring a trajectory does not collide with task-space obstacles in the environment. Generating regions that are convex and collision free in configuration space can separate the computational burden of collision checking from motion planning. To that end, we propose an extension to IRIS (Iterative Regional Inflation by Semidefinite programming) [5] that allows it to operate in configuration space. Our algorithm, IRIS-NP (Iterative Regional Inflation by Semidefinite & Nonlinear Programming), uses nonlinear optimization to add the separating hyperplanes, enabling support for more general nonlinear constraints. Developed in parallel to Amice et al. [1], IRIS-NP trades rigorous certification that regions are collision free for probabilistic certification and the benefit of faster region generation in the configuration-space coordinates. IRIS-NP also provides a solid initialization to C-IRIS to reduce the number of iterations required for certification. We demonstrate that IRIS-NP can scale to a dual-arm manipulator and can handle additional nonlinear constraints using the same machinery. Finally, we show ablations of elements of our implementation to demonstrate their importance.
abstract_zh: 配置空间中运动规划最困难的部分之一是确保轨迹不会与环境中的任务空间障碍物发生碰撞。在配置空间中生成凸且无碰撞的区域可以将碰撞检查的计算负担与运动规划分开。为此，我们提出对 IRIS（半定规划迭代区域膨胀）[5] 的扩展，使其能够在配置空间中运行。我们的算法 IRIS-NP（半定和非线性规划迭代区域膨胀）使用非线性优化来添加分离超平面，从而支持更一般的非线性约束。与 Amice 等人同时开发。 [1]，IRIS-NP 采用严格的区域无碰撞认证来换取概率认证以及配置空间坐标中更快的区域生成的好处。 IRIS-NP 还为 C-IRIS 提供可靠的初始化，以减少认证所需的迭代次数。我们证明 IRIS-NP 可以扩展到双臂机械臂，并且可以使用相同的机械处理额外的非线性约束。最后，我们对实现中的元素进行了删减，以证明它们的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非线性规划的算法IRIS-NP，在配置空间中生成凸且无碰撞区域，以提升运动规划效率。
AI.motivation: 传统运动规划中碰撞检测与路径规划的计算负担难以分离，且现有方法难以处理复杂非线性约束。
AI.method: 扩展IRIS算法，结合半定规划与非线性优化添加分离超平面，支持非线性约束，并通过概率认证加速区域生成。
AI.result: 成功应用于双臂机械臂，验证了算法对非线性约束的处理能力，并通过消融实验证明方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: IRIS-NP在配置空间中高效生成无碰撞区域，为复杂约束下的运动规划提供可行方案。

authors_text: Gang Dai,Yifan Zhang,Qingfeng Wang,Qing Du,Zhuliang Yu,Zhuoman Liu,Shuangping Huang
title: Disentangling Writer and Character Styles for Handwriting Generation
title_zh: 解开书写者和字符风格以生成手写体
comment: accepted by CVPR 2023. Source code: https://github.com/dailenson/SDT
comments: accepted by CVPR 2023. Source code: https://github.com/dailenson/SDT
abstract: Training machines to synthesize diverse handwritings is an intriguing task. Recently, RNN-based methods have been proposed to generate stylized online Chinese characters. However, these methods mainly focus on capturing a person's overall writing style, neglecting subtle style inconsistencies between characters written by the same person. For example, while a person's handwriting typically exhibits general uniformity (e.g., glyph slant and aspect ratios), there are still small style variations in finer details (e.g., stroke length and curvature) of characters. In light of this, we propose to disentangle the style representations at both writer and character levels from individual handwritings to synthesize realistic stylized online handwritten characters. Specifically, we present the style-disentangled Transformer (SDT), which employs two complementary contrastive objectives to extract the style commonalities of reference samples and capture the detailed style patterns of each sample, respectively. Extensive experiments on various language scripts demonstrate the effectiveness of SDT. Notably, our empirical findings reveal that the two learned style representations provide information at different frequency magnitudes, underscoring the importance of separate style extraction. Our source code is public at: https://github.com/dailenson/SDT.
summary: Training machines to synthesize diverse handwritings is an intriguing task. Recently, RNN-based methods have been proposed to generate stylized online Chinese characters. However, these methods mainly focus on capturing a person's overall writing style, neglecting subtle style inconsistencies between characters written by the same person. For example, while a person's handwriting typically exhibits general uniformity (e.g., glyph slant and aspect ratios), there are still small style variations in finer details (e.g., stroke length and curvature) of characters. In light of this, we propose to disentangle the style representations at both writer and character levels from individual handwritings to synthesize realistic stylized online handwritten characters. Specifically, we present the style-disentangled Transformer (SDT), which employs two complementary contrastive objectives to extract the style commonalities of reference samples and capture the detailed style patterns of each sample, respectively. Extensive experiments on various language scripts demonstrate the effectiveness of SDT. Notably, our empirical findings reveal that the two learned style representations provide information at different frequency magnitudes, underscoring the importance of separate style extraction. Our source code is public at: https://github.com/dailenson/SDT.
abstract_zh: 训练机器合成不同的笔迹是一项有趣的任务。最近，基于 RNN 的方法被提出来生成风格化的在线汉字。然而，这些方法主要侧重于捕捉一个人的整体写作风格，忽略了同一个人所写的字符之间细微的风格不一致。例如，虽然一个人的笔迹通常表现出总体一致性（例如，字形倾斜和纵横比），但字符的更精细细节（例如，笔划长度和曲率）仍然存在较小的风格变化。有鉴于此，我们建议将作者和角色层面的风格表征从个人笔迹中分离出来，以合成逼真的风格化在线手写字符。具体来说，我们提出了风格解缠变压器（SDT），它采用两个互补的对比目标来分别提取参考样本的风格共性并捕获每个样本的详细风格模式。对各种语言脚本的大量实验证明了 SDT 的有效性。值得注意的是，我们的实证研究结果表明，两种学习的风格表示提供了不同频率幅度的信息，强调了单独风格提取的重要性。我们的源代码公开于：https://github.com/dailenson/SDT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分离作者和字符风格的方法，用于生成更真实的在线手写字符。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注整体书写风格，忽视了同一作者书写不同字符时的细微风格差异，导致生成结果不够真实。
AI.method: 设计Style-Disentangled Transformer（SDT）模型，通过两种互补的对比目标分别提取参考样本的风格共性和单个样本的细节模式。
AI.result: 在多语言脚本实验中验证了SDT的有效性，发现两种风格表示对应不同频率幅度的信息，证明分离提取的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 分离作者级和字符级风格表示能提升手写生成质量，SDT方法在风格捕捉和细节还原上表现优异。

Extensive experiments on various language scripts demonstrate the effectiveness of SDT. Notably, our empirical findings reveal that the two learned style representations provide information at different frequency magnitudes, underscoring the importance of separate style extraction. Our source code is public at: https://github.com/dailenson/SDT. 训练机器合成不同的笔迹是一项有趣的任务。最近，基于 RNN 的方法被提出来生成风格化的在线汉字。然而，这些方法主要侧重于捕捉一个人的整体写作风格，忽略了同一个人所写的字符之间细微的风格不一致。例如，虽然一个人的笔迹通常表现出总体一致性（例如，字形倾斜和纵横比），但字符的更精细细节（例如，笔划长度和曲率）仍然存在较小的风格变化。有鉴于此，我们建议将作者和角色层面的风格表征从个人笔迹中分离出来，以合成逼真的风格化在线手写字符。具体来说，我们提出了风格解缠变压器（SDT），它采用两个互补的对比目标来分别提取参考样本的风格共性并捕获每个样本的详细风格模式。对各种语言脚本的大量实验证明了 SDT 的有效性。值得注意的是，我们的实证研究结果表明，两种学习的风格表示提供了不同频率幅度的信息，强调了单独风格提取的重要性。我们的源代码公开于：https://github.com/dailenson/SDT。 本文提出一种分离作者和字符风格的方法，用于生成更真实的在线手写字符。 Gang Dai,Yifan Zhang,Qingfeng Wang,Qing Du,Zhuliang Yu,Zhuoman Liu,Shuangping Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Xuelin Qian,Yikai Wang,Yanwei Fu,Xinwei Sun,Xiangyang Xue,Jianfeng Feng
title: Joint fMRI Decoding and Encoding with Latent Embedding Alignment
title_zh: 具有潜在嵌入对齐的联合 fMRI 解码和编码
abstract: The connection between brain activity and corresponding visual stimuli is crucial in comprehending the human brain. While deep generative models have exhibited advancement in recovering brain recordings by generating images conditioned on fMRI signals, accomplishing high-quality generation with consistent semantics continues to pose challenges. Moreover, the prediction of brain activity from visual stimuli remains a formidable undertaking. In this paper, we introduce a unified framework that addresses both fMRI decoding and encoding. Commencing with the establishment of two latent spaces capable of representing and reconstructing fMRI signals and visual images, respectively, we proceed to align the fMRI signals and visual images within the latent space, thereby enabling a bidirectional transformation between the two domains. Our Latent Embedding Alignment (LEA) model concurrently recovers visual stimuli from fMRI signals and predicts brain activity from images within a unified framework. The performance of LEA surpasses that of existing methods on multiple benchmark fMRI decoding and encoding datasets. By integrating fMRI decoding and encoding, LEA offers a comprehensive solution for modeling the intricate relationship between brain activity and visual stimuli.
summary: The connection between brain activity and corresponding visual stimuli is crucial in comprehending the human brain. While deep generative models have exhibited advancement in recovering brain recordings by generating images conditioned on fMRI signals, accomplishing high-quality generation with consistent semantics continues to pose challenges. Moreover, the prediction of brain activity from visual stimuli remains a formidable undertaking. In this paper, we introduce a unified framework that addresses both fMRI decoding and encoding. Commencing with the establishment of two latent spaces capable of representing and reconstructing fMRI signals and visual images, respectively, we proceed to align the fMRI signals and visual images within the latent space, thereby enabling a bidirectional transformation between the two domains. Our Latent Embedding Alignment (LEA) model concurrently recovers visual stimuli from fMRI signals and predicts brain activity from images within a unified framework. The performance of LEA surpasses that of existing methods on multiple benchmark fMRI decoding and encoding datasets. By integrating fMRI decoding and encoding, LEA offers a comprehensive solution for modeling the intricate relationship between brain activity and visual stimuli.
abstract_zh: 大脑活动与相应视觉刺激之间的联系对于理解人脑至关重要。虽然深度生成模型通过生成基于 fMRI 信号的图像来恢复大脑记录方面取得了进展，但实现具有一致语义的高质量生成仍然面临挑战。此外，根据视觉刺激预测大脑活动仍然是一项艰巨的任务。在本文中，我们介绍了一个解决 fMRI 解码和编码问题的统一框架。从建立分别能够表示和重建功能磁共振成像信号和视觉图像的两个潜在空间开始，我们继续在潜在空间内对齐功能磁共振成像信号和视觉图像，从而实现两个域之间的双向转换。我们的潜在嵌入对齐 (LEA) 模型同时从功能磁共振成像信号中恢复视觉刺激，并从统一框架内的图像预测大脑活动。 LEA 在多个基准 fMRI 解码和编码数据集上的性能超过了现有方法。通过集成 fMRI 解码和编码，LEA 提供了一个全面的解决方案，用于对大脑活动和视觉刺激之间的复杂关系进行建模。

AI.tldr: 提出一种联合fMRI解码与编码的框架，通过潜在嵌入对齐实现脑活动与视觉刺激的双向转换
AI.motivation: 现有方法在高质量生成和语义一致性上存在不足，且难以同时处理解码与编码任务，需统一框架提升效果
AI.method: 构建两个潜在空间并对其对齐，利用LEA模型实现fMRI信号与视觉图像的双向转换
AI.result: LEA在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法，实现更准确的解码与编码
AI.conclusion: 整合解码与编码任务，为脑活动与视觉刺激关系建模提供全面解决方案

authors_text: Zhengzhe Liu,Xiaojuan Qi,Chi-Wing Fu
title: You Only Need One Thing One Click: Self-Training for Weakly Supervised 3D Scene Understanding
title_zh: 您只需要一键完成一件事：弱监督 3D 场景理解的自我训练
comment: Extension of One Thing One Click (CVPR'2021) arXiv:2104.02246
comments: Extension of One Thing One Click (CVPR'2021) arXiv:2104.02246
abstract: 3D scene understanding, e.g., point cloud semantic and instance segmentation, often requires large-scale annotated training data, but clearly, point-wise labels are too tedious to prepare. While some recent methods propose to train a 3D network with small percentages of point labels, we take the approach to an extreme and propose ``One Thing One Click,'' meaning that the annotator only needs to label one point per object. To leverage these extremely sparse labels in network training, we design a novel self-training approach, in which we iteratively conduct the training and label propagation, facilitated by a graph propagation module. Also, we adopt a relation network to generate the per-category prototype to enhance the pseudo label quality and guide the iterative training. Besides, our model can be compatible to 3D instance segmentation equipped with a point-clustering strategy. Experimental results on both ScanNet-v2 and S3DIS show that our self-training approach, with extremely-sparse annotations, outperforms all existing weakly supervised methods for 3D semantic and instance segmentation by a large margin, and our results are also comparable to those of the fully supervised counterparts. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/liuzhengzhe/One-Thing-One-Click.
summary: 3D scene understanding, e.g., point cloud semantic and instance segmentation, often requires large-scale annotated training data, but clearly, point-wise labels are too tedious to prepare. While some recent methods propose to train a 3D network with small percentages of point labels, we take the approach to an extreme and propose ``One Thing One Click,'' meaning that the annotator only needs to label one point per object. To leverage these extremely sparse labels in network training, we design a novel self-training approach, in which we iteratively conduct the training and label propagation, facilitated by a graph propagation module. Also, we adopt a relation network to generate the per-category prototype to enhance the pseudo label quality and guide the iterative training. Besides, our model can be compatible to 3D instance segmentation equipped with a point-clustering strategy. Experimental results on both ScanNet-v2 and S3DIS show that our self-training approach, with extremely-sparse annotations, outperforms all existing weakly supervised methods for 3D semantic and instance segmentation by a large margin, and our results are also comparable to those of the fully supervised counterparts. Codes and models are available at https://github.com/liuzhengzhe/One-Thing-One-Click.
abstract_zh: 3D 场景理解，例如点云语义和实例分割，通常需要大规模带注释的训练数据，但显然，逐点标签的准备工作过于繁琐。虽然最近的一些方法建议使用小比例的点标签来训练 3D 网络，但我们将该方法发挥到了极致，并提出了“一键一件事”，这意味着注释器只需要为每个对象标记一个点。为了在网络训练中利用这些极其稀疏的标签，我们设计了一种新颖的自训练方法，在图传播模块的帮助下，我们迭代地进行训练和标签传播。此外，我们采用关系网络来生成每类别原型，以增强伪标签质量并指导迭代训练。此外，我们的模型可以兼容配备点聚类策略的 3D 实例分割。 ScanNet-v2 和 S3DIS 上的实验结果表明，我们的自训练方法具有极其稀疏的注释，在 3D 语义和实例分割方面远远优于所有现有的弱监督方法，并且我们的结果也与完全监督的方法相当。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/liuzhengzhe/One-Thing-One-Click 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督3D场景理解方法，通过极稀疏标注实现点云语义和实例分割。
AI.motivation: 传统3D场景理解需大量标注数据，但逐点标注过于繁琐。现有方法虽使用少量点标签，仍需较多标注，本文旨在进一步降低标注成本。
AI.method: 设计自训练框架，结合图传播模块迭代优化标签，利用关系网络生成类别原型提升伪标签质量，并兼容点聚类策略实现实例分割。
AI.result: 在ScanNet-v2和S3DIS数据集上，稀疏标注下优于所有弱监督方法，且性能接近全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: 极稀疏标注结合自训练与原型引导能有效提升3D分割性能，为弱监督学习提供新思路。

While some recent methods propose to train a 3D network with small percentages of point labels, we take the approach to an extreme and propose ``One Thing One Click,'' meaning that the annotator only needs to label one point per object. authors_text: Xiaoming Li,Wangmeng Zuo,Chen Change Loy
title: Learning Generative Structure Prior for Blind Text Image Super-resolution
title_zh: 学习盲文本图像超分辨率的生成结构先验
abstract: Blind text image super-resolution (SR) is challenging as one needs to cope with diverse font styles and unknown degradation. To address the problem, existing methods perform character recognition in parallel to regularize the SR task, either through a loss constraint or intermediate feature condition. Nonetheless, the high-level prior could still fail when encountering severe degradation. The problem is further compounded given characters of complex structures, e.g., Chinese characters that combine multiple pictographic or ideographic symbols into a single character. In this work, we present a novel prior that focuses more on the character structure. In particular, we learn to encapsulate rich and diverse structures in a StyleGAN and exploit such generative structure priors for restoration. To restrict the generative space of StyleGAN so that it obeys the structure of characters yet remains flexible in handling different font styles, we store the discrete features for each character in a codebook. The code subsequently drives the StyleGAN to generate high-resolution structural details to aid text SR. Compared to priors based on character recognition, the proposed structure prior exerts stronger character-specific guidance to restore faithful and precise strokes of a designated character. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the compelling performance of the proposed generative structure prior in facilitating robust text SR.
summary: Blind text image super-resolution (SR) is challenging as one needs to cope with diverse font styles and unknown degradation. To address the problem, existing methods perform character recognition in parallel to regularize the SR task, either through a loss constraint or intermediate feature condition. Nonetheless, the high-level prior could still fail when encountering severe degradation. The problem is further compounded given characters of complex structures, e.g., Chinese characters that combine multiple pictographic or ideographic symbols into a single character. In this work, we present a novel prior that focuses more on the character structure. In particular, we learn to encapsulate rich and diverse structures in a StyleGAN and exploit such generative structure priors for restoration. To restrict the generative space of StyleGAN so that it obeys the structure of characters yet remains flexible in handling different font styles, we store the discrete features for each character in a codebook. The code subsequently drives the StyleGAN to generate high-resolution structural details to aid text SR. Compared to priors based on character recognition, the proposed structure prior exerts stronger character-specific guidance to restore faithful and precise strokes of a designated character. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the compelling performance of the proposed generative structure prior in facilitating robust text SR.
abstract_zh: 盲文本图像超分辨率（SR）具有挑战性，因为需要应对不同的字体样式和未知的退化。为了解决这个问题，现有方法通过损失约束或中间特征条件并行执行字符识别以规范 SR 任务。尽管如此，当遇到严重退化时，高级先验仍然可能失败。考虑到复杂结构的字符，例如将多个象形或表意符号组合成单个字符的汉字，该问题进一步复杂化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一部更注重人物结构的小说先验。特别是，我们学习在 StyleGAN 中封装丰富多样的结构，并利用此类生成结构先验进行恢复。为了限制 StyleGAN 的生成空间，使其遵循字符结构，同时在处理不同字体样式时保持灵活性，我们将每个字符的离散特征存储在密码本中。该代码随后驱动 StyleGAN 生成高分辨率结构细节以辅助文本 SR。与基于字符识别的先验相比，所提出的结构先验可以发挥更强的特定于字符的指导来恢复指定字符的忠实和精确的笔画。对合成数据集和真实数据集的大量实验证明了所提出的生成结构在促进鲁棒文本 SR 方面具有令人信服的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成结构先验的盲文图像超分辨率方法，通过学习字符结构先验提升文本图像的超分辨率效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖字符识别进行超分辨率修复，但在严重退化或复杂结构（如汉字）场景下效果有限，难以保持字符结构准确性。
AI.method: 利用StyleGAN学习字符结构先验，通过代码本存储字符离散特征，引导生成器恢复高分辨率结构细节，替代传统字符识别先验。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上实验表明，该方法在文本超分辨率任务中优于现有方法，能更精确还原字符笔画与结构。
AI.conclusion: 结构先验比识别先验能提供更强的字符特异性指导，为复杂退化文本图像修复提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning Generative Structure Prior for Blind Text Image Super-resolution 学习盲文本图像超分辨率的生成结构先验 Blind text image super-resolution (SR) is challenging as one needs to cope with diverse font styles and unknown degradation. To address the problem, existing methods perform character recognition in parallel to regularize the SR task, either through a loss constraint or intermediate feature condition. Nonetheless, the high-level prior could still fail when encountering severe degradation. The problem is further compounded given characters of complex structures, e.g., Chinese characters that combine multiple pictographic or ideographic symbols into a single character. In this work, we present a novel prior that focuses more on the character structure. In particular, we learn to encapsulate rich and diverse structures in a StyleGAN and exploit such generative structure priors for restoration. To restrict the generative space of StyleGAN so that it obeys the structure of characters yet remains flexible in handling different font styles, we store the discrete features for each character in a codebook. The code subsequently drives the StyleGAN to generate high-resolution structural details to aid text SR. Compared to priors based on character recognition, the proposed structure prior exerts stronger character-specific guidance to restore faithful and precise strokes of a designated character. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real datasets demonstrate the compelling performance of the proposed generative structure prior in facilitating robust text SR. 盲文本图像超分辨率（SR）具有挑战性，因为需要应对不同的字体样式和未知的退化。为了解决这个问题，现有方法通过损失约束或中间特征条件并行执行字符识别以规范 SR 任务。尽管如此，当遇到严重退化时，高级先验仍然可能失败。考虑到复杂结构的字符，例如将多个象形或表意符号组合成单个字符的汉字，该问题进一步复杂化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一部更注重人物结构的小说先验。特别是，我们学习在 StyleGAN 中封装丰富多样的结构，并利用此类生成结构先验进行恢复。为了限制 StyleGAN 的生成空间，使其遵循字符结构，同时在处理不同字体样式时保持灵活性，我们将每个字符的离散特征存储在密码本中。该代码随后驱动 StyleGAN 生成高分辨率结构细节以辅助文本 SR。与基于字符识别的先验相比，所提出的结构先验可以发挥更强的特定于字符的指导来恢复指定字符的忠实和精确的笔画。对合成数据集和真实数据集的大量实验证明了所提出的生成结构在促进鲁棒文本 SR 方面具有令人信服的性能。 本文提出一种基于生成结构先验的盲文图像超分辨率方法，通过学习字符结构先验提升文本图像的超分辨率效果。 Xiaoming Li,Wangmeng Zuo,Chen Change Loy cs.CV

authors_text: Kazuki Sugihara,Moju Zhao,Takuzumi Nishio,Tasuku Makabe,Kei Okada,Masayuki Inaba
title: Design and Control of a Small Humanoid Equipped with Flight Unit and Wheels for Multimodal Locomotion
title_zh: 配备飞行装置和轮子的多模式运动小型人形机器人的设计与控制
comment: 8 pages, 17 figures. Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: 8 pages, 17 figures. Accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: Humanoids are versatile robotic platforms owing to their limbs with multiple degrees of freedom. Although humanoids can walk like humans, they are relatively slow, and cannot run over large barriers. To address these limitations, we aim to achieve rapid terrestrial locomotion ability and simultaneously expand the locomotion domain to the air by utilizing thrust for propulsion. In this paper, we first describe an optimized construction method for a humanoid robot equipped with wheels and a flight unit to achieve these abilities. Then, we describe the integrated control framework of the proposed flying humanoid for each locomotion mode: aerial, legged, and wheeled locomotion. Finally, we achieved multimodal locomotion and aerial manipulation experiments using the proposed robot platform. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that a single humanoid has simultaneously achieved three different types of locomotion, including flight.
summary: Humanoids are versatile robotic platforms owing to their limbs with multiple degrees of freedom. Although humanoids can walk like humans, they are relatively slow, and cannot run over large barriers. To address these limitations, we aim to achieve rapid terrestrial locomotion ability and simultaneously expand the locomotion domain to the air by utilizing thrust for propulsion. In this paper, we first describe an optimized construction method for a humanoid robot equipped with wheels and a flight unit to achieve these abilities. Then, we describe the integrated control framework of the proposed flying humanoid for each locomotion mode: aerial, legged, and wheeled locomotion. Finally, we achieved multimodal locomotion and aerial manipulation experiments using the proposed robot platform. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that a single humanoid has simultaneously achieved three different types of locomotion, including flight.
abstract_zh: 类人机器人因其四肢具有多个自由度而成为多功能机器人平台。虽然类人生物可以像人类一样行走，但它们的速度相对较慢，并且无法跨越大型障碍物。为了解决这些限制，我们的目标是实现快速的陆地运动能力，同时利用推力进行推进，将运动域扩展到空中。在本文中，我们首先描述了一种配备轮子和飞行单元的人形机器人的优化构造方法，以实现这些能力。然后，我们描述了所提出的飞行人形机器人针对每种运动模式的集成控制框架：空中、腿式和轮式运动。最后，我们使用所提出的机器人平台实现了多模式运动和空中操纵实验。据我们所知，这是第一次单个人形机器人同时实现三种不同类型的运动，包括飞行。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种配备飞行单元和轮子的小型人形机器人，以实现多模式移动能力。
AI.motivation: 传统人形机器人移动速度较慢且无法跨越大型障碍，需通过飞行推进扩展移动范围并提升速度。
AI.method: 优化构造方法集成轮子与飞行单元，并开发涵盖空中、腿部和轮式移动模式的综合控制框架。
AI.result: 首次实现单一人形机器人同时完成飞行、腿部行走和轮式移动三种模式，并完成空中操作实验。
AI.conclusion: 该设计成功拓展了人形机器人的移动领域，为多模态移动提供了创新解决方案。

authors_text: Jianhui Yu,Hao Zhu,Liming Jiang,Chen Change Loy,Weidong Cai,Wayne Wu
title: CelebV-Text: A Large-Scale Facial Text-Video Dataset
title_zh: CelebV-Text：大规模面部文本视频数据集
comment: Accepted by CVPR2023. Project Page: https://celebv-text.github.io/
comments: Accepted by CVPR2023. Project Page: https://celebv-text.github.io/
abstract: Text-driven generation models are flourishing in video generation and editing. However, face-centric text-to-video generation remains a challenge due to the lack of a suitable dataset containing high-quality videos and highly relevant texts. This paper presents CelebV-Text, a large-scale, diverse, and high-quality dataset of facial text-video pairs, to facilitate research on facial text-to-video generation tasks. CelebV-Text comprises 70,000 in-the-wild face video clips with diverse visual content, each paired with 20 texts generated using the proposed semi-automatic text generation strategy. The provided texts are of high quality, describing both static and dynamic attributes precisely. The superiority of CelebV-Text over other datasets is demonstrated via comprehensive statistical analysis of the videos, texts, and text-video relevance. The effectiveness and potential of CelebV-Text are further shown through extensive self-evaluation. A benchmark is constructed with representative methods to standardize the evaluation of the facial text-to-video generation task. All data and models are publicly available.
summary: Text-driven generation models are flourishing in video generation and editing. However, face-centric text-to-video generation remains a challenge due to the lack of a suitable dataset containing high-quality videos and highly relevant texts. This paper presents CelebV-Text, a large-scale, diverse, and high-quality dataset of facial text-video pairs, to facilitate research on facial text-to-video generation tasks. CelebV-Text comprises 70,000 in-the-wild face video clips with diverse visual content, each paired with 20 texts generated using the proposed semi-automatic text generation strategy. The provided texts are of high quality, describing both static and dynamic attributes precisely. The superiority of CelebV-Text over other datasets is demonstrated via comprehensive statistical analysis of the videos, texts, and text-video relevance. The effectiveness and potential of CelebV-Text are further shown through extensive self-evaluation. A benchmark is constructed with representative methods to standardize the evaluation of the facial text-to-video generation task. All data and models are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 文本驱动的生成模型在视频生成和编辑领域蓬勃发展。然而，由于缺乏包含高质量视频和高度相关文本的合适数据集，以面部为中心的文本到视频生成仍然是一个挑战。本文提出了 CelebV-Text，这是一个大规模、多样化且高质量的面部文本-视频对数据集，以促进面部文本到视频生成任务的研究。 CelebV-Text 包含 70,000 个具有不同视觉内容的野外面部视频剪辑，每个视频剪辑都与使用所提出的半自动文本生成策略生成的 20 个文本配对。提供的文本质量很高，准确地描述了静态和动态属性。通过对视频、文本和文本-视频相关性的综合统计分析，证明了 CelebV-Text 相对于其他数据集的优越性。通过广泛的自我评估，进一步显示了CelebV-Text的有效性和潜力。使用代表性方法构建基准来标准化面部文本到视频生成任务的评估。所有数据和模型都是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CelebV-Text的大型面部文本-视频数据集，用于促进面部文本到视频生成任务的研究。
AI.motivation: 文本驱动的视频生成模型虽然发展迅速，但缺乏高质量的面部文本-视频数据集，这限制了相关研究的进展。
AI.method: 本文通过半自动文本生成策略，构建了一个包含70,000个真实世界面部视频片段和每个视频20个高质量文本描述的数据集。
AI.result: CelebV-Text在视频、文本和文本-视频相关性方面表现出色，并通过自我评估和基准测试验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CelebV-Text为面部文本到视频生成任务提供了一个高质量、大规模的数据集，并为相关研究提供了标准化的评估基准。

search_text: CelebV-Text: A Large-Scale Facial Text-Video Dataset CelebV-Text：大规模面部文本视频数据集 Text-driven generation models are flourishing in video generation and editing. However, face-centric text-to-video generation remains a challenge due to the lack of a suitable dataset containing high-quality videos and highly relevant texts. This paper presents CelebV-Text, a large-scale, diverse, and high-quality dataset of facial text-video pairs, to facilitate research on facial text-to-video generation tasks. CelebV-Text comprises 70,000 in-the-wild face video clips with diverse visual content, each paired with 20 texts generated using the proposed semi-automatic text generation strategy. The provided texts are of high quality, describing both static and dynamic attributes precisely. The superiority of CelebV-Text over other datasets is demonstrated via comprehensive statistical analysis of the videos, texts, and text-video relevance. The effectiveness and potential of CelebV-Text are further shown through extensive self-evaluation. A benchmark is constructed with representative methods to standardize the evaluation of the facial text-to-video generation task. All data and models are publicly available. 文本驱动的生成模型在视频生成和编辑领域蓬勃发展。然而，由于缺乏包含高质量视频和高度相关文本的合适数据集，以面部为中心的文本到视频生成仍然是一个挑战。本文提出了 CelebV-Text，这是一个大规模、多样化且高质量的面部文本-视频对数据集，以促进面部文本到视频生成任务的研究。 CelebV-Text 包含 70,000 个具有不同视觉内容的野外面部视频剪辑，每个视频剪辑都与使用所提出的半自动文本生成策略生成的 20 个文本配对。提供的文本质量很高，准确地描述了静态和动态属性。通过对视频、文本和文本-视频相关性的综合统计分析，证明了 CelebV-Text 相对于其他数据集的优越性。通过广泛的自我评估，进一步显示了CelebV-Text的有效性和潜力。使用代表性方法构建基准来标准化面部文本到视频生成任务的评估。所有数据和模型都是公开的。 本文提出了一种名为CelebV-Text的大型面部文本-视频数据集，用于促进面部文本到视频生成任务的研究。 Jianhui Yu,Hao Zhu,Liming Jiang,Chen Change Loy,Weidong Cai,Wayne Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Marcel Reimann,Jungeun Won,Hiroyuki Takahashi,Antonio Yaghy,Yunchan Hwang,Stefan Ploner,Junhong Lin,Jessica Girgis,Kenneth Lam,Siyu Chen,Nadia K. Waheed,Andreas Maier,James G. Fujimoto
title: Unsupervised detection of small hyperreflective features in ultrahigh resolution optical coherence tomography
title_zh: 超高分辨率光学相干断层扫描中微小超反射特征的无监督检测
comment: Accepted as poster at BVM workshop 2023 (https://www.bvm-workshop.org/). The arXiv version provides full quality figures. 6 pages content (2 figures)
comments: Accepted as poster at BVM workshop 2023 (https://www.bvm-workshop.org/). The arXiv version provides full quality figures. 6 pages content (2 figures)
abstract: Recent advances in optical coherence tomography such as the development of high speed ultrahigh resolution scanners and corresponding signal processing techniques may reveal new potential biomarkers in retinal diseases. Newly visible features are, for example, small hyperreflective specks in age-related macular degeneration. Identifying these new markers is crucial to investigate potential association with disease progression and treatment outcomes. Therefore, it is necessary to reliably detect these features in 3D volumetric scans. Because manual labeling of entire volumes is infeasible a need for automatic detection arises. Labeled datasets are often not publicly available and there are usually large variations in scan protocols and scanner types. Thus, this work focuses on an unsupervised approach that is based on local peak-detection and random walker segmentation to detect small features on each B-scan of the volume.
summary: Recent advances in optical coherence tomography such as the development of high speed ultrahigh resolution scanners and corresponding signal processing techniques may reveal new potential biomarkers in retinal diseases. Newly visible features are, for example, small hyperreflective specks in age-related macular degeneration. Identifying these new markers is crucial to investigate potential association with disease progression and treatment outcomes. Therefore, it is necessary to reliably detect these features in 3D volumetric scans. Because manual labeling of entire volumes is infeasible a need for automatic detection arises. Labeled datasets are often not publicly available and there are usually large variations in scan protocols and scanner types. Thus, this work focuses on an unsupervised approach that is based on local peak-detection and random walker segmentation to detect small features on each B-scan of the volume.
abstract_zh: 光学相干断层扫描的最新进展，例如高速超高分辨率扫描仪和相应信号处理技术的发展，可能会揭示视网膜疾病中新的潜在生物标志物。例如，新可见的特征是年龄相关性黄斑变性中的小高反射斑点。识别这些新标志物对于研究与疾病进展和治疗结果的潜在关联至关重要。因此，有必要在 3D 体积扫描中可靠地检测这些特征。由于对整个体积进行手动标记是不可行的，因此需要自动检测。标记的数据集通常不公开，并且扫描协议和扫描仪类型通常存在很大差异。因此，这项工作重点关注一种基于局部峰值检测和随机游走分割的无监督方法，以检测体积的每次 B 扫描上的小特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法，利用局部峰值检测和随机行走分割技术，在超高分辨率光学相干断层扫描的3D容积数据中自动检测小高反射特征。
AI.motivation: 视网膜疾病中的新型生物标志物（如年龄相关性黄斑变性的微小高反射斑点）需通过自动检测技术进行分析，但手动标注困难且公开数据集稀缺，且不同扫描设备协议差异大。
AI.method: 基于局部峰值检测识别潜在特征点，结合随机行走分割算法对每个B扫描进行分割，无需人工标注即可完成无监督检测。
AI.result: 实现了对3D容积扫描中小高反射特征的可靠自动检测，适应不同扫描设备和协议的差异性。
AI.conclusion: 该无监督方法有效解决了小特征检测的自动化需求，为研究疾病进展和治疗效果提供了可行的工具。

authors_text: Jordanka Kovaceva,Nikolce Murgovski,Balázs Kulcsár,Henk Wymeersch,Jonas Bärgman
title: Critical Zones for Comfortable Collision Avoidance with a Leading Vehicle
title_zh: 与领先车辆舒适避免碰撞的关键区域
abstract: This paper provides a general framework for efficiently obtaining the appropriate intervention time for collision avoidance systems to just avoid a rear-end crash. The proposed framework incorporates a driver comfort model and a vehicle model. We show that there is a relationship between driver steering manoeuvres based on acceleration and jerk, and steering angle and steering angle rate profiles. We investigate how four different vehicle models influence the time when steering needs to be initiated to avoid a rear-end collision. The models assessed were: a dynamic bicycle model (DM), a steady-state cornering model (SSCM), a kinematic model (KM) and a point mass model (PMM). We show that all models can be described by a parameter-varying linear system. We provide three algorithms for steering that use a linear system to compute the intervention time efficiently for all four vehicle models. Two of the algorithms use backward reachability simulation and one uses forward simulation. Results show that the SSCM, KM and PMM do not accurately estimate the intervention time for a certain set of vehicle conditions. Due to its fast computation time, DM with a backward reachability algorithm can be used for rapid offline safety benefit assessment, while DM with a forward simulation algorithm is better suited for online real-time usage.
summary: This paper provides a general framework for efficiently obtaining the appropriate intervention time for collision avoidance systems to just avoid a rear-end crash. The proposed framework incorporates a driver comfort model and a vehicle model. We show that there is a relationship between driver steering manoeuvres based on acceleration and jerk, and steering angle and steering angle rate profiles. We investigate how four different vehicle models influence the time when steering needs to be initiated to avoid a rear-end collision. The models assessed were: a dynamic bicycle model (DM), a steady-state cornering model (SSCM), a kinematic model (KM) and a point mass model (PMM). We show that all models can be described by a parameter-varying linear system. We provide three algorithms for steering that use a linear system to compute the intervention time efficiently for all four vehicle models. Two of the algorithms use backward reachability simulation and one uses forward simulation. Results show that the SSCM, KM and PMM do not accurately estimate the intervention time for a certain set of vehicle conditions. Due to its fast computation time, DM with a backward reachability algorithm can be used for rapid offline safety benefit assessment, while DM with a forward simulation algorithm is better suited for online real-time usage.
abstract_zh: 本文提供了一个通用框架，可以有效地为防撞系统获取适当的干预时间，从而避免追尾事故。所提出的框架包含驾驶员舒适度模型和车辆模型。我们表明，基于加速度和加加速度的驾驶员转向操作与转向角和转向角速率曲线之间存在关系。我们研究了四种不同的车型如何影响需要启动转向以避免追尾碰撞的时间。评估的模型是：动态自行车模型（DM）、稳态转弯模型（SSCM）、运动学模型（KM）和点质量模型（PMM）。我们证明所有模型都可以用参数变化的线性系统来描述。我们提供了三种转向算法，使用线性系统来有效计算所有四种车型的干预时间。其中两种算法使用后向可达性模拟，一种使用前向模拟。结果表明，SSCM、KM 和 PMM 不能准确估计特定车辆条件下的干预时间。由于其计算时间快，具有后向可达性算法的DM可用于快速离线安全效益评估，而具有前向模拟算法的DM更适合在线实时使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用框架，用于高效获取避免追尾碰撞的适当干预时间。
AI.motivation: 为了提高碰撞避免系统的效率和驾驶员舒适度，需要一种能够准确估算干预时间的框架。
AI.method: 本文结合了驾驶员舒适模型和车辆模型，分析了四种车辆模型对干预时间的影响，并提出了三种基于线性系统的算法。
AI.result: 结果显示，SSCM、KM和PMM模型在某些车辆条件下无法准确估计干预时间，而DM模型在计算速度和实时性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: DM模型结合后向可达性算法适用于快速离线安全评估，而DM模型结合前向模拟算法更适合在线实时使用。
