authors_text: Huiru Wang,Xiuhong Li,Zenyu Ren,Dan Yang,chunming Ma
title: Exploring Multimodal Sentiment Analysis via CBAM Attention and Double-layer BiLSTM Architecture
title_zh: 通过 CBAM Attention 和双层 BiLSTM 架构探索多模态情感分析
abstract: Because multimodal data contains more modal information, multimodal sentiment analysis has become a recent research hotspot. However, redundant information is easily involved in feature fusion after feature extraction, which has a certain impact on the feature representation after fusion. Therefore, in this papaer, we propose a new multimodal sentiment analysis model. In our model, we use BERT + BiLSTM as new feature extractor to capture the long-distance dependencies in sentences and consider the position information of input sequences to obtain richer text features. To remove redundant information and make the network pay more attention to the correlation between image and text features, CNN and CBAM attention are added after splicing text features and picture features, to improve the feature representation ability. On the MVSA-single dataset and HFM dataset, compared with the baseline model, the ACC of our model is improved by 1.78% and 1.91%, and the F1 value is enhanced by 3.09% and 2.0%, respectively. The experimental results show that our model achieves a sound effect, similar to the advanced model.
summary: Because multimodal data contains more modal information, multimodal sentiment analysis has become a recent research hotspot. However, redundant information is easily involved in feature fusion after feature extraction, which has a certain impact on the feature representation after fusion. Therefore, in this papaer, we propose a new multimodal sentiment analysis model. In our model, we use BERT + BiLSTM as new feature extractor to capture the long-distance dependencies in sentences and consider the position information of input sequences to obtain richer text features. To remove redundant information and make the network pay more attention to the correlation between image and text features, CNN and CBAM attention are added after splicing text features and picture features, to improve the feature representation ability. On the MVSA-single dataset and HFM dataset, compared with the baseline model, the ACC of our model is improved by 1.78% and 1.91%, and the F1 value is enhanced by 3.09% and 2.0%, respectively. The experimental results show that our model achieves a sound effect, similar to the advanced model.
abstract_zh: 由于多模态数据包含更多的模态信息，多模态情感分析成为近年来的研究热点。但特征提取后的特征融合中容易涉及冗余信息，对融合后的特征表示有一定的影响。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的多模态情感分析模型。在我们的模型中，我们使用 BERT + BiLSTM 作为新的特征提取器来捕获句子中的长距离依赖关系，并考虑输入序列的位置信息以获得更丰富的文本特征。为了去除冗余信息，使网络更加关注图像和文本特征之间的相关性，在拼接文本特征和图片特征后加入CNN和CBAM注意力，以提高特征表示能力。在MVSA-single数据集和HFM数据集上，与基线模型相比，我们模型的ACC分别提高了1.78%和1.91%，F1值分别提高了3.09%和2.0%。实验结果表明，我们的模型实现了与高级模型相似的声音效果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CBAM注意力机制和双层BiLSTM架构的多模态情感分析模型，旨在提升特征融合效果。
AI.motivation: 多模态数据融合过程中存在冗余信息干扰，影响特征表示效果，需通过优化注意力机制和网络结构提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用BERT+BiLSTM提取文本长距离依赖特征，拼接图像特征后引入CNN和CBAM注意力模块增强模态间关联性。
AI.result: 在MVSA-single和HFM数据集上，模型ACC分别提升1.78%和1.91%，F1值分别提升3.09%和2.0%。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过冗余信息过滤和多模态特征增强，在情感分析任务中达到先进模型水平。

search_text: Exploring Multimodal Sentiment Analysis via CBAM Attention and Double-layer BiLSTM Architecture 通过 CBAM Attention 和双层 BiLSTM 架构探索多模态情感分析 Because multimodal data contains more modal information, multimodal sentiment analysis has become a recent research hotspot. However, redundant information is easily involved in feature fusion after feature extraction, which has a certain impact on the feature representation after fusion. Therefore, in this papaer, we propose a new multimodal sentiment analysis model. In our model, we use BERT + BiLSTM as new feature extractor to capture the long-distance dependencies in sentences and consider the position information of input sequences to obtain richer text features. To remove redundant information and make the network pay more attention to the correlation between image and text features, CNN and CBAM attention are added after splicing text features and picture features, to improve the feature representation ability. On the MVSA-single dataset and HFM dataset, compared with the baseline model, the ACC of our model is improved by 1.78% and 1.91%, and the F1 value is enhanced by 3.09% and 2.0%, respectively. The experimental results show that our model achieves a sound effect, similar to the advanced model. 由于多模态数据包含更多的模态信息，多模态情感分析成为近年来的研究热点。但特征提取后的特征融合中容易涉及冗余信息，对融合后的特征表示有一定的影响。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的多模态情感分析模型。在我们的模型中，我们使用 BERT + BiLSTM 作为新的特征提取器来捕获句子中的长距离依赖关系，并考虑输入序列的位置信息以获得更丰富的文本特征。为了去除冗余信息，使网络更加关注图像和文本特征之间的相关性，在拼接文本特征和图片特征后加入CNN和CBAM注意力，以提高特征表示能力。在MVSA-single数据集和HFM数据集上，与基线模型相比，我们模型的ACC分别提高了1.78%和1.91%，F1值分别提高了3.09%和2.0%。实验结果表明，我们的模型实现了与高级模型相似的声音效果。 本文提出一种结合CBAM注意力机制和双层BiLSTM架构的多模态情感分析模型，旨在提升特征融合效果。 Huiru Wang,Xiuhong Li,Zenyu Ren,Dan Yang,chunming Ma cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Xinhang Liu,Yu-Wing Tai,Chi-Keung Tang
title: Clean-NeRF: Reformulating NeRF to account for View-Dependent Observations
title_zh: Clean-NeRF：重新制定 NeRF 以考虑依赖于视图的观察
abstract: While Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) had achieved unprecedented novel view synthesis results, they have been struggling in dealing with large-scale cluttered scenes with sparse input views and highly view-dependent appearances. Specifically, existing NeRF-based models tend to produce blurry rendering with the volumetric reconstruction often inaccurate, where a lot of reconstruction errors are observed in the form of foggy "floaters" hovering within the entire volume of an opaque 3D scene. Such inaccuracies impede NeRF's potential for accurate 3D NeRF registration, object detection, segmentation, etc., which possibly accounts for only limited significant research effort so far to directly address these important 3D fundamental computer vision problems to date. This paper analyzes the NeRF's struggles in such settings and proposes Clean-NeRF for accurate 3D reconstruction and novel view rendering in complex scenes. Our key insights consist of enforcing effective appearance and geometry constraints, which are absent in the conventional NeRF reconstruction, by 1) automatically detecting and modeling view-dependent appearances in the training views to prevent them from interfering with density estimation, which is complete with 2) a geometric correction procedure performed on each traced ray during inference. Clean-NeRF can be implemented as a plug-in that can immediately benefit existing NeRF-based methods without additional input. Codes will be released.
summary: While Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs) had achieved unprecedented novel view synthesis results, they have been struggling in dealing with large-scale cluttered scenes with sparse input views and highly view-dependent appearances. Specifically, existing NeRF-based models tend to produce blurry rendering with the volumetric reconstruction often inaccurate, where a lot of reconstruction errors are observed in the form of foggy "floaters" hovering within the entire volume of an opaque 3D scene. Such inaccuracies impede NeRF's potential for accurate 3D NeRF registration, object detection, segmentation, etc., which possibly accounts for only limited significant research effort so far to directly address these important 3D fundamental computer vision problems to date. This paper analyzes the NeRF's struggles in such settings and proposes Clean-NeRF for accurate 3D reconstruction and novel view rendering in complex scenes. Our key insights consist of enforcing effective appearance and geometry constraints, which are absent in the conventional NeRF reconstruction, by 1) automatically detecting and modeling view-dependent appearances in the training views to prevent them from interfering with density estimation, which is complete with 2) a geometric correction procedure performed on each traced ray during inference. Clean-NeRF can be implemented as a plug-in that can immediately benefit existing NeRF-based methods without additional input. Codes will be released.
abstract_zh: 虽然神经辐射场（NeRF）取得了前所未有的新颖的视图合成结果，但它们在处理具有稀疏输入视图和高度依赖视图的外观的大规模杂乱场景方面一直在努力。具体来说，现有的基于 NeRF 的模型往往会产生模糊渲染，并且体积重建通常不准确，其中以雾状“漂浮物”的形式观察到许多重建错误，悬浮在不透明 3D 场景的整个体积内。这种不准确性阻碍了 NeRF 准确 3D NeRF 配准、对象检测、分割等方面的潜力，这可能导致迄今为止直接解决这些重要的 3D 基本计算机视觉问题的重要研究工作有限。本文分析了 NeRF 在此类设置中的挣扎，并提出 Clean-NeRF 用于复杂场景中的精确 3D 重建和新颖的视图渲染。我们的主要见解包括强制执行有效的外观和几何约束，这在传统的 NeRF 重建中是不存在的，方法是 1) 自动检测和建模训练视图中依赖于视图的外观，以防止它们干扰密度估计，这通过 2) 在推理过程中对每条追踪射线执行几何校正程序来完成。 Clean-NeRF 可以作为插件实现，无需额外输入即可立即使现有的基于 NeRF 的方法受益。代码将被释放。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Clean-NeRF方法，通过改进神经辐射场（NeRF）以解决复杂场景下视图相关观测导致的重建模糊和不准确问题。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF在处理大规模杂乱场景时存在重建模糊、体积不准确等问题，影响其在三维注册、目标检测等任务中的应用，亟需改进。
AI.method: 通过自动检测并建模视图相关外观以避免干扰密度估计，并在推理时对每条追踪射线进行几何校正，作为现有NeRF方法的插件实现。
AI.result: Clean-NeRF显著提升复杂场景下的三维重建精度，减少模糊伪影，且无需额外输入即可直接增强现有NeRF方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过引入外观约束与几何校正，有效解决了NeRF在复杂场景中的重建缺陷，为后续三维视觉任务奠定基础。

authors_text: Qian Wang,Yiqun Wang,Michael Birsak,Peter Wonka
title: BlobGAN-3D: A Spatially-Disentangled 3D-Aware Generative Model for Indoor Scenes
title_zh: BlobGAN-3D：室内场景的空间分离 3D 感知生成模型
abstract: 3D-aware image synthesis has attracted increasing interest as it models the 3D nature of our real world. However, performing realistic object-level editing of the generated images in the multi-object scenario still remains a challenge. Recently, a 2D GAN termed BlobGAN has demonstrated great multi-object editing capabilities on real-world indoor scene datasets. In this work, we propose BlobGAN-3D, which is a 3D-aware improvement of the original 2D BlobGAN. We enable explicit camera pose control while maintaining the disentanglement for individual objects in the scene by extending the 2D blobs into 3D blobs. We keep the object-level editing capabilities of BlobGAN and in addition allow flexible control over the 3D location of the objects in the scene. We test our method on real-world indoor datasets and show that our method can achieve comparable image quality compared to the 2D BlobGAN and other 3D-aware GAN baselines while being able to enable camera pose control and object-level editing in the challenging multi-object real-world scenarios.
summary: 3D-aware image synthesis has attracted increasing interest as it models the 3D nature of our real world. However, performing realistic object-level editing of the generated images in the multi-object scenario still remains a challenge. Recently, a 2D GAN termed BlobGAN has demonstrated great multi-object editing capabilities on real-world indoor scene datasets. In this work, we propose BlobGAN-3D, which is a 3D-aware improvement of the original 2D BlobGAN. We enable explicit camera pose control while maintaining the disentanglement for individual objects in the scene by extending the 2D blobs into 3D blobs. We keep the object-level editing capabilities of BlobGAN and in addition allow flexible control over the 3D location of the objects in the scene. We test our method on real-world indoor datasets and show that our method can achieve comparable image quality compared to the 2D BlobGAN and other 3D-aware GAN baselines while being able to enable camera pose control and object-level editing in the challenging multi-object real-world scenarios.
abstract_zh: 3D 感知图像合成吸引了越来越多的兴趣，因为它模拟了现实世界的 3D 本质。然而，在多对象场景中对生成的图像执行真实的对象级编辑仍然是一个挑战。最近，一种名为 BlobGAN 的 2D GAN 在真实室内场景数据集上展示了强大的多对象编辑功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了 BlobGAN-3D，它是原始 2D BlobGAN 的 3D 感知改进。我们通过将 2D 斑点扩展为 3D 斑点，实现显式相机姿态控制，同时保持场景中各个对象的解开。我们保留了 BlobGAN 的对象级编辑功能，此外还允许灵活控制场景中对象的 3D 位置。我们在现实世界的室内数据集上测试了我们的方法，结果表明，与 2D BlobGAN 和其他 3D 感知 GAN 基线相比，我们的方法可以实现可比的图像质量，同时能够在具有挑战性的多对象现实场景中实现相机姿势控制和对象级编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BlobGAN-3D，一种用于室内场景的3D感知生成模型，支持相机姿态控制和对象级编辑。
AI.motivation: 尽管3D-aware图像合成受到关注，但多对象场景下的真实对象级编辑仍具挑战性，现有2D方法缺乏3D控制能力。
AI.method: 通过将2D BlobGAN的blob结构扩展为3D，实现显式相机姿态控制，同时保持对象解耦特性并支持3D位置调整。
AI.result: 在真实室内数据集上达到与2D BlobGAN及其他3D GAN基线相当的图像质量，成功实现复杂多对象场景的相机控制与编辑。
AI.conclusion: BlobGAN-3D为多对象室内场景提供了兼顾高质量生成与灵活3D控制的解决方案。

search_text: BlobGAN-3D: A Spatially-Disentangled 3D-Aware Generative Model for Indoor Scenes BlobGAN-3D：室内场景的空间分离 3D 感知生成模型 3D-aware image synthesis has attracted increasing interest as it models the 3D nature of our real world. However, performing realistic object-level editing of the generated images in the multi-object scenario still remains a challenge. Recently, a 2D GAN termed BlobGAN has demonstrated great multi-object editing capabilities on real-world indoor scene datasets. In this work, we propose BlobGAN-3D, which is a 3D-aware improvement of the original 2D BlobGAN. We enable explicit camera pose control while maintaining the disentanglement for individual objects in the scene by extending the 2D blobs into 3D blobs. We keep the object-level editing capabilities of BlobGAN and in addition allow flexible control over the 3D location of the objects in the scene. We test our method on real-world indoor datasets and show that our method can achieve comparable image quality compared to the 2D BlobGAN and other 3D-aware GAN baselines while being able to enable camera pose control and object-level editing in the challenging multi-object real-world scenarios. 3D 感知图像合成吸引了越来越多的兴趣，因为它模拟了现实世界的 3D 本质。然而，在多对象场景中对生成的图像执行真实的对象级编辑仍然是一个挑战。最近，一种名为 BlobGAN 的 2D GAN 在真实室内场景数据集上展示了强大的多对象编辑功能。在这项工作中，我们提出了 BlobGAN-3D，它是原始 2D BlobGAN 的 3D 感知改进。我们通过将 2D 斑点扩展为 3D 斑点，实现显式相机姿态控制，同时保持场景中各个对象的解开。我们保留了 BlobGAN 的对象级编辑功能，此外还允许灵活控制场景中对象的 3D 位置。我们在现实世界的室内数据集上测试了我们的方法，结果表明，与 2D BlobGAN 和其他 3D 感知 GAN 基线相比，我们的方法可以实现可比的图像质量，同时能够在具有挑战性的多对象现实场景中实现相机姿势控制和对象级编辑。 本文提出BlobGAN-3D，一种用于室内场景的3D感知生成模型，支持相机姿态控制和对象级编辑。 Qian Wang,Yiqun Wang,Michael Birsak,Peter Wonka cs.CV

authors_text: Mohammad Modiri
title: Control of synaptic plasticity via the fusion of reinforcement learning and unsupervised learning in neural networks
title_zh: 通过神经网络中强化学习和无监督学习的融合来控制突触可塑性
comment: Draft version. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.07273
comments: Draft version. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.07273
abstract: The brain can learn to execute a wide variety of tasks quickly and efficiently. Nevertheless, most of the mechanisms that enable us to learn are unclear or incredibly complicated. Recently, considerable efforts have been made in neuroscience and artificial intelligence to understand and model the structure and mechanisms behind the amazing learning capability of the brain. However, in the current understanding of cognitive neuroscience, it is widely accepted that synaptic plasticity plays an essential role in our amazing learning capability. This mechanism is also known as the Credit Assignment Problem (CAP) and is a fundamental challenge in neuroscience and Artificial Intelligence (AI). The observations of neuroscientists clearly confirm the role of two important mechanisms including the error feedback system and unsupervised learning in synaptic plasticity. With this inspiration, a new learning rule is proposed via the fusion of reinforcement learning (RL) and unsupervised learning (UL). In the proposed computational model, the nonlinear optimal control theory is used to resemble the error feedback loop systems and project the output error to neurons membrane potential (neurons state), and an unsupervised learning rule based on neurons membrane potential or neurons activity are utilized to simulate synaptic plasticity dynamics to ensure that the output error is minimized.
summary: The brain can learn to execute a wide variety of tasks quickly and efficiently. Nevertheless, most of the mechanisms that enable us to learn are unclear or incredibly complicated. Recently, considerable efforts have been made in neuroscience and artificial intelligence to understand and model the structure and mechanisms behind the amazing learning capability of the brain. However, in the current understanding of cognitive neuroscience, it is widely accepted that synaptic plasticity plays an essential role in our amazing learning capability. This mechanism is also known as the Credit Assignment Problem (CAP) and is a fundamental challenge in neuroscience and Artificial Intelligence (AI). The observations of neuroscientists clearly confirm the role of two important mechanisms including the error feedback system and unsupervised learning in synaptic plasticity. With this inspiration, a new learning rule is proposed via the fusion of reinforcement learning (RL) and unsupervised learning (UL). In the proposed computational model, the nonlinear optimal control theory is used to resemble the error feedback loop systems and project the output error to neurons membrane potential (neurons state), and an unsupervised learning rule based on neurons membrane potential or neurons activity are utilized to simulate synaptic plasticity dynamics to ensure that the output error is minimized.
abstract_zh: 大脑可以学习快速有效地执行各种任务。然而，大多数使我们能够学习的机制并不明确或极其复杂。最近，在神经科学和人工智能领域做出了相当大的努力，以理解和模拟大脑惊人学习能力背后的结构和机制。然而，在目前对认知神经科学的理解中，人们普遍认为突触可塑性在我们惊人的学习能力中起着至关重要的作用。这种机制也称为信用分配问题（CAP），是神经科学和人工智能（AI）领域的一项基本挑战。神经科学家的观察清楚地证实了误差反馈系统和无监督学习这两个重要机制在突触可塑性中的作用。受此启发，通过强化学习（RL）和无监督学习（UL）的融合提出了一种新的学习规则。在所提出的计算模型中，使用非线性最优控制理论来模拟误差反馈环系统，并将输出误差投影到神经元膜电位（神经元状态），并利用基于神经元膜电位或神经元活动的无监督学习规则来模拟突触可塑性动力学，以确保输出误差最小化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过融合强化学习与无监督学习来控制神经网络中突触可塑性的新方法。
AI.motivation: 突触可塑性是大脑高效学习的关键机制，但其背后的信用分配问题（CAP）尚未被完全解决，需结合误差反馈与无监督学习机制进行建模。
AI.method: 采用非线性最优控制理论模拟误差反馈系统，将输出误差映射到神经元膜电位，并基于膜电位或神经元活动设计无监督学习规则以驱动突触可塑性动态。
AI.result: 该模型成功实现了输出误差的最小化，验证了强化学习与无监督学习融合在解决CAP中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合强化学习与无监督学习的框架为理解突触可塑性机制及解决AI中的信用分配问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hadar Hezi,Daniel Shats,Daniel Gurevich,Yosef E. Maruvka,Moti Freiman
title: Exploring the Interplay Between Colorectal Cancer Subtypes Genomic Variants and Cellular Morphology: A Deep-Learning Approach
title_zh: 探索结直肠癌亚型基因组变异与细胞形态之间的相互作用：深度学习方法
abstract: Molecular subtypes of colorectal cancer (CRC) significantly influence treatment decisions. While convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have recently been introduced for automated CRC subtype identification using H&E stained histopathological images, the correlation between CRC subtype genomic variants and their corresponding cellular morphology expressed by their imaging phenotypes is yet to be fully explored. The goal of this study was to determine such correlations by incorporating genomic variants in CNN models for CRC subtype classification from H&E images. We utilized the publicly available TCGA-CRC-DX dataset, which comprises whole slide images from 360 CRC-diagnosed patients (260 for training and 100 for testing). This dataset also provides information on CRC subtype classifications and genomic variations. We trained CNN models for CRC subtype classification that account for potential correlation between genomic variations within CRC subtypes and their corresponding cellular morphology patterns. We assessed the interplay between CRC subtypes' genomic variations and cellular morphology patterns by evaluating the CRC subtype classification accuracy of the different models in a stratified 5-fold cross-validation experimental setup using the area under the ROC curve (AUROC) and average precision (AP) as the performance metrics. Combining the CNN models account for variations in CIMP and SNP further improved classification accuracy (AUROC: 0.847$\pm$0.01 vs. 0.787$\pm$0.03, p$=$0.01, AP: 0.68$\pm$0.02 vs. 0.64$\pm$0.05).
summary: Molecular subtypes of colorectal cancer (CRC) significantly influence treatment decisions. While convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have recently been introduced for automated CRC subtype identification using H&E stained histopathological images, the correlation between CRC subtype genomic variants and their corresponding cellular morphology expressed by their imaging phenotypes is yet to be fully explored. The goal of this study was to determine such correlations by incorporating genomic variants in CNN models for CRC subtype classification from H&E images. We utilized the publicly available TCGA-CRC-DX dataset, which comprises whole slide images from 360 CRC-diagnosed patients (260 for training and 100 for testing). This dataset also provides information on CRC subtype classifications and genomic variations. We trained CNN models for CRC subtype classification that account for potential correlation between genomic variations within CRC subtypes and their corresponding cellular morphology patterns. We assessed the interplay between CRC subtypes' genomic variations and cellular morphology patterns by evaluating the CRC subtype classification accuracy of the different models in a stratified 5-fold cross-validation experimental setup using the area under the ROC curve (AUROC) and average precision (AP) as the performance metrics. Combining the CNN models account for variations in CIMP and SNP further improved classification accuracy (AUROC: 0.847$\pm$0.01 vs. 0.787$\pm$0.03, p$=$0.01, AP: 0.68$\pm$0.02 vs. 0.64$\pm$0.05).
abstract_zh: 结直肠癌 (CRC) 的分子亚型显着影响治疗决策。虽然卷积神经网络 (CNN) 最近被引入使用 H&E 染色的组织病理学图像来自动识别 CRC 亚型，但 CRC 亚型基因组变异与其成像表型所表达的相应细胞形态之间的相关性尚未得到充分探索。本研究的目标是通过将基因组变异纳入 CNN 模型中，从 H&E 图像中对 CRC 亚型进行分类，从而确定这种相关性。我们利用公开的 TCGA-CRC-DX 数据集，其中包含来自 360 名 CRC 诊断患者的完整幻灯片图像（260 名用于训练，100 名用于测试）。该数据集还提供有关 CRC 亚型分类和基因组变异的信息。我们训练了用于 CRC 亚型分类的 CNN 模型，该模型解释了 CRC 亚型内的基因组变异与其相应的细胞形态模式之间的潜在相关性。我们通过使用 ROC 曲线下面积 (AUROC) 和平均精度 (AP) 作为性能指标，在分层 5 倍交叉验证实验设置中评估不同模型的 CRC 亚型分类准确性，从而评估 CRC 亚型基因组变异和细胞形态模式之间的相互作用。结合 CNN 模型来解释 CIMP 和 SNP 的变化，进一步提高了分类准确性（AUROC：0.847$\pm$0.01 vs. 0.787$\pm$0.03，p$=$0.01，AP：0.68$\pm$0.02 vs. 0.64$\pm$0.05）。

AI.tldr: 该研究通过结合基因组变异与卷积神经网络（CNN），探索结直肠癌（CRC）亚型的基因组变异与其细胞形态学特征之间的关联。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN已被用于CRC亚型分类，但基因组变异与对应形态学表型的关联尚未明确，需通过整合基因组数据提升分类准确性。
AI.method: 利用TCGA-CRC-DX数据集，训练包含CIMP和SNP等基因组变异信息的CNN模型，并通过5折交叉验证评估其分类性能（AUROC和AP指标）。
AI.result: 结合基因组变异的CNN模型显著提升分类准确率（AUROC: 0.847±0.01，AP: 0.68±0.02），优于未整合模型（AUROC: 0.787±0.03，AP: 0.64±0.05）。
AI.conclusion: 基因组变异与形态学特征的整合可增强CRC亚型分类性能，为精准诊疗提供潜在依据。

search_text: Exploring the Interplay Between Colorectal Cancer Subtypes Genomic Variants and Cellular Morphology: A Deep-Learning Approach 探索结直肠癌亚型基因组变异与细胞形态之间的相互作用：深度学习方法 Molecular subtypes of colorectal cancer (CRC) significantly influence treatment decisions. While convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have recently been introduced for automated CRC subtype identification using H&E stained histopathological images, the correlation between CRC subtype genomic variants and their corresponding cellular morphology expressed by their imaging phenotypes is yet to be fully explored. The goal of this study was to determine such correlations by incorporating genomic variants in CNN models for CRC subtype classification from H&E images. We utilized the publicly available TCGA-CRC-DX dataset, which comprises whole slide images from 360 CRC-diagnosed patients (260 for training and 100 for testing). This dataset also provides information on CRC subtype classifications and genomic variations. We trained CNN models for CRC subtype classification that account for potential correlation between genomic variations within CRC subtypes and their corresponding cellular morphology patterns. We assessed the interplay between CRC subtypes' genomic variations and cellular morphology patterns by evaluating the CRC subtype classification accuracy of the different models in a stratified 5-fold cross-validation experimental setup using the area under the ROC curve (AUROC) and average precision (AP) as the performance metrics. Combining the CNN models account for variations in CIMP and SNP further improved classification accuracy (AUROC: 0.847$\pm$0.01 vs. 0.787$\pm$0.03, p$=$0.01, AP: 0.68$\pm$0.02 vs. 0.64$\pm$0.05). 结直肠癌 (CRC) 的分子亚型显着影响治疗决策。虽然卷积神经网络 (CNN) 最近被引入使用 H&E 染色的组织病理学图像来自动识别 CRC 亚型，但 CRC 亚型基因组变异与其成像表型所表达的相应细胞形态之间的相关性尚未得到充分探索。本研究的目标是通过将基因组变异纳入 CNN 模型中，从 H&E 图像中对 CRC 亚型进行分类，从而确定这种相关性。我们利用公开的 TCGA-CRC-DX 数据集，其中包含来自 360 名 CRC 诊断患者的完整幻灯片图像（260 名用于训练，100 名用于测试）。该数据集还提供有关 CRC 亚型分类和基因组变异的信息。我们训练了用于 CRC 亚型分类的 CNN 模型，该模型解释了 CRC 亚型内的基因组变异与其相应的细胞形态模式之间的潜在相关性。我们通过使用 ROC 曲线下面积 (AUROC) 和平均精度 (AP) 作为性能指标，在分层 5 倍交叉验证实验设置中评估不同模型的 CRC 亚型分类准确性，从而评估 CRC 亚型基因组变异和细胞形态模式之间的相互作用。结合 CNN 模型来解释 CIMP 和 SNP 的变化，进一步提高了分类准确性（AUROC：0.847$\pm$0.01 vs. 0.787$\pm$0.03，p$=$0.01，AP：0.68$\pm$0.02 vs. 0.64$\pm$0.05）。 该研究通过结合基因组变异与卷积神经网络（CNN），探索结直肠癌（CRC）亚型的基因组变异与其细胞形态学特征之间的关联。 Hadar Hezi,Daniel Shats,Daniel Gurevich,Yosef E. Maruvka,Moti Freiman cs.CV

authors_text: Simian Luo,Xuelin Qian,Yanwei Fu,Yinda Zhang,Ying Tai,Zhenyu Zhang,Chengjie Wang,Xiangyang Xue
title: Learning Versatile 3D Shape Generation with Improved AR Models
title_zh: 通过改进的 AR 模型学习多功能 3D 形状生成
abstract: Auto-Regressive (AR) models have achieved impressive results in 2D image generation by modeling joint distributions in the grid space. While this approach has been extended to the 3D domain for powerful shape generation, it still has two limitations: expensive computations on volumetric grids and ambiguous auto-regressive order along grid dimensions. To overcome these limitations, we propose the Improved Auto-regressive Model (ImAM) for 3D shape generation, which applies discrete representation learning based on a latent vector instead of volumetric grids. Our approach not only reduces computational costs but also preserves essential geometric details by learning the joint distribution in a more tractable order. Moreover, thanks to the simplicity of our model architecture, we can naturally extend it from unconditional to conditional generation by concatenating various conditioning inputs, such as point clouds, categories, images, and texts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ImAM can synthesize diverse and faithful shapes of multiple categories, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Auto-Regressive (AR) models have achieved impressive results in 2D image generation by modeling joint distributions in the grid space. While this approach has been extended to the 3D domain for powerful shape generation, it still has two limitations: expensive computations on volumetric grids and ambiguous auto-regressive order along grid dimensions. To overcome these limitations, we propose the Improved Auto-regressive Model (ImAM) for 3D shape generation, which applies discrete representation learning based on a latent vector instead of volumetric grids. Our approach not only reduces computational costs but also preserves essential geometric details by learning the joint distribution in a more tractable order. Moreover, thanks to the simplicity of our model architecture, we can naturally extend it from unconditional to conditional generation by concatenating various conditioning inputs, such as point clouds, categories, images, and texts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ImAM can synthesize diverse and faithful shapes of multiple categories, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 自回归 (AR) 模型通过对网格空间中的联合分布进行建模，在 2D 图像生成方面取得了令人印象深刻的结果。虽然这种方法已扩展到 3D 域以生成强大的形状，但它仍然有两个局限性：体积网格的昂贵计算以及沿网格维度的模糊自回归顺序。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了用于 3D 形状生成的改进自回归模型 (ImAM)，该模型应用基于潜在向量而不是体积网格的离散表示学习。我们的方法不仅降低了计算成本，而且通过以更容易处理的顺序学习联合分布来保留基本的几何细节。此外，由于模型架构的简单性，我们可以通过连接各种条件输入（例如点云、类别、图像和文本）自然地将其从无条件生成扩展到有条件生成。大量实验表明，ImAM 可以合成多个类别的多样化且忠实的形状，实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的自回归模型（ImAM），用于解决3D形状生成中的计算成本高和自回归顺序模糊的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统自回归模型在3D形状生成中面临体积网格计算昂贵和网格维度顺序模糊的局限性，需更高效且灵活的生成方法。
AI.method: 通过引入基于潜在向量的离散表示学习，替代体积网格，降低计算成本并保留几何细节；模型结构简单，可扩展为条件生成，支持点云、图像、文本等多模态输入。
AI.result: 实验表明，ImAM能生成多样且符合类别特征的高质量3D形状，在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: ImAM有效解决了3D形状生成的计算与顺序问题，为多条件生成提供了高效且通用的解决方案，推动了该领域的发展。

authors_text: Peter B Marschik,Amanda KL Kwong,Nelson Silva,Joy E Olsen,Martin Schulte-Ruether,Sven Bolte,Maria Ortqvist,Abbey Eeles,Luise Poustka,Christa Einspieler,Karin Nielsen-Saines,Dajie Zhang,Alicia J Spittle
title: Mobile solutions for clinical surveillance and evaluation in infancy -- General Movement Apps
title_zh: 用于婴儿期临床监测和评估的移动解决方案——通用运动应用程序
abstract: The Prechtl General Movements Assessment (GMA) has become a clinician and researcher tool-box for evaluating neurodevelopment in early infancy. Given it involves observation of infant movements from video recordings, utilising smartphone applications to obtain these recordings seems like the natural progression for the field. In this review, we look back on the development of apps for acquiring general movement videos, describe the application and research studies of available apps, and discuss future directions of mobile solutions and their usability in research and clinical practice. We emphasise the importance of understanding the background that has led to these developments while introducing new technologies, including the barriers and facilitators along the pathway. The GMApp and Baby Moves App were the first ones developed to increase accessibility of the GMA, with two further apps, NeuroMotion and InMotion, designed since. The Baby Moves app has been applied most frequently. For the mobile future of GMA, we advocate collaboration to boost the field's progression and to reduce research waste. We propose future collaborative solutions including standardisation of cross-sites data collection, adaption to local context and privacy laws, employment of user feedback, and sustainable IT structures enabling continuous software updating.
summary: The Prechtl General Movements Assessment (GMA) has become a clinician and researcher tool-box for evaluating neurodevelopment in early infancy. Given it involves observation of infant movements from video recordings, utilising smartphone applications to obtain these recordings seems like the natural progression for the field. In this review, we look back on the development of apps for acquiring general movement videos, describe the application and research studies of available apps, and discuss future directions of mobile solutions and their usability in research and clinical practice. We emphasise the importance of understanding the background that has led to these developments while introducing new technologies, including the barriers and facilitators along the pathway. The GMApp and Baby Moves App were the first ones developed to increase accessibility of the GMA, with two further apps, NeuroMotion and InMotion, designed since. The Baby Moves app has been applied most frequently. For the mobile future of GMA, we advocate collaboration to boost the field's progression and to reduce research waste. We propose future collaborative solutions including standardisation of cross-sites data collection, adaption to local context and privacy laws, employment of user feedback, and sustainable IT structures enabling continuous software updating.
abstract_zh: Prechtl 一般运动评估 (GMA) 已成为临床医生和研究人员评估婴儿早期神经发育的工具箱。鉴于它涉及从视频记录中观察婴儿的动作，利用智能手机应用程序来获取这些记录似乎是该领域的自然发展。在这篇综述中，我们回顾了用于获取一般运动视频的应用程序的开发，描述了可用应用程序的应用和研究，并讨论了移动解决方案的未来方向及其在研究和临床实践中的可用性。我们强调在引入新技术时了解导致这些发展的背景的重要性，包括沿途的障碍和促进因素。 GMApp 和 Baby Moves 应用程序是第一批为提高 GMA 的可访问性而开发的应用程序，此后又设计了另外两个应用程序：NeuroMotion 和 InMotion。 Baby Moves 应用程序的使用频率最高。对于 GMA 的移动未来，我们主张通过合作来促进该领域的进步并减少研究浪费。我们提出未来的协作解决方案，包括跨站点数据收集的标准化、适应当地环境和隐私法、利用用户反馈以及支持持续软件更新的可持续 IT 结构。

AI.tldr: 综述移动应用在婴儿临床监测中的发展，评估现有应用并探讨未来方向及合作需求。
AI.motivation: 传统GM评估依赖视频记录，移动应用可提升可及性，但需解决技术障碍与标准化问题。
AI.method: 通过文献回顾与案例分析，评估现有应用，并讨论技术、应用及推广中的障碍与促进因素。
AI.result: 已开发多款应用，其中Baby Moves应用最广；未来需合作推动标准化、适应本地法规，并建立可持续IT框架。
AI.conclusion: 主张跨领域合作，推动GM评估移动化的标准化与可持续发展，以减少研究浪费并提升临床应用。

authors_text: Eveline Drijver,Rodrigo Pérez-Dattari,Jens Kober,Cosimo Della Santina,Zlatan Ajanović
title: Robotic Packaging Optimization with Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过强化学习优化机器人包装
comment: preprint accepted to CASE 2023 conference; 7 pages, 5 figures, 1 table;
comments: preprint accepted to CASE 2023 conference; 7 pages, 5 figures, 1 table;
abstract: Intelligent manufacturing is becoming increasingly important due to the growing demand for maximizing productivity and flexibility while minimizing waste and lead times. This work investigates automated secondary robotic food packaging solutions that transfer food products from the conveyor belt into containers. A major problem in these solutions is varying product supply which can cause drastic productivity drops. Conventional rule-based approaches, used to address this issue, are often inadequate, leading to violation of the industry's requirements. Reinforcement learning, on the other hand, has the potential of solving this problem by learning responsive and predictive policy, based on experience. However, it is challenging to utilize it in highly complex control schemes. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning framework, designed to optimize the conveyor belt speed while minimizing interference with the rest of the control system. When tested on real-world data, the framework exceeds the performance requirements (99.8% packed products) and maintains quality (100% filled boxes). Compared to the existing solution, our proposed framework improves productivity, has smoother control, and reduces computation time.

Reinforcement learning, on the other hand, has the potential of solving this problem by learning responsive and predictive policy, based on experience. However, it is challenging to utilize it in highly complex control schemes. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning framework, designed to optimize the conveyor belt speed while minimizing interference with the rest of the control system. When tested on real-world data, the framework exceeds the performance requirements (99.8% packed products) and maintains quality (100% filled boxes). Compared to the existing solution, our proposed framework improves productivity, has smoother control, and reduces computation time.
abstract_zh: 由于对最大化生产率和灵活性、同时最小化浪费和交货时间的需求不断增长，智能制造变得越来越重要。这项工作研究了自动化二次机器人食品包装解决方案，将食品从传送带转移到容器中。这些解决方案的一个主要问题是产品供应的变化，这可能导致生产率急剧下降。用于解决此问题的传统的基于规则的方法通常是不够的，导致违反行业要求。另一方面，强化学习有可能通过基于经验学习响应性和预测性策略来解决这个问题。然而，在高度复杂的控制方案中使用它具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种强化学习框架，旨在优化传送带速度，同时最大限度地减少对控制系统其余部分的干扰。当对真实数据进行测试时，该框架超出了性能要求（99.8% 包装的产品）并保持了质量（100% 包装盒）。与现有的解决方案相比，我们提出的框架提高了生产力，具有更平滑的控制，并减少了计算时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的框架，用于优化食品包装机器人系统中的传送带速度，以应对产品供应波动带来的生产力下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于规则的方法难以应对食品包装中产品供应变化导致的生产力下降问题，需寻找更智能的解决方案以满足行业需求。
AI.method: 设计了一种强化学习框架，通过学习响应性和预测性策略，在优化传送带速度的同时减少对控制系统其他部分的干扰。
AI.result: 在真实数据测试中，框架实现了99.8%的包装率和100%的箱子填充率，相比现有方案提升了生产力、控制平滑度并减少了计算时间。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了食品包装中的动态优化问题，验证了强化学习在复杂控制场景中的应用潜力。

search_text: Robotic Packaging Optimization with Reinforcement Learning 通过强化学习优化机器人包装 Intelligent manufacturing is becoming increasingly important due to the growing demand for maximizing productivity and flexibility while minimizing waste and lead times. This work investigates automated secondary robotic food packaging solutions that transfer food products from the conveyor belt into containers. A major problem in these solutions is varying product supply which can cause drastic productivity drops. Conventional rule-based approaches, used to address this issue, are often inadequate, leading to violation of the industry's requirements. Reinforcement learning, on the other hand, has the potential of solving this problem by learning responsive and predictive policy, based on experience. However, it is challenging to utilize it in highly complex control schemes. In this paper, we propose a reinforcement learning framework, designed to optimize the conveyor belt speed while minimizing interference with the rest of the control system. When tested on real-world data, the framework exceeds the performance requirements (99.8% packed products) and maintains quality (100% filled boxes). Compared to the existing solution, our proposed framework improves productivity, has smoother control, and reduces computation time. 由于对最大化生产率和灵活性、同时最小化浪费和交货时间的需求不断增长，智能制造变得越来越重要。这项工作研究了自动化二次机器人食品包装解决方案，将食品从传送带转移到容器中。这些解决方案的一个主要问题是产品供应的变化，这可能导致生产率急剧下降。用于解决此问题的传统的基于规则的方法通常是不够的，导致违反行业要求。另一方面，强化学习有可能通过基于经验学习响应性和预测性策略来解决这个问题。然而，在高度复杂的控制方案中使用它具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种强化学习框架，旨在优化传送带速度，同时最大限度地减少对控制系统其余部分的干扰。当对真实数据进行测试时，该框架超出了性能要求（99.8% 包装的产品）并保持了质量（100% 包装盒）。与现有的解决方案相比，我们提出的框架提高了生产力，具有更平滑的控制，并减少了计算时间。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的框架，用于优化食品包装机器人系统中的传送带速度，以应对产品供应波动带来的生产力下降问题。 Eveline Drijver,Rodrigo Pérez-Dattari,Jens Kober,Cosimo Della Santina,Zlatan Ajanović cs.RO,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Luca Butera,Andrea Cini,Alberto Ferrante,Cesare Alippi
title: Object-Centric Relational Representations for Image Generation
title_zh: 用于图像生成的以对象为中心的关系表示
abstract: Conditioning image generation on specific features of the desired output is a key ingredient of modern generative models. However, existing approaches lack a general and unified way of representing structural and semantic conditioning at diverse granularity levels. This paper explores a novel method to condition image generation, based on object-centric relational representations. In particular, we propose a methodology to condition the generation of objects in an image on the attributed graph representing their structure and the associated semantic information. We show that such architectural biases entail properties that facilitate the manipulation and conditioning of the generative process and allow for regularizing the training procedure. The proposed conditioning framework is implemented by means of a neural network that learns to generate a 2D, multi-channel, layout mask of the objects, which can be used as a soft inductive bias in the downstream generative task. To do so, we leverage both 2D and graph convolutional operators. We also propose a novel benchmark for image generation consisting of a synthetic dataset of images paired with their relational representation. Empirical results show that the proposed approach compares favorably against relevant baselines.
summary: Conditioning image generation on specific features of the desired output is a key ingredient of modern generative models. However, existing approaches lack a general and unified way of representing structural and semantic conditioning at diverse granularity levels. This paper explores a novel method to condition image generation, based on object-centric relational representations. In particular, we propose a methodology to condition the generation of objects in an image on the attributed graph representing their structure and the associated semantic information. We show that such architectural biases entail properties that facilitate the manipulation and conditioning of the generative process and allow for regularizing the training procedure. The proposed conditioning framework is implemented by means of a neural network that learns to generate a 2D, multi-channel, layout mask of the objects, which can be used as a soft inductive bias in the downstream generative task. To do so, we leverage both 2D and graph convolutional operators. We also propose a novel benchmark for image generation consisting of a synthetic dataset of images paired with their relational representation. Empirical results show that the proposed approach compares favorably against relevant baselines.
abstract_zh: 根据所需输出的特定特征调节图像生成是现代生成模型的关键要素。然而，现有方法缺乏一种通用且统一的方式来表示不同粒度级别的结构和语义条件。本文探索了一种基于以对象为中心的关系表示来条件图像生成的新方法。特别是，我们提出了一种方法来在表示其结构和相关语义信息的属性图上调节图像中对象的生成。我们表明，这种架构偏差带来了促进生成过程的操纵和调节并允许规范训练程序的属性。所提出的调节框架是通过神经网络来实现的，该神经网络学习生成对象的 2D、多通道布局掩模，该掩模可以用作下游生成任务中的软归纳偏差。为此，我们利用 2D 和图卷积运算符。我们还提出了一种新颖的图像生成基准，由与其关系表示配对的图像合成数据集组成。实证结果表明，所提出的方法与相关基线相比具有优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对象中心关系表示的图像生成条件方法，通过属性图和布局掩码提升生成控制能力。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成模型缺乏统一的结构和语义条件表示方式，难以处理多粒度控制需求。
AI.method: 构建属性图表示对象结构与语义，利用神经网络生成2D多通道布局掩码，结合2D与图卷积操作，并创建新基准数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在生成质量与控制能力上优于相关基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 对象中心关系表示为图像生成提供了结构化控制框架，未来可拓展至更复杂场景。

authors_text: Yongqi An,Xu Zhao,Tao Yu,Haiyun Guo,Chaoyang Zhao,Ming Tang,Jinqiao Wang
title: ZBS: Zero-shot Background Subtraction via Instance-level Background Modeling and Foreground Selection
title_zh: ZBS：通过实例级背景建模和前景选择进行零样本背景减除
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/ZBS
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/ZBS
abstract: Background subtraction (BGS) aims to extract all moving objects in the video frames to obtain binary foreground segmentation masks. Deep learning has been widely used in this field. Compared with supervised-based BGS methods, unsupervised methods have better generalization. However, previous unsupervised deep learning BGS algorithms perform poorly in sophisticated scenarios such as shadows or night lights, and they cannot detect objects outside the pre-defined categories. In this work, we propose an unsupervised BGS algorithm based on zero-shot object detection called Zero-shot Background Subtraction (ZBS). The proposed method fully utilizes the advantages of zero-shot object detection to build the open-vocabulary instance-level background model. Based on it, the foreground can be effectively extracted by comparing the detection results of new frames with the background model. ZBS performs well for sophisticated scenarios, and it has rich and extensible categories. Furthermore, our method can easily generalize to other tasks, such as abandoned object detection in unseen environments. We experimentally show that ZBS surpasses state-of-the-art unsupervised BGS methods by 4.70% F-Measure on the CDnet 2014 dataset. The code is released at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/ZBS.
summary: Background subtraction (BGS) aims to extract all moving objects in the video frames to obtain binary foreground segmentation masks. Deep learning has been widely used in this field. Compared with supervised-based BGS methods, unsupervised methods have better generalization. However, previous unsupervised deep learning BGS algorithms perform poorly in sophisticated scenarios such as shadows or night lights, and they cannot detect objects outside the pre-defined categories. In this work, we propose an unsupervised BGS algorithm based on zero-shot object detection called Zero-shot Background Subtraction (ZBS). The proposed method fully utilizes the advantages of zero-shot object detection to build the open-vocabulary instance-level background model. Based on it, the foreground can be effectively extracted by comparing the detection results of new frames with the background model. ZBS performs well for sophisticated scenarios, and it has rich and extensible categories. Furthermore, our method can easily generalize to other tasks, such as abandoned object detection in unseen environments. We experimentally show that ZBS surpasses state-of-the-art unsupervised BGS methods by 4.70% F-Measure on the CDnet 2014 dataset. The code is released at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/ZBS.
abstract_zh: 背景减除（BGS）旨在提取视频帧中的所有运动对象以获得二进制前景分割掩模。深度学习在这一领域得到了广泛的应用。与基于监督的 BGS 方法相比，无监督方法具有更好的泛化能力。然而，之前的无监督深度学习 BGS 算法在阴影或夜灯等复杂场景中表现不佳，并且无法检测预定义类别之外的物体。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于零样本目标检测的无监督 BGS 算法，称为零样本背景扣除（ZBS）。该方法充分利用零样本目标检测的优点来构建开放词汇实例级背景模型。在此基础上，通过将新帧的检测结果与背景模型进行比较，可以有效地提取前景。 ZBS对于复杂场景表现良好，类别丰富且可扩展。此外，我们的方法可以轻松推广到其他任务，例如在看不见的环境中检测废弃的物体。我们通过实验表明，ZBS 在 CDnet 2014 数据集上的 F-Measure 超过了最先进的无监督 BGS 方法 4.70%。代码发布于https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/ZBS。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于零样本目标检测的无监督背景减除算法ZBS，用于在复杂场景下有效提取视频前景。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督背景减除方法在阴影、夜景等复杂场景下表现不佳，且无法检测预定义类别外的物体，需解决开放词汇场景下的前景提取问题。
AI.method: 通过零样本目标检测构建开放词汇实例级背景模型，利用新帧检测结果与背景模型对比实现前景提取。
AI.result: 在CDnet 2014数据集上，ZBS方法较现有最佳无监督方法提升4.70% F-Measure，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ZBS在复杂场景下表现优异，具有丰富的可扩展类别，并可泛化至其他任务如未见过环境中的遗弃物检测。

ai_content.result: 在CDnet 2014数据集上，ZBS方法较现有最佳无监督方法提升4.70% F-Measure，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: ZBS在复杂场景下表现优异，具有丰富的可扩展类别，并可泛化至其他任务如未见过环境中的遗弃物检测。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于零样本目标检测的无监督背景减除算法ZBS，用于在复杂场景下有效提取视频前景。
motivation: 现有无监督背景减除方法在阴影、夜景等复杂场景下表现不佳，且无法检测预定义类别外的物体，需解决开放词汇场景下的前景提取问题。
method: 通过零样本目标检测构建开放词汇实例级背景模型，利用新帧检测结果与背景模型对比实现前景提取。
result: 在CDnet 2014数据集上，ZBS方法较现有最佳无监督方法提升4.70% F-Measure，代码已开源。
conclusion: ZBS在复杂场景下表现优异，具有丰富的可扩展类别，并可泛化至其他任务如未见过环境中的遗弃物检测。
search_text: ZBS: Zero-shot Background Subtraction via Instance-level Background Modeling and Foreground Selection ZBS：通过实例级背景建模和前景选择进行零样本背景减除 Background subtraction (BGS) aims to extract all moving objects in the video frames to obtain binary foreground segmentation masks. Deep learning has been widely used in this field. Compared with supervised-based BGS methods, unsupervised methods have better generalization. However, previous unsupervised deep learning BGS algorithms perform poorly in sophisticated scenarios such as shadows or night lights, and they cannot detect objects outside the pre-defined categories. In this work, we propose an unsupervised BGS algorithm based on zero-shot object detection called Zero-shot Background Subtraction (ZBS). The proposed method fully utilizes the advantages of zero-shot object detection to build the open-vocabulary instance-level background model. Based on it, the foreground can be effectively extracted by comparing the detection results of new frames with the background model. ZBS performs well for sophisticated scenarios, and it has rich and extensible categories. Furthermore, our method can easily generalize to other tasks, such as abandoned object detection in unseen environments. We experimentally show that ZBS surpasses state-of-the-art unsupervised BGS methods by 4.70% F-Measure on the CDnet 2014 dataset. The code is released at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/ZBS. 背景减除（BGS）旨在提取视频帧中的所有运动对象以获得二进制前景分割掩模。深度学习在这一领域得到了广泛的应用。与基于监督的 BGS 方法相比，无监督方法具有更好的泛化能力。然而，之前的无监督深度学习 BGS 算法在阴影或夜灯等复杂场景中表现不佳，并且无法检测预定义类别之外的物体。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于零样本目标检测的无监督 BGS 算法，称为零样本背景扣除（ZBS）。该方法充分利用零样本目标检测的优点来构建开放词汇实例级背景模型。在此基础上，通过将新帧的检测结果与背景模型进行比较，可以有效地提取前景。 ZBS对于复杂场景表现良好，类别丰富且可扩展。此外，我们的方法可以轻松推广到其他任务，例如在看不见的环境中检测废弃的物体。我们通过实验表明，ZBS 在 CDnet 2014 数据集上的 F-Measure 超过了最先进的无监督 BGS 方法 4.70%。代码发布于https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/ZBS。 本文提出了一种基于零样本目标检测的无监督背景减除算法ZBS，用于在复杂场景下有效提取视频前景。 Yongqi An,Xu Zhao,Tao Yu,Haiyun Guo,Chaoyang Zhao,Ming Tang,Jinqiao Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Hanlin Wang,Yilu Wu,Sheng Guo,Limin Wang
title: PDPP: Projected Diffusion for Procedure Planning in Instructional Videos
title_zh: PDPP：教学视频中程序规划的预计扩散
comment: Accepted as a highlight paper at CVPR 2023. Extension accepted by TPAMI. Code and trained models are available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/PDPP
comments: Accepted as a highlight paper at CVPR 2023. Extension accepted by TPAMI. Code and trained models are available at https://github.com/MCG-NJU/PDPP
abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of procedure planning in instructional videos, which aims to make a plan (i.e. a sequence of actions) given the current visual observation and the desired goal. Previous works cast this as a sequence modeling problem and leverage either intermediate visual observations or language instructions as supervision to make autoregressive planning, resulting in complex learning schemes and expensive annotation costs. To avoid intermediate supervision annotation and error accumulation caused by planning autoregressively, we propose a diffusion-based framework, coined as PDPP, to directly model the whole action sequence distribution with task label as supervision instead. Our core idea is to treat procedure planning as a distribution fitting problem under the given observations, thus transform the planning problem to a sampling process from this distribution during inference. The diffusion-based modeling approach also effectively addresses the uncertainty issue in procedure planning. Based on PDPP, we further apply joint training to our framework to generate plans with varying horizon lengths using a single model and reduce the number of training parameters required. We instantiate our PDPP with three popular diffusion models and investigate a series of condition-introducing methods in our framework, including condition embeddings, MoEs, two-stage prediction and Classifier-Free Guidance strategy. Finally, we apply our PDPP to the Visual Planners for human Assistance problem which requires the goal specified in natural language rather than visual observation. We conduct experiments on challenging datasets of different scales and our PDPP model achieves the state-of-the-art performance on multiple metrics, even compared with those strongly-supervised counterparts. These results further demonstrates the effectiveness and generalization ability of our model.
summary: In this paper, we study the problem of procedure planning in instructional videos, which aims to make a plan (i.e. a sequence of actions) given the current visual observation and the desired goal. Previous works cast this as a sequence modeling problem and leverage either intermediate visual observations or language instructions as supervision to make autoregressive planning, resulting in complex learning schemes and expensive annotation costs. To avoid intermediate supervision annotation and error accumulation caused by planning autoregressively, we propose a diffusion-based framework, coined as PDPP, to directly model the whole action sequence distribution with task label as supervision instead. Our core idea is to treat procedure planning as a distribution fitting problem under the given observations, thus transform the planning problem to a sampling process from this distribution during inference. The diffusion-based modeling approach also effectively addresses the uncertainty issue in procedure planning. Based on PDPP, we further apply joint training to our framework to generate plans with varying horizon lengths using a single model and reduce the number of training parameters required. We instantiate our PDPP with three popular diffusion models and investigate a series of condition-introducing methods in our framework, including condition embeddings, MoEs, two-stage prediction and Classifier-Free Guidance strategy. Finally, we apply our PDPP to the Visual Planners for human Assistance problem which requires the goal specified in natural language rather than visual observation. We conduct experiments on challenging datasets of different scales and our PDPP model achieves the state-of-the-art performance on multiple metrics, even compared with those strongly-supervised counterparts. These results further demonstrates the effectiveness and generalization ability of our model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了教学视频中的程序规划问题，其目的是根据当前的视觉观察和期望的目标制定计划（即一系列动作）。以前的工作将其视为序列建模问题，并利用中间视觉观察或语言指令作为监督来进行自回归规划，从而导致复杂的学习方案和昂贵的注释成本。为了避免自回归规划引起的中间监督注释和误差积累，我们提出了一种基于扩散的框架，称为 PDPP，直接对整个动作序列分布进行建模，以任务标签作为监督。我们的核心思想是将程序规划视为给定观测值下的分布拟合问题，从而在推理过程中将规划问题转化为从此分布进行采样的过程。基于扩散的建模方法还有效地解决了手术规划中的不确定性问题。基于 PDPP，我们进一步将联合训练应用于我们的框架，以使用单个模型生成不同水平长度的计划，并减少所需的训练参数数量。我们用三种流行的扩散模型实例化我们的 PDPP，并在我们的框架中研究一系列条件引入方法，包括条件嵌入、MoE、两阶段预测和无分类器指导策略。最后，我们将 PDPP 应用于人类辅助问题的视觉规划器，该问题需要以自然语言而不是视觉观察来指定目标。我们对不同规模的具有挑战性的数据集进行了实验，我们的 PDPP 模型在多个指标上实现了最先进的性能，甚至与那些强监督的模型相比也是如此。这些结果进一步证明了我们模型的有效性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PDPP框架，通过扩散模型直接建模动作序列分布，解决教学视频中的过程规划问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖中间监督或语言指令进行自回归规划，导致复杂的学习方案和高昂的标注成本，且存在误差累积问题。
AI.method: 将过程规划视为分布拟合问题，利用扩散模型直接建模整体动作序列分布，结合任务标签监督，并引入条件嵌入、MoE、两阶段预测等技术，支持不同长度的计划生成。
AI.result: 在多个规模数据集上达到最先进性能，优于强监督方法，验证了模型的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: PDPP通过扩散建模有效解决过程规划中的不确定性问题，减少对中间监督的依赖，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Ming Qian,Jincheng Xiong,Gui-Song Xia,Nan Xue
title: Sat2Density: Faithful Density Learning from Satellite-Ground Image Pairs
title_zh: Sat2Density：从卫星地面图像对进行忠实的密度学习
abstract: This paper aims to develop an accurate 3D geometry representation of satellite images using satellite-ground image pairs. Our focus is on the challenging problem of 3D-aware ground-views synthesis from a satellite image. We draw inspiration from the density field representation used in volumetric neural rendering and propose a new approach, called Sat2Density. Our method utilizes the properties of ground-view panoramas for the sky and non-sky regions to learn faithful density fields of 3D scenes in a geometric perspective. Unlike other methods that require extra depth information during training, our Sat2Density can automatically learn accurate and faithful 3D geometry via density representation without depth supervision. This advancement significantly improves the ground-view panorama synthesis task. Additionally, our study provides a new geometric perspective to understand the relationship between satellite and ground-view images in 3D space.
summary: This paper aims to develop an accurate 3D geometry representation of satellite images using satellite-ground image pairs. Our focus is on the challenging problem of 3D-aware ground-views synthesis from a satellite image. We draw inspiration from the density field representation used in volumetric neural rendering and propose a new approach, called Sat2Density. Our method utilizes the properties of ground-view panoramas for the sky and non-sky regions to learn faithful density fields of 3D scenes in a geometric perspective. Unlike other methods that require extra depth information during training, our Sat2Density can automatically learn accurate and faithful 3D geometry via density representation without depth supervision. This advancement significantly improves the ground-view panorama synthesis task. Additionally, our study provides a new geometric perspective to understand the relationship between satellite and ground-view images in 3D space.
abstract_zh: 本文旨在使用卫星-地面图像对开发卫星图像的精确 3D 几何表示。我们的重点是从卫星图像合成 3D 感知地面视图这一具有挑战性的问题。我们从体积神经渲染中使用的密度场表示中汲取灵感，并提出了一种称为 Sat2Density 的新方法。我们的方法利用天空和非天空区域的地景全景图的属性来学习几何透视中 3D 场景的忠实密度场。与在训练期间需要额外深度信息的其他方法不同，我们的 Sat2Density 可以通过密度表示自动学习准确且忠实的 3D 几何形状，而无需深度监督。这一进步显着改善了地景全景合成任务。此外，我们的研究提供了一种新的几何视角来理解 3D 空间中卫星图像和地面图像之间的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sat2Density方法，通过卫星-地面图像对学习3D场景密度场，实现无需深度监督的地面视图全景合成。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖深度信息进行3D重建，而获取深度数据成本高且不总是可行，需探索无需深度监督的几何表示方法。
AI.method: 受体积神经渲染启发，利用地面全景图天空/非天空区域特性，通过密度场学习实现几何重建，无需额外深度输入。
AI.result: 显著提升地面视图合成质量，提供新的三维空间视角理解卫星与地面图像关系。
AI.conclusion: Sat2Density通过密度场表示实现无监督深度学习，在3D几何重建任务中展现潜力。

Unlike other methods that require extra depth information during training, our Sat2Density can automatically learn accurate and faithful 3D geometry via density representation without depth supervision. Additionally, our study provides a new geometric perspective to understand the relationship between satellite and ground-view images in 3D space. 本文旨在使用卫星-地面图像对开发卫星图像的精确 3D 几何表示。我们的重点是从卫星图像合成 3D 感知地面视图这一具有挑战性的问题。我们从体积神经渲染中使用的密度场表示中汲取灵感，并提出了一种称为 Sat2Density 的新方法。我们的方法利用天空和非天空区域的地景全景图的属性来学习几何透视中 3D 场景的忠实密度场。与在训练期间需要额外深度信息的其他方法不同，我们的 Sat2Density 可以通过密度表示自动学习准确且忠实的 3D 几何形状，而无需深度监督。这一进步显着改善了地景全景合成任务。此外，我们的研究提供了一种新的几何视角来理解 3D 空间中卫星图像和地面图像之间的关系。 本文提出Sat2Density方法，通过卫星-地面图像对学习3D场景密度场，实现无需深度监督的地面视图全景合成。 Ming Qian,Jincheng Xiong,Gui-Song Xia,Nan Xue cs.CV

authors_text: Tri Dung Duong,Qian Li,Guandong Xu
title: CeFlow: A Robust and Efficient Counterfactual Explanation Framework for Tabular Data using Normalizing Flows
title_zh: CeFlow：使用标准化流的表格数据的稳健且高效的反事实解释框架
abstract: Counterfactual explanation is a form of interpretable machine learning that generates perturbations on a sample to achieve the desired outcome. The generated samples can act as instructions to guide end users on how to observe the desired results by altering samples. Although state-of-the-art counterfactual explanation methods are proposed to use variational autoencoder (VAE) to achieve promising improvements, they suffer from two major limitations: 1) the counterfactuals generation is prohibitively slow, which prevents algorithms from being deployed in interactive environments; 2) the counterfactual explanation algorithms produce unstable results due to the randomness in the sampling procedure of variational autoencoder. In this work, to address the above limitations, we design a robust and efficient counterfactual explanation framework, namely CeFlow, which utilizes normalizing flows for the mixed-type of continuous and categorical features. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our technique compares favorably to state-of-the-art methods. We release our source at https://github.com/tridungduong16/fairCE.git for reproducing the results.
summary: Counterfactual explanation is a form of interpretable machine learning that generates perturbations on a sample to achieve the desired outcome. The generated samples can act as instructions to guide end users on how to observe the desired results by altering samples. Although state-of-the-art counterfactual explanation methods are proposed to use variational autoencoder (VAE) to achieve promising improvements, they suffer from two major limitations: 1) the counterfactuals generation is prohibitively slow, which prevents algorithms from being deployed in interactive environments; 2) the counterfactual explanation algorithms produce unstable results due to the randomness in the sampling procedure of variational autoencoder. In this work, to address the above limitations, we design a robust and efficient counterfactual explanation framework, namely CeFlow, which utilizes normalizing flows for the mixed-type of continuous and categorical features. Numerical experiments demonstrate that our technique compares favorably to state-of-the-art methods. We release our source at https://github.com/tridungduong16/fairCE.git for reproducing the results.
abstract_zh: 反事实解释是可解释机器学习的一种形式，它对样本产生扰动以实现期望的结果。生成的样本可以充当指令，指导最终用户如何通过更改样本来观察所需的结果。尽管提出了最先进的反事实解释方法来使用变分自动编码器（VAE）来实现有希望的改进，但它们存在两个主要限制：1）反事实生成速度极慢，这阻碍了算法在交互式环境中的部署； 2）由于变分自动编码器采样过程的随机性，反事实解释算法产生不稳定的结果。在这项工作中，为了解决上述限制，我们设计了一个强大且高效的反事实解释框架，即 CeFlow，它利用归一化流来处理连续和分类特征的混合类型。数值实验表明，我们的技术优于最先进的方法。我们在 https://github.com/tridungduong16/fairCE.git 发布了源代码以重现结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CeFlow框架，利用归一化流技术生成表格数据的反事实解释，解决现有方法效率低和结果不稳定的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实解释方法依赖变分自编码器（VAE），但存在生成速度慢和结果不稳定两大缺陷，限制了其在交互场景中的应用。
AI.method: 设计基于归一化流的CeFlow框架，有效处理连续与分类混合特征，提升生成效率和结果稳定性。
AI.result: 数值实验表明CeFlow优于现有方法，且开源代码（https://github.com/tridungduong16/fairCE.git）可复现实验结果。
AI.conclusion: CeFlow通过归一化流技术显著提升了反事实解释的效率与稳定性，为实际应用提供了可靠方案。

authors_text: Tianli Zhang,Mengqi Xue,Jiangtao Zhang,Haofei Zhang,Yu Wang,Lechao Cheng,Jie Song,Mingli Song
title: Generalization Matters: Loss Minima Flattening via Parameter Hybridization for Efficient Online Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 泛化很重要：通过参数混合实现损失最小化，以实现高效的在线知识蒸馏
abstract: Most existing online knowledge distillation(OKD) techniques typically require sophisticated modules to produce diverse knowledge for improving students' generalization ability. In this paper, we strive to fully utilize multi-model settings instead of well-designed modules to achieve a distillation effect with excellent generalization performance. Generally, model generalization can be reflected in the flatness of the loss landscape. Since averaging parameters of multiple models can find flatter minima, we are inspired to extend the process to the sampled convex combinations of multi-student models in OKD. Specifically, by linearly weighting students' parameters in each training batch, we construct a Hybrid-Weight Model(HWM) to represent the parameters surrounding involved students. The supervision loss of HWM can estimate the landscape's curvature of the whole region around students to measure the generalization explicitly. Hence we integrate HWM's loss into students' training and propose a novel OKD framework via parameter hybridization(OKDPH) to promote flatter minima and obtain robust solutions. Considering the redundancy of parameters could lead to the collapse of HWM, we further introduce a fusion operation to keep the high similarity of students. Compared to the state-of-the-art(SOTA) OKD methods and SOTA methods of seeking flat minima, our OKDPH achieves higher performance with fewer parameters, benefiting OKD with lightweight and robust characteristics. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tianlizhang/OKDPH.
summary: Most existing online knowledge distillation(OKD) techniques typically require sophisticated modules to produce diverse knowledge for improving students' generalization ability. In this paper, we strive to fully utilize multi-model settings instead of well-designed modules to achieve a distillation effect with excellent generalization performance. Generally, model generalization can be reflected in the flatness of the loss landscape. Since averaging parameters of multiple models can find flatter minima, we are inspired to extend the process to the sampled convex combinations of multi-student models in OKD. Specifically, by linearly weighting students' parameters in each training batch, we construct a Hybrid-Weight Model(HWM) to represent the parameters surrounding involved students. The supervision loss of HWM can estimate the landscape's curvature of the whole region around students to measure the generalization explicitly. Hence we integrate HWM's loss into students' training and propose a novel OKD framework via parameter hybridization(OKDPH) to promote flatter minima and obtain robust solutions. Considering the redundancy of parameters could lead to the collapse of HWM, we further introduce a fusion operation to keep the high similarity of students. Compared to the state-of-the-art(SOTA) OKD methods and SOTA methods of seeking flat minima, our OKDPH achieves higher performance with fewer parameters, benefiting OKD with lightweight and robust characteristics. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/tianlizhang/OKDPH.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的在线知识蒸馏（OKD）技术通常需要复杂的模块来产生多样化的知识，以提高学生的泛化能力。在本文中，我们力求充分利用多模型设置而不是精心设计的模块来实现具有优异泛化性能的蒸馏效果。一般来说，模型的泛化能力可以体现在损失景观的平坦度上。由于对多个模型的参数进行平均可以找到更平坦的最小值，因此我们受到启发，将该过程扩展到 OKD 中多学生模型的采样凸组合。具体来说，通过对每个训练批次中学生的参数进行线性加权，我们构建了一个混合权重模型（HWM）来表示涉及的学生周围的参数。 HWM 的监督损失可以估计学生周围整个区域的景观曲率，从而明确地衡量泛化能力。因此，我们将 HWM 的损失融入到学生的训练中，并通过参数混合（OKDPH）提出了一种新颖的 OKD 框架，以促进更平坦的最小值并获得鲁棒的解决方案。考虑到参数的冗余可能导致HWM的崩溃，我们进一步引入融合操作来保持学生的高度相似性。与最先进的（SOTA）OKD方法和寻求平坦最小值的SOTA方法相比，我们的OKDPH以更少的参数实现了更高的性能，使OKD具有轻量级和鲁棒的特性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/tianlizhang/OKDPH 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过参数混合实现高效在线知识蒸馏的新框架OKDPH，旨在提升学生模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有在线知识蒸馏技术依赖复杂模块生成多样化知识，而本文旨在利用多模型设置替代复杂模块，通过损失曲面平坦化提升泛化性能。
AI.method: 通过线性加权多个学生模型参数构建混合权重模型（HWM），利用HWM损失估计学生模型周围损失曲面曲率，并将其整合到学生训练中，同时引入融合操作防止参数冗余导致的HWM崩溃。
AI.result: OKDPH在参数更少的情况下优于现有SOTA知识蒸馏方法和寻找平坦极小值的方法，具有轻量且鲁棒的特性。
AI.conclusion: 参数混合通过平坦化损失极小值有效提升在线知识蒸馏的泛化性能，为轻量级鲁棒模型训练提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tri Dung Duong,Qian Li,Guandong Xu
title: Achieving Counterfactual Fairness with Imperfect Structural Causal Model
title_zh: 用不完美的结构因果模型实现反事实公平
abstract: Counterfactual fairness alleviates the discrimination between the model prediction toward an individual in the actual world (observational data) and that in counterfactual world (i.e., what if the individual belongs to other sensitive groups). The existing studies need to pre-define the structural causal model that captures the correlations among variables for counterfactual inference; however, the underlying causal model is usually unknown and difficult to be validated in real-world scenarios. Moreover, the misspecification of the causal model potentially leads to poor performance in model prediction and thus makes unfair decisions. In this research, we propose a novel minimax game-theoretic model for counterfactual fairness that can produce accurate results meanwhile achieve a counterfactually fair decision with the relaxation of strong assumptions of structural causal models. In addition, we also theoretically prove the error bound of the proposed minimax model. Empirical experiments on multiple real-world datasets illustrate our superior performance in both accuracy and fairness. Source code is available at \url{https://github.com/tridungduong16/counterfactual_fairness_game_theoretic}.
summary: Counterfactual fairness alleviates the discrimination between the model prediction toward an individual in the actual world (observational data) and that in counterfactual world (i.e., what if the individual belongs to other sensitive groups). The existing studies need to pre-define the structural causal model that captures the correlations among variables for counterfactual inference; however, the underlying causal model is usually unknown and difficult to be validated in real-world scenarios. Moreover, the misspecification of the causal model potentially leads to poor performance in model prediction and thus makes unfair decisions. In this research, we propose a novel minimax game-theoretic model for counterfactual fairness that can produce accurate results meanwhile achieve a counterfactually fair decision with the relaxation of strong assumptions of structural causal models. In addition, we also theoretically prove the error bound of the proposed minimax model. Empirical experiments on multiple real-world datasets illustrate our superior performance in both accuracy and fairness. Source code is available at \url{https://github.com/tridungduong16/counterfactual_fairness_game_theoretic}.
abstract_zh: 反事实公平减轻了模型对现实世界（观察数据）中的个体的预测与反事实世界中的个体（即，如果该个体属于其他敏感群体怎么办）之间的歧视。现有研究需要预先定义结构因果模型，捕捉变量之间的相关性以进行反事实推理；然而，潜在的因果模型通常是未知的，并且很难在现实场景中得到验证。此外，因果模型的错误指定可能会导致模型预测性能不佳，从而做出不公平的决策。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的反事实公平性极小极大博弈论模型，该模型可以产生准确的结果，同时通过放松结构因果模型的强假设来实现反事实公平决策。此外，我们还从理论上证明了所提出的极小极大模型的误差界。对多个现实世界数据集的实证实验说明了我们在准确性和公平性方面的卓越表现。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/tridungduong16/counterfactual_fairness_game_theoretic} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需完美结构因果模型的博弈论方法，以实现反事实公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实公平方法依赖预定义的结构因果模型，但实际场景中因果模型通常未知且难以验证，模型误设会导致预测偏差和不公平决策。
AI.method: 设计一个最小最大博弈模型，在放松结构因果模型强假设的前提下，同时优化预测准确性与反事实公平性，并理论证明误差界。
AI.result: 在多个真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法在准确率和公平性指标上均优于现有方法，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该博弈论框架为无需完美因果模型的反事实公平性提供了有效解决方案，兼具理论保证与实际应用价值。

search_text: Achieving Counterfactual Fairness with Imperfect Structural Causal Model 用不完美的结构因果模型实现反事实公平 Counterfactual fairness alleviates the discrimination between the model prediction toward an individual in the actual world (observational data) and that in counterfactual world (i.e., what if the individual belongs to other sensitive groups). The existing studies need to pre-define the structural causal model that captures the correlations among variables for counterfactual inference; however, the underlying causal model is usually unknown and difficult to be validated in real-world scenarios. Moreover, the misspecification of the causal model potentially leads to poor performance in model prediction and thus makes unfair decisions. In this research, we propose a novel minimax game-theoretic model for counterfactual fairness that can produce accurate results meanwhile achieve a counterfactually fair decision with the relaxation of strong assumptions of structural causal models. In addition, we also theoretically prove the error bound of the proposed minimax model. Empirical experiments on multiple real-world datasets illustrate our superior performance in both accuracy and fairness. Source code is available at \url{https://github.com/tridungduong16/counterfactual_fairness_game_theoretic}. 反事实公平减轻了模型对现实世界（观察数据）中的个体的预测与反事实世界中的个体（即，如果该个体属于其他敏感群体怎么办）之间的歧视。现有研究需要预先定义结构因果模型，捕捉变量之间的相关性以进行反事实推理；然而，潜在的因果模型通常是未知的，并且很难在现实场景中得到验证。此外，因果模型的错误指定可能会导致模型预测性能不佳，从而做出不公平的决策。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的反事实公平性极小极大博弈论模型，该模型可以产生准确的结果，同时通过放松结构因果模型的强假设来实现反事实公平决策。此外，我们还从理论上证明了所提出的极小极大模型的误差界。对多个现实世界数据集的实证实验说明了我们在准确性和公平性方面的卓越表现。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/tridungduong16/counterfactual_fairness_game_theoretic} 获取。 本文提出一种无需完美结构因果模型的博弈论方法，以实现反事实公平性。 Tri Dung Duong,Qian Li,Guandong Xu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Zhiyuan Ma,Xiangyu Zhu,Guojun Qi,Zhen Lei,Lei Zhang
title: OTAvatar: One-shot Talking Face Avatar with Controllable Tri-plane Rendering
title_zh: OTAvatar：具有可控三平面渲染的一次性会说话的头像
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023. The code is available at https://github.com/theEricMa/OTAvatar
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023. The code is available at https://github.com/theEricMa/OTAvatar
abstract: Controllability, generalizability and efficiency are the major objectives of constructing face avatars represented by neural implicit field. However, existing methods have not managed to accommodate the three requirements simultaneously. They either focus on static portraits, restricting the representation ability to a specific subject, or suffer from substantial computational cost, limiting their flexibility. In this paper, we propose One-shot Talking face Avatar (OTAvatar), which constructs face avatars by a generalized controllable tri-plane rendering solution so that each personalized avatar can be constructed from only one portrait as the reference. Specifically, OTAvatar first inverts a portrait image to a motion-free identity code. Second, the identity code and a motion code are utilized to modulate an efficient CNN to generate a tri-plane formulated volume, which encodes the subject in the desired motion. Finally, volume rendering is employed to generate an image in any view. The core of our solution is a novel decoupling-by-inverting strategy that disentangles identity and motion in the latent code via optimization-based inversion. Benefiting from the efficient tri-plane representation, we achieve controllable rendering of generalized face avatar at $35$ FPS on A100. Experiments show promising performance of cross-identity reenactment on subjects out of the training set and better 3D consistency.
summary: Controllability, generalizability and efficiency are the major objectives of constructing face avatars represented by neural implicit field. However, existing methods have not managed to accommodate the three requirements simultaneously. They either focus on static portraits, restricting the representation ability to a specific subject, or suffer from substantial computational cost, limiting their flexibility. In this paper, we propose One-shot Talking face Avatar (OTAvatar), which constructs face avatars by a generalized controllable tri-plane rendering solution so that each personalized avatar can be constructed from only one portrait as the reference. Specifically, OTAvatar first inverts a portrait image to a motion-free identity code. Second, the identity code and a motion code are utilized to modulate an efficient CNN to generate a tri-plane formulated volume, which encodes the subject in the desired motion. Finally, volume rendering is employed to generate an image in any view. The core of our solution is a novel decoupling-by-inverting strategy that disentangles identity and motion in the latent code via optimization-based inversion. Benefiting from the efficient tri-plane representation, we achieve controllable rendering of generalized face avatar at $35$ FPS on A100. Experiments show promising performance of cross-identity reenactment on subjects out of the training set and better 3D consistency.
abstract_zh: 可控性、泛化性和高效性是构建神经隐场代表的人脸头像的主要目标。然而，现有方法未能同时满足这三个要求。它们要么专注于静态肖像，限制了对特定主题的表示能力，要么承受巨大的计算成本，限制了它们的灵活性。在本文中，我们提出了One-shot Talking Face Avatar（OTAvatar），它通过广义可控三平面渲染解决方案构建人脸头像，使得每个个性化头像都可以仅从一张肖像作为参考来构建。具体来说，OTAvatar首先将肖像图像反转为无运动身份代码。其次，利用身份代码和运动代码来调制高效的 CNN，以生成三平面公式体积，该体积以所需的运动对主体进行编码。最后，采用体积渲染来生成任何视图中的图像。我们解决方案的核心是一种新颖的反演解耦策略，该策略通过基于优化的反演来解开潜在代码中的身份和运动。受益于高效的三平面表示，我们在 A100 上以 35 美元的 FPS 实现了广义人脸头像的可控渲染。实验表明，对训练集之外的受试者进行跨身份重演的性能良好，并且具有更好的 3D 一致性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OTAvatar，一种基于可控三平面渲染的单张图像生成 talking face avatar 的方法，解决现有模型在可控性、泛化性和效率上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有面部替身方法无法同时满足可控性、泛化性和计算效率，要么局限于静态肖像，要么计算成本过高。
AI.method: 通过逆向优化分离身份与运动信息，利用身份码和运动码调制CNN生成三平面体积表示，结合体积渲染实现任意视角图像生成。
AI.result: 在A100上实现35 FPS实时渲染，跨身份重演效果优于训练集外人物，且3D一致性更优。
AI.conclusion: OTAvatar通过三平面表示与逆向解耦策略，首次实现单张图像输入下高效可控的通用面部替身生成。

authors_text: Ji Qi,Jifan Yu,Teng Tu,Kunyu Gao,Yifan Xu,Xinyu Guan,Xiaozhi Wang,Yuxiao Dong,Bin Xu,Lei Hou,Juanzi Li,Jie Tang,Weidong Guo,Hui Liu,Yu Xu
title: GOAL: A Challenging Knowledge-grounded Video Captioning Benchmark for Real-time Soccer Commentary Generation
title_zh: 目标：用于实时足球评论生成的具有挑战性的、基于知识的视频字幕基准
abstract: Despite the recent emergence of video captioning models, how to generate vivid, fine-grained video descriptions based on the background knowledge (i.e., long and informative commentary about the domain-specific scenes with appropriate reasoning) is still far from being solved, which however has great applications such as automatic sports narrative. In this paper, we present GOAL, a benchmark of over 8.9k soccer video clips, 22k sentences, and 42k knowledge triples for proposing a challenging new task setting as Knowledge-grounded Video Captioning (KGVC). Moreover, we conduct experimental adaption of existing methods to show the difficulty and potential directions for solving this valuable and applicable task. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/THU-KEG/goal.
summary: Despite the recent emergence of video captioning models, how to generate vivid, fine-grained video descriptions based on the background knowledge (i.e., long and informative commentary about the domain-specific scenes with appropriate reasoning) is still far from being solved, which however has great applications such as automatic sports narrative. In this paper, we present GOAL, a benchmark of over 8.9k soccer video clips, 22k sentences, and 42k knowledge triples for proposing a challenging new task setting as Knowledge-grounded Video Captioning (KGVC). Moreover, we conduct experimental adaption of existing methods to show the difficulty and potential directions for solving this valuable and applicable task. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/THU-KEG/goal.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近出现了视频字幕模型，但如何基于背景知识（即，通过适当的推理对特定领域场景进行长而信息丰富的评论）生成生动、细粒度的视频描述仍远未得到解决，但这具有很大的应用，例如自动体育叙事。在本文中，我们提出了 GOAL，这是超过 8.9k 足球视频剪辑、22k 句子和 42k 知识三元组的基准，用于提出具有挑战性的新任务设置，即基于知识的视频字幕 (KGVC)。此外，我们对现有方法进行了实验调整，以展示解决这一有价值且适用的任务的难度和潜在方向。我们的数据和代码可在 https://github.com/THU-KEG/goal 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GOAL基准，用于解决知识引导的视频字幕生成（KGVC）任务，旨在生成基于背景知识的生动足球视频描述，以支持实时足球解说生成。
AI.motivation: 现有视频字幕模型难以生成结合领域知识的细粒度描述，而自动体育叙事等应用亟需此类能力，因此需要构建具有挑战性的基准推动研究。
AI.method: 构建包含8.9k足球视频片段、22k句子及42k知识三元组的GOAL基准，并通过实验适配现有方法验证任务难度与改进方向。
AI.result: 实验表明KGVC任务具有显著挑战性，现有方法在结合领域知识生成细粒度描述时表现不足，需探索新模型架构与训练策略。
AI.conclusion: GOAL基准为知识引导的视频字幕生成提供了新挑战，推动了结合领域知识与视频内容的实时解说生成研究。

search_text: GOAL: A Challenging Knowledge-grounded Video Captioning Benchmark for Real-time Soccer Commentary Generation 目标：用于实时足球评论生成的具有挑战性的、基于知识的视频字幕基准 Despite the recent emergence of video captioning models, how to generate vivid, fine-grained video descriptions based on the background knowledge (i.e., long and informative commentary about the domain-specific scenes with appropriate reasoning) is still far from being solved, which however has great applications such as automatic sports narrative. In this paper, we present GOAL, a benchmark of over 8.9k soccer video clips, 22k sentences, and 42k knowledge triples for proposing a challenging new task setting as Knowledge-grounded Video Captioning (KGVC). Moreover, we conduct experimental adaption of existing methods to show the difficulty and potential directions for solving this valuable and applicable task. Our data and code are available at https://github.com/THU-KEG/goal. 尽管最近出现了视频字幕模型，但如何基于背景知识（即，通过适当的推理对特定领域场景进行长而信息丰富的评论）生成生动、细粒度的视频描述仍远未得到解决，但这具有很大的应用，例如自动体育叙事。在本文中，我们提出了 GOAL，这是超过 8.9k 足球视频剪辑、22k 句子和 42k 知识三元组的基准，用于提出具有挑战性的新任务设置，即基于知识的视频字幕 (KGVC)。此外，我们对现有方法进行了实验调整，以展示解决这一有价值且适用的任务的难度和潜在方向。我们的数据和代码可在 https://github.com/THU-KEG/goal 获取。 本文提出GOAL基准，用于解决知识引导的视频字幕生成（KGVC）任务，旨在生成基于背景知识的生动足球视频描述，以支持实时足球解说生成。 Ji Qi,Jifan Yu,Teng Tu,Kunyu Gao,Yifan Xu,Xinyu Guan,Xiaozhi Wang,Yuxiao Dong,Bin Xu,Lei Hou,Juanzi Li,Jie Tang,Weidong Guo,Hui Liu,Yu Xu cs.CV,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Yingda Guan,Zhengyang Feng,Huiying Chang,Kuo Du,Tingting Li,Min Wang
title: SDTracker: Synthetic Data Based Multi-Object Tracking
title_zh: SDTracker：基于合成数据的多目标跟踪
abstract: We present SDTracker, a method that harnesses the potential of synthetic data for multi-object tracking of real-world scenes in a domain generalization and semi-supervised fashion. First, we use the ImageNet dataset as an auxiliary to randomize the style of synthetic data. With out-of-domain data, we further enforce pyramid consistency loss across different "stylized" images from the same sample to learn domain invariant features. Second, we adopt the pseudo-labeling method to effectively utilize the unlabeled MOT17 training data. To obtain high-quality pseudo-labels, we apply proximal policy optimization (PPO2) algorithm to search confidence thresholds for each sequence. When using the unlabeled MOT17 training set, combined with the pure-motion tracking strategy upgraded via developed post-processing, we finally reach 61.4 HOTA.
summary: We present SDTracker, a method that harnesses the potential of synthetic data for multi-object tracking of real-world scenes in a domain generalization and semi-supervised fashion. First, we use the ImageNet dataset as an auxiliary to randomize the style of synthetic data. With out-of-domain data, we further enforce pyramid consistency loss across different "stylized" images from the same sample to learn domain invariant features. Second, we adopt the pseudo-labeling method to effectively utilize the unlabeled MOT17 training data. To obtain high-quality pseudo-labels, we apply proximal policy optimization (PPO2) algorithm to search confidence thresholds for each sequence. When using the unlabeled MOT17 training set, combined with the pure-motion tracking strategy upgraded via developed post-processing, we finally reach 61.4 HOTA.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 SDTracker，一种利用合成数据的潜力以领域泛化和半监督方式对现实世界场景进行多对象跟踪的方法。首先，我们使用 ImageNet 数据集作为辅助来随机化合成数据的风格。利用域外数据，我们进一步在同一样本的不同“风格化”图像之间强制实施金字塔一致性损失，以学习域不变特征。其次，我们采用伪标记方法来有效利用未标记的MOT17训练数据。为了获得高质量的伪标签，我们应用近端策略优化（PPO2）算法来搜索每个序列的置信度阈值。当使用未标记的 MOT17 训练集，结合通过开发的后处理升级的纯运动跟踪策略时，我们最终达到 61.4 HOTA。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SDTracker方法，通过合成数据和半监督学习实现真实场景的多目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 真实场景多目标跟踪数据标注成本高，合成数据可补充但存在领域差异，需解决领域泛化问题。
AI.method: 利用ImageNet随机化合成数据风格，通过金字塔一致性损失学习领域不变特征；结合伪标签与PPO2算法优化阈值，使用改进后处理策略提升未标注数据利用效率。
AI.result: 在MOT17数据集上达到61.4 HOTA指标。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据结合半监督学习有效提升跟踪性能，领域适应策略与伪标签优化是关键。
