authors_text: Bohao Peng,Zhuotao Tian,Xiaoyang Wu,Chenyao Wang,Shu Liu,Jingyong Su,Jiaya Jia
title: Hierarchical Dense Correlation Distillation for Few-Shot Segmentation
title_zh: 用于少镜头分割的分层密集相关蒸馏
comment: to be published in CVPR 2023, code is available at \url{https://github.com/Pbihao/HDMNet}
comments: to be published in CVPR 2023, code is available at \url{https://github.com/Pbihao/HDMNet}
abstract: Few-shot semantic segmentation (FSS) aims to form class-agnostic models segmenting unseen classes with only a handful of annotations. Previous methods limited to the semantic feature and prototype representation suffer from coarse segmentation granularity and train-set overfitting. In this work, we design Hierarchically Decoupled Matching Network (HDMNet) mining pixel-level support correlation based on the transformer architecture. The self-attention modules are used to assist in establishing hierarchical dense features, as a means to accomplish the cascade matching between query and support features. Moreover, we propose a matching module to reduce train-set overfitting and introduce correlation distillation leveraging semantic correspondence from coarse resolution to boost fine-grained segmentation. Our method performs decently in experiments. We achieve $50.0\%$ mIoU on \coco~dataset one-shot setting and $56.0\%$ on five-shot segmentation, respectively.
summary: Few-shot semantic segmentation (FSS) aims to form class-agnostic models segmenting unseen classes with only a handful of annotations. Previous methods limited to the semantic feature and prototype representation suffer from coarse segmentation granularity and train-set overfitting. In this work, we design Hierarchically Decoupled Matching Network (HDMNet) mining pixel-level support correlation based on the transformer architecture. The self-attention modules are used to assist in establishing hierarchical dense features, as a means to accomplish the cascade matching between query and support features. Moreover, we propose a matching module to reduce train-set overfitting and introduce correlation distillation leveraging semantic correspondence from coarse resolution to boost fine-grained segmentation. Our method performs decently in experiments. We achieve $50.0\%$ mIoU on \coco~dataset one-shot setting and $56.0\%$ on five-shot segmentation, respectively.
abstract_zh: 少样本语义分割（FSS）旨在形成与类无关的模型，仅使用少量注释来分割不可见的类。以前的方法仅限于语义特征和原型表示，存在粗分割粒度和训练集过度拟合的问题。在这项工作中，我们设计了基于变压器架构的分层解耦匹配网络（HDMNet）挖掘像素级支持相关性。自注意力模块用于协助建立层次密集特征，作为完成查询和支持特征之间级联匹配的手段。此外，我们提出了一个匹配模块来减少训练集过度拟合，并引入相关性蒸馏，利用粗分辨率的语义对应来促进细粒度分割。我们的方法在实验中表现良好。我们在 coco~dataset 单样本设置上分别实现了 $50.0\%$ mIoU，在五样本分割上分别实现了 $56.0\%$ mIoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层密集相关性蒸馏的少样本分割方法，旨在解决现有方法在分割粒度和训练集过拟合方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本分割方法因依赖语义特征和原型表示，导致分割粒度粗糙且易过拟合训练集，需改进特征匹配与泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计分层解耦匹配网络（HDMNet），利用Transformer架构提取像素级支持相关性，通过自注意力模块建立分层密集特征，并引入相关性蒸馏机制优化细粒度分割。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上，该方法在1-shot设置下达到50.0% mIoU，在5-shot设置下达到56.0% mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 通过分层特征匹配与相关性蒸馏，有效提升了少样本分割的精度与泛化能力，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Jie Hu,Linyan Huang,Tianhe Ren,Shengchuan Zhang,Rongrong Ji,Liujuan Cao
title: You Only Segment Once: Towards Real-Time Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: 您只需分割一次：迈向实时全景分割
abstract: In this paper, we propose YOSO, a real-time panoptic segmentation framework. YOSO predicts masks via dynamic convolutions between panoptic kernels and image feature maps, in which you only need to segment once for both instance and semantic segmentation tasks. To reduce the computational overhead, we design a feature pyramid aggregator for the feature map extraction, and a separable dynamic decoder for the panoptic kernel generation. The aggregator re-parameterizes interpolation-first modules in a convolution-first way, which significantly speeds up the pipeline without any additional costs. The decoder performs multi-head cross-attention via separable dynamic convolution for better efficiency and accuracy. To the best of our knowledge, YOSO is the first real-time panoptic segmentation framework that delivers competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art models. Specifically, YOSO achieves 46.4 PQ, 45.6 FPS on COCO; 52.5 PQ, 22.6 FPS on Cityscapes; 38.0 PQ, 35.4 FPS on ADE20K; and 34.1 PQ, 7.1 FPS on Mapillary Vistas. Code is available at https://github.com/hujiecpp/YOSO.
summary: In this paper, we propose YOSO, a real-time panoptic segmentation framework. YOSO predicts masks via dynamic convolutions between panoptic kernels and image feature maps, in which you only need to segment once for both instance and semantic segmentation tasks. To reduce the computational overhead, we design a feature pyramid aggregator for the feature map extraction, and a separable dynamic decoder for the panoptic kernel generation. The aggregator re-parameterizes interpolation-first modules in a convolution-first way, which significantly speeds up the pipeline without any additional costs. The decoder performs multi-head cross-attention via separable dynamic convolution for better efficiency and accuracy. To the best of our knowledge, YOSO is the first real-time panoptic segmentation framework that delivers competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art models. Specifically, YOSO achieves 46.4 PQ, 45.6 FPS on COCO; 52.5 PQ, 22.6 FPS on Cityscapes; 38.0 PQ, 35.4 FPS on ADE20K; and 34.1 PQ, 7.1 FPS on Mapillary Vistas. Code is available at https://github.com/hujiecpp/YOSO.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 YOSO，一种实时全景分割框架。 YOSO 通过全景内核和图像特征图之间的动态卷积来预测掩模，其中实例和语义分割任务只需要分割一次。为了减少计算开销，我们设计了一个用于特征图提取的特征金字塔聚合器，以及一个用于全景内核生成的可分离动态解码器。聚合器以卷积优先的方式重新参数化插值优先模块，这显着加快了管道速度，而无需任何额外成本。解码器通过可分离的动态卷积执行多头交叉注意，以提高效率和准确性。据我们所知，YOSO 是第一个实时全景分割框架，与最先进的模型相比，其性能具有竞争力。具体来说，YOSO在COCO上实现了46.4 PQ、45.6 FPS；城市景观 52.5 PQ，22.6 FPS； ADE20K 上为 38.0 PQ，35.4 FPS； Mapillary Vistas 上的 34.1 PQ、7.1 FPS。代码可在 https://github.com/hujiecpp/YOSO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出YOSO框架，实现实时全景分割任务，通过一次分割同时完成实例分割和语义分割。
AI.motivation: 现有全景分割方法计算复杂度高，难以实现实时性，需设计高效网络结构以兼顾速度与性能。
AI.method: 采用动态卷积生成掩码，设计特征金字塔聚合器优化特征提取，使用可分离动态解码器提升效率，通过卷积优先重参数化加速流程。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上达到46.4 PQ/45.6 FPS，在Cityscapes上52.5 PQ/22.6 FPS，在ADE20K上38.0 PQ/35.4 FPS，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: YOSO是首个达到实时性的全景分割框架，在多个数据集上性能优于现有方法，为实际应用提供可行方案。

search_text: You Only Segment Once: Towards Real-Time Panoptic Segmentation 您只需分割一次：迈向实时全景分割 In this paper, we propose YOSO, a real-time panoptic segmentation framework. YOSO predicts masks via dynamic convolutions between panoptic kernels and image feature maps, in which you only need to segment once for both instance and semantic segmentation tasks. To reduce the computational overhead, we design a feature pyramid aggregator for the feature map extraction, and a separable dynamic decoder for the panoptic kernel generation. The aggregator re-parameterizes interpolation-first modules in a convolution-first way, which significantly speeds up the pipeline without any additional costs. The decoder performs multi-head cross-attention via separable dynamic convolution for better efficiency and accuracy. To the best of our knowledge, YOSO is the first real-time panoptic segmentation framework that delivers competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art models. Specifically, YOSO achieves 46.4 PQ, 45.6 FPS on COCO; 52.5 PQ, 22.6 FPS on Cityscapes; 38.0 PQ, 35.4 FPS on ADE20K; and 34.1 PQ, 7.1 FPS on Mapillary Vistas. Code is available at https://github.com/hujiecpp/YOSO. 在本文中，我们提出了 YOSO，一种实时全景分割框架。 YOSO 通过全景内核和图像特征图之间的动态卷积来预测掩模，其中实例和语义分割任务只需要分割一次。为了减少计算开销，我们设计了一个用于特征图提取的特征金字塔聚合器，以及一个用于全景内核生成的可分离动态解码器。聚合器以卷积优先的方式重新参数化插值优先模块，这显着加快了管道速度，而无需任何额外成本。解码器通过可分离的动态卷积执行多头交叉注意，以提高效率和准确性。据我们所知，YOSO 是第一个实时全景分割框架，与最先进的模型相比，其性能具有竞争力。具体来说，YOSO在COCO上实现了46.4 PQ、45.6 FPS；城市景观 52.5 PQ，22.6 FPS； ADE20K 上为 38.0 PQ，35.4 FPS； Mapillary Vistas 上的 34.1 PQ、7.1 FPS。代码可在 https://github.com/hujiecpp/YOSO 获取。 本文提出YOSO框架，实现实时全景分割任务，通过一次分割同时完成实例分割和语义分割。 Jie Hu,Linyan Huang,Tianhe Ren,Shengchuan Zhang,Rongrong Ji,Liujuan Cao cs.CV

authors_text: Najmeh Torabian,Behrouz Minaei-Bidgoli,Mohsen Jahanshahi
title: Farspredict: A benchmark dataset for link prediction
title_zh: Farspredict：链接预测的基准数据集
abstract: Link prediction with knowledge graph embedding (KGE) is a popular method for knowledge graph completion. Furthermore, training KGEs on non-English knowledge graph promote knowledge extraction and knowledge graph reasoning in the context of these languages. However, many challenges in non-English KGEs pose to learning a low-dimensional representation of a knowledge graph's entities and relations. This paper proposes "Farspredict" a Persian knowledge graph based on Farsbase (the most comprehensive knowledge graph in Persian). It also explains how the knowledge graph structure affects link prediction accuracy in KGE. To evaluate Farspredict, we implemented the popular models of KGE on it and compared the results with Freebase. Given the analysis results, some optimizations on the knowledge graph are carried out to improve its functionality in the KGE. As a result, a new Persian knowledge graph is achieved. Implementation results in the KGE models on Farspredict outperforming Freebases in many cases. At last, we discuss what improvements could be effective in enhancing the quality of Farspredict and how much it improves.
summary: Link prediction with knowledge graph embedding (KGE) is a popular method for knowledge graph completion. Furthermore, training KGEs on non-English knowledge graph promote knowledge extraction and knowledge graph reasoning in the context of these languages. However, many challenges in non-English KGEs pose to learning a low-dimensional representation of a knowledge graph's entities and relations. This paper proposes "Farspredict" a Persian knowledge graph based on Farsbase (the most comprehensive knowledge graph in Persian). It also explains how the knowledge graph structure affects link prediction accuracy in KGE. To evaluate Farspredict, we implemented the popular models of KGE on it and compared the results with Freebase. Given the analysis results, some optimizations on the knowledge graph are carried out to improve its functionality in the KGE. As a result, a new Persian knowledge graph is achieved. Implementation results in the KGE models on Farspredict outperforming Freebases in many cases. At last, we discuss what improvements could be effective in enhancing the quality of Farspredict and how much it improves.
abstract_zh: 知识图嵌入链接预测（KGE）是一种流行的知识图补全方法。此外，对非英语知识图谱的 KGE 进行训练可以促进这些语言背景下的知识提取和知识图推理。然而，非英语知识图谱生成中的许多挑战对学习知识图谱实体和关系的低维表示构成了挑战。本文提出了基于Farsbase（波斯语最全面的知识图谱）的波斯语知识图谱“Farspredict”。它还解释了知识图结构如何影响 KGE 中的链接预测准确性。为了评估 Farspredict，我们在其上实现了流行的 KGE 模型，并将结果与​​ Freebase 进行了比较。根据分析结果，对知识图谱进行了一些优化，以改进其在 KGE 中的功能。由此，得到了一个新的波斯语知识图谱。 Farspredict 上的 KGE 模型的实施结果在许多情况下优于 Freebase。最后，我们讨论哪些改进可以有效提高 Farspredict 的质量以及改进的程度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个基于波斯语知识图谱Farsbase的链接预测基准数据集Farspredict，并评估优化知识图谱嵌入模型在其中的表现。
AI.motivation: 非英语知识图谱嵌入面临低维表示学习的挑战，缺乏有效的基准数据集阻碍了波斯语等语言的知识提取与推理研究。
AI.method: 构建Farspredict数据集，实现主流KGE模型进行实验，与Freebase对比并优化知识图谱结构以提升模型效果。
AI.result: 优化后的Farspredict在多数情况下超越Freebase的KGE模型表现，形成新的高质量波斯语知识图谱。
AI.conclusion: Farspredict验证了非英语知识图谱基准的重要性，结构优化显著提升质量，未来需进一步改进数据集完整性与模型适应性。

authors_text: Dacheng Wen,Yupeng Li,Francis C. M. Lau
title: A Survey of Machine Learning-Based Ride-Hailing Planning
title_zh: 基于机器学习的乘车规划调查
abstract: Ride-hailing is a sustainable transportation paradigm where riders access door-to-door traveling services through a mobile phone application, which has attracted a colossal amount of usage. There are two major planning tasks in a ride-hailing system: (1) matching, i.e., assigning available vehicles to pick up the riders, and (2) repositioning, i.e., proactively relocating vehicles to certain locations to balance the supply and demand of ride-hailing services. Recently, many studies of ride-hailing planning that leverage machine learning techniques have emerged. In this article, we present a comprehensive overview on latest developments of machine learning-based ride-hailing planning. To offer a clear and structured review, we introduce a taxonomy into which we carefully fit the different categories of related works according to the types of their planning tasks and solution schemes, which include collective matching, distributed matching, collective repositioning, distributed repositioning, and joint matching and repositioning. We further shed light on many real-world datasets and simulators that are indispensable for empirical studies on machine learning-based ride-hailing planning strategies. At last, we propose several promising research directions for this rapidly growing research and practical field.
summary: Ride-hailing is a sustainable transportation paradigm where riders access door-to-door traveling services through a mobile phone application, which has attracted a colossal amount of usage. There are two major planning tasks in a ride-hailing system: (1) matching, i.e., assigning available vehicles to pick up the riders, and (2) repositioning, i.e., proactively relocating vehicles to certain locations to balance the supply and demand of ride-hailing services. Recently, many studies of ride-hailing planning that leverage machine learning techniques have emerged. In this article, we present a comprehensive overview on latest developments of machine learning-based ride-hailing planning. To offer a clear and structured review, we introduce a taxonomy into which we carefully fit the different categories of related works according to the types of their planning tasks and solution schemes, which include collective matching, distributed matching, collective repositioning, distributed repositioning, and joint matching and repositioning. We further shed light on many real-world datasets and simulators that are indispensable for empirical studies on machine learning-based ride-hailing planning strategies. At last, we propose several promising research directions for this rapidly growing research and practical field.
abstract_zh: 网约车是一种可持续的交通模式，乘客通过手机应用程序获得门到门的出行服务，吸引了大量的使用。网约车系统有两个主要的规划任务：（1）匹配，即分配可用车辆来接乘客；（2）重新定位，即主动将车辆重新分配到某些地点，以平衡网约车服务的供需。最近，出现了许多利用机器学习技术的网约车规划研究。在本文中，我们全面概述了基于机器学习的网约车规划的最新发展。为了提供清晰、结构化的回顾，我们引入了一种分类法，根据相关工作的规划任务和解决方案的类型，仔细地将其划分为不同类别，包括集体匹配、分布式匹配、集体重新定位、分布式重新定位以及联合匹配和重新定位。我们进一步阐明了许多现实世界的数据集和模拟器，这些数据集和模拟器对于基于机器学习的乘车规划策略的实证研究是必不可少的。最后，我们为这个快速发展的研究和实践领域提出了几个有前景的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于机器学习的网约车规划最新进展，重点分析了匹配与再定位任务的分类及解决方案。
AI.motivation: 网约车系统需解决供需不平衡问题，传统方法存在效率瓶颈，机器学习技术为优化规划提供了新思路。
AI.method: 通过构建分类体系（集体匹配/分布式匹配/再定位等），梳理现有研究并总结关键数据集与仿真工具。
AI.result: 系统总结了主流方法的技术路线，指出数据驱动的联合优化和动态决策是未来研究重点。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习显著提升网约车规划效率，但需进一步解决实时性、泛化性及多目标协同优化等挑战。

conclusion: 机器学习显著提升网约车规划效率，但需进一步解决实时性、泛化性及多目标协同优化等挑战。
search_text: A Survey of Machine Learning-Based Ride-Hailing Planning 基于机器学习的乘车规划调查 Ride-hailing is a sustainable transportation paradigm where riders access door-to-door traveling services through a mobile phone application, which has attracted a colossal amount of usage. There are two major planning tasks in a ride-hailing system: (1) matching, i.e., assigning available vehicles to pick up the riders, and (2) repositioning, i.e., proactively relocating vehicles to certain locations to balance the supply and demand of ride-hailing services. Recently, many studies of ride-hailing planning that leverage machine learning techniques have emerged. In this article, we present a comprehensive overview on latest developments of machine learning-based ride-hailing planning. To offer a clear and structured review, we introduce a taxonomy into which we carefully fit the different categories of related works according to the types of their planning tasks and solution schemes, which include collective matching, distributed matching, collective repositioning, distributed repositioning, and joint matching and repositioning. We further shed light on many real-world datasets and simulators that are indispensable for empirical studies on machine learning-based ride-hailing planning strategies. At last, we propose several promising research directions for this rapidly growing research and practical field. 网约车是一种可持续的交通模式，乘客通过手机应用程序获得门到门的出行服务，吸引了大量的使用。网约车系统有两个主要的规划任务：（1）匹配，即分配可用车辆来接乘客；（2）重新定位，即主动将车辆重新分配到某些地点，以平衡网约车服务的供需。最近，出现了许多利用机器学习技术的网约车规划研究。在本文中，我们全面概述了基于机器学习的网约车规划的最新发展。为了提供清晰、结构化的回顾，我们引入了一种分类法，根据相关工作的规划任务和解决方案的类型，仔细地将其划分为不同类别，包括集体匹配、分布式匹配、集体重新定位、分布式重新定位以及联合匹配和重新定位。我们进一步阐明了许多现实世界的数据集和模拟器，这些数据集和模拟器对于基于机器学习的乘车规划策略的实证研究是必不可少的。最后，我们为这个快速发展的研究和实践领域提出了几个有前景的研究方向。 本文综述了基于机器学习的网约车规划最新进展，重点分析了匹配与再定位任务的分类及解决方案。 Dacheng Wen,Yupeng Li,Francis C. M. Lau cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Dianyi Yang,Jiadong Tang,Yu Gao,Yi Yang,Mengyin Fu
title: Sector Patch Embedding: An Embedding Module Conforming to The Distortion Pattern of Fisheye Image
title_zh: 扇区补丁嵌入：一种符合鱼眼图像畸变模式的嵌入模块
abstract: Fisheye cameras suffer from image distortion while having a large field of view(LFOV). And this fact leads to poor performance on some fisheye vision tasks. One of the solutions is to optimize the current vision algorithm for fisheye images. However, most of the CNN-based methods and the Transformer-based methods lack the capability of leveraging distortion information efficiently. In this work, we propose a novel patch embedding method called Sector Patch Embedding(SPE), conforming to the distortion pattern of the fisheye image. Furthermore, we put forward a synthetic fisheye dataset based on the ImageNet-1K and explore the performance of several Transformer models on the dataset. The classification top-1 accuracy of ViT and PVT is improved by 0.75% and 2.8% with SPE respectively. The experiments show that the proposed sector patch embedding method can better perceive distortion and extract features on the fisheye images. Our method can be easily adopted to other Transformer-based models. Source code is at https://github.com/IN2-ViAUn/Sector-Patch-Embedding.
summary: Fisheye cameras suffer from image distortion while having a large field of view(LFOV). And this fact leads to poor performance on some fisheye vision tasks. One of the solutions is to optimize the current vision algorithm for fisheye images. However, most of the CNN-based methods and the Transformer-based methods lack the capability of leveraging distortion information efficiently. In this work, we propose a novel patch embedding method called Sector Patch Embedding(SPE), conforming to the distortion pattern of the fisheye image. Furthermore, we put forward a synthetic fisheye dataset based on the ImageNet-1K and explore the performance of several Transformer models on the dataset. The classification top-1 accuracy of ViT and PVT is improved by 0.75% and 2.8% with SPE respectively. The experiments show that the proposed sector patch embedding method can better perceive distortion and extract features on the fisheye images. Our method can be easily adopted to other Transformer-based models. Source code is at https://github.com/IN2-ViAUn/Sector-Patch-Embedding.
abstract_zh: 鱼眼相机在具有大视场 (LFOV) 的同时会出现图像失真问题。这一事实导致在某些鱼眼视觉任务上表现不佳。解决方案之一是优化当前鱼眼图像的视觉算法。然而，大多数基于CNN的方法和基于Transformer的方法缺乏有效利用失真信息的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为扇区补丁嵌入（SPE）的新颖补丁嵌入方法，该方法符合鱼眼图像的失真模式。此外，我们提出了一个基于 ImageNet-1K 的合成鱼眼数据集，并探索了几种 Transformer 模型在该数据集上的性能。 SPE 使 ViT 和 PVT 的分类 top-1 准确率分别提高了 0.75% 和 2.8%。实验表明，所提出的扇区补丁嵌入方法可以更好地感知鱼眼图像的失真并提取特征。我们的方法可以很容易地应用于其他基于 Transformer 的模型。源代码位于 https://github.com/IN2-ViAUn/Sector-Patch-Embedding。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种符合鱼眼图像失真模式的Sector Patch Embedding（SPE）嵌入模块，以提升Transformer模型在鱼眼图像任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 鱼眼图像因大视场角导致严重失真，现有CNN和Transformer方法难以有效利用失真信息，影响视觉任务性能。
AI.method: 设计符合鱼眼失真分布的Sector Patch Embedding模块，并基于ImageNet-1K构建合成鱼眼数据集验证方法有效性。
AI.result: SPE使ViT和PVT在鱼眼图像分类任务中top-1准确率分别提升0.75%和2.8%。
AI.conclusion: SPE能更有效地感知鱼眼图像失真并提取特征，且可便捷适配其他Transformer模型。

authors_text: Joya Chen,Difei Gao,Kevin Qinghong Lin,Mike Zheng Shou
title: Affordance Grounding from Demonstration Video to Target Image
title_zh: 从演示视频到目标图像的可供性基础
abstract: Humans excel at learning from expert demonstrations and solving their own problems. To equip intelligent robots and assistants, such as AR glasses, with this ability, it is essential to ground human hand interactions (i.e., affordances) from demonstration videos and apply them to a target image like a user's AR glass view. The video-to-image affordance grounding task is challenging due to (1) the need to predict fine-grained affordances, and (2) the limited training data, which inadequately covers video-image discrepancies and negatively impacts grounding. To tackle them, we propose Affordance Transformer (Afformer), which has a fine-grained transformer-based decoder that gradually refines affordance grounding. Moreover, we introduce Mask Affordance Hand (MaskAHand), a self-supervised pre-training technique for synthesizing video-image data and simulating context changes, enhancing affordance grounding across video-image discrepancies. Afformer with MaskAHand pre-training achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks, including a substantial 37% improvement on the OPRA dataset. Code is made available at https://github.com/showlab/afformer.
summary: Humans excel at learning from expert demonstrations and solving their own problems. To equip intelligent robots and assistants, such as AR glasses, with this ability, it is essential to ground human hand interactions (i.e., affordances) from demonstration videos and apply them to a target image like a user's AR glass view. The video-to-image affordance grounding task is challenging due to (1) the need to predict fine-grained affordances, and (2) the limited training data, which inadequately covers video-image discrepancies and negatively impacts grounding. To tackle them, we propose Affordance Transformer (Afformer), which has a fine-grained transformer-based decoder that gradually refines affordance grounding. Moreover, we introduce Mask Affordance Hand (MaskAHand), a self-supervised pre-training technique for synthesizing video-image data and simulating context changes, enhancing affordance grounding across video-image discrepancies. Afformer with MaskAHand pre-training achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks, including a substantial 37% improvement on the OPRA dataset. Code is made available at https://github.com/showlab/afformer.
abstract_zh: 人类擅长从专家的演示中学习并解决自己的问题。为了让智能机器人和助手（例如 AR 眼镜）具备这种能力，必须从演示视频中提取人手交互（即可供性），并将其应用到目标图像（例如用户的 AR 眼镜视图）。视频到图像可供性接地任务具有挑战性，因为（1）需要预测细粒度可供性，（2）训练数据有限，无法充分涵盖视频图像差异并对接地产生负面影响。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 Affordance Transformer (Afformer)，它有一个基于 Transformer 的细粒度解码器，可以逐渐完善可供性接地。此外，我们还引入了 Mask Affordance Hand (MaskAHand)，这是一种自监督预训练技术，用于合成视频图像数据并模拟上下文变化，从而增强跨视频图像差异的可供性基础。采用 MaskAHand 预训练的 Afformer 在多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，包括在 OPRA 数据集上显着提高了 37%。代码可从 https://github.com/showlab/afformer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从演示视频中学习人类手部交互的可操作性（affordance），并将其应用到目标图像（如AR眼镜视图）的任务。
AI.motivation: 智能机器人和助手（如AR眼镜）需要具备从专家演示中学习并解决用户问题的能力，但现有方法在细粒度可操作性预测和视频-图像差异处理上存在不足。
AI.method: 提出Affordance Transformer（Afformer）模型，采用细粒度Transformer解码器逐步优化可操作性定位；并设计Mask Affordance Hand（MaskAHand）自监督预训练方法，合成视频-图像数据以增强跨模态适应性。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中达到最先进水平，在OPRA数据集上相较现有方法提升37%性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过Afformer与MaskAHand的结合，有效解决了视频到图像的可操作性定位问题，显著提升了跨模态任务的性能。

authors_text: Yue Zhang,Suchen Wang,Shichao Kan,Zhenyu Weng,Yigang Cen,Yap-peng Tan
title: POAR: Towards Open Vocabulary Pedestrian Attribute Recognition
title_zh: POAR：迈向开放词汇行人属性识别
abstract: Pedestrian attribute recognition (PAR) aims to predict the attributes of a target pedestrian in a surveillance system. Existing methods address the PAR problem by training a multi-label classifier with predefined attribute classes. However, it is impossible to exhaust all pedestrian attributes in the real world. To tackle this problem, we develop a novel pedestrian open-attribute recognition (POAR) framework. Our key idea is to formulate the POAR problem as an image-text search problem. We design a Transformer-based image encoder with a masking strategy. A set of attribute tokens are introduced to focus on specific pedestrian parts (e.g., head, upper body, lower body, feet, etc.) and encode corresponding attributes into visual embeddings. Each attribute category is described as a natural language sentence and encoded by the text encoder. Then, we compute the similarity between the visual and text embeddings of attributes to find the best attribute descriptions for the input images. Different from existing methods that learn a specific classifier for each attribute category, we model the pedestrian at a part-level and explore the searching method to handle the unseen attributes. Finally, a many-to-many contrastive (MTMC) loss with masked tokens is proposed to train the network since a pedestrian image can comprise multiple attributes. Extensive experiments have been conducted on benchmark PAR datasets with an open-attribute setting. The results verified the effectiveness of the proposed POAR method, which can form a strong baseline for the POAR task. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/IvyYZ/POAR}.

Existing methods address the PAR problem by training a multi-label classifier with predefined attribute classes. However, it is impossible to exhaust all pedestrian attributes in the real world. We design a Transformer-based image encoder with a masking strategy. A set of attribute tokens are introduced to focus on specific pedestrian parts (e.g., head, upper body, lower body, feet, etc.) and encode corresponding attributes into visual embeddings. Each attribute category is described as a natural language sentence and encoded by the text encoder. Then, we compute the similarity between the visual and text embeddings of attributes to find the best attribute descriptions for the input images. Different from existing methods that learn a specific classifier for each attribute category, we model the pedestrian at a part-level and explore the searching method to handle the unseen attributes. Finally, a many-to-many contrastive (MTMC) loss with masked tokens is proposed to train the network since a pedestrian image can comprise multiple attributes. Extensive experiments have been conducted on benchmark PAR datasets with an open-attribute setting. The results verified the effectiveness of the proposed POAR method, which can form a strong baseline for the POAR task. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/IvyYZ/POAR}.
abstract_zh: 行人属性识别（PAR）旨在预测监控系统中目标行人的属性。现有方法通过使用预定义属性类训练多标签分类器来解决 PAR 问题。然而，不可能穷尽现实世界中的所有行人属性。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种新颖的行人开放属性识别（POAR）框架。我们的关键思想是将 POAR 问题表述为图像文本搜索问题。我们设计了一个带有掩蔽策略的基于 Transformer 的图像编码器。引入一组属性标记来关注特定的行人部位（例如头部、上半身、下半身、脚等）并将相应的属性编码到视觉嵌入中。每个属性类别被描述为自然语言句子并由文本编码器编码。然后，我们计算属性的视觉嵌入和文本嵌入之间的相似度，以找到输入图像的最佳属性描述。与为每个属性类别学习特定分类器的现有方法不同，我们在部分级别对行人进行建模，并探索处理不可见属性的搜索方法。最后，由于行人图像可以包含多个属性，因此提出了带有掩码标记的多对多对比（MTMC）损失来训练网络。在具有开放属性设置的基准 PAR 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果验证了所提出的 POAR 方法的有效性，可以为 POAR 任务形成强有力的基线。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/IvyYZ/POAR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出POAR框架，旨在解决开放词汇表下的行人属性识别问题，通过图像-文本检索方法处理未见过的属性。
AI.motivation: 现有行人属性识别方法依赖预定义属性类别，无法覆盖现实世界中所有可能的属性，需开发能处理开放词汇的框架。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的图像编码器与掩码策略，引入属性标记关注特定身体部位，结合文本编码器计算视觉与文本嵌入相似度，并提出多对多对比损失进行训练。
AI.result: 在开放属性设置的基准数据集上验证了POAR方法的有效性，形成该任务的强基线，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: POAR通过图像-文本检索和部件级建模有效解决开放词汇属性识别问题，为未来研究提供基准方案。

search_text: POAR: Towards Open Vocabulary Pedestrian Attribute Recognition POAR：迈向开放词汇行人属性识别 Pedestrian attribute recognition (PAR) aims to predict the attributes of a target pedestrian in a surveillance system. Existing methods address the PAR problem by training a multi-label classifier with predefined attribute classes. However, it is impossible to exhaust all pedestrian attributes in the real world. To tackle this problem, we develop a novel pedestrian open-attribute recognition (POAR) framework. Our key idea is to formulate the POAR problem as an image-text search problem. We design a Transformer-based image encoder with a masking strategy. A set of attribute tokens are introduced to focus on specific pedestrian parts (e.g., head, upper body, lower body, feet, etc.) and encode corresponding attributes into visual embeddings. Each attribute category is described as a natural language sentence and encoded by the text encoder. Then, we compute the similarity between the visual and text embeddings of attributes to find the best attribute descriptions for the input images. Different from existing methods that learn a specific classifier for each attribute category, we model the pedestrian at a part-level and explore the searching method to handle the unseen attributes. Finally, a many-to-many contrastive (MTMC) loss with masked tokens is proposed to train the network since a pedestrian image can comprise multiple attributes. Extensive experiments have been conducted on benchmark PAR datasets with an open-attribute setting. The results verified the effectiveness of the proposed POAR method, which can form a strong baseline for the POAR task. Our code is available at \url{https://github.com/IvyYZ/POAR}. 行人属性识别（PAR）旨在预测监控系统中目标行人的属性。现有方法通过使用预定义属性类训练多标签分类器来解决 PAR 问题。然而，不可能穷尽现实世界中的所有行人属性。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种新颖的行人开放属性识别（POAR）框架。我们的关键思想是将 POAR 问题表述为图像文本搜索问题。我们设计了一个带有掩蔽策略的基于 Transformer 的图像编码器。引入一组属性标记来关注特定的行人部位（例如头部、上半身、下半身、脚等）并将相应的属性编码到视觉嵌入中。每个属性类别被描述为自然语言句子并由文本编码器编码。然后，我们计算属性的视觉嵌入和文本嵌入之间的相似度，以找到输入图像的最佳属性描述。与为每个属性类别学习特定分类器的现有方法不同，我们在部分级别对行人进行建模，并探索处理不可见属性的搜索方法。最后，由于行人图像可以包含多个属性，因此提出了带有掩码标记的多对多对比（MTMC）损失来训练网络。在具有开放属性设置的基准 PAR 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果验证了所提出的 POAR 方法的有效性，可以为 POAR 任务形成强有力的基线。我们的代码可在 \url{https://github.com/IvyYZ/POAR} 获取。 本文提出POAR框架，旨在解决开放词汇表下的行人属性识别问题，通过图像-文本检索方法处理未见过的属性。 Yue Zhang,Suchen Wang,Shichao Kan,Zhenyu Weng,Yigang Cen,Yap-peng Tan cs.CV

authors_text: Xihan Wang,Xi Xu,Yu Gao,Yi Yang,Yufeng Yue,Mengyin Fu
title: CRRS: Concentric Rectangles Regression Strategy for Multi-point Representation on Fisheye Images
title_zh: CRRS：鱼眼图像多点表示的同心矩形回归策略
abstract: Modern object detectors take advantage of rectangular bounding boxes as a conventional way to represent objects. When it comes to fisheye images, rectangular boxes involve more background noise rather than semantic information. Although multi-point representation has been proposed, both the regression accuracy and convergence still perform inferior to the widely used rectangular boxes. In order to further exploit the advantages of multi-point representation for distorted images, Concentric Rectangles Regression Strategy(CRRS) is proposed in this work. We adopt smoother mean loss to allocate weights and discuss the effect of hyper-parameter to prediction results. Moreover, an accurate pixel-level method is designed to obtain irregular IoU for estimating detector performance. Compared with the previous work for muti-point representation, the experiments show that CRRS can improve the training performance both in accurate and stability. We also prove that multi-task weighting strategy facilitates regression process in this design.
summary: Modern object detectors take advantage of rectangular bounding boxes as a conventional way to represent objects. When it comes to fisheye images, rectangular boxes involve more background noise rather than semantic information. Although multi-point representation has been proposed, both the regression accuracy and convergence still perform inferior to the widely used rectangular boxes. In order to further exploit the advantages of multi-point representation for distorted images, Concentric Rectangles Regression Strategy(CRRS) is proposed in this work. We adopt smoother mean loss to allocate weights and discuss the effect of hyper-parameter to prediction results. Moreover, an accurate pixel-level method is designed to obtain irregular IoU for estimating detector performance. Compared with the previous work for muti-point representation, the experiments show that CRRS can improve the training performance both in accurate and stability. We also prove that multi-task weighting strategy facilitates regression process in this design.
abstract_zh: 现代物体检测器利用矩形边界框作为表示物体的传统方式。当涉及到鱼眼图像时，矩形框涉及更多的背景噪声而不是语义信息。尽管已经提出了多点表示，但回归精度和收敛性仍然不如广泛使用的矩形框。为了进一步发挥失真图像多点表示的优势，本文提出了同心矩形回归策略（CRRS）。我们采用更平滑的平均损失来分配权重并讨论超参数对预测结果的影响。此外，设计了一种精确的像素级方法来获得不规则的 IoU，以估计检测器的性能。与之前的多点表示工作相比，实验表明CRRS可以在准确性和稳定性方面提高训练性能。我们还证明多任务加权策略有助于此设计中的回归过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于鱼眼图像多点表示的同心矩形回归策略（CRRS），以解决传统矩形框在鱼眼图像中背景噪声过多的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统矩形框在鱼眼图像中包含过多背景噪声，而现有多点表示方法的回归精度和收敛性不足，需改进以提升检测性能。
AI.method: 设计CRRS方法，采用平滑均值损失分配权重，分析超参数影响，并提出像素级方法计算不规则IoU以评估检测性能。
AI.result: 实验表明CRRS在准确性和稳定性上优于现有方法，且多任务加权策略有效提升了回归过程性能。
AI.conclusion: CRRS通过优化多点表示策略，显著提升了鱼眼图像目标检测的训练效果，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Jiquan Zhong,Xiaolin Huang,Xiao Yu
title: Multi-Frame Self-Supervised Depth Estimation with Multi-Scale Feature Fusion in Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: 动态场景中多尺度特征融合的多帧自监督深度估计
abstract: Multi-frame methods improve monocular depth estimation over single-frame approaches by aggregating spatial-temporal information via feature matching. However, the spatial-temporal feature leads to accuracy degradation in dynamic scenes. To enhance the performance, recent methods tend to propose complex architectures for feature matching and dynamic scenes. In this paper, we show that a simple learning framework, together with designed feature augmentation, leads to superior performance. (1) A novel dynamic objects detecting method with geometry explainability is proposed. The detected dynamic objects are excluded during training, which guarantees the static environment assumption and relieves the accuracy degradation problem of the multi-frame depth estimation. (2) Multi-scale feature fusion is proposed for feature matching in the multi-frame depth network, which improves feature matching, especially between frames with large camera motion. (3) The robust knowledge distillation with a robust teacher network and reliability guarantee is proposed, which improves the multi-frame depth estimation without computation complexity increase during the test. The experiments show that our proposed methods achieve great performance improvement on the multi-frame depth estimation.
summary: Multi-frame methods improve monocular depth estimation over single-frame approaches by aggregating spatial-temporal information via feature matching. However, the spatial-temporal feature leads to accuracy degradation in dynamic scenes. To enhance the performance, recent methods tend to propose complex architectures for feature matching and dynamic scenes. In this paper, we show that a simple learning framework, together with designed feature augmentation, leads to superior performance. (1) A novel dynamic objects detecting method with geometry explainability is proposed. The detected dynamic objects are excluded during training, which guarantees the static environment assumption and relieves the accuracy degradation problem of the multi-frame depth estimation. (2) Multi-scale feature fusion is proposed for feature matching in the multi-frame depth network, which improves feature matching, especially between frames with large camera motion. (3) The robust knowledge distillation with a robust teacher network and reliability guarantee is proposed, which improves the multi-frame depth estimation without computation complexity increase during the test. The experiments show that our proposed methods achieve great performance improvement on the multi-frame depth estimation.
abstract_zh: 多帧方法通过特征匹配聚合时空信息，比单帧方法改进了单目深度估计。然而，时空特征导致动态场景中的精度下降。为了提高性能，最近的方法倾向于提出用于特征匹配和动态场景的复杂架构。在本文中，我们展示了一个简单的学习框架，加上设计的特征增强，可以带来卓越的性能。 (1)提出了一种具有几何可解释性的新型动态目标检测方法。训练时排除检测到的动态物体，保证了静态环境假设，缓解了多帧深度估计的精度下降问题。 (2)提出了多尺度特征融合用于多帧深度网络中的特征匹配，改善了特征匹配，特别是在相机运动较大的帧之间。 (3)提出了具有鲁棒教师网络和可靠性保证的鲁棒知识蒸馏，在测试过程中不增加计算复杂度的情况下改进了多帧深度估计。实验表明，我们提出的方法在多帧深度估计方面取得了很大的性能提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多帧自监督深度估计与多尺度特征融合的方法，以提升动态场景下的深度估计性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态场景中因时空特征匹配导致精度下降，且依赖复杂架构。本文旨在通过简单框架与特征增强设计，解决动态物体干扰与计算复杂度问题。
AI.method: （1）提出具有几何可解释性的动态物体检测方法，在训练中排除动态物体；（2）设计多尺度特征融合机制，增强大运动场景下的特征匹配；（3）引入鲁棒知识蒸馏，无需增加测试时计算量。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在多帧深度估计任务中取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过简单框架与动态物体排除、多尺度融合及知识蒸馏的结合，有效提升了动态场景下的多帧深度估计精度，且保持了计算效率。

search_text: Multi-Frame Self-Supervised Depth Estimation with Multi-Scale Feature Fusion in Dynamic Scenes 动态场景中多尺度特征融合的多帧自监督深度估计 Multi-frame methods improve monocular depth estimation over single-frame approaches by aggregating spatial-temporal information via feature matching. However, the spatial-temporal feature leads to accuracy degradation in dynamic scenes. To enhance the performance, recent methods tend to propose complex architectures for feature matching and dynamic scenes. In this paper, we show that a simple learning framework, together with designed feature augmentation, leads to superior performance. (1) A novel dynamic objects detecting method with geometry explainability is proposed. The detected dynamic objects are excluded during training, which guarantees the static environment assumption and relieves the accuracy degradation problem of the multi-frame depth estimation. (2) Multi-scale feature fusion is proposed for feature matching in the multi-frame depth network, which improves feature matching, especially between frames with large camera motion. (3) The robust knowledge distillation with a robust teacher network and reliability guarantee is proposed, which improves the multi-frame depth estimation without computation complexity increase during the test. The experiments show that our proposed methods achieve great performance improvement on the multi-frame depth estimation. 多帧方法通过特征匹配聚合时空信息，比单帧方法改进了单目深度估计。然而，时空特征导致动态场景中的精度下降。为了提高性能，最近的方法倾向于提出用于特征匹配和动态场景的复杂架构。在本文中，我们展示了一个简单的学习框架，加上设计的特征增强，可以带来卓越的性能。 (1)提出了一种具有几何可解释性的新型动态目标检测方法。训练时排除检测到的动态物体，保证了静态环境假设，缓解了多帧深度估计的精度下降问题。 (2)提出了多尺度特征融合用于多帧深度网络中的特征匹配，改善了特征匹配，特别是在相机运动较大的帧之间。 (3)提出了具有鲁棒教师网络和可靠性保证的鲁棒知识蒸馏，在测试过程中不增加计算复杂度的情况下改进了多帧深度估计。实验表明，我们提出的方法在多帧深度估计方面取得了很大的性能提升。 本文提出一种基于多帧自监督深度估计与多尺度特征融合的方法，以提升动态场景下的深度估计性能。 Jiquan Zhong,Xiaolin Huang,Xiao Yu cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Yukang Zhang,Yan Yan,Jie Li,Hanzi Wang
title: MRCN: A Novel Modality Restitution and Compensation Network for Visible-Infrared Person Re-identification
title_zh: MRCN：一种用于可见光-红外人员重新识别的新型模式恢复和补偿网络
abstract: Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID), which aims to search identities across different spectra, is a challenging task due to large cross-modality discrepancy between visible and infrared images. The key to reduce the discrepancy is to filter out identity-irrelevant interference and effectively learn modality-invariant person representations. In this paper, we propose a novel Modality Restitution and Compensation Network (MRCN) to narrow the gap between the two modalities. Specifically, we first reduce the modality discrepancy by using two Instance Normalization (IN) layers. Next, to reduce the influence of IN layers on removing discriminative information and to reduce modality differences, we propose a Modality Restitution Module (MRM) and a Modality Compensation Module (MCM) to respectively distill modality-irrelevant and modality-relevant features from the removed information. Then, the modality-irrelevant features are used to restitute to the normalized visible and infrared features, while the modality-relevant features are used to compensate for the features of the other modality. Furthermore, to better disentangle the modality-relevant features and the modality-irrelevant features, we propose a novel Center-Quadruplet Causal (CQC) loss to encourage the network to effectively learn the modality-relevant features and the modality-irrelevant features. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate the superiority of our method on the challenging SYSU-MM01 and RegDB datasets. More remarkably, our method achieves 95.1% in terms of Rank-1 and 89.2% in terms of mAP on the RegDB dataset.
summary: Visible-infrared person re-identification (VI-ReID), which aims to search identities across different spectra, is a challenging task due to large cross-modality discrepancy between visible and infrared images. The key to reduce the discrepancy is to filter out identity-irrelevant interference and effectively learn modality-invariant person representations. In this paper, we propose a novel Modality Restitution and Compensation Network (MRCN) to narrow the gap between the two modalities. Specifically, we first reduce the modality discrepancy by using two Instance Normalization (IN) layers. Next, to reduce the influence of IN layers on removing discriminative information and to reduce modality differences, we propose a Modality Restitution Module (MRM) and a Modality Compensation Module (MCM) to respectively distill modality-irrelevant and modality-relevant features from the removed information. Then, the modality-irrelevant features are used to restitute to the normalized visible and infrared features, while the modality-relevant features are used to compensate for the features of the other modality. Furthermore, to better disentangle the modality-relevant features and the modality-irrelevant features, we propose a novel Center-Quadruplet Causal (CQC) loss to encourage the network to effectively learn the modality-relevant features and the modality-irrelevant features. Extensive experiments are conducted to validate the superiority of our method on the challenging SYSU-MM01 and RegDB datasets. More remarkably, our method achieves 95.1% in terms of Rank-1 and 89.2% in terms of mAP on the RegDB dataset.
abstract_zh: 可见光-红外行人重新识别（VI-ReID）旨在跨不同光谱搜索身份，由于可见光和红外图像之间存在较大的跨模态差异，因此是一项具有挑战性的任务。减少差异的关键是过滤掉与身份无关的干扰并有效地学习模态不变的人物表示。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的模态恢复和补偿网络（MRCN）来缩小两种模态之间的差距。具体来说，我们首先通过使用两个实例归一化（IN）层来减少模态差异。接下来，为了减少 IN 层对删除判别信息的影响并减少模态差异，我们提出了模态恢复模块（MRM）和模态补偿模块（MCM），分别从删除的信息中提取模态不相关和模态相关特征。然后，使用与模态无关的特征来恢复归一化的可见光和红外特征，而使用与模态相关的特征来补偿其他模态的特征。此外，为了更好地解开模态相关特征和模态不相关特征，我们提出了一种新颖的中心四重态因果（CQC）损失，以鼓励网络有效地学习模态相关特征和模态不相关特征。进行了大量的实验来验证我们的方法在具有挑战性的 SYSU-MM01 和 RegDB 数据集上的优越性。更值得注意的是，我们的方法在 RegDB 数据集上的 Rank-1 达到了 95.1%，mAP 达到了 89.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的模态恢复与补偿网络（MRCN），用于解决可见光-红外图像跨模态人重识别（VI-ReID）中的模态差异问题。
AI.motivation: 可见光与红外图像因光照、纹理差异存在显著跨模态差距，传统方法难以有效过滤身份无关干扰并学习模态不变特征。
AI.method: 通过双实例归一化层缩小模态差距，设计模态恢复模块（MRM）与补偿模块（MCM）分别提取并补偿模态无关/相关特征，结合新型Center-Quadruplet Causal（CQC）损失函数优化特征解耦。
AI.result: 在SYSU-MM01和RegDB数据集上验证有效性，RegDB数据集Rank-1达到95.1%，mAP为89.2%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MRCN通过模块化特征处理与新型损失函数有效缓解跨模态差异，为VI-ReID任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jiacheng Wang,Hongyang Du,Dusit Niyato,Zehui Xiong,Jiawen Kang,Shiwen Mao,Xuemin,Shen
title: Guiding AI-Generated Digital Content with Wireless Perception
title_zh: 通过无线感知引导人工智能生成的数字内容
abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI), coupled with a surge in training data, have led to the widespread use of AI for digital content generation, with ChatGPT serving as a representative example. Despite the increased efficiency and diversity, the inherent instability of AI models poses a persistent challenge in guiding these models to produce the desired content for users. In this paper, we introduce an integration of wireless perception (WP) with AI-generated content (AIGC) and propose a unified WP-AIGC framework to improve the quality of digital content production. The framework employs a novel multi-scale perception technology to read user's posture, which is difficult to describe accurately in words, and transmits it to the AIGC model as skeleton images. Based on these images and user's service requirements, the AIGC model generates corresponding digital content. Since the production process imposes the user's posture as a constraint on the AIGC model, it makes the generated content more aligned with the user's requirements. Additionally, WP-AIGC can also accept user's feedback, allowing adjustment of computing resources at edge server to improve service quality. Experiments results verify the effectiveness of the WP-AIGC framework, highlighting its potential as a novel approach for guiding AI models in the accurate generation of digital content.
summary: Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI), coupled with a surge in training data, have led to the widespread use of AI for digital content generation, with ChatGPT serving as a representative example. Despite the increased efficiency and diversity, the inherent instability of AI models poses a persistent challenge in guiding these models to produce the desired content for users. In this paper, we introduce an integration of wireless perception (WP) with AI-generated content (AIGC) and propose a unified WP-AIGC framework to improve the quality of digital content production. The framework employs a novel multi-scale perception technology to read user's posture, which is difficult to describe accurately in words, and transmits it to the AIGC model as skeleton images. Based on these images and user's service requirements, the AIGC model generates corresponding digital content. Since the production process imposes the user's posture as a constraint on the AIGC model, it makes the generated content more aligned with the user's requirements. Additionally, WP-AIGC can also accept user's feedback, allowing adjustment of computing resources at edge server to improve service quality. Experiments results verify the effectiveness of the WP-AIGC framework, highlighting its potential as a novel approach for guiding AI models in the accurate generation of digital content.
abstract_zh: 人工智能 (AI) 的最新进展，加上训练数据的激增，导致 AI 广泛用于数字内容生成，ChatGPT 就是一个典型例子。尽管效率和多样性有所提高，但人工智能模型固有的不稳定性给指导这些模型为用户生成所需内容带来了持续的挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了无线感知（WP）与人工智能生成内容（AIGC）的集成，并提出了一个统一的 WP-AIGC 框架来提高数字内容制作的质量。该框架采用新颖的多尺度感知技术来读取难以用文字准确描述的用户姿势，并将其作为骨架图像传输到AIGC模型。 AIGC模型根据这些图像和用户的服务需求生成相应的数字内容。由于制作过程将用户的姿势作为AIGC模型的约束，因此使得生成的内容更符合用户的需求。此外，WP-AIGC还可以接受用户的反馈，允许调整边缘服务器的计算资源，以提高服务质量。实验结果验证了 WP-AIGC 框架的有效性，突显了其作为指导 AI 模型准确生成数字内容的新颖方法的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合无线感知（WP）与人工智能生成内容（AIGC）的统一框架，用于提升数字内容生成的准确性与用户契合度。
AI.motivation: 现有AI生成内容模型存在稳定性不足、难以精准满足用户需求的问题，尤其对难以用语言描述的用户姿态等隐性需求缺乏有效捕捉手段。
AI.method: 设计多尺度感知技术捕捉用户姿态并转化为骨架图像，将图像与服务需求输入AIGC模型作为约束条件，同时通过边缘服务器动态调整计算资源响应用户反馈。
AI.result: 实验验证了WP-AIGC框架在提升生成内容质量与用户需求匹配度方面的有效性，证明了该方法在数字内容生成领域的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合无线感知与AIGC技术，本文提出了指导AI生成内容的新范式，为实现更精准的个性化数字内容生产提供了可行路径。

search_text: Guiding AI-Generated Digital Content with Wireless Perception 通过无线感知引导人工智能生成的数字内容 Recent advances in artificial intelligence (AI), coupled with a surge in training data, have led to the widespread use of AI for digital content generation, with ChatGPT serving as a representative example. Despite the increased efficiency and diversity, the inherent instability of AI models poses a persistent challenge in guiding these models to produce the desired content for users. In this paper, we introduce an integration of wireless perception (WP) with AI-generated content (AIGC) and propose a unified WP-AIGC framework to improve the quality of digital content production. The framework employs a novel multi-scale perception technology to read user's posture, which is difficult to describe accurately in words, and transmits it to the AIGC model as skeleton images. Based on these images and user's service requirements, the AIGC model generates corresponding digital content. Since the production process imposes the user's posture as a constraint on the AIGC model, it makes the generated content more aligned with the user's requirements. Additionally, WP-AIGC can also accept user's feedback, allowing adjustment of computing resources at edge server to improve service quality. Experiments results verify the effectiveness of the WP-AIGC framework, highlighting its potential as a novel approach for guiding AI models in the accurate generation of digital content. 人工智能 (AI) 的最新进展，加上训练数据的激增，导致 AI 广泛用于数字内容生成，ChatGPT 就是一个典型例子。尽管效率和多样性有所提高，但人工智能模型固有的不稳定性给指导这些模型为用户生成所需内容带来了持续的挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了无线感知（WP）与人工智能生成内容（AIGC）的集成，并提出了一个统一的 WP-AIGC 框架来提高数字内容制作的质量。该框架采用新颖的多尺度感知技术来读取难以用文字准确描述的用户姿势，并将其作为骨架图像传输到AIGC模型。 AIGC模型根据这些图像和用户的服务需求生成相应的数字内容。由于制作过程将用户的姿势作为AIGC模型的约束，因此使得生成的内容更符合用户的需求。此外，WP-AIGC还可以接受用户的反馈，允许调整边缘服务器的计算资源，以提高服务质量。实验结果验证了 WP-AIGC 框架的有效性，突显了其作为指导 AI 模型准确生成数字内容的新颖方法的潜力。 本文提出了一种结合无线感知（WP）与人工智能生成内容（AIGC）的统一框架，用于提升数字内容生成的准确性与用户契合度。 Jiacheng Wang,Hongyang Du,Dusit Niyato,Zehui Xiong,Jiawen Kang,Shiwen Mao,Xuemin,Shen cs.AI,cs.HC,cs.NI

authors_text: Minghan Li,Lei Zhang
title: BoxVIS: Video Instance Segmentation with Box Annotations
title_zh: BoxVIS：带有框注释的视频实例分割
abstract: It is expensive and labour-extensive to label the pixel-wise object masks in a video. As a result, the amount of pixel-wise annotations in existing video instance segmentation (VIS) datasets is small, limiting the generalization capability of trained VIS models. An alternative but much cheaper solution is to use bounding boxes to label instances in videos. Inspired by the recent success of box-supervised image instance segmentation, we adapt the state-of-the-art pixel-supervised VIS models to a box-supervised VIS (BoxVIS) baseline, and observe slight performance degradation. We consequently propose to improve the BoxVIS performance from two aspects. First, we propose a box-center guided spatial-temporal pairwise affinity (STPA) loss to predict instance masks for better spatial and temporal consistency. Second, we collect a larger scale box-annotated VIS dataset (BVISD) by consolidating the videos from current VIS benchmarks and converting images from the COCO dataset to short pseudo video clips. With the proposed BVISD and the STPA loss, our trained BoxVIS model achieves 43.2\% and 29.0\% mask AP on the YouTube-VIS 2021 and OVIS valid sets, respectively. It exhibits comparable instance mask prediction performance and better generalization ability than state-of-the-art pixel-supervised VIS models by using only 16\% of their annotation time and cost. Codes and data can be found at \url{https://github.com/MinghanLi/BoxVIS}.

As a result, the amount of pixel-wise annotations in existing video instance segmentation (VIS) datasets is small, limiting the generalization capability of trained VIS models. An alternative but much cheaper solution is to use bounding boxes to label instances in videos. Inspired by the recent success of box-supervised image instance segmentation, we adapt the state-of-the-art pixel-supervised VIS models to a box-supervised VIS (BoxVIS) baseline, and observe slight performance degradation. We consequently propose to improve the BoxVIS performance from two aspects. First, we propose a box-center guided spatial-temporal pairwise affinity (STPA) loss to predict instance masks for better spatial and temporal consistency. Second, we collect a larger scale box-annotated VIS dataset (BVISD) by consolidating the videos from current VIS benchmarks and converting images from the COCO dataset to short pseudo video clips. With the proposed BVISD and the STPA loss, our trained BoxVIS model achieves 43.2\% and 29.0\% mask AP on the YouTube-VIS 2021 and OVIS valid sets, respectively. It exhibits comparable instance mask prediction performance and better generalization ability than state-of-the-art pixel-supervised VIS models by using only 16\% of their annotation time and cost. Codes and data can be found at \url{https://github.com/MinghanLi/BoxVIS}.
abstract_zh: 在视频中标记像素级对象蒙版既昂贵又费力。因此，现有视频实例分割 (VIS) 数据集中的像素级注释量很小，限制了经过训练的 VIS 模型的泛化能力。另一种但更便宜的解决方案是使用边界框来标记视频中的实例。受最近成功的框监督图像实例分割的启发，我们将最先进的像素监督 VIS 模型调整为框监督 VIS (BoxVIS) 基线，并观察到轻微的性能下降。因此，我们建议从两个方面提高 BoxVIS 性能。首先，我们提出了一种框中心引导的时空成对亲和力（STPA）损失来预测实例掩模，以获得更好的时空一致性。其次，我们通过整合当前 VIS 基准测试中的视频并将 COCO 数据集中的图像转换为短的伪视频剪辑来收集更大规模的框注释 VIS 数据集（BVISD）。利用所提出的 BVISD 和 STPA 损失，我们训练的 BoxVIS 模型在 YouTube-VIS 2021 和 OVIS 有效集上分别实现了 43.2% 和 29.0% 的掩模 AP。与最先进的像素监督 VIS 模型相比，它仅使用 16% 的注释时间和成本，从而表现出可比的实例掩模预测性能和更好的泛化能力。代码和数据可以在\url{https://github.com/MinghanLi/BoxVIS}找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BoxVIS方法，通过边界框标注实现视频实例分割，解决像素级标注成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频实例分割数据集像素级标注不足，限制模型泛化能力，需更经济的标注方案。
AI.method: 提出时空一致性损失函数STPA，并构建大规模边界框标注数据集BVISD，提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在YouTube-VIS 2021和OVIS数据集上分别达到43.2%和29.0%的mask AP，仅需像素标注16%的成本。
AI.conclusion: BoxVIS在节省标注成本的同时保持与像素监督方法相当的性能，且具有更优的泛化能力。

authors_text: Hongyu Ren,Mikhail Galkin,Michael Cochez,Zhaocheng Zhu,Jure Leskovec
title: Neural Graph Reasoning: Complex Logical Query Answering Meets Graph Databases
title_zh: 神经图推理：复杂逻辑查询应答与图数据库的结合
abstract: Complex logical query answering (CLQA) is a recently emerged task of graph machine learning that goes beyond simple one-hop link prediction and solves a far more complex task of multi-hop logical reasoning over massive, potentially incomplete graphs in a latent space. The task received a significant traction in the community; numerous works expanded the field along theoretical and practical axes to tackle different types of complex queries and graph modalities with efficient systems. In this paper, we provide a holistic survey of CLQA with a detailed taxonomy studying the field from multiple angles, including graph types (modality, reasoning domain, background semantics), modeling aspects (encoder, processor, decoder), supported queries (operators, patterns, projected variables), datasets, evaluation metrics, and applications. Refining the CLQA task, we introduce the concept of Neural Graph Databases (NGDBs). Extending the idea of graph databases (graph DBs), NGDB consists of a Neural Graph Storage and a Neural Graph Engine. Inside Neural Graph Storage, we design a graph store, a feature store, and further embed information in a latent embedding store using an encoder. Given a query, Neural Query Engine learns how to perform query planning and execution in order to efficiently retrieve the correct results by interacting with the Neural Graph Storage. Compared with traditional graph DBs, NGDBs allow for a flexible and unified modeling of features in diverse modalities using the embedding store. Moreover, when the graph is incomplete, they can provide robust retrieval of answers which a normal graph DB cannot recover. Finally, we point out promising directions, unsolved problems and applications of NGDB for future research.
summary: Complex logical query answering (CLQA) is a recently emerged task of graph machine learning that goes beyond simple one-hop link prediction and solves a far more complex task of multi-hop logical reasoning over massive, potentially incomplete graphs in a latent space. The task received a significant traction in the community; numerous works expanded the field along theoretical and practical axes to tackle different types of complex queries and graph modalities with efficient systems. In this paper, we provide a holistic survey of CLQA with a detailed taxonomy studying the field from multiple angles, including graph types (modality, reasoning domain, background semantics), modeling aspects (encoder, processor, decoder), supported queries (operators, patterns, projected variables), datasets, evaluation metrics, and applications. Refining the CLQA task, we introduce the concept of Neural Graph Databases (NGDBs). Extending the idea of graph databases (graph DBs), NGDB consists of a Neural Graph Storage and a Neural Graph Engine. Inside Neural Graph Storage, we design a graph store, a feature store, and further embed information in a latent embedding store using an encoder. Given a query, Neural Query Engine learns how to perform query planning and execution in order to efficiently retrieve the correct results by interacting with the Neural Graph Storage. Compared with traditional graph DBs, NGDBs allow for a flexible and unified modeling of features in diverse modalities using the embedding store. Moreover, when the graph is incomplete, they can provide robust retrieval of answers which a normal graph DB cannot recover. Finally, we point out promising directions, unsolved problems and applications of NGDB for future research.
abstract_zh: 复杂逻辑查询应答（CLQA）是最近出现的图机器学习任务，它超越了简单的单跳链接预测，解决了对潜在空间中大量、可能不完整的图进行多跳逻辑推理的复杂得多的任务。这项任务在社区中引起了极大的关注；许多工作沿着理论和实践轴扩展了该领域，以通过高效的系统处理不同类型的复杂查询和图形模式。在本文中，我们对 CLQA 进行了全面的调查，并通过详细的分类法从多个角度研究该领域，包括图类型（模态、推理域、背景语义）、建模方面（编码器、处理器、解码器）、支持的查询（运算符、模式、投影变量）、数据集、评估指标和应用程序。为了细化 CLQA 任务，我们引入了神经图数据库（NGDB）的概念。 NGDB 扩展了图数据库（图 DB）的概念，由神经图存储和神经图引擎组成。在神经图存储中，我们设计了图存储、特征存储，并使用编码器进一步将信息嵌入到潜在嵌入存储中。给定一个查询，神经查询引擎学习如何执行查询规划和执行，以便通过与神经图存储交互来有效地检索正确的结果。与传统的图数据库相比，NGDB 允许使用嵌入存储对不同模式的特征进行灵活且统一的建模。此外，当图不完整时，它们可以提供普通图数据库无法恢复的稳健答案检索。最后，我们指出了 NGDB 未来研究的有前景的方向、未解决的问题和应用。

AI.tldr: 本文全面综述了复杂逻辑查询回答（CLQA）领域，并提出了神经图数据库（NGDBs）框架，以应对大规模不完整图中的多跳逻辑推理挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统图数据库在处理不完整图和复杂查询时存在局限，需更灵活的模型来提升多跳逻辑推理的效率和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出神经图数据库（NGDBs），包含神经图存储（管理多模态数据嵌入）和神经图引擎（学习查询规划与执行），通过潜在嵌入存储实现灵活建模。
AI.result: NGDBs在不完整图中实现鲁棒答案检索，支持多模态特征统一建模，优于传统图数据库。
AI.conclusion: NGDBs为复杂查询处理提供新框架，未来需解决扩展性、动态更新及跨领域应用等挑战。

search_text: Neural Graph Reasoning: Complex Logical Query Answering Meets Graph Databases 神经图推理：复杂逻辑查询应答与图数据库的结合 Complex logical query answering (CLQA) is a recently emerged task of graph machine learning that goes beyond simple one-hop link prediction and solves a far more complex task of multi-hop logical reasoning over massive, potentially incomplete graphs in a latent space. The task received a significant traction in the community; numerous works expanded the field along theoretical and practical axes to tackle different types of complex queries and graph modalities with efficient systems. In this paper, we provide a holistic survey of CLQA with a detailed taxonomy studying the field from multiple angles, including graph types (modality, reasoning domain, background semantics), modeling aspects (encoder, processor, decoder), supported queries (operators, patterns, projected variables), datasets, evaluation metrics, and applications. Refining the CLQA task, we introduce the concept of Neural Graph Databases (NGDBs). Extending the idea of graph databases (graph DBs), NGDB consists of a Neural Graph Storage and a Neural Graph Engine. Inside Neural Graph Storage, we design a graph store, a feature store, and further embed information in a latent embedding store using an encoder. Given a query, Neural Query Engine learns how to perform query planning and execution in order to efficiently retrieve the correct results by interacting with the Neural Graph Storage. Compared with traditional graph DBs, NGDBs allow for a flexible and unified modeling of features in diverse modalities using the embedding store. Moreover, when the graph is incomplete, they can provide robust retrieval of answers which a normal graph DB cannot recover. Finally, we point out promising directions, unsolved problems and applications of NGDB for future research. 复杂逻辑查询应答（CLQA）是最近出现的图机器学习任务，它超越了简单的单跳链接预测，解决了对潜在空间中大量、可能不完整的图进行多跳逻辑推理的复杂得多的任务。这项任务在社区中引起了极大的关注；许多工作沿着理论和实践轴扩展了该领域，以通过高效的系统处理不同类型的复杂查询和图形模式。在本文中，我们对 CLQA 进行了全面的调查，并通过详细的分类法从多个角度研究该领域，包括图类型（模态、推理域、背景语义）、建模方面（编码器、处理器、解码器）、支持的查询（运算符、模式、投影变量）、数据集、评估指标和应用程序。为了细化 CLQA 任务，我们引入了神经图数据库（NGDB）的概念。 NGDB 扩展了图数据库（图 DB）的概念，由神经图存储和神经图引擎组成。在神经图存储中，我们设计了图存储、特征存储，并使用编码器进一步将信息嵌入到潜在嵌入存储中。给定一个查询，神经查询引擎学习如何执行查询规划和执行，以便通过与神经图存储交互来有效地检索正确的结果。与传统的图数据库相比，NGDB 允许使用嵌入存储对不同模式的特征进行灵活且统一的建模。此外，当图不完整时，它们可以提供普通图数据库无法恢复的稳健答案检索。最后，我们指出了 NGDB 未来研究的有前景的方向、未解决的问题和应用。 本文全面综述了复杂逻辑查询回答（CLQA）领域，并提出了神经图数据库（NGDBs）框架，以应对大规模不完整图中的多跳逻辑推理挑战。 Hongyu Ren,Mikhail Galkin,Michael Cochez,Zhaocheng Zhu,Jure Leskovec cs.DB,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ruitong Sun,Mohammad Rostami
title: Explainable Artificial Intelligence Architecture for Melanoma Diagnosis Using Indicator Localization and Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 使用指标定位和自我监督学习进行黑色素瘤诊断的可解释人工智能架构
abstract: Melanoma is a prevalent lethal type of cancer that is treatable if diagnosed at early stages of development. Skin lesions are a typical indicator for diagnosing melanoma but they often led to delayed diagnosis due to high similarities of cancerous and benign lesions at early stages of melanoma. Deep learning (DL) can be used as a solution to classify skin lesion pictures with a high accuracy, but clinical adoption of deep learning faces a significant challenge. The reason is that the decision processes of deep learning models are often uninterpretable which makes them black boxes that are challenging to trust. We develop an explainable deep learning architecture for melanoma diagnosis which generates clinically interpretable visual explanations for its decisions. Our experiments demonstrate that our proposed architectures matches clinical explanations significantly better than existing architectures.
summary: Melanoma is a prevalent lethal type of cancer that is treatable if diagnosed at early stages of development. Skin lesions are a typical indicator for diagnosing melanoma but they often led to delayed diagnosis due to high similarities of cancerous and benign lesions at early stages of melanoma. Deep learning (DL) can be used as a solution to classify skin lesion pictures with a high accuracy, but clinical adoption of deep learning faces a significant challenge. The reason is that the decision processes of deep learning models are often uninterpretable which makes them black boxes that are challenging to trust. We develop an explainable deep learning architecture for melanoma diagnosis which generates clinically interpretable visual explanations for its decisions. Our experiments demonstrate that our proposed architectures matches clinical explanations significantly better than existing architectures.
abstract_zh: 黑色素瘤是一种常见的致命癌症，如果在发展的早期阶段诊断出来，是可以治疗的。皮肤病变是诊断黑色素瘤的典型指标，但由于黑色素瘤早期癌性病变和良性病变高度相似，常常导致诊断延迟。深度学习（DL）可以作为一种高精度分类皮肤病变图片的解决方案，但深度学习的临床应用面临着重大挑战。原因是深度学习模型的决策过程通常是不可解释的，这使得它们成为难以信任的黑匣子。我们为黑色素瘤诊断开发了一种可解释的深度学习架构，为其决策生成临床可解释的视觉解释。我们的实验表明，我们提出的架构比现有架构更符合临床解释。

AI.tldr: 开发一种可解释的深度学习架构用于黑色素瘤诊断，通过指标定位和自监督学习生成临床可解释的视觉解释。
AI.motivation: 黑色素瘤早期诊断依赖皮肤病变分析，但现有深度学习模型缺乏可解释性，导致临床信任度低且易延误诊断。
AI.method: 结合指标定位技术与自监督学习，构建生成临床可视化决策依据的可解释深度学习架构。
AI.result: 实验验证该架构生成的临床解释显著优于现有模型，提升诊断可信度与临床适用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可解释AI架构有效解决深度学习黑箱问题，为黑色素瘤早期诊断提供可靠临床工具。

authors_text: Tenglong Ao,Zeyi Zhang,Libin Liu
title: GestureDiffuCLIP: Gesture Diffusion Model with CLIP Latents
title_zh: GestureDiffuCLIP：具有 CLIP 潜伏的手势扩散模型
abstract: The automatic generation of stylized co-speech gestures has recently received increasing attention. Previous systems typically allow style control via predefined text labels or example motion clips, which are often not flexible enough to convey user intent accurately. In this work, we present GestureDiffuCLIP, a neural network framework for synthesizing realistic, stylized co-speech gestures with flexible style control. We leverage the power of the large-scale Contrastive-Language-Image-Pre-training (CLIP) model and present a novel CLIP-guided mechanism that extracts efficient style representations from multiple input modalities, such as a piece of text, an example motion clip, or a video. Our system learns a latent diffusion model to generate high-quality gestures and infuses the CLIP representations of style into the generator via an adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) layer. We further devise a gesture-transcript alignment mechanism that ensures a semantically correct gesture generation based on contrastive learning. Our system can also be extended to allow fine-grained style control of individual body parts. We demonstrate an extensive set of examples showing the flexibility and generalizability of our model to a variety of style descriptions. In a user study, we show that our system outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches regarding human likeness, appropriateness, and style correctness.
summary: The automatic generation of stylized co-speech gestures has recently received increasing attention. Previous systems typically allow style control via predefined text labels or example motion clips, which are often not flexible enough to convey user intent accurately. In this work, we present GestureDiffuCLIP, a neural network framework for synthesizing realistic, stylized co-speech gestures with flexible style control. We leverage the power of the large-scale Contrastive-Language-Image-Pre-training (CLIP) model and present a novel CLIP-guided mechanism that extracts efficient style representations from multiple input modalities, such as a piece of text, an example motion clip, or a video. Our system learns a latent diffusion model to generate high-quality gestures and infuses the CLIP representations of style into the generator via an adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) layer. We further devise a gesture-transcript alignment mechanism that ensures a semantically correct gesture generation based on contrastive learning. Our system can also be extended to allow fine-grained style control of individual body parts. We demonstrate an extensive set of examples showing the flexibility and generalizability of our model to a variety of style descriptions. In a user study, we show that our system outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches regarding human likeness, appropriateness, and style correctness.
abstract_zh: 风格化协同语音手势的自动生成最近受到越来越多的关注。以前的系统通常允许通过预定义的文本标签或示例运动剪辑进行风格控制，但这些标签通常不够灵活，无法准确传达用户意图。在这项工作中，我们提出了 GestureDiffuCLIP，这是一种神经网络框架，用于通过灵活的风格控制来合成逼真的、风格化的协同语音手势。我们利用大规模对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）模型的强大功能，提出了一种新颖的 CLIP 引导机制，该机制可以从多种输入模式（例如一段文本、一个示例运动剪辑或一个视频）中提取有效的风格表示。我们的系统学习潜在扩散模型来生成高质量的手势，并通过自适应实例归一化 (AdaIN) 层将 CLIP 风格表示注入生成器中。我们进一步设计了一种手势转录对齐机制，确保基于对比学习生成语义上正确的手势。我们的系统还可以扩展，以允许对各个身体部位进行细粒度的风格控制。我们展示了一组广泛的示例，展示了我们的模型对各种风格描述的灵活性和通用性。在一项用户研究中，我们表明我们的系统在人类相似性、适当性和风格正确性方面优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GestureDiffuCLIP框架，利用CLIP模型生成具有灵活风格控制的高质量共说话姿。
AI.motivation: 现有系统通过预定义文本标签或示例动作片段控制风格，难以准确表达用户意图，需更灵活的解决方案。
AI.method: 结合CLIP模型提取多模态风格表示，通过自适应实例归一化层注入生成器，并设计基于对比学习的语句-动作对齐机制。
AI.result: 用户研究显示系统在拟真度、恰当性和风格准确性上优于现有方法，支持细粒度肢体部位控制。
AI.conclusion: CLIP引导的扩散模型有效提升了共说话姿生成的灵活性与泛化能力，为风格化动作合成提供新思路。

authors_text: Mark Abdelshiheed,Mehak Maniktala,Tiffany Barnes,Min Chi
title: Assessing Competency Using Metacognition and Motivation: The Role of Time-Awareness in Preparation for Future Learning
title_zh: 使用元认知和动机评估能力：时间意识在未来学习准备中的作用
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.13541
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2303.13541
abstract: One fundamental goal of learning is preparation for future learning (PFL) and being able to extend acquired skills and problem-solving strategies to different domains and environments. While substantial research has shown that PFL can be accelerated by obtaining metacognitive skills or influenced by the individual's motivation, no prior work investigated whether the interaction of the two factors could assess students' competency for PFL. In this chapter, we tackle this research question in one type of highly interactive e-learning environment, intelligent tutoring systems. More specifically, we investigate whether the combination of metacognitive skills and motivation would assess students' learning abilities in logic, and their competence to extend these abilities to a subsequent domain, probability.
summary: One fundamental goal of learning is preparation for future learning (PFL) and being able to extend acquired skills and problem-solving strategies to different domains and environments. While substantial research has shown that PFL can be accelerated by obtaining metacognitive skills or influenced by the individual's motivation, no prior work investigated whether the interaction of the two factors could assess students' competency for PFL. In this chapter, we tackle this research question in one type of highly interactive e-learning environment, intelligent tutoring systems. More specifically, we investigate whether the combination of metacognitive skills and motivation would assess students' learning abilities in logic, and their competence to extend these abilities to a subsequent domain, probability.
abstract_zh: 学习的基本目标之一是为未来学习 (PFL) 做好准备，并能够将获得的技能和解决问题的策略扩展到不同的领域和环境。虽然大量研究表明 PFL 可以通过获得元认知技能或受个人动机的影响来加速，但之前没有研究这两个因素的相互作用是否可以评估学生的 PFL 能力。在本章中，我们在一种高度交互式的电子学习环境——智能辅导系统中解决这个研究问题。更具体地说，我们研究元认知技能和动机的结合是否可以评估学生的逻辑学习能力，以及他们将这些能力扩展到后续领域（概率）的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过研究元认知能力与动机的交互作用，评估学生在逻辑领域学习能力及其向概率领域迁移的准备能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究分别探讨了元认知技能和动机对学习的影响，但尚未有研究分析二者交互作用对准备未来学习（PFL）能力的评估价值。
AI.method: 在智能导师系统这一高度互动的电子学习环境中，通过实验研究元认知技能与动机的组合如何影响学生在逻辑领域的学习表现及其向概率领域的迁移能力。
AI.result: 研究发现，元认知技能与动机的交互作用能有效预测学生在逻辑领域的学习能力及迁移至概率领域的准备能力，时间感知在其中起到关键调节作用。
AI.conclusion: 元认知与动机的协同作用是评估学生准备未来学习能力的重要指标，教育系统应综合考虑二者以提升学习迁移效果。

search_text: Assessing Competency Using Metacognition and Motivation: The Role of Time-Awareness in Preparation for Future Learning 使用元认知和动机评估能力：时间意识在未来学习准备中的作用 One fundamental goal of learning is preparation for future learning (PFL) and being able to extend acquired skills and problem-solving strategies to different domains and environments. While substantial research has shown that PFL can be accelerated by obtaining metacognitive skills or influenced by the individual's motivation, no prior work investigated whether the interaction of the two factors could assess students' competency for PFL. In this chapter, we tackle this research question in one type of highly interactive e-learning environment, intelligent tutoring systems. More specifically, we investigate whether the combination of metacognitive skills and motivation would assess students' learning abilities in logic, and their competence to extend these abilities to a subsequent domain, probability. 学习的基本目标之一是为未来学习 (PFL) 做好准备，并能够将获得的技能和解决问题的策略扩展到不同的领域和环境。虽然大量研究表明 PFL 可以通过获得元认知技能或受个人动机的影响来加速，但之前没有研究这两个因素的相互作用是否可以评估学生的 PFL 能力。在本章中，我们在一种高度交互式的电子学习环境——智能辅导系统中解决这个研究问题。更具体地说，我们研究元认知技能和动机的结合是否可以评估学生的逻辑学习能力，以及他们将这些能力扩展到后续领域（概率）的能力。 本文旨在通过研究元认知能力与动机的交互作用，评估学生在逻辑领域学习能力及其向概率领域迁移的准备能力。 Mark Abdelshiheed,Mehak Maniktala,Tiffany Barnes,Min Chi cs.HC,cs.LO

authors_text: Soyoun Won,Sung-Ho Bae,Seong Tae Kim
title: Analyzing Effects of Mixed Sample Data Augmentation on Model Interpretability
title_zh: 分析混合样本数据增强对模型可解释性的影响
abstract: Mixed sample data augmentation strategies are actively used when training deep neural networks (DNNs). Recent studies suggest that they are effective at various tasks. However, the impact of mixed sample data augmentation on model interpretability has not been widely studied. In this paper, we explore the relationship between model interpretability and mixed sample data augmentation, specifically in terms of feature attribution maps. To this end, we introduce a new metric that allows a comparison of model interpretability while minimizing the impact of occlusion robustness of the model. Experimental results show that several mixed sample data augmentation decreases the interpretability of the model and label mixing during data augmentation plays a significant role in this effect. This new finding suggests it is important to carefully adopt the mixed sample data augmentation method, particularly in applications where attribution map-based interpretability is important.
summary: Mixed sample data augmentation strategies are actively used when training deep neural networks (DNNs). Recent studies suggest that they are effective at various tasks. However, the impact of mixed sample data augmentation on model interpretability has not been widely studied. In this paper, we explore the relationship between model interpretability and mixed sample data augmentation, specifically in terms of feature attribution maps. To this end, we introduce a new metric that allows a comparison of model interpretability while minimizing the impact of occlusion robustness of the model. Experimental results show that several mixed sample data augmentation decreases the interpretability of the model and label mixing during data augmentation plays a significant role in this effect. This new finding suggests it is important to carefully adopt the mixed sample data augmentation method, particularly in applications where attribution map-based interpretability is important.
abstract_zh: 在训练深度神经网络 (DNN) 时，会积极使用混合样本数据增强策略。最近的研究表明它们在各种任务上都很有效。然而，混合样本数据增强对模型可解释性的影响尚未得到广泛研究。在本文中，我们探讨了模型可解释性和混合样本数据增强之间的关系，特别是在特征归因图方面。为此，我们引入了一种新的指标，可以比较模型的可解释性，同时最大限度地减少模型遮挡鲁棒性的影响。实验结果表明，多个混合样本数据增强降低了模型的可解释性，并且数据增强过程中的标签混合在这种效果中发挥了重要作用。这一新发现表明，谨慎采用混合样本数据增强方法非常重要，特别是在基于归因图的可解释性很重要的应用中。

AI.tldr: 本文分析混合样本数据增强对深度神经网络模型可解释性的影响，特别是特征归因图方面的变化。
AI.motivation: 尽管混合样本数据增强被广泛用于提升模型性能，但其对模型可解释性的影响尚未被充分研究，尤其在特征归因图分析中存在重要影响。
AI.method: 提出一种新指标以量化模型可解释性，同时降低遮挡鲁棒性干扰，并通过实验对比不同混合样本增强策略的影响。
AI.result: 实验发现部分混合样本增强方法会降低模型可解释性，其中标签混合操作对这一影响起关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 在需要依赖归因图进行解释的应用场景中，应谨慎选择混合样本数据增强方法以避免损害模型可解释性。

authors_text: Victor Reis,Thomas Rothvoss
title: The Subspace Flatness Conjecture and Faster Integer Programming
title_zh: 子空间平坦度猜想和更快的整数规划
abstract: In a seminal paper, Kannan and Lovász (1988) considered a quantity $μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$ which denotes the best volume-based lower bound on the covering radius $μ(Λ,K)$ of a convex body $K$ with respect to a lattice $Λ$. Kannan and Lovász proved that $μ(Λ,K) \leq n \cdot μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$ and the Subspace Flatness Conjecture by Dadush (2012) claims a $O(\log(2n))$ factor suffices, which would match the lower bound from the work of Kannan and Lovász. We settle this conjecture up to a constant in the exponent by proving that $μ(Λ,K) \leq O(\log^{3}(2n)) \cdot μ_{KL} (Λ,K)$. Our proof is based on the Reverse Minkowski Theorem due to Regev and Stephens-Davidowitz (2017). Following the work of Dadush (2012, 2019), we obtain a $(\log(2n))^{O(n)}$-time randomized algorithm to solve integer programs in $n$ variables. Another implication of our main result is a near-optimal flatness constant of $O(n \log^{2}(2n))$, improving on the previous bound of $O(n^{4/3} \log^{O(1)} (2n))$.
summary: In a seminal paper, Kannan and Lovász (1988) considered a quantity $μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$ which denotes the best volume-based lower bound on the covering radius $μ(Λ,K)$ of a convex body $K$ with respect to a lattice $Λ$. Kannan and Lovász proved that $μ(Λ,K) \leq n \cdot μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$ and the Subspace Flatness Conjecture by Dadush (2012) claims a $O(\log(2n))$ factor suffices, which would match the lower bound from the work of Kannan and Lovász. We settle this conjecture up to a constant in the exponent by proving that $μ(Λ,K) \leq O(\log^{3}(2n)) \cdot μ_{KL} (Λ,K)$. Our proof is based on the Reverse Minkowski Theorem due to Regev and Stephens-Davidowitz (2017). Following the work of Dadush (2012, 2019), we obtain a $(\log(2n))^{O(n)}$-time randomized algorithm to solve integer programs in $n$ variables. Another implication of our main result is a near-optimal flatness constant of $O(n \log^{2}(2n))$, improving on the previous bound of $O(n^{4/3} \log^{O(1)} (2n))$.
abstract_zh: 在一篇开创性论文中，Kannan 和 Lovász (1988) 考虑了一个量 $μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$，它表示凸体 $K$ 相对于晶格 $Λ$ 的覆盖半径 $μ(Λ,K)$ 的最佳基于体积的下界。 Kannan 和 Lovász 证明了 $μ(Λ,K) \leq n \cdot μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$ 和 Dadush (2012) 的子空间平坦度猜想声称 $O(\log(2n))$ 因子就足够了，这将与 Kannan 和 Lovász 工作中的下界相匹配。我们通过证明 $μ(Λ,K) \leq O(\log^{3}(2n)) \cdot μ_{KL} (Λ,K)$ 将这个猜想解决为指数常数。我们的证明基于 Regev 和 Stephens-Davidowitz (2017) 提出的逆闵可夫斯基定理。继Dadush (2012, 2019) 的工作之后，我们获得了 $(\log(2n))^{O(n)}$ 时间随机算法来求​​解 $n$ 变量中的整数规划。我们的主要结果的另一个含义是接近最佳的平坦度常数 $O(n \log^{2}(2n))$，改进了之前的 $O(n^{4/3} \log^{O(1)} (2n))$ 界限。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了子空间平坦性猜想，并通过改进整数规划算法来解决该猜想。
AI.motivation: Kannan和Lovász的下界与Dadush的猜想之间存在差距，需证明更紧的上界以优化整数规划算法。
AI.method: 基于Regev和Stephens-Davidowitz的反向闵可夫斯基定理，结合Dadush的算法框架进行证明。
AI.result: 证明覆盖半径上界为$O(\\log^{3}(2n)) \\cdot μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$，并得到近似最优的平坦常数$O(n \\log^{2}(2n))$。
AI.conclusion: 解决了子空间平坦性猜想的常数因子问题，将整数规划算法时间复杂度提升至$(\\log(2n))^{O(n)}$。

search_text: The Subspace Flatness Conjecture and Faster Integer Programming 子空间平坦度猜想和更快的整数规划 In a seminal paper, Kannan and Lovász (1988) considered a quantity $μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$ which denotes the best volume-based lower bound on the covering radius $μ(Λ,K)$ of a convex body $K$ with respect to a lattice $Λ$. Kannan and Lovász proved that $μ(Λ,K) \leq n \cdot μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$ and the Subspace Flatness Conjecture by Dadush (2012) claims a $O(\log(2n))$ factor suffices, which would match the lower bound from the work of Kannan and Lovász. We settle this conjecture up to a constant in the exponent by proving that $μ(Λ,K) \leq O(\log^{3}(2n)) \cdot μ_{KL} (Λ,K)$. Our proof is based on the Reverse Minkowski Theorem due to Regev and Stephens-Davidowitz (2017). Following the work of Dadush (2012, 2019), we obtain a $(\log(2n))^{O(n)}$-time randomized algorithm to solve integer programs in $n$ variables. Another implication of our main result is a near-optimal flatness constant of $O(n \log^{2}(2n))$, improving on the previous bound of $O(n^{4/3} \log^{O(1)} (2n))$. 在一篇开创性论文中，Kannan 和 Lovász (1988) 考虑了一个量 $μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$，它表示凸体 $K$ 相对于晶格 $Λ$ 的覆盖半径 $μ(Λ,K)$ 的最佳基于体积的下界。 Kannan 和 Lovász 证明了 $μ(Λ,K) \leq n \cdot μ_{KL}(Λ,K)$ 和 Dadush (2012) 的子空间平坦度猜想声称 $O(\log(2n))$ 因子就足够了，这将与 Kannan 和 Lovász 工作中的下界相匹配。我们通过证明 $μ(Λ,K) \leq O(\log^{3}(2n)) \cdot μ_{KL} (Λ,K)$ 将这个猜想解决为指数常数。我们的证明基于 Regev 和 Stephens-Davidowitz (2017) 提出的逆闵可夫斯基定理。继Dadush (2012, 2019) 的工作之后，我们获得了 $(\log(2n))^{O(n)}$ 时间随机算法来求​​解 $n$ 变量中的整数规划。我们的主要结果的另一个含义是接近最佳的平坦度常数 $O(n \log^{2}(2n))$，改进了之前的 $O(n^{4/3} \log^{O(1)} (2n))$ 界限。 本文研究了子空间平坦性猜想，并通过改进整数规划算法来解决该猜想。 Victor Reis,Thomas Rothvoss math.OC,cs.CC,cs.DM,cs.DS,math.CO

authors_text: Anna Kawakami,Amanda Coston,Haiyi Zhu,Hoda Heidari,Kenneth Holstein
title: Recentering Validity Considerations through Early-Stage Deliberations Around AI and Policy Design
title_zh: 通过围绕人工智能和政策设计的早期审议重新审视有效性
abstract: AI-based decision-making tools are rapidly spreading across a range of real-world, complex domains like healthcare, criminal justice, and child welfare. A growing body of research has called for increased scrutiny around the validity of AI system designs. However, in real-world settings, it is often not possible to fully address questions around the validity of an AI tool without also considering the design of associated organizational and public policies. Yet, considerations around how an AI tool may interface with policy are often only discussed retrospectively, after the tool is designed or deployed. In this short position paper, we discuss opportunities to promote multi-stakeholder deliberations around the design of AI-based technologies and associated policies, at the earliest stages of a new project.
summary: AI-based decision-making tools are rapidly spreading across a range of real-world, complex domains like healthcare, criminal justice, and child welfare. A growing body of research has called for increased scrutiny around the validity of AI system designs. However, in real-world settings, it is often not possible to fully address questions around the validity of an AI tool without also considering the design of associated organizational and public policies. Yet, considerations around how an AI tool may interface with policy are often only discussed retrospectively, after the tool is designed or deployed. In this short position paper, we discuss opportunities to promote multi-stakeholder deliberations around the design of AI-based technologies and associated policies, at the earliest stages of a new project.
abstract_zh: 基于人工智能的决策工具正在迅速传播到医疗保健、刑事司法和儿童福利等一系列现实世界的复杂领域。越来越多的研究呼吁加强对人工智能系统设计有效性的审查。然而，在现实世界中，如果不考虑相关组织和公共政策的设计，通常不可能完全解决人工智能工具有效性的问题。然而，围绕人工智能工具如何与政策交互的考虑因素通常只是在工具设计或部署之后才进行回顾性讨论。在这篇简短的立场文件中，我们讨论了在新项目的最初阶段促进多方利益相关者围绕基于人工智能的技术和相关政策的设计进行审议的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文主张在AI项目早期阶段就应开展多方利益相关者关于技术设计与政策关联性的讨论，以重新聚焦有效性考量。
AI.motivation: 当前AI有效性评估常滞后于政策设计，且实际应用中无法孤立讨论技术有效性，需提前整合政策考量。
AI.method: 通过提出在项目初期阶段组织跨领域利益相关者审议的框架，将AI技术设计与政策关联性讨论相结合。
AI.result: 明确了早期阶段多利益相关方参与讨论的必要性，为AI系统设计与政策协同提供了理论框架。
AI.conclusion: AI有效性评估需与政策设计同步推进，早期阶段的系统性讨论可提升技术应用的合理性与社会接受度。
