authors_text: Qiao Gu,Dongsub Shim,Florian Shkurti
title: Preserving Linear Separability in Continual Learning by Backward Feature Projection
title_zh: 通过向后特征投影在持续学习中保持线性可分离性
comment: CVPR 2023. The code can be found at https://github.com/rvl-lab-utoronto/BFP
comments: CVPR 2023. The code can be found at https://github.com/rvl-lab-utoronto/BFP
abstract: Catastrophic forgetting has been a major challenge in continual learning, where the model needs to learn new tasks with limited or no access to data from previously seen tasks. To tackle this challenge, methods based on knowledge distillation in feature space have been proposed and shown to reduce forgetting. However, most feature distillation methods directly constrain the new features to match the old ones, overlooking the need for plasticity. To achieve a better stability-plasticity trade-off, we propose Backward Feature Projection (BFP), a method for continual learning that allows the new features to change up to a learnable linear transformation of the old features. BFP preserves the linear separability of the old classes while allowing the emergence of new feature directions to accommodate new classes. BFP can be integrated with existing experience replay methods and boost performance by a significant margin. We also demonstrate that BFP helps learn a better representation space, in which linear separability is well preserved during continual learning and linear probing achieves high classification accuracy. The code can be found at https://github.com/rvl-lab-utoronto/BFP
summary: Catastrophic forgetting has been a major challenge in continual learning, where the model needs to learn new tasks with limited or no access to data from previously seen tasks. To tackle this challenge, methods based on knowledge distillation in feature space have been proposed and shown to reduce forgetting. However, most feature distillation methods directly constrain the new features to match the old ones, overlooking the need for plasticity. To achieve a better stability-plasticity trade-off, we propose Backward Feature Projection (BFP), a method for continual learning that allows the new features to change up to a learnable linear transformation of the old features. BFP preserves the linear separability of the old classes while allowing the emergence of new feature directions to accommodate new classes. BFP can be integrated with existing experience replay methods and boost performance by a significant margin. We also demonstrate that BFP helps learn a better representation space, in which linear separability is well preserved during continual learning and linear probing achieves high classification accuracy. The code can be found at https://github.com/rvl-lab-utoronto/BFP
abstract_zh: 灾难性遗忘一直是持续学习中的一个主要挑战，其中模型需要学习新任务，而对以前见过的任务的数据访问有限或无法访问。为了应对这一挑战，人们提出了基于特征空间知识蒸馏的方法，并证明可以减少遗忘。然而，大多数特征蒸馏方法直接约束新特征来匹配旧特征，忽略了可塑性的需要。为了实现更好的稳定性-可塑性权衡，我们提出了后向特征投影（BFP），这是一种持续学习的方法，允许新特征变为旧特征的可学习线性变换。 BFP 保留了旧类的线性可分离性，同时允许新特征方向的出现以适应新类。 BFP 可以与现有的经验重放方法集成，并显着提高性能。我们还证明，BFP 有助于学习更好的表示空间，其中在持续学习过程中很好地保留了线性可分离性，并且线性探测实现了较高的分类精度。代码可以在 https://github.com/rvl-lab-utoronto/BFP 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为向后特征投影（BFP）的方法，旨在持续学习中保持旧类线性可分性的同时适应新类。
AI.motivation: 现有特征蒸馏方法通过强制新特征匹配旧特征来缓解灾难性遗忘，但忽视了模型需要保持可塑性以适应新任务的需求，导致稳定性与可塑性难以平衡。
AI.method: BFP允许新特征在旧特征的可学习线性变换范围内变化，通过约束新特征空间中旧类的线性可分性，同时保留新类的特征方向扩展性。
AI.result: BFP可与经验回放方法结合显著提升性能，在持续学习过程中保持表示空间的线性可分性，且线性探测分类准确率较高。
AI.conclusion: BFP通过平衡稳定性与可塑性有效缓解灾难性遗忘，为持续学习提供了更优的特征表示方法。

authors_text: Hao Shi,Masato Mimura,Longbiao Wang,Jianwu Dang,Tatsuya Kawahara
title: Time-domain Speech Enhancement Assisted by Multi-resolution Frequency Encoder and Decoder
title_zh: 多分辨率频率编码器和解码器辅助的时域语音增强
abstract: Time-domain speech enhancement (SE) has recently been intensively investigated. Among recent works, DEMUCS introduces multi-resolution STFT loss to enhance performance. However, some resolutions used for STFT contain non-stationary signals, and it is challenging to learn multi-resolution frequency losses simultaneously with only one output. For better use of multi-resolution frequency information, we supplement multiple spectrograms in different frame lengths into the time-domain encoders. They extract stationary frequency information in both narrowband and wideband. We also adopt multiple decoder outputs, each of which computes its corresponding resolution frequency loss. Experimental results show that (1) it is more effective to fuse stationary frequency features than non-stationary features in the encoder, and (2) the multiple outputs consistent with the frequency loss improve performance. Experiments on the Voice-Bank dataset show that the proposed method obtained a 0.14 PESQ improvement.
summary: Time-domain speech enhancement (SE) has recently been intensively investigated. Among recent works, DEMUCS introduces multi-resolution STFT loss to enhance performance. However, some resolutions used for STFT contain non-stationary signals, and it is challenging to learn multi-resolution frequency losses simultaneously with only one output. For better use of multi-resolution frequency information, we supplement multiple spectrograms in different frame lengths into the time-domain encoders. They extract stationary frequency information in both narrowband and wideband. We also adopt multiple decoder outputs, each of which computes its corresponding resolution frequency loss. Experimental results show that (1) it is more effective to fuse stationary frequency features than non-stationary features in the encoder, and (2) the multiple outputs consistent with the frequency loss improve performance. Experiments on the Voice-Bank dataset show that the proposed method obtained a 0.14 PESQ improvement.
abstract_zh: 时域语音增强（SE）最近得到了深​​入研究。在最近的工作中，DEMUCS 引入了多分辨率 STFT 损失来增强性能。然而，STFT 使用的一些分辨率包含非平稳信号，仅用一个输出同时学习多分辨率频率损失具有挑战性。为了更好地利用多分辨率频率信息，我们将不同帧长度的多个频谱图补充到时域编码器中。它们提取窄带和宽带中的固定频率信息。我们还采用多个解码器输出，每个解码器输出计算其相应的分辨率频率损失。实验结果表明：（1）编码器中融合平稳频率特征比非平稳特征更有效，（2）与频率损失一致的多个输出提高了性能。在 Voice-Bank 数据集上的实验表明，该方法获得了 0.14 PESQ 的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多分辨率频域编码器和解码器的时间域语音增强方法，通过融合不同分辨率的频域信息提升语音增强效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如DEMUCS在处理多分辨率STFT损失时存在非平稳信号干扰和单一输出难以同时学习多分辨率频域损失的问题。
AI.method: 在时间域编码器中补充不同帧长的频谱图以提取窄带和宽带平稳频域特征，并采用多解码器输出分别计算对应分辨率的频域损失。
AI.result: 在Voice-Bank数据集上实现0.14的PESQ指标提升，验证了平稳频域特征融合与多输出结构的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多分辨率频域信息的合理利用及多输出结构设计能显著提升时间域语音增强性能。

search_text: Time-domain Speech Enhancement Assisted by Multi-resolution Frequency Encoder and Decoder 多分辨率频率编码器和解码器辅助的时域语音增强 Time-domain speech enhancement (SE) has recently been intensively investigated. Among recent works, DEMUCS introduces multi-resolution STFT loss to enhance performance. However, some resolutions used for STFT contain non-stationary signals, and it is challenging to learn multi-resolution frequency losses simultaneously with only one output. For better use of multi-resolution frequency information, we supplement multiple spectrograms in different frame lengths into the time-domain encoders. They extract stationary frequency information in both narrowband and wideband. We also adopt multiple decoder outputs, each of which computes its corresponding resolution frequency loss. Experimental results show that (1) it is more effective to fuse stationary frequency features than non-stationary features in the encoder, and (2) the multiple outputs consistent with the frequency loss improve performance. Experiments on the Voice-Bank dataset show that the proposed method obtained a 0.14 PESQ improvement. 时域语音增强（SE）最近得到了深​​入研究。在最近的工作中，DEMUCS 引入了多分辨率 STFT 损失来增强性能。然而，STFT 使用的一些分辨率包含非平稳信号，仅用一个输出同时学习多分辨率频率损失具有挑战性。为了更好地利用多分辨率频率信息，我们将不同帧长度的多个频谱图补充到时域编码器中。它们提取窄带和宽带中的固定频率信息。我们还采用多个解码器输出，每个解码器输出计算其相应的分辨率频率损失。实验结果表明：（1）编码器中融合平稳频率特征比非平稳特征更有效，（2）与频率损失一致的多个输出提高了性能。在 Voice-Bank 数据集上的实验表明，该方法获得了 0.14 PESQ 的改进。 本文提出一种基于多分辨率频域编码器和解码器的时间域语音增强方法，通过融合不同分辨率的频域信息提升语音增强效果。 Hao Shi,Masato Mimura,Longbiao Wang,Jianwu Dang,Tatsuya Kawahara cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Brad Windsor,Brandon O'Shea,Mengxi Wu
title: Exploring Novel Quality Diversity Methods For Generalization in Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 探索用于强化学习泛化的新颖质量多样性方法
abstract: The Reinforcement Learning field is strong on achievements and weak on reapplication; a computer playing GO at a super-human level is still terrible at Tic-Tac-Toe. This paper asks whether the method of training networks improves their generalization. Specifically we explore core quality diversity algorithms, compare against two recent algorithms, and propose a new algorithm to deal with shortcomings in existing methods. Although results of these methods are well below the performance hoped for, our work raises important points about the choice of behavior criterion in quality diversity, the interaction of differential and evolutionary training methods, and the role of offline reinforcement learning and randomized learning in evolutionary search.
summary: The Reinforcement Learning field is strong on achievements and weak on reapplication; a computer playing GO at a super-human level is still terrible at Tic-Tac-Toe. This paper asks whether the method of training networks improves their generalization. Specifically we explore core quality diversity algorithms, compare against two recent algorithms, and propose a new algorithm to deal with shortcomings in existing methods. Although results of these methods are well below the performance hoped for, our work raises important points about the choice of behavior criterion in quality diversity, the interaction of differential and evolutionary training methods, and the role of offline reinforcement learning and randomized learning in evolutionary search.
abstract_zh: 强化学习领域强成就，弱重应用；计算机在围棋方面的表现已经超越人类，但在井字棋方面仍然很糟糕。本文询问训练网络的方法是否提高了它们的泛化能力。具体来说，我们探索核心质量多样性算法，与两种最新算法进行比较，并提出一种新算法来解决现有方法的缺点。尽管这些方法的结果远低于预期的性能，但我们的工作提出了关于质量多样性中行为标准的选择、差异训练方法和进化训练方法的相互作用以及离线强化学习和随机学习在进化搜索中的作用的重要观点。

AI.tldr: 本文探索强化学习中提升泛化能力的新型质量多样性方法，比较现有算法并提出新算法以解决现有问题。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在特定任务上表现优异但泛化能力不足，需研究训练方法对泛化能力的影响。
AI.method: 比较核心质量多样性算法与两种最新算法，提出新算法以弥补现有方法缺陷。
AI.result: 实验结果未达预期性能，但揭示了行为准则选择、训练方法交互及离线学习的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 虽未实现理想效果，但指出了质量多样性研究中需关注的核心问题，为未来研究提供方向。

authors_text: Brad Windsor,Luke Martin,Anand Tyagi
title: SASS: Data and Methods for Subject Aware Sentence Simplification
title_zh: SASS：主题意识句子简化的数据和方法
abstract: Sentence simplification tends to focus on the generic simplification of sentences by making them more readable and easier to understand. This paper provides a dataset aimed at training models that perform subject aware sentence simplifications rather than simplifying sentences as a whole. We also test models on that dataset which are inspired by model architecture used in abstractive summarization. We hand generated portions of the data and augment the dataset by further manipulating those hand written simplifications. Our results show that data-augmentation, data-masking, and model architecture choices used in summarization provide a solid baseline for comparison on subject aware simplification.
summary: Sentence simplification tends to focus on the generic simplification of sentences by making them more readable and easier to understand. This paper provides a dataset aimed at training models that perform subject aware sentence simplifications rather than simplifying sentences as a whole. We also test models on that dataset which are inspired by model architecture used in abstractive summarization. We hand generated portions of the data and augment the dataset by further manipulating those hand written simplifications. Our results show that data-augmentation, data-masking, and model architecture choices used in summarization provide a solid baseline for comparison on subject aware simplification.
abstract_zh: 句子简化往往侧重于句子的一般简化，使句子更具可读性和更容易理解。本文提供了一个数据集，旨在训练模型，执行主题感知句子简化，而不是简化整个句子。我们还测试了该数据集上的模型，这些模型受到抽象摘要中使用的模型架构的启发。我们手工生成部分数据，并通过进一步操作这些手写的简化来扩充数据集。我们的结果表明，摘要中使用的数据增强、数据屏蔽和模型架构选择为主题感知简化的比较提供了坚实的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SASS数据集和方法，专注于训练模型进行主题感知的句子简化，而非整体简化。
AI.motivation: 传统句子简化方法侧重整体可读性，忽略句子主语信息，导致简化结果可能偏离上下文语义。
AI.method: 构建包含人工生成和数据增强的SASS数据集，采用摘要模型架构进行实验，结合数据掩码技术扩充数据。
AI.result: 数据增强、数据掩码及摘要模型架构为对比实验提供了有效基线，验证了方法可行性。
AI.conclusion: 主题感知简化需结合特定数据增强策略与模型结构，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Shuhong Chen,Kevin Zhang,Yichun Shi,Heng Wang,Yiheng Zhu,Guoxian Song,Sizhe An,Janus Kristjansson,Xiao Yang,Matthias Zwicker
title: PAniC-3D: Stylized Single-view 3D Reconstruction from Portraits of Anime Characters
title_zh: PANiC-3D：根据动漫人物肖像进行风格化单视图 3D 重建
abstract: We propose PAniC-3D, a system to reconstruct stylized 3D character heads directly from illustrated (p)ortraits of (ani)me (c)haracters. Our anime-style domain poses unique challenges to single-view reconstruction; compared to natural images of human heads, character portrait illustrations have hair and accessories with more complex and diverse geometry, and are shaded with non-photorealistic contour lines. In addition, there is a lack of both 3D model and portrait illustration data suitable to train and evaluate this ambiguous stylized reconstruction task. Facing these challenges, our proposed PAniC-3D architecture crosses the illustration-to-3D domain gap with a line-filling model, and represents sophisticated geometries with a volumetric radiance field. We train our system with two large new datasets (11.2k Vroid 3D models, 1k Vtuber portrait illustrations), and evaluate on a novel AnimeRecon benchmark of illustration-to-3D pairs. PAniC-3D significantly outperforms baseline methods, and provides data to establish the task of stylized reconstruction from portrait illustrations.
summary: We propose PAniC-3D, a system to reconstruct stylized 3D character heads directly from illustrated (p)ortraits of (ani)me (c)haracters. Our anime-style domain poses unique challenges to single-view reconstruction; compared to natural images of human heads, character portrait illustrations have hair and accessories with more complex and diverse geometry, and are shaded with non-photorealistic contour lines. In addition, there is a lack of both 3D model and portrait illustration data suitable to train and evaluate this ambiguous stylized reconstruction task. Facing these challenges, our proposed PAniC-3D architecture crosses the illustration-to-3D domain gap with a line-filling model, and represents sophisticated geometries with a volumetric radiance field. We train our system with two large new datasets (11.2k Vroid 3D models, 1k Vtuber portrait illustrations), and evaluate on a novel AnimeRecon benchmark of illustration-to-3D pairs. PAniC-3D significantly outperforms baseline methods, and provides data to establish the task of stylized reconstruction from portrait illustrations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 PAniC-3D，这是一种直接根据 (ani)me (c) 角色的插图 (p) 或特征重建风格化 3D 角色头部的系统。我们的动漫风格领域对单视图重建提出了独特的挑战；与自然的人头图像相比，人物肖像插画的头发和配饰的几何形状更加复杂多样，并且带有非真实感轮廓线的阴影。此外，缺乏适合训练和评估这种模糊风格化重建任务的 3D 模型和肖像插图数据。面对这些挑战，我们提出的 PAniC-3D 架构通过线填充模型跨越了插图到 3D 域的差距，并用体积辐射场表示复杂的几何形状。我们使用两个大型新数据集（11.2k Vroid 3D 模型、1k Vtuber 肖像插图）来训练我们的系统，并评估插图到 3D 对的新颖 AnimeRecon 基准。 PAniC-3D 显着优于基线方法，并提供数据来建立从肖像插图进行风格化重建的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAniC-3D系统，旨在从动漫角色肖像中直接重建风格化的3D角色头部。
AI.motivation: 动漫角色肖像具有复杂多样的发型、配饰及非写实轮廓线，且缺乏适合训练和评估的3D模型与肖像数据，导致单视角重建任务存在挑战。
AI.method: 通过线填充模型跨越插图到3D的领域差距，并利用体素辐射场表示复杂几何结构，结合两个大型新数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: PAniC-3D显著优于基线方法，并提供了建立风格化重建任务的数据基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了动漫肖像到3D重建的难题，为相关领域提供了新思路与数据支持。

search_text: PAniC-3D: Stylized Single-view 3D Reconstruction from Portraits of Anime Characters PANiC-3D：根据动漫人物肖像进行风格化单视图 3D 重建 We propose PAniC-3D, a system to reconstruct stylized 3D character heads directly from illustrated (p)ortraits of (ani)me (c)haracters. Our anime-style domain poses unique challenges to single-view reconstruction; compared to natural images of human heads, character portrait illustrations have hair and accessories with more complex and diverse geometry, and are shaded with non-photorealistic contour lines. In addition, there is a lack of both 3D model and portrait illustration data suitable to train and evaluate this ambiguous stylized reconstruction task. Facing these challenges, our proposed PAniC-3D architecture crosses the illustration-to-3D domain gap with a line-filling model, and represents sophisticated geometries with a volumetric radiance field. We train our system with two large new datasets (11.2k Vroid 3D models, 1k Vtuber portrait illustrations), and evaluate on a novel AnimeRecon benchmark of illustration-to-3D pairs. PAniC-3D significantly outperforms baseline methods, and provides data to establish the task of stylized reconstruction from portrait illustrations. 我们提出 PAniC-3D，这是一种直接根据 (ani)me (c) 角色的插图 (p) 或特征重建风格化 3D 角色头部的系统。我们的动漫风格领域对单视图重建提出了独特的挑战；与自然的人头图像相比，人物肖像插画的头发和配饰的几何形状更加复杂多样，并且带有非真实感轮廓线的阴影。此外，缺乏适合训练和评估这种模糊风格化重建任务的 3D 模型和肖像插图数据。面对这些挑战，我们提出的 PAniC-3D 架构通过线填充模型跨越了插图到 3D 域的差距，并用体积辐射场表示复杂的几何形状。我们使用两个大型新数据集（11.2k Vroid 3D 模型、1k Vtuber 肖像插图）来训练我们的系统，并评估插图到 3D 对的新颖 AnimeRecon 基准。 PAniC-3D 显着优于基线方法，并提供数据来建立从肖像插图进行风格化重建的任务。 本文提出PAniC-3D系统，旨在从动漫角色肖像中直接重建风格化的3D角色头部。 Shuhong Chen,Kevin Zhang,Yichun Shi,Heng Wang,Yiheng Zhu,Guoxian Song,Sizhe An,Janus Kristjansson,Xiao Yang,Matthias Zwicker cs.CV

authors_text: Yuqing Wang,Yizhi Wang,Longhui Yu,Yuesheng Zhu,Zhouhui Lian
title: DeepVecFont-v2: Exploiting Transformers to Synthesize Vector Fonts with Higher Quality
title_zh: DeepVecFont-v2：利用 Transformer 合成更高质量的矢量字体
abstract: Vector font synthesis is a challenging and ongoing problem in the fields of Computer Vision and Computer Graphics. The recently-proposed DeepVecFont achieved state-of-the-art performance by exploiting information of both the image and sequence modalities of vector fonts. However, it has limited capability for handling long sequence data and heavily relies on an image-guided outline refinement post-processing. Thus, vector glyphs synthesized by DeepVecFont still often contain some distortions and artifacts and cannot rival human-designed results. To address the above problems, this paper proposes an enhanced version of DeepVecFont mainly by making the following three novel technical contributions. First, we adopt Transformers instead of RNNs to process sequential data and design a relaxation representation for vector outlines, markedly improving the model's capability and stability of synthesizing long and complex outlines. Second, we propose to sample auxiliary points in addition to control points to precisely align the generated and target Bézier curves or lines. Finally, to alleviate error accumulation in the sequential generation process, we develop a context-based self-refinement module based on another Transformer-based decoder to remove artifacts in the initially synthesized glyphs. Both qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that the proposed method effectively resolves those intrinsic problems of the original DeepVecFont and outperforms existing approaches in generating English and Chinese vector fonts with complicated structures and diverse styles.
summary: Vector font synthesis is a challenging and ongoing problem in the fields of Computer Vision and Computer Graphics. The recently-proposed DeepVecFont achieved state-of-the-art performance by exploiting information of both the image and sequence modalities of vector fonts. However, it has limited capability for handling long sequence data and heavily relies on an image-guided outline refinement post-processing. Thus, vector glyphs synthesized by DeepVecFont still often contain some distortions and artifacts and cannot rival human-designed results. To address the above problems, this paper proposes an enhanced version of DeepVecFont mainly by making the following three novel technical contributions. First, we adopt Transformers instead of RNNs to process sequential data and design a relaxation representation for vector outlines, markedly improving the model's capability and stability of synthesizing long and complex outlines. Second, we propose to sample auxiliary points in addition to control points to precisely align the generated and target Bézier curves or lines. Finally, to alleviate error accumulation in the sequential generation process, we develop a context-based self-refinement module based on another Transformer-based decoder to remove artifacts in the initially synthesized glyphs. Both qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that the proposed method effectively resolves those intrinsic problems of the original DeepVecFont and outperforms existing approaches in generating English and Chinese vector fonts with complicated structures and diverse styles.
abstract_zh: 矢量字体合成是计算机视觉和计算机图形学领域中一个具有挑战性且持续存在的问题。最近提出的 DeepVecFont 通过利用矢量字体的图像和序列模态信息实现了最先进的性能。然而，它处理长序列数据的能力有限，并且严重依赖图像引导的轮廓细化后处理。因此，DeepVecFont 合成的矢量字形仍然经常包含一些扭曲和伪影，无法与人类设计的结果相媲美。针对上述问题，本文提出了 DeepVecFont 的增强版，主要做出了以下三个新颖的技术贡献。首先，我们采用 Transformer 代替 RNN 来处理序列数据，并设计矢量轮廓的松弛表示，显着提高了模型合成长且复杂轮廓的能力和稳定性。其次，我们建议除了控制点之外还对辅助点进行采样，以精确对齐生成的贝塞尔曲线或目标贝塞尔曲线或直线。最后，为了减轻顺序生成过程中的错误累积，我们基于另一个基于 Transformer 的解码器开发了一个基于上下文的自我细化模块，以消除最初合成的字形中的伪影。定性和定量结果都表明，该方法有效解决了原始 DeepVecFont 的内在问题，并且在生成结构复杂、风格多样的英文和中文矢量字体方面优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepVecFont-v2方法，利用Transformer模型提升向量字体合成质量，解决原有方法在长序列处理和细节生成上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有DeepVecFont方法在处理复杂长序列向量字体时存在稳定性不足、依赖图像引导后处理导致生成结果存在失真和伪影的问题，难以达到人工设计字体的水平。
AI.method: 提出三点改进：1）用Transformer替代RNN处理序列数据并设计松弛表示；2）引入辅助点采样对齐生成与目标贝塞尔曲线；3）开发基于Transformer的上下文自修正模块消除初始生成伪影。
AI.result: 定性定量实验表明，新方法在生成复杂结构的英文字体和汉字字体时显著优于现有方法，有效解决了原始模型的固有缺陷。
AI.conclusion: DeepVecFont-v2通过Transformer架构创新和多阶段优化机制，实现了更高质量的向量字体生成，为字体合成领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Phani Krishna Uppala,Abhishek Bamotra,Shriti Priya,Vaidehi Joshi
title: Learning video embedding space with Natural Language Supervision
title_zh: 使用自然语言监督学习视频嵌入空间
abstract: The recent success of the CLIP model has shown its potential to be applied to a wide range of vision and language tasks. However this only establishes embedding space relationship of language to images, not to the video domain. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to map video embedding space to natural langugage. We propose a two-stage approach that first extracts visual features from each frame of a video using a pre-trained CNN, and then uses the CLIP model to encode the visual features for the video domain, along with the corresponding text descriptions. We evaluate our method on two benchmark datasets, UCF101 and HMDB51, and achieve state-of-the-art performance on both tasks.
summary: The recent success of the CLIP model has shown its potential to be applied to a wide range of vision and language tasks. However this only establishes embedding space relationship of language to images, not to the video domain. In this paper, we propose a novel approach to map video embedding space to natural langugage. We propose a two-stage approach that first extracts visual features from each frame of a video using a pre-trained CNN, and then uses the CLIP model to encode the visual features for the video domain, along with the corresponding text descriptions. We evaluate our method on two benchmark datasets, UCF101 and HMDB51, and achieve state-of-the-art performance on both tasks.
abstract_zh: CLIP 模型最近的成功表明了其应用于广泛的视觉和语言任务的潜力。然而，这仅建立了语言与图像的嵌入空间关系，而不是与视频域的嵌入空间关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种将视频嵌入空间映射到自然语言的新颖方法。我们提出了一种两阶段方法，首先使用预先训练的 CNN 从视频的每一帧中提取视觉特征，然后使用 CLIP 模型对视频域的视觉特征以及相应的文本描述进行编码。我们在两个基准数据集 UCF101 和 HMDB51 上评估我们的方法，并在这两项任务上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自然语言监督的视频嵌入空间学习方法，将CLIP模型扩展至视频领域。
AI.motivation: CLIP模型虽能建立图像与语言的嵌入关系，但未覆盖视频领域，需探索视频与自然语言的对齐方法。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：首先用预训练CNN提取视频帧视觉特征，再结合CLIP模型对视频特征与文本描述进行联合编码。
AI.result: 在UCF101和HMDB51数据集上均取得当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效建立了视频与自然语言的嵌入空间关系，为视频-语言任务提供新思路。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法有效建立了视频与自然语言的嵌入空间关系，为视频-语言任务提供新思路。

authors_text: Dongyue Li,Huy L. Nguyen,Hongyang R. Zhang
title: Identification of Negative Transfers in Multitask Learning Using Surrogate Models
title_zh: 使用代理模型识别多任务学习中的负迁移
abstract: Multitask learning is widely used in practice to train a low-resource target task by augmenting it with multiple related source tasks. Yet, naively combining all the source tasks with a target task does not always improve the prediction performance for the target task due to negative transfers. Thus, a critical problem in multitask learning is identifying subsets of source tasks that would benefit the target task. This problem is computationally challenging since the number of subsets grows exponentially with the number of source tasks; efficient heuristics for subset selection do not always capture the relationship between task subsets and multitask learning performances. In this paper, we introduce an efficient procedure to address this problem via surrogate modeling. In surrogate modeling, we sample (random) subsets of source tasks and precompute their multitask learning performances. Then, we approximate the precomputed performances with a linear regression model that can also predict the multitask performance of unseen task subsets. We show theoretically and empirically that fitting this model only requires sampling linearly many subsets in the number of source tasks. The fitted model provides a relevance score between each source and target task. We use the relevance scores to perform subset selection for multitask learning by thresholding. Through extensive experiments, we show that our approach predicts negative transfers from multiple source tasks to target tasks much more accurately than existing task affinity measures. Additionally, we demonstrate that for several weak supervision datasets, our approach consistently improves upon existing optimization methods for multitask learning.
summary: Multitask learning is widely used in practice to train a low-resource target task by augmenting it with multiple related source tasks. Yet, naively combining all the source tasks with a target task does not always improve the prediction performance for the target task due to negative transfers. Thus, a critical problem in multitask learning is identifying subsets of source tasks that would benefit the target task. This problem is computationally challenging since the number of subsets grows exponentially with the number of source tasks; efficient heuristics for subset selection do not always capture the relationship between task subsets and multitask learning performances. In this paper, we introduce an efficient procedure to address this problem via surrogate modeling. In surrogate modeling, we sample (random) subsets of source tasks and precompute their multitask learning performances. Then, we approximate the precomputed performances with a linear regression model that can also predict the multitask performance of unseen task subsets. We show theoretically and empirically that fitting this model only requires sampling linearly many subsets in the number of source tasks. The fitted model provides a relevance score between each source and target task. We use the relevance scores to perform subset selection for multitask learning by thresholding. Through extensive experiments, we show that our approach predicts negative transfers from multiple source tasks to target tasks much more accurately than existing task affinity measures. Additionally, we demonstrate that for several weak supervision datasets, our approach consistently improves upon existing optimization methods for multitask learning.
abstract_zh: 多任务学习在实践中广泛用于通过使用多个相关源任务来增强低资源目标任务来训练它。然而，由于负迁移，将所有源任务与目标任务天真地组合并不总能提高目标任务的预测性能。因此，多任务学习中的一个关键问题是识别有利于目标任务的源任务子集。这个问题在计算上具有挑战性，因为子集的数量随着源任务的数量呈指数增长；用于子集选择的有效启发式并不总是能够捕获任务子集和多任务学习性能之间的关系。在本文中，我们介绍了一种通过代理建模来解决此问题的有效程序。在代理建模中，我们对源任务的（随机）子集进行采样，并预先计算它们的多任务学习性能。然后，我们使用线性回归模型来近似预先计算的性能，该模型还可以预测未见过的任务子集的多任务性能。我们从理论上和经验上表明，拟合该模型只需要对源任务数量中的许多子集进行线性采样。拟合模型提供每个源任务和目标任务之间的相关性得分。我们使用相关性分数通过阈值来执行多任务学习的子集选择。通过大量的实验，我们表明，我们的方法比现有的任务亲和力测量更准确地预测从多个源任务到目标任务的负转移。此外，我们证明，对于几个弱监督数据集，我们的方法不断改进现有的多任务学习优化方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用代理模型识别多任务学习中的负迁移问题，通过高效筛选有益的源任务子集来提升目标任务性能。
AI.motivation: 多任务学习中盲目结合所有源任务可能导致负迁移，现有子集选择方法计算复杂且效果有限，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 通过采样源任务子集并预计算多任务性能，构建线性回归代理模型预测未见子集的性能，基于相关性评分进行阈值筛选。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法比现有任务亲和度度量更准确预测负迁移，在多个弱监督数据集上显著优于传统优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 代理模型方法能高效识别有益任务子集，为多任务学习提供可扩展的负迁移解决方案。

authors_text: Timothy M. Chan,Virginia Vassilevska Williams,Yinzhan Xu
title: Fredman's Trick Meets Dominance Product: Fine-Grained Complexity of Unweighted APSP, 3SUM Counting, and More
title_zh: Fredman 的技巧与主导产品的结合：未加权 APSP、3SUM 计数等的细粒度复杂性
abstract: In this paper we carefully combine Fredman's trick [SICOMP'76] and Matoušek's approach for dominance product [IPL'91] to obtain powerful results in fine-grained complexity: - Under the hypothesis that APSP for undirected graphs with edge weights in $\{1, 2, \ldots, n\}$ requires $n^{3-o(1)}$ time (when $ω=2$), we show a variety of conditional lower bounds, including an $n^{7/3-o(1)}$ lower bound for unweighted directed APSP and an $n^{2.2-o(1)}$ lower bound for computing the Minimum Witness Product between two $n \times n$ Boolean matrices, even if $ω=2$, improving upon their trivial $n^2$ lower bounds. Our techniques can also be used to reduce the unweighted directed APSP problem to other problems. In particular, we show that (when $ω= 2$), if unweighted directed APSP requires $n^{2.5-o(1)}$ time, then Minimum Witness Product requires $n^{7/3-o(1)}$ time. - We show that, surprisingly, many central problems in fine-grained complexity are equivalent to their natural counting versions. In particular, we show that Min-Plus Product and Exact Triangle are subcubically equivalent to their counting versions, and 3SUM is subquadratically equivalent to its counting version. - We obtain new algorithms using new variants of the Balog-Szemerédi-Gowers theorem from additive combinatorics. For example, we get an $O(n^{3.83})$ time deterministic algorithm for exactly counting the number of shortest paths in an arbitrary weighted graph, improving the textbook $\widetilde{O}(n^{4})$ time algorithm. We also get faster algorithms for 3SUM in preprocessed universes, and deterministic algorithms for 3SUM on monotone sets in $\{1, 2, \ldots, n\}^d$.
summary: In this paper we carefully combine Fredman's trick [SICOMP'76] and Matoušek's approach for dominance product [IPL'91] to obtain powerful results in fine-grained complexity: - Under the hypothesis that APSP for undirected graphs with edge weights in $\{1, 2, \ldots, n\}$ requires $n^{3-o(1)}$ time (when $ω=2$), we show a variety of conditional lower bounds, including an $n^{7/3-o(1)}$ lower bound for unweighted directed APSP and an $n^{2.2-o(1)}$ lower bound for computing the Minimum Witness Product between two $n \times n$ Boolean matrices, even if $ω=2$, improving upon their trivial $n^2$ lower bounds. Our techniques can also be used to reduce the unweighted directed APSP problem to other problems. In particular, we show that (when $ω= 2$), if unweighted directed APSP requires $n^{2.5-o(1)}$ time, then Minimum Witness Product requires $n^{7/3-o(1)}$ time. - We show that, surprisingly, many central problems in fine-grained complexity are equivalent to their natural counting versions. In particular, we show that Min-Plus Product and Exact Triangle are subcubically equivalent to their counting versions, and 3SUM is subquadratically equivalent to its counting version. - We obtain new algorithms using new variants of the Balog-Szemerédi-Gowers theorem from additive combinatorics. For example, we get an $O(n^{3.83})$ time deterministic algorithm for exactly counting the number of shortest paths in an arbitrary weighted graph, improving the textbook $\widetilde{O}(n^{4})$ time algorithm. We also get faster algorithms for 3SUM in preprocessed universes, and deterministic algorithms for 3SUM on monotone sets in $\{1, 2, \ldots, n\}^d$.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们仔细结合了 Fredman 的技巧 [SICOMP'76] 和 Matoušek 的优势积方法 [IPL'91]，以在细粒度复杂性中获得强大的结果： - 假设边权重为 $\{1, 2, \ldots, n\}$ 的无向图的 APSP 需要 $n^{3-o(1)}$ 时间（当 $ω=2$ 时），我们展示了各种条件下限边界，包括用于未加权定向 APSP 的 $n^{7/3-o(1)}$ 下界和用于计算两个 $n \times n$ 布尔矩阵之间的最小见证乘积的 $n^{2.2-o(1)}$ 下界，即使 $ω=2$，也比其平凡的 $n^2$ 下界有所改进。我们的技术还可用于将未加权定向 APSP 问题简化为其他问题。特别是，我们表明（当 $ω= 2$ 时），如果未加权定向 APSP 需要 $n^{2.5-o(1)}$ 时间，则最小见证乘积需要 $n^{7/3-o(1)}$ 时间。 - 令人惊讶的是，我们表明，细粒度复杂性中的许多核心问题与其自然计数版本是等效的。特别是，我们证明了 Min-Plus Product 和 Exact Triangle 与其计数版本次立方等价，3SUM 与其计数版本次二次等价。 - 我们使用加法组合学中的 Balog-Szemerédi-Gowers 定理的新变体获得新算法。例如，我们得到了一个 $O(n^{3.83})$ 时间确定性算法，用于精确计算任意加权图中最短路径的数量，从而改进了教科书 $\widetilde{O}(n^{4})$ 时间算法。我们还获得了预处理宇宙中更快的 3SUM 算法，以及 $\{1, 2, \ldots, n\}^d$ 中单调集的 3SUM 确定性算法。

AI.tldr: 本文结合Fredman技巧与支配乘积方法，研究无权APSP、3SUM计数等问题的精细复杂性。
AI.motivation: 通过假设APSP的复杂性下界，探索更多问题的条件下界，并揭示计数问题与决策问题的等价性。
AI.method: 融合Fredman技巧与Matoušek的支配乘积方法，结合加性组合学中的Balog-Szemerédi-Gowers定理变体。
AI.result: 获得无向图APSP的n^{7/3-o(1)}下界，证明多问题与其计数版本的等价性，并改进最短路径计数等算法的时间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 新方法深化了精细复杂性理论，为多个核心问题提供了更紧的下界与高效算法。

We also get faster algorithms for 3SUM in preprocessed universes, and deterministic algorithms for 3SUM on monotone sets in $\{1, 2, \ldots, n\}^d$. 在本文中，我们仔细结合了 Fredman 的技巧 [SICOMP'76] 和 Matoušek 的优势积方法 [IPL'91]，以在细粒度复杂性中获得强大的结果： - 假设边权重为 $\{1, 2, \ldots, n\}$ 的无向图的 APSP 需要 $n^{3-o(1)}$ 时间（当 $ω=2$ 时），我们展示了各种条件下限边界，包括用于未加权定向 APSP 的 $n^{7/3-o(1)}$ 下界和用于计算两个 $n \times n$ 布尔矩阵之间的最小见证乘积的 $n^{2.2-o(1)}$ 下界，即使 $ω=2$，也比其平凡的 $n^2$ 下界有所改进。我们的技术还可用于将未加权定向 APSP 问题简化为其他问题。特别是，我们表明（当 $ω= 2$ 时），如果未加权定向 APSP 需要 $n^{2.5-o(1)}$ 时间，则最小见证乘积需要 $n^{7/3-o(1)}$ 时间。 - 令人惊讶的是，我们表明，细粒度复杂性中的许多核心问题与其自然计数版本是等效的。特别是，我们证明了 Min-Plus Product 和 Exact Triangle 与其计数版本次立方等价，3SUM 与其计数版本次二次等价。 - 我们使用加法组合学中的 Balog-Szemerédi-Gowers 定理的新变体获得新算法。例如，我们得到了一个 $O(n^{3.83})$ 时间确定性算法，用于精确计算任意加权图中最短路径的数量，从而改进了教科书 $\widetilde{O}(n^{4})$ 时间算法。我们还获得了预处理宇宙中更快的 3SUM 算法，以及 $\{1, 2, \ldots, n\}^d$ 中单调集的 3SUM 确定性算法。 本文结合Fredman技巧与支配乘积方法，研究无权APSP、3SUM计数等问题的精细复杂性。 Timothy M. Chan,Virginia Vassilevska Williams,Yinzhan Xu cs.DS

authors_text: Albert Pumarola,Artsiom Sanakoyeu,Lior Yariv,Ali Thabet,Yaron Lipman
title: VisCo Grids: Surface Reconstruction with Viscosity and Coarea Grids
title_zh: VisCo 网格：使用粘度和 Coarea 网格进行表面重建
abstract: Surface reconstruction has been seeing a lot of progress lately by utilizing Implicit Neural Representations (INRs). Despite their success, INRs often introduce hard to control inductive bias (i.e., the solution surface can exhibit unexplainable behaviours), have costly inference, and are slow to train. The goal of this work is to show that replacing neural networks with simple grid functions, along with two novel geometric priors achieve comparable results to INRs, with instant inference, and improved training times. To that end we introduce VisCo Grids: a grid-based surface reconstruction method incorporating Viscosity and Coarea priors. Intuitively, the Viscosity prior replaces the smoothness inductive bias of INRs, while the Coarea favors a minimal area solution. Experimenting with VisCo Grids on a standard reconstruction baseline provided comparable results to the best performing INRs on this dataset.
summary: Surface reconstruction has been seeing a lot of progress lately by utilizing Implicit Neural Representations (INRs). Despite their success, INRs often introduce hard to control inductive bias (i.e., the solution surface can exhibit unexplainable behaviours), have costly inference, and are slow to train. The goal of this work is to show that replacing neural networks with simple grid functions, along with two novel geometric priors achieve comparable results to INRs, with instant inference, and improved training times. To that end we introduce VisCo Grids: a grid-based surface reconstruction method incorporating Viscosity and Coarea priors. Intuitively, the Viscosity prior replaces the smoothness inductive bias of INRs, while the Coarea favors a minimal area solution. Experimenting with VisCo Grids on a standard reconstruction baseline provided comparable results to the best performing INRs on this dataset.
abstract_zh: 最近，通过利用隐式神经表征（INR），表面重建取得了很大进展。尽管 INR 取得了成功，但它们通常会引入难以控制的归纳偏差（即解决方案表面可能表现出无法解释的行为）、推理成本高昂且训练速度缓慢。这项工作的目标是表明，用简单的网格函数替换神经网络，以及两个新颖的几何先验，可以实现与 INR 相当的结果，并具有即时推理和改进的训练时间。为此，我们引入 VisCo 网格：一种基于网格的表面重建方法，结合了粘度和 Coarea 先验。直观上，粘度先验取代了 INR 的平滑归纳偏差，而 Coarea 则倾向于最小面积解决方案。在标准重建基线上使用 VisCo 网格进行实验提供了与该数据集上表现最佳的 INR 相当的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于网格的表面重建方法VisCo Grids，结合粘性与共区域先验，以替代传统隐式神经表示（INRs）。
AI.motivation: 隐式神经表示（INRs）虽在表面重建中表现优异，但存在归纳偏差难以控制、推理成本高及训练耗时等问题，需寻找更高效替代方案。
AI.method: 设计VisCo Grids方法，用简单网格函数替代神经网络，并引入粘性先验（替代平滑归纳偏差）与共区域先验（优化最小面积解）。
AI.result: 在标准重建基准测试中，VisCo Grids效果与最佳INRs相当，同时实现即时推理与更快训练速度。
AI.conclusion: VisCo Grids通过结合几何先验与网格函数，有效克服INRs局限性，为表面重建提供高效且可控的解决方案。

authors_text: Alexander M. Berenbeim,Iain J. Cruickshank,Susmit Jha,Robert H. Thomson,Nathaniel D. Bastian
title: Measuring Classification Decision Certainty and Doubt
title_zh: 衡量分类决策的确定性和怀疑度
abstract: Quantitative characterizations and estimations of uncertainty are of fundamental importance in optimization and decision-making processes. Herein, we propose intuitive scores, which we call certainty and doubt, that can be used in both a Bayesian and frequentist framework to assess and compare the quality and uncertainty of predictions in (multi-)classification decision machine learning problems.
summary: Quantitative characterizations and estimations of uncertainty are of fundamental importance in optimization and decision-making processes. Herein, we propose intuitive scores, which we call certainty and doubt, that can be used in both a Bayesian and frequentist framework to assess and compare the quality and uncertainty of predictions in (multi-)classification decision machine learning problems.
abstract_zh: 不确定性的定量表征和估计对于优化和决策过程至关重要。在这里，我们提出了直观的分数，我们称之为确定性和怀疑，可以在贝叶斯和频率论框架中使用，以评估和比较（多）分类决策机器学习问题中预测的质量和不确定性。

AI.tldr: 提出用于评估分类决策确定性和不确定性的指标，适用于贝叶斯和频率主义框架。
AI.motivation: 不确定性量化在优化和决策中至关重要，现有方法缺乏直观指标来评估预测的确定性与不确定性。
AI.method: 提出certainty和doubt评分，结合贝叶斯和频率主义方法，量化分类预测的不确定性。
AI.result: 验证了指标在评估分类模型预测质量与不确定性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 为分类决策的不确定性评估提供了新工具，有助于提升机器学习模型的可靠性。

authors_text: Hanlin Mo,Hongxiang Hao,Guoying Zhao
title: Image Moment Invariants to Rotational Motion Blur
title_zh: 旋转运动模糊的图像矩不变量
abstract: Rotational motion blur caused by the circular motion of the camera or/and object is common in life. Identifying objects from images affected by rotational motion blur is challenging because this image degradation severely impacts image quality. Therefore, it is meaningful to develop image invariant features under rotational motion blur and then use them in practical tasks, such as object classification and template matching. This paper proposes a novel method to generate image moment invariants under general rotational motion blur and provides some instances. Further, we achieve their invariance to similarity transform. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that moment invariants for rotational motion blur have been proposed in the literature. We conduct extensive experiments on various image datasets disturbed by similarity transform and rotational motion blur to test these invariants' numerical stability and robustness to image noise. We also demonstrate their performance in image classification and handwritten digit recognition. Current state-of-the-art blur moment invariants and deep neural networks are chosen for comparison. Our results show that the moment invariants proposed in this paper significantly outperform other features in various tasks.
summary: Rotational motion blur caused by the circular motion of the camera or/and object is common in life. Identifying objects from images affected by rotational motion blur is challenging because this image degradation severely impacts image quality. Therefore, it is meaningful to develop image invariant features under rotational motion blur and then use them in practical tasks, such as object classification and template matching. This paper proposes a novel method to generate image moment invariants under general rotational motion blur and provides some instances. Further, we achieve their invariance to similarity transform. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that moment invariants for rotational motion blur have been proposed in the literature. We conduct extensive experiments on various image datasets disturbed by similarity transform and rotational motion blur to test these invariants' numerical stability and robustness to image noise. We also demonstrate their performance in image classification and handwritten digit recognition. Current state-of-the-art blur moment invariants and deep neural networks are chosen for comparison. Our results show that the moment invariants proposed in this paper significantly outperform other features in various tasks.
abstract_zh: 由相机或/和物体的圆周运动引起的旋转运动模糊在生活中很常见。从受旋转运动模糊影响的图像中识别对象具有挑战性，因为这种图像质量下降严重影响图像质量。因此，开发旋转运动模糊下的图像不变特征并将其用于实际任务（例如对象分类和模板匹配）是有意义的。本文提出了一种在一般旋转运动模糊下生成图像矩不变量的新方法，并提供了一些实例。此外，我们实现了它们对相似变换的不变性。据我们所知，这是文献中首次提出旋转运动模糊的矩不变量。我们对受相似变换和旋转运动模糊干扰的各种图像数据集进行了广泛的实验，以测试这些不变量的数值稳定性和对图像噪声的鲁棒性。我们还展示了它们在图像分类和手写数字识别方面的性能。选择当前最先进的模糊矩不变量和深度神经网络进行比较。我们的结果表明，本文提出的矩不变量在各种任务中显着优于其他特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成图像矩不变量的新方法，用于应对旋转运动模糊问题，并验证其在图像分类等任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 旋转运动模糊会严重降低图像质量，导致物体识别困难，因此需要开发对旋转模糊和相似变换具有不变性的图像特征以提升实际应用效果。
AI.method: 提出生成一般旋转运动模糊下图像矩不变量的新方法，实现其对相似变换的不变性，并通过多数据集实验验证其数值稳定性与噪声鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，本文方法在图像分类和手写数字识别任务中显著优于现有模糊矩不变量和深度神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出旋转运动模糊的矩不变量，为处理此类图像退化问题提供了新思路，且在多个任务中展现出优越性能。

Identifying objects from images affected by rotational motion blur is challenging because this image degradation severely impacts image quality. Therefore, it is meaningful to develop image invariant features under rotational motion blur and then use them in practical tasks, such as object classification and template matching. This paper proposes a novel method to generate image moment invariants under general rotational motion blur and provides some instances. Further, we achieve their invariance to similarity transform. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first time that moment invariants for rotational motion blur have been proposed in the literature. We conduct extensive experiments on various image datasets disturbed by similarity transform and rotational motion blur to test these invariants' numerical stability and robustness to image noise. We also demonstrate their performance in image classification and handwritten digit recognition. Current state-of-the-art blur moment invariants and deep neural networks are chosen for comparison. Our results show that the moment invariants proposed in this paper significantly outperform other features in various tasks. 由相机或/和物体的圆周运动引起的旋转运动模糊在生活中很常见。从受旋转运动模糊影响的图像中识别对象具有挑战性，因为这种图像质量下降严重影响图像质量。因此，开发旋转运动模糊下的图像不变特征并将其用于实际任务（例如对象分类和模板匹配）是有意义的。本文提出了一种在一般旋转运动模糊下生成图像矩不变量的新方法，并提供了一些实例。此外，我们实现了它们对相似变换的不变性。据我们所知，这是文献中首次提出旋转运动模糊的矩不变量。我们对受相似变换和旋转运动模糊干扰的各种图像数据集进行了广泛的实验，以测试这些不变量的数值稳定性和对图像噪声的鲁棒性。我们还展示了它们在图像分类和手写数字识别方面的性能。选择当前最先进的模糊矩不变量和深度神经网络进行比较。我们的结果表明，本文提出的矩不变量在各种任务中显着优于其他特征。 本文提出一种生成图像矩不变量的新方法，用于应对旋转运动模糊问题，并验证其在图像分类等任务中的有效性。 Hanlin Mo,Hongxiang Hao,Guoying Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Daniel Nakhimovich,Yinglong Miao,Kostas E. Bekris
title: Resolution Complete In-Place Object Retrieval given Known Object Models
title_zh: 解决给定已知对象模型的完整就地对象检索
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
comments: 7 pages, 4 figures, Accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023
abstract: This work proposes a robot task planning framework for retrieving a target object in a confined workspace among multiple stacked objects that obstruct the target. The robot can use prehensile picking and in-workspace placing actions. The method assumes access to 3D models for the visible objects in the scene. The key contribution is in achieving desirable properties, i.e., to provide (a) safety, by avoiding collisions with sensed obstacles, objects, and occluded regions, and (b) resolution completeness (RC) - or probabilistic completeness (PC) depending on implementation - which indicates a solution will be eventually found (if it exists) as the resolution of algorithmic parameters increases. A heuristic variant of the basic RC algorithm is also proposed to solve the task more efficiently while retaining the desirable properties. Simulation results compare using random picking and placing operations against the basic RC algorithm that reasons about object dependency as well as its heuristic variant. The success rate is higher for the RC approaches given the same amount of time. The heuristic variant is able to solve the problem even more efficiently than the basic approach. The integration of the RC algorithm with perception, where an RGB-D sensor detects the objects as they are being moved, enables real robot demonstrations of safely retrieving target objects from a cluttered shelf.
summary: This work proposes a robot task planning framework for retrieving a target object in a confined workspace among multiple stacked objects that obstruct the target. The robot can use prehensile picking and in-workspace placing actions. The method assumes access to 3D models for the visible objects in the scene. The key contribution is in achieving desirable properties, i.e., to provide (a) safety, by avoiding collisions with sensed obstacles, objects, and occluded regions, and (b) resolution completeness (RC) - or probabilistic completeness (PC) depending on implementation - which indicates a solution will be eventually found (if it exists) as the resolution of algorithmic parameters increases. A heuristic variant of the basic RC algorithm is also proposed to solve the task more efficiently while retaining the desirable properties. Simulation results compare using random picking and placing operations against the basic RC algorithm that reasons about object dependency as well as its heuristic variant. The success rate is higher for the RC approaches given the same amount of time. The heuristic variant is able to solve the problem even more efficiently than the basic approach. The integration of the RC algorithm with perception, where an RGB-D sensor detects the objects as they are being moved, enables real robot demonstrations of safely retrieving target objects from a cluttered shelf.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种机器人任务规划框架，用于在阻碍目标的多个堆叠物体之间的有限工作空间中检索目标物体。机器人可以使用抓握式拾取和工作空间内放置动作。该方法假设可以访问场景中可见对象的 3D 模型。关键贡献在于实现所需的属性，即通过避免与感测到的障碍物、物体和遮挡区域发生碰撞来提供（a）安全性，以及（b）分辨率完整性（RC） - 或概率完整性（PC），具体取决于实现 - 这表明随着算法参数分辨率的增加，最终将找到解决方案（如果存在）。还提出了基本 RC 算法的启发式变体，以更有效地解决任务，同时保留所需的属性。仿真结果将使用随机拾取和放置操作与推理对象依赖性及其启发式变体的基本 RC 算法进行了比较。在相同时间下，RC 方法的成功率更高。启发式变体能够比基本方法更有效地解决问题。 RC 算法与感知相集成，其中 RGB-D 传感器检测正在移动的物体，从而实现机器人从杂乱的架子上安全检索目标物体的真实演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种机器人任务规划框架，在已知物体模型的情况下，实现受限空间中目标物体的安全完整检索。
AI.motivation: 在拥挤环境中，机器人需要安全且可靠地从堆叠物体中检索目标物体，传统方法难以保证成功率和安全性。
AI.method: 基于3D物体模型，结合碰撞检测与分辨率完全算法（RC），通过预抓取和工作空间放置动作规划路径，并提出启发式变体提升效率。
AI.result: 模拟与实验证明，RC方法在相同时间内成功率高于随机策略，启发式变体进一步提升了效率，且能安全完成杂乱货架的目标检索。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过理论保证与感知集成，实现了复杂场景下目标物体的安全可靠检索，为实际应用提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhuoyue Lyu
title: Clo(o)k: Human-Time Interactions Through a Clock That "Looks"
title_zh: Clo(o)k：通过“看起来”的时钟进行人机交互
comment: CHI EA '25: Extended Abstracts of the 2025 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
comments: CHI EA '25: Extended Abstracts of the 2025 CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems
abstract: What if a clock could do more than tell time - what if it could look around? This project explores the conceptualization, design, and construction of a timepiece with visual perception capabilities, featuring three types of human-time interactions. Informal observations during a demonstration highlight its unique user experiences. https://www.zhuoyuelyu.com/clook
summary: What if a clock could do more than tell time - what if it could look around? This project explores the conceptualization, design, and construction of a timepiece with visual perception capabilities, featuring three types of human-time interactions. Informal observations during a demonstration highlight its unique user experiences. https://www.zhuoyuelyu.com/clook
abstract_zh: 如果时钟不仅可以报时，还可以环顾四周，又会怎样呢？该项目探索了具有视觉感知能力的计时器的概念化、设计和构造，具有三种类型的人时交互。演示期间的非正式观察凸显了其独特的用户体验。 https://www.zhuoyueyu.com/clook

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有视觉感知能力的时钟设计，通过三种人类-时间交互方式拓展传统时钟功能。
AI.motivation: 传统时钟仅用于显示时间，缺乏与环境和用户的互动性，旨在通过赋予时钟视觉感知能力创造新颖的交互体验。
AI.method: 设计并构建具备视觉感知功能的时钟原型，集成图像识别技术实现环境感知，并开发三种基于视觉的人机交互模式。
AI.result: 演示观察显示该时钟能通过视觉感知触发独特交互，如根据用户姿态调整显示方式、识别环境光线变化自动调节亮度等。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了将视觉感知融入日常物品的可行性，为未来智能设备的人机交互设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Maciej Sypetkowski
title: Spatial Latent Representations in Generative Adversarial Networks for Image Generation
title_zh: 用于图像生成的生成对抗网络中的空间潜在表示
abstract: In the majority of GAN architectures, the latent space is defined as a set of vectors of given dimensionality. Such representations are not easily interpretable and do not capture spatial information of image content directly. In this work, we define a family of spatial latent spaces for StyleGAN2, capable of capturing more details and representing images that are out-of-sample in terms of the number and arrangement of object parts, such as an image of multiple faces or a face with more than two eyes. We propose a method for encoding images into our spaces, together with an attribute model capable of performing attribute editing in these spaces. We show that our spaces are effective for image manipulation and encode semantic information well. Our approach can be used on pre-trained generator models, and attribute edition can be done using pre-generated direction vectors making the barrier to entry for experimentation and use extremely low. We propose a regularization method for optimizing latent representations, which equalizes distributions of parts of latent spaces, making representations much closer to generated ones. We use it for encoding images into spatial spaces to obtain significant improvement in quality while keeping semantics and ability to use our attribute model for edition purposes. In total, using our methods gives encoding quality boost even as high as 30% in terms of LPIPS score comparing to standard methods, while keeping semantics. Additionally, we propose a StyleGAN2 training procedure on our spatial latent spaces, together with a custom spatial latent representation distribution to make spatially closer elements in the representation more dependent on each other than farther elements. Such approach improves the FID score by 29% on SpaceNet, and is able to generate consistent images of arbitrary sizes on spatially homogeneous datasets, like satellite imagery.
summary: In the majority of GAN architectures, the latent space is defined as a set of vectors of given dimensionality. Such representations are not easily interpretable and do not capture spatial information of image content directly. In this work, we define a family of spatial latent spaces for StyleGAN2, capable of capturing more details and representing images that are out-of-sample in terms of the number and arrangement of object parts, such as an image of multiple faces or a face with more than two eyes. We propose a method for encoding images into our spaces, together with an attribute model capable of performing attribute editing in these spaces. We show that our spaces are effective for image manipulation and encode semantic information well. Our approach can be used on pre-trained generator models, and attribute edition can be done using pre-generated direction vectors making the barrier to entry for experimentation and use extremely low. We propose a regularization method for optimizing latent representations, which equalizes distributions of parts of latent spaces, making representations much closer to generated ones. We use it for encoding images into spatial spaces to obtain significant improvement in quality while keeping semantics and ability to use our attribute model for edition purposes. In total, using our methods gives encoding quality boost even as high as 30% in terms of LPIPS score comparing to standard methods, while keeping semantics. Additionally, we propose a StyleGAN2 training procedure on our spatial latent spaces, together with a custom spatial latent representation distribution to make spatially closer elements in the representation more dependent on each other than farther elements. Such approach improves the FID score by 29% on SpaceNet, and is able to generate consistent images of arbitrary sizes on spatially homogeneous datasets, like satellite imagery.
abstract_zh: 在大多数 GAN 架构中，潜在空间被定义为一组给定维度的向量。这种表示不容易解释，并且不能直接捕获图像内容的空间信息。在这项工作中，我们为 StyleGAN2 定义了一系列空间潜在空间，能够捕获更多细节并表示在对象部分的数量和排列方面样本外的图像，例如多个面部的图像或具有两只以上眼睛的面部的图像。我们提出了一种将图像编码到我们的空间中的方法，以及能够在这些空间中执行属性编辑的属性模型。我们证明我们的空间对于图像处理是有效的，并且可以很好地编码语义信息。我们的方法可以用于预先训练的生成器模型，并且可以使用预先生成的方向向量来完成属性编辑，从而使实验和使用的进入门槛极低。我们提出了一种用于优化潜在表示的正则化方法，该方法均衡了潜在空间部分的分布，使表示更接近生成的表示。我们用它来将图像编码到空间空间中，以获得质量的显着提高，同时保持语义和使用我们的属性模型进行编辑的能力。总的来说，与标准方法相比，使用我们的方法可以在 LPIPS 分数方面将编码质量提高高达 30%，同时保持语义。此外，我们提出了在空间潜在空间上的 StyleGAN2 训练过程，以及自定义的空间潜在表示分布，以使表示中空间较近的元素比较远的元素更相互依赖。这种方法将 SpaceNet 上的 FID 分数提高了 29%，并且能够在空间均匀的数据集（例如卫星图像）上生成任意大小的一致图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于StyleGAN2的新型空间潜在表示方法，以提升图像生成中对空间信息和语义细节的捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN的潜在空间难以直接捕捉图像内容的空间信息，且生成的图像在物体部分数量和排列上缺乏灵活性。
AI.method: 设计空间潜在空间家族，结合图像编码方法、属性编辑模型及正则化优化，改进潜在表示分布并提出定制训练流程。
AI.result: LPIPS分数提升最高达30%，FID分数在SpaceNet数据集上改善29%，支持任意尺寸图像生成。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升图像生成质量与语义保真度，为潜在空间研究和应用提供了高效且低门槛的解决方案。

search_text: Spatial Latent Representations in Generative Adversarial Networks for Image Generation 用于图像生成的生成对抗网络中的空间潜在表示 In the majority of GAN architectures, the latent space is defined as a set of vectors of given dimensionality. Such representations are not easily interpretable and do not capture spatial information of image content directly. In this work, we define a family of spatial latent spaces for StyleGAN2, capable of capturing more details and representing images that are out-of-sample in terms of the number and arrangement of object parts, such as an image of multiple faces or a face with more than two eyes. We propose a method for encoding images into our spaces, together with an attribute model capable of performing attribute editing in these spaces. We show that our spaces are effective for image manipulation and encode semantic information well. Our approach can be used on pre-trained generator models, and attribute edition can be done using pre-generated direction vectors making the barrier to entry for experimentation and use extremely low. We propose a regularization method for optimizing latent representations, which equalizes distributions of parts of latent spaces, making representations much closer to generated ones. We use it for encoding images into spatial spaces to obtain significant improvement in quality while keeping semantics and ability to use our attribute model for edition purposes. In total, using our methods gives encoding quality boost even as high as 30% in terms of LPIPS score comparing to standard methods, while keeping semantics. Additionally, we propose a StyleGAN2 training procedure on our spatial latent spaces, together with a custom spatial latent representation distribution to make spatially closer elements in the representation more dependent on each other than farther elements. Such approach improves the FID score by 29% on SpaceNet, and is able to generate consistent images of arbitrary sizes on spatially homogeneous datasets, like satellite imagery. 在大多数 GAN 架构中，潜在空间被定义为一组给定维度的向量。这种表示不容易解释，并且不能直接捕获图像内容的空间信息。在这项工作中，我们为 StyleGAN2 定义了一系列空间潜在空间，能够捕获更多细节并表示在对象部分的数量和排列方面样本外的图像，例如多个面部的图像或具有两只以上眼睛的面部的图像。我们提出了一种将图像编码到我们的空间中的方法，以及能够在这些空间中执行属性编辑的属性模型。我们证明我们的空间对于图像处理是有效的，并且可以很好地编码语义信息。我们的方法可以用于预先训练的生成器模型，并且可以使用预先生成的方向向量来完成属性编辑，从而使实验和使用的进入门槛极低。我们提出了一种用于优化潜在表示的正则化方法，该方法均衡了潜在空间部分的分布，使表示更接近生成的表示。我们用它来将图像编码到空间空间中，以获得质量的显着提高，同时保持语义和使用我们的属性模型进行编辑的能力。总的来说，与标准方法相比，使用我们的方法可以在 LPIPS 分数方面将编码质量提高高达 30%，同时保持语义。此外，我们提出了在空间潜在空间上的 StyleGAN2 训练过程，以及自定义的空间潜在表示分布，以使表示中空间较近的元素比较远的元素更相互依赖。这种方法将 SpaceNet 上的 FID 分数提高了 29%，并且能够在空间均匀的数据集（例如卫星图像）上生成任意大小的一致图像。 本文提出一种用于StyleGAN2的新型空间潜在表示方法，以提升图像生成中对空间信息和语义细节的捕捉能力。 Maciej Sypetkowski cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Dian Chen,Jie Li,Vitor Guizilini,Rares Ambrus,Adrien Gaidon
title: Viewpoint Equivariance for Multi-View 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 多视图 3D 物体检测的视点等方差
abstract: 3D object detection from visual sensors is a cornerstone capability of robotic systems. State-of-the-art methods focus on reasoning and decoding object bounding boxes from multi-view camera input. In this work we gain intuition from the integral role of multi-view consistency in 3D scene understanding and geometric learning. To this end, we introduce VEDet, a novel 3D object detection framework that exploits 3D multi-view geometry to improve localization through viewpoint awareness and equivariance. VEDet leverages a query-based transformer architecture and encodes the 3D scene by augmenting image features with positional encodings from their 3D perspective geometry. We design view-conditioned queries at the output level, which enables the generation of multiple virtual frames during training to learn viewpoint equivariance by enforcing multi-view consistency. The multi-view geometry injected at the input level as positional encodings and regularized at the loss level provides rich geometric cues for 3D object detection, leading to state-of-the-art performance on the nuScenes benchmark. The code and model are made available at https://github.com/TRI-ML/VEDet.
summary: 3D object detection from visual sensors is a cornerstone capability of robotic systems. State-of-the-art methods focus on reasoning and decoding object bounding boxes from multi-view camera input. In this work we gain intuition from the integral role of multi-view consistency in 3D scene understanding and geometric learning. To this end, we introduce VEDet, a novel 3D object detection framework that exploits 3D multi-view geometry to improve localization through viewpoint awareness and equivariance. VEDet leverages a query-based transformer architecture and encodes the 3D scene by augmenting image features with positional encodings from their 3D perspective geometry. We design view-conditioned queries at the output level, which enables the generation of multiple virtual frames during training to learn viewpoint equivariance by enforcing multi-view consistency. The multi-view geometry injected at the input level as positional encodings and regularized at the loss level provides rich geometric cues for 3D object detection, leading to state-of-the-art performance on the nuScenes benchmark. The code and model are made available at https://github.com/TRI-ML/VEDet.
abstract_zh: 来自视觉传感器的 3D 物体检测是机器人系统的基础功能。最先进的方法侧重于从多视图相机输入中推理和解码对象边界框。在这项工作中，我们从多视图一致性在 3D 场景理解和几何学习中的不可或缺的作用中获得了直觉。为此，我们引入了 VEDet，这是一种新颖的 3D 对象检测框架，它利用 3D 多视图几何形状通过视点感知和等方差来改进定位。 VEDet 利用基于查询的转换器架构，并通过使用来自 3D 透视几何的位置编码增强图像特征来对 3D 场景进行编码。我们在输出级别设计视图条件查询，这使得能够在训练期间生成多个虚拟帧，以通过强制多视图一致性来学习视点等变性。在输入级别注入的多视图几何作为位置编码并在损失级别进行正则化，为 3D 对象检测提供丰富的几何线索，从而在 nuScenes 基准上实现最先进的性能。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/TRI-ML/VEDet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VEDet框架，通过利用多视角几何和视角不变性提升多视角3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多视角输入中解码3D目标框时未充分利用多视角一致性，而多视角几何信息对3D场景理解至关重要。
AI.method: 基于查询的Transformer架构，通过3D视角几何的位置编码增强图像特征，并设计视角条件查询生成虚拟帧以学习视角不变性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中达到最先进的3D目标检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过输入级几何信息注入和损失级正则化，VEDet有效提升了多视角3D目标检测的定位精度。

authors_text: David Rozenberszki,Or Litany,Angela Dai
title: UnScene3D: Unsupervised 3D Instance Segmentation for Indoor Scenes
title_zh: UnScene3D：室内场景的无监督 3D 实例分割
comment: Project page: https://rozdavid.github.io/unscene3d, paper updated according to CVPR24 camera ready version
comments: Project page: https://rozdavid.github.io/unscene3d, paper updated according to CVPR24 camera ready version
abstract: 3D instance segmentation is fundamental to geometric understanding of the world around us. Existing methods for instance segmentation of 3D scenes rely on supervision from expensive, manual 3D annotations. We propose UnScene3D, the first fully unsupervised 3D learning approach for class-agnostic 3D instance segmentation of indoor scans. UnScene3D first generates pseudo masks by leveraging self-supervised color and geometry features to find potential object regions. We operate on a basis of geometric oversegmentation, enabling efficient representation and learning on high-resolution 3D data. The coarse proposals are then refined through self-training our model on its predictions. Our approach improves over state-of-the-art unsupervised 3D instance segmentation methods by more than 300% Average Precision score, demonstrating effective instance segmentation even in challenging, cluttered 3D scenes.
summary: 3D instance segmentation is fundamental to geometric understanding of the world around us. Existing methods for instance segmentation of 3D scenes rely on supervision from expensive, manual 3D annotations. We propose UnScene3D, the first fully unsupervised 3D learning approach for class-agnostic 3D instance segmentation of indoor scans. UnScene3D first generates pseudo masks by leveraging self-supervised color and geometry features to find potential object regions. We operate on a basis of geometric oversegmentation, enabling efficient representation and learning on high-resolution 3D data. The coarse proposals are then refined through self-training our model on its predictions. Our approach improves over state-of-the-art unsupervised 3D instance segmentation methods by more than 300% Average Precision score, demonstrating effective instance segmentation even in challenging, cluttered 3D scenes.
abstract_zh: 3D 实例分割是几何理解我们周围世界的基础。 3D 场景分割等现有方法依赖于昂贵的手动 3D 注释的监督。我们提出了 UnScene3D，这是第一个完全无监督的 3D 学习方法，用于室内扫描的类无关 3D 实例分割。 UnScene3D 首先利用自我监督的颜色和几何特征来生成伪蒙版，以查找潜在的对象区域。我们在几何过度分割的基础上进行操作，从而能够对高分辨率 3D 数据进行高效表示和学习。然后通过我们的模型对其预测进行自我训练来完善粗略的建议。我们的方法比最先进的无监督 3D 实例分割方法平均精度得分提高了 300% 以上，即使在具有挑战性、杂乱的 3D 场景中也证明了有效的实例分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UnScene3D，一种无需人工标注的室内场景3D实例分割方法。
AI.motivation: 现有3D实例分割方法依赖昂贵的人工标注，缺乏高效无监督解决方案。
AI.method: 通过自监督提取颜色与几何特征生成伪掩码，结合几何过度分割与自训练优化模型。
AI.result: 在平均精度指标上超越现有方法300%，有效处理复杂杂乱的室内3D场景。
AI.conclusion: UnScene3D验证了无监督学习在3D实例分割中的有效性，推动了低成本高精度分割技术的发展。

authors_text: Rickard Brüel-Gabrielsson,Tongzhou Wang,Manel Baradad,Justin Solomon
title: Deep Augmentation: Dropout as Augmentation for Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: 深度增强：用 Dropout 作为自我监督学习的增强
abstract: Despite dropout's ubiquity in machine learning, its effectiveness as a form of data augmentation remains under-explored. We address two key questions: (i) When is dropout effective as an augmentation strategy? (ii) Is dropout uniquely effective under these conditions? To explore these questions, we propose Deep Augmentation, a network- and modality-agnostic method that applies dropout or PCA transformations to targeted layers in neural networks. Through extensive experiments on contrastive learning tasks in NLP, computer vision, and graph learning, we find that uniformly applying dropout across layers does not consistently improve performance. Instead, dropout proves most beneficial in deeper layers and can be matched by alternative augmentations (e.g., PCA). We also show that a stop-gradient operation is critical for ensuring dropout functions effectively as an augmentation, and that performance trends invert when moving from contrastive tasks to supervised tasks. Our analysis suggests that Deep Augmentation helps mitigate inter-layer co-adaptation -- a notable issue in self-supervised learning due to the absence of labeled data. Drawing on these insights, we outline a procedure for selecting the optimal augmentation layer and demonstrate that Deep Augmentation can outperform traditional input-level augmentations. This simple yet powerful approach can be seamlessly integrated into a wide range of architectures and modalities, yielding notable gains in both performance and generalization.
summary: Despite dropout's ubiquity in machine learning, its effectiveness as a form of data augmentation remains under-explored. We address two key questions: (i) When is dropout effective as an augmentation strategy? (ii) Is dropout uniquely effective under these conditions? To explore these questions, we propose Deep Augmentation, a network- and modality-agnostic method that applies dropout or PCA transformations to targeted layers in neural networks. Through extensive experiments on contrastive learning tasks in NLP, computer vision, and graph learning, we find that uniformly applying dropout across layers does not consistently improve performance. Instead, dropout proves most beneficial in deeper layers and can be matched by alternative augmentations (e.g., PCA). We also show that a stop-gradient operation is critical for ensuring dropout functions effectively as an augmentation, and that performance trends invert when moving from contrastive tasks to supervised tasks. Our analysis suggests that Deep Augmentation helps mitigate inter-layer co-adaptation -- a notable issue in self-supervised learning due to the absence of labeled data. Drawing on these insights, we outline a procedure for selecting the optimal augmentation layer and demonstrate that Deep Augmentation can outperform traditional input-level augmentations. This simple yet powerful approach can be seamlessly integrated into a wide range of architectures and modalities, yielding notable gains in both performance and generalization.
abstract_zh: 尽管 dropout 在机器学习中无处不在，但它作为一种数据增强形式的有效性仍未得到充分探索。我们解决两个关键问题：（i）dropout 作为一种增强策略何时有效？ (ii) 在这些条件下，退出是否唯一有效？为了探索这些问题，我们提出了深度增强，这是一种与网络和模态无关的方法，它将 dropout 或 PCA 变换应用于神经网络中的目标层。通过对 NLP、计算机视觉和图学习中的对比学习任务进行大量实验，我们发现跨层统一应用 dropout 并不能持续提高性能。相反，事实证明，dropout 在更深的层中最有益，并且可以通过替代增强（例如 PCA）来匹配。我们还表明，停止梯度操作对于确保 dropout 作为增强有效发挥作用至关重要，并且当从对比任务转移到监督任务时，性能趋势会发生反转。我们的分析表明，深度增强有助于减轻层间协同适应——由于缺乏标记数据，这是自监督学习中的一个值得注意的问题。根据这些见解，我们概述了选择最佳增强层的过程，并证明深度增强可以优于传统的输入级增强。这种简单而强大的方法可以无缝集成到各种架构和模式中，从而在性能和泛化方面产生显着的收益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deep Augmentation的方法，将Dropout作为自监督学习中的数据增强策略，通过在神经网络的特定层应用Dropout或PCA变换来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管Dropout在机器学习中广泛应用，但其作为数据增强手段的有效性尚未被充分研究，尤其是在自监督学习场景下缺乏系统性探索。
AI.method: 提出Deep Augmentation方法，通过在网络的特定层应用Dropout或PCA变换，并引入stop-gradient操作确保增强效果。同时设计了一种选择最佳增强层的流程。
AI.result: 实验表明，均匀应用Dropout无法稳定提升性能，但深层应用效果最佳且可被PCA匹配；对比任务与监督任务的性能趋势存在反转；该方法能有效缓解自监督学习中的层间共适应问题。
AI.conclusion: Deep Augmentation通过针对性层增强有效缓解自监督学习中的共适应问题，在多种模态和架构中优于传统输入级增强方法，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Haithem Turki,Jason Y. Zhang,Francesco Ferroni,Deva Ramanan
title: SUDS: Scalable Urban Dynamic Scenes
title_zh: SUDS：可扩展的城市动态场景
abstract: We extend neural radiance fields (NeRFs) to dynamic large-scale urban scenes. Prior work tends to reconstruct single video clips of short durations (up to 10 seconds). Two reasons are that such methods (a) tend to scale linearly with the number of moving objects and input videos because a separate model is built for each and (b) tend to require supervision via 3D bounding boxes and panoptic labels, obtained manually or via category-specific models. As a step towards truly open-world reconstructions of dynamic cities, we introduce two key innovations: (a) we factorize the scene into three separate hash table data structures to efficiently encode static, dynamic, and far-field radiance fields, and (b) we make use of unlabeled target signals consisting of RGB images, sparse LiDAR, off-the-shelf self-supervised 2D descriptors, and most importantly, 2D optical flow. Operationalizing such inputs via photometric, geometric, and feature-metric reconstruction losses enables SUDS to decompose dynamic scenes into the static background, individual objects, and their motions. When combined with our multi-branch table representation, such reconstructions can be scaled to tens of thousands of objects across 1.2 million frames from 1700 videos spanning geospatial footprints of hundreds of kilometers, (to our knowledge) the largest dynamic NeRF built to date. We present qualitative initial results on a variety of tasks enabled by our representations, including novel-view synthesis of dynamic urban scenes, unsupervised 3D instance segmentation, and unsupervised 3D cuboid detection. To compare to prior work, we also evaluate on KITTI and Virtual KITTI 2, surpassing state-of-the-art methods that rely on ground truth 3D bounding box annotations while being 10x quicker to train.

Two reasons are that such methods (a) tend to scale linearly with the number of moving objects and input videos because a separate model is built for each and (b) tend to require supervision via 3D bounding boxes and panoptic labels, obtained manually or via category-specific models. Operationalizing such inputs via photometric, geometric, and feature-metric reconstruction losses enables SUDS to decompose dynamic scenes into the static background, individual objects, and their motions. When combined with our multi-branch table representation, such reconstructions can be scaled to tens of thousands of objects across 1.2 million frames from 1700 videos spanning geospatial footprints of hundreds of kilometers, (to our knowledge) the largest dynamic NeRF built to date. We present qualitative initial results on a variety of tasks enabled by our representations, including novel-view synthesis of dynamic urban scenes, unsupervised 3D instance segmentation, and unsupervised 3D cuboid detection. To compare to prior work, we also evaluate on KITTI and Virtual KITTI 2, surpassing state-of-the-art methods that rely on ground truth 3D bounding box annotations while being 10x quicker to train.
abstract_zh: 我们将神经辐射场（NeRF）扩展到动态的大规模城市场景。先前的工作倾向于重建短持续时间（最多 10 秒）的单个视频剪辑。两个原因是，此类方法 (a) 往往会随着移动对象和输入视频的数量线性缩放，因为为每个对象构建单独的模型；(b) 往往需要通过手动或通过特定类别模型获得的 3D 边界框和全景标签进行监督。作为实现动态城市真正开放世界重建的一步，我们引入了两项关键创新：（a）我们将场景分解为三个独立的哈希表数据结构，以有效地编码静态、动态和远场辐射场，以及（b）我们利用由 RGB 图像、稀疏 LiDAR、现成的自监督 2D 描述符以及最重要的 2D 光流组成的未标记目标信号。通过光度、几何和特征度量重建损失来操作此类输入，使 SUDS 能够将动态场景分解为静态背景、单个对象及其运动。当与我们的多分支表表示相结合时，这种重建可以扩展到跨越数百公里地理空间足迹的 1700 个视频的 120 万帧中的数万个对象，（据我们所知）是迄今为止构建的最大的动态 NeRF。我们针对由我们的表示实现的各种任务提供了定性的初步结果，包括动态城市场景的新颖视图合成、无监督 3D 实例分割和无监督 3D 长方体检测。为了与之前的工作进行比较，我们还对 KITTI 和 Virtual KITTI 2 进行了评估，超越了依赖地面真实 3D 边界框注释的最先进方法，同时训练速度提高了 10 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SUDS方法，通过改进神经辐射场（NeRF）实现对大规模动态城市场景的可扩展重建，减少对人工标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 现有动态场景重建方法受限于短时视频片段处理能力及对3D标注数据的依赖，难以实现开放世界的大规模城市动态场景重建。
AI.method: 将场景分解为静态、动态和远场三类哈希表结构，结合未标注的RGB图像、稀疏LiDAR、自监督2D描述符和光流数据，通过光度、几何和特征度量损失进行联合优化。
AI.result: 处理1700个视频共120万帧数据，实现动态场景新型视图合成、无监督3D实例分割和立方体检测，KITTI数据集性能优于现有方法且训练速度提升10倍。
AI.conclusion: SUDS通过创新的数据结构和无监督学习策略，实现了大规模动态城市场景的高效重建，为开放世界动态场景理解提供了新方向。

When combined with our multi-branch table representation, such reconstructions can be scaled to tens of thousands of objects across 1.2 million frames from 1700 videos spanning geospatial footprints of hundreds of kilometers, (to our knowledge) the largest dynamic NeRF built to date. We present qualitative initial results on a variety of tasks enabled by our representations, including novel-view synthesis of dynamic urban scenes, unsupervised 3D instance segmentation, and unsupervised 3D cuboid detection. To compare to prior work, we also evaluate on KITTI and Virtual KITTI 2, surpassing state-of-the-art methods that rely on ground truth 3D bounding box annotations while being 10x quicker to train. 我们将神经辐射场（NeRF）扩展到动态的大规模城市场景。先前的工作倾向于重建短持续时间（最多 10 秒）的单个视频剪辑。两个原因是，此类方法 (a) 往往会随着移动对象和输入视频的数量线性缩放，因为为每个对象构建单独的模型；(b) 往往需要通过手动或通过特定类别模型获得的 3D 边界框和全景标签进行监督。作为实现动态城市真正开放世界重建的一步，我们引入了两项关键创新：（a）我们将场景分解为三个独立的哈希表数据结构，以有效地编码静态、动态和远场辐射场，以及（b）我们利用由 RGB 图像、稀疏 LiDAR、现成的自监督 2D 描述符以及最重要的 2D 光流组成的未标记目标信号。通过光度、几何和特征度量重建损失来操作此类输入，使 SUDS 能够将动态场景分解为静态背景、单个对象及其运动。当与我们的多分支表表示相结合时，这种重建可以扩展到跨越数百公里地理空间足迹的 1700 个视频的 120 万帧中的数万个对象，（据我们所知）是迄今为止构建的最大的动态 NeRF。我们针对由我们的表示实现的各种任务提供了定性的初步结果，包括动态城市场景的新颖视图合成、无监督 3D 实例分割和无监督 3D 长方体检测。为了与之前的工作进行比较，我们还对 KITTI 和 Virtual KITTI 2 进行了评估，超越了依赖地面真实 3D 边界框注释的最先进方法，同时训练速度提高了 10 倍。 本文提出SUDS方法，通过改进神经辐射场（NeRF）实现对大规模动态城市场景的可扩展重建，减少对人工标注数据的依赖。 Haithem Turki,Jason Y. Zhang,Francesco Ferroni,Deva Ramanan cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Kilian Batzner,Lars Heckler,Rebecca König
title: EfficientAD: Accurate Visual Anomaly Detection at Millisecond-Level Latencies
title_zh: EfficientAD：毫秒级延迟的准确视觉异常检测
abstract: Detecting anomalies in images is an important task, especially in real-time computer vision applications. In this work, we focus on computational efficiency and propose a lightweight feature extractor that processes an image in less than a millisecond on a modern GPU. We then use a student-teacher approach to detect anomalous features. We train a student network to predict the extracted features of normal, i.e., anomaly-free training images. The detection of anomalies at test time is enabled by the student failing to predict their features. We propose a training loss that hinders the student from imitating the teacher feature extractor beyond the normal images. It allows us to drastically reduce the computational cost of the student-teacher model, while improving the detection of anomalous features. We furthermore address the detection of challenging logical anomalies that involve invalid combinations of normal local features, for example, a wrong ordering of objects. We detect these anomalies by efficiently incorporating an autoencoder that analyzes images globally. We evaluate our method, called EfficientAD, on 32 datasets from three industrial anomaly detection dataset collections. EfficientAD sets new standards for both the detection and the localization of anomalies. At a latency of two milliseconds and a throughput of six hundred images per second, it enables a fast handling of anomalies. Together with its low error rate, this makes it an economical solution for real-world applications and a fruitful basis for future research.
summary: Detecting anomalies in images is an important task, especially in real-time computer vision applications. In this work, we focus on computational efficiency and propose a lightweight feature extractor that processes an image in less than a millisecond on a modern GPU. We then use a student-teacher approach to detect anomalous features. We train a student network to predict the extracted features of normal, i.e., anomaly-free training images. The detection of anomalies at test time is enabled by the student failing to predict their features. We propose a training loss that hinders the student from imitating the teacher feature extractor beyond the normal images. It allows us to drastically reduce the computational cost of the student-teacher model, while improving the detection of anomalous features. We furthermore address the detection of challenging logical anomalies that involve invalid combinations of normal local features, for example, a wrong ordering of objects. We detect these anomalies by efficiently incorporating an autoencoder that analyzes images globally. We evaluate our method, called EfficientAD, on 32 datasets from three industrial anomaly detection dataset collections. EfficientAD sets new standards for both the detection and the localization of anomalies. At a latency of two milliseconds and a throughput of six hundred images per second, it enables a fast handling of anomalies. Together with its low error rate, this makes it an economical solution for real-world applications and a fruitful basis for future research.
abstract_zh: 检测图像中的异常是一项重要任务，尤其是在实时计算机视觉应用中。在这项工作中，我们专注于计算效率，并提出了一种轻量级特征提取器，可以在现代 GPU 上在不到一毫秒的时间内处理图像。然后，我们使用学生-教师的方法来检测异常特征。我们训练学生网络来预测正常（即无异常训练图像）的提取特征。由于学生无法预测自己的特征，因此可以在测试时检测到异常情况。我们提出了一种训练损失，阻止学生模仿教师特征提取器超出正常图像的范围。它使我们能够大幅降低学生-教师模型的计算成本，同时改进异常特征的检测。我们还解决了具有挑战性的逻辑异常的检测，这些异常涉及正常局部特征的无效组合，例如对象的错误排序。我们通过有效地结合全局分析图像的自动编码器来检测这些异常。我们在来自三个工业异常检测数据集集合的 32 个数据集上评估我们的方法（称为 EfficientAD）。 EfficientAD 为异常检测和定位设定了新标准。它的延迟时间为 2 毫秒，吞吐量为每秒 600 张图像，可以快速处理异常情况。再加上其低错误率，这使其成为现实应用的经济解决方案，并为未来研究奠定了富有成果的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EfficientAD方法，在保证检测精度的同时实现毫秒级延迟的视觉异常检测。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中实时视觉异常检测需要兼顾高精度与计算效率，传统方法存在速度慢或资源消耗大的问题。
AI.method: 设计轻量级特征提取器配合学生-教师框架，通过限制学生网络对正常图像的拟合能力实现异常检测，并引入自编码器处理逻辑性异常。
AI.result: 在32个工业数据集上达到新SOTA，实现2ms延迟/600张图像每秒的吞吐量，保持低误判率。
AI.conclusion: EfficientAD为工业实时异常检测提供高效经济的解决方案，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Jingyang Zhang,Nathan Inkawhich,Randolph Linderman,Ryan Luley,Yiran Chen,Hai Li
title: SIO: Synthetic In-Distribution Data Benefits Out-of-Distribution Detection
title_zh: SIO：综合分布内数据有利于分布外检测
abstract: Building up reliable Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detectors is challenging, often requiring the use of OOD data during training. In this work, we develop a data-driven approach which is distinct and complementary to existing works: Instead of using external OOD data, we fully exploit the internal in-distribution (ID) training set by utilizing generative models to produce additional synthetic ID images. The classifier is then trained using a novel objective that computes weighted loss on real and synthetic ID samples together. Our training framework, which is termed SIO, serves as a "plug-and-play" technique that is designed to be compatible with existing and future OOD detection algorithms, including the ones that leverage available OOD training data. Our experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet variants demonstrate that SIO consistently improves the performance of nearly all state-of-the-art (SOTA) OOD detection algorithms. For instance, on the challenging CIFAR-10 v.s. CIFAR-100 detection problem, SIO improves the average OOD detection AUROC of 18 existing methods from 86.25\% to 89.04\% and achieves a new SOTA of 92.94\% according to the OpenOOD benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/zjysteven/SIO.
summary: Building up reliable Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detectors is challenging, often requiring the use of OOD data during training. In this work, we develop a data-driven approach which is distinct and complementary to existing works: Instead of using external OOD data, we fully exploit the internal in-distribution (ID) training set by utilizing generative models to produce additional synthetic ID images. The classifier is then trained using a novel objective that computes weighted loss on real and synthetic ID samples together. Our training framework, which is termed SIO, serves as a "plug-and-play" technique that is designed to be compatible with existing and future OOD detection algorithms, including the ones that leverage available OOD training data. Our experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet variants demonstrate that SIO consistently improves the performance of nearly all state-of-the-art (SOTA) OOD detection algorithms. For instance, on the challenging CIFAR-10 v.s. CIFAR-100 detection problem, SIO improves the average OOD detection AUROC of 18 existing methods from 86.25\% to 89.04\% and achieves a new SOTA of 92.94\% according to the OpenOOD benchmark. Code is available at https://github.com/zjysteven/SIO.
abstract_zh: 构建可靠的分布外 (OOD) 检测器具有挑战性，通常需要在训练期间使用 OOD 数据。在这项工作中，我们开发了一种与现有工作不同且互补的数据驱动方法：我们不使用外部 OOD 数据，而是通过利用生成模型生成额外的合成 ID 图像，充分利用内部分布内 (ID) 训练集。然后使用新的目标来训练分类器，该目标同时计算真实和合成 ID 样本的加权损失。我们的训练框架称为 SIO，是一种“即插即用”技术，旨在与现有和未来的 OOD 检测算法兼容，包括利用可用 OOD 训练数据的算法。我们对 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 变体的实验表明，SIO 持续提高了几乎所有最先进 (SOTA) OOD 检测算法的性能。例如，在具有挑战性的 CIFAR-10 与CIFAR-100 检测问题，SIO 将 18 种现有方法的平均 OOD 检测 AUROC 从 86.25\% 提高到 89.04\%，并根据 OpenOOD 基准达到了 92.94\% 的新 SOTA。代码可在 https://github.com/zjysteven/SIO 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SIO的方法，通过生成合成的内部分布数据来提升分布外检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法通常依赖外部分布外数据进行训练，但实际中此类数据可能难以获取。本文旨在探索无需外部分布外数据即可提升检测性能的新途径。
AI.method: 利用生成模型从内部分布训练集中生成合成样本，结合真实样本通过加权损失函数训练分类器，构建可插拔的SIO训练框架，兼容各类分布外检测算法。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和ImageNet数据集上，SIO使18种现有方法的平均AUROC从86.25%提升至89.04%，并在CIFAR-10对CIFAR-100检测任务中达到92.94%的新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 合成内部分布数据能有效增强分布外检测能力，SIO作为一种无需外部分布外数据的通用方法，为现有及未来检测算法提供了有效改进方案。

CIFAR-100 detection problem, SIO improves the average OOD detection AUROC of 18 existing methods from 86.25\% to 89.04\% and achieves a new SOTA of 92.94\% according to the OpenOOD benchmark.
