authors_text: Jue Wang,Wentao Zhu,Pichao Wang,Xiang Yu,Linda Liu,Mohamed Omar,Raffay Hamid
title: Selective Structured State-Spaces for Long-Form Video Understanding
title_zh: 用于长格式视频理解的选择性结构化状态空间
abstract: Effective modeling of complex spatiotemporal dependencies in long-form videos remains an open problem. The recently proposed Structured State-Space Sequence (S4) model with its linear complexity offers a promising direction in this space. However, we demonstrate that treating all image-tokens equally as done by S4 model can adversely affect its efficiency and accuracy. To address this limitation, we present a novel Selective S4 (i.e., S5) model that employs a lightweight mask generator to adaptively select informative image tokens resulting in more efficient and accurate modeling of long-term spatiotemporal dependencies in videos. Unlike previous mask-based token reduction methods used in transformers, our S5 model avoids the dense self-attention calculation by making use of the guidance of the momentum-updated S4 model. This enables our model to efficiently discard less informative tokens and adapt to various long-form video understanding tasks more effectively. However, as is the case for most token reduction methods, the informative image tokens could be dropped incorrectly. To improve the robustness and the temporal horizon of our model, we propose a novel long-short masked contrastive learning (LSMCL) approach that enables our model to predict longer temporal context using shorter input videos. We present extensive comparative results using three challenging long-form video understanding datasets (LVU, COIN and Breakfast), demonstrating that our approach consistently outperforms the previous state-of-the-art S4 model by up to 9.6% accuracy while reducing its memory footprint by 23%.
summary: Effective modeling of complex spatiotemporal dependencies in long-form videos remains an open problem. The recently proposed Structured State-Space Sequence (S4) model with its linear complexity offers a promising direction in this space. However, we demonstrate that treating all image-tokens equally as done by S4 model can adversely affect its efficiency and accuracy. To address this limitation, we present a novel Selective S4 (i.e., S5) model that employs a lightweight mask generator to adaptively select informative image tokens resulting in more efficient and accurate modeling of long-term spatiotemporal dependencies in videos. Unlike previous mask-based token reduction methods used in transformers, our S5 model avoids the dense self-attention calculation by making use of the guidance of the momentum-updated S4 model. This enables our model to efficiently discard less informative tokens and adapt to various long-form video understanding tasks more effectively. However, as is the case for most token reduction methods, the informative image tokens could be dropped incorrectly. To improve the robustness and the temporal horizon of our model, we propose a novel long-short masked contrastive learning (LSMCL) approach that enables our model to predict longer temporal context using shorter input videos. We present extensive comparative results using three challenging long-form video understanding datasets (LVU, COIN and Breakfast), demonstrating that our approach consistently outperforms the previous state-of-the-art S4 model by up to 9.6% accuracy while reducing its memory footprint by 23%.
abstract_zh: 对长视频中复杂的时空依赖性进行有效建模仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。最近提出的结构化状态空间序列（S4）模型以其线性复杂性为该领域提供了一个有希望的方向。然而，我们证明，像 S4 模型一样平等地对待所有图像标记可能会对其效率和准确性产生不利影响。为了解决这一限制，我们提出了一种新颖的选择性 S4（即 S5）模型，该模型采用轻量级掩模生成器来自适应地选择信息丰富的图像标记，从而对视频中的长期时空依赖性进行更高效、更准确的建模。与之前 Transformer 中使用的基于掩码的 token 缩减方法不同，我们的 S5 模型通过利用动量更新的 S4 模型的指导来避免密集的自注意力计算。这使得我们的模型能够有效地丢弃信息量较少的标记，并更有效地适应各种长格式视频理解任务。然而，与大多数令牌减少方法的情况一样，信息图像令牌可能会被错误地丢弃。为了提高模型的鲁棒性和时间范围，我们提出了一种新颖的长短屏蔽对比学习（LSMCL）方法，使我们的模型能够使用较短的输入视频来预测较长的时间上下文。我们使用三个具有挑战性的长格式视频理解数据集（LVU、COIN 和 Breakfast）提供了广泛的比较结果，证明我们的方法始终优于之前最先进的 S4 模型，准确率高达 9.6%，同时内存占用减少了 23%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种选择性结构化状态空间模型（S5），用于提高长视频理解任务的效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的结构化状态空间序列（S4）模型在处理长视频时，将所有图像标记视为同等重要，这可能影响其效率和准确性，因此需要改进方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的选择性S4模型（S5），通过轻量级的掩码生成器自适应选择信息丰富的图像标记，并引入了长短期掩码对比学习（LSMCL）方法，以提高模型的鲁棒性和时间范围。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在三个具有挑战性的长视频理解数据集（LVU、COIN和Breakfast）上，准确率比之前的S4模型提高了9.6%，同时减少了23%的内存占用。
AI.conclusion: S5模型通过自适应选择信息丰富的图像标记和引入LSMCL方法，显著提高了长视频理解任务的性能和效率。

authors_text: Pedro Carvalho,Jessica Mégane,Nuno Lourenço,Penousal Machado
title: Context Matters: Adaptive Mutation for Grammars
title_zh: 上下文很重要：语法的自适应变异
abstract: This work proposes Adaptive Facilitated Mutation, a self-adaptive mutation method for Structured Grammatical Evolution (SGE), biologically inspired by the theory of facilitated variation. In SGE, the genotype of individuals contains a list for each non-terminal of the grammar that defines the search space. In our proposed mutation, each individual contains an array with a different, self-adaptive mutation rate for each non-terminal. We also propose Function Grouped Grammars, a grammar design procedure, to enhance the benefits of the proposed mutation. Experiments were conducted on three symbolic regression benchmarks using Probabilistic Structured Grammatical Evolution (PSGE), a variant of SGE. Results show our approach is similar or better when compared with the standard grammar and mutation.
summary: This work proposes Adaptive Facilitated Mutation, a self-adaptive mutation method for Structured Grammatical Evolution (SGE), biologically inspired by the theory of facilitated variation. In SGE, the genotype of individuals contains a list for each non-terminal of the grammar that defines the search space. In our proposed mutation, each individual contains an array with a different, self-adaptive mutation rate for each non-terminal. We also propose Function Grouped Grammars, a grammar design procedure, to enhance the benefits of the proposed mutation. Experiments were conducted on three symbolic regression benchmarks using Probabilistic Structured Grammatical Evolution (PSGE), a variant of SGE. Results show our approach is similar or better when compared with the standard grammar and mutation.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了自适应促进突变，这是一种结构化语法进化（SGE）的自适应突变方法，其生物学灵感来自于促进变异理论。在 SGE 中，个体的基因型包含定义搜索空间的语法的每个非终结符的列表。在我们提出的突变中，每个个体都包含一个数组，每个非终端具有不同的自适应突变率。我们还提出了函数分组语法（Function Grouped Grammars），一种语法设计程序，以增强所提出的突变的好处。使用概率结构化语法进化（PSGE）（SGE 的一种变体）在三个符号回归基准上进行了实验。结果表明，与标准语法和变异相比，我们的方法相似或更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应促进突变方法用于结构语法进化（SGE），结合函数分组语法设计，以提升符号回归任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SGE中固定突变率难以适应不同非终端的搜索需求，导致效率低下。受生物促进变异理论启发，需设计自适应突变机制与语法结构优化方案。
AI.method: 提出自适应促进突变（AFM），为每个非终端分配独立突变率；设计函数分组语法增强突变效果，通过PSGE在符号回归基准上验证。
AI.result: 在三个符号回归基准测试中，AFM方法表现与标准方法相当或更优，证明其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 自适应突变率与函数分组语法协同优化可提升SGE性能，为语法进化算法提供新思路。

authors_text: Dávid Magyar,Máté Cserép,Zoltán Vincellér,Attila D. Molnár
title: Waste Detection and Change Analysis based on Multispectral Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 基于多光谱卫星图像的废物检测和变化分析
abstract: One of the biggest environmental problems of our time is the increase in illegal landfills in forests, rivers, on river banks and other secluded places. In addition, waste in rivers causes damage not only locally, but also downstream, both in the water and washed ashore. Large islands of waste can also form at hydroelectric power stations and dams, and if they continue to flow, they can cause further damage to the natural environment along the river. Recent studies have also proved that rivers are the main source of plastic pollution in marine environments. Monitoring potential sources of danger is therefore highly important for effective waste collection for related organizations. In our research we analyze two possible forms of waste detection: identification of hot-spots (i.e. illegal waste dumps) and identification of water-surface river blockages. We used medium to high-resolution multispectral satellite imagery as our data source, especially focusing on the Tisza river as our study area. We found that using satellite imagery and machine learning are viable to locate and to monitor the change of the previously detected waste.
summary: One of the biggest environmental problems of our time is the increase in illegal landfills in forests, rivers, on river banks and other secluded places. In addition, waste in rivers causes damage not only locally, but also downstream, both in the water and washed ashore. Large islands of waste can also form at hydroelectric power stations and dams, and if they continue to flow, they can cause further damage to the natural environment along the river. Recent studies have also proved that rivers are the main source of plastic pollution in marine environments. Monitoring potential sources of danger is therefore highly important for effective waste collection for related organizations. In our research we analyze two possible forms of waste detection: identification of hot-spots (i.e. illegal waste dumps) and identification of water-surface river blockages. We used medium to high-resolution multispectral satellite imagery as our data source, especially focusing on the Tisza river as our study area. We found that using satellite imagery and machine learning are viable to locate and to monitor the change of the previously detected waste.
abstract_zh: 我们这个时代最大的环境问题之一是森林、河流、河岸和其他僻静地方非法垃圾填埋场的增加。此外，河流中的废物不仅对当地造成损害，而且对下游造成损害，无论是在水中还是冲上岸。水力发电站和水坝也会形成大型垃圾岛，如果它们继续流动，会对沿河自然环境造成进一步破坏。最近的研究也证明，河流是海洋环境中塑料污染的主要来源。因此，监测潜在危险源对于相关组织的有效废物收集非常重要。在我们的研究中，我们分析了两种可能的废物检测形式：识别热点（即非法废物倾倒场）和识别水面河流堵塞。我们使用中高分辨率多光谱卫星图像作为我们的数据源，特别关注蒂萨河作为我们的研究区域。我们发现，使用卫星图像和机器学习可以定位并监测先前检测到的废物的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文利用多光谱卫星影像检测非法垃圾堆放点及河流阻塞物，并分析其变化情况。
AI.motivation: 非法垃圾堆放和河流垃圾对环境造成严重危害，传统监测手段效率低下，亟需有效技术手段进行实时监控。
AI.method: 采用中高分辨率多光谱卫星影像数据，结合机器学习算法，以蒂萨河为研究区域进行垃圾热点识别与阻塞物检测。
AI.result: 验证了卫星影像与机器学习结合的方法可有效定位垃圾并监测其动态变化，为环境管理提供数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为非法垃圾监测和环境治理提供了可行的技术路径，有助于提升河流生态系统的保护效率。

search_text: Waste Detection and Change Analysis based on Multispectral Satellite Imagery 基于多光谱卫星图像的废物检测和变化分析 One of the biggest environmental problems of our time is the increase in illegal landfills in forests, rivers, on river banks and other secluded places. In addition, waste in rivers causes damage not only locally, but also downstream, both in the water and washed ashore. Large islands of waste can also form at hydroelectric power stations and dams, and if they continue to flow, they can cause further damage to the natural environment along the river. Recent studies have also proved that rivers are the main source of plastic pollution in marine environments. Monitoring potential sources of danger is therefore highly important for effective waste collection for related organizations. In our research we analyze two possible forms of waste detection: identification of hot-spots (i.e. illegal waste dumps) and identification of water-surface river blockages. We used medium to high-resolution multispectral satellite imagery as our data source, especially focusing on the Tisza river as our study area. We found that using satellite imagery and machine learning are viable to locate and to monitor the change of the previously detected waste. 我们这个时代最大的环境问题之一是森林、河流、河岸和其他僻静地方非法垃圾填埋场的增加。此外，河流中的废物不仅对当地造成损害，而且对下游造成损害，无论是在水中还是冲上岸。水力发电站和水坝也会形成大型垃圾岛，如果它们继续流动，会对沿河自然环境造成进一步破坏。最近的研究也证明，河流是海洋环境中塑料污染的主要来源。因此，监测潜在危险源对于相关组织的有效废物收集非常重要。在我们的研究中，我们分析了两种可能的废物检测形式：识别热点（即非法废物倾倒场）和识别水面河流堵塞。我们使用中高分辨率多光谱卫星图像作为我们的数据源，特别关注蒂萨河作为我们的研究区域。我们发现，使用卫星图像和机器学习可以定位并监测先前检测到的废物的变化。 本文利用多光谱卫星影像检测非法垃圾堆放点及河流阻塞物，并分析其变化情况。 Dávid Magyar,Máté Cserép,Zoltán Vincellér,Attila D. Molnár cs.CV

authors_text: Made Raharja Surya Mahadi,Nugraha Priya Utama
title: Indonesian Text-to-Image Synthesis with Sentence-BERT and FastGAN
title_zh: 使用句子 BERT 和 FastGAN 进行印尼语文本到图像合成
abstract: Currently, text-to-image synthesis uses text encoder and image generator architecture. Research on this topic is challenging. This is because of the domain gap between natural language and vision. Nowadays, most research on this topic only focuses on producing a photo-realistic image, but the other domain, in this case, is the language, which is less concentrated. A lot of the current research uses English as the input text. Besides, there are many languages around the world. Bahasa Indonesia, as the official language of Indonesia, is quite popular. This language has been taught in Philipines, Australia, and Japan. Translating or recreating a new dataset into another language with good quality will cost a lot. Research on this domain is necessary because we need to examine how the image generator performs in other languages besides generating photo-realistic images. To achieve this, we translate the CUB dataset into Bahasa using google translate and manually by humans. We use Sentence BERT as the text encoder and FastGAN as the image generator. FastGAN uses lots of skip excitation modules and auto-encoder to generate an image with resolution 512x512x3, which is twice as bigger as the current state-of-the-art model (Zhang, Xu, Li, Zhang, Wang, Huang and Metaxas, 2019). We also get 4.76 +- 0.43 and 46.401 on Inception Score and Fréchet inception distance, respectively, and comparable with the current English text-to-image generation models. The mean opinion score also gives as 3.22 out of 5, which means the generated image is acceptable by humans. Link to source code: https://github.com/share424/Indonesian-Text-to-Image-synthesis-with-Sentence-BERT-and-FastGAN

This is because of the domain gap between natural language and vision. Nowadays, most research on this topic only focuses on producing a photo-realistic image, but the other domain, in this case, is the language, which is less concentrated. A lot of the current research uses English as the input text. Besides, there are many languages around the world. Bahasa Indonesia, as the official language of Indonesia, is quite popular. This language has been taught in Philipines, Australia, and Japan. Translating or recreating a new dataset into another language with good quality will cost a lot. Research on this domain is necessary because we need to examine how the image generator performs in other languages besides generating photo-realistic images. To achieve this, we translate the CUB dataset into Bahasa using google translate and manually by humans. We use Sentence BERT as the text encoder and FastGAN as the image generator. FastGAN uses lots of skip excitation modules and auto-encoder to generate an image with resolution 512x512x3, which is twice as bigger as the current state-of-the-art model (Zhang, Xu, Li, Zhang, Wang, Huang and Metaxas, 2019). We also get 4.76 +- 0.43 and 46.401 on Inception Score and Fréchet inception distance, respectively, and comparable with the current English text-to-image generation models. The mean opinion score also gives as 3.22 out of 5, which means the generated image is acceptable by humans. Link to source code: https://github.com/share424/Indonesian-Text-to-Image-synthesis-with-Sentence-BERT-and-FastGAN
abstract_zh: 目前，文本到图像的合成使用文本编码器和图像生成器架构。关于这个主题的研究具有挑战性。这是因为自然语言和视觉之间的领域差距。如今，大多数关于这个主题的研究只集中于生成逼真的图像，但在这种情况下，另一个领域是语言，它不太集中。目前很多研究都使用英语作为输入文本。此外，世界上还有很多种语言。印度尼西亚语作为印度尼西亚的官方语言，相当流行。这种语言已在菲律宾、澳大利亚和日本教授。将新的数据集翻译或重新创建为另一种高质量的语言将花费大量成本。对这个领域的研究是必要的，因为除了生成逼真的图像之外，我们还需要检查图像生成器在其他语言中的表现。为了实现这一目标，我们使用谷歌翻译并由人工手动将 CUB 数据集翻译成马来语。我们使用 Sentence BERT 作为文本编码器，使用 FastGAN 作为图像生成器。 FastGAN 使用大量跳跃激励模块和自动编码器来生成分辨率为 512x512x3 的图像，该图像是当前最先进模型的两倍（Zhang、Xu、Li、Zhang、Wang、Huang 和 Metaxas，2019）。我们还分别在 Inception Score 和 Fréchet inception distance 上得到 4.76 ± 0.43 和 46.401，与当前的英文文本到图像生成模型相当。平均意见得分也为 3.22（满分 5 分），这意味着生成的图像是人类可以接受的。源代码链接：https://github.com/share424/Indonesian-Text-to-Image-synthesis-with-Sentence-BERT-and-FastGAN

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Sentence-BERT和FastGAN的印尼语文本到图像合成方法，通过翻译CUB数据集实现多语言支持。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像研究过度依赖英语且忽视语言领域差异，需验证图像生成器在非英语（如印尼语）场景下的表现，同时降低多语言数据集构建成本。
AI.method: 使用Sentence-BERT编码文本，FastGAN生成512x512分辨率图像，结合跳过激励模块与自编码器。通过谷歌翻译和人工校对将CUB数据集翻译为印尼语。
AI.result: 在Inception Score（4.76±0.43）和Fréchet Inception Distance（46.401）指标上表现与英语模型相当，人类评估得分为3.22/5。
AI.conclusion: 证明了Sentence-BERT与FastGAN组合在印尼语文本到图像任务中的有效性，为多语言生成研究提供了可行方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 证明了Sentence-BERT与FastGAN组合在印尼语文本到图像任务中的有效性，为多语言生成研究提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Stamatis Alexandropoulos,Christos Sakaridis,Petros Maragos
title: OVeNet: Offset Vector Network for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: OVeNet：用于语义分割的偏移向量网络
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a fundamental task in visual scene understanding. We focus on the supervised setting, where ground-truth semantic annotations are available. Based on knowledge about the high regularity of real-world scenes, we propose a method for improving class predictions by learning to selectively exploit information from neighboring pixels. In particular, our method is based on the prior that for each pixel, there is a seed pixel in its close neighborhood sharing the same prediction with the former. Motivated by this prior, we design a novel two-head network, named Offset Vector Network (OVeNet), which generates both standard semantic predictions and a dense 2D offset vector field indicating the offset from each pixel to the respective seed pixel, which is used to compute an alternative, seed-based semantic prediction. The two predictions are adaptively fused at each pixel using a learnt dense confidence map for the predicted offset vector field. We supervise offset vectors indirectly via optimizing the seed-based prediction and via a novel loss on the confidence map. Compared to the baseline state-of-the-art architectures HRNet and HRNet+OCR on which OVeNet is built, the latter achieves significant performance gains on three prominent benchmarks for semantic segmentation, namely Cityscapes, ACDC and ADE20K. Code is available at https://github.com/stamatisalex/OVeNet
summary: Semantic segmentation is a fundamental task in visual scene understanding. We focus on the supervised setting, where ground-truth semantic annotations are available. Based on knowledge about the high regularity of real-world scenes, we propose a method for improving class predictions by learning to selectively exploit information from neighboring pixels. In particular, our method is based on the prior that for each pixel, there is a seed pixel in its close neighborhood sharing the same prediction with the former. Motivated by this prior, we design a novel two-head network, named Offset Vector Network (OVeNet), which generates both standard semantic predictions and a dense 2D offset vector field indicating the offset from each pixel to the respective seed pixel, which is used to compute an alternative, seed-based semantic prediction. The two predictions are adaptively fused at each pixel using a learnt dense confidence map for the predicted offset vector field. We supervise offset vectors indirectly via optimizing the seed-based prediction and via a novel loss on the confidence map. Compared to the baseline state-of-the-art architectures HRNet and HRNet+OCR on which OVeNet is built, the latter achieves significant performance gains on three prominent benchmarks for semantic segmentation, namely Cityscapes, ACDC and ADE20K. Code is available at https://github.com/stamatisalex/OVeNet
abstract_zh: 语义分割是视觉场景理解中的一项基本任务。我们专注于监督环境，其中可以使用真实的语义注释。基于对现实世界场景高度规律性的了解，我们提出了一种通过学习选择性地利用相邻像素的信息来改进类预测的方法。特别是，我们的方法基于先验知识，即对于每个像素，其近邻中有一个种子像素与前者共享相同的预测。受此先验的启发，我们设计了一种新颖的双头网络，名为偏移向量网络（OVeNet），它生成标准语义预测和密集的二维偏移向量场，指示从每个像素到相应种子像素的偏移，该向量场用于计算替代的基于种子的语义预测。使用预测偏移向量场的学习密集置信图，在每个像素处自适应地融合两个预测。我们通过优化基于种子的预测和置信图上的新损失来间接监督偏移向量。与 OVeNet 所基于的最先进的基线架构 HRNet 和 HRNet+OCR 相比，后者在三个著名的语义分割基准（即 Cityscapes、ACDC 和 ADE20K）上取得了显着的性能提升。代码可在 https://github.com/stamatisalex/OVeNet 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出OVeNet，一种通过学习邻域像素偏移向量提升语义分割精度的双头网络架构。
AI.motivation: 基于现实场景的高规律性，利用邻近像素间语义一致性先验，通过种子像素信息增强预测可靠性。
AI.method: 设计双头网络生成标准预测与偏移向量场，结合学习的置信度图进行自适应融合，通过种子预测优化和置信度损失间接监督偏移向量。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、ACDC和ADE20K基准测试中，OVeNet较HRNet/HRNet+OCR基线模型取得显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入偏移向量与置信度融合机制，OVeNet有效提升了语义分割的准确性和鲁棒性。

search_text: OVeNet: Offset Vector Network for Semantic Segmentation OVeNet：用于语义分割的偏移向量网络 Semantic segmentation is a fundamental task in visual scene understanding. We focus on the supervised setting, where ground-truth semantic annotations are available. Based on knowledge about the high regularity of real-world scenes, we propose a method for improving class predictions by learning to selectively exploit information from neighboring pixels. In particular, our method is based on the prior that for each pixel, there is a seed pixel in its close neighborhood sharing the same prediction with the former. Motivated by this prior, we design a novel two-head network, named Offset Vector Network (OVeNet), which generates both standard semantic predictions and a dense 2D offset vector field indicating the offset from each pixel to the respective seed pixel, which is used to compute an alternative, seed-based semantic prediction. The two predictions are adaptively fused at each pixel using a learnt dense confidence map for the predicted offset vector field. We supervise offset vectors indirectly via optimizing the seed-based prediction and via a novel loss on the confidence map. Compared to the baseline state-of-the-art architectures HRNet and HRNet+OCR on which OVeNet is built, the latter achieves significant performance gains on three prominent benchmarks for semantic segmentation, namely Cityscapes, ACDC and ADE20K. Code is available at https://github.com/stamatisalex/OVeNet 语义分割是视觉场景理解中的一项基本任务。我们专注于监督环境，其中可以使用真实的语义注释。基于对现实世界场景高度规律性的了解，我们提出了一种通过学习选择性地利用相邻像素的信息来改进类预测的方法。特别是，我们的方法基于先验知识，即对于每个像素，其近邻中有一个种子像素与前者共享相同的预测。受此先验的启发，我们设计了一种新颖的双头网络，名为偏移向量网络（OVeNet），它生成标准语义预测和密集的二维偏移向量场，指示从每个像素到相应种子像素的偏移，该向量场用于计算替代的基于种子的语义预测。使用预测偏移向量场的学习密集置信图，在每个像素处自适应地融合两个预测。我们通过优化基于种子的预测和置信图上的新损失来间接监督偏移向量。与 OVeNet 所基于的最先进的基线架构 HRNet 和 HRNet+OCR 相比，后者在三个著名的语义分割基准（即 Cityscapes、ACDC 和 ADE20K）上取得了显着的性能提升。代码可在 https://github.com/stamatisalex/OVeNet 获取 本文提出OVeNet，一种通过学习邻域像素偏移向量提升语义分割精度的双头网络架构。 Stamatis Alexandropoulos,Christos Sakaridis,Petros Maragos cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Annika Stein
title: Improving robustness of jet tagging algorithms with adversarial training: exploring the loss surface
title_zh: 通过对抗训练提高喷射标记算法的鲁棒性：探索损失表面
comment: 5 pages, 2 figures; submitted to ACAT 2022 proceedings
comments: 5 pages, 2 figures; submitted to ACAT 2022 proceedings
abstract: In the field of high-energy physics, deep learning algorithms continue to gain in relevance and provide performance improvements over traditional methods, for example when identifying rare signals or finding complex patterns. From an analyst's perspective, obtaining highest possible performance is desirable, but recently, some attention has been shifted towards studying robustness of models to investigate how well these perform under slight distortions of input features. Especially for tasks that involve many (low-level) inputs, the application of deep neural networks brings new challenges. In the context of jet flavor tagging, adversarial attacks are used to probe a typical classifier's vulnerability and can be understood as a model for systematic uncertainties. A corresponding defense strategy, adversarial training, improves robustness, while maintaining high performance. Investigating the loss surface corresponding to the inputs and models in question reveals geometric interpretations of robustness, taking correlations into account.
summary: In the field of high-energy physics, deep learning algorithms continue to gain in relevance and provide performance improvements over traditional methods, for example when identifying rare signals or finding complex patterns. From an analyst's perspective, obtaining highest possible performance is desirable, but recently, some attention has been shifted towards studying robustness of models to investigate how well these perform under slight distortions of input features. Especially for tasks that involve many (low-level) inputs, the application of deep neural networks brings new challenges. In the context of jet flavor tagging, adversarial attacks are used to probe a typical classifier's vulnerability and can be understood as a model for systematic uncertainties. A corresponding defense strategy, adversarial training, improves robustness, while maintaining high performance. Investigating the loss surface corresponding to the inputs and models in question reveals geometric interpretations of robustness, taking correlations into account.
abstract_zh: 在高能物理领域，深度学习算法不断获得相关性，并比传统方法提供性能改进，例如在识别罕见信号或发现复杂模式时。从分析师的角度来看，获得尽可能高的性能是可取的，但最近，一些注意力已经转向研究模型的鲁棒性，以研究这些模型在输入特征轻微失真的情况下的表现如何。特别是对于涉及许多（低级）输入的任务，深度神经网络的应用带来了新的挑战。在喷气式飞机风味标签的背景下，对抗性攻击用于探测典型分类器的漏洞，并且可以理解为系统不确定性的模型。相应的防御策略，即对抗性训练，可以提高鲁棒性，同时保持高性能。研究与相关输入和模型相对应的损失表面揭示了鲁棒性的几何解释，并考虑到相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过对抗训练提升喷注标签算法的鲁棒性，并探索损失表面的几何解释。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在高能物理中表现优异，但模型对输入扰动的鲁棒性不足，尤其在处理低级输入时易受对抗攻击影响，需研究防御策略及鲁棒性本质。
AI.method: 采用对抗训练增强模型鲁棒性，通过分析输入与模型的损失表面，结合相关性揭示鲁棒性的几何特征。
AI.result: 对抗训练有效提升模型鲁棒性且保持高性能，损失表面分析展示了鲁棒性与输入特征相关性的几何关联。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练是提升喷注标签算法鲁棒性的有效方法，损失表面分析为理解模型鲁棒性提供了新视角，对高能物理中的深度学习应用具有指导意义。

authors_text: Jiacheng Li,Chang Chen,Zhen Cheng,Zhiwei Xiong
title: Toward DNN of LUTs: Learning Efficient Image Restoration with Multiple Look-Up Tables
title_zh: 迈向 LUT 的 DNN：使用多个查找表学习高效的图像恢复
abstract: The widespread usage of high-definition screens on edge devices stimulates a strong demand for efficient image restoration algorithms. The way of caching deep learning models in a look-up table (LUT) is recently introduced to respond to this demand. However, the size of a single LUT grows exponentially with the increase of its indexing capacity, which restricts its receptive field and thus the performance. To overcome this intrinsic limitation of the single-LUT solution, we propose a universal method to construct multiple LUTs like a neural network, termed MuLUT. Firstly, we devise novel complementary indexing patterns, as well as a general implementation for arbitrary patterns, to construct multiple LUTs in parallel. Secondly, we propose a re-indexing mechanism to enable hierarchical indexing between cascaded LUTs. Finally, we introduce channel indexing to allow cross-channel interaction, enabling LUTs to process color channels jointly. In these principled ways, the total size of MuLUT is linear to its indexing capacity, yielding a practical solution to obtain superior performance with the enlarged receptive field. We examine the advantage of MuLUT on various image restoration tasks, including super-resolution, demosaicing, denoising, and deblocking. MuLUT achieves a significant improvement over the single-LUT solution, e.g., up to 1.1dB PSNR for super-resolution and up to 2.8dB PSNR for grayscale denoising, while preserving its efficiency, which is 100$\times$ less in energy cost compared with lightweight deep neural networks. Our code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/ddlee-cn/MuLUT.
summary: The widespread usage of high-definition screens on edge devices stimulates a strong demand for efficient image restoration algorithms. The way of caching deep learning models in a look-up table (LUT) is recently introduced to respond to this demand. However, the size of a single LUT grows exponentially with the increase of its indexing capacity, which restricts its receptive field and thus the performance. To overcome this intrinsic limitation of the single-LUT solution, we propose a universal method to construct multiple LUTs like a neural network, termed MuLUT. Firstly, we devise novel complementary indexing patterns, as well as a general implementation for arbitrary patterns, to construct multiple LUTs in parallel. Secondly, we propose a re-indexing mechanism to enable hierarchical indexing between cascaded LUTs. Finally, we introduce channel indexing to allow cross-channel interaction, enabling LUTs to process color channels jointly. In these principled ways, the total size of MuLUT is linear to its indexing capacity, yielding a practical solution to obtain superior performance with the enlarged receptive field. We examine the advantage of MuLUT on various image restoration tasks, including super-resolution, demosaicing, denoising, and deblocking. MuLUT achieves a significant improvement over the single-LUT solution, e.g., up to 1.1dB PSNR for super-resolution and up to 2.8dB PSNR for grayscale denoising, while preserving its efficiency, which is 100$\times$ less in energy cost compared with lightweight deep neural networks. Our code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/ddlee-cn/MuLUT.
abstract_zh: 高清屏幕在边缘设备上的广泛使用激发了对高效图像恢复算法的强烈需求。最近引入了在查找表（LUT）中缓存深度学习模型的方式来响应这一需求。然而，单个LUT的大小随着其索引容量的增加而呈指数级增长，这限制了其感受野，从而限制了性能。为了克服单 LUT 解决方案的固有局限性，我们提出了一种通用方法来构建多个 LUT（如神经网络），称为 MuLUT。首先，我们设计了新颖的互补索引模式以及任意模式的通用实现，以并行构建多个 LUT。其次，我们提出了一种重新索引机制，以实现级联 LUT 之间的分层索引。最后，我们引入通道索引以允许跨通道交互，使 LUT 能够联合处理颜色通道。在这些原则性的方式中，MuLUT 的总大小与其索引容量成线性关系，从而产生了一种实用的解决方案，可以通过扩大的感受野获得卓越的性能。我们研究了 MuLUT 在各种图像恢复任务上的优势，包括超分辨率、去马赛克、去噪和去块。 MuLUT 比单 LUT 解决方案取得了显着改进，例如，超分辨率高达 1.1dB PSNR，灰度去噪高达 2.8dB PSNR，同时保持其效率，与轻量级深度神经网络相比，能源成本降低了 100 倍。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://github.com/ddlee-cn/MuLUT 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MuLUT的方法，通过构建多个查找表（LUT）来实现高效的图像修复，解决了单个LUT在扩展性上的限制。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率屏幕在边缘设备的普及推动了高效图像修复算法的需求，但单个LUT的大小随索引容量指数增长，限制了其性能。
AI.method: 设计互补索引模式和分层重索引机制，结合通道索引实现跨通道交互，使多个LUT并行工作，总大小线性增长。
AI.result: 在超分辨率、去噪等任务中，MuLUT相比单LUT方案PSNR提升最高达2.8dB，且能耗仅为轻量级神经网络的1/100。
AI.conclusion: MuLUT通过多LUT结构有效克服了单LUT的扩展性限制，在保持高效性的同时显著提升了图像修复性能。

search_text: Toward DNN of LUTs: Learning Efficient Image Restoration with Multiple Look-Up Tables 迈向 LUT 的 DNN：使用多个查找表学习高效的图像恢复 The widespread usage of high-definition screens on edge devices stimulates a strong demand for efficient image restoration algorithms. The way of caching deep learning models in a look-up table (LUT) is recently introduced to respond to this demand. However, the size of a single LUT grows exponentially with the increase of its indexing capacity, which restricts its receptive field and thus the performance. To overcome this intrinsic limitation of the single-LUT solution, we propose a universal method to construct multiple LUTs like a neural network, termed MuLUT. Firstly, we devise novel complementary indexing patterns, as well as a general implementation for arbitrary patterns, to construct multiple LUTs in parallel. Secondly, we propose a re-indexing mechanism to enable hierarchical indexing between cascaded LUTs. Finally, we introduce channel indexing to allow cross-channel interaction, enabling LUTs to process color channels jointly. In these principled ways, the total size of MuLUT is linear to its indexing capacity, yielding a practical solution to obtain superior performance with the enlarged receptive field. We examine the advantage of MuLUT on various image restoration tasks, including super-resolution, demosaicing, denoising, and deblocking. MuLUT achieves a significant improvement over the single-LUT solution, e.g., up to 1.1dB PSNR for super-resolution and up to 2.8dB PSNR for grayscale denoising, while preserving its efficiency, which is 100$\times$ less in energy cost compared with lightweight deep neural networks. Our code and trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/ddlee-cn/MuLUT. 高清屏幕在边缘设备上的广泛使用激发了对高效图像恢复算法的强烈需求。最近引入了在查找表（LUT）中缓存深度学习模型的方式来响应这一需求。然而，单个LUT的大小随着其索引容量的增加而呈指数级增长，这限制了其感受野，从而限制了性能。为了克服单 LUT 解决方案的固有局限性，我们提出了一种通用方法来构建多个 LUT（如神经网络），称为 MuLUT。首先，我们设计了新颖的互补索引模式以及任意模式的通用实现，以并行构建多个 LUT。其次，我们提出了一种重新索引机制，以实现级联 LUT 之间的分层索引。最后，我们引入通道索引以允许跨通道交互，使 LUT 能够联合处理颜色通道。在这些原则性的方式中，MuLUT 的总大小与其索引容量成线性关系，从而产生了一种实用的解决方案，可以通过扩大的感受野获得卓越的性能。我们研究了 MuLUT 在各种图像恢复任务上的优势，包括超分辨率、去马赛克、去噪和去块。 MuLUT 比单 LUT 解决方案取得了显着改进，例如，超分辨率高达 1.1dB PSNR，灰度去噪高达 2.8dB PSNR，同时保持其效率，与轻量级深度神经网络相比，能源成本降低了 100 倍。我们的代码和经过训练的模型可在 https://github.com/ddlee-cn/MuLUT 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种名为MuLUT的方法，通过构建多个查找表（LUT）来实现高效的图像修复，解决了单个LUT在扩展性上的限制。 Jiacheng Li,Chang Chen,Zhen Cheng,Zhiwei Xiong cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Chao Chen,Yu-Shen Liu,Zhizhong Han
title: Unsupervised Inference of Signed Distance Functions from Single Sparse Point Clouds without Learning Priors
title_zh: 无需学习先验即可从单个稀疏点云无监督地推断有符号距离函数
abstract: It is vital to infer signed distance functions (SDFs) from 3D point clouds. The latest methods rely on generalizing the priors learned from large scale supervision. However, the learned priors do not generalize well to various geometric variations that are unseen during training, especially for extremely sparse point clouds. To resolve this issue, we present a neural network to directly infer SDFs from single sparse point clouds without using signed distance supervision, learned priors or even normals. Our insight here is to learn surface parameterization and SDFs inference in an end-to-end manner. To make up the sparsity, we leverage parameterized surfaces as a coarse surface sampler to provide many coarse surface estimations in training iterations, according to which we mine supervision and our thin plate splines (TPS) based network infers SDFs as smooth functions in a statistical way. Our method significantly improves the generalization ability and accuracy in unseen point clouds. Our experimental results show our advantages over the state-of-the-art methods in surface reconstruction for sparse point clouds under synthetic datasets and real scans.The code is available at \url{https://github.com/chenchao15/NeuralTPS}.
summary: It is vital to infer signed distance functions (SDFs) from 3D point clouds. The latest methods rely on generalizing the priors learned from large scale supervision. However, the learned priors do not generalize well to various geometric variations that are unseen during training, especially for extremely sparse point clouds. To resolve this issue, we present a neural network to directly infer SDFs from single sparse point clouds without using signed distance supervision, learned priors or even normals. Our insight here is to learn surface parameterization and SDFs inference in an end-to-end manner. To make up the sparsity, we leverage parameterized surfaces as a coarse surface sampler to provide many coarse surface estimations in training iterations, according to which we mine supervision and our thin plate splines (TPS) based network infers SDFs as smooth functions in a statistical way. Our method significantly improves the generalization ability and accuracy in unseen point clouds. Our experimental results show our advantages over the state-of-the-art methods in surface reconstruction for sparse point clouds under synthetic datasets and real scans.The code is available at \url{https://github.com/chenchao15/NeuralTPS}.
abstract_zh: 从 3D 点云推断有符号距离函数 (SDF) 至关重要。最新的方法依赖于概括从大规模监督中学到的先验知识。然而，学习到的先验不能很好地泛化到训练期间看不见的各种几何变化，特别是对于极其稀疏的点云。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个神经网络，可以直接从单个稀疏点云推断 SDF，而不使用符号距离监督、学习先验甚至法线。我们的见解是以端到端的方式学习表面参数化和 SDF 推理。为了弥补稀疏性，我们利用参数化表面作为粗糙表面采样器，在训练迭代中提供许多粗糙表面估计，根据这些估计，我们挖掘监督，并且基于薄板样条（TPS）的网络以统计方式将 SDF 推断为平滑函数。我们的方法显着提高了看不见的点云的泛化能力和准确性。我们的实验结果表明，我们在合成数据集和真实扫描下的稀疏点云表面重建方面优于最先进的方法。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/chenchao15/NeuralTPS} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需学习先验知识的神经网络方法，直接从单个稀疏点云中推断符号距离函数（SDF），以解决现有方法在稀疏点云重建中的泛化不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于大规模监督学习的先验知识，但难以泛化到训练中未见的几何变化，尤其在极端稀疏点云场景下表现不佳。
AI.method: 通过端到端学习表面参数化与SDF推断，利用参数化表面作为粗略采样器生成训练监督，并基于薄板样条（TPS）网络以统计方式推断平滑SDF。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实扫描的稀疏点云重建任务中，该方法在泛化能力和精度上均优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需监督信号或先验知识，有效提升了稀疏点云表面重建的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Kasun Weerakoon,Tianrui Guan,Mason Russell,Damon Conover,Jason Pusey,Dinesh Manocha
title: VERN: Vegetation-aware Robot Navigation in Dense Unstructured Outdoor Environments
title_zh: VERN：密集非结构化室外环境中的植被感知机器人导航
abstract: We propose a novel method for autonomous legged robot navigation in densely vegetated environments with a variety of pliable/traversable and non-pliable/untraversable vegetation. We present a novel few-shot learning classifier that can be trained on a few hundred RGB images to differentiate flora that can be navigated through, from the ones that must be circumvented. Using the vegetation classification and 2D lidar scans, our method constructs a vegetation-aware traversability cost map that accurately represents the pliable and non-pliable obstacles with lower, and higher traversability costs, respectively. Our cost map construction accounts for misclassifications of the vegetation and further lowers the risk of collisions, freezing and entrapment in vegetation during navigation. Furthermore, we propose holonomic recovery behaviors for the robot for scenarios where it freezes, or gets physically entrapped in dense, pliable vegetation. We demonstrate our method on a Boston Dynamics Spot robot in real-world unstructured environments with sparse and dense tall grass, bushes, trees, etc. We observe an increase of 25-90% in success rates, 10-90% decrease in freezing rate, and up to 65% decrease in the false positive rate compared to existing methods.
summary: We propose a novel method for autonomous legged robot navigation in densely vegetated environments with a variety of pliable/traversable and non-pliable/untraversable vegetation. We present a novel few-shot learning classifier that can be trained on a few hundred RGB images to differentiate flora that can be navigated through, from the ones that must be circumvented. Using the vegetation classification and 2D lidar scans, our method constructs a vegetation-aware traversability cost map that accurately represents the pliable and non-pliable obstacles with lower, and higher traversability costs, respectively. Our cost map construction accounts for misclassifications of the vegetation and further lowers the risk of collisions, freezing and entrapment in vegetation during navigation. Furthermore, we propose holonomic recovery behaviors for the robot for scenarios where it freezes, or gets physically entrapped in dense, pliable vegetation. We demonstrate our method on a Boston Dynamics Spot robot in real-world unstructured environments with sparse and dense tall grass, bushes, trees, etc. We observe an increase of 25-90% in success rates, 10-90% decrease in freezing rate, and up to 65% decrease in the false positive rate compared to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在植被茂密的环境中进行自主腿式机器人导航的新方法，该环境具有各种柔韧/可穿越和非柔韧/不可穿越的植被。我们提出了一种新颖的少样本学习分类器，可以在数百张 RGB 图像上进行训练，以区分可以导航的植物群和必须避开的植物群。使用植被分类和二维激光雷达扫描，我们的方法构建了植被感知的可穿越成本图，该地图分别准确地表示了具有较低和较高可穿越成本的柔韧和非柔韧障碍物。我们的成本地图构建考虑了植被的错误分类，并进一步降低了导航过程中碰撞、冻结和植被卡住的风险。此外，我们还提出了机器人在结冰或被茂密、柔韧的植被困住的情况下的完整恢复行为。我们在波士顿动力 Spot 机器人上在现实世界的非结构化环境中展示了我们的方法，其中有稀疏和密集的高草、灌木丛、树木等。我们观察到，与现有方法相比，成功率提高了 25-90%，冻结率降低了 10-90%，误报率降低了 65%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于植被感知的四足机器人导航方法，通过分类可穿越植被与不可穿越植被并构建代价地图，提升密集植被环境下的自主导航能力。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人导航方法在植被密集的非结构化户外环境中易发生碰撞、卡顿或误判，需降低植被障碍物风险并提高路径规划成功率。
AI.method: 设计基于少量样本学习的RGB图像分类器区分植被类型，结合2D激光雷达数据生成植被感知的可穿越性代价地图，并引入全向恢复行为应对机器人卡顿或被困场景。
AI.result: 在波士顿动力Spot机器人实测中，成功率达提升25-90%，冻结率降低10-90%，误报率减少最高65%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过植被分类与代价地图优化结合物理恢复机制，有效解决了密集植被环境下的机器人导航难题。

method: 设计基于少量样本学习的RGB图像分类器区分植被类型，结合2D激光雷达数据生成植被感知的可穿越性代价地图，并引入全向恢复行为应对机器人卡顿或被困场景。
result: 在波士顿动力Spot机器人实测中，成功率达提升25-90%，冻结率降低10-90%，误报率减少最高65%。
conclusion: 该方法通过植被分类与代价地图优化结合物理恢复机制，有效解决了密集植被环境下的机器人导航难题。
search_text: VERN: Vegetation-aware Robot Navigation in Dense Unstructured Outdoor Environments VERN：密集非结构化室外环境中的植被感知机器人导航 We propose a novel method for autonomous legged robot navigation in densely vegetated environments with a variety of pliable/traversable and non-pliable/untraversable vegetation. We present a novel few-shot learning classifier that can be trained on a few hundred RGB images to differentiate flora that can be navigated through, from the ones that must be circumvented. Using the vegetation classification and 2D lidar scans, our method constructs a vegetation-aware traversability cost map that accurately represents the pliable and non-pliable obstacles with lower, and higher traversability costs, respectively. Our cost map construction accounts for misclassifications of the vegetation and further lowers the risk of collisions, freezing and entrapment in vegetation during navigation. Furthermore, we propose holonomic recovery behaviors for the robot for scenarios where it freezes, or gets physically entrapped in dense, pliable vegetation. We demonstrate our method on a Boston Dynamics Spot robot in real-world unstructured environments with sparse and dense tall grass, bushes, trees, etc. We observe an increase of 25-90% in success rates, 10-90% decrease in freezing rate, and up to 65% decrease in the false positive rate compared to existing methods. 我们提出了一种在植被茂密的环境中进行自主腿式机器人导航的新方法，该环境具有各种柔韧/可穿越和非柔韧/不可穿越的植被。我们提出了一种新颖的少样本学习分类器，可以在数百张 RGB 图像上进行训练，以区分可以导航的植物群和必须避开的植物群。使用植被分类和二维激光雷达扫描，我们的方法构建了植被感知的可穿越成本图，该地图分别准确地表示了具有较低和较高可穿越成本的柔韧和非柔韧障碍物。我们的成本地图构建考虑了植被的错误分类，并进一步降低了导航过程中碰撞、冻结和植被卡住的风险。此外，我们还提出了机器人在结冰或被茂密、柔韧的植被困住的情况下的完整恢复行为。我们在波士顿动力 Spot 机器人上在现实世界的非结构化环境中展示了我们的方法，其中有稀疏和密集的高草、灌木丛、树木等。我们观察到，与现有方法相比，成功率提高了 25-90%，冻结率降低了 10-90%，误报率降低了 65%。 本文提出一种基于植被感知的四足机器人导航方法，通过分类可穿越植被与不可穿越植被并构建代价地图，提升密集植被环境下的自主导航能力。 Adarsh Jagan Sathyamoorthy,Kasun Weerakoon,Tianrui Guan,Mason Russell,Damon Conover,Jason Pusey,Dinesh Manocha cs.RO

authors_text: Bastian Wittmann,Johannes C. Paetzold,Chinmay Prabhakar,Daniel Rueckert,Bjoern Menze
title: Link Prediction for Flow-Driven Spatial Networks
title_zh: 流驱动空间网络的链路预测
abstract: Link prediction algorithms aim to infer the existence of connections (or links) between nodes in network-structured data and are typically applied to refine the connectivity among nodes. In this work, we focus on link prediction for flow-driven spatial networks, which are embedded in a Euclidean space and relate to physical exchange and transportation processes (e.g., blood flow in vessels or traffic flow in road networks). To this end, we propose the Graph Attentive Vectors (GAV) link prediction framework. GAV models simplified dynamics of physical flow in spatial networks via an attentive, neighborhood-aware message-passing paradigm, updating vector embeddings in a constrained manner. We evaluate GAV on eight flow-driven spatial networks given by whole-brain vessel graphs and road networks. GAV demonstrates superior performances across all datasets and metrics and outperformed the state-of-the-art on the ogbl-vessel benchmark at the time of submission by 12% (98.38 vs. 87.98 AUC). All code is publicly available on GitHub.
summary: Link prediction algorithms aim to infer the existence of connections (or links) between nodes in network-structured data and are typically applied to refine the connectivity among nodes. In this work, we focus on link prediction for flow-driven spatial networks, which are embedded in a Euclidean space and relate to physical exchange and transportation processes (e.g., blood flow in vessels or traffic flow in road networks). To this end, we propose the Graph Attentive Vectors (GAV) link prediction framework. GAV models simplified dynamics of physical flow in spatial networks via an attentive, neighborhood-aware message-passing paradigm, updating vector embeddings in a constrained manner. We evaluate GAV on eight flow-driven spatial networks given by whole-brain vessel graphs and road networks. GAV demonstrates superior performances across all datasets and metrics and outperformed the state-of-the-art on the ogbl-vessel benchmark at the time of submission by 12% (98.38 vs. 87.98 AUC). All code is publicly available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 链接预测算法旨在推断网络结构数据中节点之间的连接（或链接）的存在，通常用于细化节点之间的连接性。在这项工作中，我们专注于流驱动的空间网络的链接预测，这些网络嵌入在欧几里德空间中，并与物理交换和运输过程（例如，血管中的血流或道路网络中的交通流）相关。为此，我们提出了图注意力向量（GAV）链接预测框架。 GAV 模型通过专注的、邻域感知的消息传递范式简化了空间网络中物理流的动态，以受限的方式更新向量嵌入。我们在全脑血管图和道路网络给出的八个流驱动空间网络上评估 GAV。 GAV 在所有数据集和指标上都表现出卓越的性能，并且在提交时的 ogbl-vessel 基准测试中表现优于最先进的 12%（AUC 为 98.38 与 87.98）。所有代码均可在 GitHub 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于流驱动空间网络的链接预测框架GAV，通过模拟物理流动动态来提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有链接预测方法未能有效捕捉流驱动空间网络（如血管网络、道路网络）中物理流动的动态特性与空间约束关系。
AI.method: 设计Graph Attentive Vectors（GAV）框架，采用注意力机制与邻居感知消息传递，在约束条件下更新节点向量嵌入以模拟物理流动规律。
AI.result: GAV在8个流驱动网络数据集上均优于现有方法，在ogbl-vessel基准测试中AUC提升12%（98.38 vs. 87.98）。
AI.conclusion: GAV通过建模物理流动动态显著提升了流驱动空间网络的链接预测效果，代码已开源供研究复现。

authors_text: Wenqiang Xu,Zhenjun Yu,Han Xue,Ruolin Ye,Siqiong Yao,Cewu Lu
title: Visual-Tactile Sensing for In-Hand Object Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于手内物体重建的视觉触觉感知
abstract: Tactile sensing is one of the modalities humans rely on heavily to perceive the world. Working with vision, this modality refines local geometry structure, measures deformation at the contact area, and indicates the hand-object contact state. With the availability of open-source tactile sensors such as DIGIT, research on visual-tactile learning is becoming more accessible and reproducible. Leveraging this tactile sensor, we propose a novel visual-tactile in-hand object reconstruction framework \textbf{VTacO}, and extend it to \textbf{VTacOH} for hand-object reconstruction. Since our method can support both rigid and deformable object reconstruction, no existing benchmarks are proper for the goal. We propose a simulation environment, VT-Sim, which supports generating hand-object interaction for both rigid and deformable objects. With VT-Sim, we generate a large-scale training dataset and evaluate our method on it. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method can outperform the previous baseline methods qualitatively and quantitatively. Finally, we directly apply our model trained in simulation to various real-world test cases, which display qualitative results. Codes, models, simulation environment, and datasets are available at \url{https://sites.google.com/view/vtaco/}.
summary: Tactile sensing is one of the modalities humans rely on heavily to perceive the world. Working with vision, this modality refines local geometry structure, measures deformation at the contact area, and indicates the hand-object contact state. With the availability of open-source tactile sensors such as DIGIT, research on visual-tactile learning is becoming more accessible and reproducible. Leveraging this tactile sensor, we propose a novel visual-tactile in-hand object reconstruction framework \textbf{VTacO}, and extend it to \textbf{VTacOH} for hand-object reconstruction. Since our method can support both rigid and deformable object reconstruction, no existing benchmarks are proper for the goal. We propose a simulation environment, VT-Sim, which supports generating hand-object interaction for both rigid and deformable objects. With VT-Sim, we generate a large-scale training dataset and evaluate our method on it. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our proposed method can outperform the previous baseline methods qualitatively and quantitatively. Finally, we directly apply our model trained in simulation to various real-world test cases, which display qualitative results. Codes, models, simulation environment, and datasets are available at \url{https://sites.google.com/view/vtaco/}.
abstract_zh: 触觉感知是人类严重依赖的感知世界的方式之一。该模式通过视觉来细化局部几何结构，测量接触区域的变形，并指示手部物体的接触状态。随着 DIGIT 等开源触觉传感器的出现，视觉触觉学习的研究变得更加容易实现和可重复。利用这种触觉传感器，我们提出了一种新颖的视觉触觉手部物体重建框架 \textbf{VTacO}，并将其扩展到 \textbf{VTacOH} 以进行手部物体重建。由于我们的方法可以支持刚性和可变形对象重建，因此没有现有的基准适合该目标。我们提出了一个模拟环境 VT-Sim，它支持为刚性和可变形物体生成手部物体交互。使用 VT-Sim，我们生成大规模训练数据集并在其上评估我们的方法。大量的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以在定性和定量上优于以前的基线方法。最后，我们直接将模拟训练的模型应用于各种现实世界的测试用例，显示定性结果。代码、模型、模拟环境和数据集可在 \url{https://sites.google.com/view/vtaco/} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合视觉与触觉信息的在手物体重建框架VTacO，并扩展为手-物重建框架VTacOH，以解决刚性和变形物体的重建问题。
AI.motivation: 触觉感知能提供局部几何结构、接触区域形变及手-物接触状态等关键信息，但现有基准数据集无法支持刚性和变形物体的重建需求。
AI.method: 设计了VT-Sim仿真环境生成手-物交互数据，构建大规模训练数据集，并基于视觉-触觉融合提出VTacO和VTacOH框架。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量指标上均优于现有基线方法，且仿真训练模型可迁移至真实场景并取得有效重建结果。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架和仿真环境为视觉-触觉联合感知研究提供了新工具，验证了方法在真实场景中的有效性。

authors_text: Rattana Pukdee,Dylan Sam,J. Zico Kolter,Maria-Florina Balcan,Pradeep Ravikumar
title: Learning with Explanation Constraints
title_zh: 在解释约束下学习
abstract: As larger deep learning models are hard to interpret, there has been a recent focus on generating explanations of these black-box models. In contrast, we may have apriori explanations of how models should behave. In this paper, we formalize this notion as learning from explanation constraints and provide a learning theoretic framework to analyze how such explanations can improve the learning of our models. One may naturally ask, "When would these explanations be helpful?" Our first key contribution addresses this question via a class of models that satisfies these explanation constraints in expectation over new data. We provide a characterization of the benefits of these models (in terms of the reduction of their Rademacher complexities) for a canonical class of explanations given by gradient information in the settings of both linear models and two layer neural networks. In addition, we provide an algorithmic solution for our framework, via a variational approximation that achieves better performance and satisfies these constraints more frequently, when compared to simpler augmented Lagrangian methods to incorporate these explanations. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach over a large array of synthetic and real-world experiments.
summary: As larger deep learning models are hard to interpret, there has been a recent focus on generating explanations of these black-box models. In contrast, we may have apriori explanations of how models should behave. In this paper, we formalize this notion as learning from explanation constraints and provide a learning theoretic framework to analyze how such explanations can improve the learning of our models. One may naturally ask, "When would these explanations be helpful?" Our first key contribution addresses this question via a class of models that satisfies these explanation constraints in expectation over new data. We provide a characterization of the benefits of these models (in terms of the reduction of their Rademacher complexities) for a canonical class of explanations given by gradient information in the settings of both linear models and two layer neural networks. In addition, we provide an algorithmic solution for our framework, via a variational approximation that achieves better performance and satisfies these constraints more frequently, when compared to simpler augmented Lagrangian methods to incorporate these explanations. We demonstrate the benefits of our approach over a large array of synthetic and real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 由于较大的深度学习模型难以解释，因此最近的重点是生成这些黑盒模型的解释。相反，我们可能对模型应该如何表现有先验的解释。在本文中，我们将这一概念形式化为从解释约束中学习，并提供了一个学习理论框架来分析此类解释如何改善我们模型的学习。人们自然会问：“这些解释什么时候会有帮助？”我们的第一个关键贡献通过一类模型来解决这个问题，这些模型满足对新数据的期望的解释约束。我们为线性模型和两层神经网络设置中的梯度信息给出的规范类解释提供了这些模型优点的表征（就其 Rademacher 复杂性的降低而言）。此外，我们通过变分近似为我们的框架提供了一种算法解决方案，与合并这些解释的更简单的增强拉格朗日方法相比，该解决方案可以实现更好的性能并更频繁地满足这些约束。我们通过大量的合成和现实实验证明了我们的方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过先验解释约束来指导模型学习的框架，旨在提升模型的可解释性与性能。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习模型规模增大，其可解释性问题日益突出。传统方法侧重于生成模型解释，而本文关注如何利用先验解释约束来规范模型行为，从而提升学习效果。
AI.method: 构建了一个理论框架，通过期望满足解释约束的模型类，分析其对Rademacher复杂度的降低效果，并提出基于变分近似的算法以满足约束条件。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据实验中，该方法相比传统拉格朗日乘数法在性能和约束满足频率上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 解释约束能有效提升模型可解释性与泛化能力，变分近似算法为实现该目标提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Xian Xu,Aoyu Wu,Leni Yang,Zheng Wei,Rong Huang,David Yip,Huamin Qu
title: Is It the End? Guidelines for Cinematic Endings in Data Videos
title_zh: 这是终结吗？数据视频中的电影结局指南
abstract: Data videos are becoming increasingly popular in society and academia. Yet little is known about how to create endings that strengthen a lasting impression and persuasion. To fulfill the gap, this work aims to develop guidelines for data video endings by drawing inspiration from cinematic arts. To contextualize cinematic endings in data videos, 111 film endings and 105 data video endings are first analyzed to identify four common styles using the framework of ending punctuation marks. We conducted expert interviews (N=11) and formulated 20 guidelines for creating cinematic endings in data videos. To validate our guidelines, we conducted a user study where 24 participants were invited to design endings with and without our guidelines, which are evaluated by experts and the general public. The participants praise the clarity and usability of the guidelines, and results show that the endings with guidelines are perceived to be more understandable, impressive, and reflective.
summary: Data videos are becoming increasingly popular in society and academia. Yet little is known about how to create endings that strengthen a lasting impression and persuasion. To fulfill the gap, this work aims to develop guidelines for data video endings by drawing inspiration from cinematic arts. To contextualize cinematic endings in data videos, 111 film endings and 105 data video endings are first analyzed to identify four common styles using the framework of ending punctuation marks. We conducted expert interviews (N=11) and formulated 20 guidelines for creating cinematic endings in data videos. To validate our guidelines, we conducted a user study where 24 participants were invited to design endings with and without our guidelines, which are evaluated by experts and the general public. The participants praise the clarity and usability of the guidelines, and results show that the endings with guidelines are perceived to be more understandable, impressive, and reflective.
abstract_zh: 数据视频在社会和学术界越来越受欢迎。然而，人们对于如何创造能够增强持久印象和说服力的结局却知之甚少。为了填补这一空白，这项工作旨在通过从电影艺术中汲取灵感来制定数据视频结局指南。为了将数据视频中的电影结尾置于语境中，首先分析了 111 个电影结尾和 105 个数据视频结尾，以使用结尾标点符号的框架来识别四种常见的风格。我们进行了专家访谈 (N=11)，并制定了 20 条在数据视频中创建电影结局的指南。为了验证我们的指南，我们进行了一项用户研究，邀请 24 名参与者在有或没有我们的指南的情况下设计结局，并由专家和公众进行评估。参与者称赞指南的清晰性和可用性，结果表明，有指南的结尾被认为更容易理解、更令人印象深刻和更具反思性。

AI.tldr: 开发数据视频结尾的指南，借鉴电影艺术以增强信息传递效果
AI.motivation: 数据视频日益普及但缺乏有效结尾设计方法，需通过电影艺术理论填补这一空白以提升说服力
AI.method: 分析111部电影与105个数据视频结尾，提炼四类风格框架；通过11位专家访谈制定20条指南，并组织24人参与对照实验验证
AI.result: 指南组结尾在可理解性、印象深度和反思性三个维度显著优于对照组，参与者认可指南的清晰度与实用性
AI.conclusion: 电影化结尾指南能有效提升数据视频传播效果，为创作者提供可操作的结尾设计框架

authors_text: Bowei Du,Yecheng Huang,Jiaxin Chen,Di Huang
title: Adaptive Sparse Convolutional Networks with Global Context Enhancement for Faster Object Detection on Drone Images
title_zh: 具有全局上下文增强功能的自适应稀疏卷积网络可加快无人机图像上的目标检测速度
abstract: Object detection on drone images with low-latency is an important but challenging task on the resource-constrained unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) platform. This paper investigates optimizing the detection head based on the sparse convolution, which proves effective in balancing the accuracy and efficiency. Nevertheless, it suffers from inadequate integration of contextual information of tiny objects as well as clumsy control of the mask ratio in the presence of foreground with varying scales. To address the issues above, we propose a novel global context-enhanced adaptive sparse convolutional network (CEASC). It first develops a context-enhanced group normalization (CE-GN) layer, by replacing the statistics based on sparsely sampled features with the global contextual ones, and then designs an adaptive multi-layer masking strategy to generate optimal mask ratios at distinct scales for compact foreground coverage, promoting both the accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experimental results on two major benchmarks, i.e. VisDrone and UAVDT, demonstrate that CEASC remarkably reduces the GFLOPs and accelerates the inference procedure when plugging into the typical state-of-the-art detection frameworks (e.g. RetinaNet and GFL V1) with competitive performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Cuogeihong/CEASC.
summary: Object detection on drone images with low-latency is an important but challenging task on the resource-constrained unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) platform. This paper investigates optimizing the detection head based on the sparse convolution, which proves effective in balancing the accuracy and efficiency. Nevertheless, it suffers from inadequate integration of contextual information of tiny objects as well as clumsy control of the mask ratio in the presence of foreground with varying scales. To address the issues above, we propose a novel global context-enhanced adaptive sparse convolutional network (CEASC). It first develops a context-enhanced group normalization (CE-GN) layer, by replacing the statistics based on sparsely sampled features with the global contextual ones, and then designs an adaptive multi-layer masking strategy to generate optimal mask ratios at distinct scales for compact foreground coverage, promoting both the accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experimental results on two major benchmarks, i.e. VisDrone and UAVDT, demonstrate that CEASC remarkably reduces the GFLOPs and accelerates the inference procedure when plugging into the typical state-of-the-art detection frameworks (e.g. RetinaNet and GFL V1) with competitive performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Cuogeihong/CEASC.
abstract_zh: 在资源有限的无人机（UAV）平台上，低延迟的无人机图像目标检测是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。本文研究了基于稀疏卷积的检测头优化，证明可以有效平衡精度和效率。然而，它存在对微小物体的上下文信息整合不充分以及在存在不同尺度的前景时对掩模比率的笨拙控制的问题。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新颖的全局上下文增强自适应稀疏卷积网络（CEASC）。它首先开发了上下文增强组归一化（CE-GN）层，通过用全局上下文特征替换基于稀疏采样特征的统计数据，然后设计自适应多层掩蔽策略以在不同尺度上生成最佳掩蔽比率以实现紧凑的前景覆盖，从而提高准确性和效率。 VisDrone 和 UAVDT 两个主要基准的大量实验结果表明，当插入具有竞争性能的典型最先进检测框架（例如 RetinaNet 和 GFL V1）时，CEASC 显着降低了 GFLOP，并加速了推理过程。代码可在 https://github.com/Cuogeihong/CEASC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的稀疏卷积网络，用于在无人机图像上实现更高效的物体检测。
AI.motivation: 现有稀疏卷积方法在处理小物体上下文信息整合不足，且对不同尺度前景的掩码比例控制不够灵活，导致检测效率与精度难以平衡。
AI.method: 设计了全局上下文增强的组归一化层（CE-GN）和自适应多层掩码策略，通过全局上下文统计替代稀疏特征统计，并动态生成最优掩码比例以提升检测效率。
AI.result: 在VisDrone和UAVDT数据集上显著降低GFLOPs并加速推理过程，在保持竞争力性能的同时优化了检测框架（如RetinaNet和GFL V1）。
AI.conclusion: CEASC方法有效解决了无人机平台资源受限下的物体检测效率与精度矛盾，为低延迟检测提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.method: 设计了全局上下文增强的组归一化层（CE-GN）和自适应多层掩码策略，通过全局上下文统计替代稀疏特征统计，并动态生成最优掩码比例以提升检测效率。
ai_content_json.result: 在VisDrone和UAVDT数据集上显著降低GFLOPs并加速推理过程，在保持竞争力性能的同时优化了检测框架（如RetinaNet和GFL V1）。
ai_content_json.conclusion: CEASC方法有效解决了无人机平台资源受限下的物体检测效率与精度矛盾，为低延迟检测提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的稀疏卷积网络，用于在无人机图像上实现更高效的物体检测。
motivation: 现有稀疏卷积方法在处理小物体上下文信息整合不足，且对不同尺度前景的掩码比例控制不够灵活，导致检测效率与精度难以平衡。
method: 设计了全局上下文增强的组归一化层（CE-GN）和自适应多层掩码策略，通过全局上下文统计替代稀疏特征统计，并动态生成最优掩码比例以提升检测效率。
result: 在VisDrone和UAVDT数据集上显著降低GFLOPs并加速推理过程，在保持竞争力性能的同时优化了检测框架（如RetinaNet和GFL V1）。
conclusion: CEASC方法有效解决了无人机平台资源受限下的物体检测效率与精度矛盾，为低延迟检测提供了新思路。
search_text: Adaptive Sparse Convolutional Networks with Global Context Enhancement for Faster Object Detection on Drone Images 具有全局上下文增强功能的自适应稀疏卷积网络可加快无人机图像上的目标检测速度 Object detection on drone images with low-latency is an important but challenging task on the resource-constrained unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) platform. This paper investigates optimizing the detection head based on the sparse convolution, which proves effective in balancing the accuracy and efficiency. Nevertheless, it suffers from inadequate integration of contextual information of tiny objects as well as clumsy control of the mask ratio in the presence of foreground with varying scales. To address the issues above, we propose a novel global context-enhanced adaptive sparse convolutional network (CEASC). It first develops a context-enhanced group normalization (CE-GN) layer, by replacing the statistics based on sparsely sampled features with the global contextual ones, and then designs an adaptive multi-layer masking strategy to generate optimal mask ratios at distinct scales for compact foreground coverage, promoting both the accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experimental results on two major benchmarks, i.e. VisDrone and UAVDT, demonstrate that CEASC remarkably reduces the GFLOPs and accelerates the inference procedure when plugging into the typical state-of-the-art detection frameworks (e.g. RetinaNet and GFL V1) with competitive performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Cuogeihong/CEASC. 在资源有限的无人机（UAV）平台上，低延迟的无人机图像目标检测是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务。本文研究了基于稀疏卷积的检测头优化，证明可以有效平衡精度和效率。然而，它存在对微小物体的上下文信息整合不充分以及在存在不同尺度的前景时对掩模比率的笨拙控制的问题。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种新颖的全局上下文增强自适应稀疏卷积网络（CEASC）。它首先开发了上下文增强组归一化（CE-GN）层，通过用全局上下文特征替换基于稀疏采样特征的统计数据，然后设计自适应多层掩蔽策略以在不同尺度上生成最佳掩蔽比率以实现紧凑的前景覆盖，从而提高准确性和效率。 VisDrone 和 UAVDT 两个主要基准的大量实验结果表明，当插入具有竞争性能的典型最先进检测框架（例如 RetinaNet 和 GFL V1）时，CEASC 显着降低了 GFLOP，并加速了推理过程。代码可在 https://github.com/Cuogeihong/CEASC 获取。 本文提出了一种改进的稀疏卷积网络，用于在无人机图像上实现更高效的物体检测。 Bowei Du,Yecheng Huang,Jiaxin Chen,Di Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Alborz Aghamaleki Sarvestani,Felix Ruppert,Alexander Badri-Spröwitz
title: An Open-Source Modular Treadmill for Dynamic Force Measurement with Load Dependant Range Adjustment
title_zh: 用于动态力测量的开源模块化跑步机，具有负载相关范围调整功能
abstract: Ground reaction force sensing is one of the key components of gait analysis in legged locomotion research. To measure continuous force data during locomotion, we present a novel compound instrumented treadmill design. The treadmill is 1.7m long, with a natural frequency of 170Hz and an adjustable range that can be used for humans and small robots alike. Here, we present the treadmill's design methodology and characterize it in its natural frequency, noise behavior and real-life performance. Additionally, we apply an ISO 376 norm conform calibration procedure for all spatial force directions and center of pressure position. We achieve a force accuracy of $\leq$5.6N for the ground reaction forces and $\leq$13mm in center of pressure position.
summary: Ground reaction force sensing is one of the key components of gait analysis in legged locomotion research. To measure continuous force data during locomotion, we present a novel compound instrumented treadmill design. The treadmill is 1.7m long, with a natural frequency of 170Hz and an adjustable range that can be used for humans and small robots alike. Here, we present the treadmill's design methodology and characterize it in its natural frequency, noise behavior and real-life performance. Additionally, we apply an ISO 376 norm conform calibration procedure for all spatial force directions and center of pressure position. We achieve a force accuracy of $\leq$5.6N for the ground reaction forces and $\leq$13mm in center of pressure position.
abstract_zh: 地面反作用力传感是腿部运动研究中步态分析的关键组成部分之一。为了测量运动过程中的连续力数据，我们提出了一种新颖的复合仪表跑步机设计。该跑步机长1.7m，固有频率170Hz，可调范围，可供人类和小型机器人使用。在这里，我们介绍跑步机的设计方法，并对其固有频率、噪声行为和实际性能进行表征。此外，我们对所有空间力方向和压力中心位置应用符合 ISO 376 标准的校准程序。我们实现了地面反作用力 $\leq$5.6N 的力精度和压力中心位置 $\leq$13mm 的力精度。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种开源模块化跑步机，用于动态力测量并具备负载依赖的范围调整功能，适用于人类和小型机器人。
AI.motivation: 地面反作用力传感是足式运动步态分析的关键，但现有设备在灵活性和精度上存在不足，需开发新型可调节跑步机以满足多样化需求。
AI.method: 提出复合式仪器跑步机设计，通过调整范围适应不同负载；测试自然频率、噪声特性及实际性能，并采用ISO 376标准进行多方向力与压力中心校准。
AI.result: 地面反作用力测量精度≤5.6N，压力中心位置精度≤13mm，跑步机自然频率达170Hz，适用于人类及小型机器人。
AI.conclusion: 该跑步机通过模块化设计和标准化校准，实现了高精度动态力测量，为足式运动研究提供了可靠工具。

authors_text: Yukang Zhang,Hanzi Wang
title: Diverse Embedding Expansion Network and Low-Light Cross-Modality Benchmark for Visible-Infrared Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于可见红外人员重新识别的多样化嵌入扩展网络和低光跨模态基准
abstract: For the visible-infrared person re-identification (VIReID) task, one of the major challenges is the modality gaps between visible (VIS) and infrared (IR) images. However, the training samples are usually limited, while the modality gaps are too large, which leads that the existing methods cannot effectively mine diverse cross-modality clues. To handle this limitation, we propose a novel augmentation network in the embedding space, called diverse embedding expansion network (DEEN). The proposed DEEN can effectively generate diverse embeddings to learn the informative feature representations and reduce the modality discrepancy between the VIS and IR images. Moreover, the VIReID model may be seriously affected by drastic illumination changes, while all the existing VIReID datasets are captured under sufficient illumination without significant light changes. Thus, we provide a low-light cross-modality (LLCM) dataset, which contains 46,767 bounding boxes of 1,064 identities captured by 9 RGB/IR cameras. Extensive experiments on the SYSU-MM01, RegDB and LLCM datasets show the superiority of the proposed DEEN over several other state-of-the-art methods. The code and dataset are released at: https://github.com/ZYK100/LLCM
summary: For the visible-infrared person re-identification (VIReID) task, one of the major challenges is the modality gaps between visible (VIS) and infrared (IR) images. However, the training samples are usually limited, while the modality gaps are too large, which leads that the existing methods cannot effectively mine diverse cross-modality clues. To handle this limitation, we propose a novel augmentation network in the embedding space, called diverse embedding expansion network (DEEN). The proposed DEEN can effectively generate diverse embeddings to learn the informative feature representations and reduce the modality discrepancy between the VIS and IR images. Moreover, the VIReID model may be seriously affected by drastic illumination changes, while all the existing VIReID datasets are captured under sufficient illumination without significant light changes. Thus, we provide a low-light cross-modality (LLCM) dataset, which contains 46,767 bounding boxes of 1,064 identities captured by 9 RGB/IR cameras. Extensive experiments on the SYSU-MM01, RegDB and LLCM datasets show the superiority of the proposed DEEN over several other state-of-the-art methods. The code and dataset are released at: https://github.com/ZYK100/LLCM
abstract_zh: 对于可见光-红外行人重新识别（VIReID）任务，主要挑战之一是可见光（VIS）和红外（IR）图像之间的模态差距。然而，训练样本通常有限，而模态差距过大，导致现有方法无法有效挖掘多样化的跨模态线索。为了解决这个限制，我们在嵌入空间中提出了一种新颖的增强网络，称为多样化嵌入扩展网络（DEEN）。所提出的 DEEN 可以有效地生成不同的嵌入来学习信息丰富的特征表示并减少 VIS 和 IR 图像之间的模态差异。此外，VIReID模型可能会受到剧烈光照变化的严重影响，而所有现有的VIReID数据集都是在足够的光照下捕获的，没有明显的光照变化。因此，我们提供了一个低光跨模态 (LLCM) 数据集，其中包含由 9 个 RGB/IR 相机捕获的 1,064 个身份的 46,767 个边界框。对 SYSU-MM01、RegDB 和 LLCM 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 DEEN 相对于其他几种最先进的方法具有优越性。代码和数据集发布于：https://github.com/ZYK100/LLCM

AI.tldr: 本文针对可见光与红外图像在行人重识别任务中的模态差异问题，提出了一种多样嵌入扩展网络（DEEN）及低光跨模态数据集LLCM，以提升跨模态特征学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因训练样本有限且模态差异过大，难以有效挖掘跨模态线索；同时现有数据集未考虑低光环境对模型性能的影响，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 提出多样嵌入扩展网络（DEEN）通过生成多样化嵌入以学习判别性特征并缩小模态差异；构建包含低光场景的LLCM数据集，包含1,064个身份的46,767个标注框。
AI.result: 在SYSU-MM01、RegDB和LLCM数据集上的实验表明，DEEN优于多种先进方法，且代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: DEEN通过增强跨模态特征学习能力，结合LLCM数据集的低光场景覆盖，有效解决了VIReID任务中模态差异大和光照变化敏感的问题。

Thus, we provide a low-light cross-modality (LLCM) dataset, which contains 46,767 bounding boxes of 1,064 identities captured by 9 RGB/IR cameras. Extensive experiments on the SYSU-MM01, RegDB and LLCM datasets show the superiority of the proposed DEEN over several other state-of-the-art methods. The code and dataset are released at: https://github.com/ZYK100/LLCM 对于可见光-红外行人重新识别（VIReID）任务，主要挑战之一是可见光（VIS）和红外（IR）图像之间的模态差距。然而，训练样本通常有限，而模态差距过大，导致现有方法无法有效挖掘多样化的跨模态线索。为了解决这个限制，我们在嵌入空间中提出了一种新颖的增强网络，称为多样化嵌入扩展网络（DEEN）。所提出的 DEEN 可以有效地生成不同的嵌入来学习信息丰富的特征表示并减少 VIS 和 IR 图像之间的模态差异。此外，VIReID模型可能会受到剧烈光照变化的严重影响，而所有现有的VIReID数据集都是在足够的光照下捕获的，没有明显的光照变化。因此，我们提供了一个低光跨模态 (LLCM) 数据集，其中包含由 9 个 RGB/IR 相机捕获的 1,064 个身份的 46,767 个边界框。对 SYSU-MM01、RegDB 和 LLCM 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 DEEN 相对于其他几种最先进的方法具有优越性。代码和数据集发布于：https://github.com/ZYK100/LLCM 本文针对可见光与红外图像在行人重识别任务中的模态差异问题，提出了一种多样嵌入扩展网络（DEEN）及低光跨模态数据集LLCM，以提升跨模态特征学习效果。 Yukang Zhang,Hanzi Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Zhouhong Gu,Sihang Jiang,Jingping Liu,Yanghua Xiao,Hongwei Feng,Zhixu Li,Jiaqing Liang,Jian Zhong
title: GANTEE: Generative Adversatial Network for Taxonomy Entering Evaluation
title_zh: GANTEE：分类学进入评估的生成对抗网络
abstract: Taxonomy is formulated as directed acyclic concepts graphs or trees that support many downstream tasks. Many new coming concepts need to be added to an existing taxonomy. The traditional taxonomy expansion task aims only at finding the best position for new coming concepts in the existing taxonomy. However, they have two drawbacks when being applied to the real-scenarios. The previous methods suffer from low-efficiency since they waste much time when most of the new coming concepts are indeed noisy concepts. They also suffer from low-effectiveness since they collect training samples only from the existing taxonomy, which limits the ability of the model to mine more hypernym-hyponym relationships among real concepts. This paper proposes a pluggable framework called Generative Adversarial Network for Taxonomy Entering Evaluation (GANTEE) to alleviate these drawbacks. A generative adversarial network is designed in this framework by discriminative models to alleviate the first drawback and the generative model to alleviate the second drawback. Two discriminators are used in GANTEE to provide long-term and short-term rewards, respectively. Moreover, to further improve the efficiency, pre-trained language models are used to retrieve the representation of the concepts quickly. The experiments on three real-world large-scale datasets with two different languages show that GANTEE improves the performance of the existing taxonomy expansion methods in both effectiveness and efficiency.

The traditional taxonomy expansion task aims only at finding the best position for new coming concepts in the existing taxonomy. However, they have two drawbacks when being applied to the real-scenarios. The previous methods suffer from low-efficiency since they waste much time when most of the new coming concepts are indeed noisy concepts. They also suffer from low-effectiveness since they collect training samples only from the existing taxonomy, which limits the ability of the model to mine more hypernym-hyponym relationships among real concepts. This paper proposes a pluggable framework called Generative Adversarial Network for Taxonomy Entering Evaluation (GANTEE) to alleviate these drawbacks. A generative adversarial network is designed in this framework by discriminative models to alleviate the first drawback and the generative model to alleviate the second drawback. Two discriminators are used in GANTEE to provide long-term and short-term rewards, respectively. Moreover, to further improve the efficiency, pre-trained language models are used to retrieve the representation of the concepts quickly. The experiments on three real-world large-scale datasets with two different languages show that GANTEE improves the performance of the existing taxonomy expansion methods in both effectiveness and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 分类法被表述为支持许多下游任务的有向非循环概念图或树。许多新的概念需要添加到现有的分类法中。传统的分类扩展任务仅旨在为现有分类中的新概念找到最佳位置。然而，它们在应用于实际场景时有两个缺点。以前的方法效率低下，因为当大多数新出现的概念确实是嘈杂的概念时，它们会浪费大量时间。它们还存在效率低下的问题，因为它们仅从现有分类法中收集训练样本，这限制了模型在真实概念之间挖掘更多上位词-下位词关系的能力。本文提出了一种称为分类输入评估的生成对抗网络（GANTEE）的可插入框架来缓解这些缺点。在此框架中，通过判别模型设计了生成对抗网络来缓解第一个缺点，并通过生成模型来缓解第二个缺点。 GANTEE 中使用两个判别器分别提供长期和短期奖励。此外，为了进一步提高效率，使用预先训练的语言模型来快速检索概念的表示。在使用两种不同语言的三个真实世界大规模数据集上的实验表明，GANTEE 在有效性和效率上提高了现有分类扩展方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出GANTEE框架以提升分类法扩展任务的效率和效果
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理噪声概念时效率低，且依赖现有分类法限制了模型挖掘更多上下位词关系的能力
AI.method: 设计包含判别模型和生成模型的GAN框架，结合两个判别器和预训练语言模型提升效率和效果
AI.result: 在三个多语言数据集上，GANTEE在效率和效果上均优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: GANTEE通过对抗网络和预训练模型有效解决了传统方法的不足，为分类法扩展提供了新思路

authors_text: Caner Ozer,Arda Guler,Aysel Turkvatan Cansever,Ilkay Oksuz
title: Explainable Image Quality Assessment for Medical Imaging
title_zh: 医学成像的可解释图像质量评估
abstract: Medical image quality assessment is an important aspect of image acquisition, as poor-quality images may lead to misdiagnosis. Manual labelling of image quality is a tedious task for population studies and can lead to misleading results. While much research has been done on automated analysis of image quality to address this issue, relatively little work has been done to explain the methodologies. In this work, we propose an explainable image quality assessment system and validate our idea on two different objectives which are foreign object detection on Chest X-Rays (Object-CXR) and Left Ventricular Outflow Tract (LVOT) detection on Cardiac Magnetic Resonance (CMR) volumes. We apply a variety of techniques to measure the faithfulness of the saliency detectors, and our explainable pipeline relies on NormGrad, an algorithm which can efficiently localise image quality issues with saliency maps of the classifier. We compare NormGrad with a range of saliency detection methods and illustrate its superior performance as a result of applying these methodologies for measuring the faithfulness of the saliency detectors. We see that NormGrad has significant gains over other saliency detectors by reaching a repeated Pointing Game score of 0.853 for Object-CXR and 0.611 for LVOT datasets.
summary: Medical image quality assessment is an important aspect of image acquisition, as poor-quality images may lead to misdiagnosis. Manual labelling of image quality is a tedious task for population studies and can lead to misleading results. While much research has been done on automated analysis of image quality to address this issue, relatively little work has been done to explain the methodologies. In this work, we propose an explainable image quality assessment system and validate our idea on two different objectives which are foreign object detection on Chest X-Rays (Object-CXR) and Left Ventricular Outflow Tract (LVOT) detection on Cardiac Magnetic Resonance (CMR) volumes. We apply a variety of techniques to measure the faithfulness of the saliency detectors, and our explainable pipeline relies on NormGrad, an algorithm which can efficiently localise image quality issues with saliency maps of the classifier. We compare NormGrad with a range of saliency detection methods and illustrate its superior performance as a result of applying these methodologies for measuring the faithfulness of the saliency detectors. We see that NormGrad has significant gains over other saliency detectors by reaching a repeated Pointing Game score of 0.853 for Object-CXR and 0.611 for LVOT datasets.
abstract_zh: 医学图像质量评估是图像采集的一个重要方面，因为质量差的图像可能导致误诊。对于人口研究来说，手动标记图像质量是一项繁琐的任务，并且可能会导致误导性的结果。虽然为了解决这个问题对图像质量的自动分析进行了大量研究，但解释这些方法的工作相对较少。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个可解释的图像质量评估系统，并在两个不同的目标上验证了我们的想法，即胸部 X 射线异物检测 (Object-CXR) 和心脏磁共振 (CMR) 体积上的左心室流出道 (LVOT) 检测。我们应用各种技术来测量显着性检测器的可信度，并且我们的可解释管道依赖于 NormGrad，这是一种可以通过分类器的显着性图有效定位图像质量问题的算法。我们将 NormGrad 与一系列显着性检测方法进行比较，并说明由于应用这些方法来测量显着性检测器的可信度，其优越的性能。我们看到 NormGrad 比其他显着性检测器有显着的进步，Object-CXR 的重复指向游戏得分为 0.853，LVOT 数据集的重复指向游戏得分为 0.611。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于医学影像的可解释图像质量评估系统，并在两个不同的医学影像任务上进行了验证。
AI.motivation: 医学图像质量评估对图像采集至关重要，而手动标注图像质量既繁琐又容易导致误导结果，目前自动化分析方法研究较多，但对方法的解释性研究较少。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于NormGrad算法的可解释图像质量评估系统，并通过多种方法评估显著性检测器的可信度。
AI.result: NormGrad在两个医学影像任务中表现优异，分别达到了0.853和0.611的Pointing Game评分。
AI.conclusion: NormGrad在显著性检测方面优于其他方法，为医学图像质量评估提供了有效的可解释性工具。

authors_text: Yu Chen,Gim Hee Lee
title: DBARF: Deep Bundle-Adjusting Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: DBARF：深度束调整可推广神经辐射场
abstract: Recent works such as BARF and GARF can bundle adjust camera poses with neural radiance fields (NeRF) which is based on coordinate-MLPs. Despite the impressive results, these methods cannot be applied to Generalizable NeRFs (GeNeRFs) which require image feature extractions that are often based on more complicated 3D CNN or transformer architectures. In this work, we first analyze the difficulties of jointly optimizing camera poses with GeNeRFs, and then further propose our DBARF to tackle these issues. Our DBARF which bundle adjusts camera poses by taking a cost feature map as an implicit cost function can be jointly trained with GeNeRFs in a self-supervised manner. Unlike BARF and its follow-up works, which can only be applied to per-scene optimized NeRFs and need accurate initial camera poses with the exception of forward-facing scenes, our method can generalize across scenes and does not require any good initialization. Experiments show the effectiveness and generalization ability of our DBARF when evaluated on real-world datasets. Our code is available at \url{https://aibluefisher.github.io/dbarf}.
summary: Recent works such as BARF and GARF can bundle adjust camera poses with neural radiance fields (NeRF) which is based on coordinate-MLPs. Despite the impressive results, these methods cannot be applied to Generalizable NeRFs (GeNeRFs) which require image feature extractions that are often based on more complicated 3D CNN or transformer architectures. In this work, we first analyze the difficulties of jointly optimizing camera poses with GeNeRFs, and then further propose our DBARF to tackle these issues. Our DBARF which bundle adjusts camera poses by taking a cost feature map as an implicit cost function can be jointly trained with GeNeRFs in a self-supervised manner. Unlike BARF and its follow-up works, which can only be applied to per-scene optimized NeRFs and need accurate initial camera poses with the exception of forward-facing scenes, our method can generalize across scenes and does not require any good initialization. Experiments show the effectiveness and generalization ability of our DBARF when evaluated on real-world datasets. Our code is available at \url{https://aibluefisher.github.io/dbarf}.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作如 BARF 和 GARF 可以将相机姿态与基于坐标 MLP 的神经辐射场（NeRF）捆绑在一起。尽管取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但这些方法无法应用于通用化 NeRF (GeNeRF)，后者需要通常基于更复杂的 3D CNN 或 Transformer 架构的图像特征提取。在这项工作中，我们首先分析了与 GeNeRF 联合优化相机姿势的困难，然后进一步提出我们的 DBARF 来解决这些问题。我们的 DBARF 通过将成本特征图作为隐式成本函数来调整相机姿态，可以以自我监督的方式与 GeNeRF 联合训练。与 BARF 及其后续工作不同，BARF 及其后续工作只能应用于每个场景优化的 NeRF，并且需要准确的初始相机姿势（前向场景除外），我们的方法可以跨场景泛化，并且不需要任何良好的初始化。实验证明了我们的 DBARF 在真实数据集上进行评估时的有效性和泛化能力。我们的代码可在 \url{https://aibluefisher.github.io/dbarf} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DBARF的方法，用于在通用神经辐射场（GeNeRFs）中联合优化相机姿态。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于坐标-MLP的NeRF方法（如BARF和GARF）无法应用于需要更复杂3D CNN或Transformer架构的通用NeRFs，因此需要一种新的方法来解决这一问题。
AI.method: DBARF通过使用隐式成本函数（成本特征图）来调整相机姿态，并与GeNeRFs在自监督方式下联合训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，DBARF在真实世界数据集上具有有效性和泛化能力，且无需良好的初始相机姿态。
AI.conclusion: DBARF方法能够在不需要良好初始化的情况下，实现跨场景的相机姿态优化，具有较强的泛化能力。
