search_text: DBARF: Deep Bundle-Adjusting Generalizable Neural Radiance Fields DBARF：深度束调整可推广神经辐射场 Recent works such as BARF and GARF can bundle adjust camera poses with neural radiance fields (NeRF) which is based on coordinate-MLPs. Despite the impressive results, these methods cannot be applied to Generalizable NeRFs (GeNeRFs) which require image feature extractions that are often based on more complicated 3D CNN or transformer architectures. In this work, we first analyze the difficulties of jointly optimizing camera poses with GeNeRFs, and then further propose our DBARF to tackle these issues. Our DBARF which bundle adjusts camera poses by taking a cost feature map as an implicit cost function can be jointly trained with GeNeRFs in a self-supervised manner. Unlike BARF and its follow-up works, which can only be applied to per-scene optimized NeRFs and need accurate initial camera poses with the exception of forward-facing scenes, our method can generalize across scenes and does not require any good initialization. Experiments show the effectiveness and generalization ability of our DBARF when evaluated on real-world datasets. Our code is available at \url{https://aibluefisher.github.io/dbarf}. 最近的工作如 BARF 和 GARF 可以将相机姿态与基于坐标 MLP 的神经辐射场（NeRF）捆绑在一起。尽管取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但这些方法无法应用于通用化 NeRF (GeNeRF)，后者需要通常基于更复杂的 3D CNN 或 Transformer 架构的图像特征提取。在这项工作中，我们首先分析了与 GeNeRF 联合优化相机姿势的困难，然后进一步提出我们的 DBARF 来解决这些问题。我们的 DBARF 通过将成本特征图作为隐式成本函数来调整相机姿态，可以以自我监督的方式与 GeNeRF 联合训练。与 BARF 及其后续工作不同，BARF 及其后续工作只能应用于每个场景优化的 NeRF，并且需要准确的初始相机姿势（前向场景除外），我们的方法可以跨场景泛化，并且不需要任何良好的初始化。实验证明了我们的 DBARF 在真实数据集上进行评估时的有效性和泛化能力。我们的代码可在 \url{https://aibluefisher.github.io/dbarf} 获取。 本文提出了一种名为DBARF的方法，用于在通用神经辐射场（GeNeRFs）中联合优化相机姿态。 Yu Chen,Gim Hee Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Can Liu,Yu Zhang,Cong Wu,Chen Li,Xiaoru Yuan
title: A Spatial-Constraint Model for Manipulating Static Visualizations
title_zh: 用于操作静态可视化的空间约束模型
abstract: We propose a spatial-constraint approach for modeling spatial-based interactions and enabling interactive visualizations, which involves the manipulation of visualizations through selection, filtering, navigation, arrangement, and aggregation. We proposes a system that activates static visualizations by adding intelligent interactions, which is achieved by associating static visual objects with forces. Our force-directed technique facilitates smooth animated transitions of the visualizations between different interaction states. We showcase the effectiveness of our technique through usage scenarios that involve activating visualizations in real-world settings.
summary: We propose a spatial-constraint approach for modeling spatial-based interactions and enabling interactive visualizations, which involves the manipulation of visualizations through selection, filtering, navigation, arrangement, and aggregation. We proposes a system that activates static visualizations by adding intelligent interactions, which is achieved by associating static visual objects with forces. Our force-directed technique facilitates smooth animated transitions of the visualizations between different interaction states. We showcase the effectiveness of our technique through usage scenarios that involve activating visualizations in real-world settings.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种空间约束方法，用于对基于空间的交互进行建模并实现交互式可视化，其中涉及通过选择、过滤、导航、排列和聚合来操纵可视化。我们提出了一种通过添加智能交互来激活静态可视化的系统，这是通过将静态视觉对象与力相关联来实现的。我们的力导向技术有助于不同交互状态之间可视化的平滑动画过渡。我们通过涉及在现实世界设置中激活可视化的使用场景来展示我们技术的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种空间约束模型，通过力导向技术增强静态可视化的交互性，允许用户通过选择、过滤等操作动态调整可视化布局。
AI.motivation: 静态可视化难以满足动态交互需求，传统方法缺乏对空间关系的智能响应机制，需探索更自然的交互方式激活静态图表。
AI.method: 构建空间约束模型，将静态视觉元素关联物理力场，利用力导向算法实现可视化状态间的平滑动画过渡，并支持多维度交互操作。
AI.result: 通过现实场景案例验证，该方法能有效提升静态可视化在复杂数据探索中的交互灵活性与视觉表现力。
AI.conclusion: 空间约束模型为静态可视化提供了动态交互新范式，通过物理模拟机制实现了可视化元素的智能布局调整。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种空间约束模型，通过力导向技术增强静态可视化的交互性，允许用户通过选择、过滤等操作动态调整可视化布局。

authors_text: Md Abul Bashar,Richi Nayak,Gareth Knapman,Paul Turnbull,Cressida Fforde
title: Informed Machine Learning, Centrality, CNN, Relevant Document Detection, Repatriation of Indigenous Human Remains
title_zh: 知情机器学习、Centrality、CNN、相关文档检测、原住民遗骸遣返
comment: Accepted Version of the Journal Article
comments: Accepted Version of the Journal Article
abstract: Among the pressing issues facing Australian and other First Nations peoples is the repatriation of the bodily remains of their ancestors, which are currently held in Western scientific institutions. The success of securing the return of these remains to their communities for reburial depends largely on locating information within scientific and other literature published between 1790 and 1970 documenting their theft, donation, sale, or exchange between institutions. This article reports on collaborative research by data scientists and social science researchers in the Research, Reconcile, Renew Network (RRR) to develop and apply text mining techniques to identify this vital information. We describe our work to date on developing a machine learning-based solution to automate the process of finding and semantically analysing relevant texts. Classification models, particularly deep learning-based models, are known to have low accuracy when trained with small amounts of labelled (i.e. relevant/non-relevant) documents. To improve the accuracy of our detection model, we explore the use of an Informed Neural Network (INN) model that describes documentary content using expert-informed contextual knowledge. Only a few labelled documents are used to provide specificity to the model, using conceptually related keywords identified by RRR experts in provenance research. The results confirm the value of using an INN network model for identifying relevant documents related to the investigation of the global commercial trade in Indigenous human remains. Empirical analysis suggests that this INN model can be generalized for use by other researchers in the social sciences and humanities who want to extract relevant information from large textual corpora.
summary: Among the pressing issues facing Australian and other First Nations peoples is the repatriation of the bodily remains of their ancestors, which are currently held in Western scientific institutions. The success of securing the return of these remains to their communities for reburial depends largely on locating information within scientific and other literature published between 1790 and 1970 documenting their theft, donation, sale, or exchange between institutions. This article reports on collaborative research by data scientists and social science researchers in the Research, Reconcile, Renew Network (RRR) to develop and apply text mining techniques to identify this vital information. We describe our work to date on developing a machine learning-based solution to automate the process of finding and semantically analysing relevant texts. Classification models, particularly deep learning-based models, are known to have low accuracy when trained with small amounts of labelled (i.e. relevant/non-relevant) documents. To improve the accuracy of our detection model, we explore the use of an Informed Neural Network (INN) model that describes documentary content using expert-informed contextual knowledge. Only a few labelled documents are used to provide specificity to the model, using conceptually related keywords identified by RRR experts in provenance research. The results confirm the value of using an INN network model for identifying relevant documents related to the investigation of the global commercial trade in Indigenous human remains. Empirical analysis suggests that this INN model can be generalized for use by other researchers in the social sciences and humanities who want to extract relevant information from large textual corpora.
abstract_zh: 澳大利亚和其他原住民面临的紧迫问题之一是遣返其祖先的遗骸，这些遗骸目前保存在西方科学机构中。能否成功将这些遗骸送回其社区重新埋葬，很大程度上取决于在 1790 年至 1970 年间出版的记录遗骸被盗、捐赠、出售或机构之间交换的科学文献和其他文献中查找信息。本文报道了数据科学家和社会科学研究人员在研究、协调、更新网络 (RRR) 中的合作研究，以开发和应用文本挖掘技术来识别这些重要信息。我们描述了迄今为止我们在开发基于机器学习的解决方案以自动化查找和语义分析相关文本的过程方面所做的工作。众所周知，分类模型，特别是基于深度学习的模型，在使用少量标记（即相关/不相关）文档进行训练时，准确性较低。为了提高检测模型的准确性，我们探索使用知情神经网络（INN）模型，该模型使用专家知情的上下文知识来描述文献内容。仅使用少数标记文档来提供模型的特异性，使用 RRR 专家在出处研究中确定的概念相关关键字。结果证实了使用 INN 网络模型来识别与土著人类遗骸全球商业贸易调查相关的相关文件的价值。实证分析表明，这种 INN 模型可以推广用于社会科学和人文学科的其他研究人员，这些研究人员希望从大型文本语料库中提取相关信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于知情神经网络（INN）的机器学习方法，用于自动识别与原住民遗骸归还相关的文献。
AI.motivation: 澳大利亚及其他原住民群体面临祖先遗骸归还问题，需从1790-1970年的文献中查找遗骸被窃、捐赠或交易的记录，但传统方法效率低下且数据标注稀缺。
AI.method: 结合领域专家知识构建概念关键词，利用少量标注数据训练知情神经网络模型，通过语义分析提升相关文献识别准确率。
AI.result: 实验验证INN模型能有效识别与原住民遗骸贸易相关的文档，且可推广至人文社科领域的文本信息提取任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为解决历史文献挖掘难题提供新思路，证明专家知识引导的机器学习在小样本场景下的有效性。

result: 实验验证INN模型能有效识别与原住民遗骸贸易相关的文档，且可推广至人文社科领域的文本信息提取任务。
conclusion: 该方法为解决历史文献挖掘难题提供新思路，证明专家知识引导的机器学习在小样本场景下的有效性。
search_text: Informed Machine Learning, Centrality, CNN, Relevant Document Detection, Repatriation of Indigenous Human Remains 知情机器学习、Centrality、CNN、相关文档检测、原住民遗骸遣返 Among the pressing issues facing Australian and other First Nations peoples is the repatriation of the bodily remains of their ancestors, which are currently held in Western scientific institutions. The success of securing the return of these remains to their communities for reburial depends largely on locating information within scientific and other literature published between 1790 and 1970 documenting their theft, donation, sale, or exchange between institutions. This article reports on collaborative research by data scientists and social science researchers in the Research, Reconcile, Renew Network (RRR) to develop and apply text mining techniques to identify this vital information. We describe our work to date on developing a machine learning-based solution to automate the process of finding and semantically analysing relevant texts. Classification models, particularly deep learning-based models, are known to have low accuracy when trained with small amounts of labelled (i.e. relevant/non-relevant) documents. To improve the accuracy of our detection model, we explore the use of an Informed Neural Network (INN) model that describes documentary content using expert-informed contextual knowledge. Only a few labelled documents are used to provide specificity to the model, using conceptually related keywords identified by RRR experts in provenance research. The results confirm the value of using an INN network model for identifying relevant documents related to the investigation of the global commercial trade in Indigenous human remains. Empirical analysis suggests that this INN model can be generalized for use by other researchers in the social sciences and humanities who want to extract relevant information from large textual corpora. 澳大利亚和其他原住民面临的紧迫问题之一是遣返其祖先的遗骸，这些遗骸目前保存在西方科学机构中。能否成功将这些遗骸送回其社区重新埋葬，很大程度上取决于在 1790 年至 1970 年间出版的记录遗骸被盗、捐赠、出售或机构之间交换的科学文献和其他文献中查找信息。本文报道了数据科学家和社会科学研究人员在研究、协调、更新网络 (RRR) 中的合作研究，以开发和应用文本挖掘技术来识别这些重要信息。我们描述了迄今为止我们在开发基于机器学习的解决方案以自动化查找和语义分析相关文本的过程方面所做的工作。众所周知，分类模型，特别是基于深度学习的模型，在使用少量标记（即相关/不相关）文档进行训练时，准确性较低。为了提高检测模型的准确性，我们探索使用知情神经网络（INN）模型，该模型使用专家知情的上下文知识来描述文献内容。仅使用少数标记文档来提供模型的特异性，使用 RRR 专家在出处研究中确定的概念相关关键字。结果证实了使用 INN 网络模型来识别与土著人类遗骸全球商业贸易调查相关的相关文件的价值。实证分析表明，这种 INN 模型可以推广用于社会科学和人文学科的其他研究人员，这些研究人员希望从大型文本语料库中提取相关信息。 本文提出一种基于知情神经网络（INN）的机器学习方法，用于自动识别与原住民遗骸归还相关的文献。 Md Abul Bashar,Richi Nayak,Gareth Knapman,Paul Turnbull,Cressida Fforde cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.IR,cs.LG,cs.SI

authors_text: Lei Wang,Piotr Koniusz
title: 3Mformer: Multi-order Multi-mode Transformer for Skeletal Action Recognition
title_zh: 3Mformer：用于骨骼动作识别的多阶多模式变压器
comment: This paper is accepted by CVPR 2023
comments: This paper is accepted by CVPR 2023
abstract: Many skeletal action recognition models use GCNs to represent the human body by 3D body joints connected body parts. GCNs aggregate one- or few-hop graph neighbourhoods, and ignore the dependency between not linked body joints. We propose to form hypergraph to model hyper-edges between graph nodes (e.g., third- and fourth-order hyper-edges capture three and four nodes) which help capture higher-order motion patterns of groups of body joints. We split action sequences into temporal blocks, Higher-order Transformer (HoT) produces embeddings of each temporal block based on (i) the body joints, (ii) pairwise links of body joints and (iii) higher-order hyper-edges of skeleton body joints. We combine such HoT embeddings of hyper-edges of orders 1, ..., r by a novel Multi-order Multi-mode Transformer (3Mformer) with two modules whose order can be exchanged to achieve coupled-mode attention on coupled-mode tokens based on 'channel-temporal block', 'order-channel-body joint', 'channel-hyper-edge (any order)' and 'channel-only' pairs. The first module, called Multi-order Pooling (MP), additionally learns weighted aggregation along the hyper-edge mode, whereas the second module, Temporal block Pooling (TP), aggregates along the temporal block mode. Our end-to-end trainable network yields state-of-the-art results compared to GCN-, transformer- and hypergraph-based counterparts.
summary: Many skeletal action recognition models use GCNs to represent the human body by 3D body joints connected body parts. GCNs aggregate one- or few-hop graph neighbourhoods, and ignore the dependency between not linked body joints. We propose to form hypergraph to model hyper-edges between graph nodes (e.g., third- and fourth-order hyper-edges capture three and four nodes) which help capture higher-order motion patterns of groups of body joints. We split action sequences into temporal blocks, Higher-order Transformer (HoT) produces embeddings of each temporal block based on (i) the body joints, (ii) pairwise links of body joints and (iii) higher-order hyper-edges of skeleton body joints. We combine such HoT embeddings of hyper-edges of orders 1, ..., r by a novel Multi-order Multi-mode Transformer (3Mformer) with two modules whose order can be exchanged to achieve coupled-mode attention on coupled-mode tokens based on 'channel-temporal block', 'order-channel-body joint', 'channel-hyper-edge (any order)' and 'channel-only' pairs. The first module, called Multi-order Pooling (MP), additionally learns weighted aggregation along the hyper-edge mode, whereas the second module, Temporal block Pooling (TP), aggregates along the temporal block mode. Our end-to-end trainable network yields state-of-the-art results compared to GCN-, transformer- and hypergraph-based counterparts.
abstract_zh: 许多骨骼动作识别模型使用 GCN 通过连接身体部位的 3D 身体关节来表示人体。 GCN 聚合一跳或几跳图邻域，并忽略未链接的身体关节之间的依赖关系。我们建议形成超图来对图节点之间的超边进行建模（例如，三阶和四阶超边捕获三个和四个节点），这有助于捕获身体关节组的高阶运动模式。我们将动作序列分割成时间块，高阶变换器（HoT）基于（i）身体关节，（ii）身体关节的成对链接和（iii）骨架身体关节的高阶超边缘生成每个时间块的嵌入。我们通过一种新颖的多阶多模式变压器（3Mformer）将这种阶数为 1, ..., r 的超边的 HoT 嵌入与两个可以交换阶数的模块相结合，以实现基于“通道-时间块”、“阶-通道-体联合”、“通道-超边（任何阶）”和“仅通道”对的耦合模式标记的耦合模式注意。第一个模块称为多阶池化 (MP)，另外学习沿超边缘模式的加权聚合，而第二个模块称为时间块池化 (TP)，沿时间块模式进行聚合。与基于 GCN、transformer 和超图的网络相比，我们的端到端可训练网络产生了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出3Mformer模型，通过多阶多模式Transformer捕捉骨骼动作识别中的高阶关节依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 传统GCN模型仅聚合一阶或少量跳数的图邻域，忽略未连接关节间的依赖关系，难以捕捉高阶运动模式。
AI.method: 构建超图建模高阶超边，将动作序列分块后用HoT生成嵌入，通过多阶多模式Transformer融合1到r阶超边信息，包含多阶池化模块和时序块池化模块实现跨模态注意力。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上达到优于GCN、Transformer和超图基线方法的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 3Mformer通过建模高阶关节关联和时序块耦合，有效提升了骨骼动作识别的准确性。

authors_text: Kartik Teotia,Mallikarjun B R,Xingang Pan,Hyeongwoo Kim,Pablo Garrido,Mohamed Elgharib,Christian Theobalt
title: HQ3DAvatar: High Quality Controllable 3D Head Avatar
title_zh: HQ3DAvatar：高品质可控3D头像
abstract: Multi-view volumetric rendering techniques have recently shown great potential in modeling and synthesizing high-quality head avatars. A common approach to capture full head dynamic performances is to track the underlying geometry using a mesh-based template or 3D cube-based graphics primitives. While these model-based approaches achieve promising results, they often fail to learn complex geometric details such as the mouth interior, hair, and topological changes over time. This paper presents a novel approach to building highly photorealistic digital head avatars. Our method learns a canonical space via an implicit function parameterized by a neural network. It leverages multiresolution hash encoding in the learned feature space, allowing for high-quality, faster training and high-resolution rendering. At test time, our method is driven by a monocular RGB video. Here, an image encoder extracts face-specific features that also condition the learnable canonical space. This encourages deformation-dependent texture variations during training. We also propose a novel optical flow based loss that ensures correspondences in the learned canonical space, thus encouraging artifact-free and temporally consistent renderings. We show results on challenging facial expressions and show free-viewpoint renderings at interactive real-time rates for medium image resolutions. Our method outperforms all existing approaches, both visually and numerically. We will release our multiple-identity dataset to encourage further research. Our Project page is available at: https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/HQ3DAvatar/
summary: Multi-view volumetric rendering techniques have recently shown great potential in modeling and synthesizing high-quality head avatars. A common approach to capture full head dynamic performances is to track the underlying geometry using a mesh-based template or 3D cube-based graphics primitives. While these model-based approaches achieve promising results, they often fail to learn complex geometric details such as the mouth interior, hair, and topological changes over time. This paper presents a novel approach to building highly photorealistic digital head avatars. Our method learns a canonical space via an implicit function parameterized by a neural network. It leverages multiresolution hash encoding in the learned feature space, allowing for high-quality, faster training and high-resolution rendering. At test time, our method is driven by a monocular RGB video. Here, an image encoder extracts face-specific features that also condition the learnable canonical space. This encourages deformation-dependent texture variations during training. We also propose a novel optical flow based loss that ensures correspondences in the learned canonical space, thus encouraging artifact-free and temporally consistent renderings. We show results on challenging facial expressions and show free-viewpoint renderings at interactive real-time rates for medium image resolutions. Our method outperforms all existing approaches, both visually and numerically. We will release our multiple-identity dataset to encourage further research. Our Project page is available at: https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/HQ3DAvatar/
abstract_zh: 多视图体积渲染技术最近在建模和合成高质量头像方面显示出巨大的潜力。捕获全头部动态性能的常见方法是使用基于网格的模板或基于 3D 立方体的图形基元来跟踪底层几何结构。虽然这些基于模型的方法取得了有希望的结果，但它们往往无法学习复杂的几何细节，例如口腔内部、头发和随时间的拓扑变化。本文提出了一种构建高度逼真的数字头像的新颖方法。我们的方法通过由神经网络参数化的隐式函数来学习规范空间。它在学习的特征空间中利用多分辨率哈希编码，从而实现高质量、更快的训练和高分辨率渲染。在测试时，我们的方法由单目 RGB 视频驱动。在这里，图像编码器提取面部特定特征，这些特征也调节可学习的规范空间。这鼓励了训练期间依赖变形的纹理变化。我们还提出了一种新颖的基于光流的损失，可确保学习的规范空间中的对应性，从而鼓励无伪影和时间一致的渲染。我们展示具有挑战性的面部表情的结果，并以中等图像分辨率的交互式实时速率展示自由视点渲染。我们的方法在视觉上和数字上都优于所有现有方法。我们将发布我们的多重身份数据集以鼓励进一步的研究。我们的项目页面位于：https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/HQ3DAvatar/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高质量可控的3D头部虚拟人像生成方法HQ3DAvatar，通过神经网络隐式函数和多分辨率哈希编码实现高精度动态建模。
AI.motivation: 现有基于网格模板或3D立方体的模型方法难以捕捉嘴唇内部、头发等复杂几何细节及随时间变化的拓扑结构，亟需更精确的建模方案。
AI.method: 构建神经网络参数化的隐式函数定义规范空间，结合多分辨率哈希编码提升训练效率；通过单目RGB视频提取面部特征并驱动规范空间变形，引入光流损失保证时空一致性。
AI.result: 在复杂表情和交互式实时渲染中表现优异，中等分辨率下实现无伪影的自由视角渲染，数值和视觉效果均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在质量和效率上取得突破，通过发布多身份数据集推动相关研究发展。

search_text: HQ3DAvatar: High Quality Controllable 3D Head Avatar HQ3DAvatar：高品质可控3D头像 Multi-view volumetric rendering techniques have recently shown great potential in modeling and synthesizing high-quality head avatars. A common approach to capture full head dynamic performances is to track the underlying geometry using a mesh-based template or 3D cube-based graphics primitives. While these model-based approaches achieve promising results, they often fail to learn complex geometric details such as the mouth interior, hair, and topological changes over time. This paper presents a novel approach to building highly photorealistic digital head avatars. Our method learns a canonical space via an implicit function parameterized by a neural network. It leverages multiresolution hash encoding in the learned feature space, allowing for high-quality, faster training and high-resolution rendering. At test time, our method is driven by a monocular RGB video. Here, an image encoder extracts face-specific features that also condition the learnable canonical space. This encourages deformation-dependent texture variations during training. We also propose a novel optical flow based loss that ensures correspondences in the learned canonical space, thus encouraging artifact-free and temporally consistent renderings. We show results on challenging facial expressions and show free-viewpoint renderings at interactive real-time rates for medium image resolutions. Our method outperforms all existing approaches, both visually and numerically. We will release our multiple-identity dataset to encourage further research. Our Project page is available at: https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/HQ3DAvatar/ 多视图体积渲染技术最近在建模和合成高质量头像方面显示出巨大的潜力。捕获全头部动态性能的常见方法是使用基于网格的模板或基于 3D 立方体的图形基元来跟踪底层几何结构。虽然这些基于模型的方法取得了有希望的结果，但它们往往无法学习复杂的几何细节，例如口腔内部、头发和随时间的拓扑变化。本文提出了一种构建高度逼真的数字头像的新颖方法。我们的方法通过由神经网络参数化的隐式函数来学习规范空间。它在学习的特征空间中利用多分辨率哈希编码，从而实现高质量、更快的训练和高分辨率渲染。在测试时，我们的方法由单目 RGB 视频驱动。在这里，图像编码器提取面部特定特征，这些特征也调节可学习的规范空间。这鼓励了训练期间依赖变形的纹理变化。我们还提出了一种新颖的基于光流的损失，可确保学习的规范空间中的对应性，从而鼓励无伪影和时间一致的渲染。我们展示具有挑战性的面部表情的结果，并以中等图像分辨率的交互式实时速率展示自由视点渲染。我们的方法在视觉上和数字上都优于所有现有方法。我们将发布我们的多重身份数据集以鼓励进一步的研究。我们的项目页面位于：https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/HQ3DAvatar/ 本文提出一种高质量可控的3D头部虚拟人像生成方法HQ3DAvatar，通过神经网络隐式函数和多分辨率哈希编码实现高精度动态建模。 Kartik Teotia,Mallikarjun B R,Xingang Pan,Hyeongwoo Kim,Pablo Garrido,Mohamed Elgharib,Christian Theobalt cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Yikai Wang,Wenbing Huang,Yinpeng Dong,Fuchun Sun,Anbang Yao
title: Compacting Binary Neural Networks by Sparse Kernel Selection
title_zh: 通过稀疏核选择压缩二元神经网络
abstract: Binary Neural Network (BNN) represents convolution weights with 1-bit values, which enhances the efficiency of storage and computation. This paper is motivated by a previously revealed phenomenon that the binary kernels in successful BNNs are nearly power-law distributed: their values are mostly clustered into a small number of codewords. This phenomenon encourages us to compact typical BNNs and obtain further close performance through learning non-repetitive kernels within a binary kernel subspace. Specifically, we regard the binarization process as kernel grouping in terms of a binary codebook, and our task lies in learning to select a smaller subset of codewords from the full codebook. We then leverage the Gumbel-Sinkhorn technique to approximate the codeword selection process, and develop the Permutation Straight-Through Estimator (PSTE) that is able to not only optimize the selection process end-to-end but also maintain the non-repetitive occupancy of selected codewords. Experiments verify that our method reduces both the model size and bit-wise computational costs, and achieves accuracy improvements compared with state-of-the-art BNNs under comparable budgets.
summary: Binary Neural Network (BNN) represents convolution weights with 1-bit values, which enhances the efficiency of storage and computation. This paper is motivated by a previously revealed phenomenon that the binary kernels in successful BNNs are nearly power-law distributed: their values are mostly clustered into a small number of codewords. This phenomenon encourages us to compact typical BNNs and obtain further close performance through learning non-repetitive kernels within a binary kernel subspace. Specifically, we regard the binarization process as kernel grouping in terms of a binary codebook, and our task lies in learning to select a smaller subset of codewords from the full codebook. We then leverage the Gumbel-Sinkhorn technique to approximate the codeword selection process, and develop the Permutation Straight-Through Estimator (PSTE) that is able to not only optimize the selection process end-to-end but also maintain the non-repetitive occupancy of selected codewords. Experiments verify that our method reduces both the model size and bit-wise computational costs, and achieves accuracy improvements compared with state-of-the-art BNNs under comparable budgets.
abstract_zh: 二元神经网络（BNN）用 1 位值表示卷积权重，提高了存储和计算的效率。本文的动机是先前揭示的一个现象，即成功的 BNN 中的二进制内核几乎是幂律分布的：它们的值大多聚集成少量的码字。这种现象鼓励我们压缩典型的 BNN，并通过学习二元核子空间中的非重复核来获得更接近的性能。具体来说，我们将二值化过程视为二进制码本的内核分组，我们的任务在于学习从完整码本中选择较小的码字子集。然后，我们利用 Gumbel-Sinkhorn 技术来近似码字选择过程，并开发排列直通估计器 (PSTE)，它不仅能够端到端优化选择过程，而且还能保持所选码字的非重复占用。实验验证了我们的方法减少了模型大小和按位计算成本，并且与同等预算下最先进的 BNN 相比，实现了准确性的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过稀疏核选择压缩二值神经网络（BNN），在减少模型大小和计算成本的同时保持性能。
AI.motivation: 观察到成功BNN的二值核近似幂律分布，即值集中在少量码字中，因此可通过学习更少的非重复核来压缩模型。
AI.method: 将二值化过程视为二进制码本的核分组，利用Gumbel-Sinkhorn技术近似码字选择，并开发Permutation Straight-Through Estimator（PSTE）实现端到端优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持模型精度的前提下，有效减少了模型规模和位级计算成本，优于现有BNN方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过稀疏核选择策略，能够在有限预算下实现更高效且准确的二值神经网络，为模型压缩提供新思路。

authors_text: Tommaso Lanciano,Atsushi Miyauchi,Adriano Fazzone,Francesco Bonchi
title: A Survey on the Densest Subgraph Problem and Its Variants
title_zh: 最稠子图问题及其变体综述
abstract: The Densest Subgraph Problem requires to find, in a given graph, a subset of vertices whose induced subgraph maximizes a measure of density. The problem has received a great deal of attention in the algorithmic literature since the early 1970s, with many variants proposed and many applications built on top of this basic definition. Recent years have witnessed a revival of research interest in this problem with several important contributions, including some groundbreaking results, published in 2022 and 2023. This survey provides a deep overview of the fundamental results and an exhaustive coverage of the many variants proposed in the literature, with a special attention to the most recent results. The survey also presents a comprehensive overview of applications and discusses some interesting open problems for this evergreen research topic.
summary: The Densest Subgraph Problem requires to find, in a given graph, a subset of vertices whose induced subgraph maximizes a measure of density. The problem has received a great deal of attention in the algorithmic literature since the early 1970s, with many variants proposed and many applications built on top of this basic definition. Recent years have witnessed a revival of research interest in this problem with several important contributions, including some groundbreaking results, published in 2022 and 2023. This survey provides a deep overview of the fundamental results and an exhaustive coverage of the many variants proposed in the literature, with a special attention to the most recent results. The survey also presents a comprehensive overview of applications and discusses some interesting open problems for this evergreen research topic.
abstract_zh: 最稠密子图问题需要在给定图中找到其导出子图最大化密度度量的顶点子集。自 20 世纪 70 年代初以来，这个问题在算法文献中受到了广泛关注，提出了许多变体，并且许多应用程序都建立在这个基本定义之上。近年来，人们对该问题的研究兴趣有所复苏，并做出了多项重要贡献，其中包括 2022 年和 2023 年发表的一些突破性结果。这项调查深入概述了基本结果，并详尽涵盖了文献中提出的许多变体，并特别关注了最新结果。该调查还对应用程序进行了全面的概述，并讨论了这个常青研究主题的一些有趣的开放问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了密集子图问题及其变种的研究现状，涵盖基础理论、算法进展、应用领域及开放问题。
AI.motivation: 密集子图问题在算法领域具有重要理论价值和应用潜力，近年来研究取得突破性进展，需系统总结现有成果以推动未来研究。
AI.method: 通过文献调研与分析，系统梳理密集子图问题的定义、算法框架、变种形式及其在现实场景中的应用案例。
AI.result: 全面总结了问题的核心算法、最新研究成果（2022-2023年），并归纳了跨领域应用实例与当前未解决的关键科学问题。
AI.conclusion: 密集子图问题仍是活跃研究方向，未来需在理论优化与实际应用落地之间寻求平衡，探索更高效的算法与更广泛的场景适配性。

authors_text: Tan Wang,Kevin Lin,Linjie Li,Chung-Ching Lin,Zhengyuan Yang,Hanwang Zhang,Zicheng Liu,Lijuan Wang
title: Equivariant Similarity for Vision-Language Foundation Models
title_zh: 视觉语言基础模型的等变相似性
comment: Accepted by ICCV'23 (Oral); Add evaluation on MLLM
comments: Accepted by ICCV'23 (Oral); Add evaluation on MLLM
abstract: This study explores the concept of equivariance in vision-language foundation models (VLMs), focusing specifically on the multimodal similarity function that is not only the major training objective but also the core delivery to support downstream tasks. Unlike the existing image-text similarity objective which only categorizes matched pairs as similar and unmatched pairs as dissimilar, equivariance also requires similarity to vary faithfully according to the semantic changes. This allows VLMs to generalize better to nuanced and unseen multimodal compositions. However, modeling equivariance is challenging as the ground truth of semantic change is difficult to collect. For example, given an image-text pair about a dog, it is unclear to what extent the similarity changes when the pixel is changed from dog to cat? To this end, we propose EqSim, a regularization loss that can be efficiently calculated from any two matched training pairs and easily pluggable into existing image-text retrieval fine-tuning. Meanwhile, to further diagnose the equivariance of VLMs, we present a new challenging benchmark EqBen. Compared to the existing evaluation sets, EqBen is the first to focus on "visual-minimal change". Extensive experiments show the lack of equivariance in current VLMs and validate the effectiveness of EqSim. Code is available at https://github.com/Wangt-CN/EqBen.
summary: This study explores the concept of equivariance in vision-language foundation models (VLMs), focusing specifically on the multimodal similarity function that is not only the major training objective but also the core delivery to support downstream tasks. This allows VLMs to generalize better to nuanced and unseen multimodal compositions. However, modeling equivariance is challenging as the ground truth of semantic change is difficult to collect. For example, given an image-text pair about a dog, it is unclear to what extent the similarity changes when the pixel is changed from dog to cat? To this end, we propose EqSim, a regularization loss that can be efficiently calculated from any two matched training pairs and easily pluggable into existing image-text retrieval fine-tuning. Meanwhile, to further diagnose the equivariance of VLMs, we present a new challenging benchmark EqBen. Compared to the existing evaluation sets, EqBen is the first to focus on "visual-minimal change". Extensive experiments show the lack of equivariance in current VLMs and validate the effectiveness of EqSim. Code is available at https://github.com/Wangt-CN/EqBen.
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了视觉语言基础模型（VLM）中的等方差概念，特别关注多模态相似性函数，它不仅是主要训练目标，也是支持下游任务的核心交付。与现有的图像文本相似度目标仅将匹配对分类为相似，将不匹配对分类为不相似不同，等方差还要求相似度根据语义变化忠实地变化。这使得 VLM 能够更好地泛化到细微差别和看不见的多模态成分。然而，对等方差进行建模具有挑战性，因为语义变化的基本事实很难收集。例如，给定一个关于狗的图像文本对，当像素从狗变为猫时，不清楚相似性会发生多大程度的变化？为此，我们提出了 EqSim，这是一种正则化损失，可以从任何两个匹配的训练对中有效地计算出来，并且可以轻松插入现有的图像文本检索微调中。同时，为了进一步诊断 VLM 的等方差性，我们提出了一个新的具有挑战性的基准 EqBen。与现有的评估集相比，EqBen 是第一个关注“视觉-最小变化”的。大量实验表明当前 VLM 缺乏等方差性，并验证了 EqSim 的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Wangt-CN/EqBen 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EqSim的正则化损失和一个名为EqBen的新基准，以增强视觉-语言基础模型（VLMs）在语义变化下的等变性，从而提升其对细微多模态组合的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型的相似性函数无法有效捕捉语义变化带来的相似性调整，导致模型在面对新颖或细微的多模态组合时泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出EqSim正则化损失，通过任意两个匹配训练对高效计算，强制模型学习语义变化下的相似性调整；构建EqBen基准，专注于‘视觉最小变化’场景以诊断模型等变性。
AI.result: 实验表明当前VLMs存在等变性缺陷，EqSim有效提升了模型性能，EqBen验证了其在细微变化下的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: EqSim和EqBen为改进视觉-语言模型的语义适应性提供了新方法和评估工具，推动其在复杂场景下的应用。

search_text: Equivariant Similarity for Vision-Language Foundation Models 视觉语言基础模型的等变相似性 This study explores the concept of equivariance in vision-language foundation models (VLMs), focusing specifically on the multimodal similarity function that is not only the major training objective but also the core delivery to support downstream tasks. Unlike the existing image-text similarity objective which only categorizes matched pairs as similar and unmatched pairs as dissimilar, equivariance also requires similarity to vary faithfully according to the semantic changes. This allows VLMs to generalize better to nuanced and unseen multimodal compositions. However, modeling equivariance is challenging as the ground truth of semantic change is difficult to collect. For example, given an image-text pair about a dog, it is unclear to what extent the similarity changes when the pixel is changed from dog to cat? To this end, we propose EqSim, a regularization loss that can be efficiently calculated from any two matched training pairs and easily pluggable into existing image-text retrieval fine-tuning. Meanwhile, to further diagnose the equivariance of VLMs, we present a new challenging benchmark EqBen. Compared to the existing evaluation sets, EqBen is the first to focus on "visual-minimal change". Extensive experiments show the lack of equivariance in current VLMs and validate the effectiveness of EqSim. Code is available at https://github.com/Wangt-CN/EqBen. 本研究探讨了视觉语言基础模型（VLM）中的等方差概念，特别关注多模态相似性函数，它不仅是主要训练目标，也是支持下游任务的核心交付。与现有的图像文本相似度目标仅将匹配对分类为相似，将不匹配对分类为不相似不同，等方差还要求相似度根据语义变化忠实地变化。这使得 VLM 能够更好地泛化到细微差别和看不见的多模态成分。然而，对等方差进行建模具有挑战性，因为语义变化的基本事实很难收集。例如，给定一个关于狗的图像文本对，当像素从狗变为猫时，不清楚相似性会发生多大程度的变化？为此，我们提出了 EqSim，这是一种正则化损失，可以从任何两个匹配的训练对中有效地计算出来，并且可以轻松插入现有的图像文本检索微调中。同时，为了进一步诊断 VLM 的等方差性，我们提出了一个新的具有挑战性的基准 EqBen。与现有的评估集相比，EqBen 是第一个关注“视觉-最小变化”的。大量实验表明当前 VLM 缺乏等方差性，并验证了 EqSim 的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/Wangt-CN/EqBen 获取。 本文提出了一种名为EqSim的正则化损失和一个名为EqBen的新基准，以增强视觉-语言基础模型（VLMs）在语义变化下的等变性，从而提升其对细微多模态组合的泛化能力。 Tan Wang,Kevin Lin,Linjie Li,Chung-Ching Lin,Zhengyuan Yang,Hanwang Zhang,Zicheng Liu,Lijuan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Zeming Wei,Yifei Wang,Yiwen Guo,Yisen Wang
title: CFA: Class-wise Calibrated Fair Adversarial Training
title_zh: CFA：按班级校准的公平对抗性训练
abstract: Adversarial training has been widely acknowledged as the most effective method to improve the adversarial robustness against adversarial examples for Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). So far, most existing works focus on enhancing the overall model robustness, treating each class equally in both the training and testing phases. Although revealing the disparity in robustness among classes, few works try to make adversarial training fair at the class level without sacrificing overall robustness. In this paper, we are the first to theoretically and empirically investigate the preference of different classes for adversarial configurations, including perturbation margin, regularization, and weight averaging. Motivated by this, we further propose a \textbf{C}lass-wise calibrated \textbf{F}air \textbf{A}dversarial training framework, named CFA, which customizes specific training configurations for each class automatically. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our proposed CFA can improve both overall robustness and fairness notably over other state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/PKU-ML/CFA}.
summary: Adversarial training has been widely acknowledged as the most effective method to improve the adversarial robustness against adversarial examples for Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). So far, most existing works focus on enhancing the overall model robustness, treating each class equally in both the training and testing phases. Although revealing the disparity in robustness among classes, few works try to make adversarial training fair at the class level without sacrificing overall robustness. In this paper, we are the first to theoretically and empirically investigate the preference of different classes for adversarial configurations, including perturbation margin, regularization, and weight averaging. Motivated by this, we further propose a \textbf{C}lass-wise calibrated \textbf{F}air \textbf{A}dversarial training framework, named CFA, which customizes specific training configurations for each class automatically. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our proposed CFA can improve both overall robustness and fairness notably over other state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at \url{https://github.com/PKU-ML/CFA}.
abstract_zh: 对抗训练被广泛认为是提高深度神经网络（DNN）对抗样本的对抗鲁棒性的最有效方法。到目前为止，大多数现有工作都专注于增强整体模型的鲁棒性，在训练和测试阶段平等对待每个类别。尽管揭示了类别之间鲁棒性的差异，但很少有作品试图在不牺牲整体鲁棒性的情况下在类别层面上实现对抗性训练的公平性。在本文中，我们首次从理论上和实证上研究了不同类别对对抗配置的偏好，包括扰动裕度、正则化和权重平均。受此启发，我们进一步提出了一个 \textbf{C}lass-wise 校准 \textbf{F}air \textbf{A}dversarial 训练框架，名为 CFA，它自动为每个类别定制特定的训练配置。基准数据集上的实验表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，我们提出的 CFA 可以显着提高整体鲁棒性和公平性。代码可在 \url{https://github.com/PKU-ML/CFA} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CFA的类级校准公平对抗训练框架，旨在通过自定义每个类别的训练配置来提升深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性和公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法在提升模型整体鲁棒性时通常对所有类别一视同仁，忽视了不同类别在鲁棒性上的差异，导致公平性不足。
AI.method: CFA框架通过理论与实验分析不同类别对对抗配置（如扰动边距、正则化、权重平均）的偏好，自动为每个类别定制化训练参数。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，CFA在保持整体鲁棒性的同时显著提升了类间公平性，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CFA通过类级自适应配置有效平衡了对抗鲁棒性与公平性，为公平对抗训练提供了新方向。

authors_text: Tianxiang Ren,Jubo Yu,Shihui Guo,Ying Ma,Yutao Ouyang,Zijiao Zeng,Yazhan Zhang,Yipeng Qin
title: Diverse Motion In-betweening with Dual Posture Stitching
title_zh: 双姿势拼接的多样动作中间
abstract: In-betweening is a technique for generating transitions given initial and target character states. The majority of existing works require multiple (often $>$10) frames as input, which are not always accessible. Our work deals with a focused yet challenging problem: to generate the transition when given exactly two frames (only the first and last). To cope with this challenging scenario, we implement our bi-directional scheme which generates forward and backward transitions from the start and end frames with two adversarial autoregressive networks, and stitches them in the middle of the transition where there is no strict ground truth. The autoregressive networks based on conditional variational autoencoders (CVAE) are optimized by searching for a pair of optimal latent codes that minimize a novel stitching loss between their outputs. Results show that our method achieves higher motion quality and more diverse results than existing methods on both the LaFAN1 and Human3.6m datasets.
summary: In-betweening is a technique for generating transitions given initial and target character states. The majority of existing works require multiple (often $>$10) frames as input, which are not always accessible. Our work deals with a focused yet challenging problem: to generate the transition when given exactly two frames (only the first and last). To cope with this challenging scenario, we implement our bi-directional scheme which generates forward and backward transitions from the start and end frames with two adversarial autoregressive networks, and stitches them in the middle of the transition where there is no strict ground truth. The autoregressive networks based on conditional variational autoencoders (CVAE) are optimized by searching for a pair of optimal latent codes that minimize a novel stitching loss between their outputs. Results show that our method achieves higher motion quality and more diverse results than existing methods on both the LaFAN1 and Human3.6m datasets.
abstract_zh: 中间是一种在给定初始和目标角色状态的情况下生成转换的技术。大多数现有作品需要多个（通常 $>$10）帧作为输入，而这些帧并不总是可访问的。我们的工作处理一个重点但具有挑战性的问题：在给定两帧（仅第一帧和最后一帧）时生成过渡。为了应对这种具有挑战性的场景，我们实现了双向方案，该方案使用两个对抗性自回归网络从开始帧和结束帧生成前向和后向过渡，并将它们缝合在没有严格的基本事实的过渡中间。基于条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）的自回归网络通过搜索一对最佳潜在代码来优化，这些潜在代码可以最小化其输出之间的新拼接损失。结果表明，我们的方法在 LaFAN1 和 Human3.6m 数据集上比现有方法实现了更高的运动质量和更多样化的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在仅有起始和目标帧的情况下生成高质量且多样化的角色运动过渡的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有运动插值方法通常需要多个输入帧（通常>10帧），但实际场景中可能无法获取足够多的帧，因此需要解决仅用两帧生成过渡的挑战。
AI.method: 采用双向生成方案，通过两个对抗自回归网络（基于CVAE）分别从起始帧和目标帧生成正向和反向过渡，并在中间区域通过新颖的缝合损失函数进行拼接优化。
AI.result: 在LaFAN1和Human3.6m数据集上，该方法在运动质量与结果多样性方面优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过双姿态缝合策略与对抗自回归网络的结合，有效解决了仅有两帧时的运动插值问题，实现了高质量且多样化的过渡生成。

search_text: Diverse Motion In-betweening with Dual Posture Stitching 双姿势拼接的多样动作中间 In-betweening is a technique for generating transitions given initial and target character states. The majority of existing works require multiple (often $>$10) frames as input, which are not always accessible. Our work deals with a focused yet challenging problem: to generate the transition when given exactly two frames (only the first and last). To cope with this challenging scenario, we implement our bi-directional scheme which generates forward and backward transitions from the start and end frames with two adversarial autoregressive networks, and stitches them in the middle of the transition where there is no strict ground truth. The autoregressive networks based on conditional variational autoencoders (CVAE) are optimized by searching for a pair of optimal latent codes that minimize a novel stitching loss between their outputs. Results show that our method achieves higher motion quality and more diverse results than existing methods on both the LaFAN1 and Human3.6m datasets. 中间是一种在给定初始和目标角色状态的情况下生成转换的技术。大多数现有作品需要多个（通常 $>$10）帧作为输入，而这些帧并不总是可访问的。我们的工作处理一个重点但具有挑战性的问题：在给定两帧（仅第一帧和最后一帧）时生成过渡。为了应对这种具有挑战性的场景，我们实现了双向方案，该方案使用两个对抗性自回归网络从开始帧和结束帧生成前向和后向过渡，并将它们缝合在没有严格的基本事实的过渡中间。基于条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）的自回归网络通过搜索一对最佳潜在代码来优化，这些潜在代码可以最小化其输出之间的新拼接损失。结果表明，我们的方法在 LaFAN1 和 Human3.6m 数据集上比现有方法实现了更高的运动质量和更多样化的结果。 本文提出一种在仅有起始和目标帧的情况下生成高质量且多样化的角色运动过渡的方法。 Tianxiang Ren,Jubo Yu,Shihui Guo,Ying Ma,Yutao Ouyang,Zijiao Zeng,Yazhan Zhang,Yipeng Qin cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR

authors_text: Yilun Jin,Yang Liu,Kai Chen,Qiang Yang
title: Federated Learning without Full Labels: A Survey
title_zh: 没有完整标签的联邦学习：一项调查
comment: This survey is an extended and contemporary version of arXiv:2002.11545
comments: This survey is an extended and contemporary version of arXiv:2002.11545
abstract: Data privacy has become an increasingly important concern in real-world big data applications such as machine learning. To address the problem, federated learning (FL) has been a promising solution to building effective machine learning models from decentralized and private data. Existing federated learning algorithms mainly tackle the supervised learning problem, where data are assumed to be fully labeled. However, in practice, fully labeled data is often hard to obtain, as the participants may not have sufficient domain expertise, or they lack the motivation and tools to label data. Therefore, the problem of federated learning without full labels is important in real-world FL applications. In this paper, we discuss how the problem can be solved with machine learning techniques that leverage unlabeled data. We present a survey of methods that combine FL with semi-supervised learning, self-supervised learning, and transfer learning methods. We also summarize the datasets used to evaluate FL methods without full labels. Finally, we highlight future directions in the context of FL without full labels.
summary: Data privacy has become an increasingly important concern in real-world big data applications such as machine learning. To address the problem, federated learning (FL) has been a promising solution to building effective machine learning models from decentralized and private data. Existing federated learning algorithms mainly tackle the supervised learning problem, where data are assumed to be fully labeled. However, in practice, fully labeled data is often hard to obtain, as the participants may not have sufficient domain expertise, or they lack the motivation and tools to label data. Therefore, the problem of federated learning without full labels is important in real-world FL applications. In this paper, we discuss how the problem can be solved with machine learning techniques that leverage unlabeled data. We present a survey of methods that combine FL with semi-supervised learning, self-supervised learning, and transfer learning methods. We also summarize the datasets used to evaluate FL methods without full labels. Finally, we highlight future directions in the context of FL without full labels.
abstract_zh: 数据隐私已成为机器学习等现实大数据应用中越来越重要的问题。为了解决这个问题，联邦学习（FL）是一种很有前途的解决方案，可以从去中心化和私有数据构建有效的机器学习模型。现有的联邦学习算法主要解决监督学习问题，其中数据被假设为完全标记的。然而，在实践中，完全标记的数据通常很难获得，因为参与者可能没有足够的领域专业知识，或者他们缺乏标记数据的动力和工具。因此，没有完整标签的联邦学习问题在现实世界的 FL 应用中非常重要。在本文中，我们讨论如何通过利用未标记数据的机器学习技术来解决该问题。我们对将 FL 与半监督学习、自监督学习和迁移学习方法相结合的方法进行了调查。我们还总结了用于评估没有完整标签的 FL 方法的数据集。最后，我们在没有完整标签的情况下强调了 FL 背景下的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了无需完整标签的联邦学习方法，探讨如何利用无标签数据解决实际应用中标签获取困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习算法依赖完整标签数据，但实际场景中标签获取成本高且难以保证质量，亟需研究无需完整标签的联邦学习方案。
AI.method: 通过整合半监督学习、自监督学习和迁移学习方法，系统梳理联邦学习与无标签数据结合的技术框架，并总结相关数据集与评估方法。
AI.result: 归纳了当前主流技术路线，分析了典型数据集的适用场景，并指出了标签缺失场景下联邦学习的挑战与研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 无需完整标签的联邦学习是提升实际应用可行性的关键方向，未来需在算法鲁棒性、跨领域适应性及隐私保护等方面进一步突破。

authors_text: Constantin Ulrich,Fabian Isensee,Tassilo Wald,Maximilian Zenk,Michael Baumgartner,Klaus H. Maier-Hein
title: MultiTalent: A Multi-Dataset Approach to Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: MultiTalent：医学图像分割的多数据集方法
comment: Accepted for Miccai 2023 and selected for an oral
comments: Accepted for Miccai 2023 and selected for an oral
abstract: The medical imaging community generates a wealth of datasets, many of which are openly accessible and annotated for specific diseases and tasks such as multi-organ or lesion segmentation. Current practices continue to limit model training and supervised pre-training to one or a few similar datasets, neglecting the synergistic potential of other available annotated data. We propose MultiTalent, a method that leverages multiple CT datasets with diverse and conflicting class definitions to train a single model for a comprehensive structure segmentation. Our results demonstrate improved segmentation performance compared to previous related approaches, systematically, also compared to single dataset training using state-of-the-art methods, especially for lesion segmentation and other challenging structures. We show that MultiTalent also represents a powerful foundation model that offers a superior pre-training for various segmentation tasks compared to commonly used supervised or unsupervised pre-training baselines. Our findings offer a new direction for the medical imaging community to effectively utilize the wealth of available data for improved segmentation performance. The code and model weights will be published here: [tba]
summary: The medical imaging community generates a wealth of datasets, many of which are openly accessible and annotated for specific diseases and tasks such as multi-organ or lesion segmentation. Current practices continue to limit model training and supervised pre-training to one or a few similar datasets, neglecting the synergistic potential of other available annotated data. We propose MultiTalent, a method that leverages multiple CT datasets with diverse and conflicting class definitions to train a single model for a comprehensive structure segmentation. Our results demonstrate improved segmentation performance compared to previous related approaches, systematically, also compared to single dataset training using state-of-the-art methods, especially for lesion segmentation and other challenging structures. We show that MultiTalent also represents a powerful foundation model that offers a superior pre-training for various segmentation tasks compared to commonly used supervised or unsupervised pre-training baselines. Our findings offer a new direction for the medical imaging community to effectively utilize the wealth of available data for improved segmentation performance. The code and model weights will be published here: [tba]
abstract_zh: 医学成像社区生成了大量数据集，其中许多数据集可以公开访问并针对特定疾病和任务（例如多器官或病变分割）进行注释。当前的实践继续将模型训练和监督预训练限制在一个或几个类似的数据集上，忽略了其他可用注释数据的协同潜力。我们提出了 MultiTalent，一种利用具有多样化且相互冲突的类定义的多个 CT 数据集来训练单个模型以进行全面结构分割的方法。我们的结果表明，与以前的相关方法相比，系统地，也与使用最先进方法的单个数据集训练相比，分割性能得到了提高，特别是对于病变分割和其他具有挑战性的结构。我们表明，MultiTalent 还代表了一个强大的基础模型，与常用的监督或无监督预训练基线相比，它为各种分割任务提供了卓越的预训练。我们的研究结果为医学成像界提供了有效利用大量可用数据来提高分割性能的新方向。代码和模型权重将在这里发布：[tba]

AI.tldr: 本文提出MultiTalent方法，通过整合多个具有不同类别定义的医学影像数据集，实现更全面的医学图像分割。
AI.motivation: 当前医学影像分割模型通常仅使用单一或少量相似数据集进行训练，未能充分利用其他可用的标注数据的协同潜力。
AI.method: MultiTalent方法利用多个CT数据集，通过处理不同数据集间的类别定义冲突，训练单一模型实现多结构分割。
AI.result: 实验表明，MultiTalent在分割性能上优于现有方法及单数据集训练，尤其在病变分割等复杂结构上表现突出，并可作为优于传统预训练方法的通用基础模型。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为医学影像领域有效利用多样化数据提升分割性能提供了新方向，代码和模型权重将公开发布。

authors_text: Franco Coltraro,Jaume Amorós,Maria Alberich-Carramiñana,Carme Torras
title: A novel collision model for inextensible textiles and its experimental validation
title_zh: 一种新型不可延伸纺织品碰撞模型及其实验验证
abstract: In this work, we introduce a collision model specifically tailored for the simulation of inextensible textiles. The model considers friction, contacts, and inextensibility constraints all at the same time without any decoupling. Self-collisions are modeled in a natural way that allows considering the thickness of cloth without introducing unwanted oscillations. The discretization of the equations of motion leads naturally to a sequence of quadratic problems with inequality and equality constraints. In order to solve these problems efficiently, we develop a novel active-set algorithm that takes into account past active constraints to accelerate the resolution of unresolved contacts. We put to a test the developed collision procedure with diverse scenarios involving static and dynamic friction, sharp objects, and complex-topology folding sequences. Finally, we perform an experimental validation of the collision model by comparing simulations with recordings of real textiles as given by a $\textit{Motion Capture System}$. The results are very accurate, having errors around 1 cm for DIN A2 textiles (42 x 59.4 cm) even in difficult scenarios involving fast and strong hits with a rigid object.
summary: In this work, we introduce a collision model specifically tailored for the simulation of inextensible textiles. The model considers friction, contacts, and inextensibility constraints all at the same time without any decoupling. Self-collisions are modeled in a natural way that allows considering the thickness of cloth without introducing unwanted oscillations. The discretization of the equations of motion leads naturally to a sequence of quadratic problems with inequality and equality constraints. In order to solve these problems efficiently, we develop a novel active-set algorithm that takes into account past active constraints to accelerate the resolution of unresolved contacts. We put to a test the developed collision procedure with diverse scenarios involving static and dynamic friction, sharp objects, and complex-topology folding sequences. Finally, we perform an experimental validation of the collision model by comparing simulations with recordings of real textiles as given by a $\textit{Motion Capture System}$. The results are very accurate, having errors around 1 cm for DIN A2 textiles (42 x 59.4 cm) even in difficult scenarios involving fast and strong hits with a rigid object.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们引入了专门为模拟不可延伸的纺织品而定制的碰撞模型。该模型同时考虑摩擦、接触和不可扩展约束，没有任何解耦。自碰撞以自然的方式建模，允许考虑布料的厚度，而不会引入不必要的振荡。运动方程的离散化自然会导致一系列具有不等式和等式约束的二次问题。为了有效地解决这些问题，我们开发了一种新颖的活动集算法，该算法考虑了过去的活动约束，以加速解决未解决的接触。我们对开发的碰撞程序进行了测试，涉及静态和动态摩擦、尖锐物体和复杂拓扑折叠序列等多种场景。最后，我们通过将模拟与 $\textit{动作捕捉系统}$ 给出的真实纺织品的记录进行比较来对碰撞模型进行实验验证。结果非常准确，即使在涉及刚性物体快速强力撞击的困难场景中，DIN A2 纺织品 (42 x 59.4 厘米) 的误差也约为 1 厘米。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的不可伸缩纺织品碰撞模型，并通过实验验证其准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有纺织品模拟方法难以同时处理摩擦、接触和不可伸缩性约束，且易产生振荡或计算效率低。
AI.method: 开发主动集算法解决带约束的二次问题，结合运动捕捉系统进行实验验证。
AI.result: 模拟误差在1厘米内，适用于复杂动态场景如快速撞击和复杂折叠。
AI.conclusion: 新模型有效解决了纺织品碰撞模拟的挑战，验证了其在实际应用中的可靠性。

authors_text: Beauty L. Komane,Topside E. Mathonsi
title: Design of a Smart Waste Management System for the City of Johannesburg
title_zh: 约翰内斯堡市智能废物管理系统设计
abstract: Every human being in this world produces waste. South Africa is a developing country with many townships that have limited waste resources. Over-increasing population growth overpowers the volume of most municipal authorities to provide even the most essential services. Waste in townships is produced via littering, dumping of bins, cutting of trees, dumping of waste near rivers, and overrunning of waste bins. Waste increases diseases, air pollution, and environmental pollution, and lastly increases gas emissions that contribute to the release of greenhouse gases. The ungathered waste is dumped widely in the streets and drains contributing to flooding, breeding of insects, rodent vectors, and spreading of diseases. Therefore, the aim of this paper is to design a smart waste management system for the city of Johannesburg. The city of Johannesburg contains waste municipality workers and has provided some areas with waste resources such as waste bins and trucks for collecting waste. But the problem is that the resources only are not enough to solve the problem of waste in the city. The waste municipality uses traditional ways of collecting waste such as going to each street and picking up waste bins. The traditional way has worked for years but as the population is increasing more waste is produced which causes various problems for the waste municipalities and the public at large. The proposed system consists of sensors, user applications, and a real-time monitoring system. This paper adopts the experimental methodology.

abstract_zh: 这个世界上的每个人都会产生废物。南非是一个发展中国家，许多乡镇的废物资源有限。过度增长的人口增长超出了大多数市政当局提供最基本服务的能力。乡镇的垃圾是通过乱扔垃圾、倾倒垃圾箱、砍伐树木、在河边倾倒垃圾以及垃圾箱溢出而产生的。废物会增加疾病、空气污染和环境污染，并最终增加气体排放，从而导致温室气体的释放。未收集的废物被广泛倾倒在街道和下水道中，导致洪水泛滥、昆虫滋生、啮齿动物媒介和疾病传播。因此，本文的目的是为约翰内斯堡市设计一个智能废物管理系统。约翰内斯堡市有垃圾市政工作人员，并为一些地区提供了垃圾资源，例如垃圾箱和用于收集垃圾的卡车。但问题是，仅有资源不足以解决城市的垃圾问题。垃圾处理城市使用传统的方式收集垃圾，例如到每条街道捡拾垃圾箱。传统的方式多年来一直有效，但随着人口的增加，产生了更多的垃圾，这给垃圾处理城市和广大公众带来了各种问题。所提出的系统由传感器、用户应用程序和实时监控系统组成。本文采用实验方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为约翰内斯堡设计一个智能垃圾管理系统，通过传感器、用户应用和实时监控系统优化垃圾收集流程。
AI.motivation: 约翰内斯堡因人口增长导致垃圾激增，传统收集方式效率低下，引发环境污染、疾病传播和温室气体排放等问题，亟需智能化解决方案。
AI.method: 采用实验方法，整合传感器监测垃圾箱容量、用户应用反馈垃圾点信息，并结合实时监控系统优化垃圾收集路线和资源分配。
AI.result: 系统可提升垃圾收集效率，减少资源浪费，降低环境污染风险，并为市政部门提供数据驱动的决策支持。
AI.conclusion: 智能垃圾管理系统能有效应对约翰内斯堡垃圾管理挑战，为其他发展中国家提供可借鉴的可持续城市治理模式。

authors_text: Zhiwen Yan,Chen Li,Gim Hee Lee
title: NeRF-DS: Neural Radiance Fields for Dynamic Specular Objects
title_zh: NeRF-DS：动态镜面物体的神经辐射场
abstract: Dynamic Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) is a powerful algorithm capable of rendering photo-realistic novel view images from a monocular RGB video of a dynamic scene. Although it warps moving points across frames from the observation spaces to a common canonical space for rendering, dynamic NeRF does not model the change of the reflected color during the warping. As a result, this approach often fails drastically on challenging specular objects in motion. We address this limitation by reformulating the neural radiance field function to be conditioned on surface position and orientation in the observation space. This allows the specular surface at different poses to keep the different reflected colors when mapped to the common canonical space. Additionally, we add the mask of moving objects to guide the deformation field. As the specular surface changes color during motion, the mask mitigates the problem of failure to find temporal correspondences with only RGB supervision. We evaluate our model based on the novel view synthesis quality with a self-collected dataset of different moving specular objects in realistic environments. The experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly improves the reconstruction quality of moving specular objects from monocular RGB videos compared to the existing NeRF models. Our code and data are available at the project website https://github.com/JokerYan/NeRF-DS.
summary: Dynamic Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) is a powerful algorithm capable of rendering photo-realistic novel view images from a monocular RGB video of a dynamic scene. Although it warps moving points across frames from the observation spaces to a common canonical space for rendering, dynamic NeRF does not model the change of the reflected color during the warping. As a result, this approach often fails drastically on challenging specular objects in motion. We address this limitation by reformulating the neural radiance field function to be conditioned on surface position and orientation in the observation space. This allows the specular surface at different poses to keep the different reflected colors when mapped to the common canonical space. Additionally, we add the mask of moving objects to guide the deformation field. As the specular surface changes color during motion, the mask mitigates the problem of failure to find temporal correspondences with only RGB supervision. We evaluate our model based on the novel view synthesis quality with a self-collected dataset of different moving specular objects in realistic environments. The experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly improves the reconstruction quality of moving specular objects from monocular RGB videos compared to the existing NeRF models. Our code and data are available at the project website https://github.com/JokerYan/NeRF-DS.
abstract_zh: 动态神经辐射场 (NeRF) 是一种强大的算法，能够从动态场景的单目 RGB 视频中渲染逼真的新颖视图图像。尽管动态 NeRF 将跨帧的移动点从观察空间扭曲到公共规范空间进行渲染，但动态 NeRF 不会对扭曲期间反射颜色的变化进行建模。因此，这种方法在挑战运动中的镜面物体时常常会彻底失败。我们通过重新制定神经辐射场函数来解决这一限制，该函数以观察空间中的表面位置和方向为条件。这允许不同姿势的镜面在映射到公共规范空间时保持不同的反射颜色。此外，我们添加了移动物体的遮罩来引导变形场。当镜面在运动过程中改变颜色时，遮罩缓解了仅通过 RGB 监督无法找到时间对应关系的问题。我们基于新颖的视图合成质量和现实环境中不同移动镜面物体的自收集数据集来评估我们的模型。实验结果表明，与现有的 NeRF 模型相比，我们的方法显着提高了单目 RGB 视频中移动镜面物体的重建质量。我们的代码和数据可在项目网站 https://github.com/JokerYan/NeRF-DS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeRF-DS方法，通过改进神经辐射场模型以更有效地处理动态场景中运动的镜面物体的新型视角合成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有动态NeRF方法在处理运动镜面物体时因未建模反射颜色变化导致重建失败，需解决镜面表面在运动过程中颜色变化带来的挑战。
AI.method: 将神经辐射场函数条件化为观测空间中的表面位置和方向，并引入运动物体掩码引导变形场，以保持镜面在不同姿态下的反射颜色差异。
AI.result: 在自建的真实环境数据集上实验表明，该方法显著优于现有NeRF模型，有效提升了动态镜面物体的重建质量。
AI.conclusion: 通过条件化建模和运动掩码设计，NeRF-DS成功解决了动态镜面物体的视角合成难题，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: NeRF-DS: Neural Radiance Fields for Dynamic Specular Objects NeRF-DS：动态镜面物体的神经辐射场 Dynamic Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) is a powerful algorithm capable of rendering photo-realistic novel view images from a monocular RGB video of a dynamic scene. Although it warps moving points across frames from the observation spaces to a common canonical space for rendering, dynamic NeRF does not model the change of the reflected color during the warping. As a result, this approach often fails drastically on challenging specular objects in motion. We address this limitation by reformulating the neural radiance field function to be conditioned on surface position and orientation in the observation space. This allows the specular surface at different poses to keep the different reflected colors when mapped to the common canonical space. Additionally, we add the mask of moving objects to guide the deformation field. As the specular surface changes color during motion, the mask mitigates the problem of failure to find temporal correspondences with only RGB supervision. We evaluate our model based on the novel view synthesis quality with a self-collected dataset of different moving specular objects in realistic environments. The experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly improves the reconstruction quality of moving specular objects from monocular RGB videos compared to the existing NeRF models. Our code and data are available at the project website https://github.com/JokerYan/NeRF-DS. 动态神经辐射场 (NeRF) 是一种强大的算法，能够从动态场景的单目 RGB 视频中渲染逼真的新颖视图图像。尽管动态 NeRF 将跨帧的移动点从观察空间扭曲到公共规范空间进行渲染，但动态 NeRF 不会对扭曲期间反射颜色的变化进行建模。因此，这种方法在挑战运动中的镜面物体时常常会彻底失败。我们通过重新制定神经辐射场函数来解决这一限制，该函数以观察空间中的表面位置和方向为条件。这允许不同姿势的镜面在映射到公共规范空间时保持不同的反射颜色。此外，我们添加了移动物体的遮罩来引导变形场。当镜面在运动过程中改变颜色时，遮罩缓解了仅通过 RGB 监督无法找到时间对应关系的问题。我们基于新颖的视图合成质量和现实环境中不同移动镜面物体的自收集数据集来评估我们的模型。实验结果表明，与现有的 NeRF 模型相比，我们的方法显着提高了单目 RGB 视频中移动镜面物体的重建质量。我们的代码和数据可在项目网站 https://github.com/JokerYan/NeRF-DS 获取。 本文提出NeRF-DS方法，通过改进神经辐射场模型以更有效地处理动态场景中运动的镜面物体的新型视角合成问题。 Zhiwen Yan,Chen Li,Gim Hee Lee cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Jihyo Kim,Jeonghyeon Kim,Sangheum Hwang
title: Deep Active Learning with Contrastive Learning Under Realistic Data Pool Assumptions
title_zh: 现实数据池假设下的深度主动学习与对比学习
comment: AAAI 2023 Workshop on Practical Deep Learning in the Wild
comments: AAAI 2023 Workshop on Practical Deep Learning in the Wild
abstract: Active learning aims to identify the most informative data from an unlabeled data pool that enables a model to reach the desired accuracy rapidly. This benefits especially deep neural networks which generally require a huge number of labeled samples to achieve high performance. Most existing active learning methods have been evaluated in an ideal setting where only samples relevant to the target task, i.e., in-distribution samples, exist in an unlabeled data pool. A data pool gathered from the wild, however, is likely to include samples that are irrelevant to the target task at all and/or too ambiguous to assign a single class label even for the oracle. We argue that assuming an unlabeled data pool consisting of samples from various distributions is more realistic. In this work, we introduce new active learning benchmarks that include ambiguous, task-irrelevant out-of-distribution as well as in-distribution samples. We also propose an active learning method designed to acquire informative in-distribution samples in priority. The proposed method leverages both labeled and unlabeled data pools and selects samples from clusters on the feature space constructed via contrastive learning. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method requires a lower annotation budget than existing active learning methods to reach the same level of accuracy.
summary: Active learning aims to identify the most informative data from an unlabeled data pool that enables a model to reach the desired accuracy rapidly. This benefits especially deep neural networks which generally require a huge number of labeled samples to achieve high performance. Most existing active learning methods have been evaluated in an ideal setting where only samples relevant to the target task, i.e., in-distribution samples, exist in an unlabeled data pool. A data pool gathered from the wild, however, is likely to include samples that are irrelevant to the target task at all and/or too ambiguous to assign a single class label even for the oracle. We argue that assuming an unlabeled data pool consisting of samples from various distributions is more realistic. In this work, we introduce new active learning benchmarks that include ambiguous, task-irrelevant out-of-distribution as well as in-distribution samples. We also propose an active learning method designed to acquire informative in-distribution samples in priority. The proposed method leverages both labeled and unlabeled data pools and selects samples from clusters on the feature space constructed via contrastive learning. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method requires a lower annotation budget than existing active learning methods to reach the same level of accuracy.
abstract_zh: 主动学习旨在从未标记的数据池中识别信息最丰富的数据，使模型能够快速达到所需的准确性。这尤其有利于深度神经网络，因为深度神经网络通常需要大量标记样本才能实现高性能。大多数现有的主动学习方法都在理想的环境中进行了评估，其中只有与目标任务相关的样本（即分布样本）存在于未标记的数据池中。然而，从野外收集的数据池可能包含与目标任务完全无关和/或过于模糊而无法为预言机分配单个类别标签的样本。我们认为，假设一个由各种分布的样本组成的未标记数据池更为现实。在这项工作中，我们引入了新的主动学习基准，其中包括模糊的、与任务无关的分布外和分布内样本。我们还提出了一种主动学习方法，旨在优先获取信息丰富的分布样本。所提出的方法利用标记和未标记的数据池，并从通过对比学习构建的特征空间上的簇中选择样本。实验结果表明，与现有的主动学习方法相比，所提出的方法需要更低的注释预算才能达到相同的准确度水平。

AI.tldr: 本文在现实数据池假设下（包含模糊和任务无关样本）提出改进的深度主动学习方法，通过对比学习优先选择信息量大的in-distribution样本。
AI.motivation: 现有主动学习方法假设数据池仅含任务相关样本，但实际数据常包含不相关或模糊样本，导致方法有效性受限，需更贴近现实的评估基准与算法设计。
AI.method: 提出结合对比学习的主动学习框架，利用特征空间聚类选择样本，并优先获取in-distribution样本，同时利用标记与未标记数据池提升效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在达到相同模型精度时所需标注样本数量显著少于现有主动学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过设计更现实的数据池基准与对比学习驱动的样本选择策略，论文验证了所提方法在降低标注成本方面的有效性。

search_text: Deep Active Learning with Contrastive Learning Under Realistic Data Pool Assumptions 现实数据池假设下的深度主动学习与对比学习 Active learning aims to identify the most informative data from an unlabeled data pool that enables a model to reach the desired accuracy rapidly. This benefits especially deep neural networks which generally require a huge number of labeled samples to achieve high performance. Most existing active learning methods have been evaluated in an ideal setting where only samples relevant to the target task, i.e., in-distribution samples, exist in an unlabeled data pool. A data pool gathered from the wild, however, is likely to include samples that are irrelevant to the target task at all and/or too ambiguous to assign a single class label even for the oracle. We argue that assuming an unlabeled data pool consisting of samples from various distributions is more realistic. In this work, we introduce new active learning benchmarks that include ambiguous, task-irrelevant out-of-distribution as well as in-distribution samples. We also propose an active learning method designed to acquire informative in-distribution samples in priority. The proposed method leverages both labeled and unlabeled data pools and selects samples from clusters on the feature space constructed via contrastive learning. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method requires a lower annotation budget than existing active learning methods to reach the same level of accuracy. 主动学习旨在从未标记的数据池中识别信息最丰富的数据，使模型能够快速达到所需的准确性。这尤其有利于深度神经网络，因为深度神经网络通常需要大量标记样本才能实现高性能。大多数现有的主动学习方法都在理想的环境中进行了评估，其中只有与目标任务相关的样本（即分布样本）存在于未标记的数据池中。然而，从野外收集的数据池可能包含与目标任务完全无关和/或过于模糊而无法为预言机分配单个类别标签的样本。我们认为，假设一个由各种分布的样本组成的未标记数据池更为现实。在这项工作中，我们引入了新的主动学习基准，其中包括模糊的、与任务无关的分布外和分布内样本。我们还提出了一种主动学习方法，旨在优先获取信息丰富的分布样本。所提出的方法利用标记和未标记的数据池，并从通过对比学习构建的特征空间上的簇中选择样本。实验结果表明，与现有的主动学习方法相比，所提出的方法需要更低的注释预算才能达到相同的准确度水平。 本文在现实数据池假设下（包含模糊和任务无关样本）提出改进的深度主动学习方法，通过对比学习优先选择信息量大的in-distribution样本。 Jihyo Kim,Jeonghyeon Kim,Sangheum Hwang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhouzheng Li,Hao Liu
title: Beta-VAE has 2 Behaviors: PCA or ICA?
title_zh: Beta-VAE 有 2 种行为：PCA 还是 ICA？
abstract: Beta-VAE is a very classical model for disentangled representation learning, the use of an expanding bottleneck that allow information into the decoder gradually is key to representation disentanglement as well as high-quality reconstruction. During recent experiments on such fascinating structure, we discovered that the total amount of latent variables can affect the representation learnt by the network: with very few latent variables, the network tend to learn the most important or principal variables, acting like a PCA; with very large numbers of latent variables, the variables tend to be more disentangled, and act like an ICA. Our assumption is that the competition between latent variables while trying to gain the most information bandwidth can lead to this phenomenon.
summary: Beta-VAE is a very classical model for disentangled representation learning, the use of an expanding bottleneck that allow information into the decoder gradually is key to representation disentanglement as well as high-quality reconstruction. During recent experiments on such fascinating structure, we discovered that the total amount of latent variables can affect the representation learnt by the network: with very few latent variables, the network tend to learn the most important or principal variables, acting like a PCA; with very large numbers of latent variables, the variables tend to be more disentangled, and act like an ICA. Our assumption is that the competition between latent variables while trying to gain the most information bandwidth can lead to this phenomenon.
abstract_zh: Beta-VAE 是一种非常经典的解缠结表示学习模型，使用允许信息逐渐进入解码器的扩展瓶颈是表示解缠和高质量重建的关键。在最近对这种令人着迷的结构进行的实验中，我们发现潜在变量的总量会影响网络学习的表示：在潜在变量很少的情况下，网络倾向于学习最重要或主要的变量，就像 PCA 一样；当潜在变量数量非常多时，变量往往会更加分散，并且表现得像 ICA。我们的假设是，试图获得最大信息带宽时潜在变量之间的竞争可能会导致这种现象。

AI.tldr: 本文研究Beta-VAE在潜在变量数量不同时的行为差异，发现其分别表现出类似PCA和ICA的特性。
AI.motivation: 作者旨在探索Beta-VAE在不同潜在变量数量下的表示学习行为，并解释其背后的机制。
AI.method: 通过实验分析不同数量的潜在变量对Beta-VAE表示学习的影响，观察其行为变化并进行对比分析。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，潜在变量较少时模型学习主要变量（类似PCA），较多时变量更解耦（类似ICA）。
AI.conclusion: 结论认为潜在变量争夺信息带宽的竞争导致了PCA与ICA行为的转换。

conclusion: 结论认为潜在变量争夺信息带宽的竞争导致了PCA与ICA行为的转换。
search_text: Beta-VAE has 2 Behaviors: PCA or ICA? Beta-VAE 有 2 种行为：PCA 还是 ICA？ Beta-VAE is a very classical model for disentangled representation learning, the use of an expanding bottleneck that allow information into the decoder gradually is key to representation disentanglement as well as high-quality reconstruction. During recent experiments on such fascinating structure, we discovered that the total amount of latent variables can affect the representation learnt by the network: with very few latent variables, the network tend to learn the most important or principal variables, acting like a PCA; with very large numbers of latent variables, the variables tend to be more disentangled, and act like an ICA. Our assumption is that the competition between latent variables while trying to gain the most information bandwidth can lead to this phenomenon. Beta-VAE 是一种非常经典的解缠结表示学习模型，使用允许信息逐渐进入解码器的扩展瓶颈是表示解缠和高质量重建的关键。在最近对这种令人着迷的结构进行的实验中，我们发现潜在变量的总量会影响网络学习的表示：在潜在变量很少的情况下，网络倾向于学习最重要或主要的变量，就像 PCA 一样；当潜在变量数量非常多时，变量往往会更加分散，并且表现得像 ICA。我们的假设是，试图获得最大信息带宽时潜在变量之间的竞争可能会导致这种现象。 本文研究Beta-VAE在潜在变量数量不同时的行为差异，发现其分别表现出类似PCA和ICA的特性。 Zhouzheng Li,Hao Liu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yaroslav Zharov,Evelina Ametova,Rebecca Spiecker,Tilo Baumbach,Genoveva Burca,Vincent Heuveline
title: Shot Noise Reduction in Radiographic and Tomographic Multi-Channel Imaging with Self-Supervised Deep Learning
title_zh: 通过自监督深度学习减少放射线和断层扫描多通道成像中的散粒噪声
comment: To be submitted to Optics Express
comments: To be submitted to Optics Express
abstract: Noise is an important issue for radiographic and tomographic imaging techniques. It becomes particularly critical in applications where additional constraints force a strong reduction of the Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) per image. These constraints may result from limitations on the maximum available flux or permissible dose and the associated restriction on exposure time. Often, a high SNR per image is traded for the ability to distribute a given total exposure capacity per pixel over multiple channels, thus obtaining additional information about the object by the same total exposure time. These can be energy channels in the case of spectroscopic imaging or time channels in the case of time-resolved imaging. In this paper, we report on a method for improving the quality of noisy multi-channel (time or energy-resolved) imaging datasets. The method relies on the recent Noise2Noise (N2N) self-supervised denoising approach that learns to predict a noise-free signal without access to noise-free data. N2N in turn requires drawing pairs of samples from a data distribution sharing identical signals while being exposed to different samples of random noise. The method is applicable if adjacent channels share enough information to provide images with similar enough information but independent noise. We demonstrate several representative case studies, namely spectroscopic (k-edge) X-ray tomography, in vivo X-ray cine-radiography, and energy-dispersive (Bragg edge) neutron tomography. In all cases, the N2N method shows dramatic improvement and outperforms conventional denoising methods. For such imaging techniques, the method can therefore significantly improve image quality, or maintain image quality with further reduced exposure time per image.

It becomes particularly critical in applications where additional constraints force a strong reduction of the Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) per image. These constraints may result from limitations on the maximum available flux or permissible dose and the associated restriction on exposure time. Often, a high SNR per image is traded for the ability to distribute a given total exposure capacity per pixel over multiple channels, thus obtaining additional information about the object by the same total exposure time. These can be energy channels in the case of spectroscopic imaging or time channels in the case of time-resolved imaging. In this paper, we report on a method for improving the quality of noisy multi-channel (time or energy-resolved) imaging datasets. The method relies on the recent Noise2Noise (N2N) self-supervised denoising approach that learns to predict a noise-free signal without access to noise-free data. N2N in turn requires drawing pairs of samples from a data distribution sharing identical signals while being exposed to different samples of random noise. The method is applicable if adjacent channels share enough information to provide images with similar enough information but independent noise. We demonstrate several representative case studies, namely spectroscopic (k-edge) X-ray tomography, in vivo X-ray cine-radiography, and energy-dispersive (Bragg edge) neutron tomography. In all cases, the N2N method shows dramatic improvement and outperforms conventional denoising methods. For such imaging techniques, the method can therefore significantly improve image quality, or maintain image quality with further reduced exposure time per image.
abstract_zh: 噪声是放射线照相和断层扫描成像技术的一个重要问题。在附加约束迫使每个图像的信噪比 (SNR) 大幅降低的应用中，它变得尤为重要。这些限制可能源于对最大可用通量或允许剂量的限制以及对暴露时间的相关限制。通常，每张图像的高信噪比可以换取在多个通道上分配每个像素给定总曝光容量的能力，从而通过相同的总曝光时间获得有关对象的附加信息。这些可以是光谱成像情况下的能量通道或时间分辨成像情况下的时间通道。在本文中，我们报告了一种提高噪声多通道（时间或能量分辨）成像数据集质量的方法。该方法依赖于最近的 Noise2Noise (N2N) 自监督去噪方法，该方法无需访问无噪声数据即可学习预测无噪声信号。 N2N 反过来需要从共享相同信号的数据分布中抽取样本对，同时暴露于不同的随机噪声样本。如果相邻通道共享足够的信息以提供具有足够相似信息但独立噪声的图像，则该方法适用。我们展示了几个具有代表性的案例研究，即光谱（k 边）X 射线断层扫描、体内 X 射线电影射线照相和能量色散（布拉格边）中子断层扫描。在所有情况下，N2N 方法都显示出显着的改进，并且优于传统的去噪方法。对于这样的成像技术，该方法因此可以显着提高图像质量，或者在进一步减少每幅图像的曝光时间的情况下保持图像质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督深度学习的多通道成像降噪方法，用于改善射线和断层扫描中的噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 在射线和断层成像中，信噪比（SNR）受限于剂量或曝光时间约束，传统降噪方法依赖干净数据且效果有限，需开发无需干净数据的新型降噪技术。
AI.method: 采用Noise2Noise（N2N）自监督方法，利用相邻通道间信息相似但噪声独立的特性，通过多通道噪声样本对训练模型预测无噪信号。
AI.result: 在谱学X射线断层扫描、活体X射线动态成像和中子断层扫描等案例中，N2N方法显著优于传统方法，有效提升图像质量或降低单帧曝光时间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低SNR条件下的多通道成像提供了高效降噪方案，可广泛应用于医学、材料科学等领域，提升成像质量并减少辐射剂量。

authors_text: Zhouhong Gu,Sihang Jiang,Wenhao Huang,Jiaqing Liang,Hongwei Feng,Yanghua Xiao
title: Sem4SAP: Synonymous Expression Mining From Open Knowledge Graph For Language Model Synonym-Aware Pretraining
title_zh: Sem4SAP：从开放知识图谱中挖掘同义表达式，用于语言模型同义词感知预训练
abstract: The model's ability to understand synonymous expression is crucial in many kinds of downstream tasks. It will make the model to better understand the similarity between context, and more robust to the synonym substitution attack. However, many Pretrained Language Model (PLM) lack synonym knowledge due to limitation of small-scale synsets and PLM's pretraining objectives. In this paper, we propose a framework called Sem4SAP to mine synsets from Open Knowledge Graph (Open-KG) and using the mined synsets to do synonym-aware pretraining for language models. We propose to coarsly filter the content in Open-KG and use the frequency information to better help the clustering process under low-resource unsupervised conditions. We expand the mined synsets by migrating core semantics between synonymous expressions.We also propose two novel and effective synonym-aware pre-training methods for injecting synonym knowledge into PLMs.Extensive experiments demonstrate that Sem4SAP can dramatically outperform the original PLMs and other baselines on ten different tasks.
summary: The model's ability to understand synonymous expression is crucial in many kinds of downstream tasks. It will make the model to better understand the similarity between context, and more robust to the synonym substitution attack. However, many Pretrained Language Model (PLM) lack synonym knowledge due to limitation of small-scale synsets and PLM's pretraining objectives. In this paper, we propose a framework called Sem4SAP to mine synsets from Open Knowledge Graph (Open-KG) and using the mined synsets to do synonym-aware pretraining for language models. We propose to coarsly filter the content in Open-KG and use the frequency information to better help the clustering process under low-resource unsupervised conditions. We expand the mined synsets by migrating core semantics between synonymous expressions.We also propose two novel and effective synonym-aware pre-training methods for injecting synonym knowledge into PLMs.Extensive experiments demonstrate that Sem4SAP can dramatically outperform the original PLMs and other baselines on ten different tasks.
abstract_zh: 该模型理解同义表达的能力在多种下游任务中至关重要。这将使模型更好地理解上下文之间的相似性，并且对同义词替换攻击更加鲁棒。然而，由于小规模同义词集和 PLM 预训练目标的限制，许多预训练语言模型 (PLM) 缺乏同义词知识。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 Sem4SAP 的框架，用于从开放知识图谱（Open-KG）中挖掘同义词集，并使用挖掘的同义词集对语言模型进行同义词感知预训练。我们建议对Open-KG中的内容进行粗略过滤，并使用频率信息更好地帮助低资源无监督条件下的聚类过程。我们通过在同义表达式之间迁移核心语义来扩展挖掘的同义词集。我们还提出了两种新颖且有效的同义词感知预训练方法，用于将同义词知识注入到 PLM 中。大量实验表明，Sem4SAP 在 10 种不同任务上可以显着优于原始 PLM 和其他基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sem4SAP框架，通过从开放知识图谱中挖掘同义词集并用于语言模型的同义词感知预训练，以提升模型对同义表达的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练语言模型（PLM）因同义词集规模有限及预训练目标限制，缺乏足够的同义知识，导致在处理同义替换攻击和上下文相似性任务时表现不足。
AI.method: 通过粗粒度过滤开放知识图谱内容并结合频率信息优化聚类过程，在低资源无监督条件下扩展同义词集，迁移核心语义，并设计两种新型同义词感知预训练方法注入同义知识。
AI.result: 在十种不同任务中，Sem4SAP显著优于原始PLM及其他基线模型，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: Sem4SAP通过利用开放知识图谱挖掘同义词集并进行针对性预训练，有效提升了语言模型的同义表达理解能力与任务表现。

We expand the mined synsets by migrating core semantics between synonymous expressions.We also propose two novel and effective synonym-aware pre-training methods for injecting synonym knowledge into PLMs.Extensive experiments demonstrate that Sem4SAP can dramatically outperform the original PLMs and other baselines on ten different tasks. 该模型理解同义表达的能力在多种下游任务中至关重要。这将使模型更好地理解上下文之间的相似性，并且对同义词替换攻击更加鲁棒。然而，由于小规模同义词集和 PLM 预训练目标的限制，许多预训练语言模型 (PLM) 缺乏同义词知识。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 Sem4SAP 的框架，用于从开放知识图谱（Open-KG）中挖掘同义词集，并使用挖掘的同义词集对语言模型进行同义词感知预训练。我们建议对Open-KG中的内容进行粗略过滤，并使用频率信息更好地帮助低资源无监督条件下的聚类过程。我们通过在同义表达式之间迁移核心语义来扩展挖掘的同义词集。我们还提出了两种新颖且有效的同义词感知预训练方法，用于将同义词知识注入到 PLM 中。大量实验表明，Sem4SAP 在 10 种不同任务上可以显着优于原始 PLM 和其他基线。 本文提出Sem4SAP框架，通过从开放知识图谱中挖掘同义词集并用于语言模型的同义词感知预训练，以提升模型对同义表达的理解能力。 Zhouhong Gu,Sihang Jiang,Wenhao Huang,Jiaqing Liang,Hongwei Feng,Yanghua Xiao cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Giuseppe Lancia,Marcello Dalpasso
title: Orbits, schemes and dynamic programming procedures for the TSP 4-OPT neighborhood
title_zh: TSP 4-OPT 邻域的轨道、方案和动态规划程序
abstract: We discuss the way to group all 25 possible 4-OPT moves into 7 orbits of equivalent moves. We then describe two implementations, one for a $Θ(n^3)$ algorithm by de Berg's et al. and one of a $Θ(n^2)$ algorithm by Glover, for finding the best 4-OPT move via dynamic programming.
summary: We discuss the way to group all 25 possible 4-OPT moves into 7 orbits of equivalent moves. We then describe two implementations, one for a $Θ(n^3)$ algorithm by de Berg's et al. and one of a $Θ(n^2)$ algorithm by Glover, for finding the best 4-OPT move via dynamic programming.
abstract_zh: 我们讨论将所有 25 种可能的 4-OPT 动作分组为 7 个等效动作轨道的方法。然后，我们描述两种实现，一种是 de Berg 等人的 $θ(n^3)$ 算法。以及 Glover 的 $θ(n^2)$ 算法之一，用于通过动态编程找到最佳 4-OPT 移动。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何将25种4-OPT移动分为7个等价轨道，并描述两种动态规划算法以高效寻找最佳4-OPT移动。
AI.motivation: 旅行商问题（TSP）的4-OPT邻域搜索需处理大量移动，直接枚举效率低下，需优化方法以提升计算性能。
AI.method: 通过群论将4-OPT移动分组为等价轨道，并实现两种动态规划算法：de Berg等人提出的Θ(n³)算法与Glover的Θ(n²)算法。
AI.result: 成功将25种移动归类为7个轨道，并验证两种算法在不同时间复杂度下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过轨道分组和动态规划优化，显著提升了TSP问题中4-OPT邻域搜索的效率。
