tldr: 本文提出了一种轻量化的视觉与点云联合Transformer模型ViPFormer，用于无监督点云理解任务。
motivation: 现有无监督点云方法（如CrossPoint）存在架构不平衡问题，图像分支体积是点云分支的8.3倍，导致复杂度高且效率低。
method: 设计统一架构的ViPFormer，通过优化模内和跨模对比目标实现无监督学习，并将预训练模型迁移到3D分类和分割等下游任务。
result: 在多个数据集上优于现有无监督方法，准确率更高且模型复杂度和运行时延更低，组件有效性经消融实验验证。
conclusion: ViPFormer通过平衡架构设计有效提升了点云理解的效率和性能，为无监督点云处理提供了新思路。
search_text: ViPFormer: Efficient Vision-and-Pointcloud Transformer for Unsupervised Pointcloud Understanding ViPFarmer：用于无监督点云理解的高效视觉和点云转换器 Recently, a growing number of work design unsupervised paradigms for point cloud processing to alleviate the limitation of expensive manual annotation and poor transferability of supervised methods. Among them, CrossPoint follows the contrastive learning framework and exploits image and point cloud data for unsupervised point cloud understanding. Although the promising performance is presented, the unbalanced architecture makes it unnecessarily complex and inefficient. For example, the image branch in CrossPoint is $\sim$8.3x heavier than the point cloud branch leading to higher complexity and latency. To address this problem, in this paper, we propose a lightweight Vision-and-Pointcloud Transformer (ViPFormer) to unify image and point cloud processing in a single architecture. ViPFormer learns in an unsupervised manner by optimizing intra-modal and cross-modal contrastive objectives. Then the pretrained model is transferred to various downstream tasks, including 3D shape classification and semantic segmentation. Experiments on different datasets show ViPFormer surpasses previous state-of-the-art unsupervised methods with higher accuracy, lower model complexity and runtime latency. Finally, the effectiveness of each component in ViPFormer is validated by extensive ablation studies. The implementation of the proposed method is available at https://github.com/auniquesun/ViPFormer. 最近，越来越多的工作设计了点云处理的无监督范例，以减轻昂贵的手动注释和监督方法可移植性差的限制。其中，CrossPoint遵循对比学习框架，利用图像和点云数据进行无监督点云理解。尽管性能表现出色，但不平衡的架构使其变得不必要的复杂和低效。例如，CrossPoint 中的图像分支比点云分支重 $\sim$8.3 倍，导致更高的复杂性和延迟。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种轻量级的视觉和点云转换器（ViPFormer），以将图像和点云处理统一在单一架构中。 ViPFormer 通过优化模内和跨模态对比目标以无监督的方式学习。然后将预训练的模型转移到各种下游任务，包括 3D 形状分类和语义分割。在不同数据集上的实验表明，ViPFormer 超越了以前最先进的无监督方法，具有更高的准确性、更低的模型复杂性和运行时延迟。最后，ViPFormer 中每个组件的有效性均通过广泛的消融研究得到验证。所提出方法的实现可在 https://github.com/auniquesun/ViPFormer 上找到。 本文提出了一种轻量化的视觉与点云联合Transformer模型ViPFormer，用于无监督点云理解任务。 Hongyu Sun,Yongcai Wang,Xudong Cai,Xuewei Bai,Deying Li cs.CV

authors_text: Hao Jiang,Rushan Zhang,Yanning Zhou,Yumeng Wang,Hao Chen
title: DoNet: Deep De-overlapping Network for Cytology Instance Segmentation
title_zh: DoNet：用于细胞学实例分割的深度去重叠网络
abstract: Cell instance segmentation in cytology images has significant importance for biology analysis and cancer screening, while remains challenging due to 1) the extensive overlapping translucent cell clusters that cause the ambiguous boundaries, and 2) the confusion of mimics and debris as nuclei. In this work, we proposed a De-overlapping Network (DoNet) in a decompose-and-recombined strategy. A Dual-path Region Segmentation Module (DRM) explicitly decomposes the cell clusters into intersection and complement regions, followed by a Semantic Consistency-guided Recombination Module (CRM) for integration. To further introduce the containment relationship of the nucleus in the cytoplasm, we design a Mask-guided Region Proposal Strategy (MRP) that integrates the cell attention maps for inner-cell instance prediction. We validate the proposed approach on ISBI2014 and CPS datasets. Experiments show that our proposed DoNet significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art (SOTA) cell instance segmentation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/DeepDoNet/DoNet.
summary: Cell instance segmentation in cytology images has significant importance for biology analysis and cancer screening, while remains challenging due to 1) the extensive overlapping translucent cell clusters that cause the ambiguous boundaries, and 2) the confusion of mimics and debris as nuclei. In this work, we proposed a De-overlapping Network (DoNet) in a decompose-and-recombined strategy. A Dual-path Region Segmentation Module (DRM) explicitly decomposes the cell clusters into intersection and complement regions, followed by a Semantic Consistency-guided Recombination Module (CRM) for integration. To further introduce the containment relationship of the nucleus in the cytoplasm, we design a Mask-guided Region Proposal Strategy (MRP) that integrates the cell attention maps for inner-cell instance prediction. We validate the proposed approach on ISBI2014 and CPS datasets. Experiments show that our proposed DoNet significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art (SOTA) cell instance segmentation methods. The code is available at https://github.com/DeepDoNet/DoNet.
abstract_zh: 细胞学图像中的细胞实例分割对于生物学分析和癌症筛查具有重要意义，但仍然具有挑战性，因为 1) 大量重叠的半透明细胞簇导致边界模糊，2) 模拟物和碎片作为细胞核的混淆。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种采用分解和重组策略的去重叠网络（DoNet）。双路径区域分割模块 (DRM) 将细胞簇显式分解为交叉区域和互补区域，然后通过语义一致性引导重组模块 (CRM) 进行集成。为了进一步介绍细胞核在细胞质中的包含关系，我们设计了一种掩模引导的区域提议策略（MRP），该策略集成了细胞注意力图以进行细胞内实例预测。我们在 ISBI2014 和 CPS 数据集上验证了所提出的方法。实验表明，我们提出的 DoNet 显着优于其他最先进的（SOTA）单元实例分割方法。该代码可在 https://github.com/DeepDoNet/DoNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DoNet，一种用于细胞学图像中细胞实例分割的深度去重叠网络，旨在解决细胞重叠和核质混淆的挑战。
AI.motivation: 细胞实例分割在生物分析和癌症筛查中至关重要，但因细胞簇重叠导致边界模糊以及核质混淆等问题，现有方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 采用分解-重组策略，设计双路径区域分割模块（DRM）分解细胞簇为交集与补集区域，并通过语义一致性引导的重组模块（CRM）整合；引入掩码引导的区域建议策略（MRP）以捕捉核质包含关系。
AI.result: 在ISBI2014和CPS数据集上验证，DoNet显著优于现有最先进的细胞实例分割方法。
AI.conclusion: DoNet通过分解-重组策略和核质关系建模，有效解决了细胞分割中的重叠与混淆问题，为细胞学图像分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hao Xu,Tengfei Xue,Dongnan Liu,Fan Zhang,Carl-Fredrik Westin,Ron Kikinis,Lauren J. O'Donnell,Weidong Cai
title: A Registration- and Uncertainty-based Framework for White Matter Tract Segmentation With Only One Annotated Subject
title_zh: 一种基于配准和不确定性的白质束分割框架，仅具有一个注释主题
comment: Accepted by The IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2023
comments: Accepted by The IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI) 2023
abstract: White matter (WM) tract segmentation based on diffusion magnetic resonance imaging (dMRI) plays an important role in the analysis of human health and brain diseases. However, the annotation of WM tracts is time-consuming and needs experienced neuroanatomists. In this study, to explore tract segmentation in the challenging setting of minimal annotations, we propose a novel framework utilizing only one annotated subject (subject-level one-shot) for tract segmentation. Our method is constructed by proposed registration-based peak augmentation (RPA) and uncertainty-based refining (URe) modules. RPA module synthesizes pseudo subjects and their corresponding labels to improve the tract segmentation performance. The proposed URe module alleviates the negative influence of the low-confidence voxels on pseudo subjects. Experimental results show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods by a large margin, and our proposed modules are effective. Overall, our method achieves accurate whole-brain tract segmentation with only one annotated subject. Our code is available at https://github.com/HaoXu0507/ISBI2023-One-Shot-WM-Tract-Segmentation.
summary: White matter (WM) tract segmentation based on diffusion magnetic resonance imaging (dMRI) plays an important role in the analysis of human health and brain diseases. However, the annotation of WM tracts is time-consuming and needs experienced neuroanatomists. In this study, to explore tract segmentation in the challenging setting of minimal annotations, we propose a novel framework utilizing only one annotated subject (subject-level one-shot) for tract segmentation. Our method is constructed by proposed registration-based peak augmentation (RPA) and uncertainty-based refining (URe) modules. RPA module synthesizes pseudo subjects and their corresponding labels to improve the tract segmentation performance. The proposed URe module alleviates the negative influence of the low-confidence voxels on pseudo subjects. Experimental results show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods by a large margin, and our proposed modules are effective. Overall, our method achieves accurate whole-brain tract segmentation with only one annotated subject. Our code is available at https://github.com/HaoXu0507/ISBI2023-One-Shot-WM-Tract-Segmentation.
abstract_zh: 基于扩散磁共振成像（dMRI）的白质（WM）束分割在人类健康和脑部疾病的分析中发挥着重要作用。然而，WM 束的注释非常耗时，并且需要经验丰富的神经解剖学家。在本研究中，为了在最小注释的挑战性环境中探索束分割，我们提出了一种仅利用一个带注释的主题（主题级一次性）进行束分割的新颖框架。我们的方法是由提出的基于配准的峰值增强（RPA）和基于不确定性的精炼（URe）模块构建的。 RPA模块合成伪主题及其相应标签以提高区域分割性能。所提出的 URe 模块减轻了低置信度体素对伪主体的负面影响。实验结果表明，我们的方法大大优于其他最先进的方法，并且我们提出的模块是有效的。总体而言，我们的方法仅用一个带注释的主题即可实现准确的全脑束分割。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/HaoXu0507/ISBI2023-One-Shot-WM-Tract-Segmentation。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注册和不确定性的框架，仅使用一个标注主体进行白质束分割。
AI.motivation: 白质束分割在分析人类健康和脑疾病中起着重要作用，但标注过程耗时且需要经验丰富的神经解剖学家。因此，探索在最少标注情况下进行白质束分割的方法具有重要意义。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的框架，包含基于注册的峰值增强（RPA）模块和基于不确定性的细化（URe）模块。RPA模块通过合成伪主体及其对应标签来提高白质束分割性能，URe模块通过减少低置信度体素对伪主体的负面影响来优化分割结果。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在性能上显著优于其他最先进的方法，且提出的模块有效。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法仅使用一个标注主体即可实现准确的全脑白质束分割，具有重要的实际应用价值。

Experimental results show that our method outperforms other state-of-the-art methods by a large margin, and our proposed modules are effective. Overall, our method achieves accurate whole-brain tract segmentation with only one annotated subject. Our code is available at https://github.com/HaoXu0507/ISBI2023-One-Shot-WM-Tract-Segmentation. 基于扩散磁共振成像（dMRI）的白质（WM）束分割在人类健康和脑部疾病的分析中发挥着重要作用。然而，WM 束的注释非常耗时，并且需要经验丰富的神经解剖学家。在本研究中，为了在最小注释的挑战性环境中探索束分割，我们提出了一种仅利用一个带注释的主题（主题级一次性）进行束分割的新颖框架。我们的方法是由提出的基于配准的峰值增强（RPA）和基于不确定性的精炼（URe）模块构建的。 RPA模块合成伪主题及其相应标签以提高区域分割性能。所提出的 URe 模块减轻了低置信度体素对伪主体的负面影响。实验结果表明，我们的方法大大优于其他最先进的方法，并且我们提出的模块是有效的。总体而言，我们的方法仅用一个带注释的主题即可实现准确的全脑束分割。我们的代码位于 https://github.com/HaoXu0507/ISBI2023-One-Shot-WM-Tract-Segmentation。 本文提出了一种基于注册和不确定性的框架，仅使用一个标注主体进行白质束分割。 Hao Xu,Tengfei Xue,Dongnan Liu,Fan Zhang,Carl-Fredrik Westin,Ron Kikinis,Lauren J. O'Donnell,Weidong Cai eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Peng Jin,Jinfa Huang,Pengfei Xiong,Shangxuan Tian,Chang Liu,Xiangyang Ji,Li Yuan,Jie Chen
title: Video-Text as Game Players: Hierarchical Banzhaf Interaction for Cross-Modal Representation Learning
title_zh: 视频-文本作为游戏玩家：跨模态表示学习的分层 Banzhaf 交互
abstract: Contrastive learning-based video-language representation learning approaches, e.g., CLIP, have achieved outstanding performance, which pursue semantic interaction upon pre-defined video-text pairs. To clarify this coarse-grained global interaction and move a step further, we have to encounter challenging shell-breaking interactions for fine-grained cross-modal learning. In this paper, we creatively model video-text as game players with multivariate cooperative game theory to wisely handle the uncertainty during fine-grained semantic interaction with diverse granularity, flexible combination, and vague intensity. Concretely, we propose Hierarchical Banzhaf Interaction (HBI) to value possible correspondence between video frames and text words for sensitive and explainable cross-modal contrast. To efficiently realize the cooperative game of multiple video frames and multiple text words, the proposed method clusters the original video frames (text words) and computes the Banzhaf Interaction between the merged tokens. By stacking token merge modules, we achieve cooperative games at different semantic levels. Extensive experiments on commonly used text-video retrieval and video-question answering benchmarks with superior performances justify the efficacy of our HBI. More encouragingly, it can also serve as a visualization tool to promote the understanding of cross-modal interaction, which have a far-reaching impact on the community. Project page is available at https://jpthu17.github.io/HBI/.
summary: Contrastive learning-based video-language representation learning approaches, e.g., CLIP, have achieved outstanding performance, which pursue semantic interaction upon pre-defined video-text pairs. To clarify this coarse-grained global interaction and move a step further, we have to encounter challenging shell-breaking interactions for fine-grained cross-modal learning. In this paper, we creatively model video-text as game players with multivariate cooperative game theory to wisely handle the uncertainty during fine-grained semantic interaction with diverse granularity, flexible combination, and vague intensity. Concretely, we propose Hierarchical Banzhaf Interaction (HBI) to value possible correspondence between video frames and text words for sensitive and explainable cross-modal contrast. To efficiently realize the cooperative game of multiple video frames and multiple text words, the proposed method clusters the original video frames (text words) and computes the Banzhaf Interaction between the merged tokens. By stacking token merge modules, we achieve cooperative games at different semantic levels. Extensive experiments on commonly used text-video retrieval and video-question answering benchmarks with superior performances justify the efficacy of our HBI. More encouragingly, it can also serve as a visualization tool to promote the understanding of cross-modal interaction, which have a far-reaching impact on the community. Project page is available at https://jpthu17.github.io/HBI/.
abstract_zh: 基于对比学习的视频语言表示学习方法（例如 CLIP）已经取得了出色的性能，它追求预定义视频文本对上的语义交互。为了阐明这种粗粒度的全局交互并更进一步，我们必须在细粒度的跨模态学习中遇到具有挑战性的破壳交互。在本文中，我们创造性地利用多元合作博弈理论将视频文本建模为游戏玩家，以明智地处理粒度多样、组合灵活、强度模糊的细粒度语义交互过程中的不确定性。具体来说，我们提出分层 Banzhaf 交互（HBI）来评估视频帧和文本单词之间可能的对应关系，以实现敏感且可解释的跨模式对比。为了有效地实现多个视频帧和多个文本单词的合作游戏，该方法对原始视频帧（文本单词）进行聚类并计算合并标记之间的 Banzhaf 交互。通过堆叠令牌合并模块，我们实现了不同语义级别的合作游戏。对常用文本视频检索和视频问答基准进行的大量实验证明了我们 HBI 的有效性。更令人鼓舞的是，它还可以作为可视化工具来促进对跨模态交互的理解，这对社区产生了深远的影响。项目页面位于 https://jpthu17.github.io/HBI/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层巴赞互动的跨模态表示学习方法，通过将视频-文本对建模为博弈参与者，解决细粒度语义交互中的不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法（如CLIP）仅关注预定义的全局视频-文本交互，难以处理细粒度跨模态学习中多粒度、灵活组合和模糊强度的语义交互挑战。
AI.method: 提出分层巴赞互动（HBI）框架，利用合作博弈论建模视频帧与文本词的对应关系，通过聚类原始视频帧/文本词并计算合并token间的巴赞互动值，结合多级token合并模块实现不同语义层次的博弈。
AI.result: 在文本-视频检索和视频问答基准测试中取得优越性能，同时可作为可视化工具提升跨模态交互理解，对学术界具有深远影响。
AI.conclusion: HBI通过博弈论创新性解决了细粒度跨模态学习难题，为可解释的视频-文本表示学习提供了新范式。

authors_text: Vinoj Jayasundara,Amit Agrawal,Nicolas Heron,Abhinav Shrivastava,Larry S. Davis
title: FlexNeRF: Photorealistic Free-viewpoint Rendering of Moving Humans from Sparse Views
title_zh: FlexNeRF：从稀疏视图对移动人物进行逼真的自由视点渲染
abstract: We present FlexNeRF, a method for photorealistic freeviewpoint rendering of humans in motion from monocular videos. Our approach works well with sparse views, which is a challenging scenario when the subject is exhibiting fast/complex motions. We propose a novel approach which jointly optimizes a canonical time and pose configuration, with a pose-dependent motion field and pose-independent temporal deformations complementing each other. Thanks to our novel temporal and cyclic consistency constraints along with additional losses on intermediate representation such as segmentation, our approach provides high quality outputs as the observed views become sparser. We empirically demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art on public benchmark datasets as well as a self-captured fashion dataset. The project page is available at: https://flex-nerf.github.io/
summary: We present FlexNeRF, a method for photorealistic freeviewpoint rendering of humans in motion from monocular videos. Our approach works well with sparse views, which is a challenging scenario when the subject is exhibiting fast/complex motions. We propose a novel approach which jointly optimizes a canonical time and pose configuration, with a pose-dependent motion field and pose-independent temporal deformations complementing each other. Thanks to our novel temporal and cyclic consistency constraints along with additional losses on intermediate representation such as segmentation, our approach provides high quality outputs as the observed views become sparser. We empirically demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art on public benchmark datasets as well as a self-captured fashion dataset. The project page is available at: https://flex-nerf.github.io/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 FlexNeRF，一种通过单目视频对运动中的人体进行逼真的自由视点渲染的方法。我们的方法适用于稀疏视图，当对象表现出快速/复杂的运动时，这是一个具有挑战性的场景。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，联合优化规范时间和姿势配置，使姿势相关的运动场和姿势无关的时间变形相互补充。由于我们新颖的时间和循环一致性约束以及中间表示（例如分割）的额外损失，随着观察到的视图变得稀疏，我们的方法提供了高质量的输出。我们凭经验证明，我们的方法在公共基准数据集以及自我捕获的时尚数​​据集上显着优于最先进的方法。项目页面位于：https://flex-nerf.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlexNeRF方法，通过单目视频实现对运动人体的高质量自由视角渲染，尤其适用于稀疏视角场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在稀疏视角下难以处理快速/复杂的人体运动，且难以保持渲染质量与细节一致性。
AI.method: 联合优化人体的规范时间与姿态配置，结合姿态依赖的运动场与姿态无关的时间形变场，并引入时序与循环一致性约束及分割等中间表示损失。
AI.result: 在公开基准数据集和自建时尚数据集上显著优于现有最先进方法，稀疏视角下仍能保持高质量输出。
AI.conclusion: FlexNeRF通过创新的时间-姿态联合优化与多约束机制，有效解决了稀疏视角下运动人体高质量渲染的挑战。

authors_text: Dillon Chen,Felipe Trevizan,Sylvie Thiébaux
title: Heuristic Search for Multi-Objective Probabilistic Planning
title_zh: 多目标概率规划的启发式搜索
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, accepted to AAAI23
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, accepted to AAAI23
abstract: Heuristic search is a powerful approach that has successfully been applied to a broad class of planning problems, including classical planning, multi-objective planning, and probabilistic planning modelled as a stochastic shortest path (SSP) problem. Here, we extend the reach of heuristic search to a more expressive class of problems, namely multi-objective stochastic shortest paths (MOSSPs), which require computing a coverage set of non-dominated policies. We design new heuristic search algorithms MOLAO* and MOLRTDP, which extend well-known SSP algorithms to the multi-objective case. We further construct a spectrum of domain-independent heuristic functions differing in their ability to take into account the stochastic and multi-objective features of the problem to guide the search. Our experiments demonstrate the benefits of these algorithms and the relative merits of the heuristics.
summary: Heuristic search is a powerful approach that has successfully been applied to a broad class of planning problems, including classical planning, multi-objective planning, and probabilistic planning modelled as a stochastic shortest path (SSP) problem. Here, we extend the reach of heuristic search to a more expressive class of problems, namely multi-objective stochastic shortest paths (MOSSPs), which require computing a coverage set of non-dominated policies. We design new heuristic search algorithms MOLAO* and MOLRTDP, which extend well-known SSP algorithms to the multi-objective case. We further construct a spectrum of domain-independent heuristic functions differing in their ability to take into account the stochastic and multi-objective features of the problem to guide the search. Our experiments demonstrate the benefits of these algorithms and the relative merits of the heuristics.
abstract_zh: 启发式搜索是一种强大的方法，已成功应用于广泛的规划问题，包括经典规划、多目标规划和建模为随机最短路径 (SSP) 问题的概率规划。在这里，我们将启发式搜索的范围扩展到更具表现力的一类问题，即多目标随机最短路径（MOSSP），它需要计算一组非支配策略的覆盖范围。我们设计了新的启发式搜索算法 MOLAO* 和 MOLRTDP，将著名的 SSP 算法扩展到多目标情况。我们进一步构建了一系列与领域无关的启发式函数，它们考虑问题的随机和多目标特征来指导搜索的能力不同。我们的实验证明了这些算法的好处以及启发式的相对优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种启发式搜索算法MOLAO*和MOLRTDP，用于解决多目标概率规划问题（MOSSP），并设计了多种启发式函数以提升搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理多目标与概率不确定性共存的规划问题，需扩展启发式搜索以应对更复杂的MOSSP场景。
AI.method: 扩展经典SSP算法至多目标场景，设计MOLAO*和MOLRTDP算法，并构建考虑随机性和多目标特性的启发式函数族。
AI.result: 实验验证了新算法在MOSSP问题上的有效性，不同启发式函数在搜索效率和解质量上表现出差异化优势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法和启发式函数为多目标概率规划提供了高效求解框架，未来可进一步优化启发式策略的适应性。

search_text: Heuristic Search for Multi-Objective Probabilistic Planning 多目标概率规划的启发式搜索 Heuristic search is a powerful approach that has successfully been applied to a broad class of planning problems, including classical planning, multi-objective planning, and probabilistic planning modelled as a stochastic shortest path (SSP) problem. Here, we extend the reach of heuristic search to a more expressive class of problems, namely multi-objective stochastic shortest paths (MOSSPs), which require computing a coverage set of non-dominated policies. We design new heuristic search algorithms MOLAO* and MOLRTDP, which extend well-known SSP algorithms to the multi-objective case. We further construct a spectrum of domain-independent heuristic functions differing in their ability to take into account the stochastic and multi-objective features of the problem to guide the search. Our experiments demonstrate the benefits of these algorithms and the relative merits of the heuristics. 启发式搜索是一种强大的方法，已成功应用于广泛的规划问题，包括经典规划、多目标规划和建模为随机最短路径 (SSP) 问题的概率规划。在这里，我们将启发式搜索的范围扩展到更具表现力的一类问题，即多目标随机最短路径（MOSSP），它需要计算一组非支配策略的覆盖范围。我们设计了新的启发式搜索算法 MOLAO* 和 MOLRTDP，将著名的 SSP 算法扩展到多目标情况。我们进一步构建了一系列与领域无关的启发式函数，它们考虑问题的随机和多目标特征来指导搜索的能力不同。我们的实验证明了这些算法的好处以及启发式的相对优点。 本文提出两种启发式搜索算法MOLAO*和MOLRTDP，用于解决多目标概率规划问题（MOSSP），并设计了多种启发式函数以提升搜索效率。 Dillon Chen,Felipe Trevizan,Sylvie Thiébaux cs.AI

authors_text: Shao-Yuan Lo,Poojan Oza,Sumanth Chennupati,Alejandro Galindo,Vishal M. Patel
title: Spatio-Temporal Pixel-Level Contrastive Learning-based Source-Free Domain Adaptation for Video Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 基于时空像素级对比学习的视频语义分割无源域适应
comment: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023
comments: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2023
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) of semantic segmentation transfers labeled source knowledge to an unlabeled target domain by relying on accessing both the source and target data. However, the access to source data is often restricted or infeasible in real-world scenarios. Under the source data restrictive circumstances, UDA is less practical. To address this, recent works have explored solutions under the Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) setup, which aims to adapt a source-trained model to the target domain without accessing source data. Still, existing SFDA approaches use only image-level information for adaptation, making them sub-optimal in video applications. This paper studies SFDA for Video Semantic Segmentation (VSS), where temporal information is leveraged to address video adaptation. Specifically, we propose Spatio-Temporal Pixel-Level (STPL) contrastive learning, a novel method that takes full advantage of spatio-temporal information to tackle the absence of source data better. STPL explicitly learns semantic correlations among pixels in the spatio-temporal space, providing strong self-supervision for adaptation to the unlabeled target domain. Extensive experiments show that STPL achieves state-of-the-art performance on VSS benchmarks compared to current UDA and SFDA approaches. Code is available at: https://github.com/shaoyuanlo/STPL
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) of semantic segmentation transfers labeled source knowledge to an unlabeled target domain by relying on accessing both the source and target data. However, the access to source data is often restricted or infeasible in real-world scenarios. Under the source data restrictive circumstances, UDA is less practical. To address this, recent works have explored solutions under the Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) setup, which aims to adapt a source-trained model to the target domain without accessing source data. Still, existing SFDA approaches use only image-level information for adaptation, making them sub-optimal in video applications. This paper studies SFDA for Video Semantic Segmentation (VSS), where temporal information is leveraged to address video adaptation. Specifically, we propose Spatio-Temporal Pixel-Level (STPL) contrastive learning, a novel method that takes full advantage of spatio-temporal information to tackle the absence of source data better. STPL explicitly learns semantic correlations among pixels in the spatio-temporal space, providing strong self-supervision for adaptation to the unlabeled target domain. Extensive experiments show that STPL achieves state-of-the-art performance on VSS benchmarks compared to current UDA and SFDA approaches. Code is available at: https://github.com/shaoyuanlo/STPL
abstract_zh: 语义分割的无监督域适应（UDA）通过访问源数据和目标数据将标记的源知识转移到未标记的目标域。然而，在现实场景中，对源数据的访问通常受到限制或不可行。在源数据受限的情况下，UDA的实用性较差。为了解决这个问题，最近的工作探索了无源域适应（SFDA）设置下的解决方案，其目的是在不访问源数据的情况下将源训练模型适应目标域。尽管如此，现有的 SFDA 方法仅使用图像级信息进行适应，这使得它们在视频应用中不是最佳的。本文研究了 SFDA 的视频语义分割 (VSS)，其中利用时间信息来解决视频自适应问题。具体来说，我们提出了时空像素级（STPL）对比学习，这是一种充分利用时空信息来更好地解决源数据缺失问题的新方法。 STPL 明确学习时空空间中像素之间的语义相关性，为适应未标记的目标域提供强大的自我监督。大量实验表明，与当前的 UDA 和 SFDA 方法相比，STPL 在 VSS 基准测试中实现了最先进的性能。代码位于：https://github.com/shaoyuanlo/STPL

AI.tldr: 本文研究在无源数据情况下，利用时空信息提升视频语义分割的域适应效果。
AI.motivation: 现有源自由域适应方法仅使用图像级信息，未能有效利用视频中的时序信息，导致视频语义分割效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出时空像素级对比学习（STPL），通过建模像素在时空维度的语义关联，实现无需源数据的自监督域适应。
AI.result: 在视频语义分割基准测试中，STPL方法相较现有UDA和SFDA方法达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: STPL通过时空像素级对比学习有效解决了源数据不可用场景下的视频域适应问题，为实际应用提供新思路。

authors_text: Xu Zheng,Jinjing Zhu,Yexin Liu,Zidong Cao,Chong Fu,Lin Wang
title: Both Style and Distortion Matter: Dual-Path Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Panoramic Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 风格和失真都很重要：用于全景语义分割的双路径无监督域适应
abstract: The ability of scene understanding has sparked active research for panoramic image semantic segmentation. However, the performance is hampered by distortion of the equirectangular projection (ERP) and a lack of pixel-wise annotations. For this reason, some works treat the ERP and pinhole images equally and transfer knowledge from the pinhole to ERP images via unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). However, they fail to handle the domain gaps caused by: 1) the inherent differences between camera sensors and captured scenes; 2) the distinct image formats (e.g., ERP and pinhole images). In this paper, we propose a novel yet flexible dual-path UDA framework, DPPASS, taking ERP and tangent projection (TP) images as inputs. To reduce the domain gaps, we propose cross-projection and intra-projection training. The cross-projection training includes tangent-wise feature contrastive training and prediction consistency training. That is, the former formulates the features with the same projection locations as positive examples and vice versa, for the models' awareness of distortion, while the latter ensures the consistency of cross-model predictions between the ERP and TP. Moreover, adversarial intra-projection training is proposed to reduce the inherent gap, between the features of the pinhole images and those of the ERP and TP images, respectively. Importantly, the TP path can be freely removed after training, leading to no additional inference cost. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks show that our DPPASS achieves +1.06$\%$ mIoU increment than the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: The ability of scene understanding has sparked active research for panoramic image semantic segmentation. However, the performance is hampered by distortion of the equirectangular projection (ERP) and a lack of pixel-wise annotations. For this reason, some works treat the ERP and pinhole images equally and transfer knowledge from the pinhole to ERP images via unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). However, they fail to handle the domain gaps caused by: 1) the inherent differences between camera sensors and captured scenes; 2) the distinct image formats (e.g., ERP and pinhole images). In this paper, we propose a novel yet flexible dual-path UDA framework, DPPASS, taking ERP and tangent projection (TP) images as inputs. To reduce the domain gaps, we propose cross-projection and intra-projection training. The cross-projection training includes tangent-wise feature contrastive training and prediction consistency training. That is, the former formulates the features with the same projection locations as positive examples and vice versa, for the models' awareness of distortion, while the latter ensures the consistency of cross-model predictions between the ERP and TP. Moreover, adversarial intra-projection training is proposed to reduce the inherent gap, between the features of the pinhole images and those of the ERP and TP images, respectively. Importantly, the TP path can be freely removed after training, leading to no additional inference cost. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks show that our DPPASS achieves +1.06$\%$ mIoU increment than the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 场景理解的能力引发了全景图像语义分割的积极研究。然而，等距柱状投影 (ERP) 的失真和缺乏像素级注释阻碍了性能。因此，一些工作平等对待 ERP 和针孔图像，并通过无监督域适应（UDA）将知识从针孔转移到 ERP 图像。然而，它们无法处理由以下原因引起的域间隙：1）相机传感器和捕获场景之间的固有差异； 2) 不同的图像格式（例如 ERP 和针孔图像）。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖而灵活的双路径 UDA 框架 DPPASS，以 ERP 和切线投影（TP）图像作为输入。为了减少域差距，我们提出了交叉投影和内投影训练。交叉投影训练包括切线特征对比训练和预测一致性训练。也就是说，前者将具有相同投影位置的特征作为正例，反之亦然，以提高模型对失真的认识，而后者则确保ERP和TP之间跨模型预测的一致性。此外，提出了对抗性内投影训练来减少针孔图像特征与 ERP 和 TP 图像特征之间的固有差距。重要的是，TP路径在训练后可以自由移除，不会产生额外的推理成本。对两个基准的大量实验表明，我们的 DPPASS 比最先进的方法实现了 +1.06$\%$ mIoU 增量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双路径无监督域适应框架DPPASS，用于解决全景图像语义分割中由于等距投影失真和域差异导致的性能问题。
AI.motivation: 等距投影（ERP）存在固有失真且缺乏像素级标注，现有方法未能有效处理传感器差异和图像格式（如ERP与针孔图像）导致的域差距。
AI.method: 设计双路径框架同时处理ERP和切线投影（TP）图像，通过跨投影训练（特征对比学习与预测一致性训练）和对抗性内投影训练，减少域差距。TP路径可训练后移除，无需额外推理成本。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上，DPPASS相较最先进方法实现了+1.06%的mIoU提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过联合优化失真感知与域适应，有效缩小了全景图像与针孔图像间的差距，提升了分割性能且保持推理效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种双路径无监督域适应框架DPPASS，用于解决全景图像语义分割中由于等距投影失真和域差异导致的性能问题。

search_text: Both Style and Distortion Matter: Dual-Path Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Panoramic Semantic Segmentation 风格和失真都很重要：用于全景语义分割的双路径无监督域适应 The ability of scene understanding has sparked active research for panoramic image semantic segmentation. However, the performance is hampered by distortion of the equirectangular projection (ERP) and a lack of pixel-wise annotations. For this reason, some works treat the ERP and pinhole images equally and transfer knowledge from the pinhole to ERP images via unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). However, they fail to handle the domain gaps caused by: 1) the inherent differences between camera sensors and captured scenes; 2) the distinct image formats (e.g., ERP and pinhole images). In this paper, we propose a novel yet flexible dual-path UDA framework, DPPASS, taking ERP and tangent projection (TP) images as inputs. To reduce the domain gaps, we propose cross-projection and intra-projection training. The cross-projection training includes tangent-wise feature contrastive training and prediction consistency training. That is, the former formulates the features with the same projection locations as positive examples and vice versa, for the models' awareness of distortion, while the latter ensures the consistency of cross-model predictions between the ERP and TP. Moreover, adversarial intra-projection training is proposed to reduce the inherent gap, between the features of the pinhole images and those of the ERP and TP images, respectively. Importantly, the TP path can be freely removed after training, leading to no additional inference cost. Extensive experiments on two benchmarks show that our DPPASS achieves +1.06$\%$ mIoU increment than the state-of-the-art approaches. 场景理解的能力引发了全景图像语义分割的积极研究。然而，等距柱状投影 (ERP) 的失真和缺乏像素级注释阻碍了性能。因此，一些工作平等对待 ERP 和针孔图像，并通过无监督域适应（UDA）将知识从针孔转移到 ERP 图像。然而，它们无法处理由以下原因引起的域间隙：1）相机传感器和捕获场景之间的固有差异； 2) 不同的图像格式（例如 ERP 和针孔图像）。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖而灵活的双路径 UDA 框架 DPPASS，以 ERP 和切线投影（TP）图像作为输入。为了减少域差距，我们提出了交叉投影和内投影训练。交叉投影训练包括切线特征对比训练和预测一致性训练。也就是说，前者将具有相同投影位置的特征作为正例，反之亦然，以提高模型对失真的认识，而后者则确保ERP和TP之间跨模型预测的一致性。此外，提出了对抗性内投影训练来减少针孔图像特征与 ERP 和 TP 图像特征之间的固有差距。重要的是，TP路径在训练后可以自由移除，不会产生额外的推理成本。对两个基准的大量实验表明，我们的 DPPASS 比最先进的方法实现了 +1.06$\%$ mIoU 增量。 本文提出了一种双路径无监督域适应框架DPPASS，用于解决全景图像语义分割中由于等距投影失真和域差异导致的性能问题。 Xu Zheng,Jinjing Zhu,Yexin Liu,Zidong Cao,Chong Fu,Lin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Ying-Chen Lin,Vincent S. Tseng
title: Multi-view knowledge distillation transformer for human action recognition
title_zh: 用于人类动作识别的多视图知识蒸馏转换器
abstract: Recently, Transformer-based methods have been utilized to improve the performance of human action recognition. However, most of these studies assume that multi-view data is complete, which may not always be the case in real-world scenarios. Therefore, this paper presents a novel Multi-view Knowledge Distillation Transformer (MKDT) framework that consists of a teacher network and a student network. This framework aims to handle incomplete human action problems in real-world applications. Specifically, the multi-view knowledge distillation transformer uses a hierarchical vision transformer with shifted windows to capture more spatial-temporal information. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework outperforms the CNN-based method on three public datasets.
summary: Recently, Transformer-based methods have been utilized to improve the performance of human action recognition. However, most of these studies assume that multi-view data is complete, which may not always be the case in real-world scenarios. Therefore, this paper presents a novel Multi-view Knowledge Distillation Transformer (MKDT) framework that consists of a teacher network and a student network. This framework aims to handle incomplete human action problems in real-world applications. Specifically, the multi-view knowledge distillation transformer uses a hierarchical vision transformer with shifted windows to capture more spatial-temporal information. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework outperforms the CNN-based method on three public datasets.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于 Transformer 的方法已被用来提高人类动作识别的性能。然而，这些研究大多数都假设多视图数据是完整的，但在现实场景中情况可能并不总是如此。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的多视图知识蒸馏转换器（MKDT）框架，由教师网络和学生网络组成。该框架旨在处理现实应用中不完整的人类行为问题。具体来说，多视图知识蒸馏转换器使用具有移动窗口的分层视觉转换器来捕获更多时空信息。实验结果表明，我们的框架在三个公共数据集上优于基于 CNN 的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种多视角知识蒸馏Transformer框架，解决现实场景中多视角数据不完整导致的人类动作识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设多视角数据完整，但实际应用中数据可能不完整，需改进模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计包含教师网络和学生网络的MKDT框架，结合层次化视觉Transformer与移位窗口机制，有效提取时空特征并处理不完整数据。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上，MKDT框架性能优于传统CNN方法。
AI.conclusion: MKDT框架有效应对多视角数据不完整性，验证了知识蒸馏与Transformer结合在动作识别中的优势。

authors_text: Xiaoxiao He,Chaowei Tan,Bo Liu,Liping Si,Weiwu Yao,Liang Zhao,Di Liu,Qilong Zhangli,Qi Chang,Kang Li,Dimitris N. Metaxas
title: Dealing With Heterogeneous 3D MR Knee Images: A Federated Few-Shot Learning Method With Dual Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 处理异构 3D MR 膝盖图像：一种具有双重知识蒸馏的联合少样本学习方法
abstract: Federated Learning has gained popularity among medical institutions since it enables collaborative training between clients (e.g., hospitals) without aggregating data. However, due to the high cost associated with creating annotations, especially for large 3D image datasets, clinical institutions do not have enough supervised data for training locally. Thus, the performance of the collaborative model is subpar under limited supervision. On the other hand, large institutions have the resources to compile data repositories with high-resolution images and labels. Therefore, individual clients can utilize the knowledge acquired in the public data repositories to mitigate the shortage of private annotated images. In this paper, we propose a federated few-shot learning method with dual knowledge distillation. This method allows joint training with limited annotations across clients without jeopardizing privacy. The supervised learning of the proposed method extracts features from limited labeled data in each client, while the unsupervised data is used to distill both feature and response-based knowledge from a national data repository to further improve the accuracy of the collaborative model and reduce the communication cost. Extensive evaluations are conducted on 3D magnetic resonance knee images from a private clinical dataset. Our proposed method shows superior performance and less training time than other semi-supervised federated learning methods. Codes and additional visualization results are available at https://github.com/hexiaoxiao-cs/fedml-knee.
summary: Federated Learning has gained popularity among medical institutions since it enables collaborative training between clients (e.g., hospitals) without aggregating data. However, due to the high cost associated with creating annotations, especially for large 3D image datasets, clinical institutions do not have enough supervised data for training locally. Thus, the performance of the collaborative model is subpar under limited supervision. On the other hand, large institutions have the resources to compile data repositories with high-resolution images and labels. Therefore, individual clients can utilize the knowledge acquired in the public data repositories to mitigate the shortage of private annotated images. In this paper, we propose a federated few-shot learning method with dual knowledge distillation. This method allows joint training with limited annotations across clients without jeopardizing privacy. The supervised learning of the proposed method extracts features from limited labeled data in each client, while the unsupervised data is used to distill both feature and response-based knowledge from a national data repository to further improve the accuracy of the collaborative model and reduce the communication cost. Extensive evaluations are conducted on 3D magnetic resonance knee images from a private clinical dataset. Our proposed method shows superior performance and less training time than other semi-supervised federated learning methods. Codes and additional visualization results are available at https://github.com/hexiaoxiao-cs/fedml-knee.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习在医疗机构中广受欢迎，因为它可以在不聚合数据的情况下在客户（例如医院）之间进行协作培训。然而，由于创建注释的成本很高，特别是对于大型 3D 图像数据集，临床机构没有足够的监督数据用于本地训练。因此，在有限的监督下，协作模型的性能较差。另一方面，大型机构拥有资源​​来编译具有高分辨率图像和标签的数据存储库。因此，个人客户可以利用公共数据存储库中获得的知识来缓解私人注释图像的短缺。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有对偶知识蒸馏的联邦少样本学习方法。这种方法允许跨客户进行有限注释的联合训练，而不会危及隐私。该方法的监督学习从每个客户端的有限标记数据中提取特征，而无监督数据用于从国家数据存储库中提取特征和基于响应的知识，以进一步提高协作模型的准确性并降低通信成本。对来自私人临床数据集的 3D 磁共振膝盖图像进行了广泛的评估。我们提出的方法比其他半监督联邦学习方法表现出优越的性能和更少的训练时间。代码和其他可视化结果可在 https://github.com/hexiaoxiao-cs/fedml-knee 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联邦少样本学习方法，结合双重知识蒸馏技术，解决异构3D膝关节MRI图像在医疗联邦学习中的标注数据不足问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗机构因标注成本高导致本地监督数据不足，而联邦学习需在隐私保护下整合多方数据，传统方法难以兼顾有限标注与模型性能。
AI.method: 设计联邦少样本框架，利用客户端有限标注数据进行监督学习，同时通过无监督数据从国家级数据仓库蒸馏特征与响应知识，降低通信成本。
AI.result: 在私有临床3D膝关节MRI数据集上，该方法在准确率和训练时间上优于其他半监督联邦学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 双重知识蒸馏有效缓解了医疗联邦学习中数据标注不足的问题，为异构医学图像分析提供了高效隐私保护方案。

Codes and additional visualization results are available at https://github.com/hexiaoxiao-cs/fedml-knee. 联邦学习在医疗机构中广受欢迎，因为它可以在不聚合数据的情况下在客户（例如医院）之间进行协作培训。然而，由于创建注释的成本很高，特别是对于大型 3D 图像数据集，临床机构没有足够的监督数据用于本地训练。因此，在有限的监督下，协作模型的性能较差。另一方面，大型机构拥有资源​​来编译具有高分辨率图像和标签的数据存储库。因此，个人客户可以利用公共数据存储库中获得的知识来缓解私人注释图像的短缺。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有对偶知识蒸馏的联邦少样本学习方法。这种方法允许跨客户进行有限注释的联合训练，而不会危及隐私。该方法的监督学习从每个客户端的有限标记数据中提取特征，而无监督数据用于从国家数据存储库中提取特征和基于响应的知识，以进一步提高协作模型的准确性并降低通信成本。对来自私人临床数据集的 3D 磁共振膝盖图像进行了广泛的评估。我们提出的方法比其他半监督联邦学习方法表现出优越的性能和更少的训练时间。代码和其他可视化结果可在 https://github.com/hexiaoxiao-cs/fedml-knee 获取。 本文提出一种联邦少样本学习方法，结合双重知识蒸馏技术，解决异构3D膝关节MRI图像在医疗联邦学习中的标注数据不足问题。 Xiaoxiao He,Chaowei Tan,Bo Liu,Liping Si,Weiwu Yao,Liang Zhao,Di Liu,Qilong Zhangli,Qi Chang,Kang Li,Dimitris N. Metaxas eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Chia-Hsiang Lai,Li-Hsiang Shen,Kai-Ten Feng
title: Intelligent Load Balancing and Resource Allocation in O-RAN: A Multi-Agent Multi-Armed Bandit Approach
title_zh: O-RAN 中的智能负载平衡和资源分配：多代理多臂 Bandit 方法
abstract: The open radio access network (O-RAN) architecture offers a cost-effective and scalable solution for internet service providers to optimize their networks using machine learning algorithms. The architecture's open interfaces enable network function virtualization, with the O-RAN serving as the primary communication device for users. However, the limited frequency resources and information explosion make it difficult to achieve an optimal network experience without effective traffic control or resource allocation. To address this, we consider mobility-aware load balancing to evenly distribute loads across the network, preventing network congestion and user outages caused by excessive load concentration on open radio unit (O-RU) governed by a single open distributed unit (O-DU). We have proposed a multi-agent multi-armed bandit for load balancing and resource allocation (mmLBRA) scheme, designed to both achieve load balancing and improve the effective sum-rate performance of the O-RAN network. We also present the mmLBRA-LB and mmLBRA-RA sub-schemes that can operate independently in non-realtime RAN intelligent controller (Non-RT RIC) and near-RT RIC, respectively, providing a solution with moderate loads and high-rate in O-RUs. Simulation results show that the proposed mmLBRA scheme significantly increases the effective network sum-rate while achieving better load balancing across O-RUs compared to rule-based and other existing heuristic methods in open literature.
summary: The open radio access network (O-RAN) architecture offers a cost-effective and scalable solution for internet service providers to optimize their networks using machine learning algorithms. The architecture's open interfaces enable network function virtualization, with the O-RAN serving as the primary communication device for users. However, the limited frequency resources and information explosion make it difficult to achieve an optimal network experience without effective traffic control or resource allocation. To address this, we consider mobility-aware load balancing to evenly distribute loads across the network, preventing network congestion and user outages caused by excessive load concentration on open radio unit (O-RU) governed by a single open distributed unit (O-DU). We have proposed a multi-agent multi-armed bandit for load balancing and resource allocation (mmLBRA) scheme, designed to both achieve load balancing and improve the effective sum-rate performance of the O-RAN network. We also present the mmLBRA-LB and mmLBRA-RA sub-schemes that can operate independently in non-realtime RAN intelligent controller (Non-RT RIC) and near-RT RIC, respectively, providing a solution with moderate loads and high-rate in O-RUs. Simulation results show that the proposed mmLBRA scheme significantly increases the effective network sum-rate while achieving better load balancing across O-RUs compared to rule-based and other existing heuristic methods in open literature.
abstract_zh: 开放式无线接入网络 (O-RAN) 架构为互联网服务提供商提供了一种经济高效且可扩展的解决方案，帮助他们使用机器学习算法优化其网络。该架构的开放接口支持网络功能虚拟化，O-RAN 作为用户的主要通信设备。然而，有限的频率资源和信息爆炸使得如果没有有效的流量控制或资源分配，很难获得最佳的网络体验。为了解决这个问题，我们考虑移动感知负载平衡，以在整个网络中均匀分配负载，防止由于负载过度集中在由单个开放分布式单元 (O-DU) 管理的开放无线电单元 (O-RU) 上而导致的网络拥塞和用户中断。我们提出了一种用于负载均衡和资源分配的多代理多臂老虎机（mmLBRA）方案，旨在实现负载均衡并提高 O-RAN 网络的有效总速率性能。我们还提出了 mmLBRA-LB 和 mmLBRA-RA 子方案，它们分别可以在非实时 RAN 智能控制器（Non-RT RIC）和近 RT RIC 中独立运行，为 O-RU 提供中等负载和高速率的解决方案。仿真结果表明，与开放文献中基于规则的方法和其他现有启发式方法相比，所提出的 mmLBRA 方案显着提高了有效网络总速率，同时在 O-RU 之间实现了更好的负载平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体多臂老虎机的负载均衡与资源分配方案（mmLBRA），以解决O-RAN网络中的资源分配和负载均衡问题。
AI.motivation: O-RAN架构虽具备开放性和可扩展性，但受限于频谱资源和信息爆炸，传统方法难以实现高效负载均衡与资源分配，易导致网络拥塞和用户服务中断。
AI.method: 设计多智能体多臂老虎机框架mmLBRA，包含两个子方案mmLBRA-LB（非实时RIC）和mmLBRA-RA（近实时RIC），通过动态调整负载和资源分配策略优化网络性能。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，mmLBRA在有效网络总速率和O-RU负载均衡性上显著优于基于规则和其他启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的mmLBRA方案通过智能协同机制有效解决了O-RAN的负载均衡与资源分配难题，为未来网络优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zalan Fabian,Berk Tinaz,Mahdi Soltanolkotabi
title: DiracDiffusion: Denoising and Incremental Reconstruction with Assured Data-Consistency
title_zh: DiracDiffusion：具有保证数据一致性的去噪和增量重建
comment: 30 pages, 15 figures, published at the 41st International Conference on Machine Learning, Vienna, Austria, 2024
comments: 30 pages, 15 figures, published at the 41st International Conference on Machine Learning, Vienna, Austria, 2024
abstract: Diffusion models have established new state of the art in a multitude of computer vision tasks, including image restoration. Diffusion-based inverse problem solvers generate reconstructions of exceptional visual quality from heavily corrupted measurements. However, in what is widely known as the perception-distortion trade-off, the price of perceptually appealing reconstructions is often paid in declined distortion metrics, such as PSNR. Distortion metrics measure faithfulness to the observation, a crucial requirement in inverse problems. In this work, we propose a novel framework for inverse problem solving, namely we assume that the observation comes from a stochastic degradation process that gradually degrades and noises the original clean image. We learn to reverse the degradation process in order to recover the clean image. Our technique maintains consistency with the original measurement throughout the reverse process, and allows for great flexibility in trading off perceptual quality for improved distortion metrics and sampling speedup via early-stopping. We demonstrate the efficiency of our method on different high-resolution datasets and inverse problems, achieving great improvements over other state-of-the-art diffusion-based methods with respect to both perceptual and distortion metrics.
summary: Diffusion models have established new state of the art in a multitude of computer vision tasks, including image restoration. Diffusion-based inverse problem solvers generate reconstructions of exceptional visual quality from heavily corrupted measurements. However, in what is widely known as the perception-distortion trade-off, the price of perceptually appealing reconstructions is often paid in declined distortion metrics, such as PSNR. Distortion metrics measure faithfulness to the observation, a crucial requirement in inverse problems. In this work, we propose a novel framework for inverse problem solving, namely we assume that the observation comes from a stochastic degradation process that gradually degrades and noises the original clean image. We learn to reverse the degradation process in order to recover the clean image. Our technique maintains consistency with the original measurement throughout the reverse process, and allows for great flexibility in trading off perceptual quality for improved distortion metrics and sampling speedup via early-stopping. We demonstrate the efficiency of our method on different high-resolution datasets and inverse problems, achieving great improvements over other state-of-the-art diffusion-based methods with respect to both perceptual and distortion metrics.
abstract_zh: 扩散模型在包括图像恢复在内的多种计算机视觉任务中建立了新的技术水平。基于扩散的逆问题求解器从严重损坏的测量中生成卓越视觉质量的重建。然而，在众所周知的感知失真权衡中，感知上有吸引力的重建的代价通常是以失真指标（例如 PSNR）的下降为代价。畸变度量衡量观察的忠实度，这是逆问题的关键要求。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的逆向问题解决框架，即我们假设观察来自随机退化过程，该过程逐渐退化原始干净图像并产生噪声。我们学习逆转退化过程以恢复干净的图像。我们的技术在整个反向过程中保持与原始测量的一致性，并且在感知质量与改进的失真指标和通过提前停止的采样加速之间进行权衡时具有很大的灵活性。我们展示了我们的方法在不同高分辨率数据集和反演问题上的效率，在感知和失真指标方面比其他最先进的基于扩散的方法取得了巨大的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为DiracDiffusion的逆问题求解框架，通过逆向随机退化过程实现图像恢复，在保持数据一致性的同时平衡感知质量与失真度量。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在图像恢复中虽能生成视觉质量高的重建结果，但常导致失真度量（如PSNR）下降，而数据一致性是逆问题的核心要求，需解决感知质量与失真度量间的矛盾。
AI.method: 假设观测数据源自逐步退化和噪声的随机过程，通过学习逆向退化过程恢复干净图像，保持与原始测量的一致性，并引入早停策略实现质量与速度的灵活权衡。
AI.result: 在多个高分辨率数据集和逆问题任务中，该方法在感知和失真指标上均优于现有扩散模型，有效提升了重建质量与效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过确保数据一致性的逆向退化过程建模，DiracDiffusion成功解决了感知-失真权衡问题，在图像恢复任务中实现了更优的性能表现。

We learn to reverse the degradation process in order to recover the clean image. We demonstrate the efficiency of our method on different high-resolution datasets and inverse problems, achieving great improvements over other state-of-the-art diffusion-based methods with respect to both perceptual and distortion metrics. 扩散模型在包括图像恢复在内的多种计算机视觉任务中建立了新的技术水平。基于扩散的逆问题求解器从严重损坏的测量中生成卓越视觉质量的重建。然而，在众所周知的感知失真权衡中，感知上有吸引力的重建的代价通常是以失真指标（例如 PSNR）的下降为代价。畸变度量衡量观察的忠实度，这是逆问题的关键要求。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的逆向问题解决框架，即我们假设观察来自随机退化过程，该过程逐渐退化原始干净图像并产生噪声。我们学习逆转退化过程以恢复干净的图像。我们的技术在整个反向过程中保持与原始测量的一致性，并且在感知质量与改进的失真指标和通过提前停止的采样加速之间进行权衡时具有很大的灵活性。我们展示了我们的方法在不同高分辨率数据集和反演问题上的效率，在感知和失真指标方面比其他最先进的基于扩散的方法取得了巨大的改进。 本文提出一种名为DiracDiffusion的逆问题求解框架，通过逆向随机退化过程实现图像恢复，在保持数据一致性的同时平衡感知质量与失真度量。 Zalan Fabian,Berk Tinaz,Mahdi Soltanolkotabi eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yujia Li,Jiong Shi,S. Kevin Zhou
title: Causal Image Synthesis of Brain MR in 3D
title_zh: 3D 大脑 MR 因果图像合成
abstract: Clinical decision making requires counterfactual reasoning based on a factual medical image and thus necessitates causal image synthesis. To this end, we present a novel method for modeling the causality between demographic variables, clinical indices and brain MR images for Alzheimer's Diseases. Specifically, we leverage a structural causal model to depict the causality and a styled generator to synthesize the image. Furthermore, as a crucial step to reduce modeling complexity and make learning tractable, we propose the use of low dimensional latent feature representation of a high-dimensional 3D image, together with exogenous noise, to build causal relationship between the image and non image variables. We experiment the proposed method based on 1586 subjects and 3683 3D images and synthesize counterfactual brain MR images intervened on certain attributes, such as age, brain volume and cognitive test score. Quantitative metrics and qualitative evaluation of counterfactual images demonstrates the superiority of our generated images.
summary: Clinical decision making requires counterfactual reasoning based on a factual medical image and thus necessitates causal image synthesis. To this end, we present a novel method for modeling the causality between demographic variables, clinical indices and brain MR images for Alzheimer's Diseases. Specifically, we leverage a structural causal model to depict the causality and a styled generator to synthesize the image. Furthermore, as a crucial step to reduce modeling complexity and make learning tractable, we propose the use of low dimensional latent feature representation of a high-dimensional 3D image, together with exogenous noise, to build causal relationship between the image and non image variables. We experiment the proposed method based on 1586 subjects and 3683 3D images and synthesize counterfactual brain MR images intervened on certain attributes, such as age, brain volume and cognitive test score. Quantitative metrics and qualitative evaluation of counterfactual images demonstrates the superiority of our generated images.
abstract_zh: 临床决策需要基于事实医学图像的反事实推理，因此需要因果图像合成。为此，我们提出了一种新方法，用于对阿尔茨海默病的人口统计变量、临床指标和大脑 MR 图像之间的因果关系进行建模。具体来说，我们利用结构因果模型来描述因果关系，并利用样式生成器来合成图像。此外，作为降低建模复杂性和使学习易于处理的关键步骤，我们建议使用高维 3D 图像的低维潜在特征表示以及外源噪声来建立图像和非图像变量之间的因果关系。我们基于 1586 名受试者和 3683 幅 3D 图像对所提出的方法进行了实验，并合成了针对某些属性（如年龄、大脑体积和认知测试分数）进行干预的反事实大脑 MR 图像。反事实图像的定量指标和定性评估证明了我们生成的图像的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构因果模型和风格生成器的三维脑部MRI因果图像合成方法，用于阿尔茨海默病的反事实推理。
AI.motivation: 临床决策需要基于实际医疗图像的反事实推理，但现有方法难以有效建模影像与非影像变量间的因果关系。
AI.method: 结合结构因果模型与风格生成器，通过低维潜在特征表示和外生噪声构建影像与非影像变量的因果关系，实现三维脑MRI的反事实合成。
AI.result: 在1586名受试者和3683张三维图像上验证，生成的反事实图像在定量指标和定性评估中均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了脑MRI的因果合成，为临床决策中的反事实推理提供了可靠工具。

authors_text: Fengyin Lin,Mingkang Li,Da Li,Timothy Hospedales,Yi-Zhe Song,Yonggang Qi
title: Zero-Shot Everything Sketch-Based Image Retrieval, and in Explainable Style
title_zh: 零样本一切基于草图的图像检索，并且采用可解释的风格
abstract: This paper studies the problem of zero-short sketch-based image retrieval (ZS-SBIR), however with two significant differentiators to prior art (i) we tackle all variants (inter-category, intra-category, and cross datasets) of ZS-SBIR with just one network (``everything''), and (ii) we would really like to understand how this sketch-photo matching operates (``explainable''). Our key innovation lies with the realization that such a cross-modal matching problem could be reduced to comparisons of groups of key local patches -- akin to the seasoned ``bag-of-words'' paradigm. Just with this change, we are able to achieve both of the aforementioned goals, with the added benefit of no longer requiring external semantic knowledge. Technically, ours is a transformer-based cross-modal network, with three novel components (i) a self-attention module with a learnable tokenizer to produce visual tokens that correspond to the most informative local regions, (ii) a cross-attention module to compute local correspondences between the visual tokens across two modalities, and finally (iii) a kernel-based relation network to assemble local putative matches and produce an overall similarity metric for a sketch-photo pair. Experiments show ours indeed delivers superior performances across all ZS-SBIR settings. The all important explainable goal is elegantly achieved by visualizing cross-modal token correspondences, and for the first time, via sketch to photo synthesis by universal replacement of all matched photo patches. Code and model are available at \url{https://github.com/buptLinfy/ZSE-SBIR}.
summary: This paper studies the problem of zero-short sketch-based image retrieval (ZS-SBIR), however with two significant differentiators to prior art (i) we tackle all variants (inter-category, intra-category, and cross datasets) of ZS-SBIR with just one network (``everything''), and (ii) we would really like to understand how this sketch-photo matching operates (``explainable''). Our key innovation lies with the realization that such a cross-modal matching problem could be reduced to comparisons of groups of key local patches -- akin to the seasoned ``bag-of-words'' paradigm. Just with this change, we are able to achieve both of the aforementioned goals, with the added benefit of no longer requiring external semantic knowledge. Technically, ours is a transformer-based cross-modal network, with three novel components (i) a self-attention module with a learnable tokenizer to produce visual tokens that correspond to the most informative local regions, (ii) a cross-attention module to compute local correspondences between the visual tokens across two modalities, and finally (iii) a kernel-based relation network to assemble local putative matches and produce an overall similarity metric for a sketch-photo pair. Experiments show ours indeed delivers superior performances across all ZS-SBIR settings. The all important explainable goal is elegantly achieved by visualizing cross-modal token correspondences, and for the first time, via sketch to photo synthesis by universal replacement of all matched photo patches. Code and model are available at \url{https://github.com/buptLinfy/ZSE-SBIR}.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了基于零短草图的图像检索（ZS-SBIR）问题，但是与现有技术有两个显着的区别（i）我们仅用一个网络（“所有”）来处理 ZS-SBIR 的所有变体（类别间、类别内和跨数据集），以及（ii）我们真的很想了解这种草图-照片匹配是如何运作的（“可解释的”）。我们的关键创新在于认识到这种跨模式匹配问题可以简化为关键本地补丁组的比较——类似于经验丰富的“词袋”范式。通过这一改变，我们能够实现上述两个目标，并具有不再需要外部语义知识的额外好处。从技术上讲，我们的网络是一个基于变压器的跨模态网络，具有三个新颖的组件（i）一个带有可学习标记器的自注意力模块，用于生成与信息最丰富的局部区域相对应的视觉标记，（ii）一个交叉注意模块，用于计算跨两种模态的视觉标记之间的局部对应关系，最后（iii）一个基于内核的关系网络，用于组装局部假定匹配并为草图-照片对生成整体相似性度量。实验表明，我们的确实在所有 ZS-SBIR 设置中提供了卓越的性能。所有重要的可解释目标都是通过可视化跨模式令牌对应关系优雅地实现的，并且首次通过草图到照片合成，通过通用替换所有匹配的照片补丁。代码和模型可在 \url{https://github.com/buptLinfy/ZSE-SBIR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的零样本草图到图像检索方法，支持跨类别、同类别及跨数据集的检索，并实现可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本草图检索方法通常针对特定场景设计，缺乏统一性且难以解释匹配机制，本文旨在构建通用模型并揭示匹配原理。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构设计跨模态网络，包含自注意力模块生成视觉标记、跨注意力模块计算模态间局部对应关系、核关系网络聚合局部匹配生成整体相似度，无需外部语义知识。
AI.result: 在多种零样本检索场景中均优于现有方法，通过可视化跨模态标记对应关系及草图到图像的合成结果实现可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一框架在性能和可解释性上均取得突破，为零样本草图检索提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ertai Liu,Josephine Monica,Kaitlin Gold,Lance Cadle-Davidson,David Combs,Yu Jiang
title: Vision-based Vineyard Navigation Solution with Automatic Annotation
title_zh: 基于视觉的自动注释葡萄园导航解决方案
abstract: Autonomous navigation is the key to achieving the full automation of agricultural research and production management (e.g., disease management and yield prediction) using agricultural robots. In this paper, we introduced a vision-based autonomous navigation framework for agriculture robots in trellised cropping systems such as vineyards. To achieve this, we proposed a novel learning-based method to estimate the path traversibility heatmap directly from an RGB-D image and subsequently convert the heatmap to a preferred traversal path. An automatic annotation pipeline was developed to form a training dataset by projecting RTK GPS paths collected during the first setup in a vineyard in corresponding RGB-D images as ground-truth path annotations, allowing a fast model training and fine-tuning without costly human annotation. The trained path detection model was used to develop a full navigation framework consisting of row tracking and row switching modules, enabling a robot to traverse within a crop row and transit between crop rows to cover an entire vineyard autonomously. Extensive field trials were conducted in three different vineyards to demonstrate that the developed path detection model and navigation framework provided a cost-effective, accurate, and robust autonomous navigation solution in the vineyard and could be generalized to unseen vineyards with stable performance.
summary: Autonomous navigation is the key to achieving the full automation of agricultural research and production management (e.g., disease management and yield prediction) using agricultural robots. In this paper, we introduced a vision-based autonomous navigation framework for agriculture robots in trellised cropping systems such as vineyards. To achieve this, we proposed a novel learning-based method to estimate the path traversibility heatmap directly from an RGB-D image and subsequently convert the heatmap to a preferred traversal path. An automatic annotation pipeline was developed to form a training dataset by projecting RTK GPS paths collected during the first setup in a vineyard in corresponding RGB-D images as ground-truth path annotations, allowing a fast model training and fine-tuning without costly human annotation. The trained path detection model was used to develop a full navigation framework consisting of row tracking and row switching modules, enabling a robot to traverse within a crop row and transit between crop rows to cover an entire vineyard autonomously. Extensive field trials were conducted in three different vineyards to demonstrate that the developed path detection model and navigation framework provided a cost-effective, accurate, and robust autonomous navigation solution in the vineyard and could be generalized to unseen vineyards with stable performance.
abstract_zh: 自主导航是利用农业机器人实现农业研究和生产管理（例如疾病管理和产量预测）完全自动化的关键。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于视觉的自主导航框架，适用于葡萄园等棚架种植系统中的农业机器人。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种新颖的基于学习的方法，直接从 RGB-D 图像估计路径可遍历性热图，然后将热图转换为首选遍历路径。我们开发了自动注释管道，通过将在葡萄园中第一次设置期间收集的 RTK GPS 路径投影到相应的 RGB-D 图像中作为地面实况路径注释来形成训练数据集，从而无需昂贵的人工注释即可快速进行模型训练和微调。经过训练的路径检测模型用于开发由行跟踪和行切换模块组成的完整导航框架，使机器人能够在作物行内穿越并在作物行之间穿梭，从而自主覆盖整个葡萄园。在三个不同的葡萄园进行了广泛的现场试验，证明所开发的路径检测模型和导航框架为葡萄园提供了一种经济有效、准确且强大的自主导航解决方案，并且可以推广到性能稳定的看不见的葡萄园。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉的葡萄园自主导航框架，通过自动标注和路径检测实现农业机器人的自主行驶。
AI.motivation: 传统农业机器人导航依赖高成本GPS和人工标注数据，难以满足实际应用需求，需开发低成本且高效的自主导航方案。
AI.method: 利用RGB-D图像学习生成路径可通行性热图，并通过RTK GPS路径投影实现自动标注，构建包含行跟踪和行切换模块的完整导航框架。
AI.result: 在三个不同葡萄园的实地试验中验证了该方法的有效性，证明其具有成本低、精度高、鲁棒性强且可泛化到未见场景的特点。
AI.conclusion: 提出的视觉导航方案为农业机器人提供了稳定可靠的自主行驶解决方案，适用于复杂农田环境并具备推广价值。

search_text: Vision-based Vineyard Navigation Solution with Automatic Annotation 基于视觉的自动注释葡萄园导航解决方案 Autonomous navigation is the key to achieving the full automation of agricultural research and production management (e.g., disease management and yield prediction) using agricultural robots. In this paper, we introduced a vision-based autonomous navigation framework for agriculture robots in trellised cropping systems such as vineyards. To achieve this, we proposed a novel learning-based method to estimate the path traversibility heatmap directly from an RGB-D image and subsequently convert the heatmap to a preferred traversal path. An automatic annotation pipeline was developed to form a training dataset by projecting RTK GPS paths collected during the first setup in a vineyard in corresponding RGB-D images as ground-truth path annotations, allowing a fast model training and fine-tuning without costly human annotation. The trained path detection model was used to develop a full navigation framework consisting of row tracking and row switching modules, enabling a robot to traverse within a crop row and transit between crop rows to cover an entire vineyard autonomously. Extensive field trials were conducted in three different vineyards to demonstrate that the developed path detection model and navigation framework provided a cost-effective, accurate, and robust autonomous navigation solution in the vineyard and could be generalized to unseen vineyards with stable performance. 自主导航是利用农业机器人实现农业研究和生产管理（例如疾病管理和产量预测）完全自动化的关键。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于视觉的自主导航框架，适用于葡萄园等棚架种植系统中的农业机器人。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种新颖的基于学习的方法，直接从 RGB-D 图像估计路径可遍历性热图，然后将热图转换为首选遍历路径。我们开发了自动注释管道，通过将在葡萄园中第一次设置期间收集的 RTK GPS 路径投影到相应的 RGB-D 图像中作为地面实况路径注释来形成训练数据集，从而无需昂贵的人工注释即可快速进行模型训练和微调。经过训练的路径检测模型用于开发由行跟踪和行切换模块组成的完整导航框架，使机器人能够在作物行内穿越并在作物行之间穿梭，从而自主覆盖整个葡萄园。在三个不同的葡萄园进行了广泛的现场试验，证明所开发的路径检测模型和导航框架为葡萄园提供了一种经济有效、准确且强大的自主导航解决方案，并且可以推广到性能稳定的看不见的葡萄园。 本文提出了一种基于视觉的葡萄园自主导航框架，通过自动标注和路径检测实现农业机器人的自主行驶。 Ertai Liu,Josephine Monica,Kaitlin Gold,Lance Cadle-Davidson,David Combs,Yu Jiang cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Sanbao Su,Songyang Han,Yiming Li,Zhili Zhang,Chen Feng,Caiwen Ding,Fei Miao
title: Collaborative Multi-Object Tracking with Conformal Uncertainty Propagation
title_zh: 具有共形不确定性传播的协作多目标跟踪
comment: This paper has been accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
comments: This paper has been accepted by IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters
abstract: Object detection and multiple object tracking (MOT) are essential components of self-driving systems. Accurate detection and uncertainty quantification are both critical for onboard modules, such as perception, prediction, and planning, to improve the safety and robustness of autonomous vehicles. Collaborative object detection (COD) has been proposed to improve detection accuracy and reduce uncertainty by leveraging the viewpoints of multiple agents. However, little attention has been paid to how to leverage the uncertainty quantification from COD to enhance MOT performance. In this paper, as the first attempt to address this challenge, we design an uncertainty propagation framework called MOT-CUP. Our framework first quantifies the uncertainty of COD through direct modeling and conformal prediction, and propagates this uncertainty information into the motion prediction and association steps. MOT-CUP is designed to work with different collaborative object detectors and baseline MOT algorithms. We evaluate MOT-CUP on V2X-Sim, a comprehensive collaborative perception dataset, and demonstrate a 2% improvement in accuracy and a 2.67X reduction in uncertainty compared to the baselines, e.g. SORT and ByteTrack. In scenarios characterized by high occlusion levels, our MOT-CUP demonstrates a noteworthy $4.01\%$ improvement in accuracy. MOT-CUP demonstrates the importance of uncertainty quantification in both COD and MOT, and provides the first attempt to improve the accuracy and reduce the uncertainty in MOT based on COD through uncertainty propagation. Our code is public on https://coperception.github.io/MOT-CUP/.

However, little attention has been paid to how to leverage the uncertainty quantification from COD to enhance MOT performance. In this paper, as the first attempt to address this challenge, we design an uncertainty propagation framework called MOT-CUP. Our framework first quantifies the uncertainty of COD through direct modeling and conformal prediction, and propagates this uncertainty information into the motion prediction and association steps. MOT-CUP is designed to work with different collaborative object detectors and baseline MOT algorithms. We evaluate MOT-CUP on V2X-Sim, a comprehensive collaborative perception dataset, and demonstrate a 2% improvement in accuracy and a 2.67X reduction in uncertainty compared to the baselines, e.g. SORT and ByteTrack. In scenarios characterized by high occlusion levels, our MOT-CUP demonstrates a noteworthy $4.01\%$ improvement in accuracy. MOT-CUP demonstrates the importance of uncertainty quantification in both COD and MOT, and provides the first attempt to improve the accuracy and reduce the uncertainty in MOT based on COD through uncertainty propagation. abstract_zh: 物体检测和多物体跟踪（MOT）是自动驾驶系统的重要组成部分。准确的检测和不确定性量化对于感知、预测和规划等车载模块来说都至关重要，以提高自动驾驶汽车的安全性和鲁棒性。协作对象检测（COD）被提出来通过利用多个代理的观点来提高检测精度并减少不确定性。然而，很少有人关注如何利用 COD 的不确定性量化来提高 MOT 性能。在本文中，作为解决这一挑战的首次尝试，我们设计了一个名为 MOT-CUP 的不确定性传播框架。我们的框架首先通过直接建模和保形预测来量化 COD 的不确定性，并将这种不确定性信息传播到运动预测和关联步骤中。 MOT-CUP 旨在与不同的协作对象检测器和基线 MOT 算法配合使用。我们在 V2X-Sim（一个全面的协作感知数据集）上评估 MOT-CUP，并证明与基线相比，准确性提高了 2%，不确定性降低了 2.67 倍。排序和字节跟踪。在以高遮挡水平为特征的场景中，我们的 MOT-CUP 的准确度显着提高了 4.01\%$。 MOT-CUP展示了不确定性量化在COD和MOT中的重要性，并首次尝试在COD的基础上通过不确定性传播来提高MOT的精度并降低不确定性。我们的代码在 https://coperception.github.io/MOT-CUP/ 上公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MOT-CUP的不确定性传播框架，旨在通过协作目标检测（COD）的不确定性量化来提升多目标跟踪（MOT）的准确性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 尽管协作目标检测（COD）能提升检测精度并降低不确定性，但如何将COD的不确定性量化用于改进MOT性能尚未被充分研究，亟需探索不确定性传播对MOT的提升作用。
AI.method: 设计MOT-CUP框架，通过直接建模与符合预测量化COD的不确定性，并将该不确定性信息传播至运动预测与数据关联步骤，兼容多种协作检测器与MOT基线算法。
AI.result: 在V2X-Sim数据集上，MOT-CUP相比SORT和ByteTrack等基线方法，准确率提升2%，不确定性降低2.67倍；在高遮挡场景下准确率提升4.01%。
AI.conclusion: MOT-CUP验证了COD与MOT中不确定性量化的重要性，首次通过不确定性传播实现了基于COD的MOT精度提升与不确定性降低。

authors_text: Yifu Ding,Haotong Qin,Qinghua Yan,Zhenhua Chai,Junjie Liu,Xiaolin Wei,Xianglong Liu
title: Towards Accurate Post-Training Quantization for Vision Transformer
title_zh: 实现 Vision Transformer 的准确训练后量化
comment: 9 pages, 5 figures, accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022
comments: 9 pages, 5 figures, accepted by ACM Multimedia 2022
abstract: Vision transformer emerges as a potential architecture for vision tasks. However, the intense computation and non-negligible delay hinder its application in the real world. As a widespread model compression technique, existing post-training quantization methods still cause severe performance drops. We find the main reasons lie in (1) the existing calibration metric is inaccurate in measuring the quantization influence for extremely low-bit representation, and (2) the existing quantization paradigm is unfriendly to the power-law distribution of Softmax. Based on these observations, we propose a novel Accurate Post-training Quantization framework for Vision Transformer, namely APQ-ViT. We first present a unified Bottom-elimination Blockwise Calibration scheme to optimize the calibration metric to perceive the overall quantization disturbance in a blockwise manner and prioritize the crucial quantization errors that influence more on the final output. Then, we design a Matthew-effect Preserving Quantization for Softmax to maintain the power-law character and keep the function of the attention mechanism. Comprehensive experiments on large-scale classification and detection datasets demonstrate that our APQ-ViT surpasses the existing post-training quantization methods by convincing margins, especially in lower bit-width settings (e.g., averagely up to 5.17% improvement for classification and 24.43% for detection on W4A4). We also highlight that APQ-ViT enjoys versatility and works well on diverse transformer variants.
summary: Vision transformer emerges as a potential architecture for vision tasks. However, the intense computation and non-negligible delay hinder its application in the real world. As a widespread model compression technique, existing post-training quantization methods still cause severe performance drops. We find the main reasons lie in (1) the existing calibration metric is inaccurate in measuring the quantization influence for extremely low-bit representation, and (2) the existing quantization paradigm is unfriendly to the power-law distribution of Softmax. Based on these observations, we propose a novel Accurate Post-training Quantization framework for Vision Transformer, namely APQ-ViT. We first present a unified Bottom-elimination Blockwise Calibration scheme to optimize the calibration metric to perceive the overall quantization disturbance in a blockwise manner and prioritize the crucial quantization errors that influence more on the final output. Then, we design a Matthew-effect Preserving Quantization for Softmax to maintain the power-law character and keep the function of the attention mechanism. Comprehensive experiments on large-scale classification and detection datasets demonstrate that our APQ-ViT surpasses the existing post-training quantization methods by convincing margins, especially in lower bit-width settings (e.g., averagely up to 5.17% improvement for classification and 24.43% for detection on W4A4). We also highlight that APQ-ViT enjoys versatility and works well on diverse transformer variants.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器成为视觉任务的潜在架构。然而，密集的计算和不可忽略的延迟阻碍了其在现实世界中的应用。作为一种广泛使用的模型压缩技术，现有的训练后量化方法仍然会导致严重的性能下降。我们发现主要原因在于（1）现有的校准度量在测量极低比特表示的量化影响方面不准确，（2）现有的量化范式对Softmax的幂律分布不友好。基于这些观察，我们提出了一种新颖的 Vision Transformer 精确训练后量化框架，即 APQ-ViT。我们首先提出了一种统一的底部消除分块校准方案，以优化校准度量，以分块方式感知整体量化干扰，并优先考虑对最终输出影响更大的关键量化误差。然后，我们为Softmax设计了马太效应保留量化，以保持幂律特征并保持注意力机制的功能。对大规模分类和检测数据集的综合实验表明，我们的 APQ-ViT 通过令人信服的裕度超越了现有的训练后量化方法，特别是在较低位宽设置中（例如，在 W4A4 上分类平均提高 5.17％，检测平均提高 24.43％）。我们还强调，APQ-ViT 具有多功能性，并且适用于各种变压器型号。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对视觉Transformer的准确后训练量化框架APQ-ViT，以解决现有量化方法在低比特表示和Softmax处理上的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有后训练量化方法在极低比特表示下校准指标不准确，且量化范式无法适应Softmax的幂律分布特性，导致视觉Transformer性能显著下降。
AI.method: 提出统一的块级校准方案优化量化扰动感知，并设计保留马太效应的Softmax量化方法，维持注意力机制功能。
AI.result: 在大规模分类和检测数据集上，APQ-ViT在W4A4等低比特设置下分别平均提升5.17%和24.43%，且适用于多种Transformer变体。
AI.conclusion: APQ-ViT通过改进校准机制与Softmax量化策略，有效缓解了视觉Transformer量化过程中的性能损失问题。

authors_text: Dusko Pavlovic,Temra Pavlovic
title: From Gödel's Incompleteness Theorem to the completeness of bot beliefs (Extended abstract)
title_zh: 从哥德尔不完备定理到机器人信念的完备性（扩展摘要）
comment: 19 pages, 13 figures; version updates: changed one word in the title, expanded Introduction, improved presentation, tidied up some diagrams
comments: 19 pages, 13 figures; version updates: changed one word in the title, expanded Introduction, improved presentation, tidied up some diagrams
abstract: Hilbert and Ackermann asked for a method to consistently extend incomplete theories to complete theories. Gödel essentially proved that any theory capable of encoding its own statements and their proofs contains statements that are true but not provable. Hilbert did not accept that Gödel's construction answered his question, and in his late writings and lectures, Gödel agreed that it did not, since theories can be completed incrementally, by adding axioms to prove ever more true statements, as science normally does, with completeness as the vanishing point. This pragmatic view of validity is familiar not only to scientists who conjecture test hypotheses but also to real estate agents and other dealers, who conjure claims, albeit invalid, as necessary to close a deal, confident that they will be able to conjure other claims, albeit invalid, sufficient to make the first claims valid. We study the underlying logical process and describe the trajectories leading to testable but unfalsifiable theories to which bots and other automated learners are likely to converge.
summary: Hilbert and Ackermann asked for a method to consistently extend incomplete theories to complete theories. Gödel essentially proved that any theory capable of encoding its own statements and their proofs contains statements that are true but not provable. Hilbert did not accept that Gödel's construction answered his question, and in his late writings and lectures, Gödel agreed that it did not, since theories can be completed incrementally, by adding axioms to prove ever more true statements, as science normally does, with completeness as the vanishing point. This pragmatic view of validity is familiar not only to scientists who conjecture test hypotheses but also to real estate agents and other dealers, who conjure claims, albeit invalid, as necessary to close a deal, confident that they will be able to conjure other claims, albeit invalid, sufficient to make the first claims valid. We study the underlying logical process and describe the trajectories leading to testable but unfalsifiable theories to which bots and other automated learners are likely to converge.
abstract_zh: 希尔伯特和阿克曼寻求一种方法来不断地将不完整的理论扩展到完整的理论。哥德尔本质上证明了任何能够编码自己的陈述及其证明的理论都包含真实但不可证明的陈述。希尔伯特并不接受哥德尔的构造回答了他的问题，在他后来的著作和讲座中，哥德尔也同意这一点，因为理论可以通过添加公理来证明更真实的陈述来逐步完成，就像科学通常所做的那样，以完整性为消失点。这种实用主义的有效性观点不仅为推测检验假设的科学家所熟悉，也为房地产经纪人和其他交易商所熟悉，他们在达成交易所必需的情况下提出主张，尽管无效，并相信他们能够提出其他主张，尽管无效，但足以使第一个主张有效。我们研究潜在的逻辑过程，并描述导致机器人和其他自动学习者可能收敛的可测试但不可证伪的理论的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文从哥德尔不完备定理出发，探讨了通过逐步添加公理完成理论的逻辑过程，并分析机器人等自动学习系统可能收敛于可测试但不可证伪的理论路径。
AI.motivation: 希尔伯特提出的理论完备性问题未被哥德尔定理完全解决，现实中人类通过增量假设构建理论的现象（如科学和商业实践）启发研究自动学习系统的类似行为。
AI.method: 通过逻辑分析和类比现实中的增量假设过程，描述从不完整理论到可测试但不可证伪理论的演化轨迹，结合自动学习系统的行为建模。
AI.result: 发现机器人等系统可能通过不断添加假设趋近于某种完备性，但最终形成的理论具有可测试性与不可证伪性的矛盾特征。
AI.conclusion: 哥德尔定理揭示的理论局限性可通过增量扩展部分克服，但自动学习系统可能陷入类似科学实践的‘实用主义完备性’困境，需警惕其逻辑边界。

authors_text: Reuben Kirkham
title: (Legal Design) Research through Litigation
title_zh: （法律设计）通过诉讼进行研究
comment: Workshop paper, to be presented at the CHI'23 Design x Policy Workshop
comments: Workshop paper, to be presented at the CHI'23 Design x Policy Workshop
abstract: This paper proposes the concept of 'research through litigation', where a HCI researcher would bring a claim in the legal system in order to understand judicial attitudes towards technologies. Based on my seven years of experience of bringing legal cases as a computer scientist in Tribunals, I demonstrate the value of this approach by presenting multiple case studies, which illustrate the counter-intuitive approach towards technology taken by Tribunals. This exercise surfaced some serious (and somewhat surreal) concerns with the operation of the justice system, as well as demonstrating how research through litigation changed the law on several occasions. This work therefore makes important methodological and practical contributions to the nascent topic of legal (interaction) design, especially from a methodological standpoint.
summary: This paper proposes the concept of 'research through litigation', where a HCI researcher would bring a claim in the legal system in order to understand judicial attitudes towards technologies. Based on my seven years of experience of bringing legal cases as a computer scientist in Tribunals, I demonstrate the value of this approach by presenting multiple case studies, which illustrate the counter-intuitive approach towards technology taken by Tribunals. This exercise surfaced some serious (and somewhat surreal) concerns with the operation of the justice system, as well as demonstrating how research through litigation changed the law on several occasions. This work therefore makes important methodological and practical contributions to the nascent topic of legal (interaction) design, especially from a methodological standpoint.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了“通过诉讼进行研究”的概念，人机交互研究人员将在法律体系中提出主张，以了解司法部门对技术的态度。根据我作为计算机科学家在法庭提起法律案件的七年经验，我通过展示多个案例研究来证明这种方法的价值，这些案例研究说明了法庭对技术采取的反直觉方法。这项工作暴露了对司法系统运作的一些严重（有些超现实）的担忧，并展示了通过诉讼进行的研究如何多次改变法律。因此，这项工作对法律（互动）设计这一新兴主题做出了重要的方法论和实践贡献，特别是从方法论的角度来看。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过诉讼研究司法对技术的态度，并展示其方法论和实践贡献。
AI.motivation: 现有司法系统对技术的处理存在不足，传统研究方法难以揭示司法态度，需通过诉讼实践进行深入探索。
AI.method: 基于作者七年的法庭诉讼经验，通过多个案例研究分析司法机构对技术的处理方式。
AI.result: 揭示了司法系统在处理技术问题中的问题，并在多个案例中推动了法律的改变。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为法律（交互）设计提供了重要的方法论和实践贡献，特别是在理解司法对技术的态度方面。

search_text: (Legal Design) Research through Litigation （法律设计）通过诉讼进行研究 This paper proposes the concept of 'research through litigation', where a HCI researcher would bring a claim in the legal system in order to understand judicial attitudes towards technologies. Based on my seven years of experience of bringing legal cases as a computer scientist in Tribunals, I demonstrate the value of this approach by presenting multiple case studies, which illustrate the counter-intuitive approach towards technology taken by Tribunals. This exercise surfaced some serious (and somewhat surreal) concerns with the operation of the justice system, as well as demonstrating how research through litigation changed the law on several occasions. This work therefore makes important methodological and practical contributions to the nascent topic of legal (interaction) design, especially from a methodological standpoint. 本文提出了“通过诉讼进行研究”的概念，人机交互研究人员将在法律体系中提出主张，以了解司法部门对技术的态度。根据我作为计算机科学家在法庭提起法律案件的七年经验，我通过展示多个案例研究来证明这种方法的价值，这些案例研究说明了法庭对技术采取的反直觉方法。这项工作暴露了对司法系统运作的一些严重（有些超现实）的担忧，并展示了通过诉讼进行的研究如何多次改变法律。因此，这项工作对法律（互动）设计这一新兴主题做出了重要的方法论和实践贡献，特别是从方法论的角度来看。 本文提出通过诉讼研究司法对技术的态度，并展示其方法论和实践贡献。 Reuben Kirkham cs.HC

authors_text: Guojin Chen,Haoyu Yang,Bei Yu
title: GPU-accelerated Matrix Cover Algorithm for Multiple Patterning Layout Decomposition
title_zh: 用于多重图案布局分解的 GPU 加速矩阵覆盖算法
abstract: Multiple patterning lithography (MPL) is regarded as one of the most promising ways of overcoming the resolution limitations of conventional optical lithography due to the delay of next-generation lithography technology. As the feature size continues to decrease, layout decomposition for multiple patterning lithography (MPLD) technology is becoming increasingly crucial for improving the manufacturability in advanced nodes. The decomposition process refers to assigning the layout features to different mask layers according to the design rules and density requirements. When the number of masks $k \geq 3$, the MPLD problems are NP-hard and thus may suffer from runtime overhead for practical designs. However, the number of layout patterns is increasing exponentially in industrial layouts, which hinders the runtime performance of MPLD models. In this research, we substitute the CPU's dance link data structure with parallel GPU matrix operations to accelerate the solution for exact cover-based MPLD algorithms. Experimental results demonstrate that our system is capable of full-scale, lightning-fast layout decomposition, which can achieve more than 10$\times$ speed-up without quality degradation compared to state-of-the-art layout decomposition methods.
summary: Multiple patterning lithography (MPL) is regarded as one of the most promising ways of overcoming the resolution limitations of conventional optical lithography due to the delay of next-generation lithography technology. As the feature size continues to decrease, layout decomposition for multiple patterning lithography (MPLD) technology is becoming increasingly crucial for improving the manufacturability in advanced nodes. The decomposition process refers to assigning the layout features to different mask layers according to the design rules and density requirements. When the number of masks $k \geq 3$, the MPLD problems are NP-hard and thus may suffer from runtime overhead for practical designs. However, the number of layout patterns is increasing exponentially in industrial layouts, which hinders the runtime performance of MPLD models. In this research, we substitute the CPU's dance link data structure with parallel GPU matrix operations to accelerate the solution for exact cover-based MPLD algorithms. Experimental results demonstrate that our system is capable of full-scale, lightning-fast layout decomposition, which can achieve more than 10$\times$ speed-up without quality degradation compared to state-of-the-art layout decomposition methods.
abstract_zh: 由于下一代光刻技术的延迟，多重图案光刻（MPL）被认为是克服传统光学光刻分辨率限制的最有前途的方法之一。随着特征尺寸不断减小，多重图案光刻 (MPLD) 技术的布局分解对于提高先进节点的可制造性变得越来越重要。分解过程是指根据设计规则和密度要求，将版图特征分配到不同的掩模层。当掩码数量 $k \geq 3$ 时，MPLD 问题是 NP 困难的，因此可能会遭受实际设计的运行时开销。然而，工业布局中布局模式的数量呈指数级增长，这阻碍了MPLD模型的运行时性能。在本研究中，我们用并行 GPU 矩阵运算替代 CPU 的舞蹈链接数据结构，以加速基于精确覆盖的 MPLD 算法的求解。实验结果表明，我们的系统能够进行全面、快如闪电的布局分解，与最先进的布局分解方法相比，可以在不降低质量的情况下实现超过 10 倍的加速。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GPU加速的矩阵覆盖算法，用于改进多图案光刻布局分解的效率。
AI.motivation: 随着特征尺寸缩小，多图案光刻布局分解（MPLD）的计算复杂度显著增加，传统CPU方法在处理大规模工业布局时面临运行时过长的问题。
AI.method: 将CPU中的舞蹈链数据结构替换为GPU并行矩阵运算，加速基于精确覆盖的MPLD算法求解过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持分解质量的前提下，相比现有方法实现了超过10倍的加速效果。
AI.conclusion: GPU加速方案有效解决了MPLD的计算瓶颈，为先进制程的大规模布局分解提供了可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Kyle Lo,Joseph Chee Chang,Andrew Head,Jonathan Bragg,Amy X. Zhang,Cassidy Trier,Chloe Anastasiades,Tal August,Russell Authur,Danielle Bragg,Erin Bransom,Isabel Cachola,Stefan Candra,Yoganand Chandrasekhar,Yen-Sung Chen,Evie Yu-Yen Cheng,Yvonne Chou,Doug Downey,Rob Evans,Raymond Fok,Fangzhou Hu,Regan Huff,Dongyeop Kang,Tae Soo Kim,Rodney Kinney, et al.
