authors_text: Hongyi Chen,Changliu Liu
title: Safe and Sample-efficient Reinforcement Learning for Clustered Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 适用于集群动态环境的安全且样本高效的强化学习
abstract: This study proposes a safe and sample-efficient reinforcement learning (RL) framework to address two major challenges in developing applicable RL algorithms: satisfying safety constraints and efficiently learning with limited samples. To guarantee safety in real-world complex environments, we use the safe set algorithm (SSA) to monitor and modify the nominal controls, and evaluate SSA+RL in a clustered dynamic environment which is challenging to be solved by existing RL algorithms. However, the SSA+RL framework is usually not sample-efficient especially in reward-sparse environments, which has not been addressed in previous safe RL works. To improve the learning efficiency, we propose three techniques: (1) avoiding behaving overly conservative by adapting the SSA; (2) encouraging safe exploration using random network distillation with safety constraints; (3) improving policy convergence by treating SSA as expert demonstrations and directly learn from that. The experimental results show that our framework can achieve better safety performance compare to other safe RL methods during training and solve the task with substantially fewer episodes. Project website: https://hychen-naza.github.io/projects/Safe_RL/.
summary: This study proposes a safe and sample-efficient reinforcement learning (RL) framework to address two major challenges in developing applicable RL algorithms: satisfying safety constraints and efficiently learning with limited samples. To guarantee safety in real-world complex environments, we use the safe set algorithm (SSA) to monitor and modify the nominal controls, and evaluate SSA+RL in a clustered dynamic environment which is challenging to be solved by existing RL algorithms. However, the SSA+RL framework is usually not sample-efficient especially in reward-sparse environments, which has not been addressed in previous safe RL works. To improve the learning efficiency, we propose three techniques: (1) avoiding behaving overly conservative by adapting the SSA; (2) encouraging safe exploration using random network distillation with safety constraints; (3) improving policy convergence by treating SSA as expert demonstrations and directly learn from that. The experimental results show that our framework can achieve better safety performance compare to other safe RL methods during training and solve the task with substantially fewer episodes. Project website: https://hychen-naza.github.io/projects/Safe_RL/.
abstract_zh: 本研究提出了一种安全且样本高效的强化学习 (RL) 框架，以解决开发适用的 RL 算法的两大挑战：满足安全约束和利用有限样本进行高效学习。为了保证现实复杂环境中的安全性，我们使用安全集算法（SSA）来监控和修改名义控制，并在集群动态环境中评估SSA+RL，这是现有强化学习算法难以解决的。然而，SSA+RL 框架通常样本效率不高，尤其是在奖励稀疏的环境中，这一点在之前的安全 RL 工作中尚未得到解决。为了提高学习效率，我们提出了三种技术：（1）通过调整SSA来避免表现过于保守； （2）鼓励使用具有安全约束的随机网络蒸馏进行安全勘探； （3）将SSA作为专家示范，直接借鉴，提高政策衔接性。实验结果表明，与其他安全强化学习方法相比，我们的框架在训练过程中可以实现更好的安全性能，并以更少的次数来解决任务。项目网站：https://hychen-naza.github.io/projects/Safe_RL/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种安全且样本高效的强化学习框架，用于解决复杂动态环境中的安全约束和样本效率问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法在现实复杂环境中难以同时满足安全约束和高效学习需求，尤其在样本稀缺的环境中表现不足。
AI.method: 通过改进安全集算法（SSA）适应性、结合安全约束的随机网络蒸馏技术以及将SSA视为专家示范直接学习，提升安全性和样本效率。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在训练过程中安全性能优于其他方法，并能以更少的训练回合完成任务。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效平衡了安全性与样本效率，在动态环境中表现出优于现有安全强化学习方法的性能。

search_text: Safe and Sample-efficient Reinforcement Learning for Clustered Dynamic Environments 适用于集群动态环境的安全且样本高效的强化学习 This study proposes a safe and sample-efficient reinforcement learning (RL) framework to address two major challenges in developing applicable RL algorithms: satisfying safety constraints and efficiently learning with limited samples. To guarantee safety in real-world complex environments, we use the safe set algorithm (SSA) to monitor and modify the nominal controls, and evaluate SSA+RL in a clustered dynamic environment which is challenging to be solved by existing RL algorithms. However, the SSA+RL framework is usually not sample-efficient especially in reward-sparse environments, which has not been addressed in previous safe RL works. To improve the learning efficiency, we propose three techniques: (1) avoiding behaving overly conservative by adapting the SSA; (2) encouraging safe exploration using random network distillation with safety constraints; (3) improving policy convergence by treating SSA as expert demonstrations and directly learn from that. The experimental results show that our framework can achieve better safety performance compare to other safe RL methods during training and solve the task with substantially fewer episodes. Project website: https://hychen-naza.github.io/projects/Safe_RL/. 本研究提出了一种安全且样本高效的强化学习 (RL) 框架，以解决开发适用的 RL 算法的两大挑战：满足安全约束和利用有限样本进行高效学习。为了保证现实复杂环境中的安全性，我们使用安全集算法（SSA）来监控和修改名义控制，并在集群动态环境中评估SSA+RL，这是现有强化学习算法难以解决的。然而，SSA+RL 框架通常样本效率不高，尤其是在奖励稀疏的环境中，这一点在之前的安全 RL 工作中尚未得到解决。为了提高学习效率，我们提出了三种技术：（1）通过调整SSA来避免表现过于保守； （2）鼓励使用具有安全约束的随机网络蒸馏进行安全勘探； （3）将SSA作为专家示范，直接借鉴，提高政策衔接性。实验结果表明，与其他安全强化学习方法相比，我们的框架在训练过程中可以实现更好的安全性能，并以更少的次数来解决任务。项目网站：https://hychen-naza.github.io/projects/Safe_RL/。 本文提出了一种安全且样本高效的强化学习框架，用于解决复杂动态环境中的安全约束和样本效率问题。 Hongyi Chen,Changliu Liu cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: James Mullen,Dinesh Manocha
title: PACE: Data-Driven Virtual Agent Interaction in Dense and Cluttered Environments
title_zh: PACE：密集和杂乱环境中数据驱动的虚拟代理交互
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics 29.5 (2023) 2536-2546
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics 29.5 (2023) 2536-2546
abstract: We present PACE, a novel method for modifying motion-captured virtual agents to interact with and move throughout dense, cluttered 3D scenes. Our approach changes a given motion sequence of a virtual agent as needed to adjust to the obstacles and objects in the environment. We first take the individual frames of the motion sequence most important for modeling interactions with the scene and pair them with the relevant scene geometry, obstacles, and semantics such that interactions in the agents motion match the affordances of the scene (e.g., standing on a floor or sitting in a chair). We then optimize the motion of the human by directly altering the high-DOF pose at each frame in the motion to better account for the unique geometric constraints of the scene. Our formulation uses novel loss functions that maintain a realistic flow and natural-looking motion. We compare our method with prior motion generating techniques and highlight the benefits of our method with a perceptual study and physical plausibility metrics. Human raters preferred our method over the prior approaches. Specifically, they preferred our method 57.1% of the time versus the state-of-the-art method using existing motions, and 81.0% of the time versus a state-of-the-art motion synthesis method. Additionally, our method performs significantly higher on established physical plausibility and interaction metrics. Specifically, we outperform competing methods by over 1.2% in terms of the non-collision metric and by over 18% in terms of the contact metric. We have integrated our interactive system with Microsoft HoloLens and demonstrate its benefits in real-world indoor scenes. Our project website is available at https://gamma.umd.edu/pace/.
summary: We present PACE, a novel method for modifying motion-captured virtual agents to interact with and move throughout dense, cluttered 3D scenes. Our approach changes a given motion sequence of a virtual agent as needed to adjust to the obstacles and objects in the environment. We first take the individual frames of the motion sequence most important for modeling interactions with the scene and pair them with the relevant scene geometry, obstacles, and semantics such that interactions in the agents motion match the affordances of the scene (e.g., standing on a floor or sitting in a chair). We then optimize the motion of the human by directly altering the high-DOF pose at each frame in the motion to better account for the unique geometric constraints of the scene. Our formulation uses novel loss functions that maintain a realistic flow and natural-looking motion. We compare our method with prior motion generating techniques and highlight the benefits of our method with a perceptual study and physical plausibility metrics. Human raters preferred our method over the prior approaches. Specifically, they preferred our method 57.1% of the time versus the state-of-the-art method using existing motions, and 81.0% of the time versus a state-of-the-art motion synthesis method. Additionally, our method performs significantly higher on established physical plausibility and interaction metrics. Specifically, we outperform competing methods by over 1.2% in terms of the non-collision metric and by over 18% in terms of the contact metric. We have integrated our interactive system with Microsoft HoloLens and demonstrate its benefits in real-world indoor scenes. Our project website is available at https://gamma.umd.edu/pace/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PACE，这是一种修改动作捕捉虚拟代理的新颖方法，以便与密集、杂乱的 3D 场景进行交互并在其中移动。我们的方法根据需要改变虚拟代理的给定运动序列，以适应环境中的障碍物和物体。我们首先采用对于建模与场景交互最重要的运动序列的各个帧，并将它们与相关的场景几何形状、障碍物和语义配对，以便代理运动中的交互与场景的可供性相匹配（例如，站在地板上或坐在椅子上）。然后，我们通过直接改变运动中每一帧的高自由度姿势来优化人体运动，以更好地考虑场景的独特几何约束。我们的公式使用新颖的损失函数来保持真实的流动和自然的运动。我们将我们的方法与先前的运动生成技术进行比较，并通过感知研究和物理合理性指标强调我们的方法的优点。与之前的方法相比，人类评估者更喜欢我们的方法。具体来说，与使用现有运动的最先进方法相比，他们在 57.1% 的时间里更喜欢我们的方法，在与最先进的运动合成方法相比，他们在 81.0% 的时间里更喜欢我们的方法。此外，我们的方法在已建立的物理合理性和交互指标上表现明显更高。具体来说，我们在非碰撞指标方面优于竞争方法 1.2% 以上，在接触指标方面优于竞争方法 18% 以上。我们将我们的交互系统与 Microsoft HoloLens 集成，并在真实的室内场景中展示了其优势。我们的项目网站位于 https://gamma.umd.edu/pace/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PACE方法，通过调整动作捕捉数据使虚拟代理在密集杂乱的3D环境中实现更真实的交互。
AI.motivation: 现有虚拟代理交互方法难以适应复杂场景中的几何约束，导致动作不自然或与环境不匹配。
AI.method: 提取关键动作帧并结合场景几何信息，通过优化高自由度姿态和设计新颖损失函数实现动作调整。
AI.result: 人类评估显示优于现有方法（57.1%和81.0%偏好率），物理合理性指标提升超1.2%和18%。
AI.conclusion: PACE有效提升了虚拟代理在复杂环境中的动作真实性和交互合理性，已集成到HoloLens实现场景验证。

authors_text: Xiyuan Zhang,Ranak Roy Chowdhury,Jingbo Shang,Rajesh Gupta,Dezhi Hong
title: Towards Diverse and Coherent Augmentation for Time-Series Forecasting
title_zh: 实现时间序列预测的多样化和一致的增强
abstract: Time-series data augmentation mitigates the issue of insufficient training data for deep learning models. Yet, existing augmentation methods are mainly designed for classification, where class labels can be preserved even if augmentation alters the temporal dynamics. We note that augmentation designed for forecasting requires diversity as well as coherence with the original temporal dynamics. As time-series data generated by real-life physical processes exhibit characteristics in both the time and frequency domains, we propose to combine Spectral and Time Augmentation (STAug) for generating more diverse and coherent samples. Specifically, in the frequency domain, we use the Empirical Mode Decomposition to decompose a time series and reassemble the subcomponents with random weights. This way, we generate diverse samples while being coherent with the original temporal relationships as they contain the same set of base components. In the time domain, we adapt a mix-up strategy that generates diverse as well as linearly in-between coherent samples. Experiments on five real-world time-series datasets demonstrate that STAug outperforms the base models without data augmentation as well as state-of-the-art augmentation methods.
summary: Time-series data augmentation mitigates the issue of insufficient training data for deep learning models. Yet, existing augmentation methods are mainly designed for classification, where class labels can be preserved even if augmentation alters the temporal dynamics. We note that augmentation designed for forecasting requires diversity as well as coherence with the original temporal dynamics. As time-series data generated by real-life physical processes exhibit characteristics in both the time and frequency domains, we propose to combine Spectral and Time Augmentation (STAug) for generating more diverse and coherent samples. Specifically, in the frequency domain, we use the Empirical Mode Decomposition to decompose a time series and reassemble the subcomponents with random weights. This way, we generate diverse samples while being coherent with the original temporal relationships as they contain the same set of base components. In the time domain, we adapt a mix-up strategy that generates diverse as well as linearly in-between coherent samples. Experiments on five real-world time-series datasets demonstrate that STAug outperforms the base models without data augmentation as well as state-of-the-art augmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 时间序列数据增强缓解了深度学习模型训练数据不足的问题。然而，现有的增强方法主要是为分类而设计的，即使增强改变了时间动态，也可以保留类标签。我们注意到，为预测而设计的增强需要多样性以及与原始时间动态的一致性。由于现实生活中的物理过程生成的时间序列数据在时域和频域中都表现出特征，我们建议结合频谱和时间增强（STAug）来生成更加多样化和相干的样本。具体来说，在频域中，我们使用经验模式分解来分解时间序列并使用随机权重重新组合子分量。这样，我们生成了不同的样本，同时与原始时间关系保持一致，因为它们包含相同的一组基本组件。在时域中，我们采用混合策略来生成不同的以及线性的相干样本。对五个真实世界时间序列数据集的实验表明，STAug 优于没有数据增强的基本模型以及最先进的增强方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合时频域增强的STAug方法，用于生成多样化且与原始时间序列动态一致的样本，以提升时间序列预测模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法多针对分类任务设计，无法同时满足时间序列预测对样本多样性与时间动态一致性的双重需求，而物理过程生成的时间序列具有时频域双重特性。
AI.method: 在频域采用经验模态分解重构子成分，在时域适配混合策略生成线性中间样本，通过随机权重重组与时间混合实现多样性与一致性的平衡。
AI.result: 在五个真实数据集上的实验表明，STAug优于无增强基线模型及现有最先进增强方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: STAug通过融合时频域增强机制，为时间序列预测提供了更优的数据增强方案，证明了兼顾多样性与动态一致性的必要性。

search_text: Towards Diverse and Coherent Augmentation for Time-Series Forecasting 实现时间序列预测的多样化和一致的增强 Time-series data augmentation mitigates the issue of insufficient training data for deep learning models. Yet, existing augmentation methods are mainly designed for classification, where class labels can be preserved even if augmentation alters the temporal dynamics. We note that augmentation designed for forecasting requires diversity as well as coherence with the original temporal dynamics. As time-series data generated by real-life physical processes exhibit characteristics in both the time and frequency domains, we propose to combine Spectral and Time Augmentation (STAug) for generating more diverse and coherent samples. Specifically, in the frequency domain, we use the Empirical Mode Decomposition to decompose a time series and reassemble the subcomponents with random weights. This way, we generate diverse samples while being coherent with the original temporal relationships as they contain the same set of base components. In the time domain, we adapt a mix-up strategy that generates diverse as well as linearly in-between coherent samples. Experiments on five real-world time-series datasets demonstrate that STAug outperforms the base models without data augmentation as well as state-of-the-art augmentation methods. 时间序列数据增强缓解了深度学习模型训练数据不足的问题。然而，现有的增强方法主要是为分类而设计的，即使增强改变了时间动态，也可以保留类标签。我们注意到，为预测而设计的增强需要多样性以及与原始时间动态的一致性。由于现实生活中的物理过程生成的时间序列数据在时域和频域中都表现出特征，我们建议结合频谱和时间增强（STAug）来生成更加多样化和相干的样本。具体来说，在频域中，我们使用经验模式分解来分解时间序列并使用随机权重重新组合子分量。这样，我们生成了不同的样本，同时与原始时间关系保持一致，因为它们包含相同的一组基本组件。在时域中，我们采用混合策略来生成不同的以及线性的相干样本。对五个真实世界时间序列数据集的实验表明，STAug 优于没有数据增强的基本模型以及最先进的增强方法。 本文提出了一种结合时频域增强的STAug方法，用于生成多样化且与原始时间序列动态一致的样本，以提升时间序列预测模型的性能。 Xiyuan Zhang,Ranak Roy Chowdhury,Jingbo Shang,Rajesh Gupta,Dezhi Hong cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Bruno Arcanjo,Bruno Ferrarini,Michael Milford,Klaus D. McDonald-Maier,Shoaib Ehsan
title: A-MuSIC: An Adaptive Ensemble System For Visual Place Recognition In Changing Environments
title_zh: A-MuSIC：一种自适应集成系统，用于在不断变化的环境中进行视觉位置识别
abstract: Visual place recognition (VPR) is an essential component of robot navigation and localization systems that allows them to identify a place using only image data. VPR is challenging due to the significant changes in a place's appearance under different illumination throughout the day, with seasonal weather and when observed from different viewpoints. Currently, no single VPR technique excels in every environmental condition, each exhibiting unique benefits and shortcomings. As a result, VPR systems combining multiple techniques achieve more reliable VPR performance in changing environments, at the cost of higher computational loads. Addressing this shortcoming, we propose an adaptive VPR system dubbed Adaptive Multi-Self Identification and Correction (A-MuSIC). We start by developing a method to collect information of the runtime performance of a VPR technique by analysing the frame-to-frame continuity of matched queries. We then demonstrate how to operate the method on a static ensemble of techniques, generating data on which techniques are contributing the most for the current environment. A-MuSIC uses the collected information to both select a minimal subset of techniques and to decide when a re-selection is required during navigation. A-MuSIC matches or beats state-of-the-art VPR performance across all tested benchmark datasets while maintaining its computational load on par with individual techniques.
summary: Visual place recognition (VPR) is an essential component of robot navigation and localization systems that allows them to identify a place using only image data. VPR is challenging due to the significant changes in a place's appearance under different illumination throughout the day, with seasonal weather and when observed from different viewpoints. Currently, no single VPR technique excels in every environmental condition, each exhibiting unique benefits and shortcomings. As a result, VPR systems combining multiple techniques achieve more reliable VPR performance in changing environments, at the cost of higher computational loads. Addressing this shortcoming, we propose an adaptive VPR system dubbed Adaptive Multi-Self Identification and Correction (A-MuSIC). We start by developing a method to collect information of the runtime performance of a VPR technique by analysing the frame-to-frame continuity of matched queries. We then demonstrate how to operate the method on a static ensemble of techniques, generating data on which techniques are contributing the most for the current environment. A-MuSIC uses the collected information to both select a minimal subset of techniques and to decide when a re-selection is required during navigation. A-MuSIC matches or beats state-of-the-art VPR performance across all tested benchmark datasets while maintaining its computational load on par with individual techniques.
abstract_zh: 视觉地点识别 (VPR) 是机器人导航和定位系统的重要组成部分，使机器人能够仅使用图像数据来识别地点。 VPR 具有挑战性，因为在全天不同光照、季节性天气以及从不同角度观察时，一个地方的外观会发生显着变化。目前，没有一种 VPR 技术能够在所有环境条件下表现出色，每种技术都表现出独特的优点和缺点。因此，结合多种技术的 VPR 系统在不断变化的环境中实现了更可靠的 VPR 性能，但代价是更高的计算负载。针对这一缺点，我们提出了一种称为自适应多重自识别和校正（A-MuSIC）的自适应 VPR 系统。我们首先开发一种方法，通过分析匹配查询的帧到帧连续性来收集 VPR 技术的运行时性能信息。然后，我们演示如何在静态技术集合上操作该方法，生成有关哪些技术对当前环境贡献最大的数据。 A-MuSIC 使用收集到的信息来选择技术的最小子集并决定在导航期间何时需要重新选择。 A-MuSIC 在所有测试的基准数据集上匹配或超越最先进的 VPR 性能，同时保持其计算负载与单独技术相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应集成系统A-MuSIC，用于在变化环境中实现更可靠的视觉地点识别。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉地点识别技术在不同环境条件下表现各异，单一方法难以应对光照、天气和视角变化，而集成方法虽性能更优但计算负载较高。
AI.method: 通过分析帧间匹配连续性评估运行时性能，动态选择最优技术子集并决定何时重新选择，实现计算负载与性能的平衡。
AI.result: A-MuSIC在所有测试基准数据集上匹配或超越现有最先进方法的性能，同时保持与单个技术相当的计算负载。
AI.conclusion: 自适应集成方法能有效应对环境变化，在保证识别精度的同时降低计算开销，为机器人导航提供可靠解决方案。

authors_text: Heng Yu,Joel Julin,Zoltan A. Milacski,Koichiro Niinuma,Laszlo A. Jeni
title: DyLiN: Making Light Field Networks Dynamic
title_zh: DyLiN：使光场网络充满活力
abstract: Light Field Networks, the re-formulations of radiance fields to oriented rays, are magnitudes faster than their coordinate network counterparts, and provide higher fidelity with respect to representing 3D structures from 2D observations. They would be well suited for generic scene representation and manipulation, but suffer from one problem: they are limited to holistic and static scenes. In this paper, we propose the Dynamic Light Field Network (DyLiN) method that can handle non-rigid deformations, including topological changes. We learn a deformation field from input rays to canonical rays, and lift them into a higher dimensional space to handle discontinuities. We further introduce CoDyLiN, which augments DyLiN with controllable attribute inputs. We train both models via knowledge distillation from pretrained dynamic radiance fields. We evaluated DyLiN using both synthetic and real world datasets that include various non-rigid deformations. DyLiN qualitatively outperformed and quantitatively matched state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual fidelity, while being 25 - 71x computationally faster. We also tested CoDyLiN on attribute annotated data and it surpassed its teacher model. Project page: https://dylin2023.github.io .
summary: Light Field Networks, the re-formulations of radiance fields to oriented rays, are magnitudes faster than their coordinate network counterparts, and provide higher fidelity with respect to representing 3D structures from 2D observations. They would be well suited for generic scene representation and manipulation, but suffer from one problem: they are limited to holistic and static scenes. In this paper, we propose the Dynamic Light Field Network (DyLiN) method that can handle non-rigid deformations, including topological changes. We learn a deformation field from input rays to canonical rays, and lift them into a higher dimensional space to handle discontinuities. We further introduce CoDyLiN, which augments DyLiN with controllable attribute inputs. We train both models via knowledge distillation from pretrained dynamic radiance fields. We evaluated DyLiN using both synthetic and real world datasets that include various non-rigid deformations. DyLiN qualitatively outperformed and quantitatively matched state-of-the-art methods in terms of visual fidelity, while being 25 - 71x computationally faster. We also tested CoDyLiN on attribute annotated data and it surpassed its teacher model. Project page: https://dylin2023.github.io .
abstract_zh: 光场网络是将辐射场重新表述为定向光线，其速度比对应的坐标网络快很多，并且在从 2D 观测中表示 3D 结构方面提供了更高的保真度。它们非常适合通用场景表示和操作，但存在一个问题：它们仅限于整体和静态场景。在本文中，我们提出了动态光场网络（DyLiN）方法，可以处理非刚性变形，包括拓扑变化。我们学习从输入射线到规范射线的变形场，并将它们提升到更高维度的空间来处理不连续性。我们进一步引入 CoDyLiN，它通过可控属性输入增强了 DyLiN。我们通过预先训练的动态辐射场的知识蒸馏来训练这两个模型。我们使用包含各种非刚性变形的合成数据集和现实世界数据集评估了 DyLiN。 DyLiN 在视觉保真度方面在质量上优于并在数量上匹配最先进的方法，同时计算速度提高了 25 - 71 倍。我们还在属性注释数据上测试了 CoDyLiN，它超越了其教师模型。项目页面：https://dylin2023.github.io。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态光场网络DyLiN和可控版本CoDyLiN，用于处理非刚性变形和拓扑变化的动态场景表示。
AI.motivation: 传统光场网络受限于静态场景，无法处理动态变形，需开发能适应非刚性变化的动态光场网络以提升场景表示能力。
AI.method: 通过从输入光线学习到规范光线的变形场，并映射到高维空间处理不连续性；引入可控属性输入的CoDyLiN，采用知识蒸馏训练方法。
AI.result: DyLiN在视觉保真度上超越现有方法且计算速度提升25-71倍，CoDyLiN在标注数据上超越教师模型。
AI.conclusion: DyLiN有效解决了动态场景建模问题，CoDyLiN增强了可控性，为动态场景处理提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Ruo Yang,Binghui Wang,Mustafa Bilgic
title: IDGI: A Framework to Eliminate Explanation Noise from Integrated Gradients
title_zh: IDGI：消除积分梯度解释噪声的框架
abstract: Integrated Gradients (IG) as well as its variants are well-known techniques for interpreting the decisions of deep neural networks. While IG-based approaches attain state-of-the-art performance, they often integrate noise into their explanation saliency maps, which reduce their interpretability. To minimize the noise, we examine the source of the noise analytically and propose a new approach to reduce the explanation noise based on our analytical findings. We propose the Important Direction Gradient Integration (IDGI) framework, which can be easily incorporated into any IG-based method that uses the Reimann Integration for integrated gradient computation. Extensive experiments with three IG-based methods show that IDGI improves them drastically on numerous interpretability metrics.
summary: Integrated Gradients (IG) as well as its variants are well-known techniques for interpreting the decisions of deep neural networks. While IG-based approaches attain state-of-the-art performance, they often integrate noise into their explanation saliency maps, which reduce their interpretability. To minimize the noise, we examine the source of the noise analytically and propose a new approach to reduce the explanation noise based on our analytical findings. We propose the Important Direction Gradient Integration (IDGI) framework, which can be easily incorporated into any IG-based method that uses the Reimann Integration for integrated gradient computation. Extensive experiments with three IG-based methods show that IDGI improves them drastically on numerous interpretability metrics.
abstract_zh: 积分梯度（IG）及其变体是解释深度神经网络决策的众所周知的技术。虽然基于 IG 的方法获得了最先进的性能，但它们经常将噪声集成到其解释显着性图中，从而降低了其可解释性。为了最大限度地减少噪音，我们分析性地检查了噪音的来源，并根据我们的分析结果提出了一种减少解释噪音的新方法。我们提出了重要方向梯度积分 (IDGI) 框架，该框架可以轻松合并到任何使用 Reimann 积分进行积分梯度计算的基于 IG 的方法中。对三种基于 IG 的方法进行的广泛实验表明，IDGI 在许多可解释性指标上极大地改进了它们。

AI.tldr: 提出IDGI框架以消除集成梯度（IG）解释中的噪声，提升深度神经网络决策的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有IG方法在生成解释时引入噪声，影响模型可解释性，需减少噪声以提高解释质量。
AI.method: 通过分析噪声来源，提出IDGI框架，基于黎曼积分改进梯度整合过程，适用于各类IG方法。
AI.result: 实验表明IDGI在多个可解释性指标上显著提升三种IG方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: IDGI有效减少解释噪声，提升模型可解释性，为IG方法提供通用改进框架。

authors_text: Wenwen Zhang,Xinyu Xiao,Hangguan Shan,Eryun Liu
title: Adaptive Base-class Suppression and Prior Guidance Network for One-Shot Object Detection
title_zh: 用于单次目标检测的自适应基类抑制和先验引导网络
abstract: One-shot object detection (OSOD) aims to detect all object instances towards the given category specified by a query image. Most existing studies in OSOD endeavor to explore effective cross-image correlation and alleviate the semantic feature misalignment, however, ignoring the phenomenon of the model bias towards the base classes and the generalization degradation on the novel classes. Observing this, we propose a novel framework, namely Base-class Suppression and Prior Guidance (BSPG) network to overcome the problem. Specifically, the objects of base categories can be explicitly detected by a base-class predictor and adaptively eliminated by our base-class suppression module. Moreover, a prior guidance module is designed to calculate the correlation of high-level features in a non-parametric manner, producing a class-agnostic prior map to provide the target features with rich semantic cues and guide the subsequent detection process. Equipped with the proposed two modules, we endow the model with a strong discriminative ability to distinguish the target objects from distractors belonging to the base classes. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms the previous techniques by a large margin and achieves new state-of-the-art performance under various evaluation settings.
summary: One-shot object detection (OSOD) aims to detect all object instances towards the given category specified by a query image. Most existing studies in OSOD endeavor to explore effective cross-image correlation and alleviate the semantic feature misalignment, however, ignoring the phenomenon of the model bias towards the base classes and the generalization degradation on the novel classes. Observing this, we propose a novel framework, namely Base-class Suppression and Prior Guidance (BSPG) network to overcome the problem. Specifically, the objects of base categories can be explicitly detected by a base-class predictor and adaptively eliminated by our base-class suppression module. Moreover, a prior guidance module is designed to calculate the correlation of high-level features in a non-parametric manner, producing a class-agnostic prior map to provide the target features with rich semantic cues and guide the subsequent detection process. Equipped with the proposed two modules, we endow the model with a strong discriminative ability to distinguish the target objects from distractors belonging to the base classes. Extensive experiments show that our method outperforms the previous techniques by a large margin and achieves new state-of-the-art performance under various evaluation settings.
abstract_zh: 一次性对象检测（OSOD）旨在检测查询图像指定的给定类别的所有对象实例。 OSOD 的大多数现有研究都致力于探索有效的跨图像相关性并减轻语义特征错位，然而，忽略了模型偏向基类和新类的泛化退化的现象。观察到这一点，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，即基类抑制和先验指导（BSPG）网络来克服这个问题。具体来说，基类别的对象可以由基类预测器显式检测，并由我们的基类抑制模块自适应消除。此外，设计先验指导模块以非参数方式计算高级特征的相关性，生成与类别无关的先验图，为目标特征提供丰富的语义线索并指导后续的检测过程。配备了所提出的两个模块，我们赋予模型强大的区分能力，以区分目标对象和属于基类的干扰物。大量的实验表明，我们的方法大大优于以前的技术，并在各种评估设置下实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于单次学习目标检测（OSOD）的自适应基类抑制与先验引导网络（BSPG），以解决模型对基类的偏好和新类泛化能力下降的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有OSOD方法侧重于跨图像相关性和语义特征对齐，但忽略了模型对基类的偏差及新类泛化性能退化的问题，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计BSPG框架，包含基类抑制模块（显式检测并自适应消除基类目标）和先验引导模块（通过非参数化高层特征相关性生成类无关先验图，提供语义线索指导检测）。
AI.result: 在多种评估设置下，该方法显著优于现有技术，达到新的最先进水平（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: BSPG通过抑制基类干扰和引入先验引导，有效提升了模型对目标对象的判别能力，解决了OSOD中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Rafael Pina,Varuna De Silva,Corentin Artaud
title: Causality Detection for Efficient Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 高效多智能体强化学习的因果关系检测
abstract: When learning a task as a team, some agents in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) may fail to understand their true impact in the performance of the team. Such agents end up learning sub-optimal policies, demonstrating undesired lazy behaviours. To investigate this problem, we start by formalising the use of temporal causality applied to MARL problems. We then show how causality can be used to penalise such lazy agents and improve their behaviours. By understanding how their local observations are causally related to the team reward, each agent in the team can adjust their individual credit based on whether they helped to cause the reward or not. We show empirically that using causality estimations in MARL improves not only the holistic performance of the team, but also the individual capabilities of each agent. We observe that the improvements are consistent in a set of different environments.
summary: When learning a task as a team, some agents in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) may fail to understand their true impact in the performance of the team. Such agents end up learning sub-optimal policies, demonstrating undesired lazy behaviours. To investigate this problem, we start by formalising the use of temporal causality applied to MARL problems. We then show how causality can be used to penalise such lazy agents and improve their behaviours. By understanding how their local observations are causally related to the team reward, each agent in the team can adjust their individual credit based on whether they helped to cause the reward or not. We show empirically that using causality estimations in MARL improves not only the holistic performance of the team, but also the individual capabilities of each agent. We observe that the improvements are consistent in a set of different environments.
abstract_zh: 当作为一个团队学习任务时，多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的一些智能体可能无法理解它们对团队绩效的真正影响。这些代理最终会学习次优策略，表现出不受欢迎的懒惰行为。为了研究这个问题，我们首先将时间因果关系应用于 MARL 问题的形式化。然后，我们展示了如何使用因果关系来惩罚这些懒惰的代理人并改善他们的行为。通过了解他们的本地观察结果与团队奖励之间的因果关系，团队中的每个代理都可以根据他们是否有助于获得奖励来调整他们的个人信用。我们凭经验证明，在 MARL 中使用因果关系估计不仅可以提高团队的整体绩效，还可以提高每个代理的个人能力。我们观察到，改进在一组不同的环境中是一致的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过因果检测解决多智能体强化学习中智能体懒惰行为问题，提升团队整体及个体性能。
AI.motivation: 团队学习中部分智能体无法正确评估自身对团队奖励的贡献，导致学习次优策略并出现懒惰行为。
AI.method: 形式化时间因果性概念，基于局部观察与团队奖励的因果关系调整智能体信用分配，惩罚懒惰行为。
AI.result: 实验表明因果估计方法在多个环境中均提升团队整体性能及个体智能体能力。
AI.conclusion: 因果检测有效改善多智能体协作效率，促进更公平的信用分配与个体学习效果。

By understanding how their local observations are causally related to the team reward, each agent in the team can adjust their individual credit based on whether they helped to cause the reward or not. We show empirically that using causality estimations in MARL improves not only the holistic performance of the team, but also the individual capabilities of each agent. We observe that the improvements are consistent in a set of different environments. 当作为一个团队学习任务时，多智能体强化学习（MARL）中的一些智能体可能无法理解它们对团队绩效的真正影响。这些代理最终会学习次优策略，表现出不受欢迎的懒惰行为。为了研究这个问题，我们首先将时间因果关系应用于 MARL 问题的形式化。然后，我们展示了如何使用因果关系来惩罚这些懒惰的代理人并改善他们的行为。通过了解他们的本地观察结果与团队奖励之间的因果关系，团队中的每个代理都可以根据他们是否有助于获得奖励来调整他们的个人信用。我们凭经验证明，在 MARL 中使用因果关系估计不仅可以提高团队的整体绩效，还可以提高每个代理的个人能力。我们观察到，改进在一组不同的环境中是一致的。 本文提出通过因果检测解决多智能体强化学习中智能体懒惰行为问题，提升团队整体及个体性能。 Rafael Pina,Varuna De Silva,Corentin Artaud cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MA

authors_text: Yu Zheng,Jiahui Zhan,Shengfeng He,Junyu Dong,Yong Du
title: Curricular Contrastive Regularization for Physics-aware Single Image Dehazing
title_zh: 用于物理感知单图像去雾的课程对比正则化
comment: This paper is accepted by CVPR2023
comments: This paper is accepted by CVPR2023
abstract: Considering the ill-posed nature, contrastive regularization has been developed for single image dehazing, introducing the information from negative images as a lower bound. However, the contrastive samples are nonconsensual, as the negatives are usually represented distantly from the clear (i.e., positive) image, leaving the solution space still under-constricted. Moreover, the interpretability of deep dehazing models is underexplored towards the physics of the hazing process. In this paper, we propose a novel curricular contrastive regularization targeted at a consensual contrastive space as opposed to a non-consensual one. Our negatives, which provide better lower-bound constraints, can be assembled from 1) the hazy image, and 2) corresponding restorations by other existing methods. Further, due to the different similarities between the embeddings of the clear image and negatives, the learning difficulty of the multiple components is intrinsically imbalanced. To tackle this issue, we customize a curriculum learning strategy to reweight the importance of different negatives. In addition, to improve the interpretability in the feature space, we build a physics-aware dual-branch unit according to the atmospheric scattering model. With the unit, as well as curricular contrastive regularization, we establish our dehazing network, named C2PNet. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our C2PNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, with extreme PSNR boosts of 3.94dB and 1.50dB, respectively, on SOTS-indoor and SOTS-outdoor datasets.

However, the contrastive samples are nonconsensual, as the negatives are usually represented distantly from the clear (i.e., positive) image, leaving the solution space still under-constricted. Moreover, the interpretability of deep dehazing models is underexplored towards the physics of the hazing process. In this paper, we propose a novel curricular contrastive regularization targeted at a consensual contrastive space as opposed to a non-consensual one. Our negatives, which provide better lower-bound constraints, can be assembled from 1) the hazy image, and 2) corresponding restorations by other existing methods. Further, due to the different similarities between the embeddings of the clear image and negatives, the learning difficulty of the multiple components is intrinsically imbalanced. To tackle this issue, we customize a curriculum learning strategy to reweight the importance of different negatives. In addition, to improve the interpretability in the feature space, we build a physics-aware dual-branch unit according to the atmospheric scattering model. With the unit, as well as curricular contrastive regularization, we establish our dehazing network, named C2PNet. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our C2PNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, with extreme PSNR boosts of 3.94dB and 1.50dB, respectively, on SOTS-indoor and SOTS-outdoor datasets.
abstract_zh: 考虑到不适定的性质，对比正则化已经被开发用于单图像去雾，引入负图像的信息作为下界。然而，对比样本是非一致的，因为负片通常与清晰（即正片）图像相距很远，使得解决方案空间仍然不够狭窄。此外，对于雾化过程的物理原理，深度去雾模型的可解释性还没有得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的课程对比正则化，针对共识对比空间而不是非共识空间。我们的底片提供了更好的下界约束，可以从 1）模糊图像和 2）其他现有方法的相应恢复中组装而成。此外，由于清晰图像和负片的嵌入之间的相似性不同，多个组件的学习难度本质上是不平衡的。为了解决这个问题，我们定制了课程学习策略来重新衡量不同负面因素的重要性。此外，为了提高特征空间的可解释性，我们根据大气散射模型构建了物理感知的双分支单元。通过该单元以及课程对比正则化，我们建立了去雾网络，名为 C2PNet。大量实验表明，我们的 C2PNet 显着优于最先进的方法，在 SOTS 室内和 SOTS 室外数据集上，PSNR 分别提高了 3.94dB 和 1.50dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于课程对比正则化的物理感知单图像去雾方法C2PNet，通过改进对比样本选择和引入物理模型提升去雾效果。
AI.motivation: 现有单图像去雾方法中对比样本与清晰图像距离较远导致解空间约束不足，且深度模型对雾化物理过程的可解释性研究不足。
AI.method: 构建共识对比空间，从雾图和现有方法恢复结果生成负样本；设计课程学习策略平衡不同负样本的重要性；基于大气散射模型建立物理感知双分支单元。
AI.result: 在SOTS-indoor和SOTS-outdoor数据集上分别实现3.94dB和1.50dB的PSNR显著提升，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 课程对比正则化与物理模型结合有效提升了去雾性能，解决了对比样本非共识性和模型可解释性不足的问题。

However, the contrastive samples are nonconsensual, as the negatives are usually represented distantly from the clear (i.e., positive) image, leaving the solution space still under-constricted. Moreover, the interpretability of deep dehazing models is underexplored towards the physics of the hazing process. In this paper, we propose a novel curricular contrastive regularization targeted at a consensual contrastive space as opposed to a non-consensual one. Our negatives, which provide better lower-bound constraints, can be assembled from 1) the hazy image, and 2) corresponding restorations by other existing methods. Further, due to the different similarities between the embeddings of the clear image and negatives, the learning difficulty of the multiple components is intrinsically imbalanced. To tackle this issue, we customize a curriculum learning strategy to reweight the importance of different negatives. In addition, to improve the interpretability in the feature space, we build a physics-aware dual-branch unit according to the atmospheric scattering model. With the unit, as well as curricular contrastive regularization, we establish our dehazing network, named C2PNet. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our C2PNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, with extreme PSNR boosts of 3.94dB and 1.50dB, respectively, on SOTS-indoor and SOTS-outdoor datasets. 考虑到不适定的性质，对比正则化已经被开发用于单图像去雾，引入负图像的信息作为下界。然而，对比样本是非一致的，因为负片通常与清晰（即正片）图像相距很远，使得解决方案空间仍然不够狭窄。此外，对于雾化过程的物理原理，深度去雾模型的可解释性还没有得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的课程对比正则化，针对共识对比空间而不是非共识空间。我们的底片提供了更好的下界约束，可以从 1）模糊图像和 2）其他现有方法的相应恢复中组装而成。此外，由于清晰图像和负片的嵌入之间的相似性不同，多个组件的学习难度本质上是不平衡的。为了解决这个问题，我们定制了课程学习策略来重新衡量不同负面因素的重要性。此外，为了提高特征空间的可解释性，我们根据大气散射模型构建了物理感知的双分支单元。通过该单元以及课程对比正则化，我们建立了去雾网络，名为 C2PNet。大量实验表明，我们的 C2PNet 显着优于最先进的方法，在 SOTS 室内和 SOTS 室外数据集上，PSNR 分别提高了 3.94dB 和 1.50dB。 本文提出一种基于课程对比正则化的物理感知单图像去雾方法C2PNet，通过改进对比样本选择和引入物理模型提升去雾效果。 Yu Zheng,Jiahui Zhan,Shengfeng He,Junyu Dong,Yong Du cs.CV

authors_text: Jiapeng Tang,Yinyu Nie,Lev Markhasin,Angela Dai,Justus Thies,Matthias Nießner
title: DiffuScene: Denoising Diffusion Models for Generative Indoor Scene Synthesis
title_zh: DiffuScene：用于生成室内场景合成的去噪扩散模型
abstract: We present DiffuScene for indoor 3D scene synthesis based on a novel scene configuration denoising diffusion model. It generates 3D instance properties stored in an unordered object set and retrieves the most similar geometry for each object configuration, which is characterized as a concatenation of different attributes, including location, size, orientation, semantics, and geometry features. We introduce a diffusion network to synthesize a collection of 3D indoor objects by denoising a set of unordered object attributes. Unordered parametrization simplifies and eases the joint distribution approximation. The shape feature diffusion facilitates natural object placements, including symmetries. Our method enables many downstream applications, including scene completion, scene arrangement, and text-conditioned scene synthesis. Experiments on the 3D-FRONT dataset show that our method can synthesize more physically plausible and diverse indoor scenes than state-of-the-art methods. Extensive ablation studies verify the effectiveness of our design choice in scene diffusion models.
summary: We present DiffuScene for indoor 3D scene synthesis based on a novel scene configuration denoising diffusion model. It generates 3D instance properties stored in an unordered object set and retrieves the most similar geometry for each object configuration, which is characterized as a concatenation of different attributes, including location, size, orientation, semantics, and geometry features. We introduce a diffusion network to synthesize a collection of 3D indoor objects by denoising a set of unordered object attributes. Unordered parametrization simplifies and eases the joint distribution approximation. The shape feature diffusion facilitates natural object placements, including symmetries. Our method enables many downstream applications, including scene completion, scene arrangement, and text-conditioned scene synthesis. Experiments on the 3D-FRONT dataset show that our method can synthesize more physically plausible and diverse indoor scenes than state-of-the-art methods. Extensive ablation studies verify the effectiveness of our design choice in scene diffusion models.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了基于新颖的场景配置去噪扩散模型的 DiffuScene 用于室内 3D 场景合成。它生成存储在无序对象集中的 3D 实例属性，并检索每个对象配置最相似的几何形状，其特征是不同属性的串联，包括位置、大小、方向、语义和几何特征。我们引入扩散网络，通过对一组无序对象属性进行去噪来合成 3D 室内对象的集合。无序参数化简化并简化了联合分布近似。形状特征扩散有利于自然的对象放置，包括对称性。我们的方法支持许多下游应用，包括场景完成、场景排列和文本条件场景合成。 3D-FRONT 数据集上的实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法可以合成更多物理上合理且多样化的室内场景。广泛的消融研究验证了我们在场景扩散模型中设计选择的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DiffuScene，一种基于去噪扩散模型的室内3D场景生成方法，通过生成无序对象属性集并检索相似几何体来合成室内场景。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成物理合理且多样化的室内场景时存在局限性，需解决对象属性联合分布建模与自然布局的问题。
AI.method: 设计扩散网络对无序对象属性（位置、尺寸、方向等）进行去噪，结合形状特征扩散实现对称性等自然布局，简化联合分布近似。
AI.result: 在3D-FRONT数据集上生成的场景比现有方法更物理合理且多样，消融实验验证了设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DiffuScene通过无序参数化和形状特征扩散有效提升了室内场景生成质量，适用于场景补全、排列及文本条件生成等下游任务。

authors_text: Yue Wang,Wending Li,Michail Maniatakos,Saif Eddin Jabari
title: Optimal Smoothing Distribution Exploration for Backdoor Neutralization in Deep Learning-based Traffic Systems
title_zh: 基于深度学习的流量系统中后门中和的最优平滑分布探索
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) enhances the efficiency of Autonomous Vehicles (AV), but also makes them susceptible to backdoor attacks that can result in traffic congestion or collisions. Backdoor functionality is typically incorporated by contaminating training datasets with covert malicious data to maintain high precision on genuine inputs while inducing the desired (malicious) outputs for specific inputs chosen by adversaries. Current defenses against backdoors mainly focus on image classification using image-based features, which cannot be readily transferred to the regression task of DRL-based AV controllers since the inputs are continuous sensor data, i.e., the combinations of velocity and distance of AV and its surrounding vehicles. Our proposed method adds well-designed noise to the input to neutralize backdoors. The approach involves learning an optimal smoothing (noise) distribution to preserve the normal functionality of genuine inputs while neutralizing backdoors. By doing so, the resulting model is expected to be more resilient against backdoor attacks while maintaining high accuracy on genuine inputs. The effectiveness of the proposed method is verified on a simulated traffic system based on a microscopic traffic simulator, where experimental results showcase that the smoothed traffic controller can neutralize all trigger samples and maintain the performance of relieving traffic congestion
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) enhances the efficiency of Autonomous Vehicles (AV), but also makes them susceptible to backdoor attacks that can result in traffic congestion or collisions. Our proposed method adds well-designed noise to the input to neutralize backdoors. The approach involves learning an optimal smoothing (noise) distribution to preserve the normal functionality of genuine inputs while neutralizing backdoors. By doing so, the resulting model is expected to be more resilient against backdoor attacks while maintaining high accuracy on genuine inputs. The effectiveness of the proposed method is verified on a simulated traffic system based on a microscopic traffic simulator, where experimental results showcase that the smoothed traffic controller can neutralize all trigger samples and maintain the performance of relieving traffic congestion
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习 (DRL) 提高了自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的效率，但也使它们容易受到后门攻击，从而导致交通拥堵或碰撞。后门功能通常通过用隐蔽的恶意数据污染训练数据集来合并，以保持真实输入的高精度，同时为对手选择的特定输入引入所需的（恶意）输出。目前针对后门的防御主要集中在使用基于图像的特征进行图像分类，但由于输入是连续的传感器数据，即自动驾驶汽车及其周围车辆的速度和距离的组合，因此不能轻易地将其转移到基于 DRL 的自动驾驶汽车控制器的回归任务。我们提出的方法向输入添加精心设计的噪声以中和后门。该方法涉及学习最佳平滑（噪声）分布，以保留真实输入的正常功能，同时消除后门。通过这样做，最终的模型预计将更能抵御后门攻击，同时保持真实输入的高精度。该方法的有效性在基于微观交通模拟器的模拟交通系统上得到验证，实验结果表明平滑交通控制器可以中和所有触发样本并保持缓解交通拥堵的性能

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对深度学习交通系统的后门中和方法，通过向输入添加最优噪声分布来消除后门攻击的影响，同时保持系统正常功能。
AI.motivation: 现有后门防御方法多针对图像分类任务，难以直接应用于基于深度强化学习的自动驾驶系统，因其输入为连续传感器数据而非离散图像特征。
AI.method: 设计学习最优平滑分布的噪声注入机制，在保持正常输入性能的同时，通过噪声扰动破坏后门触发样本的恶意输出能力。
AI.result: 在微观交通模拟器实验中，该方法成功中和所有后门触发样本，且在缓解交通拥堵的主任务上保持高精度表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为连续输入的深度学习交通系统提供了有效的后门防御方案，在安全性与功能性之间取得平衡。

search_text: Optimal Smoothing Distribution Exploration for Backdoor Neutralization in Deep Learning-based Traffic Systems 基于深度学习的流量系统中后门中和的最优平滑分布探索 Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) enhances the efficiency of Autonomous Vehicles (AV), but also makes them susceptible to backdoor attacks that can result in traffic congestion or collisions. Backdoor functionality is typically incorporated by contaminating training datasets with covert malicious data to maintain high precision on genuine inputs while inducing the desired (malicious) outputs for specific inputs chosen by adversaries. Current defenses against backdoors mainly focus on image classification using image-based features, which cannot be readily transferred to the regression task of DRL-based AV controllers since the inputs are continuous sensor data, i.e., the combinations of velocity and distance of AV and its surrounding vehicles. Our proposed method adds well-designed noise to the input to neutralize backdoors. The approach involves learning an optimal smoothing (noise) distribution to preserve the normal functionality of genuine inputs while neutralizing backdoors. By doing so, the resulting model is expected to be more resilient against backdoor attacks while maintaining high accuracy on genuine inputs. The effectiveness of the proposed method is verified on a simulated traffic system based on a microscopic traffic simulator, where experimental results showcase that the smoothed traffic controller can neutralize all trigger samples and maintain the performance of relieving traffic congestion 深度强化学习 (DRL) 提高了自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的效率，但也使它们容易受到后门攻击，从而导致交通拥堵或碰撞。后门功能通常通过用隐蔽的恶意数据污染训练数据集来合并，以保持真实输入的高精度，同时为对手选择的特定输入引入所需的（恶意）输出。目前针对后门的防御主要集中在使用基于图像的特征进行图像分类，但由于输入是连续的传感器数据，即自动驾驶汽车及其周围车辆的速度和距离的组合，因此不能轻易地将其转移到基于 DRL 的自动驾驶汽车控制器的回归任务。我们提出的方法向输入添加精心设计的噪声以中和后门。该方法涉及学习最佳平滑（噪声）分布，以保留真实输入的正常功能，同时消除后门。通过这样做，最终的模型预计将更能抵御后门攻击，同时保持真实输入的高精度。该方法的有效性在基于微观交通模拟器的模拟交通系统上得到验证，实验结果表明平滑交通控制器可以中和所有触发样本并保持缓解交通拥堵的性能 本文提出一种针对深度学习交通系统的后门中和方法，通过向输入添加最优噪声分布来消除后门攻击的影响，同时保持系统正常功能。 Yue Wang,Wending Li,Michail Maniatakos,Saif Eddin Jabari cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Marc Lambert,Silvère Bonnabel,Francis Bach
title: The limited-memory recursive variational Gaussian approximation (L-RVGA)
title_zh: 有限内存递归变分高斯近似 (L-RVGA)
abstract: We consider the problem of computing a Gaussian approximation to the posterior distribution of a parameter given a large number N of observations and a Gaussian prior, when the dimension of the parameter d is also large. To address this problem we build on a recently introduced recursive algorithm for variational Gaussian approximation of the posterior, called recursive variational Gaussian approximation (RVGA), which is a single pass algorithm, free of parameter tuning. In this paper, we consider the case where the parameter dimension d is high, and we propose a novel version of RVGA that scales linearly in the dimension d (as well as in the number of observations N), and which only requires linear storage capacity in d. This is afforded by the use of a novel recursive expectation maximization (EM) algorithm applied for factor analysis introduced herein, to approximate at each step the covariance matrix of the Gaussian distribution conveying the uncertainty in the parameter. The approach is successfully illustrated on the problems of high dimensional least-squares and logistic regression, and generalized to a large class of nonlinear models.
summary: We consider the problem of computing a Gaussian approximation to the posterior distribution of a parameter given a large number N of observations and a Gaussian prior, when the dimension of the parameter d is also large. To address this problem we build on a recently introduced recursive algorithm for variational Gaussian approximation of the posterior, called recursive variational Gaussian approximation (RVGA), which is a single pass algorithm, free of parameter tuning. In this paper, we consider the case where the parameter dimension d is high, and we propose a novel version of RVGA that scales linearly in the dimension d (as well as in the number of observations N), and which only requires linear storage capacity in d. This is afforded by the use of a novel recursive expectation maximization (EM) algorithm applied for factor analysis introduced herein, to approximate at each step the covariance matrix of the Gaussian distribution conveying the uncertainty in the parameter. The approach is successfully illustrated on the problems of high dimensional least-squares and logistic regression, and generalized to a large class of nonlinear models.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在给定大量 N 个观测值和高斯先验的情况下，当参数 d 的维数也很大时，计算参数后验分布的高斯近似的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们基于最近引入的后验变分高斯近似的递归算法，称为递归变分高斯近似（RVGA），它是一种单通道算法，无需参数调整。在本文中，我们考虑参数维度 d 高的情况，提出了一种新版本的 RVGA，它在维度 d（以及观测数量 N）上线性缩放，并且只需要 d 中的线性存储容量。这是通过使用一种新颖的递归期望最大化（EM）算法来实现的，该算法应用于本文引入的因子分析，以在每一步逼近传达参数不确定性的高斯分布的协方差矩阵。该方法成功地说明了高维最小二乘和逻辑回归问题，并推广到一大类非线性模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于高维参数和大量观测的有限内存递归变分高斯近似算法(L-RVGA)，用于计算参数后验分布的高斯近似。
AI.motivation: 传统变分高斯近似方法在处理高维参数(d)和大规模观测(N)时面临计算复杂度和存储需求的挑战，需开发更高效的算法。
AI.method: 基于递归EM算法改进RVGA，通过因子分析近似协方差矩阵，实现算法在d和N上的线性扩展及线性存储需求。
AI.result: 该方法成功应用于高维最小二乘和逻辑回归问题，并推广至非线性模型，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: L-RVGA算法为高维参数估计提供了可扩展的解决方案，在保持单次传递和免调参优势的同时显著降低计算与存储开销。

authors_text: Ritam Majumdar,Shirish Karande,Lovekesh Vig
title: DeepEpiSolver: Unravelling Inverse problems in Covid, HIV, Ebola and Disease Transmission
title_zh: DeepEpiSolver：解开 Covid、HIV、埃博拉和疾病传播中的逆问题
comment: Publication accepted at International Conference for Learning Representations 2023: First Workshop in Machine Learning and Global Health
comments: Publication accepted at International Conference for Learning Representations 2023: First Workshop in Machine Learning and Global Health
abstract: The spread of many infectious diseases is modeled using variants of the SIR compartmental model, which is a coupled differential equation. The coefficients of the SIR model determine the spread trajectories of disease, on whose basis proactive measures can be taken. Hence, the coefficient estimates must be both fast and accurate. Shaier et al. in the paper "Disease Informed Neural Networks" used Physics Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) to estimate the parameters of the SIR model. There are two drawbacks to this approach. First, the training time for PINNs is high, with certain diseases taking close to 90 hrs to train. Second, PINNs don't generalize for a new SIDR trajectory, and learning its corresponding SIR parameters requires retraining the PINN from scratch. In this work, we aim to eliminate both of these drawbacks. We generate a dataset between the parameters of ODE and the spread trajectories by solving the forward problem for a large distribution of parameters using the LSODA algorithm. We then use a neural network to learn the mapping between spread trajectories and coefficients of SIDR in an offline manner. This allows us to learn the parameters of a new spread trajectory without having to retrain, enabling generalization at test time. We observe a speed-up of 3-4 orders of magnitude with accuracy comparable to that of PINNs for 11 highly infectious diseases. Further finetuning of neural network inferred ODE coefficients using PINN further leads to 2-3 orders improvement of estimated coefficients.
summary: The spread of many infectious diseases is modeled using variants of the SIR compartmental model, which is a coupled differential equation. The coefficients of the SIR model determine the spread trajectories of disease, on whose basis proactive measures can be taken. Hence, the coefficient estimates must be both fast and accurate. Shaier et al. in the paper "Disease Informed Neural Networks" used Physics Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) to estimate the parameters of the SIR model. There are two drawbacks to this approach. First, the training time for PINNs is high, with certain diseases taking close to 90 hrs to train. Second, PINNs don't generalize for a new SIDR trajectory, and learning its corresponding SIR parameters requires retraining the PINN from scratch. In this work, we aim to eliminate both of these drawbacks. We generate a dataset between the parameters of ODE and the spread trajectories by solving the forward problem for a large distribution of parameters using the LSODA algorithm. We then use a neural network to learn the mapping between spread trajectories and coefficients of SIDR in an offline manner. This allows us to learn the parameters of a new spread trajectory without having to retrain, enabling generalization at test time. We observe a speed-up of 3-4 orders of magnitude with accuracy comparable to that of PINNs for 11 highly infectious diseases. Further finetuning of neural network inferred ODE coefficients using PINN further leads to 2-3 orders improvement of estimated coefficients.
abstract_zh: 许多传染病的传播是使用 SIR 区室模型的变体进行建模的，该模型是一个耦合微分方程。 SIR模型的系数决定了疾病的传播轨迹，在此基础上可以采取主动措施。因此，系数估计必须既快速又准确。谢尔等人。在论文“Disease Informed Neural Networks”中使用Physics Informed Neural Networks (PINNs)来估计SIR模型的参数。这种方法有两个缺点。首先，PINN 的训练时间很长，某些疾病需要接近 90 小时的训练时间。其次，PINN 不能推广新的 SIDR 轨迹，并且学习其相应的 SIR 参数需要从头开始重新训练 PINN。在这项工作中，我们的目标是消除这两个缺点。我们通过使用 LSODA 算法解决大参数分布的前向问题，生成 ODE 参数和扩展轨迹之间的数据集。然后，我们使用神经网络以离线方式学习传播轨迹和 SIDR 系数之间的映射。这使我们能够学习新传播轨迹的参数，而无需重新训练，从而在测试时实现泛化。我们观察到 11 种高传染性疾病的速度提高了 3-4 个数量级，准确度与 PINN 相当。使用 PINN 对神经网络推断 ODE 系数进行进一步微调，进一步使估计系数提高 2-3 个数量级。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepEpiSolver方法，通过神经网络解决传染病传播模型中的逆问题，快速准确估计SIR模型参数。
AI.motivation: 传统物理信息神经网络（PINN）在估计传染病模型参数时存在训练耗时长（可达90小时）且无法泛化到新数据的缺陷，需开发更高效的方法。
AI.method: 利用LSODA算法生成大量正向问题参数-轨迹数据集，训练神经网络离线学习轨迹到SIR参数的映射关系，实现无需重训练的泛化预测，并通过PINN微调提升精度。
AI.result: 在11种高传染性疾病中实现比PINN快3-4个数量级的推理速度，准确率相当；结合PINN微调后参数估计精度再提升2-3个数量级。
AI.conclusion: DeepEpiSolver有效解决了PINN的效率与泛化缺陷，为传染病实时建模提供了高效参数估计方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出DeepEpiSolver方法，通过神经网络解决传染病传播模型中的逆问题，快速准确估计SIR模型参数。
ai_content.motivation: 传统物理信息神经网络（PINN）在估计传染病模型参数时存在训练耗时长（可达90小时）且无法泛化到新数据的缺陷，需开发更高效的方法。
ai_content.method: 利用LSODA算法生成大量正向问题参数-轨迹数据集，训练神经网络离线学习轨迹到SIR参数的映射关系，实现无需重训练的泛化预测，并通过PINN微调提升精度。
ai_content.result: 在11种高传染性疾病中实现比PINN快3-4个数量级的推理速度，准确率相当；结合PINN微调后参数估计精度再提升2-3个数量级。
ai_content.conclusion: DeepEpiSolver有效解决了PINN的效率与泛化缺陷，为传染病实时建模提供了高效参数估计方案。

search_text: DeepEpiSolver: Unravelling Inverse problems in Covid, HIV, Ebola and Disease Transmission DeepEpiSolver：解开 Covid、HIV、埃博拉和疾病传播中的逆问题 The spread of many infectious diseases is modeled using variants of the SIR compartmental model, which is a coupled differential equation. The coefficients of the SIR model determine the spread trajectories of disease, on whose basis proactive measures can be taken. Hence, the coefficient estimates must be both fast and accurate. Shaier et al. in the paper "Disease Informed Neural Networks" used Physics Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) to estimate the parameters of the SIR model. There are two drawbacks to this approach. First, the training time for PINNs is high, with certain diseases taking close to 90 hrs to train. Second, PINNs don't generalize for a new SIDR trajectory, and learning its corresponding SIR parameters requires retraining the PINN from scratch. In this work, we aim to eliminate both of these drawbacks. We generate a dataset between the parameters of ODE and the spread trajectories by solving the forward problem for a large distribution of parameters using the LSODA algorithm. We then use a neural network to learn the mapping between spread trajectories and coefficients of SIDR in an offline manner. This allows us to learn the parameters of a new spread trajectory without having to retrain, enabling generalization at test time. We observe a speed-up of 3-4 orders of magnitude with accuracy comparable to that of PINNs for 11 highly infectious diseases. Further finetuning of neural network inferred ODE coefficients using PINN further leads to 2-3 orders improvement of estimated coefficients. 许多传染病的传播是使用 SIR 区室模型的变体进行建模的，该模型是一个耦合微分方程。 SIR模型的系数决定了疾病的传播轨迹，在此基础上可以采取主动措施。因此，系数估计必须既快速又准确。谢尔等人。在论文“Disease Informed Neural Networks”中使用Physics Informed Neural Networks (PINNs)来估计SIR模型的参数。这种方法有两个缺点。首先，PINN 的训练时间很长，某些疾病需要接近 90 小时的训练时间。其次，PINN 不能推广新的 SIDR 轨迹，并且学习其相应的 SIR 参数需要从头开始重新训练 PINN。在这项工作中，我们的目标是消除这两个缺点。我们通过使用 LSODA 算法解决大参数分布的前向问题，生成 ODE 参数和扩展轨迹之间的数据集。然后，我们使用神经网络以离线方式学习传播轨迹和 SIDR 系数之间的映射。这使我们能够学习新传播轨迹的参数，而无需重新训练，从而在测试时实现泛化。我们观察到 11 种高传染性疾病的速度提高了 3-4 个数量级，准确度与 PINN 相当。使用 PINN 对神经网络推断 ODE 系数进行进一步微调，进一步使估计系数提高 2-3 个数量级。 本文提出DeepEpiSolver方法，通过神经网络解决传染病传播模型中的逆问题，快速准确估计SIR模型参数。 Ritam Majumdar,Shirish Karande,Lovekesh Vig cs.LG,cs.AI,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Xiaoyang Wu,Xin Wen,Xihui Liu,Hengshuang Zhao
title: Masked Scene Contrast: A Scalable Framework for Unsupervised 3D Representation Learning
title_zh: 蒙面场景对比：无监督 3D 表示学习的可扩展框架
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2023, available at https://github.com/Pointcept/Pointcept
comments: Accepted by CVPR 2023, available at https://github.com/Pointcept/Pointcept
abstract: As a pioneering work, PointContrast conducts unsupervised 3D representation learning via leveraging contrastive learning over raw RGB-D frames and proves its effectiveness on various downstream tasks. However, the trend of large-scale unsupervised learning in 3D has yet to emerge due to two stumbling blocks: the inefficiency of matching RGB-D frames as contrastive views and the annoying mode collapse phenomenon mentioned in previous works. Turning the two stumbling blocks into empirical stepping stones, we first propose an efficient and effective contrastive learning framework, which generates contrastive views directly on scene-level point clouds by a well-curated data augmentation pipeline and a practical view mixing strategy. Second, we introduce reconstructive learning on the contrastive learning framework with an exquisite design of contrastive cross masks, which targets the reconstruction of point color and surfel normal. Our Masked Scene Contrast (MSC) framework is capable of extracting comprehensive 3D representations more efficiently and effectively. It accelerates the pre-training procedure by at least 3x and still achieves an uncompromised performance compared with previous work. Besides, MSC also enables large-scale 3D pre-training across multiple datasets, which further boosts the performance and achieves state-of-the-art fine-tuning results on several downstream tasks, e.g., 75.5% mIoU on ScanNet semantic segmentation validation set.
summary: As a pioneering work, PointContrast conducts unsupervised 3D representation learning via leveraging contrastive learning over raw RGB-D frames and proves its effectiveness on various downstream tasks. However, the trend of large-scale unsupervised learning in 3D has yet to emerge due to two stumbling blocks: the inefficiency of matching RGB-D frames as contrastive views and the annoying mode collapse phenomenon mentioned in previous works. Turning the two stumbling blocks into empirical stepping stones, we first propose an efficient and effective contrastive learning framework, which generates contrastive views directly on scene-level point clouds by a well-curated data augmentation pipeline and a practical view mixing strategy. Second, we introduce reconstructive learning on the contrastive learning framework with an exquisite design of contrastive cross masks, which targets the reconstruction of point color and surfel normal. Our Masked Scene Contrast (MSC) framework is capable of extracting comprehensive 3D representations more efficiently and effectively. It accelerates the pre-training procedure by at least 3x and still achieves an uncompromised performance compared with previous work. Besides, MSC also enables large-scale 3D pre-training across multiple datasets, which further boosts the performance and achieves state-of-the-art fine-tuning results on several downstream tasks, e.g., 75.5% mIoU on ScanNet semantic segmentation validation set.
abstract_zh: 作为一项开创性工作，PointContrast 通过利用原始 RGB-D 帧的对比学习来进行无监督 3D 表示学习，并证明了其在各种下游任务中的有效性。然而，由于两个绊脚石，3D 领域大规模无监督学习的趋势尚未出现：将 RGB-D 帧匹配为对比视图的低效率以及先前作品中提到的烦人的模式崩溃现象。将这两个绊脚石变成经验垫脚石，我们首先提出了一种高效且有效的对比学习框架，该框架通过精心策划的数据增强管道和实用的视图混合策略直接在场景级点云上生成对比视图。其次，我们在对比学习框架上引入了重构学习，并精心设计了对比交叉掩模，其目标是点颜色和面元法线的重构。我们的蒙版场景对比度 (MSC) 框架能够更高效地提取全面的 3D 表示。与之前的工作相比，它将预训练过程加速了至少 3 倍，并且仍然实现了不受影响的性能。此外，MSC 还可以跨多个数据集进行大规模 3D 预训练，这进一步提高了性能，并在多个下游任务上实现了最先进的微调结果，例如 ScanNet 语义分割验证集上的 75.5% mIoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Masked Scene Contrast (MSC)的可扩展框架，用于无监督3D表示学习，通过改进对比学习和重建学习来提升效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如PointContrast在处理RGB-D帧时效率低下且存在模式崩溃问题，阻碍了大规模无监督3D学习的发展，需解决这两个瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计高效的数据增强管道和视图混合策略，直接在场景级点云上生成对比视图；引入对比交叉掩码的重建学习，针对点颜色和Surfel法线进行重建。
AI.result: MSC将预训练过程加速至少3倍，在ScanNet语义分割验证集上达到75.5% mIoU的SOTA结果，并支持跨多数据集的大规模预训练。
AI.conclusion: MSC通过解决对比视图生成与重建学习中的关键问题，显著提升了无监督3D表示学习的效率与效果，推动了大规模预训练的发展。

authors_text: Ziang Cheng,Junxuan Li,Hongdong Li
title: WildLight: In-the-wild Inverse Rendering with a Flashlight
title_zh: WildLight：使用手电筒进行野外逆向渲染
abstract: This paper proposes a practical photometric solution for the challenging problem of in-the-wild inverse rendering under unknown ambient lighting. Our system recovers scene geometry and reflectance using only multi-view images captured by a smartphone. The key idea is to exploit smartphone's built-in flashlight as a minimally controlled light source, and decompose image intensities into two photometric components -- a static appearance corresponds to ambient flux, plus a dynamic reflection induced by the moving flashlight. Our method does not require flash/non-flash images to be captured in pairs. Building on the success of neural light fields, we use an off-the-shelf method to capture the ambient reflections, while the flashlight component enables physically accurate photometric constraints to decouple reflectance and illumination. Compared to existing inverse rendering methods, our setup is applicable to non-darkroom environments yet sidesteps the inherent difficulties of explicit solving ambient reflections. We demonstrate by extensive experiments that our method is easy to implement, casual to set up, and consistently outperforms existing in-the-wild inverse rendering techniques. Finally, our neural reconstruction can be easily exported to PBR textured triangle mesh ready for industrial renderers.
summary: This paper proposes a practical photometric solution for the challenging problem of in-the-wild inverse rendering under unknown ambient lighting. Our system recovers scene geometry and reflectance using only multi-view images captured by a smartphone. The key idea is to exploit smartphone's built-in flashlight as a minimally controlled light source, and decompose image intensities into two photometric components -- a static appearance corresponds to ambient flux, plus a dynamic reflection induced by the moving flashlight. Our method does not require flash/non-flash images to be captured in pairs. Building on the success of neural light fields, we use an off-the-shelf method to capture the ambient reflections, while the flashlight component enables physically accurate photometric constraints to decouple reflectance and illumination. Compared to existing inverse rendering methods, our setup is applicable to non-darkroom environments yet sidesteps the inherent difficulties of explicit solving ambient reflections. We demonstrate by extensive experiments that our method is easy to implement, casual to set up, and consistently outperforms existing in-the-wild inverse rendering techniques. Finally, our neural reconstruction can be easily exported to PBR textured triangle mesh ready for industrial renderers.
abstract_zh: 本文针对未知环境光照下野外逆渲染的挑战性问题提出了一种实用的光度解决方案。我们的系统仅使用智能手机捕获的多视图图像来恢复场景几何形状和反射率。关键思想是利用智能手机的内置手电筒作为最低限度控制的光源，并将图像强度分解为两个光度成分——静态外观对应于环境光通量，加上移动手电筒引起的动态反射。我们的方法不需要成对捕获闪光/非闪光图像。基于神经光场的成功，我们使用现成的方法来捕获环境反射，而手电筒组件可以实现物理上精确的光度约束，以解耦反射率和照明。与现有的逆渲染方法相比，我们的设置适用于非暗室环境，但回避了显式解决环境反射的固有困难。我们通过大量实验证明，我们的方法易于实现、设置随意，并且始终优于现有的野外逆渲染技术。最后，我们的神经重建可以轻松导出到 PBR 纹理三角形网格，为工业渲染器做好准备。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于智能手机闪光灯的实时逆向渲染方法，用于在未知环境光下恢复场景几何和反射率。
AI.motivation: 现有逆向渲染方法依赖暗室环境或需配对闪光/非闪光图像，难以适应真实复杂光照场景。
AI.method: 利用手机闪光灯作为可控光源，将图像强度分解为静态环境光与动态反射组件，结合神经光场技术分离反射率与照明参数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法易于部署且性能优于现有技术，可输出兼容工业渲染器的PBR纹理网格模型。
AI.conclusion: WildLight实现了无需配对图像的真实场景逆向渲染，在工业应用中具有显著优势。

ai_content_json.conclusion: WildLight实现了无需配对图像的真实场景逆向渲染，在工业应用中具有显著优势。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于智能手机闪光灯的实时逆向渲染方法，用于在未知环境光下恢复场景几何和反射率。
motivation: 现有逆向渲染方法依赖暗室环境或需配对闪光/非闪光图像，难以适应真实复杂光照场景。
method: 利用手机闪光灯作为可控光源，将图像强度分解为静态环境光与动态反射组件，结合神经光场技术分离反射率与照明参数。
result: 实验表明该方法易于部署且性能优于现有技术，可输出兼容工业渲染器的PBR纹理网格模型。
conclusion: WildLight实现了无需配对图像的真实场景逆向渲染，在工业应用中具有显著优势。
search_text: WildLight: In-the-wild Inverse Rendering with a Flashlight WildLight：使用手电筒进行野外逆向渲染 This paper proposes a practical photometric solution for the challenging problem of in-the-wild inverse rendering under unknown ambient lighting. Our system recovers scene geometry and reflectance using only multi-view images captured by a smartphone. The key idea is to exploit smartphone's built-in flashlight as a minimally controlled light source, and decompose image intensities into two photometric components -- a static appearance corresponds to ambient flux, plus a dynamic reflection induced by the moving flashlight. Our method does not require flash/non-flash images to be captured in pairs. Building on the success of neural light fields, we use an off-the-shelf method to capture the ambient reflections, while the flashlight component enables physically accurate photometric constraints to decouple reflectance and illumination. Compared to existing inverse rendering methods, our setup is applicable to non-darkroom environments yet sidesteps the inherent difficulties of explicit solving ambient reflections. We demonstrate by extensive experiments that our method is easy to implement, casual to set up, and consistently outperforms existing in-the-wild inverse rendering techniques. Finally, our neural reconstruction can be easily exported to PBR textured triangle mesh ready for industrial renderers. 本文针对未知环境光照下野外逆渲染的挑战性问题提出了一种实用的光度解决方案。我们的系统仅使用智能手机捕获的多视图图像来恢复场景几何形状和反射率。关键思想是利用智能手机的内置手电筒作为最低限度控制的光源，并将图像强度分解为两个光度成分——静态外观对应于环境光通量，加上移动手电筒引起的动态反射。我们的方法不需要成对捕获闪光/非闪光图像。基于神经光场的成功，我们使用现成的方法来捕获环境反射，而手电筒组件可以实现物理上精确的光度约束，以解耦反射率和照明。与现有的逆渲染方法相比，我们的设置适用于非暗室环境，但回避了显式解决环境反射的固有困难。我们通过大量实验证明，我们的方法易于实现、设置随意，并且始终优于现有的野外逆渲染技术。最后，我们的神经重建可以轻松导出到 PBR 纹理三角形网格，为工业渲染器做好准备。 本文提出一种基于智能手机闪光灯的实时逆向渲染方法，用于在未知环境光下恢复场景几何和反射率。 Ziang Cheng,Junxuan Li,Hongdong Li cs.CV

authors_text: Pavan Kumar Anasosalu Vasu,James Gabriel,Jeff Zhu,Oncel Tuzel,Anurag Ranjan
title: FastViT: A Fast Hybrid Vision Transformer using Structural Reparameterization
title_zh: FastViT：使用结构重新参数化的快速混合视觉变压器
abstract: The recent amalgamation of transformer and convolutional designs has led to steady improvements in accuracy and efficiency of the models. In this work, we introduce FastViT, a hybrid vision transformer architecture that obtains the state-of-the-art latency-accuracy trade-off. To this end, we introduce a novel token mixing operator, RepMixer, a building block of FastViT, that uses structural reparameterization to lower the memory access cost by removing skip-connections in the network. We further apply train-time overparametrization and large kernel convolutions to boost accuracy and empirically show that these choices have minimal effect on latency. We show that - our model is 3.5x faster than CMT, a recent state-of-the-art hybrid transformer architecture, 4.9x faster than EfficientNet, and 1.9x faster than ConvNeXt on a mobile device for the same accuracy on the ImageNet dataset. At similar latency, our model obtains 4.2% better Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet than MobileOne. Our model consistently outperforms competing architectures across several tasks -- image classification, detection, segmentation and 3D mesh regression with significant improvement in latency on both a mobile device and a desktop GPU. Furthermore, our model is highly robust to out-of-distribution samples and corruptions, improving over competing robust models. Code and models are available at https://github.com/apple/ml-fastvit.
summary: The recent amalgamation of transformer and convolutional designs has led to steady improvements in accuracy and efficiency of the models. In this work, we introduce FastViT, a hybrid vision transformer architecture that obtains the state-of-the-art latency-accuracy trade-off. To this end, we introduce a novel token mixing operator, RepMixer, a building block of FastViT, that uses structural reparameterization to lower the memory access cost by removing skip-connections in the network. We further apply train-time overparametrization and large kernel convolutions to boost accuracy and empirically show that these choices have minimal effect on latency. We show that - our model is 3.5x faster than CMT, a recent state-of-the-art hybrid transformer architecture, 4.9x faster than EfficientNet, and 1.9x faster than ConvNeXt on a mobile device for the same accuracy on the ImageNet dataset. At similar latency, our model obtains 4.2% better Top-1 accuracy on ImageNet than MobileOne. Our model consistently outperforms competing architectures across several tasks -- image classification, detection, segmentation and 3D mesh regression with significant improvement in latency on both a mobile device and a desktop GPU. Furthermore, our model is highly robust to out-of-distribution samples and corruptions, improving over competing robust models. Code and models are available at https://github.com/apple/ml-fastvit.
abstract_zh: 最近变压器和卷积设计的结合使得模型的准确性和效率稳步提高。在这项工作中，我们介绍了 FastViT，这是一种混合视觉转换器架构，可以实现最先进的延迟与精度之间的权衡。为此，我们引入了一种新颖的令牌混合运算符 RepMixer，它是 FastViT 的构建块，它使用结构重新参数化通过删除网络中的跳过连接来降低内存访问成本。我们进一步应用训练时间超参数化和大内核卷积来提高准确性，并根据经验表明这些选择对延迟的影响最小。我们表明，在 ImageNet 数据集上达到相同精度的情况下，我们的模型比 CMT（一种最新的混合变压器架构）快 3.5 倍，比 EfficientNet 快 4.9 倍，比移动设备上的 ConvNeXt 快 1.9 倍。在相似的延迟下，我们的模型在 ImageNet 上获得的 Top-1 准确率比 MobileOne 高 4.2%。我们的模型在图像分类、检测、分割和 3D 网格回归等多项任务中始终优于竞争架构，并且在移动设备和桌面 GPU 上的延迟均得到显着改善。此外，我们的模型对于分布外样本和腐败具有高度鲁棒性，比竞争的鲁棒模型有所改进。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/apple/ml-fastvit 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FastViT，一种通过结构重参数化实现高效混合视觉Transformer架构，优化了延迟与准确率的平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有混合模型在延迟与准确率的权衡上存在不足，需设计更高效的架构以提升移动端与桌面端的性能。
AI.method: 引入RepMixer模块，通过移除跳接降低内存访问成本，并结合训练时过参数化与大核卷积提升精度，同时保持低延迟。
AI.result: FastViT在移动端比CMT快3.5倍、比EfficientNet快4.9倍，在相似延迟下ImageNet准确率比MobileOne高4.2%，且在多任务与鲁棒性上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: FastViT通过结构创新实现了高效的混合模型，在多种场景下均优于现有架构，适用于移动端与桌面端部署。

authors_text: Jianyong Sun,Jens Kober,Michael Gienger,Jihong Zhu
title: Learning from Few Demonstrations with Frame-Weighted Motion Generation
title_zh: 从帧加权运动生成的少数演示中学习
comment: Accepted by ISER. For the experiment video, see https://youtu.be/JpGjk4eKC3o
comments: Accepted by ISER. For the experiment video, see https://youtu.be/JpGjk4eKC3o
abstract: Learning from Demonstration (LfD) enables robots to acquire versatile skills by learning motion policies from human demonstrations. It endows users with an intuitive interface to transfer new skills to robots without the need for time-consuming robot programming and inefficient solution exploration. During task executions, the robot motion is usually influenced by constraints imposed by environments. In light of this, task-parameterized LfD (TP-LfD) encodes relevant contextual information into reference frames, enabling better skill generalization to new situations. However, most TP-LfD algorithms typically require multiple demonstrations across various environmental conditions to ensure sufficient statistics for a meaningful model. It is not a trivial task for robot users to create different situations and perform demonstrations under all of them. Therefore, this paper presents a novel algorithm to learn skills from few demonstrations. By leveraging the reference frame weights that capture the frame importance or relevance during task executions, our method demonstrates excellent skill acquisition performance, which is validated in real robotic environments.
summary: Learning from Demonstration (LfD) enables robots to acquire versatile skills by learning motion policies from human demonstrations. It endows users with an intuitive interface to transfer new skills to robots without the need for time-consuming robot programming and inefficient solution exploration. During task executions, the robot motion is usually influenced by constraints imposed by environments. In light of this, task-parameterized LfD (TP-LfD) encodes relevant contextual information into reference frames, enabling better skill generalization to new situations. However, most TP-LfD algorithms typically require multiple demonstrations across various environmental conditions to ensure sufficient statistics for a meaningful model. It is not a trivial task for robot users to create different situations and perform demonstrations under all of them. Therefore, this paper presents a novel algorithm to learn skills from few demonstrations. By leveraging the reference frame weights that capture the frame importance or relevance during task executions, our method demonstrates excellent skill acquisition performance, which is validated in real robotic environments.
abstract_zh: 从演示中学习（LfD）使机器人能够通过从人类演示中学习运动策略来获得多种技能。它为用户提供了直观的界面，可以将新技能传授给机器人，而无需耗时的机器人编程和低效的解决方案探索。在任务执行过程中，机器人运动通常会受到环境施加的约束的影响。有鉴于此，任务参数化 LfD (TP-LfD) 将相关上下文信息编码到参考框架中，从而能够更好地将技能泛化到新情况。然而，大多数 TP-LfD 算法通常需要在各种环境条件下进行多次演示，以确保有意义的模型有足够的统计数据。对于机器人用户来说，创造不同的场景并在所有场景下进行演示并不是一项简单的任务。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的算法，可以从少量演示中学习技能。通过利用在任务执行期间捕获帧重要性或相关性的参考帧权重，我们的方法展示了出色的技能获取性能，这在真实的机器人环境中得到了验证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从少量示范中学习技能的新方法，通过帧加权运动生成提升机器人技能学习效率。
AI.motivation: 传统TP-LfD方法需要大量不同环境下的示范数据，而用户难以创建所有情境，亟需减少示范数量的高效学习方法。
AI.method: 利用参考帧权重捕捉任务执行中关键帧的重要性，通过加权运动生成实现少量示范下的技能学习。
AI.result: 在真实机器人环境中验证了该方法的有效性，展现出优异的技能获取性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过帧权重机制显著提升少量示范下的技能学习效果，为实际机器人应用提供可行方案。

By leveraging the reference frame weights that capture the frame importance or relevance during task executions, our method demonstrates excellent skill acquisition performance, which is validated in real robotic environments. 从演示中学习（LfD）使机器人能够通过从人类演示中学习运动策略来获得多种技能。它为用户提供了直观的界面，可以将新技能传授给机器人，而无需耗时的机器人编程和低效的解决方案探索。在任务执行过程中，机器人运动通常会受到环境施加的约束的影响。有鉴于此，任务参数化 LfD (TP-LfD) 将相关上下文信息编码到参考框架中，从而能够更好地将技能泛化到新情况。然而，大多数 TP-LfD 算法通常需要在各种环境条件下进行多次演示，以确保有意义的模型有足够的统计数据。对于机器人用户来说，创造不同的场景并在所有场景下进行演示并不是一项简单的任务。因此，本文提出了一种新颖的算法，可以从少量演示中学习技能。通过利用在任务执行期间捕获帧重要性或相关性的参考帧权重，我们的方法展示了出色的技能获取性能，这在真实的机器人环境中得到了验证。 本文提出一种从少量示范中学习技能的新方法，通过帧加权运动生成提升机器人技能学习效率。 Jianyong Sun,Jens Kober,Michael Gienger,Jihong Zhu cs.RO

authors_text: Junshu Tang,Tengfei Wang,Bo Zhang,Ting Zhang,Ran Yi,Lizhuang Ma,Dong Chen
title: Make-It-3D: High-Fidelity 3D Creation from A Single Image with Diffusion Prior
title_zh: Make-It-3D：利用扩散先验从单个图像创建高保真 3D
abstract: In this work, we investigate the problem of creating high-fidelity 3D content from only a single image. This is inherently challenging: it essentially involves estimating the underlying 3D geometry while simultaneously hallucinating unseen textures. To address this challenge, we leverage prior knowledge from a well-trained 2D diffusion model to act as 3D-aware supervision for 3D creation. Our approach, Make-It-3D, employs a two-stage optimization pipeline: the first stage optimizes a neural radiance field by incorporating constraints from the reference image at the frontal view and diffusion prior at novel views; the second stage transforms the coarse model into textured point clouds and further elevates the realism with diffusion prior while leveraging the high-quality textures from the reference image. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms prior works by a large margin, resulting in faithful reconstructions and impressive visual quality. Our method presents the first attempt to achieve high-quality 3D creation from a single image for general objects and enables various applications such as text-to-3D creation and texture editing.
summary: In this work, we investigate the problem of creating high-fidelity 3D content from only a single image. This is inherently challenging: it essentially involves estimating the underlying 3D geometry while simultaneously hallucinating unseen textures. To address this challenge, we leverage prior knowledge from a well-trained 2D diffusion model to act as 3D-aware supervision for 3D creation. Our approach, Make-It-3D, employs a two-stage optimization pipeline: the first stage optimizes a neural radiance field by incorporating constraints from the reference image at the frontal view and diffusion prior at novel views; the second stage transforms the coarse model into textured point clouds and further elevates the realism with diffusion prior while leveraging the high-quality textures from the reference image. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method outperforms prior works by a large margin, resulting in faithful reconstructions and impressive visual quality. Our method presents the first attempt to achieve high-quality 3D creation from a single image for general objects and enables various applications such as text-to-3D creation and texture editing.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了仅从单个图像创建高保真 3D 内容的问题。这本质上是具有挑战性的：它本质上涉及估计底层 3D 几何形状，同时产生看不见的纹理的幻觉。为了应对这一挑战，我们利用训练有素的 2D 扩散模型中的先验知识来充当 3D 创建的 3D 感知监督。我们的方法 Make-It-3D 采用两阶段优化流程：第一阶段通过结合正面视图中的参考图像和新颖视图中的扩散先验的约束来优化神经辐射场；第二阶段将粗糙模型转换为纹理点云，并通过扩散先验进一步提升真实感，同时利用参考图像的高质量纹理。大量的实验表明，我们的方法大大优于以前的工作，从而实现了忠实的重建和令人印象深刻的视觉质量。我们的方法首次尝试从单个图像实现一般对象的高质量 3D 创建，并支持各种应用，例如文本到 3D 创建和纹理编辑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从单张图像生成高保真3D内容的方法Make-It-3D，通过结合扩散先验和神经辐射场优化实现高质量重建。
AI.motivation: 从单张图像生成3D内容需同时估计几何结构和生成未见纹理，传统方法难以兼顾精度与细节，需引入新型监督机制突破瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用两阶段优化流程：第一阶段融合参考图像正视图约束与扩散先验的多视角信息优化神经辐射场；第二阶段将粗略模型转换为带纹理点云并利用扩散先验提升真实感。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在重建保真度和视觉质量上显著优于现有工作，首次实现通用物体单图高质量3D生成。
AI.conclusion: 本研究开创性地将扩散模型作为3D生成的监督先验，为文本到3D生成和纹理编辑等应用提供了新范式。
