authors_text: Su Chen,Xianwei Liu,Lei Fu,Suyang Wang,Bin Zhang,Xiaojun Li
title: Physics Symbolic Learner for Discovering Ground-Motion Models Via NGA-West2 Database
title_zh: 用于通过 NGA-West2 数据库发现地面运动模型的物理符号学习器
abstract: Ground-motion model (GMM) is the basis of many earthquake engineering studies. In this study, a novel physics-informed symbolic learner (PISL) method based on the Nest Generation Attenuation-West2 database is proposed to automatically discover mathematical equation operators as symbols. The sequential threshold ridge regression algorithm is utilized to distill a concise and interpretable explicit characterization of complex systems of ground motions. In addition to the basic variables retrieved from previous GMMs, the current PISL incorporates two a priori physical conditions, namely, distance and amplitude saturation. GMMs developed using the PISL, an empirical regression method (ERM), and an artificial neural network (ANN) are compared in terms of residuals and extrapolation based on obtained data of peak ground acceleration and velocity. The results show that the inter- and intra-event standard deviations of the three methods are similar. The functional form of the PISL is more concise than that of the ERM and ANN. The extrapolation capability of the PISL is more accurate than that of the ANN. The PISL-GMM used in this study provide a new paradigm of regression that considers both physical and data-driven machine learning and can be used to identify the implied physical relationships and prediction equations of ground motion variables in different regions.
summary: Ground-motion model (GMM) is the basis of many earthquake engineering studies. In this study, a novel physics-informed symbolic learner (PISL) method based on the Nest Generation Attenuation-West2 database is proposed to automatically discover mathematical equation operators as symbols. The sequential threshold ridge regression algorithm is utilized to distill a concise and interpretable explicit characterization of complex systems of ground motions. In addition to the basic variables retrieved from previous GMMs, the current PISL incorporates two a priori physical conditions, namely, distance and amplitude saturation. GMMs developed using the PISL, an empirical regression method (ERM), and an artificial neural network (ANN) are compared in terms of residuals and extrapolation based on obtained data of peak ground acceleration and velocity. The results show that the inter- and intra-event standard deviations of the three methods are similar. The functional form of the PISL is more concise than that of the ERM and ANN. The extrapolation capability of the PISL is more accurate than that of the ANN. The PISL-GMM used in this study provide a new paradigm of regression that considers both physical and data-driven machine learning and can be used to identify the implied physical relationships and prediction equations of ground motion variables in different regions.
abstract_zh: 地面运动模型（GMM）是许多地震工程研究的基础。在本研究中，提出了一种基于 Nest Generation Attenuation-West2 数据库的新型物理信息符号学习器 (PISL) 方法，可自动发现作为符号的数学方程运算符。顺序阈值岭回归算法用于提取复杂地面运动系统的简洁且可解释的明确特征。除了从以前的 GMM 检索到的基本变量之外，当前的 PISL 还包含两个先验物理条件，即距离和幅度饱和度。使用 PISL、经验回归方法 (ERM) 和人工神经网络 (ANN) 开发的 GMM 在残差和基于获得的峰值地面加速度和速度数据的外推方面进行比较。结果表明，三种方法的事件间和事件内标准差相似。 PISL 的函数形式比 ERM 和 ANN 的函数形式更加简洁。 PISL 的外推能力比 ANN 更准确。本研究中使用的PISL-GMM提供了一种新的回归范式，它考虑了物理和数据驱动的机器学习，可用于识别不同区域地震动变量的隐含物理关系和预测方程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于NGA-West2数据库的物理信息符号学习方法（PISL），用于自动发现地面运动模型的数学符号表达式。
AI.motivation: 传统地面运动模型（GMM）存在形式复杂、物理意义不明确等问题，需结合物理先验知识与数据驱动方法提升模型简洁性与外推能力。
AI.method: 基于顺序阈值脊回归算法，融合距离和振幅饱和两项物理先验条件，构建符号学习框架，并与经验回归法（ERM）和人工神经网络（ANN）进行对比验证。
AI.result: PISL模型在保持与ERM/ANN相似标准差的同时，形式更简洁，且外推预测精度优于ANN，验证了其物理约束与数据驱动结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PISL为地震工程提供了兼顾物理规律与数据特征的新范式，可有效识别不同区域地面运动变量的隐含物理关系与预测方程。

authors_text: Suchin Gururangan,Margaret Li,Mike Lewis,Weijia Shi,Tim Althoff,Noah A. Smith,Luke Zettlemoyer
title: Scaling Expert Language Models with Unsupervised Domain Discovery
title_zh: 通过无监督领域发现扩展专家语言模型
abstract: Large language models are typically trained densely: all parameters are updated with respect to all inputs. This requires synchronization of billions of parameters across thousands of GPUs. We introduce a simple but effective method to asynchronously train large, sparse language models on arbitrary text corpora. Our method clusters a corpus into sets of related documents, trains a separate expert language model on each cluster, and combines them in a sparse ensemble for inference. This approach generalizes embarrassingly parallel training by automatically discovering the domains for each expert, and eliminates nearly all the communication overhead of existing sparse language models. Our technique outperforms dense baselines on multiple corpora and few-shot tasks, and our analysis shows that specializing experts to meaningful clusters is key to these gains. Performance also improves with the number of experts and size of training data, suggesting this is a highly efficient and accessible approach to training large language models.
summary: Large language models are typically trained densely: all parameters are updated with respect to all inputs. This requires synchronization of billions of parameters across thousands of GPUs. We introduce a simple but effective method to asynchronously train large, sparse language models on arbitrary text corpora. Our method clusters a corpus into sets of related documents, trains a separate expert language model on each cluster, and combines them in a sparse ensemble for inference. This approach generalizes embarrassingly parallel training by automatically discovering the domains for each expert, and eliminates nearly all the communication overhead of existing sparse language models. Our technique outperforms dense baselines on multiple corpora and few-shot tasks, and our analysis shows that specializing experts to meaningful clusters is key to these gains. Performance also improves with the number of experts and size of training data, suggesting this is a highly efficient and accessible approach to training large language models.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型通常经过密集训练：所有参数都根据所有输入进行更新。这需要在数千个 GPU 上同步数十亿个参数。我们引入了一种简单但有效的方法来在任意文本语料库上异步训练大型稀疏语言模型。我们的方法将语料库聚类成相关文档集，在每个聚类上训练单独的专家语言模型，并将它们组合成稀疏集合以进行推理。这种方法通过自动发现每个专家的领域来推广令人尴尬的并行训练，并消除了现有稀疏语言模型的几乎所有通信开销。我们的技术在多个语料库和少量任务上的性能优于密集基线，并且我们的分析表明，将专家专门针对有意义的集群是取得这些成果的关键。性能也会随着专家数量和训练数据大小的增加而提高，这表明这是一种高效且易于访问的训练大型语言模型的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异步训练稀疏语言模型的方法，通过无监督领域发现自动划分文本领域并训练专家模型，减少通信开销并提升效率。
AI.motivation: 传统密集训练需同步大量参数导致高通信开销，而现有稀疏模型依赖人工领域划分，缺乏自动性与效率。
AI.method: 采用无监督聚类将语料库划分为相关文档集，为每个集群训练独立专家模型，并通过稀疏集成组合专家进行推理。
AI.result: 在多个语料库和少样本任务中优于密集基线，专家数量与数据量增加进一步提升性能，验证方法有效性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动领域划分与稀疏训练显著降低通信成本，为大规模语言模型训练提供高效可扩展的新范式。

search_text: Scaling Expert Language Models with Unsupervised Domain Discovery 通过无监督领域发现扩展专家语言模型 Large language models are typically trained densely: all parameters are updated with respect to all inputs. This requires synchronization of billions of parameters across thousands of GPUs. We introduce a simple but effective method to asynchronously train large, sparse language models on arbitrary text corpora. Our method clusters a corpus into sets of related documents, trains a separate expert language model on each cluster, and combines them in a sparse ensemble for inference. This approach generalizes embarrassingly parallel training by automatically discovering the domains for each expert, and eliminates nearly all the communication overhead of existing sparse language models. Our technique outperforms dense baselines on multiple corpora and few-shot tasks, and our analysis shows that specializing experts to meaningful clusters is key to these gains. Performance also improves with the number of experts and size of training data, suggesting this is a highly efficient and accessible approach to training large language models. 大型语言模型通常经过密集训练：所有参数都根据所有输入进行更新。这需要在数千个 GPU 上同步数十亿个参数。我们引入了一种简单但有效的方法来在任意文本语料库上异步训练大型稀疏语言模型。我们的方法将语料库聚类成相关文档集，在每个聚类上训练单独的专家语言模型，并将它们组合成稀疏集合以进行推理。这种方法通过自动发现每个专家的领域来推广令人尴尬的并行训练，并消除了现有稀疏语言模型的几乎所有通信开销。我们的技术在多个语料库和少量任务上的性能优于密集基线，并且我们的分析表明，将专家专门针对有意义的集群是取得这些成果的关键。性能也会随着专家数量和训练数据大小的增加而提高，这表明这是一种高效且易于访问的训练大型语言模型的方法。 本文提出一种异步训练稀疏语言模型的方法，通过无监督领域发现自动划分文本领域并训练专家模型，减少通信开销并提升效率。 Suchin Gururangan,Margaret Li,Mike Lewis,Weijia Shi,Tim Althoff,Noah A. Smith,Luke Zettlemoyer cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Asude Aydin,Mathias Gehrig,Daniel Gehrig,Davide Scaramuzza
title: A Hybrid ANN-SNN Architecture for Low-Power and Low-Latency Visual Perception
title_zh: 用于低功耗和低延迟视觉感知的混合 ANN-SNN 架构
comment: ef:IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops (CVPRW), Seattle, 2024
comments: ef:IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops (CVPRW), Seattle, 2024
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNN) are a class of bio-inspired neural networks that promise to bring low-power and low-latency inference to edge devices through asynchronous and sparse processing. However, being temporal models, SNNs depend heavily on expressive states to generate predictions on par with classical artificial neural networks (ANNs). These states converge only after long transient periods, and quickly decay without input data, leading to higher latency, power consumption, and lower accuracy. This work addresses this issue by initializing the state with an auxiliary ANN running at a low rate. The SNN then uses the state to generate predictions with high temporal resolution until the next initialization phase. Our hybrid ANN-SNN model thus combines the best of both worlds: It does not suffer from long state transients and state decay thanks to the ANN, and can generate predictions with high temporal resolution, low latency, and low power thanks to the SNN. We show for the task of event-based 2D and 3D human pose estimation that our method consumes 88% less power with only a 4% decrease in performance compared to its fully ANN counterparts when run at the same inference rate. Moreover, when compared to SNNs, our method achieves a 74% lower error. This research thus provides a new understanding of how ANNs and SNNs can be used to maximize their respective benefits.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNN) are a class of bio-inspired neural networks that promise to bring low-power and low-latency inference to edge devices through asynchronous and sparse processing. However, being temporal models, SNNs depend heavily on expressive states to generate predictions on par with classical artificial neural networks (ANNs). These states converge only after long transient periods, and quickly decay without input data, leading to higher latency, power consumption, and lower accuracy. This work addresses this issue by initializing the state with an auxiliary ANN running at a low rate. The SNN then uses the state to generate predictions with high temporal resolution until the next initialization phase. Our hybrid ANN-SNN model thus combines the best of both worlds: It does not suffer from long state transients and state decay thanks to the ANN, and can generate predictions with high temporal resolution, low latency, and low power thanks to the SNN. We show for the task of event-based 2D and 3D human pose estimation that our method consumes 88% less power with only a 4% decrease in performance compared to its fully ANN counterparts when run at the same inference rate. Moreover, when compared to SNNs, our method achieves a 74% lower error. This research thus provides a new understanding of how ANNs and SNNs can be used to maximize their respective benefits.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是一类仿生神经网络，有望通过异步和稀疏处理为边缘设备带来低功耗和低延迟的推理。然而，作为时间模型，SNN 在很大程度上依赖于表达状态来生成与经典人工神经网络 (ANN) 相同的预测。这些状态仅在较长的瞬态周期后才会收敛，并且在没有输入数据的情况下快速衰减，从而导致更高的延迟、功耗和更低的精度。这项工作通过使用低速率运行的辅助 ANN 初始化状态来解决这个问题。然后，SNN 使用该状态生成具有高时间分辨率的预测，直到下一个初始化阶段。因此，我们的混合 ANN-SNN 模型结合了两全其美的优点：由于 ANN，它不会遭受长状态瞬变和状态衰减的影响，并且由于 SNN，它可以生成具有高时间分辨率、低延迟和低功耗的预测。我们表明，对于基于事件的 2D 和 3D 人体姿态估计任务，当以相同的推理速率运行时，与完全 ANN 对应方法相比，我们的方法消耗的功率减少了 88%，性能仅下降了 4%。此外，与 SNN 相比，我们的方法的误差降低了 74%。因此，这项研究为如何使用 ANN 和 SNN 来最大限度地发挥各自的效益提供了新的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合人工神经网络（ANN）和脉冲神经网络（SNN）的混合架构，以实现低功耗、低延迟的视觉感知。
AI.motivation: SNN虽具低功耗和低延迟潜力，但其依赖时间状态的特性导致收敛慢、状态衰减快，影响准确率和效率。传统ANN则缺乏此类优势。
AI.method: 通过低速率运行的辅助ANN初始化SNN状态，使SNN在无需长期状态收敛的情况下，利用高时间分辨率生成预测，结合两者优势。
AI.result: 在事件驱动的2D/3D人体姿态估计任务中，相比全ANN模型功耗降低88%（性能仅下降4%），相比SNN误差降低74%。
AI.conclusion: 混合架构有效融合ANN与SNN的优势，为边缘设备的视觉感知任务提供了低功耗、高精度的解决方案。

authors_text: Ye Zhu,Jie Yang,Si-Qi Liu,Ruimao Zhang
title: Inherent Consistent Learning for Accurate Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于精确半监督医学图像分割的固有一致性学习
abstract: Semi-supervised medical image segmentation has attracted much attention in recent years because of the high cost of medical image annotations. In this paper, we propose a novel Inherent Consistent Learning (ICL) method, aims to learn robust semantic category representations through the semantic consistency guidance of labeled and unlabeled data to help segmentation. In practice, we introduce two external modules, namely Supervised Semantic Proxy Adaptor (SSPA) and Unsupervised Semantic Consistent Learner (USCL) that is based on the attention mechanism to align the semantic category representations of labeled and unlabeled data, as well as update the global semantic representations over the entire training set. The proposed ICL is a plug-and-play scheme for various network architectures, and the two modules are not involved in the testing stage. Experimental results on three public benchmarks show that the proposed method can outperform the state-of-the-art, especially when the number of annotated data is extremely limited. Code is available at: https://github.com/zhuye98/ICL.git.
summary: Semi-supervised medical image segmentation has attracted much attention in recent years because of the high cost of medical image annotations. In this paper, we propose a novel Inherent Consistent Learning (ICL) method, aims to learn robust semantic category representations through the semantic consistency guidance of labeled and unlabeled data to help segmentation. In practice, we introduce two external modules, namely Supervised Semantic Proxy Adaptor (SSPA) and Unsupervised Semantic Consistent Learner (USCL) that is based on the attention mechanism to align the semantic category representations of labeled and unlabeled data, as well as update the global semantic representations over the entire training set. The proposed ICL is a plug-and-play scheme for various network architectures, and the two modules are not involved in the testing stage. Experimental results on three public benchmarks show that the proposed method can outperform the state-of-the-art, especially when the number of annotated data is extremely limited. Code is available at: https://github.com/zhuye98/ICL.git.
abstract_zh: 由于医学图像标注成本较高，半监督医学图像分割近年来备受关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的固有一致性学习（ICL）方法，旨在通过标记和未标记数据的语义一致性指导来学习鲁棒的语义类别表示，以帮助分割。在实践中，我们引入了两个外部模块，即监督语义代理适配器（SSPA）和无监督语义一致性学习器（USCL），它们基于注意力机制来对齐标记和未标记数据的语义类别表示，并更新整个训练集的全局语义表示。所提出的ICL是针对各种网络架构的即插即用方案，测试阶段未涉及这两个模块。三个公共基准的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以超越最先进的方法，特别是当注释数据的数量极其有限时。代码可见：https://github.com/zhuye98/ICL.git。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为内在一致学习（ICL）的新方法，用于在半监督医疗图像分割中通过利用标签和未标签数据的语义一致性来提升分割准确性。
AI.motivation: 医疗图像标注成本高昂，现有方法在标注数据极少时表现不佳，因此需要一种能有效利用未标注数据且无需额外标注的半监督学习方法。
AI.method: 设计了两个模块：监督语义代理适配器（SSPA）和基于注意力机制的无监督语义一致学习器（USCL），通过对齐标签与未标签数据的语义表示并更新全局语义表示来实现学习，且模块不参与测试阶段。
AI.result: 在三个公开基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在标注数据极少时显著优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: ICL方法通过语义一致性约束有效提升了半监督医疗图像分割性能，尤其适用于标注数据稀缺的场景，且具有良好的模型兼容性。

search_text: Inherent Consistent Learning for Accurate Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation 用于精确半监督医学图像分割的固有一致性学习 Semi-supervised medical image segmentation has attracted much attention in recent years because of the high cost of medical image annotations. In this paper, we propose a novel Inherent Consistent Learning (ICL) method, aims to learn robust semantic category representations through the semantic consistency guidance of labeled and unlabeled data to help segmentation. In practice, we introduce two external modules, namely Supervised Semantic Proxy Adaptor (SSPA) and Unsupervised Semantic Consistent Learner (USCL) that is based on the attention mechanism to align the semantic category representations of labeled and unlabeled data, as well as update the global semantic representations over the entire training set. The proposed ICL is a plug-and-play scheme for various network architectures, and the two modules are not involved in the testing stage. Experimental results on three public benchmarks show that the proposed method can outperform the state-of-the-art, especially when the number of annotated data is extremely limited. Code is available at: https://github.com/zhuye98/ICL.git. 由于医学图像标注成本较高，半监督医学图像分割近年来备受关注。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的固有一致性学习（ICL）方法，旨在通过标记和未标记数据的语义一致性指导来学习鲁棒的语义类别表示，以帮助分割。在实践中，我们引入了两个外部模块，即监督语义代理适配器（SSPA）和无监督语义一致性学习器（USCL），它们基于注意力机制来对齐标记和未标记数据的语义类别表示，并更新整个训练集的全局语义表示。所提出的ICL是针对各种网络架构的即插即用方案，测试阶段未涉及这两个模块。三个公共基准的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以超越最先进的方法，特别是当注释数据的数量极其有限时。代码可见：https://github.com/zhuye98/ICL.git。 本文提出了一种名为内在一致学习（ICL）的新方法，用于在半监督医疗图像分割中通过利用标签和未标签数据的语义一致性来提升分割准确性。 Ye Zhu,Jie Yang,Si-Qi Liu,Ruimao Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Camilo Sanchez,Felix A. Epp
title: Experiential Futures In-the-wild to Inform Policy Design
title_zh: 野外体验式未来为政策设计提供信息
abstract: As technological innovation continues to shape our world at an accelerating pace, policy makers struggle to keep up with the unintended consequences of these new technologies. To address this policy-novelty gap, Responsible Research Innovation (RRI) has been proposed as a way to drive science and technology innovation towards socially desirable goals. This work suggests a more active HCI's position in the materialisation of pluralistic future visions and emphasizes the engagement between policy design and HCI for more agile and responsive evaluation environments. It calls for both fields to engage in questioning which and how futures are constructed, who they are benefiting, and how the findings of these interventions are interpreted towards other futures.
summary: As technological innovation continues to shape our world at an accelerating pace, policy makers struggle to keep up with the unintended consequences of these new technologies. To address this policy-novelty gap, Responsible Research Innovation (RRI) has been proposed as a way to drive science and technology innovation towards socially desirable goals. This work suggests a more active HCI's position in the materialisation of pluralistic future visions and emphasizes the engagement between policy design and HCI for more agile and responsive evaluation environments. It calls for both fields to engage in questioning which and how futures are constructed, who they are benefiting, and how the findings of these interventions are interpreted towards other futures.
abstract_zh: 随着技术创新继续加速塑造我们的世界，政策制定者努力应对这些新技术带来的意想不到的后果。为了解决这一政策新颖性差距，负责任的研究创新（RRI）被提出作为推动科学和技术创新实现社会理想目标的一种方式。这项工作提出了人机交互在实现多元化未来愿景中的更积极的地位，并强调政策设计和人机交互之间的互动，以实现更灵活和响应更快的评估环境。它呼吁两个领域都参与质疑哪些未来以及如何构建，它们使谁受益，以及如何将这些干预措施的结果解释为其他未来。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过实地体验未来的方法，促进人机交互（HCI）与政策设计的协作，以应对技术快速创新带来的政策挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着技术加速发展，政策制定者难以应对新技术的意外后果，存在政策新颖性差距，需要更主动的HCI参与以构建多元未来愿景，并加强政策设计与HCI的互动。
AI.method: 通过倡导HCI与政策制定者的协作，结合实地体验未来的方法，构建多元化的未来场景，并评估其对政策设计的启示。
AI.result: 提出了HCI与政策设计协作的框架，强调未来愿景的构建和评估，为政策制定提供了更灵活的应对策略。
AI.conclusion: 本文呼吁HCI和政策制定者共同反思未来构建的过程，确保技术发展符合社会需求，并促进更负责任的创新实践。

authors_text: Yuanbo Yang,Yifei Yang,Hanlei Guo,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang,Yiyi Liao
title: UrbanGIRAFFE: Representing Urban Scenes as Compositional Generative Neural Feature Fields
title_zh: UrbanGIRAFFE：将城市场景表示为组合生成神经特征场
abstract: Generating photorealistic images with controllable camera pose and scene contents is essential for many applications including AR/VR and simulation. Despite the fact that rapid progress has been made in 3D-aware generative models, most existing methods focus on object-centric images and are not applicable to generating urban scenes for free camera viewpoint control and scene editing. To address this challenging task, we propose UrbanGIRAFFE, which uses a coarse 3D panoptic prior, including the layout distribution of uncountable stuff and countable objects, to guide a 3D-aware generative model. Our model is compositional and controllable as it breaks down the scene into stuff, objects, and sky. Using stuff prior in the form of semantic voxel grids, we build a conditioned stuff generator that effectively incorporates the coarse semantic and geometry information. The object layout prior further allows us to learn an object generator from cluttered scenes. With proper loss functions, our approach facilitates photorealistic 3D-aware image synthesis with diverse controllability, including large camera movement, stuff editing, and object manipulation. We validate the effectiveness of our model on both synthetic and real-world datasets, including the challenging KITTI-360 dataset.
summary: Generating photorealistic images with controllable camera pose and scene contents is essential for many applications including AR/VR and simulation. Despite the fact that rapid progress has been made in 3D-aware generative models, most existing methods focus on object-centric images and are not applicable to generating urban scenes for free camera viewpoint control and scene editing. To address this challenging task, we propose UrbanGIRAFFE, which uses a coarse 3D panoptic prior, including the layout distribution of uncountable stuff and countable objects, to guide a 3D-aware generative model. Our model is compositional and controllable as it breaks down the scene into stuff, objects, and sky. Using stuff prior in the form of semantic voxel grids, we build a conditioned stuff generator that effectively incorporates the coarse semantic and geometry information. The object layout prior further allows us to learn an object generator from cluttered scenes. With proper loss functions, our approach facilitates photorealistic 3D-aware image synthesis with diverse controllability, including large camera movement, stuff editing, and object manipulation. We validate the effectiveness of our model on both synthetic and real-world datasets, including the challenging KITTI-360 dataset.
abstract_zh: 使用可控相机姿势和场景内容生成逼真的图像对于包括 AR/VR 和模拟在内的许多应用至关重要。尽管 3D 感知生成模型已经取得了快速进展，但大多数现有方法都专注于以对象为中心的图像，不适用于生成城市场景以进行自由相机视点控制和场景编辑。为了解决这一具有挑战性的任务，我们提出了 UrbanGIRAFFE，它使用粗略的 3D 全景先验，包括不可数的东西和可数的对象的布局分布，来指导 3D 感知的生成模型。我们的模型是组合且可控的，因为它将场景分解为物质、物体和天空。使用语义体素网格形式的先验内容，我们构建了一个条件内容生成器，它有效地合并了粗略语义和几何信息。对象布局先验进一步允许我们从杂乱的场景中学习对象生成器。通过适当的损失函数，我们的方法可以促进具有多种可控性的逼真 3D 感知图像合成，包括大型相机移动、内容编辑和对象操作。我们在合成数据集和真实数据集（包括具有挑战性的 KITTI-360 数据集）上验证了我们的模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UrbanGIRAFFE模型，用于生成具有可控相机视角和场景内容的逼真城市场景图像。
AI.motivation: 现有3D生成模型多聚焦于物体中心图像，难以实现城市场景的自由相机视角控制和场景编辑，需解决复杂城市场景生成的挑战。
AI.method: 通过结合粗粒度3D全景先验（包括不可数物质和可数物体的布局分布），将场景分解为物质、物体和天空三部分，利用语义体素网格构建条件物质生成器，并通过物体布局先验学习物体生成器，配合特定损失函数实现可控生成。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实世界数据集（如KITTI-360）上验证了模型有效性，支持大范围相机运动、物质编辑和物体操作的逼真3D图像生成。
AI.conclusion: UrbanGIRAFFE通过组合生成和可控性设计，有效解决了城市场景生成难题，为AR/VR和模拟应用提供了新方法。

We validate the effectiveness of our model on both synthetic and real-world datasets, including the challenging KITTI-360 dataset. 使用可控相机姿势和场景内容生成逼真的图像对于包括 AR/VR 和模拟在内的许多应用至关重要。尽管 3D 感知生成模型已经取得了快速进展，但大多数现有方法都专注于以对象为中心的图像，不适用于生成城市场景以进行自由相机视点控制和场景编辑。为了解决这一具有挑战性的任务，我们提出了 UrbanGIRAFFE，它使用粗略的 3D 全景先验，包括不可数的东西和可数的对象的布局分布，来指导 3D 感知的生成模型。我们的模型是组合且可控的，因为它将场景分解为物质、物体和天空。使用语义体素网格形式的先验内容，我们构建了一个条件内容生成器，它有效地合并了粗略语义和几何信息。对象布局先验进一步允许我们从杂乱的场景中学习对象生成器。通过适当的损失函数，我们的方法可以促进具有多种可控性的逼真 3D 感知图像合成，包括大型相机移动、内容编辑和对象操作。我们在合成数据集和真实数据集（包括具有挑战性的 KITTI-360 数据集）上验证了我们的模型的有效性。 本文提出UrbanGIRAFFE模型，用于生成具有可控相机视角和场景内容的逼真城市场景图像。 Yuanbo Yang,Yifei Yang,Hanlei Guo,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang,Yiyi Liao cs.CV

authors_text: Bowen Wen,Jonathan Tremblay,Valts Blukis,Stephen Tyree,Thomas Muller,Alex Evans,Dieter Fox,Jan Kautz,Stan Birchfield
title: BundleSDF: Neural 6-DoF Tracking and 3D Reconstruction of Unknown Objects
title_zh: BundleSDF：未知物体的神经 6-DoF 跟踪和 3D 重建
abstract: We present a near real-time method for 6-DoF tracking of an unknown object from a monocular RGBD video sequence, while simultaneously performing neural 3D reconstruction of the object. Our method works for arbitrary rigid objects, even when visual texture is largely absent. The object is assumed to be segmented in the first frame only. No additional information is required, and no assumption is made about the interaction agent. Key to our method is a Neural Object Field that is learned concurrently with a pose graph optimization process in order to robustly accumulate information into a consistent 3D representation capturing both geometry and appearance. A dynamic pool of posed memory frames is automatically maintained to facilitate communication between these threads. Our approach handles challenging sequences with large pose changes, partial and full occlusion, untextured surfaces, and specular highlights. We show results on HO3D, YCBInEOAT, and BEHAVE datasets, demonstrating that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches. Project page: https://bundlesdf.github.io
summary: We present a near real-time method for 6-DoF tracking of an unknown object from a monocular RGBD video sequence, while simultaneously performing neural 3D reconstruction of the object. Our method works for arbitrary rigid objects, even when visual texture is largely absent. The object is assumed to be segmented in the first frame only. No additional information is required, and no assumption is made about the interaction agent. Key to our method is a Neural Object Field that is learned concurrently with a pose graph optimization process in order to robustly accumulate information into a consistent 3D representation capturing both geometry and appearance. A dynamic pool of posed memory frames is automatically maintained to facilitate communication between these threads. Our approach handles challenging sequences with large pose changes, partial and full occlusion, untextured surfaces, and specular highlights. We show results on HO3D, YCBInEOAT, and BEHAVE datasets, demonstrating that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches. Project page: https://bundlesdf.github.io
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种近实时方法，用于从单目 RGBD 视频序列中对未知对象进行 6 自由度跟踪，同时执行对象的神经 3D 重建。我们的方法适用于任意刚性物体，即使视觉纹理基本上不存在。假定对象仅在第一帧中被分割。不需要额外的信息，也不对交互代理做出任何假设。我们方法的关键是神经对象场，它与位姿图优化过程同时学习，以便将信息稳健地累积到捕获几何和外观的一致 3D 表示中。自动维护一个动态内存帧池，以促进这些线程之间的通信。我们的方法可以处理具有较大姿势变化、部分和完全遮挡、无纹理表面和镜面高光的具有挑战性的序列。我们在 HO3D、YCBInEOAT 和 BEHAVE 数据集上展示了结果，证明我们的方法明显优于现有方法。项目页面：https://bundlesdf.github.io

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经网络的实时6自由度跟踪与未知物体三维重建方法
AI.motivation: 现有方法在无纹理、遮挡等复杂场景下跟踪与重建效果不佳，且通常需要先验信息或假设交互代理
AI.method: 通过神经物体场与姿态图优化并发学习，结合动态姿势记忆帧池，实现几何与外观一致的3D重建，适用于无纹理及复杂遮挡场景
AI.result: 在HO3D、YCBInEOAT和BEHAVE数据集上表现优于现有方法，处理大姿态变化、遮挡和无纹理表面
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法无需先验信息，有效处理复杂场景，为未知物体的实时跟踪与重建提供新思路

authors_text: Thuan Hoang Nguyen,Thanh Van Le,Anh Tran
title: Efficient Scale-Invariant Generator with Column-Row Entangled Pixel Synthesis
title_zh: 具有列行纠缠像素合成的高效尺度不变发生器
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023; Project Page: https://thuanz123.github.io/creps/
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023; Project Page: https://thuanz123.github.io/creps/
abstract: Any-scale image synthesis offers an efficient and scalable solution to synthesize photo-realistic images at any scale, even going beyond 2K resolution. However, existing GAN-based solutions depend excessively on convolutions and a hierarchical architecture, which introduce inconsistency and the $``$texture sticking$"$ issue when scaling the output resolution. From another perspective, INR-based generators are scale-equivariant by design, but their huge memory footprint and slow inference hinder these networks from being adopted in large-scale or real-time systems. In this work, we propose $\textbf{C}$olumn-$\textbf{R}$ow $\textbf{E}$ntangled $\textbf{P}$ixel $\textbf{S}$ynthesis ($\textbf{CREPS}$), a new generative model that is both efficient and scale-equivariant without using any spatial convolutions or coarse-to-fine design. To save memory footprint and make the system scalable, we employ a novel bi-line representation that decomposes layer-wise feature maps into separate $``$thick$"$ column and row encodings. Experiments on various datasets, including FFHQ, LSUN-Church, MetFaces, and Flickr-Scenery, confirm CREPS' ability to synthesize scale-consistent and alias-free images at any arbitrary resolution with proper training and inference speed. Code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/CREPS.
summary: Any-scale image synthesis offers an efficient and scalable solution to synthesize photo-realistic images at any scale, even going beyond 2K resolution. However, existing GAN-based solutions depend excessively on convolutions and a hierarchical architecture, which introduce inconsistency and the $``$texture sticking$"$ issue when scaling the output resolution. From another perspective, INR-based generators are scale-equivariant by design, but their huge memory footprint and slow inference hinder these networks from being adopted in large-scale or real-time systems. In this work, we propose $\textbf{C}$olumn-$\textbf{R}$ow $\textbf{E}$ntangled $\textbf{P}$ixel $\textbf{S}$ynthesis ($\textbf{CREPS}$), a new generative model that is both efficient and scale-equivariant without using any spatial convolutions or coarse-to-fine design. To save memory footprint and make the system scalable, we employ a novel bi-line representation that decomposes layer-wise feature maps into separate $``$thick$"$ column and row encodings. Experiments on various datasets, including FFHQ, LSUN-Church, MetFaces, and Flickr-Scenery, confirm CREPS' ability to synthesize scale-consistent and alias-free images at any arbitrary resolution with proper training and inference speed. Code is available at https://github.com/VinAIResearch/CREPS.
abstract_zh: 任意尺度图像合成提供了一种高效且可扩展的解决方案，可以合成任意尺度的逼真图像，甚至超过 2K 分辨率。然而，现有的基于 GAN 的解决方案过度依赖于卷积和分层架构，这会在缩放输出分辨率时引入不一致性和“纹理粘连”问题。从另一个角度来看，基于 INR 的生成器在设计上是尺度等变的，但其巨大的内存占用和缓慢的推理阻碍了这些网络在大规模或实时系统中的采用。在这项工作中，我们提出$\textbf{C}$olumn-$\textbf{R}$ow $\textbf{E}$ntangled $\textbf{P}$ixel $\textbf{S}$ynthesis ($\textbf{CREPS}$)，一种新的生成模型，既高效又具有尺度等效性，无需使用任何空间卷积或从粗到精的设计。为了节省内存占用并使系统可扩展，我们采用了一种新颖的双线。将逐层特征映射分解为单独的 $``$thick$"$ 列和行编码的表示。对各种数据集（包括 FFHQ、LSUN-Church、MetFaces 和 Flickr-Scenery）的实验证实了 CREPS 能够以适当的训练和推理速度以任意分辨率合成比例一致且无混叠的图像。代码可在 https://github.com/VinAIResearch/CREPS 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效且尺度不变的生成模型CREPS，用于在任意分辨率下生成无伪影的高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN依赖卷积和分层结构导致尺度不一致和纹理粘连问题，而INR生成器虽尺度等变但存在内存消耗大和推理速度慢的缺陷。
AI.method: 设计列-行纠缠像素合成（CREPS）方法，通过双线表示将特征图分解为独立的列和行编码，避免使用卷积和粗到细结构。
AI.result: 在FFHQ、LSUN-Church等数据集上验证了CREPS可在任意分辨率生成无伪影图像，且训练和推理速度达标。
AI.conclusion: CREPS通过创新的双线表示和结构设计，在保证生成质量的同时实现了高效可扩展的任意尺度图像合成。

authors_text: S. A. Rizvi,R. Tang,X. Jiang,X. Ma,X. Hu
title: Local Contrastive Learning for Medical Image Recognition
title_zh: 医学图像识别的局部对比学习
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, AMIA conference submission
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, AMIA conference submission
abstract: The proliferation of Deep Learning (DL)-based methods for radiographic image analysis has created a great demand for expert-labeled radiology data. Recent self-supervised frameworks have alleviated the need for expert labeling by obtaining supervision from associated radiology reports. These frameworks, however, struggle to distinguish the subtle differences between different pathologies in medical images. Additionally, many of them do not provide interpretation between image regions and text, making it difficult for radiologists to assess model predictions. In this work, we propose Local Region Contrastive Learning (LRCLR), a flexible fine-tuning framework that adds layers for significant image region selection as well as cross-modality interaction. Our results on an external validation set of chest x-rays suggest that LRCLR identifies significant local image regions and provides meaningful interpretation against radiology text while improving zero-shot performance on several chest x-ray medical findings.
summary: The proliferation of Deep Learning (DL)-based methods for radiographic image analysis has created a great demand for expert-labeled radiology data. Recent self-supervised frameworks have alleviated the need for expert labeling by obtaining supervision from associated radiology reports. These frameworks, however, struggle to distinguish the subtle differences between different pathologies in medical images. Additionally, many of them do not provide interpretation between image regions and text, making it difficult for radiologists to assess model predictions. In this work, we propose Local Region Contrastive Learning (LRCLR), a flexible fine-tuning framework that adds layers for significant image region selection as well as cross-modality interaction. Our results on an external validation set of chest x-rays suggest that LRCLR identifies significant local image regions and provides meaningful interpretation against radiology text while improving zero-shot performance on several chest x-ray medical findings.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习 (DL) 的放射图像分析方法的激增对专家标记的放射学数据产生了巨大的需求。最近的自我监督框架通过获得相关放射学报告的监督，减轻了对专家标签的需求。然而，这些框架很难区分医学图像中不同病理之间的细微差异。此外，其中许多不提供图像区域和文本之间的解释，使得放射科医生很难评估模型预测。在这项工作中，我们提出了局部区域对比学习（LRCLR），这是一种灵活的微调框架，为重要的图像区域选择以及跨模态交互添加了层。我们对胸部 X 射线外部验证集的结果表明，LRCLR 可以识别重要的局部图像区域，并针对放射学文本提供有意义的解释，同时提高了多项胸部 X 射线医学发现的零样本性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种局部对比学习框架（LRCLR），用于改进医学图像识别中的自监督方法，解决病理差异区分困难和缺乏图像-文本解释的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督方法难以区分医学图像中不同病理的细微差异，且无法提供图像区域与放射报告文本的关联解释，限制了模型的可解释性和实用性。
AI.method: 设计LRCLR框架，通过添加显著图像区域选择模块和跨模态交互层，实现局部特征学习与文本信息的关联分析。
AI.result: 在胸部X光外部验证集上，LRCLR能有效识别关键局部图像区域，生成与放射文本相关的解释，并提升多种胸片病理的零样本识别性能。
AI.conclusion: LRCLR通过局部对比学习和跨模态交互，为医学影像分析提供了更可解释且性能优越的自监督框架，具有临床应用潜力。

search_text: Local Contrastive Learning for Medical Image Recognition 医学图像识别的局部对比学习 The proliferation of Deep Learning (DL)-based methods for radiographic image analysis has created a great demand for expert-labeled radiology data. Recent self-supervised frameworks have alleviated the need for expert labeling by obtaining supervision from associated radiology reports. These frameworks, however, struggle to distinguish the subtle differences between different pathologies in medical images. Additionally, many of them do not provide interpretation between image regions and text, making it difficult for radiologists to assess model predictions. In this work, we propose Local Region Contrastive Learning (LRCLR), a flexible fine-tuning framework that adds layers for significant image region selection as well as cross-modality interaction. Our results on an external validation set of chest x-rays suggest that LRCLR identifies significant local image regions and provides meaningful interpretation against radiology text while improving zero-shot performance on several chest x-ray medical findings. 基于深度学习 (DL) 的放射图像分析方法的激增对专家标记的放射学数据产生了巨大的需求。最近的自我监督框架通过获得相关放射学报告的监督，减轻了对专家标签的需求。然而，这些框架很难区分医学图像中不同病理之间的细微差异。此外，其中许多不提供图像区域和文本之间的解释，使得放射科医生很难评估模型预测。在这项工作中，我们提出了局部区域对比学习（LRCLR），这是一种灵活的微调框架，为重要的图像区域选择以及跨模态交互添加了层。我们对胸部 X 射线外部验证集的结果表明，LRCLR 可以识别重要的局部图像区域，并针对放射学文本提供有意义的解释，同时提高了多项胸部 X 射线医学发现的零样本性能。 本文提出了一种局部对比学习框架（LRCLR），用于改进医学图像识别中的自监督方法，解决病理差异区分困难和缺乏图像-文本解释的问题。 S. A. Rizvi,R. Tang,X. Jiang,X. Ma,X. Hu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Nikolas Lamb,Cameron Palmer,Benjamin Molloy,Sean Banerjee,Natasha Kholgade Banerjee
title: Fantastic Breaks: A Dataset of Paired 3D Scans of Real-World Broken Objects and Their Complete Counterparts
title_zh: Fantastic Breaks：真实世界破碎物体及其完整对应物的配对 3D 扫描数据集
abstract: Automated shape repair approaches currently lack access to datasets that describe real-world damaged geometry. We present Fantastic Breaks (and Where to Find Them: https://terascale-all-sensing-research-studio.github.io/FantasticBreaks), a dataset containing scanned, waterproofed, and cleaned 3D meshes for 150 broken objects, paired and geometrically aligned with complete counterparts. Fantastic Breaks contains class and material labels, proxy repair parts that join to broken meshes to generate complete meshes, and manually annotated fracture boundaries. Through a detailed analysis of fracture geometry, we reveal differences between Fantastic Breaks and synthetic fracture datasets generated using geometric and physics-based methods. We show experimental shape repair evaluation with Fantastic Breaks using multiple learning-based approaches pre-trained with synthetic datasets and re-trained with subset of Fantastic Breaks.
summary: Automated shape repair approaches currently lack access to datasets that describe real-world damaged geometry. We present Fantastic Breaks (and Where to Find Them: https://terascale-all-sensing-research-studio.github.io/FantasticBreaks), a dataset containing scanned, waterproofed, and cleaned 3D meshes for 150 broken objects, paired and geometrically aligned with complete counterparts. Fantastic Breaks contains class and material labels, proxy repair parts that join to broken meshes to generate complete meshes, and manually annotated fracture boundaries. Through a detailed analysis of fracture geometry, we reveal differences between Fantastic Breaks and synthetic fracture datasets generated using geometric and physics-based methods. We show experimental shape repair evaluation with Fantastic Breaks using multiple learning-based approaches pre-trained with synthetic datasets and re-trained with subset of Fantastic Breaks.
abstract_zh: 自动形状修复方法目前无法访问描述现实世界受损几何形状的数据集。我们展示了 Fantastic Breaks（以及在哪里找到它们：https://terascale-all-sensing-research-studio.github.io/FantasticBreaks），这是一个包含 150 个破碎物体的扫描、防水和清洁的 3D 网格的数据集，与完整的对应物配对并几何对齐。 Fantastic Breaks 包含类和材料标签、连接到损坏网格以生成完整网格的代理修复零件以及手动注释的断裂边界。通过对裂缝几何形状的详细分析，我们揭示了 Fantastic Breaks 与使用几何和物理方法生成的合成裂缝数据集之间的差异。我们展示了使用 Fantastic Breaks 进行的实验性形状修复评估，使用多种基于学习的方法，使用合成数据集进行预训练，并使用 Fantastic Breaks 子集进行重新训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为Fantastic Breaks的真实世界破损物体与完整物体配对的3D扫描数据集，用于改进自动形状修复研究。
AI.motivation: 现有自动形状修复方法缺乏真实破损几何数据，合成数据集存在几何和物理特性差异，需构建真实数据集推动算法发展。
AI.method: 采集150个真实破损物体及完整对应物的3D扫描数据，进行防水处理与几何配准，标注材料类别、修复部件及断裂边界，并对比分析与合成数据集的差异。
AI.result: 揭示真实破损数据与合成数据在断裂几何分布上的显著差异，验证基于该数据集微调的修复算法优于仅使用合成数据训练的模型。
AI.conclusion: Fantastic Breaks数据集为真实场景形状修复提供了关键基准，促进算法从合成数据向真实场景的迁移优化。

authors_text: Evan King,Haoxiang Yu,Sangsu Lee,Christine Julien
title: "Get ready for a party": Exploring smarter smart spaces with help from large language models
title_zh: “为聚会做好准备”：借助大语言模型探索更智能的智能空间
abstract: The right response to someone who says "get ready for a party" is deeply influenced by meaning and context. For a smart home assistant (e.g., Google Home), the ideal response might be to survey the available devices in the home and change their state to create a festive atmosphere. Current practical systems cannot service such requests since they require the ability to (1) infer meaning behind an abstract statement and (2) map that inference to a concrete course of action appropriate for the context (e.g., changing the settings of specific devices). In this paper, we leverage the observation that recent task-agnostic large language models (LLMs) like GPT-3 embody a vast amount of cross-domain, sometimes unpredictable contextual knowledge that existing rule-based home assistant systems lack, which can make them powerful tools for inferring user intent and generating appropriate context-dependent responses during smart home interactions. We first explore the feasibility of a system that places an LLM at the center of command inference and action planning, showing that LLMs have the capacity to infer intent behind vague, context-dependent commands like "get ready for a party" and respond with concrete, machine-parseable instructions that can be used to control smart devices. We furthermore demonstrate a proof-of-concept implementation that puts an LLM in control of real devices, showing its ability to infer intent and change device state appropriately with no fine-tuning or task-specific training. Our work hints at the promise of LLM-driven systems for context-awareness in smart environments, motivating future research in this area.
summary: The right response to someone who says "get ready for a party" is deeply influenced by meaning and context. For a smart home assistant (e.g., Google Home), the ideal response might be to survey the available devices in the home and change their state to create a festive atmosphere. Current practical systems cannot service such requests since they require the ability to (1) infer meaning behind an abstract statement and (2) map that inference to a concrete course of action appropriate for the context (e.g., changing the settings of specific devices). In this paper, we leverage the observation that recent task-agnostic large language models (LLMs) like GPT-3 embody a vast amount of cross-domain, sometimes unpredictable contextual knowledge that existing rule-based home assistant systems lack, which can make them powerful tools for inferring user intent and generating appropriate context-dependent responses during smart home interactions. We first explore the feasibility of a system that places an LLM at the center of command inference and action planning, showing that LLMs have the capacity to infer intent behind vague, context-dependent commands like "get ready for a party" and respond with concrete, machine-parseable instructions that can be used to control smart devices. We furthermore demonstrate a proof-of-concept implementation that puts an LLM in control of real devices, showing its ability to infer intent and change device state appropriately with no fine-tuning or task-specific training. Our work hints at the promise of LLM-driven systems for context-awareness in smart environments, motivating future research in this area.
abstract_zh: 对某人说“准备参加聚会”的正确回应深受含义和上下文的影响。对于智能家居助手（例如 Google Home），理想的响应可能是调查家里的可用设备并更改其状态以营造节日气氛。当前的实用系统无法满足此类请求，因为它们需要能够（1）推断抽象语句背后的含义，以及（2）将该推断映射到适合上下文的具体行动过程（例如，更改特定设备的设置）。在本文中，我们利用了这样的观察结果：GPT-3 等最新的任务无关大型语言模型 (LLM) 体现了现有基于规则的家庭助理系统所缺乏的大量跨领域、有时不可预测的上下文知识，这可以使它们成为在智能家居交互期间推断用户意图并生成适当的上下文相关响应的强大工具。我们首先探讨了将法学硕士置于命令推理和行动计划中心的系统的可行性，表明法学硕士有能力推断模糊的、依赖于上下文的命令（例如“为聚会做好准备”）背后的意图，并以可用于控制智能设备的具体的、机器可解析的指令进行响应。我们还演示了一种概念验证实现，使法学硕士能够控制真实设备，展示其无需微调或特定任务培训即可推断意图并适当更改设备状态的能力。我们的工作暗示了法学硕士驱动的系统在智能环境中实现情境感知的前景，从而推动了该领域的未来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨利用大型语言模型（LLM）解决智能家庭环境中抽象指令理解与执行的问题，以实现更智能的场景响应。
AI.motivation: 现有智能助手无法处理如'为派对做准备'等依赖语境的抽象指令，因其缺乏对意图的推理能力和场景化操作映射。
AI.method: 以LLM为核心构建系统，通过其跨领域知识推断用户意图，并生成可解析的设备控制指令，无需微调或任务特定训练。
AI.result: 验证了LLM可直接推断模糊指令并控制真实设备，成功实现无需额外训练的场景化响应证明概念。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的系统为智能环境中的上下文感知提供了新方向，值得进一步研究其在复杂场景中的应用潜力。

method: 以LLM为核心构建系统，通过其跨领域知识推断用户意图，并生成可解析的设备控制指令，无需微调或任务特定训练。
result: 验证了LLM可直接推断模糊指令并控制真实设备，成功实现无需额外训练的场景化响应证明概念。
conclusion: LLM驱动的系统为智能环境中的上下文感知提供了新方向，值得进一步研究其在复杂场景中的应用潜力。
search_text: "Get ready for a party": Exploring smarter smart spaces with help from large language models “为聚会做好准备”：借助大语言模型探索更智能的智能空间 The right response to someone who says "get ready for a party" is deeply influenced by meaning and context. For a smart home assistant (e.g., Google Home), the ideal response might be to survey the available devices in the home and change their state to create a festive atmosphere. Current practical systems cannot service such requests since they require the ability to (1) infer meaning behind an abstract statement and (2) map that inference to a concrete course of action appropriate for the context (e.g., changing the settings of specific devices). In this paper, we leverage the observation that recent task-agnostic large language models (LLMs) like GPT-3 embody a vast amount of cross-domain, sometimes unpredictable contextual knowledge that existing rule-based home assistant systems lack, which can make them powerful tools for inferring user intent and generating appropriate context-dependent responses during smart home interactions. We first explore the feasibility of a system that places an LLM at the center of command inference and action planning, showing that LLMs have the capacity to infer intent behind vague, context-dependent commands like "get ready for a party" and respond with concrete, machine-parseable instructions that can be used to control smart devices. We furthermore demonstrate a proof-of-concept implementation that puts an LLM in control of real devices, showing its ability to infer intent and change device state appropriately with no fine-tuning or task-specific training. Our work hints at the promise of LLM-driven systems for context-awareness in smart environments, motivating future research in this area. 对某人说“准备参加聚会”的正确回应深受含义和上下文的影响。对于智能家居助手（例如 Google Home），理想的响应可能是调查家里的可用设备并更改其状态以营造节日气氛。当前的实用系统无法满足此类请求，因为它们需要能够（1）推断抽象语句背后的含义，以及（2）将该推断映射到适合上下文的具体行动过程（例如，更改特定设备的设置）。在本文中，我们利用了这样的观察结果：GPT-3 等最新的任务无关大型语言模型 (LLM) 体现了现有基于规则的家庭助理系统所缺乏的大量跨领域、有时不可预测的上下文知识，这可以使它们成为在智能家居交互期间推断用户意图并生成适当的上下文相关响应的强大工具。我们首先探讨了将法学硕士置于命令推理和行动计划中心的系统的可行性，表明法学硕士有能力推断模糊的、依赖于上下文的命令（例如“为聚会做好准备”）背后的意图，并以可用于控制智能设备的具体的、机器可解析的指令进行响应。我们还演示了一种概念验证实现，使法学硕士能够控制真实设备，展示其无需微调或特定任务培训即可推断意图并适当更改设备状态的能力。我们的工作暗示了法学硕士驱动的系统在智能环境中实现情境感知的前景，从而推动了该领域的未来研究。 本文探讨利用大型语言模型（LLM）解决智能家庭环境中抽象指令理解与执行的问题，以实现更智能的场景响应。 Evan King,Haoxiang Yu,Sangsu Lee,Christine Julien cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Yizhuo Lu,Changde Du,Dianpeng Wang,Huiguang He
title: MindDiffuser: Controlled Image Reconstruction from Human Brain Activity with Semantic and Structural Diffusion
title_zh: MindDiffuser：通过语义和结构扩散从人脑活动中控制图像重建
abstract: Reconstructing visual stimuli from measured functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) has been a meaningful and challenging task. Previous studies have successfully achieved reconstructions with structures similar to the original images, such as the outlines and size of some natural images. However, these reconstructions lack explicit semantic information and are difficult to discern. In recent years, many studies have utilized multi-modal pre-trained models with stronger generative capabilities to reconstruct images that are semantically similar to the original ones. However, these images have uncontrollable structural information such as position and orientation. To address both of the aforementioned issues simultaneously, we propose a two-stage image reconstruction model called MindDiffuser, utilizing Stable Diffusion. In Stage 1, the VQ-VAE latent representations and the CLIP text embeddings decoded from fMRI are put into the image-to-image process of Stable Diffusion, which yields a preliminary image that contains semantic and structural information. In Stage 2, we utilize the low-level CLIP visual features decoded from fMRI as supervisory information, and continually adjust the two features in Stage 1 through backpropagation to align the structural information. The results of both qualitative and quantitative analyses demonstrate that our proposed model has surpassed the current state-of-the-art models in terms of reconstruction results on Natural Scenes Dataset (NSD). Furthermore, the results of ablation experiments indicate that each component of our model is effective for image reconstruction.
summary: Reconstructing visual stimuli from measured functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) has been a meaningful and challenging task. Previous studies have successfully achieved reconstructions with structures similar to the original images, such as the outlines and size of some natural images. However, these reconstructions lack explicit semantic information and are difficult to discern. In recent years, many studies have utilized multi-modal pre-trained models with stronger generative capabilities to reconstruct images that are semantically similar to the original ones. However, these images have uncontrollable structural information such as position and orientation. To address both of the aforementioned issues simultaneously, we propose a two-stage image reconstruction model called MindDiffuser, utilizing Stable Diffusion. In Stage 1, the VQ-VAE latent representations and the CLIP text embeddings decoded from fMRI are put into the image-to-image process of Stable Diffusion, which yields a preliminary image that contains semantic and structural information. In Stage 2, we utilize the low-level CLIP visual features decoded from fMRI as supervisory information, and continually adjust the two features in Stage 1 through backpropagation to align the structural information. The results of both qualitative and quantitative analyses demonstrate that our proposed model has surpassed the current state-of-the-art models in terms of reconstruction results on Natural Scenes Dataset (NSD). Furthermore, the results of ablation experiments indicate that each component of our model is effective for image reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 从测量的功能磁共振成像（fMRI）中重建视觉刺激是一项有意义且具有挑战性的任务。之前的研究已经成功实现了与原始图像结构相似的重建，例如一些自然图像的轮廓和大小。然而，这些重建缺乏明确的语义信息并且难以辨别。近年来，许多研究利用具有更强生成能力的多模态预训练模型来重建与原始图像语义相似的图像。然而，这些图像具有不可控的结构信息，例如位置和方向。为了同时解决上述两个问题，我们提出了一种利用稳定扩散的两阶段图像重建模型，称为 MindDiffuser。在第一阶段，VQ-VAE 潜在表示和从 fMRI 解码的 CLIP 文本嵌入被放入稳定扩散的图像到图像过程中，从而产生包含语义和结构信息的初步图像。在第2阶段，我们利用从fMRI解码的低级CLIP视觉特征作为监督信息，并通过反向传播不断调整第1阶段的两个特征以对齐结构信息。定性和定量分析的结果表明，我们提出的模型在自然场景数据集（NSD）的重建结果方面已经超越了当前最先进的模型。此外，消融实验的结果表明我们模型的每个组件对于图像重建都是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MindDiffuser模型，通过结合语义和结构扩散技术，从人类脑活动数据中重建具有语义和结构信息的图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法重建的图像或缺乏语义信息或无法控制结构信息，需同时解决语义与结构重建的双重问题。
AI.method: 采用两阶段Stable Diffusion框架：第一阶段利用VQ-VAE和CLIP文本嵌入生成初步图像；第二阶段通过CLIP视觉特征反向传播优化结构对齐。
AI.result: 在NSD数据集上超越现有最佳模型，消融实验验证各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: MindDiffuser有效融合语义与结构信息，为脑活动图像重建提供新方法。

authors_text: Junhao Dong,Junxi Chen,Xiaohua Xie,Jianhuang Lai,Hao Chen
title: Survey on Adversarial Attack and Defense for Medical Image Analysis: Methods and Challenges
title_zh: 医学图像分析的对抗性攻击和防御综述：方法和挑战
comment: Accepted by ACM Computing Surveys (CSUR) (DOI: https://doi.org/10.1145/3702638)
comments: Accepted by ACM Computing Surveys (CSUR) (DOI: https://doi.org/10.1145/3702638)
abstract: Deep learning techniques have achieved superior performance in computer-aided medical image analysis, yet they are still vulnerable to imperceptible adversarial attacks, resulting in potential misdiagnosis in clinical practice. Oppositely, recent years have also witnessed remarkable progress in defense against these tailored adversarial examples in deep medical diagnosis systems. In this exposition, we present a comprehensive survey on recent advances in adversarial attacks and defenses for medical image analysis with a systematic taxonomy in terms of the application scenario. We also provide a unified framework for different types of adversarial attack and defense methods in the context of medical image analysis. For a fair comparison, we establish a new benchmark for adversarially robust medical diagnosis models obtained by adversarial training under various scenarios. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first survey paper that provides a thorough evaluation of adversarially robust medical diagnosis models. By analyzing qualitative and quantitative results, we conclude this survey with a detailed discussion of current challenges for adversarial attack and defense in medical image analysis systems to shed light on future research directions. Code is available on \href{https://github.com/tomvii/Adv_MIA}{\color{red}{GitHub}}.
summary: Deep learning techniques have achieved superior performance in computer-aided medical image analysis, yet they are still vulnerable to imperceptible adversarial attacks, resulting in potential misdiagnosis in clinical practice. Oppositely, recent years have also witnessed remarkable progress in defense against these tailored adversarial examples in deep medical diagnosis systems. In this exposition, we present a comprehensive survey on recent advances in adversarial attacks and defenses for medical image analysis with a systematic taxonomy in terms of the application scenario. We also provide a unified framework for different types of adversarial attack and defense methods in the context of medical image analysis. For a fair comparison, we establish a new benchmark for adversarially robust medical diagnosis models obtained by adversarial training under various scenarios. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first survey paper that provides a thorough evaluation of adversarially robust medical diagnosis models. By analyzing qualitative and quantitative results, we conclude this survey with a detailed discussion of current challenges for adversarial attack and defense in medical image analysis systems to shed light on future research directions. Code is available on \href{https://github.com/tomvii/Adv_MIA}{\color{red}{GitHub}}.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术在计算机辅助医学图像分析中取得了优异的性能，但它们仍然容易受到难以察觉的对抗性攻击，导致临床实践中潜在的误诊。相反，近年来在深度医学诊断系统中防御这些定制的对抗样本方面也取得了显着进展。在本次博览会中，我们对医学图像分析的对抗性攻击和防御的最新进展进行了全面的调查，并根据应用场景进行了系统的分类。我们还为医学图像分析背景下不同类型的对抗性攻击和防御方法提供了统一的框架。为了公平比较，我们为在各种场景下通过对抗训练获得的对抗稳健的医学诊断模型建立了新的基准。据我们所知，这是第一篇对对抗性稳健的医学诊断模型进行全面评估的调查论文。通过分析定性和定量结果，我们在总结本次调查时详细讨论了医学图像分析系统中对抗性攻击和防御的当前挑战，以阐明未来的研究方向。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/tomvii/Adv_MIA}{\color{red}{GitHub}} 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了医疗图像分析中的对抗攻击与防御方法，并提出了统一的框架和新的基准。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在医疗图像分析中表现优异，但其易受对抗攻击的影响，可能导致误诊，因此需要系统研究对抗攻击与防御方法。
AI.method: 本文通过系统分类和统一框架，对医疗图像分析中的对抗攻击与防御方法进行综述，并建立新的基准进行公平比较。
AI.result: 本文首次对对抗鲁棒的医疗诊断模型进行了全面评估，并通过定性和定量结果分析，指出了当前挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本文总结了医疗图像分析系统中对抗攻击与防御的当前挑战，并为未来研究方向提供了指导。

To the best of our knowledge, this is the first survey paper that provides a thorough evaluation of adversarially robust medical diagnosis models. By analyzing qualitative and quantitative results, we conclude this survey with a detailed discussion of current challenges for adversarial attack and defense in medical image analysis systems to shed light on future research directions. Code is available on \href{https://github.com/tomvii/Adv_MIA}{\color{red}{GitHub}}. 深度学习技术在计算机辅助医学图像分析中取得了优异的性能，但它们仍然容易受到难以察觉的对抗性攻击，导致临床实践中潜在的误诊。相反，近年来在深度医学诊断系统中防御这些定制的对抗样本方面也取得了显着进展。在本次博览会中，我们对医学图像分析的对抗性攻击和防御的最新进展进行了全面的调查，并根据应用场景进行了系统的分类。我们还为医学图像分析背景下不同类型的对抗性攻击和防御方法提供了统一的框架。为了公平比较，我们为在各种场景下通过对抗训练获得的对抗稳健的医学诊断模型建立了新的基准。据我们所知，这是第一篇对对抗性稳健的医学诊断模型进行全面评估的调查论文。通过分析定性和定量结果，我们在总结本次调查时详细讨论了医学图像分析系统中对抗性攻击和防御的当前挑战，以阐明未来的研究方向。代码可在 \href{https://github.com/tomvii/Adv_MIA}{\color{red}{GitHub}} 上找到。 本文综述了医疗图像分析中的对抗攻击与防御方法，并提出了统一的框架和新的基准。 Junhao Dong,Junxi Chen,Xiaohua Xie,Jianhuang Lai,Hao Chen eess.IV,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Jordan J. Bird,Ahmad Lotfi
title: CIFAKE: Image Classification and Explainable Identification of AI-Generated Synthetic Images
title_zh: CIFAKE：人工智能生成的合成图像的图像分类和可解释识别
abstract: Recent technological advances in synthetic data have enabled the generation of images with such high quality that human beings cannot tell the difference between real-life photographs and Artificial Intelligence (AI) generated images. Given the critical necessity of data reliability and authentication, this article proposes to enhance our ability to recognise AI-generated images through computer vision. Initially, a synthetic dataset is generated that mirrors the ten classes of the already available CIFAR-10 dataset with latent diffusion which provides a contrasting set of images for comparison to real photographs. The model is capable of generating complex visual attributes, such as photorealistic reflections in water. The two sets of data present as a binary classification problem with regard to whether the photograph is real or generated by AI. This study then proposes the use of a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to classify the images into two categories; Real or Fake. Following hyperparameter tuning and the training of 36 individual network topologies, the optimal approach could correctly classify the images with 92.98% accuracy. Finally, this study implements explainable AI via Gradient Class Activation Mapping to explore which features within the images are useful for classification. Interpretation reveals interesting concepts within the image, in particular, noting that the actual entity itself does not hold useful information for classification; instead, the model focuses on small visual imperfections in the background of the images. The complete dataset engineered for this study, referred to as the CIFAKE dataset, is made publicly available to the research community for future work.
summary: Recent technological advances in synthetic data have enabled the generation of images with such high quality that human beings cannot tell the difference between real-life photographs and Artificial Intelligence (AI) generated images. Given the critical necessity of data reliability and authentication, this article proposes to enhance our ability to recognise AI-generated images through computer vision. Initially, a synthetic dataset is generated that mirrors the ten classes of the already available CIFAR-10 dataset with latent diffusion which provides a contrasting set of images for comparison to real photographs. The model is capable of generating complex visual attributes, such as photorealistic reflections in water. The two sets of data present as a binary classification problem with regard to whether the photograph is real or generated by AI. This study then proposes the use of a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to classify the images into two categories; Real or Fake. Following hyperparameter tuning and the training of 36 individual network topologies, the optimal approach could correctly classify the images with 92.98% accuracy. Finally, this study implements explainable AI via Gradient Class Activation Mapping to explore which features within the images are useful for classification. Interpretation reveals interesting concepts within the image, in particular, noting that the actual entity itself does not hold useful information for classification; instead, the model focuses on small visual imperfections in the background of the images. The complete dataset engineered for this study, referred to as the CIFAKE dataset, is made publicly available to the research community for future work.
abstract_zh: 合成数据方面的最新技术进步使得能够生成高质量的图像，以至于人类无法区分现实生活中的照片和人工智能 (AI) 生成的图像。考虑到数据可靠性和身份验证的至关重要性，本文建议增强我们通过计算机视觉识别人工智能生成的图像的能力。最初，生成一个合成数据集，该数据集反映了现有 CIFAR-10 数据集的十个类别，具有潜在扩散功能，可提供一组对比图像以与真实照片进行比较。该模型能够生成复杂的视觉属性，例如水中逼真的反射。这两组数据呈现为关于照片是真实的还是人工智能生成的二元分类问题。然后，本研究提出使用卷积神经网络（CNN）将图像分为两类：真还是假。经过超参数调整和 36 个单独网络拓扑的训练后，最佳方法可以以 92.98% 的准确率正确分类图像。最后，本研究通过梯度类激活映射实现可解释的人工智能，以探索图像中的哪些特征对分类有用。解释揭示了图像中有趣的概念，特别是注意到实际实体本身不包含用于分类的有用信息；相反，该模型专注于图像背景中的细小视觉缺陷。为本研究设计的完整数据集（称为 CIFAKE 数据集）已公开提供给研究界用于未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CIFAKE数据集和基于CNN的分类模型，用于识别AI生成的合成图像并解释分类依据。
AI.motivation: 随着AI生成图像质量提升，区分真实照片与合成图像对数据可靠性至关重要，亟需自动化识别方法。
AI.method: 通过潜在扩散模型生成与CIFAR-10对应的合成数据集，训练36种CNN结构并调优超参数，结合梯度类激活映射（Grad-CAM）分析分类特征。
AI.result: 分类模型达到92.98%准确率，发现模型依赖背景中的细微视觉缺陷而非主体内容进行判断。
AI.conclusion: CIFAKE数据集和方法为AI生成图像识别提供了有效工具，揭示了合成图像的可解释性特征，推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Bo He,Xitong Yang,Hanyu Wang,Zuxuan Wu,Hao Chen,Shuaiyi Huang,Yixuan Ren,Ser-Nam Lim,Abhinav Shrivastava
title: Towards Scalable Neural Representation for Diverse Videos
title_zh: 实现多样化视频的可扩展神经表示
abstract: Implicit neural representations (INR) have gained increasing attention in representing 3D scenes and images, and have been recently applied to encode videos (e.g., NeRV, E-NeRV). While achieving promising results, existing INR-based methods are limited to encoding a handful of short videos (e.g., seven 5-second videos in the UVG dataset) with redundant visual content, leading to a model design that fits individual video frames independently and is not efficiently scalable to a large number of diverse videos. This paper focuses on developing neural representations for a more practical setup -- encoding long and/or a large number of videos with diverse visual content. We first show that instead of dividing videos into small subsets and encoding them with separate models, encoding long and diverse videos jointly with a unified model achieves better compression results. Based on this observation, we propose D-NeRV, a novel neural representation framework designed to encode diverse videos by (i) decoupling clip-specific visual content from motion information, (ii) introducing temporal reasoning into the implicit neural network, and (iii) employing the task-oriented flow as intermediate output to reduce spatial redundancies. Our new model largely surpasses NeRV and traditional video compression techniques on UCF101 and UVG datasets on the video compression task. Moreover, when used as an efficient data-loader, D-NeRV achieves 3%-10% higher accuracy than NeRV on action recognition tasks on the UCF101 dataset under the same compression ratios.
summary: Implicit neural representations (INR) have gained increasing attention in representing 3D scenes and images, and have been recently applied to encode videos (e.g., NeRV, E-NeRV). While achieving promising results, existing INR-based methods are limited to encoding a handful of short videos (e.g., seven 5-second videos in the UVG dataset) with redundant visual content, leading to a model design that fits individual video frames independently and is not efficiently scalable to a large number of diverse videos. This paper focuses on developing neural representations for a more practical setup -- encoding long and/or a large number of videos with diverse visual content. We first show that instead of dividing videos into small subsets and encoding them with separate models, encoding long and diverse videos jointly with a unified model achieves better compression results. Based on this observation, we propose D-NeRV, a novel neural representation framework designed to encode diverse videos by (i) decoupling clip-specific visual content from motion information, (ii) introducing temporal reasoning into the implicit neural network, and (iii) employing the task-oriented flow as intermediate output to reduce spatial redundancies. Our new model largely surpasses NeRV and traditional video compression techniques on UCF101 and UVG datasets on the video compression task. Moreover, when used as an efficient data-loader, D-NeRV achieves 3%-10% higher accuracy than NeRV on action recognition tasks on the UCF101 dataset under the same compression ratios.
abstract_zh: 隐式神经表示 (INR) 在表示 3D 场景和图像方面受到越来越多的关注，并且最近已应用于视频编码（例如 NeRV、E-NeRV）。虽然取得了有希望的结果，但现有的基于 INR 的方法仅限于对少数具有冗余视觉内容的短视频（例如 UVG 数据集中的 7 个 5 秒视频）进行编码，从而导致模型设计独立适合各个视频帧，并且无法有效地扩展到大量不同的视频。本文重点开发神经表征以实现更实用的设置——对具有不同视觉内容的长视频和/或大量视频进行编码。我们首先表明，与将视频划分为小子集并使用单独的模型对其进行编码不同，使用统一的模型对长且多样化的视频进行联合编码可以实现更好的压缩结果。基于这一观察，我们提出了 D-NeRV，一种新颖的神经表示框架，旨在通过以下方式对不同的视频进行编码：（i）将特定于剪辑的视觉内容与运动信息解耦，（ii）将时间推理引入隐式神经网络，以及（iii）采用面向任务的流作为中间输出以减少空间冗余。我们的新模型在视频压缩任务上在 UCF101 和 UVG 数据集上大大超越了 NeRV 和传统视频压缩技术。此外，当用作高效的数据加载器时，在相同压缩比下，D-NeRV 在 UCF101 数据集上的动作识别任务上的准确率比 NeRV 高 3%-10%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为D-NeRV的神经表示框架，用于高效编码多样化的长视频。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于隐式神经表示（INR）的方法在处理少量短视频时表现良好，但在处理大量多样化视频时存在效率和可扩展性问题。
AI.method: D-NeRV通过解耦视频片段的视觉内容和运动信息、引入时间推理机制以及使用任务导向的流作为中间输出来减少空间冗余，实现对多样化视频的联合编码。
AI.result: D-NeRV在UCF101和UVG数据集上的视频压缩任务中显著优于NeRV和传统视频压缩技术，并且在相同压缩比下，在UCF101数据集上的动作识别任务中准确率提高了3%-10%。
AI.conclusion: D-NeRV为处理多样化视频提供了一种高效且可扩展的神经表示框架，具有更好的压缩效果和应用潜力。

Based on this observation, we propose D-NeRV, a novel neural representation framework designed to encode diverse videos by (i) decoupling clip-specific visual content from motion information, (ii) introducing temporal reasoning into the implicit neural network, and (iii) employing the task-oriented flow as intermediate output to reduce spatial redundancies. Our new model largely surpasses NeRV and traditional video compression techniques on UCF101 and UVG datasets on the video compression task. Moreover, when used as an efficient data-loader, D-NeRV achieves 3%-10% higher accuracy than NeRV on action recognition tasks on the UCF101 dataset under the same compression ratios. 隐式神经表示 (INR) 在表示 3D 场景和图像方面受到越来越多的关注，并且最近已应用于视频编码（例如 NeRV、E-NeRV）。虽然取得了有希望的结果，但现有的基于 INR 的方法仅限于对少数具有冗余视觉内容的短视频（例如 UVG 数据集中的 7 个 5 秒视频）进行编码，从而导致模型设计独立适合各个视频帧，并且无法有效地扩展到大量不同的视频。本文重点开发神经表征以实现更实用的设置——对具有不同视觉内容的长视频和/或大量视频进行编码。我们首先表明，与将视频划分为小子集并使用单独的模型对其进行编码不同，使用统一的模型对长且多样化的视频进行联合编码可以实现更好的压缩结果。基于这一观察，我们提出了 D-NeRV，一种新颖的神经表示框架，旨在通过以下方式对不同的视频进行编码：（i）将特定于剪辑的视觉内容与运动信息解耦，（ii）将时间推理引入隐式神经网络，以及（iii）采用面向任务的流作为中间输出以减少空间冗余。我们的新模型在视频压缩任务上在 UCF101 和 UVG 数据集上大大超越了 NeRV 和传统视频压缩技术。此外，当用作高效的数据加载器时，在相同压缩比下，D-NeRV 在 UCF101 数据集上的动作识别任务上的准确率比 NeRV 高 3%-10%。 本文提出了一种名为D-NeRV的神经表示框架，用于高效编码多样化的长视频。 Bo He,Xitong Yang,Hanyu Wang,Zuxuan Wu,Hao Chen,Shuaiyi Huang,Yixuan Ren,Ser-Nam Lim,Abhinav Shrivastava cs.CV

authors_text: Wentao Chen,Chenyang Si,Zhang Zhang,Liang Wang,Zilei Wang,Tieniu Tan
title: Semantic Prompt for Few-Shot Image Recognition
title_zh: 少样本图像识别的语义提示
abstract: Few-shot learning is a challenging problem since only a few examples are provided to recognize a new class. Several recent studies exploit additional semantic information, e.g. text embeddings of class names, to address the issue of rare samples through combining semantic prototypes with visual prototypes. However, these methods still suffer from the spurious visual features learned from the rare support samples, resulting in limited benefits. In this paper, we propose a novel Semantic Prompt (SP) approach for few-shot learning. Instead of the naive exploitation of semantic information for remedying classifiers, we explore leveraging semantic information as prompts to tune the visual feature extraction network adaptively. Specifically, we design two complementary mechanisms to insert semantic prompts into the feature extractor: one is to enable the interaction between semantic prompts and patch embeddings along the spatial dimension via self-attention, another is to supplement visual features with the transformed semantic prompts along the channel dimension. By combining these two mechanisms, the feature extractor presents a better ability to attend to the class-specific features and obtains more generalized image representations with merely a few support samples. Through extensive experiments on four datasets, the proposed approach achieves promising results, improving the 1-shot learning accuracy by 3.67% on average.
summary: Few-shot learning is a challenging problem since only a few examples are provided to recognize a new class. Several recent studies exploit additional semantic information, e.g. text embeddings of class names, to address the issue of rare samples through combining semantic prototypes with visual prototypes. However, these methods still suffer from the spurious visual features learned from the rare support samples, resulting in limited benefits. In this paper, we propose a novel Semantic Prompt (SP) approach for few-shot learning. Instead of the naive exploitation of semantic information for remedying classifiers, we explore leveraging semantic information as prompts to tune the visual feature extraction network adaptively. Specifically, we design two complementary mechanisms to insert semantic prompts into the feature extractor: one is to enable the interaction between semantic prompts and patch embeddings along the spatial dimension via self-attention, another is to supplement visual features with the transformed semantic prompts along the channel dimension. By combining these two mechanisms, the feature extractor presents a better ability to attend to the class-specific features and obtains more generalized image representations with merely a few support samples. Through extensive experiments on four datasets, the proposed approach achieves promising results, improving the 1-shot learning accuracy by 3.67% on average.
abstract_zh: 小样本学习是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为只提供了几个例子来识别新类别。最近的几项研究利用了额外的语义信息，例如类名的文本嵌入，通过将语义原型与视觉原型相结合来解决稀有样本的问题。然而，这些方法仍然受到从稀有支持样本中学习到的虚假视觉特征的影响，导致收益有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于小样本学习的新颖的语义提示（SP）方法。我们不再天真地利用语义信息来修正分类器，而是探索利用语义信息作为提示来自适应地调整视觉特征提取网络。具体来说，我们设计了两种互补机制将语义提示插入到特征提取器中：一种是通过自注意力使语义提示和补丁嵌入在空间维度上进行交互，另一种是沿通道维度用转换后的语义提示来补充视觉特征。通过结合这两种机制，特征提取器表现出更好的能力来关注特定于类的特征，并仅用少量支持样本即可获得更通用的图像表示。通过对四个数据集的广泛实验，所提出的方法取得了可喜的结果，将 1-shot 学习准确率平均提高了 3.67%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种语义提示（SP）方法，通过结合语义信息与视觉特征提取网络，提升小样本图像识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用语义信息辅助小样本学习时，仍受制于稀疏支持样本中的虚假视觉特征，导致效果有限。
AI.method: 设计两种互补机制将语义提示嵌入特征提取器：1）通过自注意力机制在空间维度实现语义提示与图像块嵌入的交互；2）在通道维度用转换后的语义提示补充视觉特征。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的实验表明，该方法平均提升了3.67%的1-shot学习准确率。
AI.conclusion: 语义提示通过自适应调整视觉特征提取网络，增强了对类别特异性特征的关注能力，显著提升了小样本场景下的泛化性能。

authors_text: Shunsuke Kitada
title: Improving Prediction Performance and Model Interpretability through Attention Mechanisms from Basic and Applied Research Perspectives
title_zh: 从基础和应用研究的角度通过注意力机制提高预测性能和模型可解释性
comment: The bulletin of Graduate School of Science and Engineering, Hosei University, Vol.64 (03/2023). This article draws heavily from arxiv:2009.12064, arxiv:2104.08763, arxiv:1905.07289, and arxiv:2204.11588
comments: The bulletin of Graduate School of Science and Engineering, Hosei University, Vol.64 (03/2023). This article draws heavily from arxiv:2009.12064, arxiv:2104.08763, arxiv:1905.07289, and arxiv:2204.11588
abstract: With the dramatic advances in deep learning technology, machine learning research is focusing on improving the interpretability of model predictions as well as prediction performance in both basic and applied research. While deep learning models have much higher prediction performance than traditional machine learning models, the specific prediction process is still difficult to interpret and/or explain. This is known as the black-boxing of machine learning models and is recognized as a particularly important problem in a wide range of research fields, including manufacturing, commerce, robotics, and other industries where the use of such technology has become commonplace, as well as the medical field, where mistakes are not tolerated. This bulletin is based on the summary of the author's dissertation. The research summarized in the dissertation focuses on the attention mechanism, which has been the focus of much attention in recent years, and discusses its potential for both basic research in terms of improving prediction performance and interpretability, and applied research in terms of evaluating it for real-world applications using large data sets beyond the laboratory environment. The dissertation also concludes with a summary of the implications of these findings for subsequent research and future prospects in the field.
summary: With the dramatic advances in deep learning technology, machine learning research is focusing on improving the interpretability of model predictions as well as prediction performance in both basic and applied research. While deep learning models have much higher prediction performance than traditional machine learning models, the specific prediction process is still difficult to interpret and/or explain. This is known as the black-boxing of machine learning models and is recognized as a particularly important problem in a wide range of research fields, including manufacturing, commerce, robotics, and other industries where the use of such technology has become commonplace, as well as the medical field, where mistakes are not tolerated. This bulletin is based on the summary of the author's dissertation. The research summarized in the dissertation focuses on the attention mechanism, which has been the focus of much attention in recent years, and discusses its potential for both basic research in terms of improving prediction performance and interpretability, and applied research in terms of evaluating it for real-world applications using large data sets beyond the laboratory environment. The dissertation also concludes with a summary of the implications of these findings for subsequent research and future prospects in the field.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习技术的巨大进步，机器学习研究的重点是提高模型预测的可解释性以及基础和应用研究中的预测性能。虽然深度学习模型比传统机器学习模型具有更高的预测性能，但具体的预测过程仍然难以解释和/或解释。这被称为机器学习模型的黑盒，在广泛的研究领域被认为是一个特别重要的问题，包括制造、商业、机器人和其他使用此类技术已变得司空见惯的行业，以及不允许错误的医疗领域。本公告基于作者论文的摘要。论文总结的研究重点是近年来备受关注的注意力机制，并讨论了其在提高预测性能和可解释性方面的基础研究以及在使用实验室环境之外的大数据集评估其实际应用方面的应用研究的潜力。本文还总结了这些发现对该领域后续研究和未来前景的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过注意力机制提升深度学习模型的预测性能与可解释性，并从基础研究和应用研究两个视角探讨其潜力。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型虽预测性能优异，但存在黑箱问题，导致其在医疗、制造等高风险领域应用受限，亟需提升模型可解释性。
AI.method: 基于作者的博士论文研究，系统分析注意力机制在基础研究中对预测性能的优化作用，并通过大规模真实场景数据验证其在应用研究中的有效性。
AI.result: 研究证实注意力机制能有效提升模型可解释性，同时保持较高预测精度，为跨行业应用提供了理论支持与实践验证。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制为解决深度学习黑箱问题提供了可行路径，未来需进一步探索其在复杂工业场景中的适应性与扩展性。

authors_text: Tobias Kalb,Jürgen Beyerer
title: Principles of Forgetting in Domain-Incremental Semantic Segmentation in Adverse Weather Conditions
title_zh: 领域遗忘原理——恶劣天气条件下的增量语义分割
comment: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023
comments: Accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition 2023
abstract: Deep neural networks for scene perception in automated vehicles achieve excellent results for the domains they were trained on. However, in real-world conditions, the domain of operation and its underlying data distribution are subject to change. Adverse weather conditions, in particular, can significantly decrease model performance when such data are not available during training.Additionally, when a model is incrementally adapted to a new domain, it suffers from catastrophic forgetting, causing a significant drop in performance on previously observed domains. Despite recent progress in reducing catastrophic forgetting, its causes and effects remain obscure. Therefore, we study how the representations of semantic segmentation models are affected during domain-incremental learning in adverse weather conditions. Our experiments and representational analyses indicate that catastrophic forgetting is primarily caused by changes to low-level features in domain-incremental learning and that learning more general features on the source domain using pre-training and image augmentations leads to efficient feature reuse in subsequent tasks, which drastically reduces catastrophic forgetting. These findings highlight the importance of methods that facilitate generalized features for effective continual learning algorithms.
summary: Deep neural networks for scene perception in automated vehicles achieve excellent results for the domains they were trained on. However, in real-world conditions, the domain of operation and its underlying data distribution are subject to change. Adverse weather conditions, in particular, can significantly decrease model performance when such data are not available during training.Additionally, when a model is incrementally adapted to a new domain, it suffers from catastrophic forgetting, causing a significant drop in performance on previously observed domains. Despite recent progress in reducing catastrophic forgetting, its causes and effects remain obscure. Therefore, we study how the representations of semantic segmentation models are affected during domain-incremental learning in adverse weather conditions. Our experiments and representational analyses indicate that catastrophic forgetting is primarily caused by changes to low-level features in domain-incremental learning and that learning more general features on the source domain using pre-training and image augmentations leads to efficient feature reuse in subsequent tasks, which drastically reduces catastrophic forgetting. These findings highlight the importance of methods that facilitate generalized features for effective continual learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 用于自动车辆场景感知的深度神经网络在其训练领域取得了优异的结果。然而，在现实条件下，操作域及其底层数据分布可能会发生变化。特别是，当训练期间无法获得此类数据时，恶劣的天气条件会显着降低模型性能。此外，当模型逐渐适应新领域时，它会遭受灾难性遗忘，导致先前观察到的领域的性能显着下降。尽管最近在减少灾难性遗忘方面取得了进展，但其原因和影响仍然不清楚。因此，我们研究了恶劣天气条件下领域增量学习期间语义分割模型的表示如何受到影响。我们的实验和代表性分析表明，灾难性遗忘主要是由域增量学习中低级特征的变化引起的，并且使用预训练和图像增强学习源域上更通用的特征可以在后续任务中有效地重用特征，从而大大减少灾难性遗忘。这些发现强调了促进有效持续学习算法的通用特征的方法的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在恶劣天气条件下进行领域增量语义分割时，模型遗忘的原理及应对方法。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络在自动驾驶等场景中因领域变化和恶劣天气导致性能下降，且增量学习时易出现灾难性遗忘问题，需探索其成因与解决方案。
AI.method: 通过实验与表征分析，发现领域增量学习中低级特征变化是遗忘主因，并提出通过预训练和图像增强学习更通用特征以实现高效特征复用。
AI.result: 实验表明，学习通用特征可显著减少灾难性遗忘，提升模型在新旧领域中的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通用特征的学习对有效持续学习算法至关重要，为领域增量学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Shay Snyder,Hunter Thompson,Md Abdullah-Al Kaiser,Gregory Schwartz,Akhilesh Jaiswal,Maryam Parsa
title: Object Motion Sensitivity: A Bio-inspired Solution to the Ego-motion Problem for Event-based Cameras
title_zh: 物体运动灵敏度：基于事件的相机自我运动问题的仿生解决方案
comment: This document is 9 pages and has 6 figures, tables, and algorithms
comments: This document is 9 pages and has 6 figures, tables, and algorithms
abstract: Neuromorphic (event-based) image sensors draw inspiration from the human-retina to create an electronic device that can process visual stimuli in a way that closely resembles its biological counterpart. These sensors process information significantly different than the traditional RGB sensors. Specifically, the sensory information generated by event-based image sensors are orders of magnitude sparser compared to that of RGB sensors. The first generation of neuromorphic image sensors, Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS), are inspired by the computations confined to the photoreceptors and the first retinal synapse. In this work, we highlight the capability of the second generation of neuromorphic image sensors, Integrated Retinal Functionality in CMOS Image Sensors (IRIS), which aims to mimic full retinal computations from photoreceptors to output of the retina (retinal ganglion cells) for targeted feature-extraction. The feature of choice in this work is Object Motion Sensitivity (OMS) that is processed locally in the IRIS sensor. Our results show that OMS can accomplish standard computer vision tasks with similar efficiency to conventional RGB and DVS solutions but offers drastic bandwidth reduction. This cuts the wireless and computing power budgets and opens up vast opportunities in high-speed, robust, energy-efficient, and low-bandwidth real-time decision making.
summary: Neuromorphic (event-based) image sensors draw inspiration from the human-retina to create an electronic device that can process visual stimuli in a way that closely resembles its biological counterpart. These sensors process information significantly different than the traditional RGB sensors. Specifically, the sensory information generated by event-based image sensors are orders of magnitude sparser compared to that of RGB sensors. The first generation of neuromorphic image sensors, Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS), are inspired by the computations confined to the photoreceptors and the first retinal synapse. In this work, we highlight the capability of the second generation of neuromorphic image sensors, Integrated Retinal Functionality in CMOS Image Sensors (IRIS), which aims to mimic full retinal computations from photoreceptors to output of the retina (retinal ganglion cells) for targeted feature-extraction. The feature of choice in this work is Object Motion Sensitivity (OMS) that is processed locally in the IRIS sensor. Our results show that OMS can accomplish standard computer vision tasks with similar efficiency to conventional RGB and DVS solutions but offers drastic bandwidth reduction. This cuts the wireless and computing power budgets and opens up vast opportunities in high-speed, robust, energy-efficient, and low-bandwidth real-time decision making.
abstract_zh: 神经形态（基于事件）图像传感器从人类视网膜中汲取灵感，创建了一种电子设备，可以以与其生物对应物非常相似的方式处理视觉刺激。这些传感器处理信息的方式与传统 RGB 传感器显着不同。具体来说，与 RGB 传感器相比，基于事件的图像传感器生成的传感信息要稀疏几个数量级。第一代神经形态图像传感器动态视觉传感器 (DVS) 的灵感来自仅限于感光器和第一个视网膜突触的计算。在这项工作中，我们重点介绍了第二代神经形态图像传感器的功能，即 CMOS 图像传感器中的集成视网膜功能 (IRIS)，其旨在模拟从光感受器到视网膜（视网膜神经节细胞）输出的完整视网膜计算，以进行目标特征提取。这项工作中选择的功能是在 IRIS 传感器中本地处理的对象运动灵敏度 (OMS)。我们的结果表明，OMS 可以完成标准计算机视觉任务，其效率与传统 RGB 和 DVS 解决方案相似，但带宽大幅减少。这削减了无线和计算能力预算，并为高速、稳健、节能和低带宽实时决策开辟了巨大的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生物启发的物体运动敏感性（OMS）方法，利用第二代神经形态传感器IRIS解决事件相机的自运动问题。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB和DVS传感器存在带宽高、能耗大的问题，需开发更高效、低带宽的视觉处理方案。
AI.method: 采用模仿视网膜全功能的IRIS传感器，通过局部处理物体运动敏感性特征实现目标检测与运动估计。
AI.result: OMS在保持与传统方案相似效率的同时，显著降低带宽需求，适用于高速实时决策场景。
AI.conclusion: OMS为高能效、低带宽的实时视觉系统提供了新思路，推动事件相机在机器人等领域的应用。
