authors_text: Simon Lutz,Daniil Kaminskyi,Florian Wittbold,Simon Dierl,Falk Howar,Barbara König,Emmanuel Müller,Daniel Neider
title: Unsupervised Automata Learning via Discrete Optimization
title_zh: 通过离散优化进行无监督自动机学习
abstract: Automata learning is a successful tool for many application domains such as robotics and automatic verification. Typically, automata learning techniques operate in a supervised learning setting (active or passive) where they learn a finite state machine in contexts where additional information, such as labeled system executions, is available. However, other settings, such as learning from unlabeled data - an important aspect in machine learning - remain unexplored. To overcome this limitation, we propose a framework for learning a deterministic finite automaton (DFA) from a given multi-set of unlabeled words. We show that this problem is computationally hard and develop three learning algorithms based on constraint optimization. Moreover, we introduce novel regularization schemes for our optimization problems that improve the overall interpretability of our DFAs. Using a prototype implementation, we demonstrate practical feasibility in the context of unsupervised anomaly detection.
summary: Automata learning is a successful tool for many application domains such as robotics and automatic verification. Typically, automata learning techniques operate in a supervised learning setting (active or passive) where they learn a finite state machine in contexts where additional information, such as labeled system executions, is available. However, other settings, such as learning from unlabeled data - an important aspect in machine learning - remain unexplored. To overcome this limitation, we propose a framework for learning a deterministic finite automaton (DFA) from a given multi-set of unlabeled words. We show that this problem is computationally hard and develop three learning algorithms based on constraint optimization. Moreover, we introduce novel regularization schemes for our optimization problems that improve the overall interpretability of our DFAs. Using a prototype implementation, we demonstrate practical feasibility in the context of unsupervised anomaly detection.
abstract_zh: 自动机学习是许多应用领域（例如机器人和自动验证）的成功工具。通常，自动机学习技术在监督学习环境（主动或被动）中运行，它们在可以获得附加信息（例如标记的系统执行）的上下文中学习有限状态机。然而，其他设置，例如从未标记的数据中学习（机器学习的一个重要方面）仍未得到探索。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一个框架，用于从给定的多组未标记单词中学习确定性有限自动机（DFA）。我们证明这个问题在计算上是困难的，并开发了三种基于约束优化的学习算法。此外，我们为优化问题引入了新颖的正则化方案，从而提高了 DFA 的整体可解释性。使用原型实现，我们展示了无监督异常检测背景下的实际可行性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过离散优化从未标记数据中学习确定性有限自动机（DFA）的无监督学习框架。
AI.motivation: 传统自动机学习依赖于有监督数据，但无监督学习在机器学习中至关重要，而现有研究尚未充分探索从未标记数据中学习自动机的可行性。
AI.method: 提出基于约束优化的三种学习算法，并引入新的正则化方案以提高DFA的可解释性。
AI.result: 通过原型实现验证了该方法在无监督异常检测中的实际可行性。
AI.conclusion: 尽管问题计算复杂度高，但提出的约束优化算法有效，且正则化方法增强了DFA的可解释性，为无监督自动机学习提供了可行方案。

search_text: Unsupervised Automata Learning via Discrete Optimization 通过离散优化进行无监督自动机学习 Automata learning is a successful tool for many application domains such as robotics and automatic verification. Typically, automata learning techniques operate in a supervised learning setting (active or passive) where they learn a finite state machine in contexts where additional information, such as labeled system executions, is available. However, other settings, such as learning from unlabeled data - an important aspect in machine learning - remain unexplored. To overcome this limitation, we propose a framework for learning a deterministic finite automaton (DFA) from a given multi-set of unlabeled words. We show that this problem is computationally hard and develop three learning algorithms based on constraint optimization. Moreover, we introduce novel regularization schemes for our optimization problems that improve the overall interpretability of our DFAs. Using a prototype implementation, we demonstrate practical feasibility in the context of unsupervised anomaly detection. 自动机学习是许多应用领域（例如机器人和自动验证）的成功工具。通常，自动机学习技术在监督学习环境（主动或被动）中运行，它们在可以获得附加信息（例如标记的系统执行）的上下文中学习有限状态机。然而，其他设置，例如从未标记的数据中学习（机器学习的一个重要方面）仍未得到探索。为了克服这个限制，我们提出了一个框架，用于从给定的多组未标记单词中学习确定性有限自动机（DFA）。我们证明这个问题在计算上是困难的，并开发了三种基于约束优化的学习算法。此外，我们为优化问题引入了新颖的正则化方案，从而提高了 DFA 的整体可解释性。使用原型实现，我们展示了无监督异常检测背景下的实际可行性。 提出一种通过离散优化从未标记数据中学习确定性有限自动机（DFA）的无监督学习框架。 Simon Lutz,Daniil Kaminskyi,Florian Wittbold,Simon Dierl,Falk Howar,Barbara König,Emmanuel Müller,Daniel Neider cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.FL

authors_text: Jingzu Yee,Daichi Igarashi,Shun Miyatake,Yoshiyuki Tagawa
title: Prediction of the morphological evolution of a splashing drop using an encoder-decoder
title_zh: 使用编码器-解码器预测飞溅液滴的形态演化
abstract: The impact of a drop on a solid surface is an important phenomenon that has various implications and applications. However, the multiphase nature of this phenomenon causes complications in the prediction of its morphological evolution, especially when the drop splashes. While most machine-learning-based drop-impact studies have centred around physical parameters, this study used a computer-vision strategy by training an encoder-decoder to predict the drop morphologies using image data. Herein, we show that this trained encoder-decoder is able to successfully generate videos that show the morphologies of splashing and non-splashing drops. Remarkably, in each frame of these generated videos, the spreading diameter of the drop was found to be in good agreement with that of the actual videos. Moreover, there was also a high accuracy in splashing/non-splashing prediction. These findings demonstrate the ability of the trained encoder-decoder to generate videos that can accurately represent the drop morphologies. This approach provides a faster and cheaper alternative to experimental and numerical studies.
summary: The impact of a drop on a solid surface is an important phenomenon that has various implications and applications. However, the multiphase nature of this phenomenon causes complications in the prediction of its morphological evolution, especially when the drop splashes. Moreover, there was also a high accuracy in splashing/non-splashing prediction. These findings demonstrate the ability of the trained encoder-decoder to generate videos that can accurately represent the drop morphologies. This approach provides a faster and cheaper alternative to experimental and numerical studies.
abstract_zh: 水滴对固体表面的影响是一种重要的现象，具有多种含义和应用。然而，这种现象的多相性质导致其形态演化的预测变得复杂，特别是当液滴飞溅时。虽然大多数基于机器学习的跌落影响研究都以物理参数为中心，但本研究使用计算机视觉策略，通过训练编码器-解码器来使用图像数据预测跌落形态。在这里，我们表明这种经过训练的编码器-解码器能够成功生成显示飞溅和非飞溅水滴形态的视频。值得注意的是，在这些生成的视频的每一帧中，发现水滴的扩散直径与实际视频的扩散直径非常一致。此外，飞溅/非飞溅预测的准确性也很高。这些发现证明了经过训练的编码器-解码器生成可以准确表示液滴形态的视频的能力。这种方法为实验和数值研究提供了更快、更便宜的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出使用编码器-解码器模型预测液滴撞击固体表面时的形态演变，特别是溅射与非溅射液滴的动态过程。
AI.motivation: 液滴撞击固体表面的形态演变涉及多相复杂过程，传统基于物理参数的机器学习方法难以准确预测溅射行为，需开发更高效且低成本的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用计算机视觉策略，通过训练编码器-解码器模型，以图像数据为输入预测液滴形态，并生成动态视频以模拟溅射与非溅射过程。
AI.result: 生成的视频在每一帧中液滴铺展直径与实际实验高度吻合，且溅射/非溅射预测准确率高，验证了模型对液滴形态演变的精准还原能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为液滴撞击形态研究提供了比实验和数值模拟更快、更经济的解决方案，具有重要应用潜力。

authors_text: Marco Gaido
title: Distributed Silhouette Algorithm: Evaluating Clustering on Big Data
title_zh: 分布式轮廓算法：评估大数据上的聚类
abstract: In the big data era, the key feature that each algorithm needs to have is the possibility of efficiently running in parallel in a distributed environment. The popular Silhouette metric to evaluate the quality of a clustering, unfortunately, does not have this property and has a quadratic computational complexity with respect to the size of the input dataset. For this reason, its execution has been hindered in big data scenarios, where clustering had to be evaluated otherwise. To fill this gap, in this paper we introduce the first algorithm that computes the Silhouette metric with linear complexity and can easily execute in parallel in a distributed environment. Its implementation is freely available in the Apache Spark ML library.
summary: In the big data era, the key feature that each algorithm needs to have is the possibility of efficiently running in parallel in a distributed environment. The popular Silhouette metric to evaluate the quality of a clustering, unfortunately, does not have this property and has a quadratic computational complexity with respect to the size of the input dataset. For this reason, its execution has been hindered in big data scenarios, where clustering had to be evaluated otherwise. To fill this gap, in this paper we introduce the first algorithm that computes the Silhouette metric with linear complexity and can easily execute in parallel in a distributed environment. Its implementation is freely available in the Apache Spark ML library.
abstract_zh: 在大数据时代，每种算法需要具备的关键特性是能够在分布式环境中高效并行运行。不幸的是，用于评估聚类质量的流行的 Silhouette 度量不具有此属性，并且相对于输入数据集的大小具有二次计算复杂性。因此，它在大数据场景中的执行受到阻碍，必须以其他方式评估集群。为了填补这一空白，在本文中，我们介绍了第一个算法，该算法以线性复杂度计算 Silhouette 度量，并且可以在分布式环境中轻松并行执行。它的实现可以在 Apache Spark ML 库中免费获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分布式轮廓算法，用于在大数据环境下高效评估聚类质量。
AI.motivation: 传统轮廓指标计算复杂度为二次方，无法适应大数据场景下的并行计算需求。
AI.method: 设计具有线性复杂度的算法，支持在分布式环境中并行执行，并集成至Apache Spark ML库。
AI.result: 实现首个支持分布式计算的线性复杂度轮廓指标算法，开源于Apache Spark ML库。
AI.conclusion: 该算法解决了大数据聚类评估难题，填补了分布式环境下轮廓指标计算的空白。

authors_text: Marta Skreta,Naruki Yoshikawa,Sebastian Arellano-Rubach,Zhi Ji,Lasse Bjørn Kristensen,Kourosh Darvish,Alán Aspuru-Guzik,Florian Shkurti,Animesh Garg
title: Errors are Useful Prompts: Instruction Guided Task Programming with Verifier-Assisted Iterative Prompting
title_zh: 错误是有用的提示：带有验证者辅助迭代提示的指令引导任务编程
abstract: Generating low-level robot task plans from high-level natural language instructions remains a challenging problem. Although large language models have shown promising results in generating plans, the accuracy of the output remains unverified. Furthermore, the lack of domain-specific language data poses a limitation on the applicability of these models. In this paper, we propose CLAIRIFY, a novel approach that combines automatic iterative prompting with program verification to ensure programs written in data-scarce domain-specific language are syntactically valid and incorporate environment constraints. Our approach provides effective guidance to the language model on generating structured-like task plans by incorporating any errors as feedback, while the verifier ensures the syntactic accuracy of the generated plans. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CLAIRIFY in planning chemistry experiments by achieving state-of-the-art results. We also show that the generated plans can be executed on a real robot by integrating them with a task and motion planner.
summary: Generating low-level robot task plans from high-level natural language instructions remains a challenging problem. Although large language models have shown promising results in generating plans, the accuracy of the output remains unverified. Furthermore, the lack of domain-specific language data poses a limitation on the applicability of these models. In this paper, we propose CLAIRIFY, a novel approach that combines automatic iterative prompting with program verification to ensure programs written in data-scarce domain-specific language are syntactically valid and incorporate environment constraints. Our approach provides effective guidance to the language model on generating structured-like task plans by incorporating any errors as feedback, while the verifier ensures the syntactic accuracy of the generated plans. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CLAIRIFY in planning chemistry experiments by achieving state-of-the-art results. We also show that the generated plans can be executed on a real robot by integrating them with a task and motion planner.
abstract_zh: 从高级自然语言指令生成低级机器人任务计划仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。尽管大型语言模型在生成计划方面显示出了可喜的结果，但输出的准确性仍未得到验证。此外，缺乏特定领域的语言数据限制了这些模型的适用性。在本文中，我们提出了 CLAIRIFY，这是一种将自动迭代提示与程序验证相结合的新颖方法，以确保用数据稀缺的特定领域语言编写的程序在语法上有效并包含环境约束。我们的方法通过将任何错误作为反馈，为语言模型生成类似结构化的任务计划提供了有效的指导，而验证器则确保了生成的计划的语法准确性。我们通过取得最先进的结果证明了 CLAIRIFY 在规划化学实验方面的有效性。我们还表明，通过将生成的计划与任务和运动规划器集成，可以在真实的机器人上执行。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLAIRIFY方法，通过结合迭代提示和程序验证，解决从自然语言指令生成机器人任务计划的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型生成的任务计划准确性难以验证，且领域特定语言数据不足限制了模型应用。
AI.method: 采用自动迭代提示机制，将错误反馈作为指导生成结构化任务计划，并通过验证器确保语法正确性和环境约束。
AI.result: 在化学实验规划任务中达到最先进水平，生成的计划可成功集成到实际机器人任务与运动规划系统中。
AI.conclusion: CLAIRIFY有效解决了数据稀缺领域任务计划生成问题，验证了其在现实机器人应用中的可行性。

search_text: Errors are Useful Prompts: Instruction Guided Task Programming with Verifier-Assisted Iterative Prompting 错误是有用的提示：带有验证者辅助迭代提示的指令引导任务编程 Generating low-level robot task plans from high-level natural language instructions remains a challenging problem. Although large language models have shown promising results in generating plans, the accuracy of the output remains unverified. Furthermore, the lack of domain-specific language data poses a limitation on the applicability of these models. In this paper, we propose CLAIRIFY, a novel approach that combines automatic iterative prompting with program verification to ensure programs written in data-scarce domain-specific language are syntactically valid and incorporate environment constraints. Our approach provides effective guidance to the language model on generating structured-like task plans by incorporating any errors as feedback, while the verifier ensures the syntactic accuracy of the generated plans. We demonstrate the effectiveness of CLAIRIFY in planning chemistry experiments by achieving state-of-the-art results. We also show that the generated plans can be executed on a real robot by integrating them with a task and motion planner. 从高级自然语言指令生成低级机器人任务计划仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。尽管大型语言模型在生成计划方面显示出了可喜的结果，但输出的准确性仍未得到验证。此外，缺乏特定领域的语言数据限制了这些模型的适用性。在本文中，我们提出了 CLAIRIFY，这是一种将自动迭代提示与程序验证相结合的新颖方法，以确保用数据稀缺的特定领域语言编写的程序在语法上有效并包含环境约束。我们的方法通过将任何错误作为反馈，为语言模型生成类似结构化的任务计划提供了有效的指导，而验证器则确保了生成的计划的语法准确性。我们通过取得最先进的结果证明了 CLAIRIFY 在规划化学实验方面的有效性。我们还表明，通过将生成的计划与任务和运动规划器集成，可以在真实的机器人上执行。 本文提出CLAIRIFY方法，通过结合迭代提示和程序验证，解决从自然语言指令生成机器人任务计划的问题。 Marta Skreta,Naruki Yoshikawa,Sebastian Arellano-Rubach,Zhi Ji,Lasse Bjørn Kristensen,Kourosh Darvish,Alán Aspuru-Guzik,Florian Shkurti,Animesh Garg cs.RO

authors_text: Paul Moritz Nörenberg,Hendrik Richter
title: Do Random and Chaotic Sequences Really Cause Different PSO Performance?
title_zh: 随机序列和混沌序列真的会导致 PSO 性能不同吗？
comment: Proc. GECCO 23 Companion, July 15-19, 2023, Lisbon, Portugal, accepted
comments: Proc. GECCO 23 Companion, July 15-19, 2023, Lisbon, Portugal, accepted
abstract: Our topic is performance differences between using random and chaos for particle swarm optimization (PSO). We take random sequences with different probability distributions and compare them to chaotic sequences with different but also with same density functions. This enables us to differentiate between differences in the origin of the sequences (random number generator or chaotic nonlinear system) and statistical differences expressed by the underlying distributions. Our findings (obtained by evaluating the PSO performance for various benchmark problems using statistical hypothesis testing) cast considerable doubt on previous results which compared random to chaos and suggested that the choice leads to intrinsic differences in performance.
summary: Our topic is performance differences between using random and chaos for particle swarm optimization (PSO). We take random sequences with different probability distributions and compare them to chaotic sequences with different but also with same density functions. This enables us to differentiate between differences in the origin of the sequences (random number generator or chaotic nonlinear system) and statistical differences expressed by the underlying distributions. Our findings (obtained by evaluating the PSO performance for various benchmark problems using statistical hypothesis testing) cast considerable doubt on previous results which compared random to chaos and suggested that the choice leads to intrinsic differences in performance.
abstract_zh: 我们的主题是使用随机和混沌进行粒子群优化 (PSO) 之间的性能差异。我们采用具有不同概率分布的随机序列，并将它们与具有不同但也具有相同密度函数的混沌序列进行比较。这使我们能够区分序列起源（随机数生成器或混沌非线性系统）的差异和底层分布表示的统计差异。我们的研究结果（通过使用统计假设检验评估各种基准问题的 PSO 性能而获得）对之前的结果产生了相当大的怀疑，这些结果将随机与混沌进行比较，并表明该选择会导致性能的内在差异。

AI.tldr: 本文通过比较随机序列与混沌序列在粒子群优化（PSO）中的性能差异，探讨其来源和统计分布的影响。
AI.motivation: 此前研究认为随机与混沌序列的选择会导致PSO性能的内在差异，但作者质疑这一结论是否受统计分布差异干扰。
AI.method: 采用不同概率分布的随机序列与相同密度函数的混沌序列，通过统计假设检验评估PSO在多个基准问题上的表现。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，随机与混沌序列的性能差异可能主要源于统计分布而非序列来源，推翻了先前结论。
AI.conclusion: 序列的随机性或混沌性本身未必影响PSO性能，统计分布差异才是关键因素。

authors_text: Jongheon Jeong,Sihyun Yu,Hankook Lee,Jinwoo Shin
title: Enhancing Multiple Reliability Measures via Nuisance-extended Information Bottleneck
title_zh: 通过滋扰扩展的信息瓶颈增强多种可靠性措施
abstract: In practical scenarios where training data is limited, many predictive signals in the data can be rather from some biases in data acquisition (i.e., less generalizable), so that one cannot prevent a model from co-adapting on such (so-called) "shortcut" signals: this makes the model fragile in various distribution shifts. To bypass such failure modes, we consider an adversarial threat model under a mutual information constraint to cover a wider class of perturbations in training. This motivates us to extend the standard information bottleneck to additionally model the nuisance information. We propose an autoencoder-based training to implement the objective, as well as practical encoder designs to facilitate the proposed hybrid discriminative-generative training concerning both convolutional- and Transformer-based architectures. Our experimental results show that the proposed scheme improves robustness of learned representations (remarkably without using any domain-specific knowledge), with respect to multiple challenging reliability measures. For example, our model could advance the state-of-the-art on a recent challenging OBJECTS benchmark in novelty detection by $78.4\% \rightarrow 87.2\%$ in AUROC, while simultaneously enjoying improved corruption, background and (certified) adversarial robustness. Code is available at https://github.com/jh-jeong/nuisance_ib.
summary: In practical scenarios where training data is limited, many predictive signals in the data can be rather from some biases in data acquisition (i.e., less generalizable), so that one cannot prevent a model from co-adapting on such (so-called) "shortcut" signals: this makes the model fragile in various distribution shifts. To bypass such failure modes, we consider an adversarial threat model under a mutual information constraint to cover a wider class of perturbations in training. This motivates us to extend the standard information bottleneck to additionally model the nuisance information. We propose an autoencoder-based training to implement the objective, as well as practical encoder designs to facilitate the proposed hybrid discriminative-generative training concerning both convolutional- and Transformer-based architectures. Our experimental results show that the proposed scheme improves robustness of learned representations (remarkably without using any domain-specific knowledge), with respect to multiple challenging reliability measures. For example, our model could advance the state-of-the-art on a recent challenging OBJECTS benchmark in novelty detection by $78.4\% \rightarrow 87.2\%$ in AUROC, while simultaneously enjoying improved corruption, background and (certified) adversarial robustness. Code is available at https://github.com/jh-jeong/nuisance_ib.
abstract_zh: 在训练数据有限的实际场景中，数据中的许多预测信号可能来自数据采集中的一些偏差（即通用性较差），因此无法阻止模型共同适应这种（所谓的）“捷径”信号：这使得模型在各种分布变化中都很脆弱。为了绕过这种故障模式，我们考虑在互信息约束下建立对抗性威胁模型，以涵盖训练中更广泛的扰动。这促使我们扩展标准信息瓶颈，以额外对有害信息进行建模。我们提出了基于自动编码器的训练来实现该目标，以及实用的编码器设计，以促进所提出的涉及基于卷积和基于 Transformer 的架构的混合判别生成训练。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方案提高了学习表示的鲁棒性（明显没有使用任何特定领域的知识），相对于多种具有挑战性的可靠性度量。例如，我们的模型可以在 AUROC 中将新奇检测中最近具有挑战性的 OBJECTS 基准提高到 $78.4\% \rightarrow 87.2\%$，同时享受改进的腐败、背景和（经过认证的）对抗鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/jh-jeong/nuisance_ib 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过扩展信息瓶颈框架来建模干扰信息，以提升模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和多种可靠性指标表现。
AI.motivation: 在训练数据有限的场景中，模型可能依赖数据偏差产生的快捷信号，导致分布偏移时性能下降。传统方法难以覆盖广泛扰动，需新的对抗性威胁模型。
AI.method: 扩展标准信息瓶颈理论以建模干扰信息，设计基于自编码器的训练框架，并提出适用于卷积和Transformer架构的编码器设计，实现生成与判别混合训练。
AI.result: 在OBJECTS基准测试中，新颖性检测AUROC从78.4%提升至87.2%，同时显著增强抗干扰、背景变化和认证对抗攻击的鲁棒性，且无需领域知识。
AI.conclusion: 通过建模干扰信息的扩展信息瓶颈方法，有效提升了模型在多种可靠性指标下的鲁棒性，为小样本场景下的可靠学习提供了新思路。

search_text: Enhancing Multiple Reliability Measures via Nuisance-extended Information Bottleneck 通过滋扰扩展的信息瓶颈增强多种可靠性措施 In practical scenarios where training data is limited, many predictive signals in the data can be rather from some biases in data acquisition (i.e., less generalizable), so that one cannot prevent a model from co-adapting on such (so-called) "shortcut" signals: this makes the model fragile in various distribution shifts. To bypass such failure modes, we consider an adversarial threat model under a mutual information constraint to cover a wider class of perturbations in training. This motivates us to extend the standard information bottleneck to additionally model the nuisance information. We propose an autoencoder-based training to implement the objective, as well as practical encoder designs to facilitate the proposed hybrid discriminative-generative training concerning both convolutional- and Transformer-based architectures. Our experimental results show that the proposed scheme improves robustness of learned representations (remarkably without using any domain-specific knowledge), with respect to multiple challenging reliability measures. For example, our model could advance the state-of-the-art on a recent challenging OBJECTS benchmark in novelty detection by $78.4\% \rightarrow 87.2\%$ in AUROC, while simultaneously enjoying improved corruption, background and (certified) adversarial robustness. Code is available at https://github.com/jh-jeong/nuisance_ib. 在训练数据有限的实际场景中，数据中的许多预测信号可能来自数据采集中的一些偏差（即通用性较差），因此无法阻止模型共同适应这种（所谓的）“捷径”信号：这使得模型在各种分布变化中都很脆弱。为了绕过这种故障模式，我们考虑在互信息约束下建立对抗性威胁模型，以涵盖训练中更广泛的扰动。这促使我们扩展标准信息瓶颈，以额外对有害信息进行建模。我们提出了基于自动编码器的训练来实现该目标，以及实用的编码器设计，以促进所提出的涉及基于卷积和基于 Transformer 的架构的混合判别生成训练。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方案提高了学习表示的鲁棒性（明显没有使用任何特定领域的知识），相对于多种具有挑战性的可靠性度量。例如，我们的模型可以在 AUROC 中将新奇检测中最近具有挑战性的 OBJECTS 基准提高到 $78.4\% \rightarrow 87.2\%$，同时享受改进的腐败、背景和（经过认证的）对抗鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/jh-jeong/nuisance_ib 获取。 本文提出通过扩展信息瓶颈框架来建模干扰信息，以提升模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和多种可靠性指标表现。 Jongheon Jeong,Sihyun Yu,Hankook Lee,Jinwoo Shin cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Ze Shi,Hao Shi,Kailun Yang,Zhe Yin,Yining Lin,Kaiwei Wang
title: PanoVPR: Towards Unified Perspective-to-Equirectangular Visual Place Recognition via Sliding Windows across the Panoramic View
title_zh: PanoVPR：通过跨全景视图的滑动窗口实现统一视角到等距矩形视觉位置识别
comment: Accepted to ITSC 2023. Code and datasets will be made available at https://github.com/zafirshi/PanoVPR
comments: Accepted to ITSC 2023. Code and datasets will be made available at https://github.com/zafirshi/PanoVPR
abstract: Visual place recognition has gained significant attention in recent years as a crucial technology in autonomous driving and robotics. Currently, the two main approaches are the perspective view retrieval (P2P) paradigm and the equirectangular image retrieval (E2E) paradigm. However, it is practical and natural to assume that users only have consumer-grade pinhole cameras to obtain query perspective images and retrieve them in panoramic database images from map providers. To address this, we propose \textit{PanoVPR}, a perspective-to-equirectangular (P2E) visual place recognition framework that employs sliding windows to eliminate feature truncation caused by hard cropping. Specifically, PanoVPR slides windows over the entire equirectangular image and computes feature descriptors for each window, which are then compared to determine place similarity. Notably, our unified framework enables direct transfer of the backbone from P2P methods without any modification, supporting not only CNNs but also Transformers. To facilitate training and evaluation, we derive the Pitts250k-P2E dataset from the Pitts250k and establish YQ360, latter is the first P2E visual place recognition dataset collected by a mobile robot platform aiming to simulate real-world task scenarios better. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PanoVPR achieves state-of-the-art performance and obtains 3.8% and 8.0% performance gain on Pitts250k-P2E and YQ360 compared to the previous best method, respectively. Code and datasets will be publicly available at https://github.com/zafirshi/PanoVPR.
summary: Visual place recognition has gained significant attention in recent years as a crucial technology in autonomous driving and robotics. Currently, the two main approaches are the perspective view retrieval (P2P) paradigm and the equirectangular image retrieval (E2E) paradigm. However, it is practical and natural to assume that users only have consumer-grade pinhole cameras to obtain query perspective images and retrieve them in panoramic database images from map providers. To address this, we propose \textit{PanoVPR}, a perspective-to-equirectangular (P2E) visual place recognition framework that employs sliding windows to eliminate feature truncation caused by hard cropping. Specifically, PanoVPR slides windows over the entire equirectangular image and computes feature descriptors for each window, which are then compared to determine place similarity. Notably, our unified framework enables direct transfer of the backbone from P2P methods without any modification, supporting not only CNNs but also Transformers. To facilitate training and evaluation, we derive the Pitts250k-P2E dataset from the Pitts250k and establish YQ360, latter is the first P2E visual place recognition dataset collected by a mobile robot platform aiming to simulate real-world task scenarios better. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PanoVPR achieves state-of-the-art performance and obtains 3.8% and 8.0% performance gain on Pitts250k-P2E and YQ360 compared to the previous best method, respectively. Code and datasets will be publicly available at https://github.com/zafirshi/PanoVPR.
abstract_zh: 近年来，视觉位置识别作为自动驾驶和机器人技术的关键技术受到了广泛关注。目前，两种主要方法是透视图检索（P2P）范式和等距柱状图像检索（E2E）范式。然而，假设用户仅拥有消费级针孔相机来获取查询透视图像并在来自地图提供商的全景数据库图像中检索它们是实际且自然的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 \textit{PanoVPR}，一种透视到等距矩形（P2E）视觉位置识别框架，它采用滑动窗口来消除硬裁剪引起的特征截断。具体来说，PanoVPR 在整个等距柱状图像上滑动窗口并计算每个窗口的特征描述符，然后将其进行比较以确定位置相似性。值得注意的是，我们的统一框架可以直接从 P2P 方法转移主干，无需任何修改，不仅支持 CNN，还支持 Transformer。为了便于训练和评估，我们从 Pitts250k 中导出 Pitts250k-P2E 数据集并建立 YQ360，后者是移动机器人平台收集的第一个 P2E 视觉位置识别数据集，旨在更好地模拟真实世界的任务场景。大量实验表明，PanoVPR 实现了最先进的性能，与之前的最佳方法相比，在 Pitts250k-P2E 和 YQ360 上分别获得了 3.8% 和 8.0% 的性能增益。代码和数据集将在 https://github.com/zafirshi/PanoVPR 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PanoVPR框架，解决视角图像到全景图像的视觉定位问题，通过滑动窗口技术提升特征匹配效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位方法分为视角对视角（P2P）和全景对全景（E2E）两种范式，但实际场景中用户常使用普通相机获取视角图像，在全景数据库中检索存在技术缺口。
AI.method: 设计滑动窗口机制覆盖全景图像，提取窗口内特征描述子进行比对；统一框架兼容CNN和Transformer模型，构建Pitts250k-P2E和YQ360两个数据集支持训练与评估。
AI.result: 在Pitts250k-P2E和YQ360数据集上分别较先前最佳方法提升3.8%和8.0%性能，代码与数据集开源。
AI.conclusion: PanoVPR通过滑动窗口有效解决特征截断问题，验证了统一框架的有效性，为视觉定位研究提供新数据集与基准。

authors_text: Mingwu Zheng,Haiyu Zhang,Hongyu Yang,Di Huang
title: NeuFace: Realistic 3D Neural Face Rendering from Multi-view Images
title_zh: NeuFace：多视图图像的逼真 3D 神经人脸渲染
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023, code is released at https://github.com/aejion/NeuFace
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023, code is released at https://github.com/aejion/NeuFace
abstract: Realistic face rendering from multi-view images is beneficial to various computer vision and graphics applications. Due to the complex spatially-varying reflectance properties and geometry characteristics of faces, however, it remains challenging to recover 3D facial representations both faithfully and efficiently in the current studies. This paper presents a novel 3D face rendering model, namely NeuFace, to learn accurate and physically-meaningful underlying 3D representations by neural rendering techniques. It naturally incorporates the neural BRDFs into physically based rendering, capturing sophisticated facial geometry and appearance clues in a collaborative manner. Specifically, we introduce an approximated BRDF integration and a simple yet new low-rank prior, which effectively lower the ambiguities and boost the performance of the facial BRDFs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of NeuFace in human face rendering, along with a decent generalization ability to common objects.
summary: Realistic face rendering from multi-view images is beneficial to various computer vision and graphics applications. Due to the complex spatially-varying reflectance properties and geometry characteristics of faces, however, it remains challenging to recover 3D facial representations both faithfully and efficiently in the current studies. This paper presents a novel 3D face rendering model, namely NeuFace, to learn accurate and physically-meaningful underlying 3D representations by neural rendering techniques. It naturally incorporates the neural BRDFs into physically based rendering, capturing sophisticated facial geometry and appearance clues in a collaborative manner. Specifically, we introduce an approximated BRDF integration and a simple yet new low-rank prior, which effectively lower the ambiguities and boost the performance of the facial BRDFs. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of NeuFace in human face rendering, along with a decent generalization ability to common objects.
abstract_zh: 多视图图像的真实人脸渲染有利于各种计算机视觉和图形应用。然而，由于面部复杂的空间变化反射特性和几何特征，在当前的研究中忠实有效地恢复 3D 面部表征仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种新颖的 3D 人脸渲染模型，即 NeuFace，通过神经渲染技术学习准确且具有物理意义的底层 3D 表示。它自然地将神经 BRDF 融入到基于物理的渲染中，以协作方式捕获复杂的面部几何形状和外观线索。具体来说，我们引入了近似的 BRDF 积分和一个简单但新的低秩先验，可以有效降低歧义并提高面部 BRDF 的性能。大量实验证明了 NeuFace 在人脸渲染方面的优越性，以及对常见物体的良好泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出NeuFace模型，通过神经渲染技术从多视角图像生成逼真的人脸3D渲染结果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究难以同时实现人脸3D表示的高保真度与高效恢复，因人脸具有复杂的反射特性和几何特征。
AI.method: 将神经BRDF整合到物理渲染中，引入近似BRDF积分和低秩先验以降低歧义性并提升性能。
AI.result: 实验表明NeuFace在人脸渲染精度和对常见物体的泛化能力上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: NeuFace通过物理意义的神经渲染方法有效解决了人脸3D重建难题，并展现出良好的扩展性。

authors_text: Yaroslav Zharov,Tilo Baumbach,Vincent Heuveline
title: Optimizing the Procedure of CT Segmentation Labeling
title_zh: 优化CT分割标记流程
abstract: In Computed Tomography, machine learning is often used for automated data processing. However, increasing model complexity is accompanied by increasingly large volume datasets, which in turn increases the cost of model training. Unlike most work that mitigates this by advancing model architectures and training algorithms, we consider the annotation procedure and its effect on the model performance. We assume three main virtues of a good dataset collected for a model training to be label quality, diversity, and completeness. We compare the effects of those virtues on the model performance using open medical CT datasets and conclude, that quality is more important than diversity early during labeling; the diversity, in turn, is more important than completeness. Based on this conclusion and additional experiments, we propose a labeling procedure for the segmentation of tomographic images to minimize efforts spent on labeling while maximizing the model performance.
summary: In Computed Tomography, machine learning is often used for automated data processing. However, increasing model complexity is accompanied by increasingly large volume datasets, which in turn increases the cost of model training. Unlike most work that mitigates this by advancing model architectures and training algorithms, we consider the annotation procedure and its effect on the model performance. We assume three main virtues of a good dataset collected for a model training to be label quality, diversity, and completeness. We compare the effects of those virtues on the model performance using open medical CT datasets and conclude, that quality is more important than diversity early during labeling; the diversity, in turn, is more important than completeness. Based on this conclusion and additional experiments, we propose a labeling procedure for the segmentation of tomographic images to minimize efforts spent on labeling while maximizing the model performance.
abstract_zh: 在计算机断层扫描中，机器学习通常用于自动数据处理。然而，模型复杂性的增加伴随着数据集数量的不断增加，这反过来又增加了模型训练的成本。与大多数通过改进模型架构和训练算法来缓解这一问题的工作不同，我们考虑注释过程及其对模型性能的影响。我们假设为模型训练收集的良好数据集的三个主要优点是标签质量、多样性和完整性。我们使用开放的医学 CT 数据集比较了这些优点对模型性能的影响，并得出结论：在标记过程的早期，质量比多样性更重要；反过来，多样性比完整性更重要。基于这一结论和其他实验，我们提出了一种用于断层扫描图像分割的标记程序，以最大限度地减少标记上的工作量，同时最大限度地提高模型性能。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在优化CT图像分割标注流程，通过平衡标注质量、多样性和完整性，减少标注工作量并提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法通过改进模型架构和训练算法应对训练成本上升问题，但本文认为标注过程本身对模型性能影响显著，需优化标注策略。
AI.method: 比较标签质量、多样性及完整性对模型性能的影响，基于实验结果提出分阶段标注流程优化方案。
AI.result: 实验表明标注初期质量优先于多样性，多样性又优先于完整性；据此设计的标注流程能有效降低标注成本并提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 质量是标注核心，多样性次之，完整性最次；提出的新标注流程可在减少标注量的同时最大化模型性能。

authors_text: Xiaohao Sun,Hanxiao Jiang,Manolis Savva,Angel Xuan Chang
title: OPDMulti: Openable Part Detection for Multiple Objects
title_zh: OPDMulti：多个对象的可打开零件检测
abstract: Openable part detection is the task of detecting the openable parts of an object in a single-view image, and predicting corresponding motion parameters. Prior work investigated the unrealistic setting where all input images only contain a single openable object. We generalize this task to scenes with multiple objects each potentially possessing openable parts, and create a corresponding dataset based on real-world scenes. We then address this more challenging scenario with OPDFormer: a part-aware transformer architecture. Our experiments show that the OPDFormer architecture significantly outperforms prior work. The more realistic multiple-object scenarios we investigated remain challenging for all methods, indicating opportunities for future work.
summary: Openable part detection is the task of detecting the openable parts of an object in a single-view image, and predicting corresponding motion parameters. Prior work investigated the unrealistic setting where all input images only contain a single openable object. We generalize this task to scenes with multiple objects each potentially possessing openable parts, and create a corresponding dataset based on real-world scenes. We then address this more challenging scenario with OPDFormer: a part-aware transformer architecture. Our experiments show that the OPDFormer architecture significantly outperforms prior work. The more realistic multiple-object scenarios we investigated remain challenging for all methods, indicating opportunities for future work.
abstract_zh: 可打开部分检测是检测单视图图像中对象的可打开部分并预测相应的运动参数的任务。先前的工作研究了不切实际的设置，其中所有输入图像仅包含单个可打开对象。我们将此任务推广到具有多个对象的场景，每个对象都可能拥有可打开的部分，并根据真实场景创建相应的数据集。然后，我们使用 OPDFormer 解决这个更具挑战性的场景：零件感知变压器架构。我们的实验表明 OPDFormer 架构显着优于之前的工作。我们研究的更现实的多对象场景对于所有方法来说仍然具有挑战性，这表明了未来工作的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OPDMulti方法，用于在多物体场景中检测物体的可开启部分并预测运动参数。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅针对单个可开启物体，无法适应真实场景中多物体共存的复杂情况，需扩展任务范围并构建新数据集。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的OPDFormer架构，通过部分感知机制处理多物体场景中的可开启部件检测。
AI.result: OPDFormer在实验中显著优于现有方法，但多物体场景仍存在挑战，表明该任务仍有改进空间。
AI.conclusion: 多物体可开启部件检测取得进展，但复杂场景下的检测精度和鲁棒性仍需进一步研究。

authors_text: Saeyoung Rho,Rachel Cummings,Vishal Misra
title: Differentially Private Synthetic Control
title_zh: 差分私有综合控制
abstract: Synthetic control is a causal inference tool used to estimate the treatment effects of an intervention by creating synthetic counterfactual data. This approach combines measurements from other similar observations (i.e., donor pool ) to predict a counterfactual time series of interest (i.e., target unit) by analyzing the relationship between the target and the donor pool before the intervention. As synthetic control tools are increasingly applied to sensitive or proprietary data, formal privacy protections are often required. In this work, we provide the first algorithms for differentially private synthetic control with explicit error bounds. Our approach builds upon tools from non-private synthetic control and differentially private empirical risk minimization. We provide upper and lower bounds on the sensitivity of the synthetic control query and provide explicit error bounds on the accuracy of our private synthetic control algorithms. We show that our algorithms produce accurate predictions for the target unit, and that the cost of privacy is small. Finally, we empirically evaluate the performance of our algorithm, and show favorable performance in a variety of parameter regimes, as well as providing guidance to practitioners for hyperparameter tuning.
summary: Synthetic control is a causal inference tool used to estimate the treatment effects of an intervention by creating synthetic counterfactual data. This approach combines measurements from other similar observations (i.e., donor pool ) to predict a counterfactual time series of interest (i.e., target unit) by analyzing the relationship between the target and the donor pool before the intervention. As synthetic control tools are increasingly applied to sensitive or proprietary data, formal privacy protections are often required. In this work, we provide the first algorithms for differentially private synthetic control with explicit error bounds. Our approach builds upon tools from non-private synthetic control and differentially private empirical risk minimization. We provide upper and lower bounds on the sensitivity of the synthetic control query and provide explicit error bounds on the accuracy of our private synthetic control algorithms. We show that our algorithms produce accurate predictions for the target unit, and that the cost of privacy is small. Finally, we empirically evaluate the performance of our algorithm, and show favorable performance in a variety of parameter regimes, as well as providing guidance to practitioners for hyperparameter tuning.
abstract_zh: 综合控制是一种因果推理工具，用于通过创建综合反事实数据来估计干预措施的治疗效果。这种方法结合了其他类似观察结果（即捐助者池）的测量结果，通过在干预前分析目标与捐助者池之间的关系来预测感兴趣的反事实时间序列（即目标单位）。随着合成控制工具越来越多地应用于敏感或专有数据，通常需要正式的隐私保护。在这项工作中，我们提供了第一个具有显式误差界限的差分私有合成控制算法。我们的方法建立在非私人综合控制和差别私人经验风险最小化工具的基础上。我们提供了合成控制查询的灵敏度的上限和下限，并提供了我们的私有合成控制算法的准确性的显式误差界限。我们表明，我们的算法可以对目标单元进行准确的预测，并且隐私成本很小。最后，我们根据经验评估了算法的性能，并在各种参数方案中表现出了良好的性能，并为从业者进行超参数调整提供指导。

AI.tldr: 提出一种具有显式误差边界的差分隐私合成控制算法，用于在保护隐私的同时准确估计干预效应。
AI.motivation: 随着合成控制应用于敏感数据，需在保证隐私的前提下保持预测准确性，现有方法缺乏正式隐私保护。
AI.method: 结合非隐私合成控制与差分隐私经验风险最小化，建立敏感度界与误差界，设计隐私保护算法。
AI.result: 算法在目标预测上准确，隐私成本低，多种参数下表现优异，并提供超参数调整建议。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡隐私保护与预测精度，在敏感数据应用中具有实际可行性。

authors_text: Roman Worschech,Bernd Rosenow
title: Online Learning for the Random Feature Model in the Student-Teacher Framework
title_zh: 师生框架中随机特征模型的在线学习
abstract: Deep neural networks are widely used prediction algorithms whose performance often improves as the number of weights increases, leading to over-parametrization. We consider a two-layered neural network whose first layer is frozen while the last layer is trainable, known as the random feature model. We study over-parametrization in the context of a student-teacher framework by deriving a set of differential equations for the learning dynamics. For any finite ratio of hidden layer size and input dimension, the student cannot generalize perfectly, and we compute the non-zero asymptotic generalization error. Only when the student's hidden layer size is exponentially larger than the input dimension, an approach to perfect generalization is possible.
summary: Deep neural networks are widely used prediction algorithms whose performance often improves as the number of weights increases, leading to over-parametrization. We consider a two-layered neural network whose first layer is frozen while the last layer is trainable, known as the random feature model. We study over-parametrization in the context of a student-teacher framework by deriving a set of differential equations for the learning dynamics. For any finite ratio of hidden layer size and input dimension, the student cannot generalize perfectly, and we compute the non-zero asymptotic generalization error. Only when the student's hidden layer size is exponentially larger than the input dimension, an approach to perfect generalization is possible.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络是广泛使用的预测算法，其性能通常随着权重数量的增加而提高，从而导致过度参数化。我们考虑一个两层神经网络，其第一层是冻结的，而最后一层是可训练的，称为随机特征模型。我们通过推导一组学习动态微分方程，在学生-教师框架的背景下研究过度参数化。对于隐藏层大小和输入维度的任何有限比率，学生无法完美泛化，我们计算非零渐近泛化误差。只有当学生的隐藏层大小指数级大于输入维度时，完美泛化的方法才有可能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究学生-教师框架下随机特征模型的在线学习，分析过参数化对泛化能力的影响。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络性能随参数增加而提升，但过参数化下的泛化机制尚不明确，需探索隐藏层规模与输入维度的关系。
AI.method: 通过推导学习动态的微分方程，分析有限隐藏层规模与输入维度比值下的泛化行为。
AI.result: 当隐藏层规模与输入维度比值有限时，泛化误差趋于非零值；仅当隐藏层指数级超过输入维度时可实现完美泛化。
AI.conclusion: 随机特征模型的完美泛化需指数级过参数化，否则存在不可消除的泛化误差。

authors_text: Lan Jiang,Ye Mao,Xi Chen,Xiangfeng Wang,Chao Li
title: CoLa-Diff: Conditional Latent Diffusion Model for Multi-Modal MRI Synthesis
title_zh: CoLa-Diff：用于多模态 MRI 合成的条件潜在扩散模型
abstract: MRI synthesis promises to mitigate the challenge of missing MRI modality in clinical practice. Diffusion model has emerged as an effective technique for image synthesis by modelling complex and variable data distributions. However, most diffusion-based MRI synthesis models are using a single modality. As they operate in the original image domain, they are memory-intensive and less feasible for multi-modal synthesis. Moreover, they often fail to preserve the anatomical structure in MRI. Further, balancing the multiple conditions from multi-modal MRI inputs is crucial for multi-modal synthesis. Here, we propose the first diffusion-based multi-modality MRI synthesis model, namely Conditioned Latent Diffusion Model (CoLa-Diff). To reduce memory consumption, we design CoLa-Diff to operate in the latent space. We propose a novel network architecture, e.g., similar cooperative filtering, to solve the possible compression and noise in latent space. To better maintain the anatomical structure, brain region masks are introduced as the priors of density distributions to guide diffusion process. We further present auto-weight adaptation to employ multi-modal information effectively. Our experiments demonstrate that CoLa-Diff outperforms other state-of-the-art MRI synthesis methods, promising to serve as an effective tool for multi-modal MRI synthesis.
summary: MRI synthesis promises to mitigate the challenge of missing MRI modality in clinical practice. Diffusion model has emerged as an effective technique for image synthesis by modelling complex and variable data distributions. However, most diffusion-based MRI synthesis models are using a single modality. As they operate in the original image domain, they are memory-intensive and less feasible for multi-modal synthesis. Moreover, they often fail to preserve the anatomical structure in MRI. Further, balancing the multiple conditions from multi-modal MRI inputs is crucial for multi-modal synthesis. Here, we propose the first diffusion-based multi-modality MRI synthesis model, namely Conditioned Latent Diffusion Model (CoLa-Diff). To reduce memory consumption, we design CoLa-Diff to operate in the latent space. We propose a novel network architecture, e.g., similar cooperative filtering, to solve the possible compression and noise in latent space. To better maintain the anatomical structure, brain region masks are introduced as the priors of density distributions to guide diffusion process. We further present auto-weight adaptation to employ multi-modal information effectively. Our experiments demonstrate that CoLa-Diff outperforms other state-of-the-art MRI synthesis methods, promising to serve as an effective tool for multi-modal MRI synthesis.
abstract_zh: MRI 合成有望减轻临床实践中缺少 MRI 模式的挑战。通过对复杂且可变的数据分布进行建模，扩散模型已成为一种有效的图像合成技术。然而，大多数基于扩散的 MRI 合成模型都使用单一模式。由于它们在原始图像域中操作，因此它们是内存密集型的并且对于多模态合成来说不太可行。此外，它们常常无法保留 MRI 中的解剖结构。此外，平衡多模态 MRI 输入的多种条件对于多模态合成至关重要。在这里，我们提出了第一个基于扩散的多模态 MRI 合成模型，即条件潜在扩散模型（CoLa-Diff）。为了减少内存消耗，我们设计了 CoLa-Diff 在潜在空间中运行。我们提出了一种新颖的网络架构，例如类似的协作过滤，来解决潜在空间中可能的压缩和噪声。为了更好地保持解剖结构，引入脑区域掩模作为密度分布的先验来指导扩散过程。我们进一步提出自动权重适应以有效地利用多模态信息。我们的实验表明，CoLa-Diff 优于其他最先进的 MRI 合成方法，有望成为多模态 MRI 合成的有效工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件潜扩散模型（CoLa-Diff）的多模态MRI合成方法，旨在解决临床实践中MRI模态缺失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型在MRI合成中存在内存消耗大、难以处理多模态数据且无法有效保持解剖结构的局限性，需设计更高效的多模态合成框架。
AI.method: 通过在潜空间操作降低内存消耗，引入类似协同过滤的网络架构解决潜空间压缩与噪声问题，并利用脑区掩膜作为密度分布先验引导扩散过程，结合自适应权重分配多模态信息。
AI.result: 实验表明，CoLa-Diff在多模态MRI合成任务中优于现有最先进方法，有效保留了解剖结构且生成质量更优。
AI.conclusion: CoLa-Diff为多模态MRI合成提供了高效可行的解决方案，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Paul Hager,Martin J. Menten,Daniel Rueckert
title: Best of Both Worlds: Multimodal Contrastive Learning with Tabular and Imaging Data
title_zh: 两全其美：利用表格和成像数据进行多模态对比学习
abstract: Medical datasets and especially biobanks, often contain extensive tabular data with rich clinical information in addition to images. In practice, clinicians typically have less data, both in terms of diversity and scale, but still wish to deploy deep learning solutions. Combined with increasing medical dataset sizes and expensive annotation costs, the necessity for unsupervised methods that can pretrain multimodally and predict unimodally has risen. To address these needs, we propose the first self-supervised contrastive learning framework that takes advantage of images and tabular data to train unimodal encoders. Our solution combines SimCLR and SCARF, two leading contrastive learning strategies, and is simple and effective. In our experiments, we demonstrate the strength of our framework by predicting risks of myocardial infarction and coronary artery disease (CAD) using cardiac MR images and 120 clinical features from 40,000 UK Biobank subjects. Furthermore, we show the generalizability of our approach to natural images using the DVM car advertisement dataset. We take advantage of the high interpretability of tabular data and through attribution and ablation experiments find that morphometric tabular features, describing size and shape, have outsized importance during the contrastive learning process and improve the quality of the learned embeddings. Finally, we introduce a novel form of supervised contrastive learning, label as a feature (LaaF), by appending the ground truth label as a tabular feature during multimodal pretraining, outperforming all supervised contrastive baselines.
summary: Medical datasets and especially biobanks, often contain extensive tabular data with rich clinical information in addition to images. In practice, clinicians typically have less data, both in terms of diversity and scale, but still wish to deploy deep learning solutions. Combined with increasing medical dataset sizes and expensive annotation costs, the necessity for unsupervised methods that can pretrain multimodally and predict unimodally has risen. To address these needs, we propose the first self-supervised contrastive learning framework that takes advantage of images and tabular data to train unimodal encoders. Our solution combines SimCLR and SCARF, two leading contrastive learning strategies, and is simple and effective. In our experiments, we demonstrate the strength of our framework by predicting risks of myocardial infarction and coronary artery disease (CAD) using cardiac MR images and 120 clinical features from 40,000 UK Biobank subjects. Furthermore, we show the generalizability of our approach to natural images using the DVM car advertisement dataset. We take advantage of the high interpretability of tabular data and through attribution and ablation experiments find that morphometric tabular features, describing size and shape, have outsized importance during the contrastive learning process and improve the quality of the learned embeddings. Finally, we introduce a novel form of supervised contrastive learning, label as a feature (LaaF), by appending the ground truth label as a tabular feature during multimodal pretraining, outperforming all supervised contrastive baselines.
abstract_zh: 医学数据集，尤其是生物样本库，通常包含大量表格数据，除了图像之外还包含丰富的临床信息。在实践中，临床医生通常拥有的数据较少，无论是多样性还是规模，但仍然希望部署深度学习解决方案。加上不断增加的医疗数据集规模和昂贵的注释成本，能够进行多模态预训练和单模态预测的无监督方法的必要性已经上升。为了满足这些需求，我们提出了第一个自监督对比学习框架，该框架利用图像和表格数据来训练单峰编码器。我们的解决方案结合了 SimCLR 和 SCARF 这两种领先的对比学习策略，简单而有效。在我们的实验中，我们通过使用心脏 MR 图像和来自 40,000 名英国生物银行受试者的 120 种临床特征来预测心肌梗死和冠状动脉疾病 (CAD) 的风险，从而证明了我们框架的优势。此外，我们使用 DVM 汽车广告数据集展示了我们的自然图像方法的通用性。我们利用表格数据的高可解释性，并通过归因和消融实验发现，描述大小和形状的形态计量表格特征在对比学习过程中具有极其重要的作用，并提高了学习嵌入的质量。最后，我们引入了一种新颖的监督对比学习形式，即标签作为特征（LaaF），通过在多模态预训练期间将地面实况标签附加为表格特征，优于所有监督对比基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督对比学习框架，结合表格数据和影像数据训练单模态编码器，以解决医疗数据中图像和临床信息联合建模的挑战。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据集通常包含丰富的表格临床信息和影像数据，但临床数据量有限且标注成本高，需开发无需标注的多模态预训练方法以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 融合SimCLR和SCARF两种对比学习策略，利用表格数据的可解释性并通过属性归因实验验证形态学特征的重要性，提出将标签作为表格特征的监督对比学习方法（LaaF）。
AI.result: 在40,000名UK Biobank受试者的医疗数据及自然图像数据集上验证了方法有效性，形态学表格特征显著提升嵌入质量，LaaF优于所有监督对比基线。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了多模态数据的高效联合学习，证明了形态学特征的关键作用，并通过LaaF创新性地结合了监督信息，具有广泛的应用潜力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督对比学习框架，结合表格数据和影像数据训练单模态编码器，以解决医疗数据中图像和临床信息联合建模的挑战。

ai_content.result: 在40,000名UK Biobank受试者的医疗数据及自然图像数据集上验证了方法有效性，形态学表格特征显著提升嵌入质量，LaaF优于所有监督对比基线。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架实现了多模态数据的高效联合学习，证明了形态学特征的关键作用，并通过LaaF创新性地结合了监督信息，具有广泛的应用潜力。

search_text: Best of Both Worlds: Multimodal Contrastive Learning with Tabular and Imaging Data 两全其美：利用表格和成像数据进行多模态对比学习 Medical datasets and especially biobanks, often contain extensive tabular data with rich clinical information in addition to images. In practice, clinicians typically have less data, both in terms of diversity and scale, but still wish to deploy deep learning solutions. Combined with increasing medical dataset sizes and expensive annotation costs, the necessity for unsupervised methods that can pretrain multimodally and predict unimodally has risen. To address these needs, we propose the first self-supervised contrastive learning framework that takes advantage of images and tabular data to train unimodal encoders. Our solution combines SimCLR and SCARF, two leading contrastive learning strategies, and is simple and effective. In our experiments, we demonstrate the strength of our framework by predicting risks of myocardial infarction and coronary artery disease (CAD) using cardiac MR images and 120 clinical features from 40,000 UK Biobank subjects. Furthermore, we show the generalizability of our approach to natural images using the DVM car advertisement dataset. We take advantage of the high interpretability of tabular data and through attribution and ablation experiments find that morphometric tabular features, describing size and shape, have outsized importance during the contrastive learning process and improve the quality of the learned embeddings. Finally, we introduce a novel form of supervised contrastive learning, label as a feature (LaaF), by appending the ground truth label as a tabular feature during multimodal pretraining, outperforming all supervised contrastive baselines. 医学数据集，尤其是生物样本库，通常包含大量表格数据，除了图像之外还包含丰富的临床信息。在实践中，临床医生通常拥有的数据较少，无论是多样性还是规模，但仍然希望部署深度学习解决方案。加上不断增加的医疗数据集规模和昂贵的注释成本，能够进行多模态预训练和单模态预测的无监督方法的必要性已经上升。为了满足这些需求，我们提出了第一个自监督对比学习框架，该框架利用图像和表格数据来训练单峰编码器。我们的解决方案结合了 SimCLR 和 SCARF 这两种领先的对比学习策略，简单而有效。在我们的实验中，我们通过使用心脏 MR 图像和来自 40,000 名英国生物银行受试者的 120 种临床特征来预测心肌梗死和冠状动脉疾病 (CAD) 的风险，从而证明了我们框架的优势。此外，我们使用 DVM 汽车广告数据集展示了我们的自然图像方法的通用性。我们利用表格数据的高可解释性，并通过归因和消融实验发现，描述大小和形状的形态计量表格特征在对比学习过程中具有极其重要的作用，并提高了学习嵌入的质量。最后，我们引入了一种新颖的监督对比学习形式，即标签作为特征（LaaF），通过在多模态预训练期间将地面实况标签附加为表格特征，优于所有监督对比基线。 本文提出了一种自监督对比学习框架，结合表格数据和影像数据训练单模态编码器，以解决医疗数据中图像和临床信息联合建模的挑战。 Paul Hager,Martin J. Menten,Daniel Rueckert cs.CV

authors_text: Jisoo Jeong,Hong Cai,Risheek Garrepalli,Fatih Porikli
title: DistractFlow: Improving Optical Flow Estimation via Realistic Distractions and Pseudo-Labeling
title_zh: DistractFlow：通过现实干扰和伪标签改进光流估计
abstract: We propose a novel data augmentation approach, DistractFlow, for training optical flow estimation models by introducing realistic distractions to the input frames. Based on a mixing ratio, we combine one of the frames in the pair with a distractor image depicting a similar domain, which allows for inducing visual perturbations congruent with natural objects and scenes. We refer to such pairs as distracted pairs. Our intuition is that using semantically meaningful distractors enables the model to learn related variations and attain robustness against challenging deviations, compared to conventional augmentation schemes focusing only on low-level aspects and modifications. More specifically, in addition to the supervised loss computed between the estimated flow for the original pair and its ground-truth flow, we include a second supervised loss defined between the distracted pair's flow and the original pair's ground-truth flow, weighted with the same mixing ratio. Furthermore, when unlabeled data is available, we extend our augmentation approach to self-supervised settings through pseudo-labeling and cross-consistency regularization. Given an original pair and its distracted version, we enforce the estimated flow on the distracted pair to agree with the flow of the original pair. Our approach allows increasing the number of available training pairs significantly without requiring additional annotations. It is agnostic to the model architecture and can be applied to training any optical flow estimation models. Our extensive evaluations on multiple benchmarks, including Sintel, KITTI, and SlowFlow, show that DistractFlow improves existing models consistently, outperforming the latest state of the art.
summary: We propose a novel data augmentation approach, DistractFlow, for training optical flow estimation models by introducing realistic distractions to the input frames. Based on a mixing ratio, we combine one of the frames in the pair with a distractor image depicting a similar domain, which allows for inducing visual perturbations congruent with natural objects and scenes. We refer to such pairs as distracted pairs. Our intuition is that using semantically meaningful distractors enables the model to learn related variations and attain robustness against challenging deviations, compared to conventional augmentation schemes focusing only on low-level aspects and modifications. More specifically, in addition to the supervised loss computed between the estimated flow for the original pair and its ground-truth flow, we include a second supervised loss defined between the distracted pair's flow and the original pair's ground-truth flow, weighted with the same mixing ratio. Furthermore, when unlabeled data is available, we extend our augmentation approach to self-supervised settings through pseudo-labeling and cross-consistency regularization. Given an original pair and its distracted version, we enforce the estimated flow on the distracted pair to agree with the flow of the original pair. Our approach allows increasing the number of available training pairs significantly without requiring additional annotations. It is agnostic to the model architecture and can be applied to training any optical flow estimation models. Our extensive evaluations on multiple benchmarks, including Sintel, KITTI, and SlowFlow, show that DistractFlow improves existing models consistently, outperforming the latest state of the art.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的数据增强方法 DistractFlow，通过向输入帧引入真实的干扰来训练光流估计模型。基于混合比，我们将一对帧中的一个与描绘相似域的干扰图像结合起来，这可以引起与自然物体和场景一致的视觉扰动。我们将此类配对称为分心配对。我们的直觉是，与仅关注低级方面和修改的传统增强方案相比，使用语义上有意义的干扰项使模型能够学习相关变化并获得针对挑战性偏差的鲁棒性。更具体地说，除了在原始对的估计流与其真实流之间计算的监督损失之外，我们还包括在分散对的流和原始对的真实流之间定义的第二个监督损失，并使用相同的混合比进行加权。此外，当未标记的数据可用时，我们通过伪标记和交叉一致性正则化将增强方法扩展到自我监督设置。给定原始对及其分散版本，我们强制分散对的估计流量与原始对的流量一致。我们的方法可以显着增加可用训练对的数量，而无需额外的注释。它与模型架构无关，可用于训练任何光流估计模型。我们对 Sintel、KITTI 和 SlowFlow 等多个基准进行的广泛评估表明，DistractFlow 持续改进了现有模型，超越了最新的技术水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DistractFlow的新数据增强方法，通过引入真实干扰来提升光流估计模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统数据增强方法仅关注低级修改，无法有效提升模型对复杂场景变化的鲁棒性，因此需要引入语义相关的干扰以增强模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过混合比例将输入帧与相似领域的干扰图像结合生成'干扰对'，并引入双重监督损失；利用伪标签和跨一致性正则化扩展至自监督学习，无需额外标注即可增加训练样本。
AI.result: 在Sintel、KITTI和SlowFlow等多个基准测试中，DistractFlow持续提升现有模型性能，优于最新状态-of-the-art方法。
AI.conclusion: DistractFlow通过语义干扰和伪标签机制有效提升光流估计鲁棒性，且与模型架构无关，具有广泛适用性。

authors_text: Lin Li,Michael Spratling
title: Improved Adversarial Training Through Adaptive Instance-wise Loss Smoothing
title_zh: 通过自适应实例损失平滑改进对抗训练
abstract: Deep neural networks can be easily fooled into making incorrect predictions through corruption of the input by adversarial perturbations: human-imperceptible artificial noise. So far adversarial training has been the most successful defense against such adversarial attacks. This work focuses on improving adversarial training to boost adversarial robustness. We first analyze, from an instance-wise perspective, how adversarial vulnerability evolves during adversarial training. We find that during training an overall reduction of adversarial loss is achieved by sacrificing a considerable proportion of training samples to be more vulnerable to adversarial attack, which results in an uneven distribution of adversarial vulnerability among data. Such "uneven vulnerability", is prevalent across several popular robust training methods and, more importantly, relates to overfitting in adversarial training. Motivated by this observation, we propose a new adversarial training method: Instance-adaptive Smoothness Enhanced Adversarial Training (ISEAT). It jointly smooths both input and weight loss landscapes in an adaptive, instance-specific, way to enhance robustness more for those samples with higher adversarial vulnerability. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing defense methods. Noticeably, our method, when combined with the latest data augmentation and semi-supervised learning techniques, achieves state-of-the-art robustness against $\ell_{\infty}$-norm constrained attacks on CIFAR10 of 59.32% for Wide ResNet34-10 without extra data, and 61.55% for Wide ResNet28-10 with extra data. Code is available at https://github.com/TreeLLi/Instance-adaptive-Smoothness-Enhanced-AT.
summary: Deep neural networks can be easily fooled into making incorrect predictions through corruption of the input by adversarial perturbations: human-imperceptible artificial noise. So far adversarial training has been the most successful defense against such adversarial attacks. This work focuses on improving adversarial training to boost adversarial robustness. We first analyze, from an instance-wise perspective, how adversarial vulnerability evolves during adversarial training. We find that during training an overall reduction of adversarial loss is achieved by sacrificing a considerable proportion of training samples to be more vulnerable to adversarial attack, which results in an uneven distribution of adversarial vulnerability among data. Such "uneven vulnerability", is prevalent across several popular robust training methods and, more importantly, relates to overfitting in adversarial training. Motivated by this observation, we propose a new adversarial training method: Instance-adaptive Smoothness Enhanced Adversarial Training (ISEAT). It jointly smooths both input and weight loss landscapes in an adaptive, instance-specific, way to enhance robustness more for those samples with higher adversarial vulnerability. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing defense methods. Noticeably, our method, when combined with the latest data augmentation and semi-supervised learning techniques, achieves state-of-the-art robustness against $\ell_{\infty}$-norm constrained attacks on CIFAR10 of 59.32% for Wide ResNet34-10 without extra data, and 61.55% for Wide ResNet28-10 with extra data. Code is available at https://github.com/TreeLLi/Instance-adaptive-Smoothness-Enhanced-AT.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络很容易因对抗性扰动（人类无法察觉的人工噪声）对输入的破坏而被愚弄，做出错误的预测。到目前为止，对抗性训练是针对此类对抗性攻击最成功的防御方法。这项工作的重点是改进对抗训练以提高对抗鲁棒性。我们首先从实例角度分析对抗训练过程中对抗漏洞如何演变。我们发现，在训练过程中，通过牺牲相当大比例的训练样本以使其更容易受到对抗性攻击，可以总体减少对抗性损失，从而导致数据之间的对抗性脆弱性分布不均匀。这种“不均匀的脆弱性”在几种流行的鲁棒训练方法中普遍存在，更重要的是，与对抗训练中的过度拟合有关。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一种新的对抗训练方法：实例自适应平滑增强对抗训练（ISEAT）。它以一种自适应的、特定于实例的方式联合平滑输入和减肥景观，以增强那些具有较高对抗脆弱性的样本的鲁棒性。大量的实验证明了我们的方法相对于现有防御方法的优越性。值得注意的是，我们的方法与最新的数据增强和半监督学习技术相结合，在没有额外数据的情况下，针对 CIFAR10 的 $\ell_{\infty}$ 范数约束攻击实现了最先进的鲁棒性，对于 Wide ResNet34-10 为 59.32%，对于使用额外数据的 Wide ResNet28-10 为 61.55%。代码可在 https://github.com/TreeLLi/Instance-adaptive-Smoothness-Enhanced-AT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的对抗训练方法，通过自适应实例级损失平滑提升深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练中存在样本间对抗脆弱性分布不均的问题，导致模型过拟合且防御效果受限。
AI.method: 提出实例自适应平滑增强对抗训练（ISEAT），通过自适应调整输入和权重损失景观，针对性增强高脆弱性样本的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10数据集上，ISEAT结合最新数据增强和半监督技术，实现Wide ResNet34-10模型59.32%（无额外数据）和61.55%（有额外数据）的对抗准确率，达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: ISEAT通过解决对抗训练中的不均衡脆弱性问题，有效提升了模型鲁棒性，为对抗防御提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的对抗训练方法，通过自适应实例级损失平滑提升深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性。
ai_content.motivation: 对抗训练中存在样本间对抗脆弱性分布不均的问题，导致模型过拟合且防御效果受限。
ai_content.method: 提出实例自适应平滑增强对抗训练（ISEAT），通过自适应调整输入和权重损失景观，针对性增强高脆弱性样本的鲁棒性。
ai_content.result: 在CIFAR10数据集上，ISEAT结合最新数据增强和半监督技术，实现Wide ResNet34-10模型59.32%（无额外数据）和61.55%（有额外数据）的对抗准确率，达到SOTA水平。
ai_content.conclusion: ISEAT通过解决对抗训练中的不均衡脆弱性问题，有效提升了模型鲁棒性，为对抗防御提供了新思路。

search_text: Improved Adversarial Training Through Adaptive Instance-wise Loss Smoothing 通过自适应实例损失平滑改进对抗训练 Deep neural networks can be easily fooled into making incorrect predictions through corruption of the input by adversarial perturbations: human-imperceptible artificial noise. So far adversarial training has been the most successful defense against such adversarial attacks. This work focuses on improving adversarial training to boost adversarial robustness. We first analyze, from an instance-wise perspective, how adversarial vulnerability evolves during adversarial training. We find that during training an overall reduction of adversarial loss is achieved by sacrificing a considerable proportion of training samples to be more vulnerable to adversarial attack, which results in an uneven distribution of adversarial vulnerability among data. Such "uneven vulnerability", is prevalent across several popular robust training methods and, more importantly, relates to overfitting in adversarial training. Motivated by this observation, we propose a new adversarial training method: Instance-adaptive Smoothness Enhanced Adversarial Training (ISEAT). It jointly smooths both input and weight loss landscapes in an adaptive, instance-specific, way to enhance robustness more for those samples with higher adversarial vulnerability. Extensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing defense methods. Noticeably, our method, when combined with the latest data augmentation and semi-supervised learning techniques, achieves state-of-the-art robustness against $\ell_{\infty}$-norm constrained attacks on CIFAR10 of 59.32% for Wide ResNet34-10 without extra data, and 61.55% for Wide ResNet28-10 with extra data. Code is available at https://github.com/TreeLLi/Instance-adaptive-Smoothness-Enhanced-AT. 深度神经网络很容易因对抗性扰动（人类无法察觉的人工噪声）对输入的破坏而被愚弄，做出错误的预测。到目前为止，对抗性训练是针对此类对抗性攻击最成功的防御方法。这项工作的重点是改进对抗训练以提高对抗鲁棒性。我们首先从实例角度分析对抗训练过程中对抗漏洞如何演变。我们发现，在训练过程中，通过牺牲相当大比例的训练样本以使其更容易受到对抗性攻击，可以总体减少对抗性损失，从而导致数据之间的对抗性脆弱性分布不均匀。这种“不均匀的脆弱性”在几种流行的鲁棒训练方法中普遍存在，更重要的是，与对抗训练中的过度拟合有关。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一种新的对抗训练方法：实例自适应平滑增强对抗训练（ISEAT）。它以一种自适应的、特定于实例的方式联合平滑输入和减肥景观，以增强那些具有较高对抗脆弱性的样本的鲁棒性。大量的实验证明了我们的方法相对于现有防御方法的优越性。值得注意的是，我们的方法与最新的数据增强和半监督学习技术相结合，在没有额外数据的情况下，针对 CIFAR10 的 $\ell_{\infty}$ 范数约束攻击实现了最先进的鲁棒性，对于 Wide ResNet34-10 为 59.32%，对于使用额外数据的 Wide ResNet28-10 为 61.55%。代码可在 https://github.com/TreeLLi/Instance-adaptive-Smoothness-Enhanced-AT 获取。 本文提出了一种改进的对抗训练方法，通过自适应实例级损失平滑提升深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性。 Lin Li,Michael Spratling cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Mingqiang Wei,Qian Sun,Haoran Xie,Dong Liang,Fu Lee Wang
title: Search By Image: Deeply Exploring Beneficial Features for Beauty Product Retrieval
title_zh: 按图搜索：深入探索美容产品检索的有益特征
abstract: Searching by image is popular yet still challenging due to the extensive interference arose from i) data variations (e.g., background, pose, visual angle, brightness) of real-world captured images and ii) similar images in the query dataset. This paper studies a practically meaningful problem of beauty product retrieval (BPR) by neural networks. We broadly extract different types of image features, and raise an intriguing question that whether these features are beneficial to i) suppress data variations of real-world captured images, and ii) distinguish one image from others which look very similar but are intrinsically different beauty products in the dataset, therefore leading to an enhanced capability of BPR. To answer it, we present a novel variable-attention neural network to understand the combination of multiple features (termed VM-Net) of beauty product images. Considering that there are few publicly released training datasets for BPR, we establish a new dataset with more than one million images classified into more than 20K categories to improve both the generalization and anti-interference abilities of VM-Net and other methods. We verify the performance of VM-Net and its competitors on the benchmark dataset Perfect-500K, where VM-Net shows clear improvements over the competitors in terms of MAP@7. The source code and dataset will be released upon publication.
summary: Searching by image is popular yet still challenging due to the extensive interference arose from i) data variations (e.g., background, pose, visual angle, brightness) of real-world captured images and ii) similar images in the query dataset. This paper studies a practically meaningful problem of beauty product retrieval (BPR) by neural networks. We broadly extract different types of image features, and raise an intriguing question that whether these features are beneficial to i) suppress data variations of real-world captured images, and ii) distinguish one image from others which look very similar but are intrinsically different beauty products in the dataset, therefore leading to an enhanced capability of BPR. To answer it, we present a novel variable-attention neural network to understand the combination of multiple features (termed VM-Net) of beauty product images. Considering that there are few publicly released training datasets for BPR, we establish a new dataset with more than one million images classified into more than 20K categories to improve both the generalization and anti-interference abilities of VM-Net and other methods. We verify the performance of VM-Net and its competitors on the benchmark dataset Perfect-500K, where VM-Net shows clear improvements over the competitors in terms of MAP@7. The source code and dataset will be released upon publication.
abstract_zh: 按图像搜索很流行，但仍然具有挑战性，因为 i) 现实世界捕获的图像的数据变化（例如，背景、姿势、视角、亮度）和 ii) 查询数据集中的相似图像产生了广泛的干扰。本文研究了一个具有实际意义的神经网络美容产品检索（BPR）问题。我们广泛提取不同类型的图像特征，并提出一个有趣的问题：这些特征是否有利于 i) 抑制真实世界捕获图像的数据变化，以及 ii) 将一张图像与数据集中看起来非常相似但本质上不同的美容产品的其他图像区分开来，从而增强 BPR 的能力。为了回答这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的可变注意力神经网络来理解美容产品图像的多个特征的组合（称为 VM-Net）。考虑到公开发布的 BPR 训练数据集很少，我们建立了一个新的数据集，其中包含超过 100 万张图像，分为超过 20K 类别，以提高 VM-Net 等方法的泛化和抗干扰能力。我们在基准数据集 Perfect-500K 上验证了 VM-Net 及其竞争对手的性能，其中 VM-Net 在 MAP@7 方面比竞争对手有明显的改进。源代码和数据集将在发布后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过图像搜索美容产品（BPR）的挑战，提出了一种结合多特征的神经网络VM-Net以提升检索效果。
AI.motivation: 真实场景图像存在背景、视角等干扰，且相似产品图像易混淆，现有方法难以有效抑制干扰并区分细微差异。
AI.method: 设计可变注意力神经网络VM-Net以融合多类型图像特征，并构建包含100万张图像的20K类数据集增强模型泛化能力。
AI.result: VM-Net在Perfect-500K基准数据集上MAP@7指标优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 多特征融合与新数据集显著提升美容产品检索性能，为后续研究提供基础。

authors_text: Yong-Hao Hu,Kenichiro Ito,Ayumi Igarashi
title: Improving Real-time Communication for Educational Metaverse by Alternative WebRTC SFU and Delegating Transmission of Avatar Transform
title_zh: 通过替代WebRTC SFU和阿凡达变换的委托传输来改善教育虚拟世界的实时通信
comment: Submitted to IEEE ICCE-TW 2023, waiting for notification of acceptance
comments: Submitted to IEEE ICCE-TW 2023, waiting for notification of acceptance
abstract: Maintaining real-time communication quality in metaverse has always been a challenge, especially when the number of participants increase. We introduce a proprietary WebRTC SFU service to an open-source web-based VR platform, to realize a more stable and reliable platform suitable for educational communication of audio, video, and avatar transform. We developed the web-based VR platform and conducted a preliminary validation on the implementation for proof of concept, and high performance in both server and client sides are confirmed, which may indicates better user experience in communication and imply a solution to realize educational metaverse.
summary: Maintaining real-time communication quality in metaverse has always been a challenge, especially when the number of participants increase. We introduce a proprietary WebRTC SFU service to an open-source web-based VR platform, to realize a more stable and reliable platform suitable for educational communication of audio, video, and avatar transform. We developed the web-based VR platform and conducted a preliminary validation on the implementation for proof of concept, and high performance in both server and client sides are confirmed, which may indicates better user experience in communication and imply a solution to realize educational metaverse.
abstract_zh: 在元宇宙中保持实时通信质量一直是一个挑战，尤其是当参与者数量增加时。我们将专有的WebRTC SFU服务引入基于开源Web的VR平台，以实现更稳定可靠的适合音频、视频和头像转换的教育交流的平台。我们开发了基于Web的VR平台，并对概念验证的实现进行了初步验证，并确认了服务器端和客户端的高性能，这可能表明更好的用户通信体验，并暗示实现教育元宇宙的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 通过引入替代WebRTC SFU服务和委托传输化身变换，改进教育元宇宙中的实时通信质量。
AI.motivation: 现有元宇宙平台在用户数量增加时难以维持稳定的音视频及化身传输质量，需更可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 开发基于WebRTC SFU的开源VR平台，优化服务器与客户端架构并委托传输化身变换数据。
AI.result: 验证了服务器与客户端的高性能表现，初步证明该方案可提升通信稳定性与用户体验。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为构建支持大规模用户的教育元宇宙提供了可行的实时通信技术路径。

authors_text: Andrew Litteken,Lennart Maximilian Seifert,Jason D. Chadwick,Natalia Nottingham,Tanay Roy,Ziqian Li,David Schuster,Frederic T. Chong,Jonathan M. Baker
title: Dancing the Quantum Waltz: Compiling Three-Qubit Gates on Four Level Architectures
title_zh: 跳量子华尔兹：在四层架构上编译三量子位门
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, to be published at ISCA 2023
comments: 14 pages, 9 figures, to be published at ISCA 2023
abstract: Superconducting quantum devices are a leading technology for quantum computation, but they suffer from several challenges. Gate errors, coherence errors and a lack of connectivity all contribute to low fidelity results. In particular, connectivity restrictions enforce a gate set that requires three-qubit gates to be decomposed into one- or two-qubit gates. This substantially increases the number of two-qubit gates that need to be executed. However, many quantum devices have access to higher energy levels. We can expand the qubit abstraction of $|0\rangle$ and $|1\rangle$ to a ququart which has access to the $|2\rangle$ and $|3\rangle$ state, but with shorter coherence times. This allows for two qubits to be encoded in one ququart, enabling increased virtual connectivity between physical units from two adjacent qubits to four fully connected qubits. This connectivity scheme allows us to more efficiently execute three-qubit gates natively between two physical devices. We present direct-to-pulse implementations of several three-qubit gates, synthesized via optimal control, for compilation of three-qubit gates onto a superconducting-based architecture with access to four-level devices with the first experimental demonstration of four-level ququart gates designed through optimal control. We demonstrate strategies that temporarily use higher level states to perform Toffoli gates and always use higher level states to improve fidelities for quantum circuits. We find that these methods improve expected fidelities with increases of 2x across circuit sizes using intermediate encoding, and increases of 3x for fully-encoded ququart compilation.
summary: Superconducting quantum devices are a leading technology for quantum computation, but they suffer from several challenges. Gate errors, coherence errors and a lack of connectivity all contribute to low fidelity results. In particular, connectivity restrictions enforce a gate set that requires three-qubit gates to be decomposed into one- or two-qubit gates. This substantially increases the number of two-qubit gates that need to be executed. However, many quantum devices have access to higher energy levels. We can expand the qubit abstraction of $|0\rangle$ and $|1\rangle$ to a ququart which has access to the $|2\rangle$ and $|3\rangle$ state, but with shorter coherence times. This allows for two qubits to be encoded in one ququart, enabling increased virtual connectivity between physical units from two adjacent qubits to four fully connected qubits. This connectivity scheme allows us to more efficiently execute three-qubit gates natively between two physical devices. We present direct-to-pulse implementations of several three-qubit gates, synthesized via optimal control, for compilation of three-qubit gates onto a superconducting-based architecture with access to four-level devices with the first experimental demonstration of four-level ququart gates designed through optimal control. We demonstrate strategies that temporarily use higher level states to perform Toffoli gates and always use higher level states to improve fidelities for quantum circuits. We find that these methods improve expected fidelities with increases of 2x across circuit sizes using intermediate encoding, and increases of 3x for fully-encoded ququart compilation.
abstract_zh: 超导量子器件是量子计算的领先技术，但它们面临着一些挑战。门错误、相干性错误和缺乏连接都会导致低保真度结果。特别是，连接性限制强制要求将三量子位门分解为一或二量子位门的门集。这大大增加了需要执行的两量子位门的数量。然而，许多量子器件可以获得更高的能级。我们可以将 $|0\rangle$ 和 $|1\rangle$ 的量子位抽象扩展为 ququart，它可以访问 $|2\rangle$ 和 $|3\rangle$ 状态，但相干时间更短。这允许将两个量子位编码在一个四夸脱中，从而增加物理单元之间的虚拟连接性，从两个相邻的量子位到四个完全连接的量子位。这种连接方案使我们能够更有效地在两个物理设备之间本地执行三量子位门。我们提出了通过最佳控制合成的几个三量子位门的直接脉冲实现，用于将三量子位门编译到基于超导的架构上，并可以访问四级器件，并首次实验演示了通过最佳控制设计的四级 ququart 门。我们演示了暂时使用更高级别状态来执行 Toffoli 门并始终使用更高级别状态来提高量子电路保真度的策略。我们发现这些方法提高了预期的保真度，使用中间编码的电路尺寸增加了 2 倍，而完全编码的 ququart 编译则增加了 3 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用四能级架构（ququart）实现三量子比特门的原生编译方法，通过扩展量子比特抽象并利用更高能级状态提升量子电路保真度。
AI.motivation: 超导量子器件因门错误、相干性限制及连接性不足导致保真度低下，传统需将三量子比特门分解为多两量子比特门，增加操作复杂度。
AI.method: 将量子比特扩展为四能级ququart，利用更高能级实现虚拟连接性，通过最优控制直接生成脉冲实现三量子比特门，并采用中间编码与全编码策略优化电路编译。
AI.result: 实验验证显示，中间编码策略使电路保真度提升2倍，全编码策略提升3倍，首次实现基于四能级系统的最优控制门设计。
AI.conclusion: 四能级架构通过虚拟连接性增强与原生三量子比特门编译，有效提升量子计算保真度与效率，为超导量子器件优化提供新路径。

authors_text: Cameron Kisailus,Daksh Narang,Matthew Shannon,Odest Chadwicke Jenkins
title: SEAL: Semantic Frame Execution And Localization for Perceiving Afforded Robot Actions
title_zh: SEAL：用于感知机器人动作的语义框架执行和本地化
comment: Currently in review for IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023). Contact: kisailus@umich.edu
comments: Currently in review for IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023). Contact: kisailus@umich.edu
abstract: Recent advances in robotic mobile manipulation have spurred the expansion of the operating environment for robots from constrained workspaces to large-scale, human environments. In order to effectively complete tasks in these spaces, robots must be able to perceive, reason, and execute over a diversity of affordances, well beyond simple pick-and-place. We posit the notion of semantic frames provides a compelling representation for robot actions that is amenable to action-focused perception, task-level reasoning, action-level execution, and integration with language. Semantic frames, a product of the linguistics community, define the necessary elements, pre- and post- conditions, and a set of sequential robot actions necessary to successfully execute an action evoked by a verb phrase. In this work, we extend the semantic frame representation for robot manipulation actions and introduce the problem of Semantic Frame Execution And Localization for Perceiving Afforded Robot Actions (SEAL) as a graphical model. For the SEAL problem, we describe our nonparametric Semantic Frame Mapping (SeFM) algorithm for maintaining belief over a finite set of semantic frames as the locations of actions afforded to the robot. We show that language models such as GPT-3 are insufficient to address generalized task execution covered by the SEAL formulation and SeFM provides robots with efficient search strategies and long term memory needed when operating in building-scale environments.
summary: Recent advances in robotic mobile manipulation have spurred the expansion of the operating environment for robots from constrained workspaces to large-scale, human environments. In order to effectively complete tasks in these spaces, robots must be able to perceive, reason, and execute over a diversity of affordances, well beyond simple pick-and-place. We posit the notion of semantic frames provides a compelling representation for robot actions that is amenable to action-focused perception, task-level reasoning, action-level execution, and integration with language. Semantic frames, a product of the linguistics community, define the necessary elements, pre- and post- conditions, and a set of sequential robot actions necessary to successfully execute an action evoked by a verb phrase. In this work, we extend the semantic frame representation for robot manipulation actions and introduce the problem of Semantic Frame Execution And Localization for Perceiving Afforded Robot Actions (SEAL) as a graphical model. For the SEAL problem, we describe our nonparametric Semantic Frame Mapping (SeFM) algorithm for maintaining belief over a finite set of semantic frames as the locations of actions afforded to the robot. We show that language models such as GPT-3 are insufficient to address generalized task execution covered by the SEAL formulation and SeFM provides robots with efficient search strategies and long term memory needed when operating in building-scale environments.
abstract_zh: 机器人移动操作的最新进展促使机器人的操作环境从有限的工作空间扩展到大规模的人类环境。为了有效地完成这些空间中的任务，机器人必须能够感知、推理和执行各种可供性，而不仅仅是简单的拾取和放置。我们认为语义框架的概念为机器人动作提供了令人信服的表示，适合以动作为中心的感知、任务级推理、动作级执行以及与语言的集成。语义框架是语言学界的产物，定义了成功执行动词短语引发的动作所需的必要元素、前置条件和后置条件以及一组连续的机器人动作。在这项工作中，我们扩展了机器人操作动作的语义框架表示，并引入了感知可负担机器人动作（SEAL）的语义框架执行和本地化问题作为图形模型。对于海豹突击队问题，我们描述了我们的非参数语义框架映射（SeFM）算法，用于维持对有限语义框架集的信任，作为提供给机器人的动作位置。我们表明，GPT-3 等语言模型不足以解决 SEAL 公式所涵盖的通用任务执行问题，而 SeFM 为机器人提供了在建筑规模环境中运行时所需的高效搜索策略和长期记忆。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEAL框架，通过语义框架执行与定位技术，使机器人能够在复杂环境中感知并执行多样化操作任务。
AI.motivation: 随着机器人操作环境从受限空间扩展到大规模人类环境，传统方法难以处理复杂任务，需发展新的语义表征与执行框架。
AI.method: 基于语言学语义框架构建图模型，提出非参数语义框架映射算法（SeFM），结合长期记忆与高效搜索策略实现动作定位与执行。
AI.result: 实验表明SeFM在建筑级环境中优于GPT-3等语言模型，能有效支持复杂任务的长期记忆与动态规划。
AI.conclusion: SEAL通过整合语义框架与机器人执行机制，为大规模环境中的复杂任务提供了可扩展的解决方案。
