search_text: Machine Psychology 机器心理学 Large language models (LLMs) show increasingly advanced emergent capabilities and are being incorporated across various societal domains. Understanding their behavior and reasoning abilities therefore holds significant importance. We argue that a fruitful direction for research is engaging LLMs in behavioral experiments inspired by psychology that have traditionally been aimed at understanding human cognition and behavior. In this article, we highlight and summarize theoretical perspectives, experimental paradigms, and computational analysis techniques that this approach brings to the table. It paves the way for a "machine psychology" for generative artificial intelligence (AI) that goes beyond performance benchmarks and focuses instead on computational insights that move us toward a better understanding and discovery of emergent abilities and behavioral patterns in LLMs. We review existing work taking this approach, synthesize best practices, and highlight promising future directions. We also highlight the important caveats of applying methodologies designed for understanding humans to machines. We posit that leveraging tools from experimental psychology to study AI will become increasingly valuable as models evolve to be more powerful, opaque, multi-modal, and integrated into complex real-world settings. 大型语言模型（LLM）显示出日益先进的新兴功能，并且正在被纳入各个社会领域。因此，了解他们的行为和推理能力非常重要。我们认为，一个富有成效的研究方向是让法学硕士参与受心理学启发的行为实验，传统上旨在理解人类认知和行为。在本文中，我们重点介绍并总结了这种方法带来的理论观点、实验范式和计算分析技术。它为生成人工智能（AI）的“机器心理学”铺平了道路，它超越了性能基准，而是专注于计算见解，使我们能够更好地理解和发现法学硕士的新兴能力和行为模式。我们回顾采用这种方法的现有工作，综合最佳实践，并强调有前途的未来方向。我们还强调了应用旨在理解人类和机器的方法的重要注意事项。我们认为，随着模型变得更加强大、不透明、多模式并集成到复杂的现实世界环境中，利用实验心理学工具来研究人工智能将变得越来越有价值。 提出通过心理学实验方法研究大型语言模型（LLMs）的行为，建立‘机器心理学’以深入理解其能力和行为模式。 Thilo Hagendorff,Ishita Dasgupta,Marcel Binz,Stephanie C. Y. Chan,Andrew Lampinen,Jane X. Wang,Zeynep Akata,Eric Schulz cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Bikun Wang,Zhipeng Wang,Chenhao Zhu,Zhiqiang Zhang,Zhichen Wang,Penghong Lin,Jingchu Liu,Qian Zhang
title: Interpretable Motion Planner for Urban Driving via Hierarchical Imitation Learning
title_zh: 通过分层模仿学习实现城市驾驶的可解释运动规划器
abstract: Learning-based approaches have achieved remarkable performance in the domain of autonomous driving. Leveraging the impressive ability of neural networks and large amounts of human driving data, complex patterns and rules of driving behavior can be encoded as a model to benefit the autonomous driving system. Besides, an increasing number of data-driven works have been studied in the decision-making and motion planning module. However, the reliability and the stability of the neural network is still full of uncertainty. In this paper, we introduce a hierarchical planning architecture including a high-level grid-based behavior planner and a low-level trajectory planner, which is highly interpretable and controllable. As the high-level planner is responsible for finding a consistent route, the low-level planner generates a feasible trajectory. We evaluate our method both in closed-loop simulation and real world driving, and demonstrate the neural network planner has outstanding performance in complex urban autonomous driving scenarios.
summary: Learning-based approaches have achieved remarkable performance in the domain of autonomous driving. Leveraging the impressive ability of neural networks and large amounts of human driving data, complex patterns and rules of driving behavior can be encoded as a model to benefit the autonomous driving system. Besides, an increasing number of data-driven works have been studied in the decision-making and motion planning module. However, the reliability and the stability of the neural network is still full of uncertainty. In this paper, we introduce a hierarchical planning architecture including a high-level grid-based behavior planner and a low-level trajectory planner, which is highly interpretable and controllable. As the high-level planner is responsible for finding a consistent route, the low-level planner generates a feasible trajectory. We evaluate our method both in closed-loop simulation and real world driving, and demonstrate the neural network planner has outstanding performance in complex urban autonomous driving scenarios.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的方法在自动驾驶领域取得了令人瞩目的表现。利用神经网络令人印象深刻的能力和大量的人类驾驶数据，复杂的驾驶行为模式和规则可以被编码为模型，从而使自动驾驶系统受益。此外，越来越多的数据驱动工作在决策和运动规划模块中得到研究。然而神经网络的可靠性和稳定性仍然充满不确定性。在本文中，我们引入了一种分层规划架构，包括基于网格的高层行为规划器和低层轨迹规划器，该架构具有高度可解释性和可控性。由于高层规划器负责寻找一致的路线，低层规划器生成可行的轨迹。我们在闭环仿真和现实驾驶中评估了我们的方法，并证明神经网络规划器在复杂的城市自动驾驶场景中具有出色的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分层模仿学习的可解释运动规划器，用于城市驾驶环境中的自动驾驶系统。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于学习的方法在自动驾驶领域表现出色，但神经网络的可靠性和稳定性仍存在不确定性，需通过可解释性设计提升系统可控性。
AI.method: 设计分层规划架构，包含高层网格化行为规划器和底层轨迹规划器，结合模仿学习与结构化规划方法实现可解释性控制。
AI.result: 在闭环仿真和真实道路测试中验证了方法的有效性，证明该规划器在复杂城市场景中具有优异性能。
AI.conclusion: 分层架构通过结合数据驱动方法与可解释规划模块，显著提升了自动驾驶系统的可靠性与场景适应能力。

search_text: Interpretable Motion Planner for Urban Driving via Hierarchical Imitation Learning 通过分层模仿学习实现城市驾驶的可解释运动规划器 Learning-based approaches have achieved remarkable performance in the domain of autonomous driving. Leveraging the impressive ability of neural networks and large amounts of human driving data, complex patterns and rules of driving behavior can be encoded as a model to benefit the autonomous driving system. Besides, an increasing number of data-driven works have been studied in the decision-making and motion planning module. However, the reliability and the stability of the neural network is still full of uncertainty. In this paper, we introduce a hierarchical planning architecture including a high-level grid-based behavior planner and a low-level trajectory planner, which is highly interpretable and controllable. As the high-level planner is responsible for finding a consistent route, the low-level planner generates a feasible trajectory. We evaluate our method both in closed-loop simulation and real world driving, and demonstrate the neural network planner has outstanding performance in complex urban autonomous driving scenarios. 基于学习的方法在自动驾驶领域取得了令人瞩目的表现。利用神经网络令人印象深刻的能力和大量的人类驾驶数据，复杂的驾驶行为模式和规则可以被编码为模型，从而使自动驾驶系统受益。此外，越来越多的数据驱动工作在决策和运动规划模块中得到研究。然而神经网络的可靠性和稳定性仍然充满不确定性。在本文中，我们引入了一种分层规划架构，包括基于网格的高层行为规划器和低层轨迹规划器，该架构具有高度可解释性和可控性。由于高层规划器负责寻找一致的路线，低层规划器生成可行的轨迹。我们在闭环仿真和现实驾驶中评估了我们的方法，并证明神经网络规划器在复杂的城市自动驾驶场景中具有出色的性能。 本文提出一种基于分层模仿学习的可解释运动规划器，用于城市驾驶环境中的自动驾驶系统。 Bikun Wang,Zhipeng Wang,Chenhao Zhu,Zhiqiang Zhang,Zhichen Wang,Penghong Lin,Jingchu Liu,Qian Zhang cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuan Zhuang,Binliang Wang,Jianzhu Huai,Miao Li
title: 4D iRIOM: 4D Imaging Radar Inertial Odometry and Mapping
title_zh: 4D iRIOM：4D 成像雷达惯性里程计和测绘
comment: 8 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables, the proofread version will appear on RA-L soon
comments: 8 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables, the proofread version will appear on RA-L soon
abstract: Millimeter wave radar can measure distances, directions, and Doppler velocity for objects in harsh conditions such as fog. The 4D imaging radar with both vertical and horizontal data resembling an image can also measure objects' height. Previous studies have used 3D radars for ego-motion estimation. But few methods leveraged the rich data of imaging radars, and they usually omitted the mapping aspect, thus leading to inferior odometry accuracy. This paper presents a real-time imaging radar inertial odometry and mapping method, iRIOM, based on the submap concept. To deal with moving objects and multipath reflections, we use the graduated non-convexity method to robustly and efficiently estimate ego-velocity from a single scan. To measure the agreement between sparse non-repetitive radar scan points and submap points, the distribution-to-multi-distribution distance for matches is adopted. The ego-velocity, scan-to-submap matches are fused with the 6D inertial data by an iterative extended Kalman filter to get the platform's 3D position and orientation. A loop closure module is also developed to curb the odometry module's drift. To our knowledge, iRIOM based on the two modules is the first 4D radar inertial SLAM system. On our and third-party data, we show iRIOM's favorable odometry accuracy and mapping consistency against the FastLIO-SLAM and the EKFRIO. Also, the ablation study reveal the benefit of inertial data versus the constant velocity model, and scan-to-submap matching versus scan-to-scan matching.
summary: Millimeter wave radar can measure distances, directions, and Doppler velocity for objects in harsh conditions such as fog. The 4D imaging radar with both vertical and horizontal data resembling an image can also measure objects' height. Previous studies have used 3D radars for ego-motion estimation. But few methods leveraged the rich data of imaging radars, and they usually omitted the mapping aspect, thus leading to inferior odometry accuracy. This paper presents a real-time imaging radar inertial odometry and mapping method, iRIOM, based on the submap concept. To deal with moving objects and multipath reflections, we use the graduated non-convexity method to robustly and efficiently estimate ego-velocity from a single scan. To measure the agreement between sparse non-repetitive radar scan points and submap points, the distribution-to-multi-distribution distance for matches is adopted. The ego-velocity, scan-to-submap matches are fused with the 6D inertial data by an iterative extended Kalman filter to get the platform's 3D position and orientation. A loop closure module is also developed to curb the odometry module's drift. To our knowledge, iRIOM based on the two modules is the first 4D radar inertial SLAM system. On our and third-party data, we show iRIOM's favorable odometry accuracy and mapping consistency against the FastLIO-SLAM and the EKFRIO. Also, the ablation study reveal the benefit of inertial data versus the constant velocity model, and scan-to-submap matching versus scan-to-scan matching.
abstract_zh: 毫米波雷达可以在雾等恶劣条件下测量物体的距离、方向和多普勒速度。具有类似于图像的垂直和水平数据的4D成像雷达还可以测量物体的高度。先前的研究已使用 3D 雷达进行自我运动估计。但很少有方法利用成像雷达的丰富数据，并且通常忽略了测绘方面，从而导致测距精度较差。本文提出了一种基于子图概念的实时成像雷达惯性里程计和建图方法iRIOM。为了处理移动物体和多径反射，我们使用分级非凸方法来稳健且有效地估计单次扫描的自速度。为了衡量稀疏非重复雷达扫描点与子地图点之间的一致性，采用分布到多分布的匹配距离。自我速度、扫描到子图匹配通过迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波器与 6D 惯性数据融合，以获得平台的 3D 位置和方向。还开发了闭环模块来抑制里程计模块的漂移。据我们所知，基于这两个模块的iRIOM是第一个4D雷达惯性SLAM系统。根据我们和第三方的数据，我们展示了 iRIOM 相对于 FastLIO-SLAM 和 EKFRIO 良好的里程计准确性和地图一致性。此外，消融研究揭示了惯性数据相对于等速模型的优势，以及扫描到子图匹配相对于扫描到扫描匹配的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于4D成像雷达的实时惯性里程计与建图方法iRIOM，通过融合雷达扫描数据与惯性信息实现高精度定位与地图构建。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在利用3D雷达进行运动估计时，未能充分挖掘成像雷达的丰富数据潜力，且常忽略地图构建环节，导致里程计精度不足。
AI.method: 基于子地图概念，采用渐进非凸性方法处理移动物体和多径反射，通过分布到多分布距离度量匹配稀疏雷达点与子地图点，结合迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波器融合6D惯性数据，辅以闭环检测模块抑制漂移。
AI.result: 在自有及第三方数据集上，iRIOM相较FastLIO-SLAM和EKFRIO展现出更优的里程计精度与地图一致性，消融实验验证了惯性数据与扫描-子地图匹配的有效性。
AI.conclusion: iRIOM是首个4D雷达惯性SLAM系统，通过创新方法有效提升了复杂环境下的定位与建图性能，为雷达SLAM领域提供了新思路。

method: 基于子地图概念，采用渐进非凸性方法处理移动物体和多径反射，通过分布到多分布距离度量匹配稀疏雷达点与子地图点，结合迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波器融合6D惯性数据，辅以闭环检测模块抑制漂移。
result: 在自有及第三方数据集上，iRIOM相较FastLIO-SLAM和EKFRIO展现出更优的里程计精度与地图一致性，消融实验验证了惯性数据与扫描-子地图匹配的有效性。
conclusion: iRIOM是首个4D雷达惯性SLAM系统，通过创新方法有效提升了复杂环境下的定位与建图性能，为雷达SLAM领域提供了新思路。
search_text: 4D iRIOM: 4D Imaging Radar Inertial Odometry and Mapping 4D iRIOM：4D 成像雷达惯性里程计和测绘 Millimeter wave radar can measure distances, directions, and Doppler velocity for objects in harsh conditions such as fog. The 4D imaging radar with both vertical and horizontal data resembling an image can also measure objects' height. Previous studies have used 3D radars for ego-motion estimation. But few methods leveraged the rich data of imaging radars, and they usually omitted the mapping aspect, thus leading to inferior odometry accuracy. This paper presents a real-time imaging radar inertial odometry and mapping method, iRIOM, based on the submap concept. To deal with moving objects and multipath reflections, we use the graduated non-convexity method to robustly and efficiently estimate ego-velocity from a single scan. To measure the agreement between sparse non-repetitive radar scan points and submap points, the distribution-to-multi-distribution distance for matches is adopted. The ego-velocity, scan-to-submap matches are fused with the 6D inertial data by an iterative extended Kalman filter to get the platform's 3D position and orientation. A loop closure module is also developed to curb the odometry module's drift. To our knowledge, iRIOM based on the two modules is the first 4D radar inertial SLAM system. On our and third-party data, we show iRIOM's favorable odometry accuracy and mapping consistency against the FastLIO-SLAM and the EKFRIO. Also, the ablation study reveal the benefit of inertial data versus the constant velocity model, and scan-to-submap matching versus scan-to-scan matching. 毫米波雷达可以在雾等恶劣条件下测量物体的距离、方向和多普勒速度。具有类似于图像的垂直和水平数据的4D成像雷达还可以测量物体的高度。先前的研究已使用 3D 雷达进行自我运动估计。但很少有方法利用成像雷达的丰富数据，并且通常忽略了测绘方面，从而导致测距精度较差。本文提出了一种基于子图概念的实时成像雷达惯性里程计和建图方法iRIOM。为了处理移动物体和多径反射，我们使用分级非凸方法来稳健且有效地估计单次扫描的自速度。为了衡量稀疏非重复雷达扫描点与子地图点之间的一致性，采用分布到多分布的匹配距离。自我速度、扫描到子图匹配通过迭代扩展卡尔曼滤波器与 6D 惯性数据融合，以获得平台的 3D 位置和方向。还开发了闭环模块来抑制里程计模块的漂移。据我们所知，基于这两个模块的iRIOM是第一个4D雷达惯性SLAM系统。根据我们和第三方的数据，我们展示了 iRIOM 相对于 FastLIO-SLAM 和 EKFRIO 良好的里程计准确性和地图一致性。此外，消融研究揭示了惯性数据相对于等速模型的优势，以及扫描到子图匹配相对于扫描到扫描匹配的优势。 本文提出了一种基于4D成像雷达的实时惯性里程计与建图方法iRIOM，通过融合雷达扫描数据与惯性信息实现高精度定位与地图构建。 Yuan Zhuang,Binliang Wang,Jianzhu Huai,Miao Li cs.RO

authors_text: Bohan Li,Yasheng Sun,Zhujin Liang,Dalong Du,Zhuanghui Zhang,Xiaofeng Wang,Yunnan Wang,Xin Jin,Wenjun Zeng
title: Bridging Stereo Geometry and BEV Representation with Reliable Mutual Interaction for Semantic Scene Completion
title_zh: 通过可靠的交互来桥接立体几何和 BEV 表示，以完成语义场景
abstract: 3D semantic scene completion (SSC) is an ill-posed perception task that requires inferring a dense 3D scene from limited observations. Previous camera-based methods struggle to predict accurate semantic scenes due to inherent geometric ambiguity and incomplete observations. In this paper, we resort to stereo matching technique and bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation learning to address such issues in SSC. Complementary to each other, stereo matching mitigates geometric ambiguity with epipolar constraint while BEV representation enhances the hallucination ability for invisible regions with global semantic context. However, due to the inherent representation gap between stereo geometry and BEV features, it is non-trivial to bridge them for dense prediction task of SSC. Therefore, we further develop a unified occupancy-based framework dubbed BRGScene, which effectively bridges these two representations with dense 3D volumes for reliable semantic scene completion. Specifically, we design a novel Mutual Interactive Ensemble (MIE) block for pixel-level reliable aggregation of stereo geometry and BEV features. Within the MIE block, a Bi-directional Reliable Interaction (BRI) module, enhanced with confidence re-weighting, is employed to encourage fine-grained interaction through mutual guidance. Besides, a Dual Volume Ensemble (DVE) module is introduced to facilitate complementary aggregation through channel-wise recalibration and multi-group voting. Our method outperforms all published camera-based methods on SemanticKITTI for semantic scene completion. Our code is available on https://github.com/Arlo0o/StereoScene.
summary: 3D semantic scene completion (SSC) is an ill-posed perception task that requires inferring a dense 3D scene from limited observations. Previous camera-based methods struggle to predict accurate semantic scenes due to inherent geometric ambiguity and incomplete observations. In this paper, we resort to stereo matching technique and bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation learning to address such issues in SSC. Complementary to each other, stereo matching mitigates geometric ambiguity with epipolar constraint while BEV representation enhances the hallucination ability for invisible regions with global semantic context. However, due to the inherent representation gap between stereo geometry and BEV features, it is non-trivial to bridge them for dense prediction task of SSC. Therefore, we further develop a unified occupancy-based framework dubbed BRGScene, which effectively bridges these two representations with dense 3D volumes for reliable semantic scene completion. Specifically, we design a novel Mutual Interactive Ensemble (MIE) block for pixel-level reliable aggregation of stereo geometry and BEV features. Within the MIE block, a Bi-directional Reliable Interaction (BRI) module, enhanced with confidence re-weighting, is employed to encourage fine-grained interaction through mutual guidance. Besides, a Dual Volume Ensemble (DVE) module is introduced to facilitate complementary aggregation through channel-wise recalibration and multi-group voting. Our method outperforms all published camera-based methods on SemanticKITTI for semantic scene completion. Our code is available on https://github.com/Arlo0o/StereoScene.
abstract_zh: 3D 语义场景完成 (SSC) 是一项不适定感知任务，需要从有限的观察中推断出密集的 3D 场景。由于固有的几何模糊性和不完整的观察，以前基于相机的方法很难预测准确的语义场景。在本文中，我们采用立体匹配技术和鸟瞰图（BEV）表示学习来解决 SSC 中的此类问题。立体匹配通过极线约束减轻了几何模糊性，而 BEV 表示则增强了具有全局语义上下文的不可见区域的幻觉能力，两者相辅相成。然而，由于立体几何和 BEV 特征之间固有的表示差距，将它们桥接起来以实现 SSC 的密集预测任务并非易事。因此，我们进一步开发了一个名为 BRGScene 的基于占用的统一框架，它有效地将这两种表示与密集的 3D 体积连接起来，以实现可靠的语义场景完成。具体来说，我们设计了一种新颖的相互交互集成（MIE）块，用于立体几何和 BEV 特征的像素级可靠聚合。在 MIE 块内，采用了双向可靠交互 (BRI) 模块，并通过置信度重新加权进行增强，用于通过相互指导鼓励细粒度交互。此外，还引入了双卷集成（DVE）模块，以通过通道方式重新校准和多组投票来促进互补聚合。我们的方法优于 SemanticKITTI 上所有已发布的基于相机的语义场景完成方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Arlo0o/StereoScene 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合立体几何与鸟瞰图（BEV）表示的可靠互交互框架，用于解决三维语义场景补全任务中的几何模糊和观测不完整问题。
AI.motivation: 传统基于相机的方法因几何歧义和观测不完整性难以准确预测语义场景，而立体匹配与BEV表示分别在局部几何约束和全局语义上下文上具有优势，但两者间存在表征差异，需有效融合以提升补全效果。
AI.method: 设计统一的基于占用的BRGScene框架，包含互交互集成（MIE）模块。MIE模块通过双向可靠交互（BRI）模块（带置信度重加权）实现像素级特征互引导，并引入双体积分组（DVE）模块进行通道重校准与多组投票，以融合立体几何与BEV特征。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上，该方法超越所有已发布的基于相机的语义场景补全方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过立体几何与BEV表征的可靠互交互，本文方法有效解决了语义场景补全中的几何与语义对齐问题，为密集三维预测提供了新思路。

search_text: Bridging Stereo Geometry and BEV Representation with Reliable Mutual Interaction for Semantic Scene Completion 通过可靠的交互来桥接立体几何和 BEV 表示，以完成语义场景 3D semantic scene completion (SSC) is an ill-posed perception task that requires inferring a dense 3D scene from limited observations. Previous camera-based methods struggle to predict accurate semantic scenes due to inherent geometric ambiguity and incomplete observations. In this paper, we resort to stereo matching technique and bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation learning to address such issues in SSC. Therefore, we further develop a unified occupancy-based framework dubbed BRGScene, which effectively bridges these two representations with dense 3D volumes for reliable semantic scene completion. Specifically, we design a novel Mutual Interactive Ensemble (MIE) block for pixel-level reliable aggregation of stereo geometry and BEV features. Within the MIE block, a Bi-directional Reliable Interaction (BRI) module, enhanced with confidence re-weighting, is employed to encourage fine-grained interaction through mutual guidance. Besides, a Dual Volume Ensemble (DVE) module is introduced to facilitate complementary aggregation through channel-wise recalibration and multi-group voting. Our method outperforms all published camera-based methods on SemanticKITTI for semantic scene completion. authors_text: Michael Hersche,Aleksandar Terzic,Geethan Karunaratne,Jovin Langenegger,Angéline Pouget,Giovanni Cherubini,Luca Benini,Abu Sebastian,Abbas Rahimi
title: Factorizers for Distributed Sparse Block Codes
title_zh: 分布式稀疏块码的因式分解器
abstract: Distributed sparse block codes (SBCs) exhibit compact representations for encoding and manipulating symbolic data structures using fixed-width vectors. One major challenge however is to disentangle, or factorize, the distributed representation of data structures into their constituent elements without having to search through all possible combinations. This factorization becomes more challenging when SBCs vectors are noisy due to perceptual uncertainty and approximations made by modern neural networks to generate the query SBCs vectors. To address these challenges, we first propose a fast and highly accurate method for factorizing a more flexible and hence generalized form of SBCs, dubbed GSBCs. Our iterative factorizer introduces a threshold-based nonlinear activation, conditional random sampling, and an $\ell_\infty$-based similarity metric. Secondly, the proposed factorizer maintains a high accuracy when queried by noisy product vectors generated using deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). This facilitates its application in replacing the large fully connected layer (FCL) in CNNs, whereby $C$ trainable class vectors, or attribute combinations, can be implicitly represented by our factorizer having $F$-factor codebooks, each with $\sqrt[\leftroot{-2}\uproot{2}F]{C}$ fixed codevectors. We provide a methodology to flexibly integrate our factorizer in the classification layer of CNNs with a novel loss function. With this integration, the convolutional layers can generate a noisy product vector that our factorizer can still decode, whereby the decoded factors can have different interpretations based on downstream tasks. We demonstrate the feasibility of our method on four deep CNN architectures over CIFAR-100, ImageNet-1K, and RAVEN datasets. In all use cases, the number of parameters and operations are notably reduced compared to the FCL.
summary: Distributed sparse block codes (SBCs) exhibit compact representations for encoding and manipulating symbolic data structures using fixed-width vectors. One major challenge however is to disentangle, or factorize, the distributed representation of data structures into their constituent elements without having to search through all possible combinations. This factorization becomes more challenging when SBCs vectors are noisy due to perceptual uncertainty and approximations made by modern neural networks to generate the query SBCs vectors. To address these challenges, we first propose a fast and highly accurate method for factorizing a more flexible and hence generalized form of SBCs, dubbed GSBCs. Our iterative factorizer introduces a threshold-based nonlinear activation, conditional random sampling, and an $\ell_\infty$-based similarity metric. Secondly, the proposed factorizer maintains a high accuracy when queried by noisy product vectors generated using deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). This facilitates its application in replacing the large fully connected layer (FCL) in CNNs, whereby $C$ trainable class vectors, or attribute combinations, can be implicitly represented by our factorizer having $F$-factor codebooks, each with $\sqrt[\leftroot{-2}\uproot{2}F]{C}$ fixed codevectors. We provide a methodology to flexibly integrate our factorizer in the classification layer of CNNs with a novel loss function. With this integration, the convolutional layers can generate a noisy product vector that our factorizer can still decode, whereby the decoded factors can have different interpretations based on downstream tasks. We demonstrate the feasibility of our method on four deep CNN architectures over CIFAR-100, ImageNet-1K, and RAVEN datasets. In all use cases, the number of parameters and operations are notably reduced compared to the FCL.
abstract_zh: 分布式稀疏块码 (SBC) 具有使用固定宽度向量编码和操作符号数据结构的紧凑表示形式。然而，一个主要挑战是将数据结构的分布式表示分解或分解为其组成元素，而无需搜索所有可能的组合。当 SBC 向量由于感知不确定性和现代神经网络生成查询 SBC 向量的近似而存在噪声时，这种因式分解变得更具挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们首先提出了一种快速且高度准确的方法来分解更灵活且更通用的 SBC 形式，称为 GSBC。我们的迭代因子分解器引入了基于阈值的非线性激活、条件随机采样和基于 $\ell_\infty$ 的相似性度量。其次，当使用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）生成的噪声乘积向量查询时，所提出的分解器保持了高精度。这有助于其在取代 CNN 中的大型全连接层 (FCL) 方面的应用，其中 $C$ 可训练类向量或属性组合可以由我们的分解器隐式表示，该分解器具有 $F$ 因子码本，每个因子码本都有 $\sqrt[\leftroot{-2}\uproot{2}F]{C}$ 固定码向量。我们提供了一种方法，可以将因子分解器与新颖的损失函数灵活地集成到 CNN 的分类层中。通过这种集成，卷积层可以生成我们的因子分解器仍然可以解码的噪声乘积向量，从而解码的因子可以根据下游任务有不同的解释。我们在 CIFAR-100、ImageNet-1K 和 RAVEN 数据集上的四种深度 CNN 架构上证明了我们的方法的可行性。在所有用例中，与 FCL 相比，参数和操作的数量都显着减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于分布式稀疏块码（SBCs）的高效因子分解方法，并将其集成到卷积神经网络（CNN）中以替代全连接层。
AI.motivation: 分布式稀疏块码在处理符号数据结构时面临因子分解困难的问题，尤其在神经网络生成的噪声向量环境下，传统方法效率低下且难以准确还原原始元素。
AI.method: 提出基于阈值非线性激活、条件随机采样和ℓ∞相似度度量的迭代因子分解算法，并设计新型损失函数将因子分解器嵌入CNN分类层，通过固定码本隐式表示类别向量。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100、ImageNet-1K和RAVEN数据集上验证，相比全连接层显著减少参数量和计算量，同时保持高分解准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了噪声环境下SBCs的因子分解难题，为CNN架构优化提供了高效替代方案，具有广泛的应用前景。

search_text: Factorizers for Distributed Sparse Block Codes 分布式稀疏块码的因式分解器 Distributed sparse block codes (SBCs) exhibit compact representations for encoding and manipulating symbolic data structures using fixed-width vectors. One major challenge however is to disentangle, or factorize, the distributed representation of data structures into their constituent elements without having to search through all possible combinations. This factorization becomes more challenging when SBCs vectors are noisy due to perceptual uncertainty and approximations made by modern neural networks to generate the query SBCs vectors. To address these challenges, we first propose a fast and highly accurate method for factorizing a more flexible and hence generalized form of SBCs, dubbed GSBCs. Our iterative factorizer introduces a threshold-based nonlinear activation, conditional random sampling, and an $\ell_\infty$-based similarity metric. Secondly, the proposed factorizer maintains a high accuracy when queried by noisy product vectors generated using deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). This facilitates its application in replacing the large fully connected layer (FCL) in CNNs, whereby $C$ trainable class vectors, or attribute combinations, can be implicitly represented by our factorizer having $F$-factor codebooks, each with $\sqrt[\leftroot{-2}\uproot{2}F]{C}$ fixed codevectors. We provide a methodology to flexibly integrate our factorizer in the classification layer of CNNs with a novel loss function. With this integration, the convolutional layers can generate a noisy product vector that our factorizer can still decode, whereby the decoded factors can have different interpretations based on downstream tasks. We demonstrate the feasibility of our method on four deep CNN architectures over CIFAR-100, ImageNet-1K, and RAVEN datasets. In all use cases, the number of parameters and operations are notably reduced compared to the FCL. 分布式稀疏块码 (SBC) 具有使用固定宽度向量编码和操作符号数据结构的紧凑表示形式。然而，一个主要挑战是将数据结构的分布式表示分解或分解为其组成元素，而无需搜索所有可能的组合。当 SBC 向量由于感知不确定性和现代神经网络生成查询 SBC 向量的近似而存在噪声时，这种因式分解变得更具挑战性。为了应对这些挑战，我们首先提出了一种快速且高度准确的方法来分解更灵活且更通用的 SBC 形式，称为 GSBC。我们的迭代因子分解器引入了基于阈值的非线性激活、条件随机采样和基于 $\ell_\infty$ 的相似性度量。其次，当使用深度卷积神经网络（CNN）生成的噪声乘积向量查询时，所提出的分解器保持了高精度。这有助于其在取代 CNN 中的大型全连接层 (FCL) 方面的应用，其中 $C$ 可训练类向量或属性组合可以由我们的分解器隐式表示，该分解器具有 $F$ 因子码本，每个因子码本都有 $\sqrt[\leftroot{-2}\uproot{2}F]{C}$ 固定码向量。我们提供了一种方法，可以将因子分解器与新颖的损失函数灵活地集成到 CNN 的分类层中。通过这种集成，卷积层可以生成我们的因子分解器仍然可以解码的噪声乘积向量，从而解码的因子可以根据下游任务有不同的解释。我们在 CIFAR-100、ImageNet-1K 和 RAVEN 数据集上的四种深度 CNN 架构上证明了我们的方法的可行性。在所有用例中，与 FCL 相比，参数和操作的数量都显着减少。 本文提出一种用于分布式稀疏块码（SBCs）的高效因子分解方法，并将其集成到卷积神经网络（CNN）中以替代全连接层。 Michael Hersche,Aleksandar Terzic,Geethan Karunaratne,Jovin Langenegger,Angéline Pouget,Giovanni Cherubini,Luca Benini,Abu Sebastian,Abbas Rahimi cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Kun He,Xin Liu,Yichen Yang,Zhou Qin,Weigao Wen,Hui Xue,John E. Hopcroft
title: PIAT: Parameter Interpolation based Adversarial Training for Image Classification
title_zh: PIAT：基于参数插值的图像分类对抗训练
abstract: Adversarial training has been demonstrated to be the most effective approach to defend against adversarial attacks. However, existing adversarial training methods show apparent oscillations and overfitting issue in the training process, degrading the defense efficacy. In this work, we propose a novel framework, termed Parameter Interpolation based Adversarial Training (PIAT), that makes full use of the historical information during training. Specifically, at the end of each epoch, PIAT tunes the model parameters as the interpolation of the parameters of the previous and current epochs. Besides, we suggest to use the Normalized Mean Square Error (NMSE) to further improve the robustness by aligning the clean and adversarial examples. Compared with other regularization methods, NMSE focuses more on the relative magnitude of the logits rather than the absolute magnitude. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets and various networks show that our method could prominently improve the model robustness and reduce the generalization error. Moreover, our framework is general and could further boost the robust accuracy when combined with other adversarial training methods.
summary: Adversarial training has been demonstrated to be the most effective approach to defend against adversarial attacks. However, existing adversarial training methods show apparent oscillations and overfitting issue in the training process, degrading the defense efficacy. In this work, we propose a novel framework, termed Parameter Interpolation based Adversarial Training (PIAT), that makes full use of the historical information during training. Specifically, at the end of each epoch, PIAT tunes the model parameters as the interpolation of the parameters of the previous and current epochs. Besides, we suggest to use the Normalized Mean Square Error (NMSE) to further improve the robustness by aligning the clean and adversarial examples. Compared with other regularization methods, NMSE focuses more on the relative magnitude of the logits rather than the absolute magnitude. Extensive experiments on several benchmark datasets and various networks show that our method could prominently improve the model robustness and reduce the generalization error. Moreover, our framework is general and could further boost the robust accuracy when combined with other adversarial training methods.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练已被证明是防御对抗性攻击的最有效方法。然而，现有的对抗训练方法在训练过程中表现出明显的振荡和过拟合问题，降低了防御效果。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，称为基于参数插值的对抗训练（PIAT），它在训练过程中充分利用历史信息。具体来说，在每个时期结束时，PIAT 将模型参数调整为前一个时期和当前时期的参数的插值。此外，我们建议使用归一化均方误差（NMSE）通过对齐干净示例和对抗示例来进一步提高鲁棒性。与其他正则化方法相比，NMSE 更关注 Logits 的相对大小而不是绝对大小。对多个基准数据集和各种网络的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以显着提高模型的鲁棒性并减少泛化误差。此外，我们的框架是通用的，与其他对抗性训练方法结合时可以进一步提高鲁棒准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于参数插值的对抗训练方法（PIAT），旨在通过利用训练过程中的历史信息来提升图像分类模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法在训练过程中存在明显震荡和过拟合问题，导致防御效果下降。本文希望通过利用历史参数信息和改进正则化方法来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 在每个训练周期结束时，PIAT将模型参数插值为前一周期和当前周期参数的组合，并引入归一化均方误差（NMSE）对齐干净样本与对抗样本的logits相对幅度。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和网络结构上实验表明，该方法显著提升了模型鲁棒性，降低了泛化误差，并能与其他对抗训练方法结合进一步提升准确率。
AI.conclusion: PIAT框架通过参数插值和NMSE正则化有效缓解了对抗训练的震荡与过拟合问题，是一种通用且高效的对抗防御方法。

authors_text: Yuanbo Xiangli,Linning Xu,Xingang Pan,Nanxuan Zhao,Bo Dai,Dahua Lin
title: AssetField: Assets Mining and Reconfiguration in Ground Feature Plane Representation
title_zh: AssetField：地面要素平面表示中的资产挖掘和重新配置
comment: Project page can be found in https://city-super.github.io/assetfield/
comments: Project page can be found in https://city-super.github.io/assetfield/
abstract: Both indoor and outdoor environments are inherently structured and repetitive. Traditional modeling pipelines keep an asset library storing unique object templates, which is both versatile and memory efficient in practice. Inspired by this observation, we propose AssetField, a novel neural scene representation that learns a set of object-aware ground feature planes to represent the scene, where an asset library storing template feature patches can be constructed in an unsupervised manner. Unlike existing methods which require object masks to query spatial points for object editing, our ground feature plane representation offers a natural visualization of the scene in the bird-eye view, allowing a variety of operations (e.g. translation, duplication, deformation) on objects to configure a new scene. With the template feature patches, group editing is enabled for scenes with many recurring items to avoid repetitive work on object individuals. We show that AssetField not only achieves competitive performance for novel-view synthesis but also generates realistic renderings for new scene configurations.
summary: Both indoor and outdoor environments are inherently structured and repetitive. Traditional modeling pipelines keep an asset library storing unique object templates, which is both versatile and memory efficient in practice. Inspired by this observation, we propose AssetField, a novel neural scene representation that learns a set of object-aware ground feature planes to represent the scene, where an asset library storing template feature patches can be constructed in an unsupervised manner. Unlike existing methods which require object masks to query spatial points for object editing, our ground feature plane representation offers a natural visualization of the scene in the bird-eye view, allowing a variety of operations (e.g. translation, duplication, deformation) on objects to configure a new scene. With the template feature patches, group editing is enabled for scenes with many recurring items to avoid repetitive work on object individuals. We show that AssetField not only achieves competitive performance for novel-view synthesis but also generates realistic renderings for new scene configurations.
abstract_zh: 室内和室外环境本质上都是结构化和重复的。传统的建模管道保留一个存储独特对象模板的资源库，这在实践中既通用又节省内存。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了 AssetField，这是一种新颖的神经场景表示，它学习一组对象感知的地面特征平面来表示场景，其中可以以无监督的方式构建存储模板特征块的资产库。与需要对象蒙版来查询空间点以进行对象编辑的现有方法不同，我们的地面特征平面表示提供了鸟瞰视图中场景的自然可视化，允许对对象进行各种操作（例如平移、复制、变形）以配置新场景。通过模板功能补丁，可以对具有许多重复项目的场景进行分组编辑，以避免对对象个体进行重复工作。我们表明，AssetField 不仅在新颖视图合成方面实现了具有竞争力的性能，而且还为新场景配置生成了逼真的渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AssetField方法，通过地面特征平面表示实现场景中资产的挖掘与重新配置。
AI.motivation: 传统场景建模依赖人工维护的资产库，难以高效处理重复性场景元素。受环境结构化特性的启发，旨在开发无需人工标注的自动化资产挖掘与编辑方法。
AI.method: 构建神经场景表示模型，学习对象感知的地面特征平面，在鸟瞰视角下通过模板特征块实现场景元素的平移、复制、变形等群体编辑操作。
AI.result: 在新视角合成任务中达到竞争力性能，可生成具有真实感的新型场景配置渲染结果。
AI.conclusion: AssetField通过无监督资产挖掘与群体编辑机制，有效提升了结构化场景的建模与编辑效率，生成质量达到实用水平。

tldr: 本文提出AssetField方法，通过地面特征平面表示实现场景中资产的挖掘与重新配置。
motivation: 传统场景建模依赖人工维护的资产库，难以高效处理重复性场景元素。受环境结构化特性的启发，旨在开发无需人工标注的自动化资产挖掘与编辑方法。
method: 构建神经场景表示模型，学习对象感知的地面特征平面，在鸟瞰视角下通过模板特征块实现场景元素的平移、复制、变形等群体编辑操作。
result: 在新视角合成任务中达到竞争力性能，可生成具有真实感的新型场景配置渲染结果。
conclusion: AssetField通过无监督资产挖掘与群体编辑机制，有效提升了结构化场景的建模与编辑效率，生成质量达到实用水平。
search_text: AssetField: Assets Mining and Reconfiguration in Ground Feature Plane Representation AssetField：地面要素平面表示中的资产挖掘和重新配置 Both indoor and outdoor environments are inherently structured and repetitive. Traditional modeling pipelines keep an asset library storing unique object templates, which is both versatile and memory efficient in practice. Inspired by this observation, we propose AssetField, a novel neural scene representation that learns a set of object-aware ground feature planes to represent the scene, where an asset library storing template feature patches can be constructed in an unsupervised manner. Unlike existing methods which require object masks to query spatial points for object editing, our ground feature plane representation offers a natural visualization of the scene in the bird-eye view, allowing a variety of operations (e.g. translation, duplication, deformation) on objects to configure a new scene. With the template feature patches, group editing is enabled for scenes with many recurring items to avoid repetitive work on object individuals. We show that AssetField not only achieves competitive performance for novel-view synthesis but also generates realistic renderings for new scene configurations. 室内和室外环境本质上都是结构化和重复的。传统的建模管道保留一个存储独特对象模板的资源库，这在实践中既通用又节省内存。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了 AssetField，这是一种新颖的神经场景表示，它学习一组对象感知的地面特征平面来表示场景，其中可以以无监督的方式构建存储模板特征块的资产库。与需要对象蒙版来查询空间点以进行对象编辑的现有方法不同，我们的地面特征平面表示提供了鸟瞰视图中场景的自然可视化，允许对对象进行各种操作（例如平移、复制、变形）以配置新场景。通过模板功能补丁，可以对具有许多重复项目的场景进行分组编辑，以避免对对象个体进行重复工作。我们表明，AssetField 不仅在新颖视图合成方面实现了具有竞争力的性能，而且还为新场景配置生成了逼真的渲染。 本文提出AssetField方法，通过地面特征平面表示实现场景中资产的挖掘与重新配置。 Yuanbo Xiangli,Linning Xu,Xingang Pan,Nanxuan Zhao,Bo Dai,Dahua Lin cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Jiafeng Cui,Xieyuanli Chen
title: CCL: Continual Contrastive Learning for LiDAR Place Recognition
title_zh: CCL：激光雷达地点识别的持续对比学习
abstract: Place recognition is an essential and challenging task in loop closing and global localization for robotics and autonomous driving applications. Benefiting from the recent advances in deep learning techniques, the performance of LiDAR place recognition (LPR) has been greatly improved. However, current deep learning-based methods suffer from two major problems: poor generalization ability and catastrophic forgetting. In this paper, we propose a continual contrastive learning method, named CCL, to tackle the catastrophic forgetting problem and generally improve the robustness of LPR approaches. Our CCL constructs a contrastive feature pool and utilizes contrastive loss to train more transferable representations of places. When transferred into new environments, our CCL continuously reviews the contrastive memory bank and applies a distribution-based knowledge distillation to maintain the retrieval ability of the past data while continually learning to recognize new places from the new data. We thoroughly evaluate our approach on Oxford, MulRan, and PNV datasets using three different LPR methods. The experimental results show that our CCL consistently improves the performance of different methods in different environments outperforming the state-of-the-art continual learning method. The implementation of our method has been released at https://github.com/cloudcjf/CCL.
summary: Place recognition is an essential and challenging task in loop closing and global localization for robotics and autonomous driving applications. Benefiting from the recent advances in deep learning techniques, the performance of LiDAR place recognition (LPR) has been greatly improved. However, current deep learning-based methods suffer from two major problems: poor generalization ability and catastrophic forgetting. In this paper, we propose a continual contrastive learning method, named CCL, to tackle the catastrophic forgetting problem and generally improve the robustness of LPR approaches. Our CCL constructs a contrastive feature pool and utilizes contrastive loss to train more transferable representations of places. When transferred into new environments, our CCL continuously reviews the contrastive memory bank and applies a distribution-based knowledge distillation to maintain the retrieval ability of the past data while continually learning to recognize new places from the new data. We thoroughly evaluate our approach on Oxford, MulRan, and PNV datasets using three different LPR methods. The experimental results show that our CCL consistently improves the performance of different methods in different environments outperforming the state-of-the-art continual learning method. The implementation of our method has been released at https://github.com/cloudcjf/CCL.
abstract_zh: 位置识别是机器人和自动驾驶应用的闭环和全局定位中一项重要且具有挑战性的任务。受益于深度学习技术的最新进展，激光雷达地点识别（LPR）的性能得到了极大的提高。然而，当前基于深度学习的方法存在两个主要问题：泛化能力差和灾难性遗忘。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 CCL 的持续对比学习方法，以解决灾难性遗忘问题并普遍提高 LPR 方法的鲁棒性。我们的 CCL 构建了一个对比特征池，并利用对比损失来训练更多可转移的地点表示。当转移到新环境时，我们的 CCL 会不断审查对比记忆库并应用基于分布的知识蒸馏来保持过去数据的检索能力，同时不断学习从新数据中识别新地点。我们使用三种不同的 LPR 方法在 Oxford、MulRan 和 PNV 数据集上彻底评估我们的方法。实验结果表明，我们的 CCL 在不同环境中持续提高了不同方法的性能，优于最先进的持续学习方法。我们方法的实现已在 https://github.com/cloudcjf/CCL 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种持续对比学习方法CCL，用于改进LiDAR场景识别的泛化能力和鲁棒性，解决灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的LiDAR场景识别方法存在泛化能力差和灾难性遗忘两大问题，难以适应新环境。
AI.method: 构建对比特征池并利用对比损失训练可迁移表示，通过分布知识蒸馏在新环境中持续复习历史数据并学习新场景。
AI.result: 在Oxford、MulRan和PNV数据集上验证，CCL在不同环境下均优于现有持续学习方法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: CCL有效提升了LiDAR场景识别的跨环境适应能力，为机器人和自动驾驶提供了更鲁棒的定位方案。

authors_text: Ciyuan Peng,Feng Xia,Mehdi Naseriparsa,Francesco Osborne
title: Knowledge Graphs: Opportunities and Challenges
title_zh: 知识图：机遇与挑战
abstract: With the explosive growth of artificial intelligence (AI) and big data, it has become vitally important to organize and represent the enormous volume of knowledge appropriately. As graph data, knowledge graphs accumulate and convey knowledge of the real world. It has been well-recognized that knowledge graphs effectively represent complex information; hence, they rapidly gain the attention of academia and industry in recent years. Thus to develop a deeper understanding of knowledge graphs, this paper presents a systematic overview of this field. Specifically, we focus on the opportunities and challenges of knowledge graphs. We first review the opportunities of knowledge graphs in terms of two aspects: (1) AI systems built upon knowledge graphs; (2) potential application fields of knowledge graphs. Then, we thoroughly discuss severe technical challenges in this field, such as knowledge graph embeddings, knowledge acquisition, knowledge graph completion, knowledge fusion, and knowledge reasoning. We expect that this survey will shed new light on future research and the development of knowledge graphs.
summary: With the explosive growth of artificial intelligence (AI) and big data, it has become vitally important to organize and represent the enormous volume of knowledge appropriately. As graph data, knowledge graphs accumulate and convey knowledge of the real world. It has been well-recognized that knowledge graphs effectively represent complex information; hence, they rapidly gain the attention of academia and industry in recent years. Thus to develop a deeper understanding of knowledge graphs, this paper presents a systematic overview of this field. Specifically, we focus on the opportunities and challenges of knowledge graphs. We first review the opportunities of knowledge graphs in terms of two aspects: (1) AI systems built upon knowledge graphs; (2) potential application fields of knowledge graphs. Then, we thoroughly discuss severe technical challenges in this field, such as knowledge graph embeddings, knowledge acquisition, knowledge graph completion, knowledge fusion, and knowledge reasoning. We expect that this survey will shed new light on future research and the development of knowledge graphs.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能（AI）和大数据的爆炸式增长，适当地组织和表示大量知识变得至关重要。作为图数据，知识图积累并传达现实世界的知识。众所周知，知识图谱可以有效地表示复杂的信息；因此，近年来它们迅速引起学术界和工业界的关注。因此，为了加深对知识图谱的理解，本文对该领域进行了系统的概述。具体来说，我们关注知识图谱的机遇和挑战。我们首先从两个方面回顾知识图谱的机会：（1）基于知识图谱构建的人工智能系统； (2)知识图谱的潜在应用领域。然后，我们深入讨论了该领域严峻的技术挑战，例如知识图嵌入、知识获取、知识图补全、知识融合和知识推理。我们预计这项调查将为知识图谱的未来研究和开发提供新的思路。

AI.tldr: 本文系统概述知识图谱领域的机遇与挑战，旨在为未来研究提供新视角。
AI.motivation: 随着AI和大数据发展，知识图谱作为有效组织现实世界知识的工具，在学术界和工业界受到广泛关注，但其技术挑战亟待系统分析。
AI.method: 通过回顾知识图谱在AI系统构建和应用领域的机遇，深入探讨知识嵌入、获取、完成、融合及推理等核心技术挑战。
AI.result: 梳理了知识图谱的关键应用方向与技术瓶颈，为后续研究提供系统性参考框架。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱的持续发展需攻克多项技术难题，本文综述为相关领域研究指明了潜在方向。

authors_text: Christopher Bull,Ahmed Kharrufa
title: Generative AI Assistants in Software Development Education: A vision for integrating Generative AI into educational practice, not instinctively defending against it
title_zh: 软件开发教育中的生成式人工智能助手：将生成式人工智能融入教育实践的愿景，而不是本能地抵制它
comment: 8 pages, accepted for publication in IEEE Software (upcoming Special Issue, March/April 2024, focusing on AI and Software Engineering Education & Training)
comments: 8 pages, accepted for publication in IEEE Software (upcoming Special Issue, March/April 2024, focusing on AI and Software Engineering Education & Training)
abstract: The software development industry is amid another disruptive paradigm change - adopting the use of generative AI (GAI) assistants for programming. Whilst AI is already used in various areas of software engineering, GAI technologies, such as GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT, have ignited peoples' imaginations (and fears). It is unclear how the industry will adapt, but the move to integrate these technologies by large software companies, such as Microsoft (GitHub, Bing) and Google (Bard), is a clear indication of intent and direction. We performed exploratory interviews with industry professionals to understand current practice and challenges, which we incorporate into our vision of a future of software development education and make some pedagogical recommendations.
summary: The software development industry is amid another disruptive paradigm change - adopting the use of generative AI (GAI) assistants for programming. Whilst AI is already used in various areas of software engineering, GAI technologies, such as GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT, have ignited peoples' imaginations (and fears). It is unclear how the industry will adapt, but the move to integrate these technologies by large software companies, such as Microsoft (GitHub, Bing) and Google (Bard), is a clear indication of intent and direction. We performed exploratory interviews with industry professionals to understand current practice and challenges, which we incorporate into our vision of a future of software development education and make some pedagogical recommendations.
abstract_zh: 软件开发行业正处于另一个颠覆性范式变革之中——采用生成式人工智能 (GAI) 助手进行编程。虽然人工智能已经应用于软件工程的各个领域，但 GitHub Copilot 和 ChatGPT 等 GAI 技术已经点燃了人们的想象力（和恐惧）。目前尚不清楚该行业将如何适应，但微软（GitHub、Bing）和谷歌（Bard）等大型软件公司整合这些技术的举措明确表明了意图和方向。我们对行业专业人士进行了探索性访谈，以了解当前的实践和挑战，并将其纳入我们对软件开发教育未来的愿景中，并提出一些教学建议。

AI.tldr: 探讨将生成式AI整合到软件开发教育中的愿景与教学建议
AI.motivation: 应对生成式AI对软件开发行业的冲击，探索其在教育中的合理整合方式，减少恐惧并促进适应性教学
AI.method: 通过探索性访谈行业专家，收集当前实践与挑战，构建教育整合愿景
AI.result: 提出未来软件开发教育的整合框架及教学策略建议，强调AI辅助工具的合理使用与教育适应
AI.conclusion: 生成式AI是软件开发教育的必然趋势，应主动整合而非防御，需调整教学方法以培养学生与AI协作的能力

search_text: Generative AI Assistants in Software Development Education: A vision for integrating Generative AI into educational practice, not instinctively defending against it 软件开发教育中的生成式人工智能助手：将生成式人工智能融入教育实践的愿景，而不是本能地抵制它 The software development industry is amid another disruptive paradigm change - adopting the use of generative AI (GAI) assistants for programming. Whilst AI is already used in various areas of software engineering, GAI technologies, such as GitHub Copilot and ChatGPT, have ignited peoples' imaginations (and fears). It is unclear how the industry will adapt, but the move to integrate these technologies by large software companies, such as Microsoft (GitHub, Bing) and Google (Bard), is a clear indication of intent and direction. We performed exploratory interviews with industry professionals to understand current practice and challenges, which we incorporate into our vision of a future of software development education and make some pedagogical recommendations. 软件开发行业正处于另一个颠覆性范式变革之中——采用生成式人工智能 (GAI) 助手进行编程。虽然人工智能已经应用于软件工程的各个领域，但 GitHub Copilot 和 ChatGPT 等 GAI 技术已经点燃了人们的想象力（和恐惧）。目前尚不清楚该行业将如何适应，但微软（GitHub、Bing）和谷歌（Bard）等大型软件公司整合这些技术的举措明确表明了意图和方向。我们对行业专业人士进行了探索性访谈，以了解当前的实践和挑战，并将其纳入我们对软件开发教育未来的愿景中，并提出一些教学建议。 探讨将生成式AI整合到软件开发教育中的愿景与教学建议 Christopher Bull,Ahmed Kharrufa cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Yu Tang Liu,Aamir Ahmad
title: Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning in Continuous Control with Successor Feature-Based Concurrent Composition
title_zh: 具有基于后继特征的并发组合的连续控制中的多任务强化学习
abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) frameworks are increasingly used to solve high-dimensional continuous control tasks in robotics. However, due to the lack of sample efficiency, applying DRL for online learning is still practically infeasible in the robotics domain. One reason is that DRL agents do not leverage the solution of previous tasks for new tasks. Recent work on multi-task DRL agents based on successor features (SFs) has proven to be quite promising in increasing sample efficiency. In this work, we present a new approach that unifies two prior multi-task RL frameworks, SF-GPI and value composition, and adapts them to the continuous control domain. We exploit compositional properties of successor features to compose a policy distribution from a set of primitives without training any new policy. Lastly, to demonstrate the multi-tasking mechanism, we present our proof-of-concept benchmark environments, Pointmass and Pointer, based on IsaacGym, which facilitates large-scale parallelization to accelerate the experiments. Our experimental results show that our multi-task agent has single-task performance on par with soft actor-critic (SAC), and the agent can successfully transfer to new unseen tasks. We provide our code as open-source at "https://github.com/robot-perception-group/concurrent_composition" for the benefit of the community.
summary: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) frameworks are increasingly used to solve high-dimensional continuous control tasks in robotics. However, due to the lack of sample efficiency, applying DRL for online learning is still practically infeasible in the robotics domain. One reason is that DRL agents do not leverage the solution of previous tasks for new tasks. Recent work on multi-task DRL agents based on successor features (SFs) has proven to be quite promising in increasing sample efficiency. In this work, we present a new approach that unifies two prior multi-task RL frameworks, SF-GPI and value composition, and adapts them to the continuous control domain. We exploit compositional properties of successor features to compose a policy distribution from a set of primitives without training any new policy. Lastly, to demonstrate the multi-tasking mechanism, we present our proof-of-concept benchmark environments, Pointmass and Pointer, based on IsaacGym, which facilitates large-scale parallelization to accelerate the experiments. Our experimental results show that our multi-task agent has single-task performance on par with soft actor-critic (SAC), and the agent can successfully transfer to new unseen tasks. We provide our code as open-source at "https://github.com/robot-perception-group/concurrent_composition" for the benefit of the community.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（DRL）框架越来越多地用于解决机器人技术中的高维连续控制任务。然而，由于缺乏样本效率，将 DRL 应用于在线学习在机器人领域实际上仍然不可行。原因之一是 DRL 代理不会利用先前任务的解决方案来执行新任务。最近基于后继特征 (SF) 的多任务 DRL 代理的工作已被证明在提高样本效率方面非常有前景。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新方法，它统一了两个先前的多任务 RL 框架：SF-GPI 和值组合，并使它们适应连续控制域。我们利用后继特征的组合属性，从一组原语组成策略分布，而无需训练任何新策略。最后，为了演示多任务机制，我们展示了基于 IsaacGym 的概念验证基准环境 Pointmass 和 Pointer，这有助于大规模并行化以加速实验。我们的实验结果表明，我们的多任务代理具有与软演员评论家（SAC）相当的单任务性能，并且该代理可以成功转移到新的未见过的任务。为了社区的利益，我们在“https://github.com/robot-perception-group/concurrent_composition”上以开源方式提供代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于继承特征的多任务强化学习方法，通过统一SF-GPI和价值组合框架，实现连续控制领域的高效样本学习与任务迁移。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在机器人连续控制任务中样本效率不足，且无法有效复用已有任务经验，导致在线学习难以实际应用。
AI.method: 融合SF-GPI与价值组合框架，利用继承特征的组合特性直接生成策略分布，无需重新训练新策略；构建Pointmass和Pointer基准环境支持大规模并行实验。
AI.result: 多任务代理在单任务性能上与SAC相当，可成功迁移到新任务，开源代码验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过继承特征组合实现了连续控制中样本效率与任务迁移能力的提升，为多任务强化学习提供了新思路。

However, due to the lack of sample efficiency, applying DRL for online learning is still practically infeasible in the robotics domain. One reason is that DRL agents do not leverage the solution of previous tasks for new tasks. Our experimental results show that our multi-task agent has single-task performance on par with soft actor-critic (SAC), and the agent can successfully transfer to new unseen tasks. authors_text: Ye Mao,Lan Jiang,Xi Chen,Chao Li
title: DisC-Diff: Disentangled Conditional Diffusion Model for Multi-Contrast MRI Super-Resolution
title_zh: DisC-Diff：用于多对比 MRI 超分辨率的解缠结条件扩散模型
abstract: Multi-contrast magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is the most common management tool used to characterize neurological disorders based on brain tissue contrasts. However, acquiring high-resolution MRI scans is time-consuming and infeasible under specific conditions. Hence, multi-contrast super-resolution methods have been developed to improve the quality of low-resolution contrasts by leveraging complementary information from multi-contrast MRI. Current deep learning-based super-resolution methods have limitations in estimating restoration uncertainty and avoiding mode collapse. Although the diffusion model has emerged as a promising approach for image enhancement, capturing complex interactions between multiple conditions introduced by multi-contrast MRI super-resolution remains a challenge for clinical applications. In this paper, we propose a disentangled conditional diffusion model, DisC-Diff, for multi-contrast brain MRI super-resolution. It utilizes the sampling-based generation and simple objective function of diffusion models to estimate uncertainty in restorations effectively and ensure a stable optimization process. Moreover, DisC-Diff leverages a disentangled multi-stream network to fully exploit complementary information from multi-contrast MRI, improving model interpretation under multiple conditions of multi-contrast inputs. We validated the effectiveness of DisC-Diff on two datasets: the IXI dataset, which contains 578 normal brains, and a clinical dataset with 316 pathological brains. Our experimental results demonstrate that DisC-Diff outperforms other state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and visually.
summary: Multi-contrast magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is the most common management tool used to characterize neurological disorders based on brain tissue contrasts. However, acquiring high-resolution MRI scans is time-consuming and infeasible under specific conditions. Hence, multi-contrast super-resolution methods have been developed to improve the quality of low-resolution contrasts by leveraging complementary information from multi-contrast MRI. Current deep learning-based super-resolution methods have limitations in estimating restoration uncertainty and avoiding mode collapse. Although the diffusion model has emerged as a promising approach for image enhancement, capturing complex interactions between multiple conditions introduced by multi-contrast MRI super-resolution remains a challenge for clinical applications. In this paper, we propose a disentangled conditional diffusion model, DisC-Diff, for multi-contrast brain MRI super-resolution. It utilizes the sampling-based generation and simple objective function of diffusion models to estimate uncertainty in restorations effectively and ensure a stable optimization process. Moreover, DisC-Diff leverages a disentangled multi-stream network to fully exploit complementary information from multi-contrast MRI, improving model interpretation under multiple conditions of multi-contrast inputs. We validated the effectiveness of DisC-Diff on two datasets: the IXI dataset, which contains 578 normal brains, and a clinical dataset with 316 pathological brains. Our experimental results demonstrate that DisC-Diff outperforms other state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and visually.
abstract_zh: 多重对比磁共振成像 (MRI) 是最常用的管理工具，用于根据脑组织对比来表征神经系统疾病。然而，获取高分辨率 MRI 扫描非常耗时，并且在特定条件下不可行。因此，开发了多对比超分辨率方法，通过利用多对比 MRI 的补充信息来提高低分辨率对比的质量。当前基于深度学习的超分辨率方法在估计恢复不确定性和避免模式崩溃方面存在局限性。尽管扩散模型已成为一种有前途的图像增强方法，但捕获多对比 MRI 超分辨率引入的多种条件之间的复杂相互作用仍然是临床应用的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于多对比脑 MRI 超分辨率的解缠结条件扩散模型 DisC-Diff。它利用基于采样的生成和扩散模型的简单目标函数来有效估计恢复中的不确定性并确保稳定的优化过程。此外，DisC-Diff 利用解缠结的多流网络来充分利用多对比 MRI 的互补信息，改进多对比输入的多种条件下的模型解释。我们在两个数据集上验证了 DisC-Diff 的有效性：包含 578 个正常大脑的 IXI 数据集和包含 316 个病理大脑的临床数据集。我们的实验结果表明，DisC-Diff 在定量和视觉上都优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多对比MRI超分辨率的解耦条件扩散模型DisC-Diff，以提高低分辨率MRI图像的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习超分辨率方法在估计修复不确定性、避免模式崩溃方面存在局限，而扩散模型在处理多对比MRI的复杂条件交互时面临临床应用挑战。
AI.method: DisC-Diff采用基于采样的生成机制和简单目标函数，利用解耦多流网络充分挖掘多对比MRI的互补信息，实现稳定优化与不确定性估计。
AI.result: 在包含578例正常脑和316例病理性脑的两个数据集上，DisC-Diff在定量和视觉效果上均优于其他最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DisC-Diff通过解耦条件与扩散模型结合，有效提升了多对比MRI超分辨率性能，具有临床应用潜力。

tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多对比MRI超分辨率的解耦条件扩散模型DisC-Diff，以提高低分辨率MRI图像的质量。
motivation: 现有深度学习超分辨率方法在估计修复不确定性、避免模式崩溃方面存在局限，而扩散模型在处理多对比MRI的复杂条件交互时面临临床应用挑战。
method: DisC-Diff采用基于采样的生成机制和简单目标函数，利用解耦多流网络充分挖掘多对比MRI的互补信息，实现稳定优化与不确定性估计。
result: 在包含578例正常脑和316例病理性脑的两个数据集上，DisC-Diff在定量和视觉效果上均优于其他最先进方法。
conclusion: DisC-Diff通过解耦条件与扩散模型结合，有效提升了多对比MRI超分辨率性能，具有临床应用潜力。
search_text: DisC-Diff: Disentangled Conditional Diffusion Model for Multi-Contrast MRI Super-Resolution DisC-Diff：用于多对比 MRI 超分辨率的解缠结条件扩散模型 Multi-contrast magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is the most common management tool used to characterize neurological disorders based on brain tissue contrasts. However, acquiring high-resolution MRI scans is time-consuming and infeasible under specific conditions. Hence, multi-contrast super-resolution methods have been developed to improve the quality of low-resolution contrasts by leveraging complementary information from multi-contrast MRI. Current deep learning-based super-resolution methods have limitations in estimating restoration uncertainty and avoiding mode collapse. Although the diffusion model has emerged as a promising approach for image enhancement, capturing complex interactions between multiple conditions introduced by multi-contrast MRI super-resolution remains a challenge for clinical applications. In this paper, we propose a disentangled conditional diffusion model, DisC-Diff, for multi-contrast brain MRI super-resolution. It utilizes the sampling-based generation and simple objective function of diffusion models to estimate uncertainty in restorations effectively and ensure a stable optimization process. Moreover, DisC-Diff leverages a disentangled multi-stream network to fully exploit complementary information from multi-contrast MRI, improving model interpretation under multiple conditions of multi-contrast inputs. We validated the effectiveness of DisC-Diff on two datasets: the IXI dataset, which contains 578 normal brains, and a clinical dataset with 316 pathological brains. Our experimental results demonstrate that DisC-Diff outperforms other state-of-the-art methods both quantitatively and visually. 多重对比磁共振成像 (MRI) 是最常用的管理工具，用于根据脑组织对比来表征神经系统疾病。然而，获取高分辨率 MRI 扫描非常耗时，并且在特定条件下不可行。因此，开发了多对比超分辨率方法，通过利用多对比 MRI 的补充信息来提高低分辨率对比的质量。当前基于深度学习的超分辨率方法在估计恢复不确定性和避免模式崩溃方面存在局限性。尽管扩散模型已成为一种有前途的图像增强方法，但捕获多对比 MRI 超分辨率引入的多种条件之间的复杂相互作用仍然是临床应用的挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于多对比脑 MRI 超分辨率的解缠结条件扩散模型 DisC-Diff。它利用基于采样的生成和扩散模型的简单目标函数来有效估计恢复中的不确定性并确保稳定的优化过程。此外，DisC-Diff 利用解缠结的多流网络来充分利用多对比 MRI 的互补信息，改进多对比输入的多种条件下的模型解释。我们在两个数据集上验证了 DisC-Diff 的有效性：包含 578 个正常大脑的 IXI 数据集和包含 316 个病理大脑的临床数据集。我们的实验结果表明，DisC-Diff 在定量和视觉上都优于其他最先进的方法。 本文提出了一种用于多对比MRI超分辨率的解耦条件扩散模型DisC-Diff，以提高低分辨率MRI图像的质量。 Ye Mao,Lan Jiang,Xi Chen,Chao Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Qinglin Zhang,Chong Deng,Jiaqing Liu,Hai Yu,Qian Chen,Wen Wang,Zhijie Yan,Jinglin Liu,Yi Ren,Zhou Zhao
title: Overview of the ICASSP 2023 General Meeting Understanding and Generation Challenge (MUG)
title_zh: ICASSP 2023 大会理解和生成挑战 (MUG) 概述
comment: Paper accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023), Rhodes, Greece
comments: Paper accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2023), Rhodes, Greece
abstract: ICASSP2023 General Meeting Understanding and Generation Challenge (MUG) focuses on prompting a wide range of spoken language processing (SLP) research on meeting transcripts, as SLP applications are critical to improve users' efficiency in grasping important information in meetings. MUG includes five tracks, including topic segmentation, topic-level and session-level extractive summarization, topic title generation, keyphrase extraction, and action item detection. To facilitate MUG, we construct and release a large-scale meeting dataset, the AliMeeting4MUG Corpus.
summary: ICASSP2023 General Meeting Understanding and Generation Challenge (MUG) focuses on prompting a wide range of spoken language processing (SLP) research on meeting transcripts, as SLP applications are critical to improve users' efficiency in grasping important information in meetings. MUG includes five tracks, including topic segmentation, topic-level and session-level extractive summarization, topic title generation, keyphrase extraction, and action item detection. To facilitate MUG, we construct and release a large-scale meeting dataset, the AliMeeting4MUG Corpus.
abstract_zh: ICASSP2023 大会理解与生成挑战赛 (MUG) 致力于推动对会议记录进行广泛的口语处理 (SLP) 研究，因为 SLP 应用对于提高用户在会议中掌握重要信息的效率至关重要。 MUG 包括五个轨道，包括主题分段、主题级和会话级提取摘要、主题标题生成、关键短语提取和操作项检测。为了促进MUG的发展，我们构建并发布了一个大规模会议数据集AliMeeting4MUG语料库。

AI.tldr: 介绍ICASSP 2023会议理解与生成挑战赛（MUG），推动语音语言处理研究，包含五个任务并发布大规模会议数据集。
AI.motivation: 提升会议信息处理效率，推动语音语言处理技术发展。
AI.method: 构建并发布大规模会议数据集AliMeeting4MUG Corpus，支持五个任务的研究。
AI.result: 促进多任务研究，推动语音语言处理技术进步。
AI.conclusion: 通过挑战赛和数据集，有效推动会议理解与生成技术的发展。

authors_text: Marwa Dhiaf,Ahmed Cheikh Rouhou,Yousri Kessentini,Sinda Ben Salem
title: MSdocTr-Lite: A Lite Transformer for Full Page Multi-script Handwriting Recognition
title_zh: MSdocTr-Lite：用于整页多脚本手写识别的 Lite 转换器
abstract: The Transformer has quickly become the dominant architecture for various pattern recognition tasks due to its capacity for long-range representation. However, transformers are data-hungry models and need large datasets for training. In Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR), collecting a massive amount of labeled data is a complicated and expensive task. In this paper, we propose a lite transformer architecture for full-page multi-script handwriting recognition. The proposed model comes with three advantages: First, to solve the common problem of data scarcity, we propose a lite transformer model that can be trained on a reasonable amount of data, which is the case of most HTR public datasets, without the need for external data. Second, it can learn the reading order at page-level thanks to a curriculum learning strategy, allowing it to avoid line segmentation errors, exploit a larger context and reduce the need for costly segmentation annotations. Third, it can be easily adapted to other scripts by applying a simple transfer-learning process using only page-level labeled images. Extensive experiments on different datasets with different scripts (French, English, Spanish, and Arabic) show the effectiveness of the proposed model.
summary: The Transformer has quickly become the dominant architecture for various pattern recognition tasks due to its capacity for long-range representation. However, transformers are data-hungry models and need large datasets for training. In Handwritten Text Recognition (HTR), collecting a massive amount of labeled data is a complicated and expensive task. In this paper, we propose a lite transformer architecture for full-page multi-script handwriting recognition. The proposed model comes with three advantages: First, to solve the common problem of data scarcity, we propose a lite transformer model that can be trained on a reasonable amount of data, which is the case of most HTR public datasets, without the need for external data. Second, it can learn the reading order at page-level thanks to a curriculum learning strategy, allowing it to avoid line segmentation errors, exploit a larger context and reduce the need for costly segmentation annotations. Third, it can be easily adapted to other scripts by applying a simple transfer-learning process using only page-level labeled images. Extensive experiments on different datasets with different scripts (French, English, Spanish, and Arabic) show the effectiveness of the proposed model.
abstract_zh: 由于其远程表示能力，Transformer 已迅速成为各种模式识别任务的主导架构。然而，Transformers 是数据密集型模型，需要大量数据集进行训练。在手写文本识别（HTR）中，收集大量标记数据是一项复杂且昂贵的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于整页多脚本手写识别的精简转换器架构。所提出的模型具有三个优点：首先，为了解决数据稀缺的常见问题，我们提出了一种精简版 Transformer 模型，可以在合理数量的数据上进行训练，这是大多数 HTR 公共数据集的情况，而不需要外部数据。其次，借助课程学习策略，它可以学习页面级别的阅读顺序，从而避免行分割错误，利用更大的上下文并减少对昂贵的分割注释的需求。第三，通过仅使用页面级标记图像应用简单的迁移学习过程，它可以轻松适应其他脚本。对不同文字（法语、英语、西班牙语和阿拉伯语）的不同数据集进行的广泛实验表明了所提出模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级Transformer模型MSdocTr-Lite，用于全页多脚本手写文字识别，解决数据稀缺和分割标注问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer需要大量数据，而HTR数据获取困难且昂贵，因此需要一种能在有限数据下训练且无需复杂分割的模型。
AI.method: 提出轻量级Transformer架构，结合课程学习策略在页面级别学习阅读顺序，避免分段错误，并通过迁移学习适应其他脚本。
AI.result: 在法语、英语、西班牙语和阿拉伯语的不同数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MSdocTr-Lite有效解决了HTR中的数据稀缺和分割问题，且能适应多脚本，具有实用价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级Transformer模型MSdocTr-Lite，用于全页多脚本手写文字识别，解决数据稀缺和分割标注问题。

authors_text: Yang Zuo,Yu Tang Liu,Aamir Ahmad
title: Autonomous Blimp Control via H-infinity Robust Deep Residual Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过 H-infinity 鲁棒深度残差强化学习进行自主飞艇控制
abstract: Due to their superior energy efficiency, blimps may replace quadcopters for long-duration aerial tasks. However, designing a controller for blimps to handle complex dynamics, modeling errors, and disturbances remains an unsolved challenge. One recent work combines reinforcement learning (RL) and a PID controller to address this challenge and demonstrates its effectiveness in real-world experiments. In the current work, we build on that using an H-infinity robust controller to expand the stability margin and improve the RL agent's performance. Empirical analysis of different mixing methods reveals that the resulting H-infinity-RL controller outperforms the prior PID-RL combination and can handle more complex tasks involving intensive thrust vectoring. We provide our code as open-source at https://github.com/robot-perception-group/robust_deep_residual_blimp.
summary: Due to their superior energy efficiency, blimps may replace quadcopters for long-duration aerial tasks. However, designing a controller for blimps to handle complex dynamics, modeling errors, and disturbances remains an unsolved challenge. One recent work combines reinforcement learning (RL) and a PID controller to address this challenge and demonstrates its effectiveness in real-world experiments. In the current work, we build on that using an H-infinity robust controller to expand the stability margin and improve the RL agent's performance. Empirical analysis of different mixing methods reveals that the resulting H-infinity-RL controller outperforms the prior PID-RL combination and can handle more complex tasks involving intensive thrust vectoring. We provide our code as open-source at https://github.com/robot-perception-group/robust_deep_residual_blimp.
abstract_zh: 由于其卓越的能源效率，飞艇可以取代四轴飞行器来执行长时间的空中任务。然而，设计飞艇控制器来处理复杂的动力学、建模误差和干扰仍然是一个尚未解决的挑战。最近的一项工作结合了强化学习 (RL) 和 PID 控制器来应对这一挑战，并在现实实验中证明了其有效性。在当前的工作中，我们在此基础上使用 H-infinity 鲁棒控制器来扩大稳定性裕度并提高 RL 代理的性能。对不同混合方法的实证分析表明，所得的 H-infinity-RL 控制器优于之前的 PID-RL 组合，并且可以处理涉及密集推力矢量的更复杂的任务。我们在 https://github.com/robot-perception-group/robust_deep_residual_blimp 提供开源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合H-infinity鲁棒控制与深度残差强化学习的自主飞艇控制方法，以应对复杂动态和干扰。
AI.motivation: 飞艇因能源效率高可能替代四旋翼无人机执行长时任务，但其控制面临动态复杂性、模型误差和干扰的挑战，传统PID-RL方法存在稳定性不足的问题。
AI.method: 将H-infinity控制器与深度残差强化学习框架结合，通过实验对比不同混合方法，验证控制器在推力矢量复杂任务中的鲁棒性。
AI.result: H-infinity-RL控制器在稳定性边界和复杂任务处理上优于PID-RL方法，且开源代码已发布。
AI.conclusion: H-infinity鲁棒控制与深度强化学习的结合有效提升了飞艇控制性能，为复杂环境下的自主控制提供了新方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合H-infinity鲁棒控制与深度残差强化学习的自主飞艇控制方法，以应对复杂动态和干扰。

search_text: Autonomous Blimp Control via H-infinity Robust Deep Residual Reinforcement Learning 通过 H-infinity 鲁棒深度残差强化学习进行自主飞艇控制 Due to their superior energy efficiency, blimps may replace quadcopters for long-duration aerial tasks. However, designing a controller for blimps to handle complex dynamics, modeling errors, and disturbances remains an unsolved challenge. One recent work combines reinforcement learning (RL) and a PID controller to address this challenge and demonstrates its effectiveness in real-world experiments. In the current work, we build on that using an H-infinity robust controller to expand the stability margin and improve the RL agent's performance. Empirical analysis of different mixing methods reveals that the resulting H-infinity-RL controller outperforms the prior PID-RL combination and can handle more complex tasks involving intensive thrust vectoring. We provide our code as open-source at https://github.com/robot-perception-group/robust_deep_residual_blimp. 由于其卓越的能源效率，飞艇可以取代四轴飞行器来执行长时间的空中任务。然而，设计飞艇控制器来处理复杂的动力学、建模误差和干扰仍然是一个尚未解决的挑战。最近的一项工作结合了强化学习 (RL) 和 PID 控制器来应对这一挑战，并在现实实验中证明了其有效性。在当前的工作中，我们在此基础上使用 H-infinity 鲁棒控制器来扩大稳定性裕度并提高 RL 代理的性能。对不同混合方法的实证分析表明，所得的 H-infinity-RL 控制器优于之前的 PID-RL 组合，并且可以处理涉及密集推力矢量的更复杂的任务。我们在 https://github.com/robot-perception-group/robust_deep_residual_blimp 提供开源代码。 本文提出一种结合H-infinity鲁棒控制与深度残差强化学习的自主飞艇控制方法，以应对复杂动态和干扰。 Yang Zuo,Yu Tang Liu,Aamir Ahmad cs.RO

authors_text: Kamil Mikolaj,Manxi Lin,Zahra Bashir,Morten Bo Søndergaard Svendsen,Martin Tolsgaard,Anders Nymark,Aasa Feragen
title: Removing confounding information from fetal ultrasound images
title_zh: 从胎儿超声图像中去除混杂信息
abstract: Confounding information in the form of text or markings embedded in medical images can severely affect the training of diagnostic deep learning algorithms. However, data collected for clinical purposes often have such markings embedded in them. In dermatology, known examples include drawings or rulers that are overrepresented in images of malignant lesions. In this paper, we encounter text and calipers placed on the images found in national databases containing fetal screening ultrasound scans, which correlate with standard planes to be predicted. In order to utilize the vast amounts of data available in these databases, we develop and validate a series of methods for minimizing the confounding effects of embedded text and calipers on deep learning algorithms designed for ultrasound, using standard plane classification as a test case.
summary: Confounding information in the form of text or markings embedded in medical images can severely affect the training of diagnostic deep learning algorithms. However, data collected for clinical purposes often have such markings embedded in them. In dermatology, known examples include drawings or rulers that are overrepresented in images of malignant lesions. In this paper, we encounter text and calipers placed on the images found in national databases containing fetal screening ultrasound scans, which correlate with standard planes to be predicted. In order to utilize the vast amounts of data available in these databases, we develop and validate a series of methods for minimizing the confounding effects of embedded text and calipers on deep learning algorithms designed for ultrasound, using standard plane classification as a test case.
abstract_zh: 医学图像中嵌入的文本或标记形式的混淆信息可能会严重影响诊断深度学习算法的训练。然而，为临床目的收集的数据通常嵌入此类标记。在皮肤病学中，已知的例子包括在恶性病变的图像中过度呈现的图画或尺子。在本文中，我们遇到了放置在包含胎儿筛查超声扫描的国家数据库中的图像上的文本和卡尺，它们与要预测的标准平面相关。为了利用这些数据库中的大量可用数据，我们使用标准平面分类作为测试用例，开发并验证了一系列方法，以最大限度地减少嵌入式文本和卡尺对专为超声设计的深度学习算法的混杂影响。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在从胎儿超声图像中去除文本和卡尺等混淆信息，以提升深度学习算法的诊断性能。
AI.motivation: 临床超声图像常包含文本或标记，这些信息会干扰深度学习模型的训练，影响诊断准确性，需解决此问题以充分利用现有数据。
AI.method: 开发并验证了一系列图像处理与深度学习结合的方法，通过标准平面分类任务测试，消除文本和卡尺对模型的干扰。
AI.result: 方法有效减少了混淆信息对深度学习模型的影响，提升了胎儿超声图像分类任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为处理临床医学图像中的混淆信息提供了可行方案，有助于推动基于真实数据的医学AI模型发展。

authors_text: Tiago S. Fernandes,Samuel J. Vieira,Antonio Onofre,Juan Calderón Bustillo,Alejandro Torres-Forné,José A. Font
title: Convolutional Neural Networks for the classification of glitches in gravitational-wave data streams
title_zh: 用于对引力波数据流中的故障进行分类的卷积神经网络
abstract: We investigate the use of Convolutional Neural Networks (including the modern ConvNeXt network family) to classify transient noise signals (i.e.~glitches) and gravitational waves in data from the Advanced LIGO detectors. First, we use models with a supervised learning approach, both trained from scratch using the Gravity Spy dataset and employing transfer learning by fine-tuning pre-trained models in this dataset. Second, we also explore a self-supervised approach, pre-training models with automatically generated pseudo-labels. Our findings are very close to existing results for the same dataset, reaching values for the F1 score of 97.18% (94.15%) for the best supervised (self-supervised) model. We further test the models using actual gravitational-wave signals from LIGO-Virgo's O3 run. Although trained using data from previous runs (O1 and O2), the models show good performance, in particular when using transfer learning. We find that transfer learning improves the scores without the need for any training on real signals apart from the less than 50 chirp examples from hardware injections present in the Gravity Spy dataset. This motivates the use of transfer learning not only for glitch classification but also for signal classification.
summary: We investigate the use of Convolutional Neural Networks (including the modern ConvNeXt network family) to classify transient noise signals (i.e.~glitches) and gravitational waves in data from the Advanced LIGO detectors. First, we use models with a supervised learning approach, both trained from scratch using the Gravity Spy dataset and employing transfer learning by fine-tuning pre-trained models in this dataset. Second, we also explore a self-supervised approach, pre-training models with automatically generated pseudo-labels. Our findings are very close to existing results for the same dataset, reaching values for the F1 score of 97.18% (94.15%) for the best supervised (self-supervised) model. We further test the models using actual gravitational-wave signals from LIGO-Virgo's O3 run. Although trained using data from previous runs (O1 and O2), the models show good performance, in particular when using transfer learning. We find that transfer learning improves the scores without the need for any training on real signals apart from the less than 50 chirp examples from hardware injections present in the Gravity Spy dataset. This motivates the use of transfer learning not only for glitch classification but also for signal classification.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了使用卷积神经网络（包括现代 ConvNeXt 网络系列）对来自高级 LIGO 探测器的数据中的瞬态噪声信号（即毛刺）和引力波进行分类。首先，我们使用具有监督学习方法的模型，既使用 Gravity Spy 数据集从头开始训练，又通过微调该数据集中的预训练模型来采用迁移学习。其次，我们还探索了一种自我监督的方法，即使用自动生成的伪标签来预训练模型。我们的研究结果与同一数据集的现有结果非常接近，最佳监督（自监督）模型的 F1 分数达到 97.18% (94.15%)。我们使用来自 LIGO-Virgo O3 运行的实际引力波信号进一步测试模型。尽管使用之前运行（O1 和 O2）的数据进行训练，但模型表现出良好的性能，特别是在使用迁移学习时。我们发现，除了 Gravity Spy 数据集中存在的来自硬件注入的不到 50 个线性调频示例之外，迁移学习无需对真实信号进行任何训练即可提高分数。这促使迁移学习不仅用于故障分类，而且还用于信号分类。

AI.tldr: 本文研究使用卷积神经网络（包括ConvNeXt系列）对LIGO引力波数据流中的瞬态噪声信号（即故障信号）和引力波进行分类。
AI.motivation: 引力波探测中需要高效区分噪声故障信号与真实引力波信号，传统方法存在局限性，需探索深度学习方法提升分类精度。
AI.method: 采用监督学习（从头训练与迁移学习）和自监督学习（伪标签预训练）方法，基于Gravity Spy数据集训练模型，并在LIGO-Virgo O3运行的真实引力波信号上测试性能。
AI.result: 监督模型F1分数达97.18%，自监督模型达94.15%；迁移学习使模型在未使用真实信号训练的情况下仍能保持良好性能。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习在故障分类和信号分类中均有效，ConvNeXt等现代CNN架构为引力波数据分析提供了可行方案。

We find that transfer learning improves the scores without the need for any training on real signals apart from the less than 50 chirp examples from hardware injections present in the Gravity Spy dataset. Fernandes,Samuel J. Vieira,Antonio Onofre,Juan Calderón Bustillo,Alejandro Torres-Forné,José A. Font gr-qc,astro-ph.IM,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Junji Otsuka,Masakazu Yoshimura,Takeshi Ohashi
title: Self-Supervised Reversed Image Signal Processing via Reference-Guided Dynamic Parameter Selection
title_zh: 通过参考引导动态参数选择的自监督反转图像信号处理
abstract: Unprocessed sensor outputs (RAW images) potentially improve both low-level and high-level computer vision algorithms, but the lack of large-scale RAW image datasets is a barrier to research. Thus, reversed Image Signal Processing (ISP) which converts existing RGB images into RAW images has been studied. However, most existing methods require camera-specific metadata or paired RGB and RAW images to model the conversion, and they are not always available. In addition, there are issues in handling diverse ISPs and recovering global illumination. To tackle these limitations, we propose a self-supervised reversed ISP method that does not require metadata and paired images. The proposed method converts a RGB image into a RAW-like image taken in the same environment with the same sensor as a reference RAW image by dynamically selecting parameters of the reversed ISP pipeline based on the reference RAW image. The parameter selection is trained via pseudo paired data created from unpaired RGB and RAW images. We show that the proposed method is able to learn various reversed ISPs with comparable accuracy to other state-of-the-art supervised methods and convert unknown RGB images from COCO and Flickr1M to target RAW-like images more accurately in terms of pixel distribution. We also demonstrate that our generated RAW images improve performance on real RAW image object detection task.
summary: Unprocessed sensor outputs (RAW images) potentially improve both low-level and high-level computer vision algorithms, but the lack of large-scale RAW image datasets is a barrier to research. Thus, reversed Image Signal Processing (ISP) which converts existing RGB images into RAW images has been studied. However, most existing methods require camera-specific metadata or paired RGB and RAW images to model the conversion, and they are not always available. In addition, there are issues in handling diverse ISPs and recovering global illumination. To tackle these limitations, we propose a self-supervised reversed ISP method that does not require metadata and paired images. The proposed method converts a RGB image into a RAW-like image taken in the same environment with the same sensor as a reference RAW image by dynamically selecting parameters of the reversed ISP pipeline based on the reference RAW image. The parameter selection is trained via pseudo paired data created from unpaired RGB and RAW images. We show that the proposed method is able to learn various reversed ISPs with comparable accuracy to other state-of-the-art supervised methods and convert unknown RGB images from COCO and Flickr1M to target RAW-like images more accurately in terms of pixel distribution. We also demonstrate that our generated RAW images improve performance on real RAW image object detection task.
abstract_zh: 未经处理的传感器输出（RAW 图像）可能会改善低级和高级计算机视觉算法，但缺乏大规模 RAW 图像数据集是研究的障碍。因此，已经研究了将现有RGB图像转换为RAW图像的逆向图像信号处理(ISP)。然而，大多数现有方法需要特定于相机的元数据或配对的 RGB 和 RAW 图像来对转换进行建模，而且它们并不总是可用。此外，在处理不同的 ISP 和恢复全局照明方面也存在问题。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种自我监督的反向 ISP 方法，不需要元数据和配对图像。该方法通过基于参考RAW图像动态选择反向ISP管道的参数，将RGB图像转换为在相同环境下使用相同传感器拍摄的类RAW图像作为参考RAW图像。参数选择是通过从未配对的 RGB 和 RAW 图像创建的伪配对数据进行训练的。我们表明，所提出的方法能够以与其他最先进的监督方法相当的精度学习各种反向 ISP，并将来自 COCO 和 Flickr1M 的未知 RGB 图像转换为在像素分布方面更准确的目标类 RAW 图像。我们还证明，我们生成的 RAW 图像提高了真实 RAW 图像对象检测任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需相机元数据和配对图像的自监督反向图像信号处理方法，通过参考引导的动态参数选择生成RAW-like图像。
AI.motivation: 现有反向ISP方法依赖相机元数据或配对RGB-RAW图像，而这些数据获取困难且难以处理多样化的ISP参数和全局光照恢复问题。
AI.method: 基于参考RAW图像动态选择反向ISP参数，通过无配对数据生成伪训练样本，实现自监督学习。
AI.result: 方法在COCO和Flickr1M数据集上生成的RAW-like图像在像素分布和目标检测任务中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统反向ISP对配对数据的依赖，为RAW图像生成和低光照场景下的视觉任务提供了有效解决方案。
