authors_text: Han Xue,Wenqiang Xu,Jieyi Zhang,Tutian Tang,Yutong Li,Wenxin Du,Ruolin Ye,Cewu Lu
title: GarmentTracking: Category-Level Garment Pose Tracking
title_zh: GarmentTracking：类别级服装姿势跟踪
abstract: Garments are important to humans. A visual system that can estimate and track the complete garment pose can be useful for many downstream tasks and real-world applications. In this work, we present a complete package to address the category-level garment pose tracking task: (1) A recording system VR-Garment, with which users can manipulate virtual garment models in simulation through a VR interface. (2) A large-scale dataset VR-Folding, with complex garment pose configurations in manipulation like flattening and folding. (3) An end-to-end online tracking framework GarmentTracking, which predicts complete garment pose both in canonical space and task space given a point cloud sequence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed GarmentTracking achieves great performance even when the garment has large non-rigid deformation. It outperforms the baseline approach on both speed and accuracy. We hope our proposed solution can serve as a platform for future research. Codes and datasets are available in https://garment-tracking.robotflow.ai.
summary: Garments are important to humans. A visual system that can estimate and track the complete garment pose can be useful for many downstream tasks and real-world applications. In this work, we present a complete package to address the category-level garment pose tracking task: (1) A recording system VR-Garment, with which users can manipulate virtual garment models in simulation through a VR interface. (2) A large-scale dataset VR-Folding, with complex garment pose configurations in manipulation like flattening and folding. (3) An end-to-end online tracking framework GarmentTracking, which predicts complete garment pose both in canonical space and task space given a point cloud sequence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed GarmentTracking achieves great performance even when the garment has large non-rigid deformation. It outperforms the baseline approach on both speed and accuracy. We hope our proposed solution can serve as a platform for future research. Codes and datasets are available in https://garment-tracking.robotflow.ai.
abstract_zh: 服装对人类很重要。可以估计和跟踪完整服装姿势的视觉系统对于许多下游任务和实际应用非常有用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个完整的包来解决类别级服装姿势跟踪任务：（1）记录系统VR-Garment，用户可以通过VR界面模拟操作虚拟服装模型。 (2) 大规模数据集 VR-Folding，在展平和折叠等操作中具有复杂的服装姿势配置。 (3) 端到端在线跟踪框架 GarmentTracking，它可以在给定点云序列的情况下预测规范空间和任务空间中的完整服装姿势。大量实验表明，即使服装具有较大的非刚性变形，所提出的 GarmentTracking 也能实现出色的性能。它在速度和准确性方面都优于基线方法。我们希望我们提出的解决方案可以作为未来研究的平台。代码和数据集可在 https://garment-tracking.robotflow.ai 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对服装类别级姿态跟踪的完整解决方案，包括虚拟现实记录系统、大规模数据集和端到端跟踪框架。
AI.motivation: 服装对人体具有重要意义，能够估计和跟踪完整服装姿态的视觉系统可广泛应用于下游任务和实际场景。
AI.method: 提出VR-Garment虚拟现实记录系统、VR-Folding大规模数据集以及GarmentTracking端到端在线跟踪框架，通过点云序列预测服装在规范空间和任务空间的完整姿态。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在服装发生大幅非刚性变形时仍表现优异，在速度和精度上均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方案旨在为未来研究提供平台，相关代码和数据集已公开获取。

authors_text: Takuhiro Kaneko,Hirokazu Kameoka,Kou Tanaka,Shogo Seki
title: Wave-U-Net Discriminator: Fast and Lightweight Discriminator for Generative Adversarial Network-Based Speech Synthesis
title_zh: Wave-U-Net 鉴别器：用于基于生成对抗网络的语音合成的快速轻量级鉴别器
abstract: In speech synthesis, a generative adversarial network (GAN), training a generator (speech synthesizer) and a discriminator in a min-max game, is widely used to improve speech quality. An ensemble of discriminators is commonly used in recent neural vocoders (e.g., HiFi-GAN) and end-to-end text-to-speech (TTS) systems (e.g., VITS) to scrutinize waveforms from multiple perspectives. Such discriminators allow synthesized speech to adequately approach real speech; however, they require an increase in the model size and computation time according to the increase in the number of discriminators. Alternatively, this study proposes a Wave-U-Net discriminator, which is a single but expressive discriminator with Wave-U-Net architecture. This discriminator is unique; it can assess a waveform in a sample-wise manner with the same resolution as the input signal, while extracting multilevel features via an encoder and decoder with skip connections. This architecture provides a generator with sufficiently rich information for the synthesized speech to be closely matched to the real speech. During the experiments, the proposed ideas were applied to a representative neural vocoder (HiFi-GAN) and an end-to-end TTS system (VITS). The results demonstrate that the proposed models can achieve comparable speech quality with a 2.31 times faster and 14.5 times more lightweight discriminator when used in HiFi-GAN and a 1.90 times faster and 9.62 times more lightweight discriminator when used in VITS. Audio samples are available at https://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/waveunetd/.

The results demonstrate that the proposed models can achieve comparable speech quality with a 2.31 times faster and 14.5 times more lightweight discriminator when used in HiFi-GAN and a 1.90 times faster and 9.62 times more lightweight discriminator when used in VITS. Audio samples are available at https://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/waveunetd/.
abstract_zh: 在语音合成中，生成对抗网络（GAN）在最小-最大游戏中训练生成器（语音合成器）和鉴别器，被广泛用于提高语音质量。鉴别器集合通常用于最近的神经声码器（例如 HiFi-GAN）和端到端文本到语音（TTS）系统（例如 VITS）中，以从多个角度仔细检查波形。这种鉴别器允许合成语音充分接近真实语音；然而，它们需要根据判别器数量的增加来增加模型大小和计算时间。另外，本研究提出了一种 Wave-U-Net 判别器，它是一个具有 Wave-U-Net 架构的单一但富有表现力的判别器。这个判别器是独一无二的；它可以以与输入信号相同的分辨率以采样方式评估波形，同时通过具有跳跃连接的编码器和解码器提取多级特征。该架构为生成器提供了足够丰富的信息，使合成语音与真实语音紧密匹配。在实验过程中，所提出的想法被应用于代表性神经声码器 (HiFi-GAN) 和端到端 TTS 系统 (VITS)。结果表明，所提出的模型在 HiFi-GAN 中使用时，鉴别器速度提高了 2.31 倍，轻量级鉴别器提高了 14.5 倍，在 VITS 中使用时，鉴别器速度提高了 1.90 倍，轻量级鉴别器提高了 9.62 倍，从而实现了相当的语音质量。音频样本可在 https://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/waveunetd/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Wave-U-Net架构的轻量级判别器，用于改进生成对抗网络（GAN）在语音合成中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有语音合成系统中多判别器结构虽能提升语音质量，但会导致模型体积增大和计算时间增加，亟需更高效的单判别器方案。
AI.method: 设计具有编码器-解码器结构和跳跃连接的Wave-U-Net判别器，以相同分辨率分析输入信号并提取多级特征，提供丰富的判别信息。
AI.result: 在HiFi-GAN中实现2.31倍加速和14.5倍轻量化，在VITS中实现1.90倍加速和9.62倍轻量化，语音质量与原模型相当。
AI.conclusion: Wave-U-Net判别器在保持语音质量的同时显著提升了GAN语音合成的效率，为轻量化模型设计提供了新思路。

search_text: Wave-U-Net Discriminator: Fast and Lightweight Discriminator for Generative Adversarial Network-Based Speech Synthesis Wave-U-Net 鉴别器：用于基于生成对抗网络的语音合成的快速轻量级鉴别器 In speech synthesis, a generative adversarial network (GAN), training a generator (speech synthesizer) and a discriminator in a min-max game, is widely used to improve speech quality. An ensemble of discriminators is commonly used in recent neural vocoders (e.g., HiFi-GAN) and end-to-end text-to-speech (TTS) systems (e.g., VITS) to scrutinize waveforms from multiple perspectives. Such discriminators allow synthesized speech to adequately approach real speech; however, they require an increase in the model size and computation time according to the increase in the number of discriminators. Alternatively, this study proposes a Wave-U-Net discriminator, which is a single but expressive discriminator with Wave-U-Net architecture. This discriminator is unique; it can assess a waveform in a sample-wise manner with the same resolution as the input signal, while extracting multilevel features via an encoder and decoder with skip connections. This architecture provides a generator with sufficiently rich information for the synthesized speech to be closely matched to the real speech. During the experiments, the proposed ideas were applied to a representative neural vocoder (HiFi-GAN) and an end-to-end TTS system (VITS). The results demonstrate that the proposed models can achieve comparable speech quality with a 2.31 times faster and 14.5 times more lightweight discriminator when used in HiFi-GAN and a 1.90 times faster and 9.62 times more lightweight discriminator when used in VITS. Audio samples are available at https://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/waveunetd/. 在语音合成中，生成对抗网络（GAN）在最小-最大游戏中训练生成器（语音合成器）和鉴别器，被广泛用于提高语音质量。鉴别器集合通常用于最近的神经声码器（例如 HiFi-GAN）和端到端文本到语音（TTS）系统（例如 VITS）中，以从多个角度仔细检查波形。这种鉴别器允许合成语音充分接近真实语音；然而，它们需要根据判别器数量的增加来增加模型大小和计算时间。另外，本研究提出了一种 Wave-U-Net 判别器，它是一个具有 Wave-U-Net 架构的单一但富有表现力的判别器。这个判别器是独一无二的；它可以以与输入信号相同的分辨率以采样方式评估波形，同时通过具有跳跃连接的编码器和解码器提取多级特征。该架构为生成器提供了足够丰富的信息，使合成语音与真实语音紧密匹配。在实验过程中，所提出的想法被应用于代表性神经声码器 (HiFi-GAN) 和端到端 TTS 系统 (VITS)。结果表明，所提出的模型在 HiFi-GAN 中使用时，鉴别器速度提高了 2.31 倍，轻量级鉴别器提高了 14.5 倍，在 VITS 中使用时，鉴别器速度提高了 1.90 倍，轻量级鉴别器提高了 9.62 倍，从而实现了相当的语音质量。音频样本可在 https://www.kecl.ntt.co.jp/people/kaneko.takuhiro/projects/waveunetd/ 获取。 本文提出一种基于Wave-U-Net架构的轻量级判别器，用于改进生成对抗网络（GAN）在语音合成中的应用。 Takuhiro Kaneko,Hirokazu Kameoka,Kou Tanaka,Shogo Seki cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS,eess.SP

authors_text: Qi Wang,Lucas Mahler,Julius Steiglechner,Florian Birk,Klaus Scheffler,Gabriele Lohmann
title: A Three-Player GAN for Super-Resolution in Magnetic Resonance Imaging
title_zh: 用于磁共振成像超分辨率的三人 GAN
abstract: Learning based single image super resolution (SISR) task is well investigated in 2D images. However, SISR for 3D Magnetics Resonance Images (MRI) is more challenging compared to 2D, mainly due to the increased number of neural network parameters, the larger memory requirement and the limited amount of available training data. Current SISR methods for 3D volumetric images are based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), especially Wasserstein GANs due to their training stability. Other common architectures in the 2D domain, e.g. transformer models, require large amounts of training data and are therefore not suitable for the limited 3D data. However, Wasserstein GANs can be problematic because they may not converge to a global optimum and thus produce blurry results. Here, we propose a new method for 3D SR based on the GAN framework. Specifically, we use instance noise to balance the GAN training. Furthermore, we use a relativistic GAN loss function and an updating feature extractor during the training process. We show that our method produces highly accurate results. We also show that we need very few training samples. In particular, we need less than 30 samples instead of thousands of training samples that are typically required in previous studies. Finally, we show improved out-of-sample results produced by our model.
summary: Learning based single image super resolution (SISR) task is well investigated in 2D images. However, SISR for 3D Magnetics Resonance Images (MRI) is more challenging compared to 2D, mainly due to the increased number of neural network parameters, the larger memory requirement and the limited amount of available training data. Current SISR methods for 3D volumetric images are based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), especially Wasserstein GANs due to their training stability. Other common architectures in the 2D domain, e.g. transformer models, require large amounts of training data and are therefore not suitable for the limited 3D data. However, Wasserstein GANs can be problematic because they may not converge to a global optimum and thus produce blurry results. Here, we propose a new method for 3D SR based on the GAN framework. Specifically, we use instance noise to balance the GAN training. Furthermore, we use a relativistic GAN loss function and an updating feature extractor during the training process. We show that our method produces highly accurate results. We also show that we need very few training samples. In particular, we need less than 30 samples instead of thousands of training samples that are typically required in previous studies. Finally, we show improved out-of-sample results produced by our model.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的单图像超分辨率（SISR）任务在 2D 图像中得到了很好的研究。然而，与 2D 相比，3D 磁共振图像 (MRI) 的 SISR 更具挑战性，主要是由于神经网络参数数量增加、内存需求更大以及可用训练数据量有限。当前用于 3D 体积图像的 SISR 方法基于生成对抗网络 (GAN)，尤其是 Wasserstein GAN，因为其训练稳定性。 2D 域中的其他常见架构，例如Transformer 模型需要大量的训练数据，因此不适合有限的 3D 数据。然而，Wasserstein GAN 可能存在问题，因为它们可能无法收敛到全局最优值，从而产生模糊的结果。在这里，我们提出了一种基于 GAN 框架的 3D SR 新方法。具体来说，我们使用实例噪声来平衡 GAN 训练。此外，我们在训练过程中使用相对论 GAN 损失函数和更新特征提取器。我们证明我们的方法可以产生高度准确的结果。我们还表明我们需要很少的训练样本。特别是，我们需要不到 30 个样本，而不是以前的研究中通常需要的数千个训练样本。最后，我们展示了我们的模型产生的改进的样本外结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于三玩家生成对抗网络（GAN）的三维磁共振成像（MRI）超分辨率方法，以解决传统方法在参数量、内存需求及数据量限制下的不足。
AI.motivation: 三维MRI超分辨率面临参数多、内存需求大及训练数据有限的挑战，现有方法如Wasserstein GAN易收敛至局部最优导致模糊结果，需更高效方案。
AI.method: 引入实例噪声平衡训练，采用相对GAN损失函数，并在训练中动态更新特征提取器，减少对大量训练样本的依赖。
AI.result: 方法在少量样本（<30个）下实现高精度重建，显著优于传统需数千样本的方案，且提升泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过优化GAN训练机制，在有限数据下有效提升三维MRI超分辨率性能，为医学影像处理提供新思路。

Specifically, we use instance noise to balance the GAN training. Furthermore, we use a relativistic GAN loss function and an updating feature extractor during the training process. We show that our method produces highly accurate results. We also show that we need very few training samples. In particular, we need less than 30 samples instead of thousands of training samples that are typically required in previous studies. authors_text: Longhui Yuan,Binhui Xie,Shuang Li
title: Robust Test-Time Adaptation in Dynamic Scenarios
title_zh: 动态场景中稳健的测试时间适应
abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) intends to adapt the pretrained model to test distributions with only unlabeled test data streams. Most of the previous TTA methods have achieved great success on simple test data streams such as independently sampled data from single or multiple distributions. However, these attempts may fail in dynamic scenarios of real-world applications like autonomous driving, where the environments gradually change and the test data is sampled correlatively over time. In this work, we explore such practical test data streams to deploy the model on the fly, namely practical test-time adaptation (PTTA). To do so, we elaborate a Robust Test-Time Adaptation (RoTTA) method against the complex data stream in PTTA. More specifically, we present a robust batch normalization scheme to estimate the normalization statistics. Meanwhile, a memory bank is utilized to sample category-balanced data with consideration of timeliness and uncertainty. Further, to stabilize the training procedure, we develop a time-aware reweighting strategy with a teacher-student model. Extensive experiments prove that RoTTA enables continual testtime adaptation on the correlatively sampled data streams. Our method is easy to implement, making it a good choice for rapid deployment. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/BIT-DA/RoTTA

In this work, we explore such practical test data streams to deploy the model on the fly, namely practical test-time adaptation (PTTA). To do so, we elaborate a Robust Test-Time Adaptation (RoTTA) method against the complex data stream in PTTA. Extensive experiments prove that RoTTA enables continual testtime adaptation on the correlatively sampled data streams. Our method is easy to implement, making it a good choice for rapid deployment. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/BIT-DA/RoTTA
abstract_zh: 测试时间适应（TTA）旨在调整预训练模型，以仅使用未标记的测试数据流来测试分布。之前的大多数 TTA 方法在简单的测试数据流（例如来自单个或多个分布的独立采样数据）上取得了巨大的成功。然而，这些尝试在自动驾驶等现实应用的动态场景中可能会失败，其中环境逐渐变化，测试数据随着时间的推移进行相关采样。在这项工作中，我们探索了这种实际测试数据流来动态部署模型，即实际测试时间适应（PTTA）。为此，我们针对 PTTA 中的复杂数据流详细阐述了鲁棒测试时间适应 (RoTTA) 方法。更具体地说，我们提出了一种强大的批量归一化方案来估计归一化统计数据。同时，考虑及时性和不确定性，利用存储体对类别平衡数据进行采样。此外，为了稳定训练过程，我们利用师生模型开发了一种时间感知的重新加权策略。大量实验证明，RoTTA 能够对相关采样数据流进行持续的测试时间调整。我们的方法易于实现，是快速部署的不错选择。该代码可在 https://github.com/BIT-DA/RoTTA 上公开获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的测试时自适应方法（RoTTA），以应对动态场景中测试数据流的渐变和相关性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时自适应（TTA）方法在静态或简单数据流上表现良好，但在现实动态场景（如自动驾驶）中因环境渐变和数据相关性导致失效，需开发适应动态数据流的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: 提出鲁棒批量归一化方案估计统计量，结合考虑时效性与不确定性的记忆库进行类别平衡采样，并设计时间感知重加权策略与教师-学生模型稳定训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明RoTTA能在相关采样数据流上实现持续自适应，方法易于实现且代码开源。
AI.conclusion: RoTTA通过多策略协同有效应对动态场景挑战，为实际应用中的快速部署提供了可靠方案。

search_text: Robust Test-Time Adaptation in Dynamic Scenarios 动态场景中稳健的测试时间适应 Test-time adaptation (TTA) intends to adapt the pretrained model to test distributions with only unlabeled test data streams. Most of the previous TTA methods have achieved great success on simple test data streams such as independently sampled data from single or multiple distributions. However, these attempts may fail in dynamic scenarios of real-world applications like autonomous driving, where the environments gradually change and the test data is sampled correlatively over time. In this work, we explore such practical test data streams to deploy the model on the fly, namely practical test-time adaptation (PTTA). To do so, we elaborate a Robust Test-Time Adaptation (RoTTA) method against the complex data stream in PTTA. More specifically, we present a robust batch normalization scheme to estimate the normalization statistics. Meanwhile, a memory bank is utilized to sample category-balanced data with consideration of timeliness and uncertainty. Further, to stabilize the training procedure, we develop a time-aware reweighting strategy with a teacher-student model. Extensive experiments prove that RoTTA enables continual testtime adaptation on the correlatively sampled data streams. Our method is easy to implement, making it a good choice for rapid deployment. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/BIT-DA/RoTTA 测试时间适应（TTA）旨在调整预训练模型，以仅使用未标记的测试数据流来测试分布。之前的大多数 TTA 方法在简单的测试数据流（例如来自单个或多个分布的独立采样数据）上取得了巨大的成功。然而，这些尝试在自动驾驶等现实应用的动态场景中可能会失败，其中环境逐渐变化，测试数据随着时间的推移进行相关采样。在这项工作中，我们探索了这种实际测试数据流来动态部署模型，即实际测试时间适应（PTTA）。为此，我们针对 PTTA 中的复杂数据流详细阐述了鲁棒测试时间适应 (RoTTA) 方法。更具体地说，我们提出了一种强大的批量归一化方案来估计归一化统计数据。同时，考虑及时性和不确定性，利用存储体对类别平衡数据进行采样。此外，为了稳定训练过程，我们利用师生模型开发了一种时间感知的重新加权策略。大量实验证明，RoTTA 能够对相关采样数据流进行持续的测试时间调整。我们的方法易于实现，是快速部署的不错选择。该代码可在 https://github.com/BIT-DA/RoTTA 上公开获取 本文提出了一种鲁棒的测试时自适应方法（RoTTA），以应对动态场景中测试数据流的渐变和相关性问题。 Longhui Yuan,Binhui Xie,Shuang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Zhiheng Ma,Xiaopeng Hong,Beinan Liu,Yabin Wang,Pinyue Guo,Huiyun Li
title: Remind of the Past: Incremental Learning with Analogical Prompts
title_zh: 回忆过去：通过类比提示进行增量学习
abstract: Although data-free incremental learning methods are memory-friendly, accurately estimating and counteracting representation shifts is challenging in the absence of historical data. This paper addresses this thorny problem by proposing a novel incremental learning method inspired by human analogy capabilities. Specifically, we design an analogy-making mechanism to remap the new data into the old class by prompt tuning. It mimics the feature distribution of the target old class on the old model using only samples of new classes. The learnt prompts are further used to estimate and counteract the representation shift caused by fine-tuning for the historical prototypes. The proposed method sets up new state-of-the-art performance on four incremental learning benchmarks under both the class and domain incremental learning settings. It consistently outperforms data-replay methods by only saving feature prototypes for each class. It has almost hit the empirical upper bound by joint training on the Core50 benchmark. The code will be released at \url{https://github.com/ZhihengCV/A-Prompts}.
summary: Although data-free incremental learning methods are memory-friendly, accurately estimating and counteracting representation shifts is challenging in the absence of historical data. This paper addresses this thorny problem by proposing a novel incremental learning method inspired by human analogy capabilities. Specifically, we design an analogy-making mechanism to remap the new data into the old class by prompt tuning. It mimics the feature distribution of the target old class on the old model using only samples of new classes. The learnt prompts are further used to estimate and counteract the representation shift caused by fine-tuning for the historical prototypes. The proposed method sets up new state-of-the-art performance on four incremental learning benchmarks under both the class and domain incremental learning settings. It consistently outperforms data-replay methods by only saving feature prototypes for each class. It has almost hit the empirical upper bound by joint training on the Core50 benchmark. The code will be released at \url{https://github.com/ZhihengCV/A-Prompts}.
abstract_zh: 尽管无数据增量学习方法对记忆友好，但在缺乏历史数据的情况下，准确估计和抵消表征变化具有挑战性。本文通过受人类类比能力的启发，提出一种新颖的增量学习方法来解决这个棘手的问题。具体来说，我们设计了一种类比机制，通过及时调整将新数据重新映射到旧类中。它仅使用新类的样本来模拟旧模型上目标旧类的特征分布。学习到的提示进一步用于估计和抵消由历史原型微调引起的表示变化。所提出的方法在类和域增量学习设置下的四个增量学习基准上建立了新的最先进的性能。通过仅保存每个类的特征原型，它始终优于数据重放方法。通过在Core50基准上的联合训练，几乎已经达到了经验上限。代码将在\url{https://github.com/ZhihengCV/A-Prompts}发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于类比提示的增量学习方法，通过提示调整解决无历史数据时的表示偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据无关增量学习方法难以准确估计和抵消表示偏移，需设计无需历史数据的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计类比机制将新数据映射至旧类，利用新类样本模仿旧类特征分布，通过提示估计并抵消微调引起的表示偏移。
AI.result: 在四个基准测试中达到新SOTA，优于数据回放方法，仅保存特征原型并在Core50基准接近经验上限。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过类比提示机制有效解决增量学习中的表示偏移问题，无需存储历史数据即可实现高性能增量学习。

authors_text: Grigorios G Chrysos,Bohan Wang,Jiankang Deng,Volkan Cevher
title: Regularization of polynomial networks for image recognition
title_zh: 用于图像识别的多项式网络正则化
abstract: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have obtained impressive performance across tasks, however they still remain as black boxes, e.g., hard to theoretically analyze. At the same time, Polynomial Networks (PNs) have emerged as an alternative method with a promising performance and improved interpretability but have yet to reach the performance of the powerful DNN baselines. In this work, we aim to close this performance gap. We introduce a class of PNs, which are able to reach the performance of ResNet across a range of six benchmarks. We demonstrate that strong regularization is critical and conduct an extensive study of the exact regularization schemes required to match performance. To further motivate the regularization schemes, we introduce D-PolyNets that achieve a higher-degree of expansion than previously proposed polynomial networks. D-PolyNets are more parameter-efficient while achieving a similar performance as other polynomial networks. We expect that our new models can lead to an understanding of the role of elementwise activation functions (which are no longer required for training PNs). The source code is available at https://github.com/grigorisg9gr/regularized_polynomials.
summary: Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have obtained impressive performance across tasks, however they still remain as black boxes, e.g., hard to theoretically analyze. At the same time, Polynomial Networks (PNs) have emerged as an alternative method with a promising performance and improved interpretability but have yet to reach the performance of the powerful DNN baselines. In this work, we aim to close this performance gap. We introduce a class of PNs, which are able to reach the performance of ResNet across a range of six benchmarks. We demonstrate that strong regularization is critical and conduct an extensive study of the exact regularization schemes required to match performance. To further motivate the regularization schemes, we introduce D-PolyNets that achieve a higher-degree of expansion than previously proposed polynomial networks. D-PolyNets are more parameter-efficient while achieving a similar performance as other polynomial networks. We expect that our new models can lead to an understanding of the role of elementwise activation functions (which are no longer required for training PNs). The source code is available at https://github.com/grigorisg9gr/regularized_polynomials.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）在跨任务方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能，但它们仍然是黑匣子，例如难以进行理论上分析。与此同时，多项式网络 (PN) 已成为一种替代方法，具有良好的性能和改进的可解释性，但尚未达到强大的 DNN 基线的性能。在这项工作中，我们的目标是缩小这种性能差距。我们引入了一类 PN，它能够在六个基准测试中达到 ResNet 的性能。我们证明强大的正则化至关重要，并对匹配性能所需的精确正则化方案进行了广泛的研究。为了进一步激发正则化方案，我们引入了 D-PolyNet，它比之前提出的多项式网络实现了更高程度的扩展。 D-PolyNet 的参数效率更高，同时实现了与其他多项式网络类似的性能。我们期望我们的新模型能够帮助人们理解元素激活函数（训练 PN 不再需要）的作用。源代码可在 https://github.com/grigorisg9gr/regularized_polynomials 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过正则化方法提升多项式网络（PNs）在图像识别任务中的性能，使其接近深度神经网络（DNNs）的基准水平。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络（DNNs）虽性能优异但缺乏可解释性，而多项式网络（PNs）虽更具解释性但性能不足，需通过正则化改进其表现。
AI.method: 提出新型多项式网络（PNs）并引入D-PolyNets结构，通过系统研究正则化方案提升模型性能，同时减少参数需求。
AI.result: 新模型在六个基准测试中达到ResNet的性能水平，D-PolyNets在保持性能的同时更参数高效。
AI.conclusion: 正则化对多项式网络性能关键，新模型有望推动对逐元素激活函数作用的理解。

tldr: 本文旨在通过正则化方法提升多项式网络（PNs）在图像识别任务中的性能，使其接近深度神经网络（DNNs）的基准水平。
motivation: 深度神经网络（DNNs）虽性能优异但缺乏可解释性，而多项式网络（PNs）虽更具解释性但性能不足，需通过正则化改进其表现。
method: 提出新型多项式网络（PNs）并引入D-PolyNets结构，通过系统研究正则化方案提升模型性能，同时减少参数需求。
result: 新模型在六个基准测试中达到ResNet的性能水平，D-PolyNets在保持性能的同时更参数高效。
conclusion: 正则化对多项式网络性能关键，新模型有望推动对逐元素激活函数作用的理解。
search_text: Regularization of polynomial networks for image recognition 用于图像识别的多项式网络正则化 Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) have obtained impressive performance across tasks, however they still remain as black boxes, e.g., hard to theoretically analyze. At the same time, Polynomial Networks (PNs) have emerged as an alternative method with a promising performance and improved interpretability but have yet to reach the performance of the powerful DNN baselines. In this work, we aim to close this performance gap. We introduce a class of PNs, which are able to reach the performance of ResNet across a range of six benchmarks. We demonstrate that strong regularization is critical and conduct an extensive study of the exact regularization schemes required to match performance. To further motivate the regularization schemes, we introduce D-PolyNets that achieve a higher-degree of expansion than previously proposed polynomial networks. D-PolyNets are more parameter-efficient while achieving a similar performance as other polynomial networks. We expect that our new models can lead to an understanding of the role of elementwise activation functions (which are no longer required for training PNs). The source code is available at https://github.com/grigorisg9gr/regularized_polynomials. 深度神经网络（DNN）在跨任务方面取得了令人印象深刻的性能，但它们仍然是黑匣子，例如难以进行理论上分析。与此同时，多项式网络 (PN) 已成为一种替代方法，具有良好的性能和改进的可解释性，但尚未达到强大的 DNN 基线的性能。在这项工作中，我们的目标是缩小这种性能差距。我们引入了一类 PN，它能够在六个基准测试中达到 ResNet 的性能。我们证明强大的正则化至关重要，并对匹配性能所需的精确正则化方案进行了广泛的研究。为了进一步激发正则化方案，我们引入了 D-PolyNet，它比之前提出的多项式网络实现了更高程度的扩展。 D-PolyNet 的参数效率更高，同时实现了与其他多项式网络类似的性能。我们期望我们的新模型能够帮助人们理解元素激活函数（训练 PN 不再需要）的作用。源代码可在 https://github.com/grigorisg9gr/regularized_polynomials 获取。 本文旨在通过正则化方法提升多项式网络（PNs）在图像识别任务中的性能，使其接近深度神经网络（DNNs）的基准水平。 Grigorios G Chrysos,Bohan Wang,Jiankang Deng,Volkan Cevher cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Petr Dvořáček,Petr Hurtik,Petra Števuliáková
title: Effective black box adversarial attack with handcrafted kernels
title_zh: 使用手工内核进行有效的黑盒对抗攻击
abstract: We propose a new, simple framework for crafting adversarial examples for black box attacks. The idea is to simulate the substitution model with a non-trainable model compounded of just one layer of handcrafted convolutional kernels and then train the generator neural network to maximize the distance of the outputs for the original and generated adversarial image. We show that fooling the prediction of the first layer causes the whole network to be fooled and decreases its accuracy on adversarial inputs. Moreover, we do not train the neural network to obtain the first convolutional layer kernels, but we create them using the technique of F-transform. Therefore, our method is very time and resource effective.
summary: We propose a new, simple framework for crafting adversarial examples for black box attacks. The idea is to simulate the substitution model with a non-trainable model compounded of just one layer of handcrafted convolutional kernels and then train the generator neural network to maximize the distance of the outputs for the original and generated adversarial image. We show that fooling the prediction of the first layer causes the whole network to be fooled and decreases its accuracy on adversarial inputs. Moreover, we do not train the neural network to obtain the first convolutional layer kernels, but we create them using the technique of F-transform. Therefore, our method is very time and resource effective.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新的、简单的框架，用于为黑盒攻击制作对抗性示例。这个想法是用仅由一层手工制作的卷积核组成的不可训练模型来模拟替代模型，然后训练生成器神经网络以最大化原始和生成的对抗图像的输出距离。我们证明，欺骗第一层的预测会导致整个网络被欺骗，并降低其对抗性输入的准确性。此外，我们没有训练神经网络来获得第一个卷积层内核，而是使用 F 变换技术来创建它们。因此，我们的方法非常节省时间和资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练的黑盒对抗攻击框架，通过手工设计卷积核生成对抗样本，显著提升攻击效率。
AI.motivation: 传统对抗攻击方法依赖训练模型或消耗大量计算资源，本文旨在开发一种更高效、无需训练的黑盒攻击方案。
AI.method: 构建由单层手工设计卷积核组成的非训练模型，利用F变换生成卷积核，并训练生成器最大化原始图像与对抗样本的输出差异。
AI.result: 实验表明，攻击第一层卷积核可导致整个网络预测错误，且方法在时间和资源消耗上优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过非训练模型实现高效黑盒攻击，验证了手工设计内核在对抗样本生成中的有效性。

authors_text: Haojie Zhao,Junsong Chen,Lijun Wang,Huchuan Lu
title: ARKitTrack: A New Diverse Dataset for Tracking Using Mobile RGB-D Data
title_zh: ARKitTrack：使用移动 RGB-D 数据进行跟踪的新多样化数据集
abstract: Compared with traditional RGB-only visual tracking, few datasets have been constructed for RGB-D tracking. In this paper, we propose ARKitTrack, a new RGB-D tracking dataset for both static and dynamic scenes captured by consumer-grade LiDAR scanners equipped on Apple's iPhone and iPad. ARKitTrack contains 300 RGB-D sequences, 455 targets, and 229.7K video frames in total. Along with the bounding box annotations and frame-level attributes, we also annotate this dataset with 123.9K pixel-level target masks. Besides, the camera intrinsic and camera pose of each frame are provided for future developments. To demonstrate the potential usefulness of this dataset, we further present a unified baseline for both box-level and pixel-level tracking, which integrates RGB features with bird's-eye-view representations to better explore cross-modality 3D geometry. In-depth empirical analysis has verified that the ARKitTrack dataset can significantly facilitate RGB-D tracking and that the proposed baseline method compares favorably against the state of the arts. The code and dataset is available at https://arkittrack.github.io.
summary: Compared with traditional RGB-only visual tracking, few datasets have been constructed for RGB-D tracking. In this paper, we propose ARKitTrack, a new RGB-D tracking dataset for both static and dynamic scenes captured by consumer-grade LiDAR scanners equipped on Apple's iPhone and iPad. ARKitTrack contains 300 RGB-D sequences, 455 targets, and 229.7K video frames in total. Along with the bounding box annotations and frame-level attributes, we also annotate this dataset with 123.9K pixel-level target masks. Besides, the camera intrinsic and camera pose of each frame are provided for future developments. To demonstrate the potential usefulness of this dataset, we further present a unified baseline for both box-level and pixel-level tracking, which integrates RGB features with bird's-eye-view representations to better explore cross-modality 3D geometry. In-depth empirical analysis has verified that the ARKitTrack dataset can significantly facilitate RGB-D tracking and that the proposed baseline method compares favorably against the state of the arts. The code and dataset is available at https://arkittrack.github.io.
abstract_zh: 与传统的仅 RGB 视觉跟踪相比，为 RGB-D 跟踪构建的数据集很少。在本文中，我们提出了 ARKitTrack，这是一种新的 RGB-D 跟踪数据集，适用于 Apple iPhone 和 iPad 上配备的消费级 LiDAR 扫描仪捕获的静态和动态场景。 ARKitTrack 总共包含 300 个 RGB-D 序列、455 个目标和 229.7K 视频帧。除了边界框注释和帧级属性之外，我们还使用 123.9K 像素级目标蒙版对该数据集进行注释。此外，还提供了每帧的相机内在和相机位姿以供未来开发。为了展示该数据集的潜在实用性，我们进一步为框级和像素级跟踪提供了统一的基线，它将 RGB 特征与鸟瞰图表示相结合，以更好地探索跨模态 3D 几何。深入的实证分析已经证实 ARKitTrack 数据集可以显着促进 RGB-D 跟踪，并且所提出的基线方法与现有技术相比具有优势。代码和数据集可在 https://arkittrack.github.io 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ARKitTrack数据集，包含300个RGB-D序列及像素级标注，用于推动基于移动设备LiDAR的RGB-D跟踪研究，并提供融合RGB与鸟瞰图表示的基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D跟踪数据集稀缺，且缺乏针对消费级LiDAR设备（如iPhone/iPad）的多样化场景覆盖，限制了相关算法的发展。
AI.method: 通过Apple设备LiDAR采集静态与动态场景数据，标注框级目标、像素级掩码及相机参数；提出结合RGB特征与鸟瞰图表示的跨模态3D几何跟踪基线方法。
AI.result: 实验验证该数据集显著提升RGB-D跟踪性能，所提基线方法在框级和像素级跟踪任务中优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ARKitTrack为RGB-D跟踪研究提供高质量数据支持，其基线方法证明了跨模态3D表征的有效性，代码与数据已开源。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ARKitTrack数据集，包含300个RGB-D序列及像素级标注，用于推动基于移动设备LiDAR的RGB-D跟踪研究，并提供融合RGB与鸟瞰图表示的基线方法。

authors_text: Carlos Hernandez-Olivan,Sonia Rubio Llamas,Jose R. Beltran
title: Symbolic Music Structure Analysis with Graph Representations and Changepoint Detection Methods
title_zh: 使用图形表示和变化点检测方法进行符号音乐结构分析
abstract: Music Structure Analysis is an open research task in Music Information Retrieval (MIR). In the past, there have been several works that attempt to segment music into the audio and symbolic domains, however, the identification and segmentation of the music structure at different levels is still an open research problem in this area. In this work we propose three methods, two of which are novel graph-based algorithms that aim to segment symbolic music by its form or structure: Norm, G-PELT and G-Window. We performed an ablation study with two public datasets that have different forms or structures in order to compare such methods varying their parameter values and comparing the performance against different music styles. We have found that encoding symbolic music with graph representations and computing the novelty of Adjacency Matrices obtained from graphs represent the structure of symbolic music pieces well without the need to extract features from it. We are able to detect the boundaries with an online unsupervised changepoint detection method with a F_1 of 0.5640 for a 1 bar tolerance in one of the public datasets that we used for testing our methods. We also provide the performance results of the algorithms at different levels of structure, high, medium and low, to show how the parameters of the proposed methods have to be adjusted depending on the level. We added the best performing method with its parameters for each structure level to musicaiz, an open source python package, to facilitate the reproducibility and usability of this work. We hope that this methods could be used to improve other MIR tasks such as music generation with structure, music classification or key changes detection.
summary: Music Structure Analysis is an open research task in Music Information Retrieval (MIR). In the past, there have been several works that attempt to segment music into the audio and symbolic domains, however, the identification and segmentation of the music structure at different levels is still an open research problem in this area. In this work we propose three methods, two of which are novel graph-based algorithms that aim to segment symbolic music by its form or structure: Norm, G-PELT and G-Window. We performed an ablation study with two public datasets that have different forms or structures in order to compare such methods varying their parameter values and comparing the performance against different music styles. We have found that encoding symbolic music with graph representations and computing the novelty of Adjacency Matrices obtained from graphs represent the structure of symbolic music pieces well without the need to extract features from it. We are able to detect the boundaries with an online unsupervised changepoint detection method with a F_1 of 0.5640 for a 1 bar tolerance in one of the public datasets that we used for testing our methods. We also provide the performance results of the algorithms at different levels of structure, high, medium and low, to show how the parameters of the proposed methods have to be adjusted depending on the level. We added the best performing method with its parameters for each structure level to musicaiz, an open source python package, to facilitate the reproducibility and usability of this work. We hope that this methods could be used to improve other MIR tasks such as music generation with structure, music classification or key changes detection.
abstract_zh: 音乐结构分析是音乐信息检索（MIR）领域的一项开放研究任务。过去，已经有一些工作试图将音乐分割为音频和符号域，然而，不同层次的音乐结构的识别和分割仍然是该领域的一个开放的研究问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了三种方法，其中两种是基于图的新颖算法，旨在通过其形式或结构来分割符号音乐：Norm、G-PELT 和 G-Window。我们对两个具有不同形式或结构的公共数据集进行了消融研究，以便比较这些改变参数值的方法，并比较不同音乐风格的性能。我们发现，用图表示对符号音乐进行编码并计算从图获得的邻接矩阵的新颖性可以很好地表示符号音乐片段的结构，而不需要从中提取特征。我们能够使用在线无监督变点检测方法来检测边界，在我们用于测试方法的公共数据集之一中，F_1 为 0.5640，公差为 1 条。我们还提供了算法在不同结构级别（高、中、低）下的性能结果，以显示所提出方法的参数如何根据级别进行调整。我们将性能最佳的方法及其每个结构级别的参数添加到开源 python 包 musicaiz 中，以促进这项工作的可重复性和可用性。我们希望这种方法可以用于改进其他 MIR 任务，例如具有结构的音乐生成、音乐分类或调性变化检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种方法（Norm、G-PELT、G-Window），利用图表示和变点检测技术对符号化音乐进行结构分析与分割。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐结构分析方法在不同层级的结构识别与分割上仍存在不足，需探索更有效的符号化音乐结构分析技术。
AI.method: 提出两种基于图的新型算法（G-PELT、G-Window）及Norm方法，通过图表示编码符号化音乐并计算邻接矩阵新颖性，结合在线无监督变点检测实现结构分割。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实现1小节容忍度下的F1值0.5640，验证了方法有效性，并按结构层级（高/中/低）提供参数调整建议。
AI.conclusion: 图表示结合变点检测可有效分析音乐结构，方法已集成至开源库musicaiz，有望提升音乐生成、分类等音乐信息检索任务性能。

search_text: Symbolic Music Structure Analysis with Graph Representations and Changepoint Detection Methods 使用图形表示和变化点检测方法进行符号音乐结构分析 Music Structure Analysis is an open research task in Music Information Retrieval (MIR). In the past, there have been several works that attempt to segment music into the audio and symbolic domains, however, the identification and segmentation of the music structure at different levels is still an open research problem in this area. In this work we propose three methods, two of which are novel graph-based algorithms that aim to segment symbolic music by its form or structure: Norm, G-PELT and G-Window. We performed an ablation study with two public datasets that have different forms or structures in order to compare such methods varying their parameter values and comparing the performance against different music styles. We have found that encoding symbolic music with graph representations and computing the novelty of Adjacency Matrices obtained from graphs represent the structure of symbolic music pieces well without the need to extract features from it. We are able to detect the boundaries with an online unsupervised changepoint detection method with a F_1 of 0.5640 for a 1 bar tolerance in one of the public datasets that we used for testing our methods. We also provide the performance results of the algorithms at different levels of structure, high, medium and low, to show how the parameters of the proposed methods have to be adjusted depending on the level. We added the best performing method with its parameters for each structure level to musicaiz, an open source python package, to facilitate the reproducibility and usability of this work. We hope that this methods could be used to improve other MIR tasks such as music generation with structure, music classification or key changes detection. 音乐结构分析是音乐信息检索（MIR）领域的一项开放研究任务。过去，已经有一些工作试图将音乐分割为音频和符号域，然而，不同层次的音乐结构的识别和分割仍然是该领域的一个开放的研究问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了三种方法，其中两种是基于图的新颖算法，旨在通过其形式或结构来分割符号音乐：Norm、G-PELT 和 G-Window。我们对两个具有不同形式或结构的公共数据集进行了消融研究，以便比较这些改变参数值的方法，并比较不同音乐风格的性能。我们发现，用图表示对符号音乐进行编码并计算从图获得的邻接矩阵的新颖性可以很好地表示符号音乐片段的结构，而不需要从中提取特征。我们能够使用在线无监督变点检测方法来检测边界，在我们用于测试方法的公共数据集之一中，F_1 为 0.5640，公差为 1 条。我们还提供了算法在不同结构级别（高、中、低）下的性能结果，以显示所提出方法的参数如何根据级别进行调整。我们将性能最佳的方法及其每个结构级别的参数添加到开源 python 包 musicaiz 中，以促进这项工作的可重复性和可用性。我们希望这种方法可以用于改进其他 MIR 任务，例如具有结构的音乐生成、音乐分类或调性变化检测。 本文提出三种方法（Norm、G-PELT、G-Window），利用图表示和变点检测技术对符号化音乐进行结构分析与分割。 Carlos Hernandez-Olivan,Sonia Rubio Llamas,Jose R. authors_text: WonJun Moon,Sangeek Hyun,SangUk Park,Dongchan Park,Jae-Pil Heo
title: Query-Dependent Video Representation for Moment Retrieval and Highlight Detection
title_zh: 用于时刻检索和亮点检测的查询相关视频表示
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/wjun0830/QD-DETR
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/wjun0830/QD-DETR
abstract: Recently, video moment retrieval and highlight detection (MR/HD) are being spotlighted as the demand for video understanding is drastically increased. The key objective of MR/HD is to localize the moment and estimate clip-wise accordance level, i.e., saliency score, to the given text query. Although the recent transformer-based models brought some advances, we found that these methods do not fully exploit the information of a given query. For example, the relevance between text query and video contents is sometimes neglected when predicting the moment and its saliency. To tackle this issue, we introduce Query-Dependent DETR (QD-DETR), a detection transformer tailored for MR/HD. As we observe the insignificant role of a given query in transformer architectures, our encoding module starts with cross-attention layers to explicitly inject the context of text query into video representation. Then, to enhance the model's capability of exploiting the query information, we manipulate the video-query pairs to produce irrelevant pairs. Such negative (irrelevant) video-query pairs are trained to yield low saliency scores, which in turn, encourages the model to estimate precise accordance between query-video pairs. Lastly, we present an input-adaptive saliency predictor which adaptively defines the criterion of saliency scores for the given video-query pairs. Our extensive studies verify the importance of building the query-dependent representation for MR/HD. Specifically, QD-DETR outperforms state-of-the-art methods on QVHighlights, TVSum, and Charades-STA datasets. Codes are available at github.com/wjun0830/QD-DETR.
summary: Recently, video moment retrieval and highlight detection (MR/HD) are being spotlighted as the demand for video understanding is drastically increased. The key objective of MR/HD is to localize the moment and estimate clip-wise accordance level, i.e., saliency score, to the given text query. Although the recent transformer-based models brought some advances, we found that these methods do not fully exploit the information of a given query. For example, the relevance between text query and video contents is sometimes neglected when predicting the moment and its saliency. To tackle this issue, we introduce Query-Dependent DETR (QD-DETR), a detection transformer tailored for MR/HD. As we observe the insignificant role of a given query in transformer architectures, our encoding module starts with cross-attention layers to explicitly inject the context of text query into video representation. Then, to enhance the model's capability of exploiting the query information, we manipulate the video-query pairs to produce irrelevant pairs. Such negative (irrelevant) video-query pairs are trained to yield low saliency scores, which in turn, encourages the model to estimate precise accordance between query-video pairs. Lastly, we present an input-adaptive saliency predictor which adaptively defines the criterion of saliency scores for the given video-query pairs. Our extensive studies verify the importance of building the query-dependent representation for MR/HD. Specifically, QD-DETR outperforms state-of-the-art methods on QVHighlights, TVSum, and Charades-STA datasets. Codes are available at github.com/wjun0830/QD-DETR.
abstract_zh: 最近，随着对视频理解的需求急剧增加，视频时刻检索和亮点检测（MR/HD）受到关注。 MR/HD 的主要目标是定位时刻并估计给定文本查询的剪辑一致性水平，即显着性分数。尽管最近基于变压器的模型带来了一些进步，但我们发现这些方法并没有充分利用给定查询的信息。例如，在预测时刻及其显着性时，文本查询和视频内容之间的相关性有时会被忽略。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了查询相关的 DETR (QD-DETR)，这是一种专为 MR/HD 定制的检测转换器。当我们观察到给定查询在 Transformer 架构中的微不足道的作用时，我们的编码模块从交叉注意层开始，将文本查询的上下文显式注入视频表示中。然后，为了增强模型利用查询信息的能力，我们操纵视频查询对来生成不相关的对。这种负面（不相关）的视频查询对经过训练以产生低显着性分数，这反过来又鼓励模型估计查询视频对之间的精确一致性。最后，我们提出了一个输入自适应显着性预测器，它自适应地定义给定视频查询对的显着性分数标准。我们的广泛研究验证了为 MR/HD 构建查询相关表示的重要性。具体来说，QD-DETR 在 QVHighlights、TVSum 和 Charades-STA 数据集上的性能优于最先进的方法。代码可在 github.com/wjun0830/QD-DETR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于查询依赖的视频表示方法，用于视频时刻检索和高亮检测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的模型未能充分挖掘查询文本与视频内容的相关性，导致时刻定位和显著性评分不够精准。
AI.method: 设计Query-Dependent DETR（QD-DETR）架构，通过交叉注意力层注入查询上下文，并引入负样本训练机制与自适应显著性预测模块。
AI.result: 在QVHighlights、TVSum和Charades-STA数据集上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 构建查询依赖的视频表征对提升时刻检索和高亮检测性能具有关键作用。

authors_text: Rui Chen,Yongwei Chen,Ningxin Jiao,Kui Jia
title: Fantasia3D: Disentangling Geometry and Appearance for High-quality Text-to-3D Content Creation
title_zh: Fantasia3D：解开几何和外观以创建高质量的文本到 3D 内容
comment: Accepted by ICCV 2023. Project page: https://fantasia3d.github.io/
comments: Accepted by ICCV 2023. Project page: https://fantasia3d.github.io/
abstract: Automatic 3D content creation has achieved rapid progress recently due to the availability of pre-trained, large language models and image diffusion models, forming the emerging topic of text-to-3D content creation. Existing text-to-3D methods commonly use implicit scene representations, which couple the geometry and appearance via volume rendering and are suboptimal in terms of recovering finer geometries and achieving photorealistic rendering; consequently, they are less effective for generating high-quality 3D assets. In this work, we propose a new method of Fantasia3D for high-quality text-to-3D content creation. Key to Fantasia3D is the disentangled modeling and learning of geometry and appearance. For geometry learning, we rely on a hybrid scene representation, and propose to encode surface normal extracted from the representation as the input of the image diffusion model. For appearance modeling, we introduce the spatially varying bidirectional reflectance distribution function (BRDF) into the text-to-3D task, and learn the surface material for photorealistic rendering of the generated surface. Our disentangled framework is more compatible with popular graphics engines, supporting relighting, editing, and physical simulation of the generated 3D assets. We conduct thorough experiments that show the advantages of our method over existing ones under different text-to-3D task settings. Project page and source codes: https://fantasia3d.github.io/.

Our disentangled framework is more compatible with popular graphics engines, supporting relighting, editing, and physical simulation of the generated 3D assets. We conduct thorough experiments that show the advantages of our method over existing ones under different text-to-3D task settings. Project page and source codes: https://fantasia3d.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 由于预训练的大型语言模型和图像扩散模型的出现，自动 3D 内容创建最近取得了快速进展，形成了文本到 3D 内容创建的新兴主题。现有的文本转 3D 方法通常使用隐式场景表示，它通过体积渲染将几何图形和外观耦合在一起，并且在恢复更精细的几何图形和实现照片级真实感渲染方面并不是最优的；因此，它们生成高质量 3D 资产的效率较低。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 Fantasia3D 方法，用于创建高质量的文本到 3D 内容。 Fantasia3D 的关键是几何和外观的解开建模和学习。对于几何学习，我们依赖于混合场景表示，并建议将从表示中提取的表面法线编码为图像扩散模型的输入。对于外观建模，我们将空间变化的双向反射分布函数 (BRDF) 引入到文本转 3D 任务中，并学习表面材质以对生成的表面进行真实感渲染。我们的解开框架与流行的图形引擎更加兼容，支持生成的 3D 资源的重新照明、编辑和物理模拟。我们进行了彻底的实验，证明了我们的方法在不同的文本到 3D 任务设置下相对于现有方法的优势。项目页面和源代码：https://fantasia3d.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fantasia3D方法，通过解耦几何与外观建模，实现高质量文本到3D内容生成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到3D方法因几何与外观耦合，难以恢复精细几何结构和实现逼真渲染，导致生成质量不足。
AI.method: 采用混合场景表示学习几何，将表面法线编码为图像扩散模型输入；引入空间可变BRDF建模外观，实现材质学习与真实感渲染。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在不同文本到3D任务设置下均优于现有方法，支持重光照、编辑和物理模拟。
AI.conclusion: 解耦框架提升了3D生成质量与兼容性，为高质量资产创建提供了新思路。

search_text: Fantasia3D: Disentangling Geometry and Appearance for High-quality Text-to-3D Content Creation Fantasia3D：解开几何和外观以创建高质量的文本到 3D 内容 Automatic 3D content creation has achieved rapid progress recently due to the availability of pre-trained, large language models and image diffusion models, forming the emerging topic of text-to-3D content creation. Existing text-to-3D methods commonly use implicit scene representations, which couple the geometry and appearance via volume rendering and are suboptimal in terms of recovering finer geometries and achieving photorealistic rendering; consequently, they are less effective for generating high-quality 3D assets. In this work, we propose a new method of Fantasia3D for high-quality text-to-3D content creation. Key to Fantasia3D is the disentangled modeling and learning of geometry and appearance. For geometry learning, we rely on a hybrid scene representation, and propose to encode surface normal extracted from the representation as the input of the image diffusion model. For appearance modeling, we introduce the spatially varying bidirectional reflectance distribution function (BRDF) into the text-to-3D task, and learn the surface material for photorealistic rendering of the generated surface. Our disentangled framework is more compatible with popular graphics engines, supporting relighting, editing, and physical simulation of the generated 3D assets. We conduct thorough experiments that show the advantages of our method over existing ones under different text-to-3D task settings. Project page and source codes: https://fantasia3d.github.io/. 由于预训练的大型语言模型和图像扩散模型的出现，自动 3D 内容创建最近取得了快速进展，形成了文本到 3D 内容创建的新兴主题。现有的文本转 3D 方法通常使用隐式场景表示，它通过体积渲染将几何图形和外观耦合在一起，并且在恢复更精细的几何图形和实现照片级真实感渲染方面并不是最优的；因此，它们生成高质量 3D 资产的效率较低。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新的 Fantasia3D 方法，用于创建高质量的文本到 3D 内容。 Fantasia3D 的关键是几何和外观的解开建模和学习。对于几何学习，我们依赖于混合场景表示，并建议将从表示中提取的表面法线编码为图像扩散模型的输入。对于外观建模，我们将空间变化的双向反射分布函数 (BRDF) 引入到文本转 3D 任务中，并学习表面材质以对生成的表面进行真实感渲染。我们的解开框架与流行的图形引擎更加兼容，支持生成的 3D 资源的重新照明、编辑和物理模拟。我们进行了彻底的实验，证明了我们的方法在不同的文本到 3D 任务设置下相对于现有方法的优势。项目页面和源代码：https://fantasia3d.github.io/。 本文提出Fantasia3D方法，通过解耦几何与外观建模，实现高质量文本到3D内容生成。 Rui Chen,Yongwei Chen,Ningxin Jiao,Kui Jia cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Wei Xingxing,Yu Jie,Huang Yao
title: Physically Adversarial Infrared Patches with Learnable Shapes and Locations
title_zh: 具有可学习形状和位置的物理对抗性红外贴片
abstract: Owing to the extensive application of infrared object detectors in the safety-critical tasks, it is necessary to evaluate their robustness against adversarial examples in the real world. However, current few physical infrared attacks are complicated to implement in practical application because of their complex transformation from digital world to physical world. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a physically feasible infrared attack method called "adversarial infrared patches". Considering the imaging mechanism of infrared cameras by capturing objects' thermal radiation, adversarial infrared patches conduct attacks by attaching a patch of thermal insulation materials on the target object to manipulate its thermal distribution. To enhance adversarial attacks, we present a novel aggregation regularization to guide the simultaneous learning for the patch' shape and location on the target object. Thus, a simple gradient-based optimization can be adapted to solve for them. We verify adversarial infrared patches in different object detection tasks with various object detectors. Experimental results show that our method achieves more than 90\% Attack Success Rate (ASR) versus the pedestrian detector and vehicle detector in the physical environment, where the objects are captured in different angles, distances, postures, and scenes. More importantly, adversarial infrared patch is easy to implement, and it only needs 0.5 hours to be constructed in the physical world, which verifies its effectiveness and efficiency.
summary: Owing to the extensive application of infrared object detectors in the safety-critical tasks, it is necessary to evaluate their robustness against adversarial examples in the real world. However, current few physical infrared attacks are complicated to implement in practical application because of their complex transformation from digital world to physical world. To address this issue, in this paper, we propose a physically feasible infrared attack method called "adversarial infrared patches". Considering the imaging mechanism of infrared cameras by capturing objects' thermal radiation, adversarial infrared patches conduct attacks by attaching a patch of thermal insulation materials on the target object to manipulate its thermal distribution. To enhance adversarial attacks, we present a novel aggregation regularization to guide the simultaneous learning for the patch' shape and location on the target object. Thus, a simple gradient-based optimization can be adapted to solve for them. We verify adversarial infrared patches in different object detection tasks with various object detectors. Experimental results show that our method achieves more than 90\% Attack Success Rate (ASR) versus the pedestrian detector and vehicle detector in the physical environment, where the objects are captured in different angles, distances, postures, and scenes. More importantly, adversarial infrared patch is easy to implement, and it only needs 0.5 hours to be constructed in the physical world, which verifies its effectiveness and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 由于红外物体探测器在安全关键任务中的广泛应用，有必要评估其针对现实世界中的对抗性示例的鲁棒性。然而，目前为数不多的物理红外攻击由于其从数字世界到物理世界的复杂转换，在实际应用中实施起来很复杂。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们提出了一种物理上可行的红外攻击方法，称为“对抗性红外补丁”。考虑到红外摄像机通过捕获物体热辐射的成像机制，对抗性红外贴片通过在目标物体上附着一块隔热材料来操纵其热分布来进行攻击。为了增强对抗性攻击，我们提出了一种新颖的聚合正则化来指导同时学习目标对象上的补丁形状和位置。因此，可以采用简单的基于梯度的优化来解决它们。我们使用各种物体检测器验证不同物体检测任务中的对抗性红外补丁。实验结果表明，与物理环境中以不同角度、距离、姿势和场景捕获物体的行人检测器和车辆检测器相比，我们的方法实现了超过 90% 的攻击成功率（ASR）。更重要的是，对抗性红外贴片易于实现，在物理世界中仅需0.5小时即可构建，验证了其有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种物理可行的红外对抗攻击方法，通过可学习形状和位置的热绝缘材料补丁干扰红外检测器。
AI.motivation: 现有物理红外攻击因数字到物理的转换复杂难以实施，需开发更高效且易实现的对抗方法以评估红外检测系统的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计热绝缘材料补丁改变目标热分布，结合聚合正则化同步优化补丁形状与位置，采用梯度优化方法生成攻击样本。
AI.result: 在物理环境中对行人和车辆检测器的攻击成功率超90%，补丁构建仅需0.5小时，验证了方法的有效性与高效性。
AI.conclusion: 对抗红外补丁方法在保持高攻击成功率的同时显著降低实施难度，为物理安全攻击研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Yi Lin,Yufan Chen,Kwang-Ting Cheng,Hao Chen
title: Few Shot Medical Image Segmentation with Cross Attention Transformer
title_zh: 使用交叉注意力变压器进行少镜头医学图像分割
abstract: Medical image segmentation has made significant progress in recent years. Deep learning-based methods are recognized as data-hungry techniques, requiring large amounts of data with manual annotations. However, manual annotation is expensive in the field of medical image analysis, which requires domain-specific expertise. To address this challenge, few-shot learning has the potential to learn new classes from only a few examples. In this work, we propose a novel framework for few-shot medical image segmentation, termed CAT-Net, based on cross masked attention Transformer. Our proposed network mines the correlations between the support image and query image, limiting them to focus only on useful foreground information and boosting the representation capacity of both the support prototype and query features. We further design an iterative refinement framework that refines the query image segmentation iteratively and promotes the support feature in turn. We validated the proposed method on three public datasets: Abd-CT, Abd-MRI, and Card-MRI. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our method compared to state-of-the-art methods and the effectiveness of each component. Code: https://github.com/hust-linyi/CAT-Net.
summary: Medical image segmentation has made significant progress in recent years. Deep learning-based methods are recognized as data-hungry techniques, requiring large amounts of data with manual annotations. However, manual annotation is expensive in the field of medical image analysis, which requires domain-specific expertise. To address this challenge, few-shot learning has the potential to learn new classes from only a few examples. In this work, we propose a novel framework for few-shot medical image segmentation, termed CAT-Net, based on cross masked attention Transformer. Our proposed network mines the correlations between the support image and query image, limiting them to focus only on useful foreground information and boosting the representation capacity of both the support prototype and query features. We further design an iterative refinement framework that refines the query image segmentation iteratively and promotes the support feature in turn. We validated the proposed method on three public datasets: Abd-CT, Abd-MRI, and Card-MRI. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our method compared to state-of-the-art methods and the effectiveness of each component. Code: https://github.com/hust-linyi/CAT-Net.
abstract_zh: 近年来，医学图像分割取得了重大进展。基于深度学习的方法被认为是数据密集型技术，需要大量数据和手动注释。然而，在医学图像分析领域，手动注释成本高昂，需要特定领域的专业知识。为了应对这一挑战，小样本学习有可能仅从几个例子中学习新的类。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于交叉屏蔽注意力变压器的少镜头医学图像分割的新颖框架，称为 CAT-Net。我们提出的网络挖掘支持图像和查询图像之间的相关性，限制它们仅关注有用的前景信息，并提高支持原型和查询特征的表示能力。我们进一步设计了一个迭代细化框架，迭代地细化查询图像分割并依次提升支持功能。我们在三个公共数据集上验证了所提出的方法：Abd-CT、Abd-MRI 和 Card-MRI。实验结果证明了我们的方法与最先进的方法相比具有优越的性能以及每个组件的有效性。代码：https://github.com/hust-linyi/CAT-Net。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于交叉注意力Transformer的少样本医学图像分割框架CAT-Net，解决医学图像标注成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割依赖大量标注数据，但手动标注成本高昂且耗时，少样本学习可通过少量样本实现新类别学习，具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 设计CAT-Net框架，利用交叉掩码注意力机制挖掘支持图像与查询图像的前景关联，结合迭代优化框架增强特征表示能力。
AI.result: 在Abd-CT、Abd-MRI和Card-MRI三个数据集上验证，优于现有最先进方法，证明各组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: CAT-Net通过交叉注意力机制和迭代优化有效提升少样本医学图像分割性能，代码已开源。

search_text: Few Shot Medical Image Segmentation with Cross Attention Transformer 使用交叉注意力变压器进行少镜头医学图像分割 Medical image segmentation has made significant progress in recent years. Deep learning-based methods are recognized as data-hungry techniques, requiring large amounts of data with manual annotations. However, manual annotation is expensive in the field of medical image analysis, which requires domain-specific expertise. To address this challenge, few-shot learning has the potential to learn new classes from only a few examples. In this work, we propose a novel framework for few-shot medical image segmentation, termed CAT-Net, based on cross masked attention Transformer. Our proposed network mines the correlations between the support image and query image, limiting them to focus only on useful foreground information and boosting the representation capacity of both the support prototype and query features. We further design an iterative refinement framework that refines the query image segmentation iteratively and promotes the support feature in turn. We validated the proposed method on three public datasets: Abd-CT, Abd-MRI, and Card-MRI. Experimental results demonstrate the superior performance of our method compared to state-of-the-art methods and the effectiveness of each component. Code: https://github.com/hust-linyi/CAT-Net. 近年来，医学图像分割取得了重大进展。基于深度学习的方法被认为是数据密集型技术，需要大量数据和手动注释。然而，在医学图像分析领域，手动注释成本高昂，需要特定领域的专业知识。为了应对这一挑战，小样本学习有可能仅从几个例子中学习新的类。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于交叉屏蔽注意力变压器的少镜头医学图像分割的新颖框架，称为 CAT-Net。我们提出的网络挖掘支持图像和查询图像之间的相关性，限制它们仅关注有用的前景信息，并提高支持原型和查询特征的表示能力。我们进一步设计了一个迭代细化框架，迭代地细化查询图像分割并依次提升支持功能。我们在三个公共数据集上验证了所提出的方法：Abd-CT、Abd-MRI 和 Card-MRI。实验结果证明了我们的方法与最先进的方法相比具有优越的性能以及每个组件的有效性。代码：https://github.com/hust-linyi/CAT-Net。 本文提出一种基于交叉注意力Transformer的少样本医学图像分割框架CAT-Net，解决医学图像标注成本高的问题。 Yi Lin,Yufan Chen,Kwang-Ting Cheng,Hao Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Sibi C. Sethuraman,Gaurav R. Tadkapally,Saraju P. Mohanty,Gautam Galada,Anitha Subramanian
title: MagicEye: An Intelligent Wearable Towards Independent Living of Visually Impaired
title_zh: MagicEye：为视障人士独立生活打造的智能穿戴设备
abstract: Individuals with visual impairments often face a multitude of challenging obstacles in their daily lives. Vision impairment can severely impair a person's ability to work, navigate, and retain independence. This can result in educational limits, a higher risk of accidents, and a plethora of other issues. To address these challenges, we present MagicEye, a state-of-the-art intelligent wearable device designed to assist visually impaired individuals. MagicEye employs a custom-trained CNN-based object detection model, capable of recognizing a wide range of indoor and outdoor objects frequently encountered in daily life. With a total of 35 classes, the neural network employed by MagicEye has been specifically designed to achieve high levels of efficiency and precision in object detection. The device is also equipped with facial recognition and currency identification modules, providing invaluable assistance to the visually impaired. In addition, MagicEye features a GPS sensor for navigation, allowing users to move about with ease, as well as a proximity sensor for detecting nearby objects without physical contact. In summary, MagicEye is an innovative and highly advanced wearable device that has been designed to address the many challenges faced by individuals with visual impairments. It is equipped with state-of-the-art object detection and navigation capabilities that are tailored to the needs of the visually impaired, making it one of the most promising solutions to assist those who are struggling with visual impairments.
summary: Individuals with visual impairments often face a multitude of challenging obstacles in their daily lives. In addition, MagicEye features a GPS sensor for navigation, allowing users to move about with ease, as well as a proximity sensor for detecting nearby objects without physical contact. In summary, MagicEye is an innovative and highly advanced wearable device that has been designed to address the many challenges faced by individuals with visual impairments. It is equipped with state-of-the-art object detection and navigation capabilities that are tailored to the needs of the visually impaired, making it one of the most promising solutions to assist those who are struggling with visual impairments.
abstract_zh: 有视力障碍的人在日常生活中经常面临许多具有挑战性的障碍。视力障碍会严重损害一个人的工作、导航和保持独立的能力。这可能会导致教育限制、更高的事故风险以及大量其他问题。为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 MagicEye，这是一款最先进的智能可穿戴设备，旨在帮助视障人士。 MagicEye 采用定制训练的基于 CNN 的物体检测模型，能够识别日常生活中经常遇到的各种室内和室外物体。 MagicEye 采用的神经网络共有 35 个类别，经过专门设计，可实现高水平的目标检测效率和精度。该设备还配备了面部识别和货币识别模块，为视障人士提供宝贵的帮助。此外，MagicEye 还配备了用于导航的 GPS 传感器，让用户可以轻松移动，还配备了近距离传感器，无需物理接触即可检测附近的物体。总之，MagicEye 是一款创新且非常先进的可穿戴设备，旨在解决视力障碍人士面临的许多挑战。它配备了最先进的物体检测和导航功能，专为满足视障人士的需求而定制，使其成为帮助视障人士最有前途的解决方案之一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MagicEye的智能可穿戴设备，旨在帮助视障人士提高独立生活能力。
AI.motivation: 视障人士在日常生活中面临导航、工作和独立性的诸多挑战，现有解决方案存在不足，需开发更高效的辅助设备。
AI.method: 基于定制训练的卷积神经网络（CNN）目标检测模型，结合人脸识别、货币识别、GPS导航及接近传感器模块，实现高效精准的环境感知与导航。
AI.result: MagicEye成功识别35类常见室内外物体，具备高精度检测能力，并通过多模块协同提升视障用户的自主行动与安全水平。
AI.conclusion: MagicEye作为创新性可穿戴设备，为视障人士提供了先进的物体识别与导航解决方案，具有重要的应用前景。

authors_text: Hao Chen,Linyan Li,Fan Lyu,Fuyuan Hu,Zhenping Xia,Fenglei Xu
title: Two-level Graph Network for Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning
title_zh: 用于少样本类增量学习的两级图网络
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.06953 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.06953 by other authors
abstract: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) aims to design machine learning algorithms that can continually learn new concepts from a few data points, without forgetting knowledge of old classes. The difficulty lies in that limited data from new classes not only lead to significant overfitting issues but also exacerbates the notorious catastrophic forgetting problems. However, existing FSCIL methods ignore the semantic relationships between sample-level and class-level. % Using the advantage that graph neural network (GNN) can mine rich information among few samples, In this paper, we designed a two-level graph network for FSCIL named Sample-level and Class-level Graph Neural Network (SCGN). Specifically, a pseudo incremental learning paradigm is designed in SCGN, which synthesizes virtual few-shot tasks as new tasks to optimize SCGN model parameters in advance. Sample-level graph network uses the relationship of a few samples to aggregate similar samples and obtains refined class-level features. Class-level graph network aims to mitigate the semantic conflict between prototype features of new classes and old classes. SCGN builds two-level graph networks to guarantee the latent semantic of each few-shot class can be effectively represented in FSCIL. Experiments on three popular benchmark datasets show that our method significantly outperforms the baselines and sets new state-of-the-art results with remarkable advantages.
summary: Few-shot class-incremental learning (FSCIL) aims to design machine learning algorithms that can continually learn new concepts from a few data points, without forgetting knowledge of old classes. The difficulty lies in that limited data from new classes not only lead to significant overfitting issues but also exacerbates the notorious catastrophic forgetting problems. However, existing FSCIL methods ignore the semantic relationships between sample-level and class-level. % Using the advantage that graph neural network (GNN) can mine rich information among few samples, In this paper, we designed a two-level graph network for FSCIL named Sample-level and Class-level Graph Neural Network (SCGN). Specifically, a pseudo incremental learning paradigm is designed in SCGN, which synthesizes virtual few-shot tasks as new tasks to optimize SCGN model parameters in advance. Sample-level graph network uses the relationship of a few samples to aggregate similar samples and obtains refined class-level features. Class-level graph network aims to mitigate the semantic conflict between prototype features of new classes and old classes. SCGN builds two-level graph networks to guarantee the latent semantic of each few-shot class can be effectively represented in FSCIL. Experiments on three popular benchmark datasets show that our method significantly outperforms the baselines and sets new state-of-the-art results with remarkable advantages.
abstract_zh: 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）旨在设计机器学习算法，可以从几个数据点不断学习新概念，而不会忘记旧类的知识。困难在于，来自新类别的有限数据不仅会导致严重的过度拟合问题，还会加剧臭名昭著的灾难性遗忘问题。然而，现有的 FSCIL 方法忽略了样本级别和类级别之间的语义关系。利用图神经网络（GNN）可以在少量样本中挖掘丰富信息的优势，本文为FSCIL设计了一种两级图网络，称为样本级和类级图神经网络（SCGN）。具体来说，SCGN中设计了伪增量学习范式，将虚拟的few-shot任务合成为新任务来提前优化SCGN模型参数。样本级图网络利用少数样本的关系来聚合相似样本并获得细化的类级特征。类级图网络旨在减轻新类和旧类原型特征之间的语义冲突。 SCGN 构建了两级图网络，以保证每个少样本类的潜在语义可以在 FSCIL 中有效表示。对三个流行基准数据集的实验表明，我们的方法显着优于基线，并设置了具有显着优势的新的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于少样本类增量学习的双层图网络（SCGN），以解决新类样本有限导致的过拟合和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本类增量学习方法忽视了样本级与类级之间的语义关系，导致新类特征与旧类原型冲突，加剧了过拟合和灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.method: 设计包含样本级图网络和类级图网络的SCGN框架，通过生成虚拟任务优化模型参数，利用样本关系聚合特征并缓解新旧类语义冲突。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，取得了新的最先进结果。
AI.conclusion: 双层图网络有效捕捉了少样本类增量学习中的语义关系，提升了模型对新类的适应能力与泛化性能。

However, existing FSCIL methods ignore the semantic relationships between sample-level and class-level. % Using the advantage that graph neural network (GNN) can mine rich information among few samples, In this paper, we designed a two-level graph network for FSCIL named Sample-level and Class-level Graph Neural Network (SCGN). Specifically, a pseudo incremental learning paradigm is designed in SCGN, which synthesizes virtual few-shot tasks as new tasks to optimize SCGN model parameters in advance. Sample-level graph network uses the relationship of a few samples to aggregate similar samples and obtains refined class-level features. Class-level graph network aims to mitigate the semantic conflict between prototype features of new classes and old classes. SCGN builds two-level graph networks to guarantee the latent semantic of each few-shot class can be effectively represented in FSCIL. Experiments on three popular benchmark datasets show that our method significantly outperforms the baselines and sets new state-of-the-art results with remarkable advantages. 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）旨在设计机器学习算法，可以从几个数据点不断学习新概念，而不会忘记旧类的知识。困难在于，来自新类别的有限数据不仅会导致严重的过度拟合问题，还会加剧臭名昭著的灾难性遗忘问题。然而，现有的 FSCIL 方法忽略了样本级别和类级别之间的语义关系。利用图神经网络（GNN）可以在少量样本中挖掘丰富信息的优势，本文为FSCIL设计了一种两级图网络，称为样本级和类级图神经网络（SCGN）。具体来说，SCGN中设计了伪增量学习范式，将虚拟的few-shot任务合成为新任务来提前优化SCGN模型参数。样本级图网络利用少数样本的关系来聚合相似样本并获得细化的类级特征。类级图网络旨在减轻新类和旧类原型特征之间的语义冲突。 SCGN 构建了两级图网络，以保证每个少样本类的潜在语义可以在 FSCIL 中有效表示。对三个流行基准数据集的实验表明，我们的方法显着优于基线，并设置了具有显着优势的新的最先进结果。 本文提出了一种用于少样本类增量学习的双层图网络（SCGN），以解决新类样本有限导致的过拟合和灾难性遗忘问题。 Hao Chen,Linyan Li,Fan Lyu,Fuyuan Hu,Zhenping Xia,Fenglei Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Xinhui Huang,Chunyi Li,Abdelhak Bentaleb,Roger Zimmermann,Guangtao Zhai
title: XGC-VQA: A unified video quality assessment model for User, Professionally, and Occupationally-Generated Content
title_zh: XGC-VQA：针对用户、专业和职业生成内容的统一视频质量评估模型
abstract: With the rapid growth of Internet video data amounts and types, a unified Video Quality Assessment (VQA) is needed to inspire video communication with perceptual quality. To meet the real-time and universal requirements in providing such inspiration, this study proposes a VQA model from a classification of User Generated Content (UGC), Professionally Generated Content (PGC), and Occupationally Generated Content (OGC). In the time domain, this study utilizes non-uniform sampling, as each content type has varying temporal importance based on its perceptual quality. In the spatial domain, centralized downsampling is performed before the VQA process by utilizing a patch splicing/sampling mechanism to lower complexity for real-time assessment. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a median correlation of $0.7$ while limiting the computation time below 5s for three content types, which ensures that the communication experience of UGC, PGC, and OGC can be optimized altogether.
summary: With the rapid growth of Internet video data amounts and types, a unified Video Quality Assessment (VQA) is needed to inspire video communication with perceptual quality. To meet the real-time and universal requirements in providing such inspiration, this study proposes a VQA model from a classification of User Generated Content (UGC), Professionally Generated Content (PGC), and Occupationally Generated Content (OGC). In the time domain, this study utilizes non-uniform sampling, as each content type has varying temporal importance based on its perceptual quality. In the spatial domain, centralized downsampling is performed before the VQA process by utilizing a patch splicing/sampling mechanism to lower complexity for real-time assessment. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves a median correlation of $0.7$ while limiting the computation time below 5s for three content types, which ensures that the communication experience of UGC, PGC, and OGC can be optimized altogether.
abstract_zh: 随着互联网视频数据量和类型的快速增长，需要统一的视频质量评估（VQA）来激发感知质量的视频通信。为了满足提供这种灵感的实时性和通用性要求，本研究从用户生成内容（UGC）、专业生成内容（PGC）和职业生成内容（OGC）的分类提出了VQA模型。在时域中，本研究采用非均匀采样，因为每种内容类型根据其感知质量具有不同的时间重要性。在空间域中，利用补丁拼接/采样机制在VQA过程之前进行集中下采样，以降低实时评估的复杂度。实验结果表明，该方法实现了 0.7 美元的中值相关性，同时将三种内容类型的计算时间限制在 5 秒以下，这确保了 UGC、PGC 和 OGC 的通信体验能够得到优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的视频质量评估模型XGC-VQA，用于用户生成内容（UGC）、专业生成内容（PGC）和职业生成内容（OGC）的实时质量评估。
AI.motivation: 随着互联网视频数据量和类型的快速增长，需要一种能够实时、普适地评估视频感知质量的统一模型，以优化不同内容类型的通信体验。
AI.method: 在时域采用非均匀采样以适应不同内容类型的时序重要性差异，在空域通过块拼接/采样机制进行集中下采样以降低计算复杂度，实现实时评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在三种内容类型上的中位数相关系数达到0.7，且计算时间均控制在5秒以内。
AI.conclusion: XGC-VQA模型通过时空域优化策略，在保证评估精度的同时实现了跨内容类型的实时视频质量评估，有效提升了通信体验。

authors_text: Pengyuan Zhou
title: Unleashing GPT on the Metaverse: Savior or Destroyer?
title_zh: 在元宇宙上释放 GPT：救世主还是毁灭者？
abstract: Incorporating artificial intelligence (AI) technology, particularly large language models (LLMs), is becoming increasingly vital for developing immersive and interactive metaverse experiences. GPT, a representative LLM developed by OpenAI, is leading LLM development and gaining attention for its potential in building the metaverse. The article delves into the pros and cons of utilizing GPT for metaverse-based education, entertainment, personalization, and support. Dynamic and personalized experiences are possible with this technology, but there are also legitimate privacy, bias, and ethical issues to consider. This article aims to help readers understand the possible influence of GPT, according to its unique technological advantages, on the metaverse and how it may be used to effectively create a more immersive and engaging virtual environment by evaluating these opportunities and obstacles.
summary: Incorporating artificial intelligence (AI) technology, particularly large language models (LLMs), is becoming increasingly vital for developing immersive and interactive metaverse experiences. GPT, a representative LLM developed by OpenAI, is leading LLM development and gaining attention for its potential in building the metaverse. The article delves into the pros and cons of utilizing GPT for metaverse-based education, entertainment, personalization, and support. Dynamic and personalized experiences are possible with this technology, but there are also legitimate privacy, bias, and ethical issues to consider. This article aims to help readers understand the possible influence of GPT, according to its unique technological advantages, on the metaverse and how it may be used to effectively create a more immersive and engaging virtual environment by evaluating these opportunities and obstacles.
abstract_zh: 结合人工智能 (AI) 技术，特别是大型语言模型 (LLM)，对于开发沉浸式和交互式元宇宙体验变得越来越重要。 GPT是OpenAI开发的具有代表性的LLM，引领LLM的发展，并因其在构建元宇宙方面的潜力而受到关注。本文深入探讨了利用 GPT 进行基于元宇宙的教育、娱乐、个性化和支持的利弊。这项技术可以实现动态和个性化的体验，但也需要考虑合法的隐私、偏见和道德问题。本文旨在通过评估这些机会和障碍，帮助读者了解 GPT 以其独特的技术优势对虚拟宇宙可能产生的影响，以及如何利用它来有效地创建一个更加身临其境、更具吸引力的虚拟环境。

AI.tldr: 分析GPT技术在元宇宙中的应用潜力及其可能带来的影响，探讨其作为救世主或毁灭者的双重角色。
AI.motivation: 随着元宇宙发展对AI技术依赖加深，需评估GPT等大语言模型在提升沉浸体验的同时可能引发的隐私、伦理等问题。
AI.method: 通过梳理GPT技术特性，结合元宇宙场景需求，系统分析其在教育、娱乐等领域的应用优势与潜在风险。
AI.result: GPT可推动元宇宙实现个性化交互，但存在数据隐私泄露、算法偏见及伦理争议等挑战需警惕。
AI.conclusion: 应充分发挥GPT技术优势，同时建立伦理规范与技术防护机制，以实现元宇宙的可持续发展。

authors_text: Baixin Xu,Jiarui Zhang,Kwan-Yee Lin,Chen Qian,Ying He
title: Deformable Model-Driven Neural Rendering for High-Fidelity 3D Reconstruction of Human Heads Under Low-View Settings
title_zh: 可变形模型驱动的神经渲染，用于低视角设置下人体头部的高保真 3D 重建
comment: Accepted by ICCV2023. Visit our project page at https://github.com/xubaixinxbx/3dheads
comments: Accepted by ICCV2023. Visit our project page at https://github.com/xubaixinxbx/3dheads
abstract: Reconstructing 3D human heads in low-view settings presents technical challenges, mainly due to the pronounced risk of overfitting with limited views and high-frequency signals. To address this, we propose geometry decomposition and adopt a two-stage, coarse-to-fine training strategy, allowing for progressively capturing high-frequency geometric details. We represent 3D human heads using the zero level-set of a combined signed distance field, comprising a smooth template, a non-rigid deformation, and a high-frequency displacement field. The template captures features that are independent of both identity and expression and is co-trained with the deformation network across multiple individuals with sparse and randomly selected views. The displacement field, capturing individual-specific details, undergoes separate training for each person. Our network training does not require 3D supervision or object masks. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our geometry decomposition and two-stage training strategy. Our method outperforms existing neural rendering approaches in terms of reconstruction accuracy and novel view synthesis under low-view settings. Moreover, the pre-trained template serves a good initialization for our model when encountering unseen individuals.
summary: Reconstructing 3D human heads in low-view settings presents technical challenges, mainly due to the pronounced risk of overfitting with limited views and high-frequency signals. To address this, we propose geometry decomposition and adopt a two-stage, coarse-to-fine training strategy, allowing for progressively capturing high-frequency geometric details. We represent 3D human heads using the zero level-set of a combined signed distance field, comprising a smooth template, a non-rigid deformation, and a high-frequency displacement field. The template captures features that are independent of both identity and expression and is co-trained with the deformation network across multiple individuals with sparse and randomly selected views. The displacement field, capturing individual-specific details, undergoes separate training for each person. Our network training does not require 3D supervision or object masks. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our geometry decomposition and two-stage training strategy. Our method outperforms existing neural rendering approaches in terms of reconstruction accuracy and novel view synthesis under low-view settings. Moreover, the pre-trained template serves a good initialization for our model when encountering unseen individuals.
abstract_zh: 在低视角环境中重建 3D 人体头部提出了技术挑战，主要是由于有限视角和高频信号存在过度拟合的明显风险。为了解决这个问题，我们提出几何分解并采用两阶段、从粗到精的训练策略，允许逐步捕获高频几何细节。我们使用组合符号距离场的零水平集来表示 3D 人体头部，包括平滑模板、非刚性变形和高频位移场。该模板捕获独立于身份和表达的特征，并与具有稀疏和随机选择视图的多个个体的变形网络共同训练。位移场捕捉个人特定的细节，对每个人进行单独的训练。我们的网络训练不需要 3D 监督或对象掩模。实验结果证明了我们的几何分解和两阶段训练策略的有效性和鲁棒性。我们的方法在低视图设置下的重建精度和新颖的视图合成方面优于现有的神经渲染方法。此外，当遇到看不见的个体时，预训练的模板可以为我们的模型提供良好的初始化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可变形模型驱动的神经渲染方法，用于在低视角设置下实现高保真的人类头部3D重建。
AI.motivation: 在低视角设置下重建3D人类头部存在技术挑战，主要由于有限视角和高频信号导致的过拟合风险。
AI.method: 该方法采用几何分解和两阶段的粗到细训练策略，使用零级集的组合符号距离场表示3D人类头部，包括平滑模板、非刚性变形和高频位移场。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在低视角设置下的重建精度和新视角合成方面优于现有神经渲染方法。
AI.conclusion: 几何分解和两阶段训练策略有效且鲁棒，预训练模板为模型在面对未见过的个体时提供了良好的初始化。
