search_text: Deformable Model-Driven Neural Rendering for High-Fidelity 3D Reconstruction of Human Heads Under Low-View Settings 可变形模型驱动的神经渲染，用于低视角设置下人体头部的高保真 3D 重建 Reconstructing 3D human heads in low-view settings presents technical challenges, mainly due to the pronounced risk of overfitting with limited views and high-frequency signals. To address this, we propose geometry decomposition and adopt a two-stage, coarse-to-fine training strategy, allowing for progressively capturing high-frequency geometric details. We represent 3D human heads using the zero level-set of a combined signed distance field, comprising a smooth template, a non-rigid deformation, and a high-frequency displacement field. The template captures features that are independent of both identity and expression and is co-trained with the deformation network across multiple individuals with sparse and randomly selected views. The displacement field, capturing individual-specific details, undergoes separate training for each person. Our network training does not require 3D supervision or object masks. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our geometry decomposition and two-stage training strategy. Our method outperforms existing neural rendering approaches in terms of reconstruction accuracy and novel view synthesis under low-view settings. Moreover, the pre-trained template serves a good initialization for our model when encountering unseen individuals. 在低视角环境中重建 3D 人体头部提出了技术挑战，主要是由于有限视角和高频信号存在过度拟合的明显风险。为了解决这个问题，我们提出几何分解并采用两阶段、从粗到精的训练策略，允许逐步捕获高频几何细节。我们使用组合符号距离场的零水平集来表示 3D 人体头部，包括平滑模板、非刚性变形和高频位移场。该模板捕获独立于身份和表达的特征，并与具有稀疏和随机选择视图的多个个体的变形网络共同训练。位移场捕捉个人特定的细节，对每个人进行单独的训练。我们的网络训练不需要 3D 监督或对象掩模。实验结果证明了我们的几何分解和两阶段训练策略的有效性和鲁棒性。我们的方法在低视图设置下的重建精度和新颖的视图合成方面优于现有的神经渲染方法。此外，当遇到看不见的个体时，预训练的模板可以为我们的模型提供良好的初始化。 本文提出了一种基于可变形模型驱动的神经渲染方法，用于在低视角设置下实现高保真的人类头部3D重建。 Baixin Xu,Jiarui Zhang,Kwan-Yee Lin,Chen Qian,Ying He cs.CV

authors_text: Mikhail Kennerley,Jian-Gang Wang,Bharadwaj Veeravalli,Robby T. Tan
title: 2PCNet: Two-Phase Consistency Training for Day-to-Night Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Object Detection
title_zh: 2PCNet：昼夜无监督域自适应目标检测的两阶段一致性训练
abstract: Object detection at night is a challenging problem due to the absence of night image annotations. Despite several domain adaptation methods, achieving high-precision results remains an issue. False-positive error propagation is still observed in methods using the well-established student-teacher framework, particularly for small-scale and low-light objects. This paper proposes a two-phase consistency unsupervised domain adaptation network, 2PCNet, to address these issues. The network employs high-confidence bounding-box predictions from the teacher in the first phase and appends them to the student's region proposals for the teacher to re-evaluate in the second phase, resulting in a combination of high and low confidence pseudo-labels. The night images and pseudo-labels are scaled-down before being used as input to the student, providing stronger small-scale pseudo-labels. To address errors that arise from low-light regions and other night-related attributes in images, we propose a night-specific augmentation pipeline called NightAug. This pipeline involves applying random augmentations, such as glare, blur, and noise, to daytime images. Experiments on publicly available datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior results to state-of-the-art methods by 20\%, and to supervised models trained directly on the target data.
summary: Object detection at night is a challenging problem due to the absence of night image annotations. Despite several domain adaptation methods, achieving high-precision results remains an issue. False-positive error propagation is still observed in methods using the well-established student-teacher framework, particularly for small-scale and low-light objects. This paper proposes a two-phase consistency unsupervised domain adaptation network, 2PCNet, to address these issues. The network employs high-confidence bounding-box predictions from the teacher in the first phase and appends them to the student's region proposals for the teacher to re-evaluate in the second phase, resulting in a combination of high and low confidence pseudo-labels. The night images and pseudo-labels are scaled-down before being used as input to the student, providing stronger small-scale pseudo-labels. To address errors that arise from low-light regions and other night-related attributes in images, we propose a night-specific augmentation pipeline called NightAug. This pipeline involves applying random augmentations, such as glare, blur, and noise, to daytime images. Experiments on publicly available datasets demonstrate that our method achieves superior results to state-of-the-art methods by 20\%, and to supervised models trained directly on the target data.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏夜间图像注释，夜间目标检测是一个具有挑战性的问题。尽管有多种领域适应方法，但实现高精度结果仍然是一个问题。在使用完善的学生-教师框架的方法中仍然观察到假阳性错误传播，特别是对于小规模和低光物体。本文提出了一种两阶段一致性无监督域适应网络 2PCNet 来解决这些问题。该网络在第一阶段采用教师的高置信度边界框预测，并将其附加到学生的区域建议中，以便教师在第二阶段重新评估，从而产生高置信度和低置信度伪标签的组合。夜间图像和伪标签在用作学生的输入之前会按比例缩小，从而提供更强的小规模伪标签。为了解决图像中低光区域和其他夜间相关属性引起的错误，我们提出了一种名为 NightAug 的夜间特定增强管道。该流程涉及对白天图像应用随机增强，例如眩光、模糊和噪声。在公开数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的方法比最先进的方法以及直接在目标数据上训练的监督模型取得了 20% 的优异结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出2PCNet，一种用于昼夜无监督域适应目标检测的两阶段一致性训练网络，旨在解决夜间图像标注缺失导致的检测精度问题。
AI.motivation: 夜间目标检测因缺乏标注数据而困难，现有学生-教师框架方法在小尺度和低光物体上存在误报传播问题，需改进伪标签生成与域适应策略。
AI.method: 采用两阶段一致性训练：第一阶段利用教师模型高置信度框生成伪标签，第二阶段通过学生模型提议框重新评估生成高低置信度组合伪标签；引入NightAug增强管道对白天图像进行眩光、模糊等夜间属性模拟，并缩放输入以强化小尺度伪标签学习。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上，该方法较最先进方法提升20%，优于直接在目标域训练的监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 2PCNet通过两阶段一致性训练与夜间特定增强有效缓解域偏移，显著提升无监督域适应目标检测性能。

authors_text: Renjiao Yi,Chenyang Zhu,Kai Xu
title: Weakly-supervised Single-view Image Relighting
title_zh: 弱监督单视图图像重新照明
abstract: We present a learning-based approach to relight a single image of Lambertian and low-frequency specular objects. Our method enables inserting objects from photographs into new scenes and relighting them under the new environment lighting, which is essential for AR applications. To relight the object, we solve both inverse rendering and re-rendering. To resolve the ill-posed inverse rendering, we propose a weakly-supervised method by a low-rank constraint. To facilitate the weakly-supervised training, we contribute Relit, a large-scale (750K images) dataset of videos with aligned objects under changing illuminations. For re-rendering, we propose a differentiable specular rendering layer to render low-frequency non-Lambertian materials under various illuminations of spherical harmonics. The whole pipeline is end-to-end and efficient, allowing for a mobile app implementation of AR object insertion. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Project page: https://renjiaoyi.github.io/relighting/.
summary: We present a learning-based approach to relight a single image of Lambertian and low-frequency specular objects. Our method enables inserting objects from photographs into new scenes and relighting them under the new environment lighting, which is essential for AR applications. To relight the object, we solve both inverse rendering and re-rendering. To resolve the ill-posed inverse rendering, we propose a weakly-supervised method by a low-rank constraint. To facilitate the weakly-supervised training, we contribute Relit, a large-scale (750K images) dataset of videos with aligned objects under changing illuminations. For re-rendering, we propose a differentiable specular rendering layer to render low-frequency non-Lambertian materials under various illuminations of spherical harmonics. The whole pipeline is end-to-end and efficient, allowing for a mobile app implementation of AR object insertion. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Project page: https://renjiaoyi.github.io/relighting/.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于学习的方法来重新照亮朗伯和低频镜面物体的单个图像。我们的方法能够将照片中的对象插入到新场景中，并在新的环境照明下重新照亮它们，这对于 AR 应用至关重要。为了重新照亮对象，我们解决了逆渲染和重新渲染。为了解决不适定逆渲染问题，我们提出了一种通过低秩约束的弱监督方法。为了促进弱监督训练，我们贡献了 Relit，这是一个大规模（750K 图像）视频数据集，其中包含在变化的照明下对齐对象的视频。对于重新渲染，我们提出了一个可微分的镜面反射渲染层，以在球谐函数的各种照明下渲染低频非朗伯材质。整个管道是端到端且高效的，允许移动应用程序实现 AR 对象插入。广泛的评估表明我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。项目页面：https://renjiaoyi.github.io/relighting/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督的单视角图像重照明方法，可将照片中的物体插入新场景并重新照明，适用于AR应用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理单视角物体的逆向渲染问题，且缺乏大规模数据集支持，限制了AR中动态照明效果的实现。
AI.method: 提出弱监督逆向渲染方法（低秩约束）与可微镜面渲染层，结合自建的75万张图像Relit数据集，实现端到端的重照明流程。
AI.result: 在多项评估中达到SOTA性能，并成功部署于移动设备实现AR物体插入功能。
AI.conclusion: 通过弱监督学习与可微渲染技术的结合，解决了单视角重照明难题，为AR应用提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 通过弱监督学习与可微渲染技术的结合，解决了单视角重照明难题，为AR应用提供了高效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督的单视角图像重照明方法，可将照片中的物体插入新场景并重新照明，适用于AR应用。
motivation: 现有方法难以处理单视角物体的逆向渲染问题，且缺乏大规模数据集支持，限制了AR中动态照明效果的实现。
method: 提出弱监督逆向渲染方法（低秩约束）与可微镜面渲染层，结合自建的75万张图像Relit数据集，实现端到端的重照明流程。
result: 在多项评估中达到SOTA性能，并成功部署于移动设备实现AR物体插入功能。
conclusion: 通过弱监督学习与可微渲染技术的结合，解决了单视角重照明难题，为AR应用提供了高效解决方案。
search_text: Weakly-supervised Single-view Image Relighting 弱监督单视图图像重新照明 We present a learning-based approach to relight a single image of Lambertian and low-frequency specular objects. Our method enables inserting objects from photographs into new scenes and relighting them under the new environment lighting, which is essential for AR applications. To relight the object, we solve both inverse rendering and re-rendering. To resolve the ill-posed inverse rendering, we propose a weakly-supervised method by a low-rank constraint. To facilitate the weakly-supervised training, we contribute Relit, a large-scale (750K images) dataset of videos with aligned objects under changing illuminations. For re-rendering, we propose a differentiable specular rendering layer to render low-frequency non-Lambertian materials under various illuminations of spherical harmonics. The whole pipeline is end-to-end and efficient, allowing for a mobile app implementation of AR object insertion. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance. Project page: https://renjiaoyi.github.io/relighting/. 我们提出了一种基于学习的方法来重新照亮朗伯和低频镜面物体的单个图像。我们的方法能够将照片中的对象插入到新场景中，并在新的环境照明下重新照亮它们，这对于 AR 应用至关重要。为了重新照亮对象，我们解决了逆渲染和重新渲染。为了解决不适定逆渲染问题，我们提出了一种通过低秩约束的弱监督方法。为了促进弱监督训练，我们贡献了 Relit，这是一个大规模（750K 图像）视频数据集，其中包含在变化的照明下对齐对象的视频。对于重新渲染，我们提出了一个可微分的镜面反射渲染层，以在球谐函数的各种照明下渲染低频非朗伯材质。整个管道是端到端且高效的，允许移动应用程序实现 AR 对象插入。广泛的评估表明我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。项目页面：https://renjiaoyi.github.io/relighting/。 本文提出一种弱监督的单视角图像重照明方法，可将照片中的物体插入新场景并重新照明，适用于AR应用。 Renjiao Yi,Chenyang Zhu,Kai Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Abbavaram Gowtham Reddy,Saketh Bachu,Harsharaj Pathak,Benin L Godfrey,Vineeth N. Balasubramanian,Varshaneya V,Satya Narayanan Kar
title: Towards Learning and Explaining Indirect Causal Effects in Neural Networks
title_zh: 学习和解释神经网络中的间接因果效应
abstract: Recently, there has been a growing interest in learning and explaining causal effects within Neural Network (NN) models. By virtue of NN architectures, previous approaches consider only direct and total causal effects assuming independence among input variables. We view an NN as a structural causal model (SCM) and extend our focus to include indirect causal effects by introducing feedforward connections among input neurons. We propose an ante-hoc method that captures and maintains direct, indirect, and total causal effects during NN model training. We also propose an algorithm for quantifying learned causal effects in an NN model and efficient approximation strategies for quantifying causal effects in high-dimensional data. Extensive experiments conducted on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the causal effects learned by our ante-hoc method better approximate the ground truth effects compared to existing methods.
summary: Recently, there has been a growing interest in learning and explaining causal effects within Neural Network (NN) models. By virtue of NN architectures, previous approaches consider only direct and total causal effects assuming independence among input variables. We view an NN as a structural causal model (SCM) and extend our focus to include indirect causal effects by introducing feedforward connections among input neurons. We propose an ante-hoc method that captures and maintains direct, indirect, and total causal effects during NN model training. We also propose an algorithm for quantifying learned causal effects in an NN model and efficient approximation strategies for quantifying causal effects in high-dimensional data. Extensive experiments conducted on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that the causal effects learned by our ante-hoc method better approximate the ground truth effects compared to existing methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们对学习和解释神经网络 (NN) 模型中的因果效应越来越感兴趣。凭借神经网络架构，以前的方法仅考虑直接和总的因果效应，假设输入变量之间独立。我们将神经网络视为结构因果模型（SCM），并通过在输入神经元之间引入前馈连接，将我们的重点扩展到包括间接因果效应。我们提出了一种事前方法，可以在神经网络模型训练期间捕获并维护直接、间接和总体因果效应。我们还提出了一种用于量化神经网络模型中学习到的因果效应的算法，以及用于量化高维数据中因果效应的有效近似策略。对合成数据集和真实世界数据集进行的大量实验表明，与现有方法相比，我们的事前方法学到的因果效应更好地近似了地面真实效应。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过将神经网络视为结构因果模型，提出一种前向方法来学习和解释神经网络中的间接因果效应。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注直接和总因果效应并假设输入变量独立，忽略了间接因果效应，无法准确解释复杂模型中的因果关系。
AI.method: 将神经网络建模为结构因果模型（SCM），引入输入神经元之间的前馈连接，提出前向训练方法以捕捉直接、间接和总因果效应，并设计量化算法及高维数据近似策略。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法学习到的因果效应比现有方法更接近真实值。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过建模间接因果效应和高效量化策略，提升了神经网络中因果效应的学习与解释能力。

Balasubramanian,Varshaneya V,Satya Narayanan Kar cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ME

authors_text: Woo Jae Kim,Yoonki Cho,Junsik Jung,Sung-Eui Yoon
title: Feature Separation and Recalibration for Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 对抗鲁棒性的特征分离和重新校准
abstract: Deep neural networks are susceptible to adversarial attacks due to the accumulation of perturbations in the feature level, and numerous works have boosted model robustness by deactivating the non-robust feature activations that cause model mispredictions. However, we claim that these malicious activations still contain discriminative cues and that with recalibration, they can capture additional useful information for correct model predictions. To this end, we propose a novel, easy-to-plugin approach named Feature Separation and Recalibration (FSR) that recalibrates the malicious, non-robust activations for more robust feature maps through Separation and Recalibration. The Separation part disentangles the input feature map into the robust feature with activations that help the model make correct predictions and the non-robust feature with activations that are responsible for model mispredictions upon adversarial attack. The Recalibration part then adjusts the non-robust activations to restore the potentially useful cues for model predictions. Extensive experiments verify the superiority of FSR compared to traditional deactivation techniques and demonstrate that it improves the robustness of existing adversarial training methods by up to 8.57% with small computational overhead. Codes are available at https://github.com/wkim97/FSR.
summary: Deep neural networks are susceptible to adversarial attacks due to the accumulation of perturbations in the feature level, and numerous works have boosted model robustness by deactivating the non-robust feature activations that cause model mispredictions. However, we claim that these malicious activations still contain discriminative cues and that with recalibration, they can capture additional useful information for correct model predictions. To this end, we propose a novel, easy-to-plugin approach named Feature Separation and Recalibration (FSR) that recalibrates the malicious, non-robust activations for more robust feature maps through Separation and Recalibration. The Separation part disentangles the input feature map into the robust feature with activations that help the model make correct predictions and the non-robust feature with activations that are responsible for model mispredictions upon adversarial attack. The Recalibration part then adjusts the non-robust activations to restore the potentially useful cues for model predictions. Extensive experiments verify the superiority of FSR compared to traditional deactivation techniques and demonstrate that it improves the robustness of existing adversarial training methods by up to 8.57% with small computational overhead. Codes are available at https://github.com/wkim97/FSR.
abstract_zh: 由于特征级别扰动的积累，深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性攻击，并且许多工作通过停用导致模型错误预测的非鲁棒特征激活来提高模型的鲁棒性。然而，我们声称这些恶意激活仍然包含辨别线索，并且通过重新校准，它们可以捕获额外的有用信息以实现正确的模型预测。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的、易于插入的方法，称为特征分离和重新校准（FSR），它通过分离和重新校准来重新校准恶意的、非鲁棒的激活，以获得更鲁棒的特征图。分离部分将输入特征映射分解为鲁棒特征和非鲁棒特征，鲁棒特征的激活有助于模型做出正确的预测，非鲁棒特征的激活会导致模型在对抗性攻击时做出错误预测。然后，重新校准部分会调整非鲁棒激活，以恢复对模型预测可能有用的线索。大量实验验证了 FSR 相对于传统去激活技术的优越性，并证明它在计算开销较小的情况下将现有对抗训练方法的鲁棒性提高了高达 8.57%。代码可在 https://github.com/wkim97/FSR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FSR的新方法，通过分离和重新校准非鲁棒特征来提升深度神经网络对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过停用非鲁棒特征激活来提升鲁棒性，但这些激活仍可能包含判别性线索，合理校准可提取有用信息。
AI.method: FSR分为分离（Separation）和重新校准（Recalibration）两部分：分离模块将特征图分解为鲁棒特征和非鲁棒特征，再校准模块调整非鲁棒特征以恢复有用信息。
AI.result: 实验表明FSR相比传统方法提升鲁棒性最高达8.57%，且计算开销小，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: FSR通过有效利用非鲁棒特征中的潜在信息，在对抗鲁棒性研究中提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tri Cao,Jiawen Zhu,Guansong Pang
title: Anomaly Detection under Distribution Shift
title_zh: 分布偏移下的异常检测
abstract: Anomaly detection (AD) is a crucial machine learning task that aims to learn patterns from a set of normal training samples to identify abnormal samples in test data. Most existing AD studies assume that the training and test data are drawn from the same data distribution, but the test data can have large distribution shifts arising in many real-world applications due to different natural variations such as new lighting conditions, object poses, or background appearances, rendering existing AD methods ineffective in such cases. In this paper, we consider the problem of anomaly detection under distribution shift and establish performance benchmarks on four widely-used AD and out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization datasets. We demonstrate that simple adaptation of state-of-the-art OOD generalization methods to AD settings fails to work effectively due to the lack of labeled anomaly data. We further introduce a novel robust AD approach to diverse distribution shifts by minimizing the distribution gap between in-distribution and OOD normal samples in both the training and inference stages in an unsupervised way. Our extensive empirical results on the four datasets show that our approach substantially outperforms state-of-the-art AD methods and OOD generalization methods on data with various distribution shifts, while maintaining the detection accuracy on in-distribution data. Code and data are available at https://github.com/mala-lab/ADShift.
summary: Anomaly detection (AD) is a crucial machine learning task that aims to learn patterns from a set of normal training samples to identify abnormal samples in test data. Most existing AD studies assume that the training and test data are drawn from the same data distribution, but the test data can have large distribution shifts arising in many real-world applications due to different natural variations such as new lighting conditions, object poses, or background appearances, rendering existing AD methods ineffective in such cases. In this paper, we consider the problem of anomaly detection under distribution shift and establish performance benchmarks on four widely-used AD and out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization datasets. We demonstrate that simple adaptation of state-of-the-art OOD generalization methods to AD settings fails to work effectively due to the lack of labeled anomaly data. We further introduce a novel robust AD approach to diverse distribution shifts by minimizing the distribution gap between in-distribution and OOD normal samples in both the training and inference stages in an unsupervised way. Our extensive empirical results on the four datasets show that our approach substantially outperforms state-of-the-art AD methods and OOD generalization methods on data with various distribution shifts, while maintaining the detection accuracy on in-distribution data. Code and data are available at https://github.com/mala-lab/ADShift.
abstract_zh: 异常检测（AD）是一项重要的机器学习任务，旨在从一组正常训练样本中学习模式，以识别测试数据中的异常样本。大多数现有的AD研究都假设训练和测试数据来自相同的数据分布，但由于不同的自然变化（例如新的光照条件、物体姿势或背景外观），测试数据在许多实际应用中可能会出现较大的分布变化，从而导致现有的AD方法在这种情况下无效。在本文中，我们考虑了分布偏移下的异常检测问题，并在四个广泛使用的 AD 和分布外（OOD）泛化数据集上建立了性能基准。我们证明，由于缺乏标记的异常数据，将最先进的 OOD 泛化方法简单地适应 AD 设置无法有效地发挥作用。我们进一步引入了一种新颖的稳健 AD 方法，通过在训练和推理阶段以无监督的方式最小化分布内正态样本和 OOD 正态样本之间的分布差距，来应对不同的分布变化。我们对四个数据集的广泛实证结果表明，我们的方法在具有各种分布变化的数据上远远优于最先进的 AD 方法和 OOD 泛化方法，同时保持分布数据的检测准确性。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/mala-lab/ADShift 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在分布偏移情况下异常检测的问题，提出了一种新的鲁棒方法并在四个数据集上验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法假设训练和测试数据分布一致，但在实际应用中分布偏移普遍存在，导致方法失效，需解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过最小化训练和推理阶段分布内与分布外正常样本间的分布差距，提出无监督的鲁棒异常检测方法。
AI.result: 在四个常用数据集上，新方法显著优于现有AD和OOD方法，同时保持分布内数据检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效应对多样分布偏移，为异常检测提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Haotian Bai,Yuanhuiyi Lyu,Lutao Jiang,Sijia Li,Haonan Lu,Xiaodong Lin,Lin Wang
title: CompoNeRF: Text-guided Multi-object Compositional NeRF with Editable 3D Scene Layout
title_zh: CompoNeRF：具有可编辑 3D 场景布局的文本引导多对象组合 NeRF
abstract: Text-to-3D form plays a crucial role in creating editable 3D scenes for AR/VR. Recent advances have shown promise in merging neural radiance fields (NeRFs) with pre-trained diffusion models for text-to-3D object generation. However, one enduring challenge is their inadequate capability to accurately parse and regenerate consistent multi-object environments. Specifically, these models encounter difficulties in accurately representing quantity and style prompted by multi-object texts, often resulting in a collapse of the rendering fidelity that fails to match the semantic intricacies. Moreover, amalgamating these elements into a coherent 3D scene is a substantial challenge, stemming from generic distribution inherent in diffusion models. To tackle the issue of 'guidance collapse' and further enhance scene consistency, we propose a novel framework, dubbed CompoNeRF, by integrating an editable 3D scene layout with object-specific and scene-wide guidance mechanisms. It initiates by interpreting a complex text into the layout populated with multiple NeRFs, each paired with a corresponding subtext prompt for precise object depiction. Next, a tailored composition module seamlessly blends these NeRFs, promoting consistency, while the dual-level text guidance reduces ambiguity and boosts accuracy. Noticeably, our composition design permits decomposition. This enables flexible scene editing and recomposition into new scenes based on the edited layout or text prompts. Utilizing the open-source Stable Diffusion model, CompoNeRF generates multi-object scenes with high fidelity. Remarkably, our framework achieves up to a \textbf{54\%} improvement by the multi-view CLIP score metric. Our user study indicates that our method has significantly improved semantic accuracy, multi-view consistency, and individual recognizability for multi-object scene generation.
summary: Text-to-3D form plays a crucial role in creating editable 3D scenes for AR/VR. Recent advances have shown promise in merging neural radiance fields (NeRFs) with pre-trained diffusion models for text-to-3D object generation. However, one enduring challenge is their inadequate capability to accurately parse and regenerate consistent multi-object environments. Specifically, these models encounter difficulties in accurately representing quantity and style prompted by multi-object texts, often resulting in a collapse of the rendering fidelity that fails to match the semantic intricacies. Moreover, amalgamating these elements into a coherent 3D scene is a substantial challenge, stemming from generic distribution inherent in diffusion models. To tackle the issue of 'guidance collapse' and further enhance scene consistency, we propose a novel framework, dubbed CompoNeRF, by integrating an editable 3D scene layout with object-specific and scene-wide guidance mechanisms. It initiates by interpreting a complex text into the layout populated with multiple NeRFs, each paired with a corresponding subtext prompt for precise object depiction. Next, a tailored composition module seamlessly blends these NeRFs, promoting consistency, while the dual-level text guidance reduces ambiguity and boosts accuracy. Noticeably, our composition design permits decomposition. This enables flexible scene editing and recomposition into new scenes based on the edited layout or text prompts. Utilizing the open-source Stable Diffusion model, CompoNeRF generates multi-object scenes with high fidelity. Remarkably, our framework achieves up to a \textbf{54\%} improvement by the multi-view CLIP score metric. Our user study indicates that our method has significantly improved semantic accuracy, multi-view consistency, and individual recognizability for multi-object scene generation.
abstract_zh: 文本转 3D 形式在为 AR/VR 创建可编辑 3D 场景方面发挥着至关重要的作用。最近的进展显示出将神经辐射场 (NeRF) 与预训练的扩散模型合并以生成文本到 3D 对象的前景。然而，一个持久的挑战是它们准确解析和重新生成一致的多对象环境的能力不足。具体来说，这些模型在准确表示多对象文本提示的数量和风格方面遇到困难，通常导致渲染保真度崩溃，无法匹配复杂的语义。此外，由于扩散模型固有的通用分布，将这些元素合并成一个连贯的 3D 场景是一项巨大的挑战。为了解决“引导崩溃”问题并进一步增强场景一致性，我们提出了一种名为 CompoNeRF 的新颖框架，将可编辑的 3D 场景布局与特定于对象和场景范围的引导机制相集成。它首先将复杂的文本解释为填充有多个 NeRF 的布局，每个 NeRF 都与相应的潜文本提示配对，以实现精确的对象描述。接下来，定制的合成模块无缝地融合了这些 NeRF，从而提高了一致性，而双层文本指导则减少了歧义并提高了准确性。值得注意的是，我们的组合设计允许分解。这样可以根据编辑的布局或文本提示进行灵活的场景编辑和重新组合为新场景。 CompoNeRF 利用开源稳定扩散模型，生成高保真度的多对象场景。值得注意的是，我们的框架在多视图 CLIP 分数指标上实现了 \textbf{54\%} 的改进。我们的用户研究表明，我们的方法显着提高了多对象场景生成的语义准确性、多视图一致性和个体可识别性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CompoNeRF框架，通过文本引导生成可编辑的多物体3D场景，解决现有方法在多物体环境生成中的不一致性和渲染保真度不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到3D生成方法难以准确解析多物体文本中的数量和风格信息，导致生成场景语义不一致且渲染质量下降，尤其在复杂多物体场景中表现不佳。
AI.method: CompoNeRF整合可编辑3D场景布局与双重文本引导机制，将复杂文本分解为多NeRF模块并配对子文本提示，通过定制化组合模块提升一致性，并支持场景分解与灵活编辑。
AI.result: 在多视图CLIP分数指标上提升54%，用户研究验证了语义准确性、多视图一致性及物体可识别性的显著改善。
AI.conclusion: CompoNeRF通过创新框架有效解决了多物体生成中的关键挑战，为AR/VR应用提供了高质量、可编辑的文本驱动3D场景生成方案。

authors_text: Hao Shi,Yu Li,Kailun Yang,Jiaming Zhang,Kunyu Peng,Alina Roitberg,Yaozu Ye,Huajian Ni,Kaiwei Wang,Rainer Stiefelhagen
title: FishDreamer: Towards Fisheye Semantic Completion via Unified Image Outpainting and Segmentation
title_zh: FishDreamer：通过统一图像绘制和分割实现鱼眼语义完成
comment: Accepted to CVPR OmniCV 2023. Code and datasets will be available at https://github.com/MasterHow/FishDreamer
comments: Accepted to CVPR OmniCV 2023. Code and datasets will be available at https://github.com/MasterHow/FishDreamer
abstract: This paper raises the new task of Fisheye Semantic Completion (FSC), where dense texture, structure, and semantics of a fisheye image are inferred even beyond the sensor field-of-view (FoV). Fisheye cameras have larger FoV than ordinary pinhole cameras, yet its unique special imaging model naturally leads to a blind area at the edge of the image plane. This is suboptimal for safety-critical applications since important perception tasks, such as semantic segmentation, become very challenging within the blind zone. Previous works considered the out-FoV outpainting and in-FoV segmentation separately. However, we observe that these two tasks are actually closely coupled. To jointly estimate the tightly intertwined complete fisheye image and scene semantics, we introduce the new FishDreamer which relies on successful ViTs enhanced with a novel Polar-aware Cross Attention module (PCA) to leverage dense context and guide semantically-consistent content generation while considering different polar distributions. In addition to the contribution of the novel task and architecture, we also derive Cityscapes-BF and KITTI360-BF datasets to facilitate training and evaluation of this new track. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed FishDreamer outperforms methods solving each task in isolation and surpasses alternative approaches on the Fisheye Semantic Completion. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/MasterHow/FishDreamer.
summary: This paper raises the new task of Fisheye Semantic Completion (FSC), where dense texture, structure, and semantics of a fisheye image are inferred even beyond the sensor field-of-view (FoV). Fisheye cameras have larger FoV than ordinary pinhole cameras, yet its unique special imaging model naturally leads to a blind area at the edge of the image plane. This is suboptimal for safety-critical applications since important perception tasks, such as semantic segmentation, become very challenging within the blind zone. Previous works considered the out-FoV outpainting and in-FoV segmentation separately. However, we observe that these two tasks are actually closely coupled. To jointly estimate the tightly intertwined complete fisheye image and scene semantics, we introduce the new FishDreamer which relies on successful ViTs enhanced with a novel Polar-aware Cross Attention module (PCA) to leverage dense context and guide semantically-consistent content generation while considering different polar distributions. In addition to the contribution of the novel task and architecture, we also derive Cityscapes-BF and KITTI360-BF datasets to facilitate training and evaluation of this new track. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed FishDreamer outperforms methods solving each task in isolation and surpasses alternative approaches on the Fisheye Semantic Completion. Code and datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/MasterHow/FishDreamer.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了鱼眼语义完成（FSC）的新任务，即使在传感器视场（FoV）之外也可以推断出鱼眼图像的密集纹理、结构和语义。鱼眼相机比普通针孔相机具有更大的视场角，但其独特的特殊成像模型自然会导致图像平面边缘存在盲区。这对于安全关键型应用来说不是最佳选择，因为重要的感知任务（例如语义分割）在盲区内变得非常具有挑战性。以前的工作分别考虑了 FoV 外绘制和 FoV 内分割。然而，我们观察到这两个任务实际上是紧密耦合的。为了共同估计紧密交织的完整鱼眼图像和场景语义，我们引入了新的 FishDreamer，它依赖于通过新型极地感知交叉注意模块 (PCA) 增强的成功 ViT，以利用密集上下文并指导语义一致的内容生成，同时考虑不同的极分布。除了新任务和架构的贡献之外，我们还导出了 Cityscapes-BF 和 KITTI360-BF 数据集，以促进这一新赛道的训练和评估。我们的实验表明，所提出的 FishDreamer 优于单独解决每个任务的方法，并且优于鱼眼语义完成的替代方法。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/MasterHow/FishDreamer 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的鱼眼语义补全（FSC）任务，通过统一的图像补全和分割方法推断鱼眼图像的密集纹理、结构和语义，即使在传感器视野之外。
AI.motivation: 鱼眼相机虽具有大视野，但其成像模型在图像边缘存在盲区，导致安全关键应用中的语义分割等任务面临挑战。现有方法将视野外补全与视野内分割分开处理，未能有效利用任务间的关联性。
AI.method: 提出FishDreamer框架，基于改进的ViT模型，引入极坐标感知交叉注意力（PCA）模块，结合密集上下文信息和语义一致性生成内容。同时构建Cityscapes-BF和KITTI360-BF数据集支持任务训练与评估。
AI.result: 实验表明FishDreamer在联合估计鱼眼图像完整性与语义一致性方面优于单独处理两个任务的方法，在FSC任务上超越现有替代方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一建模鱼眼图像补全与分割任务，FishDreamer有效解决了盲区语义推断难题，为自动驾驶等安全关键场景提供更可靠的感知方案。

In addition to the contribution of the novel task and architecture, we also derive Cityscapes-BF and KITTI360-BF datasets to facilitate training and evaluation of this new track. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed FishDreamer outperforms methods solving each task in isolation and surpasses alternative approaches on the Fisheye Semantic Completion. authors_text: Jiefeng Ma,Jun Du,Pengfei Hu,Zhenrong Zhang,Jianshu Zhang,Huihui Zhu,Cong Liu
title: HRDoc: Dataset and Baseline Method Toward Hierarchical Reconstruction of Document Structures
title_zh: HRDoc：文档结构分层重建的数据集和基线方法
abstract: The problem of document structure reconstruction refers to converting digital or scanned documents into corresponding semantic structures. Most existing works mainly focus on splitting the boundary of each element in a single document page, neglecting the reconstruction of semantic structure in multi-page documents. This paper introduces hierarchical reconstruction of document structures as a novel task suitable for NLP and CV fields. To better evaluate the system performance on the new task, we built a large-scale dataset named HRDoc, which consists of 2,500 multi-page documents with nearly 2 million semantic units. Every document in HRDoc has line-level annotations including categories and relations obtained from rule-based extractors and human annotators. Moreover, we proposed an encoder-decoder-based hierarchical document structure parsing system (DSPS) to tackle this problem. By adopting a multi-modal bidirectional encoder and a structure-aware GRU decoder with soft-mask operation, the DSPS model surpass the baseline method by a large margin. All scripts and datasets will be made publicly available at https://github.com/jfma-USTC/HRDoc.
summary: The problem of document structure reconstruction refers to converting digital or scanned documents into corresponding semantic structures. Most existing works mainly focus on splitting the boundary of each element in a single document page, neglecting the reconstruction of semantic structure in multi-page documents. This paper introduces hierarchical reconstruction of document structures as a novel task suitable for NLP and CV fields. To better evaluate the system performance on the new task, we built a large-scale dataset named HRDoc, which consists of 2,500 multi-page documents with nearly 2 million semantic units. Every document in HRDoc has line-level annotations including categories and relations obtained from rule-based extractors and human annotators. Moreover, we proposed an encoder-decoder-based hierarchical document structure parsing system (DSPS) to tackle this problem. By adopting a multi-modal bidirectional encoder and a structure-aware GRU decoder with soft-mask operation, the DSPS model surpass the baseline method by a large margin. All scripts and datasets will be made publicly available at https://github.com/jfma-USTC/HRDoc.
abstract_zh: 文档结构重构问题是指将数字或扫描文档转换为相应的语义结构。现有的大多数工作主要集中在单个文档页面中每个元素的边界分割，而忽略了多页面文档中语义结构的重建。本文介绍了文档结构的层次重建作为一项适用于 NLP 和 CV 领域的新任务。为了更好地评估系统在新任务上的性能，我们构建了一个名为 HRDoc 的大规模数据集，该数据集由 2,500 个多页文档组成，具有近 200 万个语义单元。 HRDoc 中的每个文档都有行级注释，包括从基于规则的提取器和人工注释器获得的类别和关系。此外，我们提出了一种基于编码器-解码器的分层文档结构解析系统（DSPS）来解决这个问题。通过采用多模态双向编码器和具有软掩模操作的结构感知 GRU 解码器，DSPS 模型大幅超越了基线方法。所有脚本和数据集将在 https://github.com/jfma-USTC/HRDoc 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向多页文档的层次化结构重建任务，并构建了HRDoc数据集及基线方法DSPS。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注单页文档元素边界分割，忽视多页文档语义结构重建，缺乏针对多页文档的评估体系。
AI.method: 构建包含2500份多页文档的HRDoc数据集，设计基于编码器-解码器的层次化文档结构解析系统DSPS，采用多模态双向编码器与结构感知GRU解码器结合软掩码操作。
AI.result: DSPS在基准方法上取得显著提升，所有代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过提出新任务与高质量数据集，推动文档结构重建领域在NLP与CV方向的融合研究。

authors_text: Giulia Barbareschi,Midori Kawaguchi,Hiroki Kato,Masato Nagahiro,Kazuaki Takehuchi,Yoshifumi Shiiba,Shunichi Kasahara,Kai Kunze,Kouta Minamizawa
title: 'I am both here and there' Parallel Control of Multiple Robotic Avatars by Disabled Workers in a Café
title_zh: “我既在这里又在那里” 咖啡馆里残疾工人并行控制多个机器人化身
abstract: Robotic avatars can help disabled people extend their reach in interacting with the world. Technological advances make it possible for individuals to embody multiple avatars simultaneously. However, existing studies have been limited to laboratory conditions and did not involve disabled participants. In this paper, we present a real-world implementation of a parallel control system allowing disabled workers in a café to embody multiple robotic avatars at the same time to carry out different tasks. Our data corpus comprises semi-structured interviews with workers, customer surveys, and videos of café operations. Results indicate that the system increases workers' agency, enabling them to better manage customer journeys. Parallel embodiment and transitions between avatars create multiple interaction loops where the links between disabled workers and customers remain consistent, but the intermediary avatar changes. Based on our observations, we theorize that disabled individuals possess specific competencies that increase their ability to manage multiple avatar bodies.
summary: Robotic avatars can help disabled people extend their reach in interacting with the world. Technological advances make it possible for individuals to embody multiple avatars simultaneously. However, existing studies have been limited to laboratory conditions and did not involve disabled participants. In this paper, we present a real-world implementation of a parallel control system allowing disabled workers in a café to embody multiple robotic avatars at the same time to carry out different tasks. Our data corpus comprises semi-structured interviews with workers, customer surveys, and videos of café operations. Results indicate that the system increases workers' agency, enabling them to better manage customer journeys. Parallel embodiment and transitions between avatars create multiple interaction loops where the links between disabled workers and customers remain consistent, but the intermediary avatar changes. Based on our observations, we theorize that disabled individuals possess specific competencies that increase their ability to manage multiple avatar bodies.
abstract_zh: 机器人化身可以帮助残疾人扩大与世界互动的范围。技术进步使个人能够同时体现多个化身。然而，现有的研究仅限于实验室条件，并且没有涉及残疾参与者。在本文中，我们提出了并行控制系统的现实世界实现，允许咖啡馆中的残疾工人同时体现多个机器人化身来执行不同的任务。我们的数据集包括对员工的半结构化访谈、客户调查和咖啡馆运营视频。结果表明，该系统增强了员工的能动性，使他们能够更好地管理客户旅程。虚拟形象之间的并行体现和转换创建了多个交互循环，其中残疾工人和客户之间的链接保持一致，但中间虚拟形象发生了变化。根据我们的观察，我们推测残疾人拥有特定的能力，可以提高他们管理多个化身身体的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种允许残疾咖啡店员工同时控制多个机器人化身的并行控制系统，以增强其在真实环境中的任务执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多局限于实验室环境且未涉及残疾参与者，缺乏真实场景中残疾人群体使用多机器人化身的实践验证。
AI.method: 通过半结构化访谈、顾客调查及咖啡馆运营视频，收集残疾员工使用多机器人化身系统的数据并进行分析。
AI.result: 系统提升了员工的自主性，使其能更高效管理顾客流程；并行化身切换创造了稳定的交互循环，证明残疾个体具备管理多化身的独特能力。
AI.conclusion: 残疾人群体在多机器人化身控制中展现出特定能力，这为未来人机交互设计提供了新的理论视角。

search_text: 'I am both here and there' Parallel Control of Multiple Robotic Avatars by Disabled Workers in a Café “我既在这里又在那里” 咖啡馆里残疾工人并行控制多个机器人化身 Robotic avatars can help disabled people extend their reach in interacting with the world. Technological advances make it possible for individuals to embody multiple avatars simultaneously. However, existing studies have been limited to laboratory conditions and did not involve disabled participants. In this paper, we present a real-world implementation of a parallel control system allowing disabled workers in a café to embody multiple robotic avatars at the same time to carry out different tasks. Our data corpus comprises semi-structured interviews with workers, customer surveys, and videos of café operations. Results indicate that the system increases workers' agency, enabling them to better manage customer journeys. Parallel embodiment and transitions between avatars create multiple interaction loops where the links between disabled workers and customers remain consistent, but the intermediary avatar changes. Based on our observations, we theorize that disabled individuals possess specific competencies that increase their ability to manage multiple avatar bodies. 机器人化身可以帮助残疾人扩大与世界互动的范围。技术进步使个人能够同时体现多个化身。然而，现有的研究仅限于实验室条件，并且没有涉及残疾参与者。在本文中，我们提出了并行控制系统的现实世界实现，允许咖啡馆中的残疾工人同时体现多个机器人化身来执行不同的任务。我们的数据集包括对员工的半结构化访谈、客户调查和咖啡馆运营视频。结果表明，该系统增强了员工的能动性，使他们能够更好地管理客户旅程。虚拟形象之间的并行体现和转换创建了多个交互循环，其中残疾工人和客户之间的链接保持一致，但中间虚拟形象发生了变化。根据我们的观察，我们推测残疾人拥有特定的能力，可以提高他们管理多个化身身体的能力。 本文提出了一种允许残疾咖啡店员工同时控制多个机器人化身的并行控制系统，以增强其在真实环境中的任务执行能力。 Giulia Barbareschi,Midori Kawaguchi,Hiroki Kato,Masato Nagahiro,Kazuaki Takehuchi,Yoshifumi Shiiba,Shunichi Kasahara,Kai Kunze,Kouta Minamizawa cs.HC

authors_text: Wei-Jer Chang,Chen Tang,Chenran Li,Yeping Hu,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Wei Zhan
title: Editing Driver Character: Socially-Controllable Behavior Generation for Interactive Traffic Simulation
title_zh: 编辑驾驶员角色：交互式交通模拟的社会可控行为生成
abstract: Traffic simulation plays a crucial role in evaluating and improving autonomous driving planning systems. After being deployed on public roads, autonomous vehicles need to interact with human road participants with different social preferences (e.g., selfish or courteous human drivers). To ensure that autonomous vehicles take safe and efficient maneuvers in different interactive traffic scenarios, we should be able to evaluate autonomous vehicles against reactive agents with different social characteristics in the simulation environment. We propose a socially-controllable behavior generation (SCBG) model for this purpose, which allows the users to specify the level of courtesy of the generated trajectory while ensuring realistic and human-like trajectory generation through learning from real-world driving data. Specifically, we define a novel and differentiable measure to quantify the level of courtesy of driving behavior, leveraging marginal and conditional behavior prediction models trained from real-world driving data. The proposed courtesy measure allows us to auto-label the courtesy levels of trajectories from real-world driving data and conveniently train an SCBG model generating trajectories based on the input courtesy values. We examined the SCBG model on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset (WOMD) and showed that we were able to control the SCBG model to generate realistic driving behaviors with desired courtesy levels. Interestingly, we found that the SCBG model was able to identify different motion patterns of courteous behaviors according to the scenarios.
summary: Traffic simulation plays a crucial role in evaluating and improving autonomous driving planning systems. After being deployed on public roads, autonomous vehicles need to interact with human road participants with different social preferences (e.g., selfish or courteous human drivers). To ensure that autonomous vehicles take safe and efficient maneuvers in different interactive traffic scenarios, we should be able to evaluate autonomous vehicles against reactive agents with different social characteristics in the simulation environment. We propose a socially-controllable behavior generation (SCBG) model for this purpose, which allows the users to specify the level of courtesy of the generated trajectory while ensuring realistic and human-like trajectory generation through learning from real-world driving data. Specifically, we define a novel and differentiable measure to quantify the level of courtesy of driving behavior, leveraging marginal and conditional behavior prediction models trained from real-world driving data. The proposed courtesy measure allows us to auto-label the courtesy levels of trajectories from real-world driving data and conveniently train an SCBG model generating trajectories based on the input courtesy values. We examined the SCBG model on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset (WOMD) and showed that we were able to control the SCBG model to generate realistic driving behaviors with desired courtesy levels. Interestingly, we found that the SCBG model was able to identify different motion patterns of courteous behaviors according to the scenarios.
abstract_zh: 交通仿真在评估和改进自动驾驶规划系统方面发挥着至关重要的作用。在公共道路上部署后，自动驾驶汽车需要与具有不同社会偏好的人类道路参与者（例如自私或有礼貌的人类驾驶员）进行互动。为了确保自动驾驶汽车在不同的交互式交通场景中安全有效地进行操作，我们应该能够在模拟环境中针对具有不同社会特征的反应代理来评估自动驾驶汽车。为此，我们提出了一种社会可控行为生成（SCBG）模型，该模型允许用户指定生成轨迹的礼貌程度，同时通过从现实世界的驾驶数据中学习来确保生成真实且类似人类的轨迹。具体来说，我们定义了一种新颖且可微分的衡量标准，利用根据真实驾驶数据训练的边际和条件行为预测模型来量化驾驶行为的礼貌程度。所提出的礼让措施使我们能够根据现实世界的驾驶数据自动标记轨迹的礼让级别，并方便地训练 SCBG 模型，根据输入的礼让值生成轨迹。我们在 Waymo 开放运动数据集 (WOMD) 上检查了 SCBG 模型，结果表明我们能够控制 SCBG 模型以生成具有所需礼貌水平的真实驾驶行为。有趣的是，我们发现 SCBG 模型能够根据场景识别礼貌行为的不同运动模式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可社会控制的行为生成模型（SCBG），用于在交通模拟中生成具有特定礼貌水平的现实驾驶轨迹。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需在公共道路部署后与具有不同社会偏好的人类参与者交互，现有模拟环境难以生成具有不同社会特征的反应性代理行为。
AI.method: 通过定义可微分的礼貌度量标准，结合边缘和条件行为预测模型，利用真实驾驶数据训练SCBG模型，实现基于输入礼貌值的轨迹生成。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Motion Dataset上验证了SCBG模型能生成符合目标礼貌水平的现实驾驶行为，并能根据场景识别不同的礼貌行为模式。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为交互式交通模拟提供了可控的社会行为生成方案，有助于更全面评估自动驾驶系统的安全性和效率。

authors_text: Nitish Shukla
title: Efficient Mixed-Type Wafer Defect Pattern Recognition Using Compact Deformable Convolutional Transformers
title_zh: 使用紧凑型可变形卷积变压器进行高效混合型晶圆缺陷模式识别
abstract: Manufacturing wafers is an intricate task involving thousands of steps. Defect Pattern Recognition (DPR) of wafer maps is crucial to find the root cause of the issue and further improving the yield in the wafer foundry. Mixed-type DPR is much more complicated compared to single-type DPR due to varied spatial features, the uncertainty of defects, and the number of defects present. To accurately predict the number of defects as well as the types of defects, we propose a novel compact deformable convolutional transformer (DC Transformer). Specifically, DC Transformer focuses on the global features present in the wafer map by virtue of learnable deformable kernels and multi-head attention to the global features. The proposed method succinctly models the internal relationship between the wafer maps and the defects. DC Transformer is evaluated on a real dataset containing 38 defect patterns. Experimental results show that DC Transformer performs exceptionally well in recognizing both single and mixed-type defects. The proposed method outperforms the current state of the models by a considerable margin
summary: Manufacturing wafers is an intricate task involving thousands of steps. Defect Pattern Recognition (DPR) of wafer maps is crucial to find the root cause of the issue and further improving the yield in the wafer foundry. Mixed-type DPR is much more complicated compared to single-type DPR due to varied spatial features, the uncertainty of defects, and the number of defects present. To accurately predict the number of defects as well as the types of defects, we propose a novel compact deformable convolutional transformer (DC Transformer). Specifically, DC Transformer focuses on the global features present in the wafer map by virtue of learnable deformable kernels and multi-head attention to the global features. The proposed method succinctly models the internal relationship between the wafer maps and the defects. DC Transformer is evaluated on a real dataset containing 38 defect patterns. Experimental results show that DC Transformer performs exceptionally well in recognizing both single and mixed-type defects. The proposed method outperforms the current state of the models by a considerable margin
abstract_zh: 制造晶圆是一项复杂的任务，涉及数千个步骤。晶圆图的缺陷模式识别 (DPR) 对于找到问题的根本原因并进一步提高晶圆代工厂的产量至关重要。由于空间特征的变化、缺陷的不确定性以及存在的缺陷数量，混合型 DPR 比单一型 DPR 复杂得多。为了准确预测缺陷数量以及缺陷类型，我们提出了一种新型紧凑型可变形卷积变压器（DC Transformer）。具体来说，DC Transformer 凭借可学习的可变形内核和对全局特征的多头关注，重点关注晶圆图中存在的全局特征。所提出的方法简洁地模拟了晶圆图和缺陷之间的内部关系。 DC Transformer 在包含 38 个缺陷模式的真实数据集上进行评估。实验结果表明，DC Transformer 在识别单一和混合类型缺陷方面均表现出色。所提出的方法大大优于模型的当前状态

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种紧凑型可变形卷积变换器（DC Transformer），用于高效识别晶圆混合类型缺陷模式。
AI.motivation: 混合类型缺陷模式识别（DPR）因空间特征复杂、缺陷不确定性和数量多而更具挑战性，现有方法难以准确预测缺陷数量和类型。
AI.method: 设计紧凑型可变形卷积变换器，结合可学习的可变形内核与多头注意力机制，捕捉晶圆全局特征并建模缺陷与晶圆图的内部关系。
AI.result: 在包含38种缺陷模式的真实数据集上，DC Transformer在单类型和混合类型缺陷识别任务中显著优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: DC Transformer有效解决了混合类型晶圆缺陷识别难题，为提升晶圆制造良率提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content_json.result: 在包含38种缺陷模式的真实数据集上，DC Transformer在单类型和混合类型缺陷识别任务中显著优于现有模型。
ai_content_json.conclusion: DC Transformer有效解决了混合类型晶圆缺陷识别难题，为提升晶圆制造良率提供了高效解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种紧凑型可变形卷积变换器（DC Transformer），用于高效识别晶圆混合类型缺陷模式。
motivation: 混合类型缺陷模式识别（DPR）因空间特征复杂、缺陷不确定性和数量多而更具挑战性，现有方法难以准确预测缺陷数量和类型。
method: 设计紧凑型可变形卷积变换器，结合可学习的可变形内核与多头注意力机制，捕捉晶圆全局特征并建模缺陷与晶圆图的内部关系。
result: 在包含38种缺陷模式的真实数据集上，DC Transformer在单类型和混合类型缺陷识别任务中显著优于现有模型。
conclusion: DC Transformer有效解决了混合类型晶圆缺陷识别难题，为提升晶圆制造良率提供了高效解决方案。
search_text: Efficient Mixed-Type Wafer Defect Pattern Recognition Using Compact Deformable Convolutional Transformers 使用紧凑型可变形卷积变压器进行高效混合型晶圆缺陷模式识别 Manufacturing wafers is an intricate task involving thousands of steps. Defect Pattern Recognition (DPR) of wafer maps is crucial to find the root cause of the issue and further improving the yield in the wafer foundry. Mixed-type DPR is much more complicated compared to single-type DPR due to varied spatial features, the uncertainty of defects, and the number of defects present. To accurately predict the number of defects as well as the types of defects, we propose a novel compact deformable convolutional transformer (DC Transformer). Specifically, DC Transformer focuses on the global features present in the wafer map by virtue of learnable deformable kernels and multi-head attention to the global features. The proposed method succinctly models the internal relationship between the wafer maps and the defects. DC Transformer is evaluated on a real dataset containing 38 defect patterns. Experimental results show that DC Transformer performs exceptionally well in recognizing both single and mixed-type defects. The proposed method outperforms the current state of the models by a considerable margin 制造晶圆是一项复杂的任务，涉及数千个步骤。晶圆图的缺陷模式识别 (DPR) 对于找到问题的根本原因并进一步提高晶圆代工厂的产量至关重要。由于空间特征的变化、缺陷的不确定性以及存在的缺陷数量，混合型 DPR 比单一型 DPR 复杂得多。为了准确预测缺陷数量以及缺陷类型，我们提出了一种新型紧凑型可变形卷积变压器（DC Transformer）。具体来说，DC Transformer 凭借可学习的可变形内核和对全局特征的多头关注，重点关注晶圆图中存在的全局特征。所提出的方法简洁地模拟了晶圆图和缺陷之间的内部关系。 DC Transformer 在包含 38 个缺陷模式的真实数据集上进行评估。实验结果表明，DC Transformer 在识别单一和混合类型缺陷方面均表现出色。所提出的方法大大优于模型的当前状态 本文提出了一种紧凑型可变形卷积变换器（DC Transformer），用于高效识别晶圆混合类型缺陷模式。 Nitish Shukla cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Huantong Li,Xiangmiao Wu,Fanbing Lv,Daihai Liao,Thomas H. Li,Yonggang Zhang,Bo Han,Mingkui Tan
title: Hard Sample Matters a Lot in Zero-Shot Quantization
title_zh: 硬样本在零样本量化中非常重要
abstract: Zero-shot quantization (ZSQ) is promising for compressing and accelerating deep neural networks when the data for training full-precision models are inaccessible. In ZSQ, network quantization is performed using synthetic samples, thus, the performance of quantized models depends heavily on the quality of synthetic samples. Nonetheless, we find that the synthetic samples constructed in existing ZSQ methods can be easily fitted by models. Accordingly, quantized models obtained by these methods suffer from significant performance degradation on hard samples. To address this issue, we propose HArd sample Synthesizing and Training (HAST). Specifically, HAST pays more attention to hard samples when synthesizing samples and makes synthetic samples hard to fit when training quantized models. HAST aligns features extracted by full-precision and quantized models to ensure the similarity between features extracted by these two models. Extensive experiments show that HAST significantly outperforms existing ZSQ methods, achieving performance comparable to models that are quantized with real data.
summary: Zero-shot quantization (ZSQ) is promising for compressing and accelerating deep neural networks when the data for training full-precision models are inaccessible. In ZSQ, network quantization is performed using synthetic samples, thus, the performance of quantized models depends heavily on the quality of synthetic samples. Nonetheless, we find that the synthetic samples constructed in existing ZSQ methods can be easily fitted by models. Accordingly, quantized models obtained by these methods suffer from significant performance degradation on hard samples. To address this issue, we propose HArd sample Synthesizing and Training (HAST). Specifically, HAST pays more attention to hard samples when synthesizing samples and makes synthetic samples hard to fit when training quantized models. HAST aligns features extracted by full-precision and quantized models to ensure the similarity between features extracted by these two models. Extensive experiments show that HAST significantly outperforms existing ZSQ methods, achieving performance comparable to models that are quantized with real data.
abstract_zh: 当无法访问训练全精度模型的数据时，零样本量化（ZSQ）有望用于压缩和加速深度神经网络。在ZSQ中，网络量化是使用合成样本进行的，因此，量化模型的性能在很大程度上取决于合成样本的质量。尽管如此，我们发现现有 ZSQ 方法构建的合成样本可以很容易地通过模型拟合。因此，通过这些方法获得的量化模型在硬样本上的性能会显着下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了硬样本合成和训练（HAST）。具体来说，HAST在合成样本时更加关注硬样本，在训练量化模型时使合成样本难以拟合。 HAST将全精度和量化模型提取的特征进行对齐，以确保这两个模型提取的特征之间的相似性。大量实验表明，HAST 显着优于现有的 ZSQ 方法，其性能可与使用真实数据量化的模型相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HAST的方法，通过关注难以拟合的样本，改进零样本量化（ZSQ）中合成样本的质量，从而提升量化模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本量化方法生成的合成样本容易被模型拟合，导致在难以处理的样本上性能显著下降，亟需改进合成样本的质量以提升量化效果。
AI.method: HAST在合成样本时重点关注硬样本，并在训练量化模型时使合成样本更难拟合，同时通过对齐全精度模型与量化模型的特征来保证特征相似性。
AI.result: 实验表明，HAST显著优于现有ZSQ方法，在多个任务中达到接近使用真实数据量化模型的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性处理硬样本，HAST有效解决了零样本量化中因合成样本质量不足导致的性能退化问题。

authors_text: Zhiyang Guo,Wengang Zhou,Min Wang,Li Li,Houqiang Li
title: HandNeRF: Neural Radiance Fields for Animatable Interacting Hands
title_zh: HandNeRF：用于可动画交互手的神经辐射场
abstract: We propose a novel framework to reconstruct accurate appearance and geometry with neural radiance fields (NeRF) for interacting hands, enabling the rendering of photo-realistic images and videos for gesture animation from arbitrary views. Given multi-view images of a single hand or interacting hands, an off-the-shelf skeleton estimator is first employed to parameterize the hand poses. Then we design a pose-driven deformation field to establish correspondence from those different poses to a shared canonical space, where a pose-disentangled NeRF for one hand is optimized. Such unified modeling efficiently complements the geometry and texture cues in rarely-observed areas for both hands. Meanwhile, we further leverage the pose priors to generate pseudo depth maps as guidance for occlusion-aware density learning. Moreover, a neural feature distillation method is proposed to achieve cross-domain alignment for color optimization. We conduct extensive experiments to verify the merits of our proposed HandNeRF and report a series of state-of-the-art results both qualitatively and quantitatively on the large-scale InterHand2.6M dataset.
summary: We propose a novel framework to reconstruct accurate appearance and geometry with neural radiance fields (NeRF) for interacting hands, enabling the rendering of photo-realistic images and videos for gesture animation from arbitrary views. Given multi-view images of a single hand or interacting hands, an off-the-shelf skeleton estimator is first employed to parameterize the hand poses. Then we design a pose-driven deformation field to establish correspondence from those different poses to a shared canonical space, where a pose-disentangled NeRF for one hand is optimized. Such unified modeling efficiently complements the geometry and texture cues in rarely-observed areas for both hands. Meanwhile, we further leverage the pose priors to generate pseudo depth maps as guidance for occlusion-aware density learning. Moreover, a neural feature distillation method is proposed to achieve cross-domain alignment for color optimization. We conduct extensive experiments to verify the merits of our proposed HandNeRF and report a series of state-of-the-art results both qualitatively and quantitatively on the large-scale InterHand2.6M dataset.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的框架，通过用于交互手部的神经辐射场（NeRF）重建精确的外观和几何形状，从而能够从任意视图渲染逼真的手势动画图像和视频。给定单手或交互手的多视图图像，首先采用现成的骨架估计器来参数化手部姿势。然后，我们设计一个姿势驱动的变形场，以建立从这些不同姿势到共享规范空间的对应关系，其中优化了一只手的姿势解缠 NeRF。这种统一的建模有效地补充了双手很少观察到的区域的几何和纹理线索。同时，我们进一步利用姿势先验来生成伪深度图，作为遮挡感知密度学习的指导。此外，提出了一种神经特征蒸馏方法来实现颜色优化的跨域对齐。我们进行了大量的实验来验证我们提出的 HandNeRF 的优点，并在大规模 InterHand2.6M 数据集上定性和定量地报告了一系列最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HandNeRF框架，利用神经辐射场（NeRF）重建交互手的几何与外观，实现任意视角下手势动画的高质量渲染。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以准确重建交互手的几何结构与纹理信息，尤其在遮挡区域和动态姿态下效果不佳，需更高效的建模方法。
AI.method: 通过骨架估计参数化手部姿态，设计姿态驱动变形场对齐多视角数据至规范空间，优化分离姿态的NeRF；结合伪深度图与神经特征蒸馏提升遮挡区域重建与跨域对齐效果。
AI.result: 在InterHand2.6M数据集上实现定性和定量的SOTA结果，显著提升交互手动画的逼真度与几何准确性。
AI.conclusion: HandNeRF通过统一建模与多技术融合，有效解决了交互手重建难题，为手势动画生成提供了新范式。

authors_text: Benfeng Xu,Quan Wang,Zhendong Mao,Yajuan Lyu,Qiaoqiao She,Yongdong Zhang
title: $k$NN Prompting: Beyond-Context Learning with Calibration-Free Nearest Neighbor Inference
title_zh: $k$NN 提示：使用免校准最近邻推理进行超情境学习
comment: ICLR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/BenfengXu/KNNPrompting
comments: ICLR 2023. Code is available at https://github.com/BenfengXu/KNNPrompting
abstract: In-Context Learning (ICL), which formulates target tasks as prompt completion conditioned on in-context demonstrations, has become the prevailing utilization of LLMs. In this paper, we first disclose an actual predicament for this typical usage that it can not scale up with training data due to context length restriction. Besides, existing works have shown that ICL also suffers from various biases and requires delicate calibration treatment. To address both challenges, we advocate a simple and effective solution, $k$NN Prompting, which first queries LLM with training data for distributed representations, then predicts test instances by simply referring to nearest neighbors. We conduct comprehensive experiments to demonstrate its two-fold superiority: 1) Calibration-Free: $k$NN Prompting does not directly align LLM output distribution with task-specific label space, instead leverages such distribution to align test and training instances. It significantly outperforms state-of-the-art calibration-based methods under comparable few-shot scenario. 2) Beyond-Context: $k$NN Prompting can further scale up effectively with as many training data as are available, continually bringing substantial improvements. The scaling trend holds across 10 orders of magnitude ranging from 2 shots to 1024 shots as well as different LLMs scales ranging from 0.8B to 30B. It successfully bridges data scaling into model scaling, and brings new potentials for the gradient-free paradigm of LLM deployment. Code is publicly available.
summary: In-Context Learning (ICL), which formulates target tasks as prompt completion conditioned on in-context demonstrations, has become the prevailing utilization of LLMs. In this paper, we first disclose an actual predicament for this typical usage that it can not scale up with training data due to context length restriction. Besides, existing works have shown that ICL also suffers from various biases and requires delicate calibration treatment. To address both challenges, we advocate a simple and effective solution, $k$NN Prompting, which first queries LLM with training data for distributed representations, then predicts test instances by simply referring to nearest neighbors. We conduct comprehensive experiments to demonstrate its two-fold superiority: 1) Calibration-Free: $k$NN Prompting does not directly align LLM output distribution with task-specific label space, instead leverages such distribution to align test and training instances. It significantly outperforms state-of-the-art calibration-based methods under comparable few-shot scenario. 2) Beyond-Context: $k$NN Prompting can further scale up effectively with as many training data as are available, continually bringing substantial improvements. The scaling trend holds across 10 orders of magnitude ranging from 2 shots to 1024 shots as well as different LLMs scales ranging from 0.8B to 30B. It successfully bridges data scaling into model scaling, and brings new potentials for the gradient-free paradigm of LLM deployment. Code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 情境学习（ICL）将目标任务制定为以情境演示为条件迅速完成，已成为法学硕士的普遍使用。在本文中，我们首先揭示了这种典型用法的实际困境，即由于上下文长度限制，它无法扩展训练数据。此外，现有工作表明ICL也存在各种偏差，需要精细的校准处理。为了解决这两个挑战，我们提倡一种简单而有效的解决方案，$k$NN Prompting，它首先使用分布式表示的训练数据查询 LLM，然后通过简单地引用最近邻居来预测测试实例。我们进行了全面的实验来证明其双重优势：1）免校准：$k$NN 提示不会直接将 LLM 输出分布与特定于任务的标签空间对齐，而是利用这种分布来对齐测试和训练实例。在类似的少样本场景下，它的性能显着优于最先进的基于校准的方法。 2) 超越情境：$k$NN 提示可以利用尽可能多的可用训练数据进一步有效地扩大规模，不断带来实质性改进。缩放趋势保持在从 2 个镜头到 1024 个镜头的 10 个数量级以及从 0.8B 到 30B 的不同 LLM 尺度上。它成功地将数据扩展与模型扩展联系起来，并为 LLM 部署的无梯度范式带来了新的潜力。代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为$k$NN Prompting的方法，通过利用最近邻推理解决大语言模型（LLM）在上下文学习（ICL）中的局限性，实现无需校准且超越上下文长度的学习。
AI.motivation: 传统ICL受制于上下文长度限制且需要复杂校准，无法有效扩展训练数据。本文旨在提出一种无需校准、能利用更多训练数据的替代方案。
AI.method: 首先用LLM对训练数据生成分布式表示，然后通过查询最近邻直接预测测试样本，避免直接对齐输出分布与标签空间。
AI.result: 在少样本场景下显著优于现有校准方法，且在2到1024个样本及0.8B到30B不同规模LLM上均展现跨10个数量级的数据扩展优势。
AI.conclusion: $k$NN Prompting通过数据扩展弥补模型扩展不足，为无梯度LLM部署提供了新方向，同时解决了ICL的校准与扩展难题。

authors_text: Yiheng Xiong,Jingsong Liu,Kamilia Zaripova,Sahand Sharifzadeh,Matthias Keicher,Nassir Navab
title: Prior-RadGraphFormer: A Prior-Knowledge-Enhanced Transformer for Generating Radiology Graphs from X-Rays
title_zh: Prior-RadGraphFormer：用于从 X 射线生成放射学图的先验知识增强型转换器
abstract: The extraction of structured clinical information from free-text radiology reports in the form of radiology graphs has been demonstrated to be a valuable approach for evaluating the clinical correctness of report-generation methods. However, the direct generation of radiology graphs from chest X-ray (CXR) images has not been attempted. To address this gap, we propose a novel approach called Prior-RadGraphFormer that utilizes a transformer model with prior knowledge in the form of a probabilistic knowledge graph (PKG) to generate radiology graphs directly from CXR images. The PKG models the statistical relationship between radiology entities, including anatomical structures and medical observations. This additional contextual information enhances the accuracy of entity and relation extraction. The generated radiology graphs can be applied to various downstream tasks, such as free-text or structured reports generation and multi-label classification of pathologies. Our approach represents a promising method for generating radiology graphs directly from CXR images, and has significant potential for improving medical image analysis and clinical decision-making.
summary: The extraction of structured clinical information from free-text radiology reports in the form of radiology graphs has been demonstrated to be a valuable approach for evaluating the clinical correctness of report-generation methods. However, the direct generation of radiology graphs from chest X-ray (CXR) images has not been attempted. To address this gap, we propose a novel approach called Prior-RadGraphFormer that utilizes a transformer model with prior knowledge in the form of a probabilistic knowledge graph (PKG) to generate radiology graphs directly from CXR images. The PKG models the statistical relationship between radiology entities, including anatomical structures and medical observations. This additional contextual information enhances the accuracy of entity and relation extraction. The generated radiology graphs can be applied to various downstream tasks, such as free-text or structured reports generation and multi-label classification of pathologies. Our approach represents a promising method for generating radiology graphs directly from CXR images, and has significant potential for improving medical image analysis and clinical decision-making.
abstract_zh: 从放射学图表形式的自由文本放射学报告中提取结构化临床信息已被证明是评估报告生成方法的临床正确性的有价值的方法。然而，尚未尝试从胸部 X 射线 (CXR) 图像直接生成放射图。为了解决这一差距，我们提出了一种称为 Prior-RadGraphFormer 的新颖方法，该方法利用具有概率知识图 (PKG) 形式的先验知识的转换器模型直接从 CXR 图像生成放射图。 PKG 对放射学实体之间的统计关系进行建模，包括解剖结构和医学观察。这些额外的上下文信息提高了实体和关系提取的准确性。生成的放射学图可以应用于各种下游任务，例如自由文本或结构化报告生成以及病理学的多标签分类。我们的方法代表了一种直接从 CXR 图像生成放射图的有前途的方法，并且在改进医学图像分析和临床决策方面具有巨大的潜力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于先验知识增强的Transformer模型，直接从胸部X光图像生成放射学图，以提高临床信息提取的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖文本报告生成放射学图，而直接从医学影像生成尚未探索，需提升自动化水平并辅助临床决策。
AI.method: 设计Prior-RadGraphFormer模型，结合Transformer架构与概率知识图（PKG），利用解剖结构及病理间的统计关系增强实体与关系抽取。
AI.result: 生成的放射学图可有效支持下游任务（如结构化报告生成、多标签病理分类），验证了方法在医学影像分析中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为直接生成放射学图提供了新思路，有望推动医学影像分析与临床辅助决策系统的智能化发展。

authors_text: Zhe Jun Tang,Tat-Jen Cham,Haiyu Zhao
title: ABLE-NeRF: Attention-Based Rendering with Learnable Embeddings for Neural Radiance Field
title_zh: ABLE-NeRF：基于注意力的渲染，具有可学习嵌入的神经辐射场
comment: IEEE / CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR) 2023
comments: IEEE / CVF Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Conference (CVPR) 2023
abstract: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) is a popular method in representing 3D scenes by optimising a continuous volumetric scene function. Its large success which lies in applying volumetric rendering (VR) is also its Achilles' heel in producing view-dependent effects. As a consequence, glossy and transparent surfaces often appear murky. A remedy to reduce these artefacts is to constrain this VR equation by excluding volumes with back-facing normal. While this approach has some success in rendering glossy surfaces, translucent objects are still poorly represented. In this paper, we present an alternative to the physics-based VR approach by introducing a self-attention-based framework on volumes along a ray. In addition, inspired by modern game engines which utilise Light Probes to store local lighting passing through the scene, we incorporate Learnable Embeddings to capture view dependent effects within the scene. Our method, which we call ABLE-NeRF, significantly reduces `blurry' glossy surfaces in rendering and produces realistic translucent surfaces which lack in prior art. In the Blender dataset, ABLE-NeRF achieves SOTA results and surpasses Ref-NeRF in all 3 image quality metrics PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS.
summary: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) is a popular method in representing 3D scenes by optimising a continuous volumetric scene function. Its large success which lies in applying volumetric rendering (VR) is also its Achilles' heel in producing view-dependent effects. As a consequence, glossy and transparent surfaces often appear murky. A remedy to reduce these artefacts is to constrain this VR equation by excluding volumes with back-facing normal. While this approach has some success in rendering glossy surfaces, translucent objects are still poorly represented. In this paper, we present an alternative to the physics-based VR approach by introducing a self-attention-based framework on volumes along a ray. In addition, inspired by modern game engines which utilise Light Probes to store local lighting passing through the scene, we incorporate Learnable Embeddings to capture view dependent effects within the scene. Our method, which we call ABLE-NeRF, significantly reduces `blurry' glossy surfaces in rendering and produces realistic translucent surfaces which lack in prior art. In the Blender dataset, ABLE-NeRF achieves SOTA results and surpasses Ref-NeRF in all 3 image quality metrics PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 是一种通过优化连续体积场景函数来表示 3D 场景的流行方法。它的巨大成功在于应用体积渲染（VR），这也是它在产生依赖于视图的效果方面的致命弱点。因此，光滑和透明的表面常常显得暗淡。减少这些伪影的补救措施是通过排除具有背面法线的体积来约束该 VR 方程。虽然这种方法在渲染光泽表面方面取得了一些成功，但半透明对象的表现仍然很差。在本文中，我们通过引入基于自注意力的沿着射线体积的框架，提出了基于物理的 VR 方法的替代方案。此外，受现代游戏引擎利用光探针存储穿过场景的局部光照的启发，我们结合了可学习嵌入来捕获场景中与视图相关的效果。我们的方法，我们称之为 ABLE-NeRF，显着减少了渲染中的“模糊”光泽表面，并产生了现有技术所缺乏的逼真的半透明表面。在 Blender 数据集中，ABLE-NeRF 取得了 SOTA 的结果，并且在所有 3 个图像质量指标 PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS 上都超越了 Ref-NeRF。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自注意力机制和可学习嵌入的神经辐射场方法，用于改善NeRF在渲染光泽和透明物体时的效果。
AI.motivation: NeRF在渲染光泽和透明物体时存在模糊和不真实的问题，传统方法如排除反向法线体积虽有一定效果，但对半透明物体效果不佳。
AI.method: 引入基于自注意力机制的体积框架，并结合可学习嵌入以捕捉场景中的视点相关效果，从而改进NeRF的渲染效果。
AI.result: 在Blender数据集上，ABLE-NeRF在PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS三项图像质量指标上均优于Ref-NeRF，达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: ABLE-NeRF通过结合自注意力和可学习嵌入，显著提升了NeRF在渲染光泽和透明物体时的真实感和质量。

search_text: ABLE-NeRF: Attention-Based Rendering with Learnable Embeddings for Neural Radiance Field ABLE-NeRF：基于注意力的渲染，具有可学习嵌入的神经辐射场 Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) is a popular method in representing 3D scenes by optimising a continuous volumetric scene function. Its large success which lies in applying volumetric rendering (VR) is also its Achilles' heel in producing view-dependent effects. As a consequence, glossy and transparent surfaces often appear murky. A remedy to reduce these artefacts is to constrain this VR equation by excluding volumes with back-facing normal. While this approach has some success in rendering glossy surfaces, translucent objects are still poorly represented. In this paper, we present an alternative to the physics-based VR approach by introducing a self-attention-based framework on volumes along a ray. In addition, inspired by modern game engines which utilise Light Probes to store local lighting passing through the scene, we incorporate Learnable Embeddings to capture view dependent effects within the scene. Our method, which we call ABLE-NeRF, significantly reduces `blurry' glossy surfaces in rendering and produces realistic translucent surfaces which lack in prior art. In the Blender dataset, ABLE-NeRF achieves SOTA results and surpasses Ref-NeRF in all 3 image quality metrics PSNR, SSIM, LPIPS. 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 是一种通过优化连续体积场景函数来表示 3D 场景的流行方法。它的巨大成功在于应用体积渲染（VR），这也是它在产生依赖于视图的效果方面的致命弱点。因此，光滑和透明的表面常常显得暗淡。减少这些伪影的补救措施是通过排除具有背面法线的体积来约束该 VR 方程。虽然这种方法在渲染光泽表面方面取得了一些成功，但半透明对象的表现仍然很差。在本文中，我们通过引入基于自注意力的沿着射线体积的框架，提出了基于物理的 VR 方法的替代方案。此外，受现代游戏引擎利用光探针存储穿过场景的局部光照的启发，我们结合了可学习嵌入来捕获场景中与视图相关的效果。我们的方法，我们称之为 ABLE-NeRF，显着减少了渲染中的“模糊”光泽表面，并产生了现有技术所缺乏的逼真的半透明表面。在 Blender 数据集中，ABLE-NeRF 取得了 SOTA 的结果，并且在所有 3 个图像质量指标 PSNR、SSIM、LPIPS 上都超越了 Ref-NeRF。 本文提出了一种基于自注意力机制和可学习嵌入的神经辐射场方法，用于改善NeRF在渲染光泽和透明物体时的效果。 Zhe Jun Tang,Tat-Jen Cham,Haiyu Zhao cs.CV

authors_text: Bo Zhang,Boyu Jiang,Rong Zheng,Xiaoping Zhang,Jun Li,Qiang Xu
title: Pi-ViMo: Physiology-inspired Robust Vital Sign Monitoring using mmWave Radars
title_zh: Pi-ViMo：利用毫米波雷达进行受生理学启发的稳健生命体征监测
abstract: Continuous monitoring of human vital signs using non-contact mmWave radars is attractive due to their ability to penetrate garments and operate under different lighting conditions. Unfortunately, most prior research requires subjects to stay at a fixed distance from radar sensors and to remain still during monitoring. These restrictions limit the applications of radar vital sign monitoring in real life scenarios. In this paper, we address these limitations and present "Pi-ViMo", a non-contact Physiology-inspired Robust Vital Sign Monitoring system, using mmWave radars. We first derive a multi-scattering point model for the human body, and introduce a coherent combining of multiple scatterings to enhance the quality of estimated chest-wall movements. It enables vital sign estimations of subjects at any location in a radar's field of view. We then propose a template matching method to extract human vital signs by adopting physical models of respiration and cardiac activities. The proposed method is capable to separate respiration and heartbeat in the presence of micro-level random body movements (RBM) when a subject is at any location within the field of view of a radar. Experiments in a radar testbed show average respiration rate errors of 6% and heart rate errors of 11.9% for the stationary subjects and average errors of 13.5% for respiration rate and 13.6% for heart rate for subjects under different RBMs.
summary: Continuous monitoring of human vital signs using non-contact mmWave radars is attractive due to their ability to penetrate garments and operate under different lighting conditions. Unfortunately, most prior research requires subjects to stay at a fixed distance from radar sensors and to remain still during monitoring. These restrictions limit the applications of radar vital sign monitoring in real life scenarios. In this paper, we address these limitations and present "Pi-ViMo", a non-contact Physiology-inspired Robust Vital Sign Monitoring system, using mmWave radars. We first derive a multi-scattering point model for the human body, and introduce a coherent combining of multiple scatterings to enhance the quality of estimated chest-wall movements. It enables vital sign estimations of subjects at any location in a radar's field of view. We then propose a template matching method to extract human vital signs by adopting physical models of respiration and cardiac activities. The proposed method is capable to separate respiration and heartbeat in the presence of micro-level random body movements (RBM) when a subject is at any location within the field of view of a radar. Experiments in a radar testbed show average respiration rate errors of 6% and heart rate errors of 11.9% for the stationary subjects and average errors of 13.5% for respiration rate and 13.6% for heart rate for subjects under different RBMs.
abstract_zh: 使用非接触式毫米波雷达连续监测人体生命体征很有吸引力，因为它们能够穿透衣服并在不同的照明条件下运行。不幸的是，大多数先前的研究要求受试者与雷达传感器保持固定距离，并在监测过程中保持静止。这些限制限制了雷达生命体征监测在现实生活场景中的应用。在本文中，我们解决了这些局限性，并提出了“Pi-ViMo”，这是一种使用毫米波雷达的非接触式生理学启发的鲁棒生命体征监测系统。我们首先推导出人体的多散射点模型，并引入多个散射的连贯组合以提高估计胸壁运动的质量。它可以对雷达视野内任何位置的对象进行生命体征估计。然后，我们提出了一种模板匹配方法，通过采用呼吸和心脏活动的物理模型来提取人体生命体征。当对象位于雷达视场内的任何位置时，所提出的方法能够在存在微级随机身体运动（RBM）的情况下分离呼吸和心跳。在雷达试验台上进行的实验显示，静止受试者的平均呼吸率误差为 6%，心率误差为 11.9%，不同 RBM 下的受试者呼吸率平均误差为 13.5%，心率平均误差为 13.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于毫米波雷达的非接触式生理启发型鲁棒生命体征监测系统Pi-ViMo，可在不同距离和微小身体运动下实现呼吸和心率的准确估计。
AI.motivation: 现有毫米波雷达生命体征监测方法要求被测者保持静止且固定距离，限制了实际应用场景。需开发更灵活鲁棒的监测系统以适应真实环境。
AI.method: 建立人体多散射点模型并通过相干合成增强胸壁运动估计；采用呼吸和心脏活动的物理模型进行模板匹配，分离呼吸与心跳信号并消除微小身体运动干扰。
AI.result: 静态被测者呼吸率误差6%、心率误差11.9%；存在微小身体运动时呼吸率误差13.5%、心率误差13.6%。
AI.conclusion: Pi-ViMo通过物理模型与信号处理结合，实现了无需固定位置和静止状态的生命体征监测，显著提升了毫米波雷达在真实场景中的应用鲁棒性。

authors_text: Ashwin Prakash,Thejaswin S,Athira Nambiar,Alexandre Bernardino
title: Multimodal Adaptive Fusion of Face and Gait Features using Keyless attention based Deep Neural Networks for Human Identification
title_zh: 使用基于无钥匙注意的深度神经网络进行面部和步态特征的多模态自适应融合进行人体识别
abstract: Biometrics plays a significant role in vision-based surveillance applications. Soft biometrics such as gait is widely used with face in surveillance tasks like person recognition and re-identification. Nevertheless, in practical scenarios, classical fusion techniques respond poorly to changes in individual users and in the external environment. To this end, we propose a novel adaptive multi-biometric fusion strategy for the dynamic incorporation of gait and face biometric cues by leveraging keyless attention deep neural networks. Various external factors such as viewpoint and distance to the camera, are investigated in this study. Extensive experiments have shown superior performanceof the proposed model compared with the state-of-the-art model.
summary: Biometrics plays a significant role in vision-based surveillance applications. Soft biometrics such as gait is widely used with face in surveillance tasks like person recognition and re-identification. Nevertheless, in practical scenarios, classical fusion techniques respond poorly to changes in individual users and in the external environment. To this end, we propose a novel adaptive multi-biometric fusion strategy for the dynamic incorporation of gait and face biometric cues by leveraging keyless attention deep neural networks. Various external factors such as viewpoint and distance to the camera, are investigated in this study. Extensive experiments have shown superior performanceof the proposed model compared with the state-of-the-art model.
abstract_zh: 生物识别技术在基于视觉的监控应用中发挥着重要作用。步态等软生物识别技术广泛应用于人脸识别和重新识别等监控任务中。然而，在实际场景中，经典融合技术对个体用户和外部环境的变化响应较差。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应多生物特征融合策略，通过利用无钥匙注意深度神经网络来动态融合步态和面部生物特征线索。本研究研究了各种外部因素，例如视点和距相机的距离。大量的实验表明，与最先进的模型相比，所提出的模型具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于无密钥注意力机制的深度神经网络，用于自适应融合人脸和步态特征，以提高人体识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统融合技术难以应对用户个体差异和外部环境变化，需更灵活的多模态融合方法提升识别鲁棒性。
AI.method: 利用无密钥注意力机制的深度神经网络，动态融合人脸和步态特征，考虑视角、距离等外部因素，实现自适应多模态信息整合。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该模型在多种场景下的性能优于现有先进方法，具有更高的识别准确率和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应融合策略有效解决了传统方法的局限性，为复杂环境下的生物识别提供了更可靠的技术方案。

search_text: Multimodal Adaptive Fusion of Face and Gait Features using Keyless attention based Deep Neural Networks for Human Identification 使用基于无钥匙注意的深度神经网络进行面部和步态特征的多模态自适应融合进行人体识别 Biometrics plays a significant role in vision-based surveillance applications. Soft biometrics such as gait is widely used with face in surveillance tasks like person recognition and re-identification. Nevertheless, in practical scenarios, classical fusion techniques respond poorly to changes in individual users and in the external environment. To this end, we propose a novel adaptive multi-biometric fusion strategy for the dynamic incorporation of gait and face biometric cues by leveraging keyless attention deep neural networks. Various external factors such as viewpoint and distance to the camera, are investigated in this study. Extensive experiments have shown superior performanceof the proposed model compared with the state-of-the-art model. 生物识别技术在基于视觉的监控应用中发挥着重要作用。步态等软生物识别技术广泛应用于人脸识别和重新识别等监控任务中。然而，在实际场景中，经典融合技术对个体用户和外部环境的变化响应较差。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应多生物特征融合策略，通过利用无钥匙注意深度神经网络来动态融合步态和面部生物特征线索。本研究研究了各种外部因素，例如视点和距相机的距离。大量的实验表明，与最先进的模型相比，所提出的模型具有优越的性能。 提出一种基于无密钥注意力机制的深度神经网络，用于自适应融合人脸和步态特征，以提高人体识别的准确性。 Ashwin Prakash,Thejaswin S,Athira Nambiar,Alexandre Bernardino cs.CV

authors_text: Hongjun Wang,Yisen Wang
title: Generalist: Decoupling Natural and Robust Generalization
title_zh: 通才：解耦自然和鲁棒泛化
abstract: Deep neural networks obtained by standard training have been constantly plagued by adversarial examples. Although adversarial training demonstrates its capability to defend against adversarial examples, unfortunately, it leads to an inevitable drop in the natural generalization. To address the issue, we decouple the natural generalization and the robust generalization from joint training and formulate different training strategies for each one. Specifically, instead of minimizing a global loss on the expectation over these two generalization errors, we propose a bi-expert framework called \emph{Generalist} where we simultaneously train base learners with task-aware strategies so that they can specialize in their own fields. The parameters of base learners are collected and combined to form a global learner at intervals during the training process. The global learner is then distributed to the base learners as initialized parameters for continued training. Theoretically, we prove that the risks of Generalist will get lower once the base learners are well trained. Extensive experiments verify the applicability of Generalist to achieve high accuracy on natural examples while maintaining considerable robustness to adversarial ones. Code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ML/Generalist.
summary: Deep neural networks obtained by standard training have been constantly plagued by adversarial examples. Although adversarial training demonstrates its capability to defend against adversarial examples, unfortunately, it leads to an inevitable drop in the natural generalization. To address the issue, we decouple the natural generalization and the robust generalization from joint training and formulate different training strategies for each one. Specifically, instead of minimizing a global loss on the expectation over these two generalization errors, we propose a bi-expert framework called \emph{Generalist} where we simultaneously train base learners with task-aware strategies so that they can specialize in their own fields. The parameters of base learners are collected and combined to form a global learner at intervals during the training process. The global learner is then distributed to the base learners as initialized parameters for continued training. Theoretically, we prove that the risks of Generalist will get lower once the base learners are well trained. Extensive experiments verify the applicability of Generalist to achieve high accuracy on natural examples while maintaining considerable robustness to adversarial ones. Code is available at https://github.com/PKU-ML/Generalist.
abstract_zh: 通过标准训练获得的深度神经网络一直受到对抗性例子的困扰。尽管对抗性训练展示了其抵御对抗性例子的能力，但不幸的是，它不可避免地导致自然泛化能力的下降。为了解决这个问题，我们将自然泛化和鲁棒泛化与联合训练解耦，并为每一个制定不同的训练策略。具体来说，我们不是最小化这两个泛化错误的期望的全局损失，而是提出了一个名为 \emph{Generalist} 的双专家框架，在该框架中，我们同时使用任务感知策略来训练基础学习者，以便他们能够专注于自己的领域。在训练过程中，每隔一定时间收集并组合基础学习器的参数以形成全局学习器。然后将全局学习器分发给基础学习器作为继续训练的初始化参数。理论上，我们证明，一旦基础学习器得到良好的训练，通才的风险就会降低。大量的实验验证了 Generalist 在自然示例上实现高精度的适用性，同时对对抗性示例保持相当大的鲁棒性。代码可在 https://github.com/PKU-ML/Generalist 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出名为Generalist的双专家框架，通过解耦自然泛化与鲁棒泛化训练过程，解决对抗训练导致的自然准确率下降问题。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练虽能提升模型鲁棒性，但会显著降低模型在自然数据上的泛化能力，现有方法难以兼顾两者。
AI.method: 设计双专家框架，分别训练专注自然任务和鲁棒性的基学习器，通过周期性参数聚合与分配实现协同优化。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在保持对抗鲁棒性的同时，自然数据准确率优于现有对抗训练方法。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析与实验验证证明，解耦训练策略能有效平衡模型的自然泛化与对抗鲁棒性。
